Step 1: Editor Scene Foundation
javascript
// scenes/EditorScene.js

class EditorScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    constructor() {
        super({ key: 'EditorScene' });
    }
    
    init() {
        this.editorState = {
            mode: 'SELECT', // SELECT, MOVE, ROTATE, SCALE, DELETE, PLACE
            selectedObjects: [],
            clipboard: [],
            gridEnabled: true,
            gridSize: 32,
            snapToGrid: true,
            showGizmos: true,
            currentLayer: 'default'
        };
        
        this.sceneData = {
            objects: [],
            cameras: [],
            lights: [],
            metadata: {
                name: 'Untitled Scene',
                created: new Date().toISOString(),
                modified: new Date().toISOString()
            }
        };
        
        this.undoStack = [];
        this.redoStack = [];
        this.maxUndoSteps = 50;
        
        this.prefabs = new Map();
        this.layers = new Map();
        
        // UI elements
        this.uiElements = {};
    }
    
    create() {
        // Set up camera
        this.editorCamera = this.cameras.main;
        this.editorCamera.setBounds(0, 0, 2400, 1600);
        
        // Create grid
        this.createGrid();
        
        // Create UI
        this.createToolbar();
        this.createObjectPalette();
        this.createInspectorPanel();
        this.createHierarchyPanel();
        
        // Set up input
        this.setupInputHandlers();
        
        // Load prefabs
        this.loadPrefabs();
        
        // Create initial layers
        this.createLayer('background', 0);
        this.createLayer('default', 1);
        this.createLayer('foreground', 2);
        this.createLayer('ui', 3);
        
        console.log('[EditorScene] Editor initialized');
    }
    
    // === GRID SYSTEM ===
    
    createGrid() {
        const width = 2400;
        const height = 1600;
        const cellSize = this.editorState.gridSize;
        
        // Create grid graphics
        this.gridGraphics = this.add.graphics();
        this.gridGraphics.setDepth(-1000);
        
        this.redrawGrid();
    }
    
    redrawGrid() {
        this.gridGraphics.clear();
        
        if (!this.editorState.gridEnabled) return;
        
        const width = 2400;
        const height = 1600;
        const cellSize = this.editorState.gridSize;
        
        // Minor grid lines
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(1, 0x333333, 0.3);
        
        for (let x = 0; x <= width; x += cellSize) {
            this.gridGraphics.lineBetween(x, 0, x, height);
        }
        
        for (let y = 0; y <= height; y += cellSize) {
            this.gridGraphics.lineBetween(0, y, width, y);
        }
        
        // Major grid lines (every 5 cells)
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(1, 0x666666, 0.5);
        
        for (let x = 0; x <= width; x += cellSize * 5) {
            this.gridGraphics.lineBetween(x, 0, x, height);
        }
        
        for (let y = 0; y <= height; y += cellSize * 5) {
            this.gridGraphics.lineBetween(0, y, width, y);
        }
        
        // Origin lines
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0xff0000, 0.8);
        this.gridGraphics.lineBetween(0, 0, width, 0); // X axis
        
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0x00ff00, 0.8);
        this.gridGraphics.lineBetween(0, 0, 0, height); // Y axis
    }
    
    snapToGrid(x, y) {
        if (!this.editorState.snapToGrid) {
            return { x, y };
        }
        
        const cellSize = this.editorState.gridSize;
        return {
            x: Math.round(x / cellSize) * cellSize,
            y: Math.round(y / cellSize) * cellSize
        };
    }
    
    // === TOOLBAR ===
    
    createToolbar() {
        const toolbar = document.createElement('div');
        toolbar.id = 'editor-toolbar';
        toolbar.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 50px;
            background: #2a2a2a;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #444;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 0 10px;
            z-index: 1000;
            font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        `;
        
        // File menu
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, 'New Scene', () => this.newScene());
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, 'Open', () => this.openScene());
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, 'Save', () => this.saveScene());
        
        this.createToolbarSeparator(toolbar);
        
        // Edit menu
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, 'Undo', () => this.undo(), 'Ctrl+Z');
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, 'Redo', () => this.redo(), 'Ctrl+Y');
        
        this.createToolbarSeparator(toolbar);
        
        // Tool modes
        this.createToolbarToggle(toolbar, 'Select', 'SELECT', () => this.setMode('SELECT'));
        this.createToolbarToggle(toolbar, 'Move', 'MOVE', () => this.setMode('MOVE'));
        this.createToolbarToggle(toolbar, 'Rotate', 'ROTATE', () => this.setMode('ROTATE'));
        this.createToolbarToggle(toolbar, 'Scale', 'SCALE', () => this.setMode('SCALE'));
        this.createToolbarToggle(toolbar, 'Delete', 'DELETE', () => this.setMode('DELETE'));
        
        this.createToolbarSeparator(toolbar);
        
        // Grid controls
        this.createToolbarCheckbox(toolbar, 'Grid', this.editorState.gridEnabled, 
            (checked) => this.toggleGrid(checked));
        this.createToolbarCheckbox(toolbar, 'Snap', this.editorState.snapToGrid,
            (checked) => this.toggleSnap(checked));
        
        this.createToolbarSeparator(toolbar);
        
        // Play/Pause
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, '▶ Play', () => this.playScene());
        this.createToolbarButton(toolbar, '⏸ Pause', () => this.pauseScene());
        
        document.body.appendChild(toolbar);
        this.uiElements.toolbar = toolbar;
    }
    
    createToolbarButton(parent, text, onClick, tooltip = '') {
        const button = document.createElement('button');
        button.textContent = text;
        button.title = tooltip;
        button.style.cssText = `
            padding: 5px 15px;
            margin: 0 5px;
            background: #444;
            color: #fff;
            border: 1px solid #666;
            border-radius: 3px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 13px;
        `;
        
        button.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            button.style.background = '#555';
        });
        
        button.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            button.style.background = '#444';
        });
        
        button.addEventListener('click', onClick);
        
        parent.appendChild(button);
        return button;
    }
    
    createToolbarToggle(parent, text, mode, onClick) {
        const button = this.createToolbarButton(parent, text, () => {
            onClick();
            this.updateToolbarToggles();
        });
        
        button.dataset.mode = mode;
        return button;
    }
    
    updateToolbarToggles() {
        const buttons = this.uiElements.toolbar.querySelectorAll('[data-mode]');
        buttons.forEach(button => {
            if (button.dataset.mode === this.editorState.mode) {
                button.style.background = '#0066cc';
                button.style.borderColor = '#0088ff';
            } else {
                button.style.background = '#444';
                button.style.borderColor = '#666';
            }
        });
    }
    
    createToolbarCheckbox(parent, label, checked, onChange) {
        const container = document.createElement('label');
        container.style.cssText = `
            margin: 0 10px;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 13px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
        `;
        
        const checkbox = document.createElement('input');
        checkbox.type = 'checkbox';
        checkbox.checked = checked;
        checkbox.style.marginRight = '5px';
        
        checkbox.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            onChange(e.target.checked);
        });
        
        const span = document.createElement('span');
        span.textContent = label;
        
        container.appendChild(checkbox);
        container.appendChild(span);
        parent.appendChild(container);
        
        return checkbox;
    }
    
    createToolbarSeparator(parent) {
        const separator = document.createElement('div');
        separator.style.cssText = `
            width: 1px;
            height: 30px;
            background: #666;
            margin: 0 10px;
        `;
        parent.appendChild(separator);
    }
    
    // === OBJECT PALETTE ===
    
    createObjectPalette() {
        const palette = document.createElement('div');
        palette.id = 'object-palette';
        palette.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed;
            top: 52px;
            left: 0;
            width: 200px;
            bottom: 0;
            background: #2a2a2a;
            border-right: 2px solid #444;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
            padding: 10px;
        `;
        
        // Title
        const title = document.createElement('h3');
        title.textContent = 'Objects';
        title.style.cssText = `
            color: #fff;
            margin: 0 0 10px 0;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: bold;
        `;
        palette.appendChild(title);
        
        // Categories
        const categories = [
            {
                name: 'Entities',
                items: [
                    { type: 'player', label: 'Player', icon: '👤' },
                    { type: 'enemy', label: 'Enemy', icon: '👹' },
                    { type: 'npc', label: 'NPC', icon: '🧙' }
                ]
            },
            {
                name: 'Environment',
                items: [
                    { type: 'tree', label: 'Tree', icon: '🌳' },
                    { type: 'rock', label: 'Rock', icon: '🪨' },
                    { type: 'water', label: 'Water', icon: '💧' }
                ]
            },
            {
                name: 'Items',
                items: [
                    { type: 'chest', label: 'Chest', icon: '📦' },
                    { type: 'potion', label: 'Potion', icon: '🧪' },
                    { type: 'weapon', label: 'Weapon', icon: '⚔️' }
                ]
            },
            {
                name: 'Lights',
                items: [
                    { type: 'point_light', label: 'Point Light', icon: '💡' },
                    { type: 'spot_light', label: 'Spot Light', icon: '🔦' },
                    { type: 'ambient_light', label: 'Ambient Light', icon: '☀️' }
                ]
            },
            {
                name: 'Zones',
                items: [
                    { type: 'trigger', label: 'Trigger Zone', icon: '📍' },
                    { type: 'spawn', label: 'Spawn Point', icon: '🎯' },
                    { type: 'camera_zone', label: 'Camera Zone', icon: '📷' }
                ]
            }
        ];
        
        categories.forEach(category => {
            this.createPaletteCategory(palette, category);
        });
        
        document.body.appendChild(palette);
        this.uiElements.palette = palette;
    }
    
    createPaletteCategory(parent, category) {
        // Category header
        const header = document.createElement('div');
        header.textContent = category.name;
        header.style.cssText = `
            color: #aaa;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin: 15px 0 5px 0;
            padding: 5px;
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 3px;
        `;
        parent.appendChild(header);
        
        // Items
        category.items.forEach(item => {
            const itemDiv = document.createElement('div');
            itemDiv.style.cssText = `
                padding: 8px;
                margin: 3px 0;
                background: #333;
                border: 1px solid #444;
                border-radius: 3px;
                cursor: grab;
                color: #fff;
                font-size: 13px;
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
            `;
            
            itemDiv.innerHTML = `
                <span style="margin-right: 8px; font-size: 16px;">${item.icon}</span>
                <span>${item.label}</span>
            `;
            
            // Drag and drop
            itemDiv.draggable = true;
            itemDiv.dataset.objectType = item.type;
            
            itemDiv.addEventListener('dragstart', (e) => {
                e.dataTransfer.setData('objectType', item.type);
                itemDiv.style.opacity = '0.5';
            });
            
            itemDiv.addEventListener('dragend', () => {
                itemDiv.style.opacity = '1';
            });
            
            itemDiv.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                itemDiv.style.background = '#444';
            });
            
            itemDiv.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                itemDiv.style.background = '#333';
            });
            
            parent.appendChild(itemDiv);
        });
    }
    
    // === INSPECTOR PANEL ===
    
    createInspectorPanel() {
        const panel = document.createElement('div');
        panel.id = 'inspector-panel';
        panel.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed;
            top: 52px;
            right: 0;
            width: 300px;
            bottom: 0;
            background: #2a2a2a;
            border-left: 2px solid #444;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
            padding: 10px;
        `;
        
        // Title
        const title = document.createElement('h3');
        title.textContent = 'Inspector';
        title.style.cssText = `
            color: #fff;
            margin: 0 0 10px 0;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: bold;
        `;
        panel.appendChild(title);
        
        // Content area
        const content = document.createElement('div');
        content.id = 'inspector-content';
        content.style.cssText = `
            color: #aaa;
            font-size: 13px;
        `;
        content.textContent = 'No object selected';
        panel.appendChild(content);
        
        document.body.appendChild(panel);
        this.uiElements.inspector = panel;
        this.uiElements.inspectorContent = content;
    }
    
    updateInspector(gameObject) {
        const content = this.uiElements.inspectorContent;
        content.innerHTML = '';
        
        if (!gameObject) {
            content.textContent = 'No object selected';
            return;
        }
        
        // Object name
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Name', gameObject.name || 'Unnamed', 'text', 
            (value) => {
                gameObject.name = value;
                this.recordUndo('Rename object');
            });
        
        // Transform section
        this.createInspectorSection(content, 'Transform');
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Position X', gameObject.x, 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.x = parseFloat(value);
                this.recordUndo('Move object');
            });
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Position Y', gameObject.y, 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.y = parseFloat(value);
                this.recordUndo('Move object');
            });
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Rotation', 
            Phaser.Math.RadToDeg(gameObject.rotation), 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.rotation = Phaser.Math.DegToRad(parseFloat(value));
                this.recordUndo('Rotate object');
            });
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Scale X', gameObject.scaleX, 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.scaleX = parseFloat(value);
                this.recordUndo('Scale object');
            }, 0.01);
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Scale Y', gameObject.scaleY, 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.scaleY = parseFloat(value);
                this.recordUndo('Scale object');
            }, 0.01);
        
        // Appearance section
        this.createInspectorSection(content, 'Appearance');
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Visible', gameObject.visible, 'checkbox',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.setVisible(value);
                this.recordUndo('Toggle visibility');
            });
        
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Alpha', gameObject.alpha, 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.setAlpha(parseFloat(value));
                this.recordUndo('Change alpha');
            }, 0.01);
        
        if (gameObject.tintTopLeft !== undefined) {
            this.createInspectorField(content, 'Tint', 
                '#' + gameObject.tintTopLeft.toString(16).padStart(6, '0'), 
                'color',
                (value) => {
                    const color = parseInt(value.replace('#', ''), 16);
                    gameObject.setTint(color);
                    this.recordUndo('Change tint');
                });
        }
        
        // Depth
        this.createInspectorField(content, 'Depth', gameObject.depth, 'number',
            (value) => {
                gameObject.setDepth(parseInt(value));
                this.recordUndo('Change depth');
            });
        
        // Custom properties (if any)
        if (gameObject.editorData) {
            this.createInspectorSection(content, 'Custom Properties');
            
            Object.keys(gameObject.editorData).forEach(key => {
                this.createInspectorField(content, key, gameObject.editorData[key], 
                    'text',
                    (value) => {
                        gameObject.editorData[key] = value;
                        this.recordUndo(`Change ${key}`);
                    });
            });
        }
        
        // Add custom property button
        const addButton = document.createElement('button');
        addButton.textContent = '+ Add Property';
        addButton.style.cssText = `
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            margin-top: 10px;
            background: #444;
            color: #fff;
            border: 1px solid #666;
            border-radius: 3px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 12px;
        `;
        
        addButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const propName = prompt('Property name:');
            if (propName) {
                if (!gameObject.editorData) {
                    gameObject.editorData = {};
                }
                gameObject.editorData[propName] = '';
                this.updateInspector(gameObject);
                this.recordUndo('Add property');
            }
        });
        
        content.appendChild(addButton);
    }
    
    createInspectorSection(parent, title) {
        const section = document.createElement('div');
        section.style.cssText = `
            margin-top: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            padding: 5px;
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 3px;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: bold;
        `;
        section.textContent = title;
        parent.appendChild(section);
    }
    
    createInspectorField(parent, label, value, type, onChange, step = 1) {
        const field = document.createElement('div');
        field.style.cssText = `
            margin: 8px 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        `;
        
        const labelSpan = document.createElement('span');
        labelSpan.textContent = label;
        labelSpan.style.cssText = `
            color: #aaa;
            font-size: 12px;
            flex: 1;
        `;
        
        let input;
        
        if (type === 'checkbox') {
            input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'checkbox';
            input.checked = value;
            input.style.cssText = `
                margin-left: 10px;
            `;
        } else if (type === 'color') {
            input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = 'color';
            input.value = value;
            input.style.cssText = `
                margin-left: 10px;
                width: 50px;
                height: 25px;
                border: none;
                cursor: pointer;
            `;
        } else {
            input = document.createElement('input');
            input.type = type;
            input.value = value;
            if (type === 'number') {
                input.step = step;
            }
            input.style.cssText = `
                margin-left: 10px;
                padding: 4px 8px;
                background: #333;
                color: #fff;
                border: 1px solid #555;
                border-radius: 3px;
                width: 100px;
                font-size: 12px;
            `;
        }
        
        // Live update as user types
        input.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            const newValue = type === 'checkbox' ? e.target.checked : 
                           type === 'number' ? parseFloat(e.target.value) :
                           e.target.value;
            onChange(newValue);
        });
        
        field.appendChild(labelSpan);
        field.appendChild(input);
        parent.appendChild(field);
        
        return input;
    }
    
    // === HIERARCHY PANEL ===
    
    createHierarchyPanel() {
        const panel = document.createElement('div');
        panel.id = 'hierarchy-panel';
        panel.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed;
            top: 52px;
            left: 202px;
            width: 250px;
            height: 300px;
            background: #2a2a2a;
            border: 2px solid #444;
            border-radius: 3px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
            padding: 10px;
        `;
        
        // Title
        const title = document.createElement('h3');
        title.textContent = 'Hierarchy';
        title.style.cssText = `
            color: #fff;
            margin: 0 0 10px 0;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: bold;
        `;
        panel.appendChild(title);
        
        // Object list
        const list = document.createElement('div');
        list.id = 'hierarchy-list';
        panel.appendChild(list);
        
        document.body.appendChild(panel);
        this.uiElements.hierarchy = panel;
        this.uiElements.hierarchyList = list;
        
        // Make panel draggable
        this.makeDraggable(panel, title);
    }
    
    updateHierarchy() {
        const list = this.uiElements.hierarchyList;
        list.innerHTML = '';
        
        // Group objects by layer
        const layers = new Map();
        
        this.sceneData.objects.forEach(obj => {
            const layerName = obj.layer || 'default';
            if (!layers.has(layerName)) {
                layers.set(layerName, []);
            }
            layers.get(layerName).push(obj);
        });
        
        // Display by layer
        layers.forEach((objects, layerName) => {
            // Layer header
            const layerHeader = document.createElement('div');
            layerHeader.textContent = `📁 ${layerName}`;
            layerHeader.style.cssText = `
                padding: 5px;
                margin: 5px 0;
                background: #333;
                color: #aaa;
                font-size: 12px;
                font-weight: bold;
                border-radius: 3px;
                cursor: pointer;
            `;
            
            layerHeader.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const objectsDiv = layerHeader.nextElementSibling;
                objectsDiv.style.display = 
                    objectsDiv.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
            });
            
            list.appendChild(layerHeader);
            
            // Objects in layer
            const objectsDiv = document.createElement('div');
            objectsDiv.style.paddingLeft = '15px';
            
            objects.forEach((obj, index) => {
                const objDiv = document.createElement('div');
                objDiv.textContent = obj.gameObject?.name || `Object ${index}`;
                objDiv.style.cssText = `
                    padding: 5px;
                    margin: 2px 0;
                    background: #2a2a2a;
                    color: #fff;
                    font-size: 12px;
                    cursor: pointer;
                    border-radius: 3px;
                `;
                
                objDiv.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    this.selectObject(obj.gameObject);
                });
                
                objDiv.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                    objDiv.style.background = '#444';
                });
                
                objDiv.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    objDiv.style.background = '#2a2a2a';
                });
                
                objectsDiv.appendChild(objDiv);
            });
            
            list.appendChild(objectsDiv);
        });
    }
    
    // === INPUT HANDLING ===
    
    setupInputHandlers() {
        // Mouse input
        this.input.on('pointerdown', this.onPointerDown, this);
        this.input.on('pointermove', this.onPointerMove, this);
        this.input.on('pointerup', this.onPointerUp, this);
        
        // Keyboard shortcuts
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-DELETE', () => {
            this.deleteSelected();
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-Z', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.undo();
            }
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-Y', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.redo();
            }
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-C', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.copySelected();
            }
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-V', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.pasteObjects();
            }
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-D', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.duplicateSelected();
            }
        });
        
        // Camera controls
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-SPACE', () => {
            this.isPanning = true;
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keyup-SPACE', () => {
            this.isPanning = false;
        });
        
        // Drag and drop from palette
        const canvas = this.game.canvas;
        
        canvas.addEventListener('dragover', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
        });
        
        canvas.addEventListener('drop', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const objectType = e.dataTransfer.getData('objectType');
            if (objectType) {
                const point = this.cameras.main.getWorldPoint(e.offsetX, e.offsetY);
                this.placeObject(objectType, point.x, point.y);
            }
        });
        
        // Mouse wheel zoom
        this.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY) => {
            const zoomDelta = deltaY > 0 ? -0.1 : 0.1;
            const newZoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
                this.cameras.main.zoom + zoomDelta,
                0.25, 4.0
            );
            this.cameras.main.setZoom(newZoom);
        });
    }
    
    onPointerDown(pointer) {
        if (pointer.rightButtonDown()) {
            // Start panning
            this.isPanning = true;
            this.panStartX = pointer.x;
            this.panStartY = pointer.y;
            this.camStartX = this.cameras.main.scrollX;
            this.camStartY = this.cameras.main.scrollY;
            return;
        }
        
        const worldPoint = this.cameras.main.getWorldPoint(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        switch (this.editorState.mode) {
            case 'SELECT':
                this.handleSelect(worldPoint, pointer);
                break;
                
            case 'MOVE':
                this.startDragging(worldPoint);
                break;
                
            case 'DELETE':
                this.handleDelete(worldPoint);
                break;
                
            case 'PLACE':
                this.placeObject(this.editorState.placingType, worldPoint.x, worldPoint.y);
                break;
        }
    }
    
    onPointerMove(pointer) {
        if (this.isPanning) {
            const deltaX = pointer.x - this.panStartX;
            const deltaY = pointer.y - this.panStartY;
            
            this.cameras.main.scrollX = this.camStartX - deltaX / this.cameras.main.zoom;
            this.cameras.main.scrollY = this.camStartY - deltaY / this.cameras.main.zoom;
            return;
        }
        
        if (this.isDragging && this.editorState.selectedObjects.length > 0) {
            const worldPoint = this.cameras.main.getWorldPoint(pointer.x, pointer.y);
            const snapped = this.snapToGrid(worldPoint.x, worldPoint.y);
            
            this.editorState.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
                obj.x = snapped.x;
                obj.y = snapped.y;
            });
            
            this.updateInspector(this.editorState.selectedObjects[0]);
        }
    }
    
    onPointerUp(pointer) {
        if (this.isPanning) {
            this.isPanning = false;
        }
        
        if (this.isDragging) {
            this.isDragging = false;
            this.recordUndo('Move objects');
        }
    }
    
    handleSelect(worldPoint, pointer) {
        // Find object under cursor
        const objects = this.sceneData.objects
            .map(obj => obj.gameObject)
            .filter(obj => obj && obj.getBounds().contains(worldPoint.x, worldPoint.y));
        
        if (objects.length > 0) {
            const selected = objects[objects.length - 1]; // Top-most object
            
            if (!pointer.event.shiftKey) {
                // Clear previous selection
                this.clearSelection();
            }
            
            this.selectObject(selected);
        } else {
            if (!pointer.event.shiftKey) {
                this.clearSelection();
            }
        }
    }
    
    startDragging(worldPoint) {
        if (this.editorState.selectedObjects.length > 0) {
            this.isDragging = true;
            this.dragStartX = worldPoint.x;
            this.dragStartY = worldPoint.y;
        }
    }
    
    handleDelete(worldPoint) {
        const objects = this.sceneData.objects
            .map(obj => obj.gameObject)
            .filter(obj => obj && obj.getBounds().contains(worldPoint.x, worldPoint.y));
        
        if (objects.length > 0) {
            const toDelete = objects[objects.length - 1];
            this.deleteObject(toDelete);
        }
    }
    
    // === OBJECT MANAGEMENT ===
    
    placeObject(type, x, y) {
        const snapped = this.snapToGrid(x, y);
        
        let gameObject;
        
        // Create object based on type
        switch (type) {
            case 'player':
                gameObject = this.add.sprite(snapped.x, snapped.y, 'player');
                gameObject.name = 'Player';
                break;
                
            case 'enemy':
                gameObject = this.add.sprite(snapped.x, snapped.y, 'enemy');
                gameObject.name = 'Enemy';
                break;
                
            case 'tree':
                gameObject = this.add.sprite(snapped.x, snapped.y, 'tree');
                gameObject.name = 'Tree';
                break;
                
            case 'point_light':
                gameObject = this.add.circle(snapped.x, snapped.y, 20, 0xffff00, 0.5);
                gameObject.name = 'Point Light';
                gameObject.editorData = {
                    lightType: 'point',
                    radius: 100,
                    intensity: 1.0,
                    color: '0xffff00'
                };
                break;
                
            case 'trigger':
                gameObject = this.add.rectangle(snapped.x, snapped.y, 64, 64, 0x00ff00, 0.3);
                gameObject.name = 'Trigger Zone';
                gameObject.editorData = {
                    triggerType: 'enter',
                    actionId: ''
                };
                break;
                
            default:
                gameObject = this.add.rectangle(snapped.x, snapped.y, 32, 32, 0xff0000);
                gameObject.name = 'Unknown Object';
        }
        
        // Make interactive
        gameObject.setInteractive();
        
        // Add to scene data
        const sceneObject = {
            type: type,
            gameObject: gameObject,
            layer: this.editorState.currentLayer
        };
        
        this.sceneData.objects.push(sceneObject);
        
        // Select new object
        this.clearSelection();
        this.selectObject(gameObject);
        
        // Update hierarchy
        this.updateHierarchy();
        
        // Record undo
        this.recordUndo('Place object');
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Placed ${type} at (${snapped.x}, ${snapped.y})`);
    }
    
    selectObject(gameObject) {
        if (!gameObject) return;
        
        // Add selection highlight
        if (!gameObject.selectionBox) {
            const bounds = gameObject.getBounds();
            gameObject.selectionBox = this.add.rectangle(
                gameObject.x, gameObject.y,
                bounds.width + 4, bounds.height + 4
            );
            gameObject.selectionBox.setStrokeStyle(2, 0x00ff00);
            gameObject.selectionBox.setFillStyle(0x00ff00, 0.1);
            gameObject.selectionBox.setDepth(1000);
        }
        
        this.editorState.selectedObjects.push(gameObject);
        this.updateInspector(gameObject);
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Selected: ${gameObject.name}`);
    }
    
    clearSelection() {
        this.editorState.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.selectionBox) {
                obj.selectionBox.destroy();
                obj.selectionBox = null;
            }
        });
        
        this.editorState.selectedObjects = [];
        this.updateInspector(null);
    }
    
    deleteObject(gameObject) {
        // Remove from scene data
        const index = this.sceneData.objects.findIndex(
            obj => obj.gameObject === gameObject
        );
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.sceneData.objects.splice(index, 1);
        }
        
        // Remove selection
        if (gameObject.selectionBox) {
            gameObject.selectionBox.destroy();
        }
        
        // Destroy game object
        gameObject.destroy();
        
        // Update UI
        this.clearSelection();
        this.updateHierarchy();
        
        // Record undo
        this.recordUndo('Delete object');
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Deleted: ${gameObject.name}`);
    }
    
    deleteSelected() {
        const toDelete = [...this.editorState.selectedObjects];
        toDelete.forEach(obj => this.deleteObject(obj));
    }
    
    copySelected() {
        this.editorState.clipboard = this.editorState.selectedObjects.map(obj => {
            return this.serializeObject(obj);
        });
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Copied ${this.editorState.clipboard.length} objects`);
    }
    
    pasteObjects() {
        if (this.editorState.clipboard.length === 0) return;
        
        this.clearSelection();
        
        this.editorState.clipboard.forEach(data => {
            const newObj = this.deserializeObject(data);
            // Offset slightly
            newObj.x += 32;
            newObj.y += 32;
            this.selectObject(newObj);
        });
        
        this.recordUndo('Paste objects');
        this.updateHierarchy();
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Pasted ${this.editorState.clipboard.length} objects`);
    }
    
    duplicateSelected() {
        this.copySelected();
        this.pasteObjects();
    }
    
    // === SAVE/LOAD SYSTEM ===
    
    saveScene() {
        const sceneData = {
            metadata: {
                name: this.sceneData.metadata.name,
                created: this.sceneData.metadata.created,
                modified: new Date().toISOString(),
                editorVersion: '1.0.0'
            },
            objects: this.sceneData.objects.map(obj => this.serializeObject(obj.gameObject))
        };
        
        const json = JSON.stringify(sceneData, null, 2);
        
        // Download as file
        const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        
        const link = document.createElement('a');
        link.href = url;
        link.download = `${this.sceneData.metadata.name}.scene.json`;
        link.click();
        
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
        
        console.log('[EditorScene] Scene saved');
    }
    
    openScene() {
        const input = document.createElement('input');
        input.type = 'file';
        input.accept = '.scene.json';
        
        input.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files[0];
            if (!file) return;
            
            const text = await file.text();
            const sceneData = JSON.parse(text);
            
            this.loadSceneData(sceneData);
        });
        
        input.click();
    }
    
    loadSceneData(sceneData) {
        // Clear current scene
        this.sceneData.objects.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.gameObject) {
                obj.gameObject.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        this.sceneData.objects = [];
        this.clearSelection();
        
        // Load metadata
        this.sceneData.metadata = sceneData.metadata;
        
        // Create objects
        sceneData.objects.forEach(objData => {
            const gameObject = this.deserializeObject(objData);
            
            this.sceneData.objects.push({
                type: objData.type,
                gameObject: gameObject,
                layer: objData.layer || 'default'
            });
        });
        
        this.updateHierarchy();
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Loaded scene: ${sceneData.metadata.name}`);
    }
    
    serializeObject(gameObject) {
        const data = {
            type: gameObject.type || 'sprite',
            name: gameObject.name,
            x: gameObject.x,
            y: gameObject.y,
            rotation: gameObject.rotation,
            scaleX: gameObject.scaleX,
            scaleY: gameObject.scaleY,
            alpha: gameObject.alpha,
            visible: gameObject.visible,
            depth: gameObject.depth,
            layer: gameObject.layer || 'default'
        };
        
        if (gameObject.texture) {
            data.texture = gameObject.texture.key;
            data.frame = gameObject.frame.name;
        }
        
        if (gameObject.tintTopLeft !== undefined) {
            data.tint = gameObject.tintTopLeft;
        }
        
        if (gameObject.editorData) {
            data.editorData = { ...gameObject.editorData };
        }
        
        return data;
    }
    
    deserializeObject(data) {
        let gameObject;
        
        if (data.texture) {
            gameObject = this.add.sprite(data.x, data.y, data.texture, data.frame);
        } else {
            // Fallback for shapes
            gameObject = this.add.rectangle(data.x, data.y, 32, 32, 0xff0000);
        }
        
        gameObject.name = data.name;
        gameObject.setRotation(data.rotation);
        gameObject.setScale(data.scaleX, data.scaleY);
        gameObject.setAlpha(data.alpha);
        gameObject.setVisible(data.visible);
        gameObject.setDepth(data.depth);
        gameObject.layer = data.layer;
        
        if (data.tint !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setTint(data.tint);
        }
        
        if (data.editorData) {
            gameObject.editorData = { ...data.editorData };
        }
        
        gameObject.setInteractive();
        
        return gameObject;
    }
    
    newScene() {
        if (confirm('Create new scene? Unsaved changes will be lost.')) {
            this.sceneData.objects.forEach(obj => {
                if (obj.gameObject) {
                    obj.gameObject.destroy();
                }
            });
            
            this.sceneData = {
                objects: [],
                metadata: {
                    name: 'Untitled Scene',
                    created: new Date().toISOString(),
                    modified: new Date().toISOString()
                }
            };
            
            this.clearSelection();
            this.updateHierarchy();
            this.undoStack = [];
            this.redoStack = [];
            
            console.log('[EditorScene] New scene created');
        }
    }
    
    // === UNDO/REDO SYSTEM ===
    
    recordUndo(description) {
        const snapshot = {
            description: description,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            objects: this.sceneData.objects.map(obj => this.serializeObject(obj.gameObject))
        };
        
        this.undoStack.push(snapshot);
        
        // Limit stack size
        if (this.undoStack.length > this.maxUndoSteps) {
            this.undoStack.shift();
        }
        
        // Clear redo stack
        this.redoStack = [];
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Recorded undo: ${description}`);
    }
    
    undo() {
        if (this.undoStack.length === 0) {
            console.log('[EditorScene] Nothing to undo');
            return;
        }
        
        // Save current state to redo stack
        const currentState = {
            description: 'Redo point',
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            objects: this.sceneData.objects.map(obj => this.serializeObject(obj.gameObject))
        };
        this.redoStack.push(currentState);
        
        // Restore previous state
        const previousState = this.undoStack.pop();
        this.restoreState(previousState);
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Undo: ${previousState.description}`);
    }
    
    redo() {
        if (this.redoStack.length === 0) {
            console.log('[EditorScene] Nothing to redo');
            return;
        }
        
        // Save current state to undo stack
        const currentState = {
            description: 'Undo point',
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            objects: this.sceneData.objects.map(obj => this.serializeObject(obj.gameObject))
        };
        this.undoStack.push(currentState);
        
        // Restore next state
        const nextState = this.redoStack.pop();
        this.restoreState(nextState);
        
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Redo: ${nextState.description}`);
    }
    
    restoreState(state) {
        // Clear current objects
        this.sceneData.objects.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.gameObject) {
                obj.gameObject.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        this.sceneData.objects = [];
        this.clearSelection();
        
        // Recreate objects from state
        state.objects.forEach(objData => {
            const gameObject = this.deserializeObject(objData);
            
            this.sceneData.objects.push({
                type: objData.type,
                gameObject: gameObject,
                layer: objData.layer || 'default'
            });
        });
        
        this.updateHierarchy();
    }
    
    // === UTILITY METHODS ===
    
    setMode(mode) {
        this.editorState.mode = mode;
        this.updateToolbarToggles();
        console.log(`[EditorScene] Mode: ${mode}`);
    }
    
    toggleGrid(enabled) {
        this.editorState.gridEnabled = enabled;
        this.redrawGrid();
    }
    
    toggleSnap(enabled) {
        this.editorState.snapToGrid = enabled;
    }
    
    playScene() {
        console.log('[EditorScene] Playing scene...');
        // Switch to game scene with current data
        this.scene.start('GameScene', { sceneData: this.sceneData });
    }
    
    pauseScene() {
        console.log('[EditorScene] Paused');
    }
    
    createLayer(name, depth) {
        this.layers.set(name, {
            name: name,
            depth: depth,
            visible: true,
            locked: false
        });
    }
    
    loadPrefabs() {
        // Load common prefabs
        this.prefabs.set('health_potion', {
            type: 'item',
            texture: 'health_potion',
            editorData: {
                itemType: 'consumable',
                healAmount: 50
            }
        });
        
        this.prefabs.set('chest', {
            type: 'interactable',
            texture: 'chest',
            editorData: {
                lootTable: 'common',
                isLocked: false
            }
        });
    }
    
    makeDraggable(element, handle) {
        let isDragging = false;
        let offsetX, offsetY;
        
        handle.style.cursor = 'move';
        
        handle.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            isDragging = true;
            offsetX = e.clientX - element.offsetLeft;
            offsetY = e.clientY - element.offsetTop;
        });
        
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            if (isDragging) {
                element.style.left = (e.clientX - offsetX) + 'px';
                element.style.top = (e.clientY - offsetY) + 'px';
            }
        });
        
        document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
            isDragging = false;
        });
    }
    
    update() {
        // Update selection boxes to follow objects
        this.editorState.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.selectionBox) {
                obj.selectionBox.x = obj.x;
                obj.selectionBox.y = obj.y;
                obj.selectionBox.rotation = obj.rotation;
            }
        });
    }
    
    shutdown() {
        // Clean up UI elements
        Object.values(this.uiElements).forEach(element => {
            if (element && element.parentNode) {
                element.parentNode.removeChild(element);
            }
        });
    }
}

export default EditorScene;
Step 2: Integration with Main Game
javascript
// Update game.js to include editor

import EditorScene from './scenes/EditorScene.js';
import GameScene from './scenes/GameScene.js';

const config = {
    type: Phaser.AUTO,
    width: 1200,
    height: 800,
    backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
    scene: [EditorScene, GameScene],
    physics: {
        default: 'arcade',
        arcade: {
            debug: true
        }
    }
};

const game = new Phaser.Game(config);

// Toggle editor with F1 key
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'F1') {
        const currentScene = game.scene.getScenes(true)[0];
        
        if (currentScene.scene.key === 'EditorScene') {
            game.scene.stop('EditorScene');
            game.scene.start('GameScene');
        } else {
            game.scene.stop('GameScene');
            game.scene.start('EditorScene');
        }
    }
});

Feature 1: Prefab System
javascript
// systems/PrefabManager.js
class PrefabManager {
    constructor(editor) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.prefabs = new Map();
    }
    
    createPrefab(name, selectedObjects) {
        const prefabData = {
            name: name,
            objects: selectedObjects.map(obj => this.editor.serializeObject(obj)),
            thumbnail: this.generateThumbnail(selectedObjects)
        };
        
        this.prefabs.set(name, prefabData);
        this.savePrefab(name, prefabData);
        
        console.log(`[PrefabManager] Created prefab: ${name}`);
    }
    
    instantiatePrefab(name, x, y) {
        const prefabData = this.prefabs.get(name);
        if (!prefabData) {
            console.error(`[PrefabManager] Unknown prefab: ${name}`);
            return;
        }
        
        const instances = [];
        
        prefabData.objects.forEach(objData => {
            const offsetX = objData.x - prefabData.objects[0].x;
            const offsetY = objData.y - prefabData.objects[0].y;
            
            objData.x = x + offsetX;
            objData.y = y + offsetY;
            
            const instance = this.editor.deserializeObject(objData);
            instances.push(instance);
        });
        
        return instances;
    }
    
    savePrefab(name, data) {
        localStorage.setItem(`prefab_${name}`, JSON.stringify(data));
    }
    
    loadPrefabs() {
        for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
            const key = localStorage.key(i);
            if (key.startsWith('prefab_')) {
                const name = key.replace('prefab_', '');
                const data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key));
                this.prefabs.set(name, data);
            }
        }
    }
    
    generateThumbnail(objects) {
        // Create a small render of the prefab
        // (simplified version)
        return 'data:image/png;base64,...';
    }
}
Feature 2: Multi-Object Transform Gizmo
javascript
// systems/TransformGizmo.js
class TransformGizmo {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.mode = 'translate'; // translate, rotate, scale
        this.gizmo = null;
    }
    
    show(objects) {
        this.hide();
        
        if (objects.length === 0) return;
        
        // Calculate center point
        const bounds = this.calculateBounds(objects);
        const centerX = bounds.x + bounds.width / 2;
        const centerY = bounds.y + bounds.height / 2;
        
        // Create gizmo based on mode
        this.gizmo = this.scene.add.container(centerX, centerY);
        
        if (this.mode === 'translate') {
            this.createTranslateGizmo();
        } else if (this.mode === 'rotate') {
            this.createRotateGizmo();
        } else if (this.mode === 'scale') {
            this.createScaleGizmo();
        }
        
        this.gizmo.setDepth(10000);
    }
    
    createTranslateGizmo() {
        // X axis (red)
        const xAxis = this.scene.add.line(0, 0, 0, 0, 50, 0, 0xff0000);
        xAxis.setLineWidth(3);
        xAxis.setInteractive(
            new Phaser.Geom.Line(0, -5, 50, 5),
            Phaser.Geom.Line.Contains
        );
        
        xAxis.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.startDrag('x');
        });
        
        // Y axis (green)
        const yAxis = this.scene.add.line(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 50, 0x00ff00);
        yAxis.setLineWidth(3);
        yAxis.setInteractive(
            new Phaser.Geom.Line(-5, 0, 5, 50),
            Phaser.Geom.Line.Contains
        );
        
        yAxis.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.startDrag('y');
        });
        
        // Center point
        const center = this.scene.add.circle(0, 0, 8, 0xffffff);
        center.setInteractive();
        center.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.startDrag('xy');
        });
        
        this.gizmo.add([xAxis, yAxis, center]);
    }
    
    createRotateGizmo() {
        // Rotation circle
        const circle = this.scene.add.circle(0, 0, 60);
        circle.setStrokeStyle(3, 0x00ffff);
        circle.setInteractive(
            new Phaser.Geom.Circle(0, 0, 60),
            Phaser.Geom.Circle.Contains
        );
        
        circle.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.startRotation();
        });
        
        this.gizmo.add(circle);
    }
    
    createScaleGizmo() {
        // Scale handles at corners
        const handles = [
            { x: -40, y: -40 },
            { x: 40, y: -40 },
            { x: 40, y: 40 },
            { x: -40, y: 40 }
        ];
        
        handles.forEach(pos => {
            const handle = this.scene.add.rectangle(pos.x, pos.y, 12, 12, 0xffff00);
            handle.setInteractive();
            handle.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.startScale(pos);
            });
            
            this.gizmo.add(handle);
        });
    }
    
    hide() {
        if (this.gizmo) {
            this.gizmo.destroy();
            this.gizmo = null;
        }
    }
    
    calculateBounds(objects) {
        let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;
        let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
        
        objects.forEach(obj => {
            const bounds = obj.getBounds();
            minX = Math.min(minX, bounds.x);
            minY = Math.min(minY, bounds.y);
            maxX = Math.max(maxX, bounds.right);
            maxY = Math.max(maxY, bounds.bottom);
        });
        
        return new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(
            minX, minY,
            maxX - minX,
            maxY - minY
        );
    }
    
    startDrag(axis) {
        // Implementation for constrained dragging
        console.log(`[TransformGizmo] Dragging on ${axis} axis`);
    }
    
    startRotation() {
        // Implementation for rotation
        console.log('[TransformGizmo] Rotating');
    }
    
    startScale(corner) {
        // Implementation for scaling
        console.log('[TransformGizmo] Scaling from corner');
    }
}

Complete Scene File Specification
javascript
// scene-format-spec.js
/**
 * VERDANCE SCENE FILE FORMAT v1.0
 * 
 * This document defines the complete structure of .scene.json files
 * that can be created, edited, and loaded by the Visual Level Editor.
 */

const SCENE_FILE_SPECIFICATION = {
    // Required top-level fields
    version: "1.0.0",           // Scene format version
    
    metadata: {
        name: "string",          // Scene display name
        description: "string",   // Optional scene description
        created: "ISO 8601",     // Creation timestamp
        modified: "ISO 8601",    // Last modification timestamp
        author: "string",        // Creator name
        editorVersion: "string", // Editor version used to create
        tags: ["string"]         // Searchable tags
    },
    
    // Camera configuration
    camera: {
        startX: "number",        // Initial camera X position
        startY: "number",        // Initial camera Y position
        zoom: "number",          // Initial zoom level (1.0 = default)
        bounds: {
            x: "number",
            y: "number",
            width: "number",
            height: "number"
        },
        follow: "objectId",      // ID of object to follow (usually player)
        lerp: "number"           // Camera follow smoothing (0-1)
    },
    
    // All game objects in the scene
    objects: [
        {
            id: "string",            // Unique object identifier
            type: "string",          // Object type (sprite, rectangle, etc)
            name: "string",          // Display name
            layer: "string",         // Layer name
            
            // Transform
            transform: {
                x: "number",
                y: "number",
                rotation: "number",  // Radians
                scaleX: "number",
                scaleY: "number"
            },
            
            // Visual properties
            appearance: {
                texture: "string",   // Texture key
                frame: "string|number", // Frame name or index
                tint: "number",      // 0xRRGGBB format
                alpha: "number",     // 0-1
                visible: "boolean",
                depth: "number",
                flipX: "boolean",
                flipY: "boolean"
            },
            
            // Physics (if applicable)
            physics: {
                enabled: "boolean",
                bodyType: "dynamic|static|kinematic",
                collider: {
                    type: "rectangle|circle|polygon",
                    width: "number",
                    height: "number",
                    radius: "number",
                    vertices: [{"x": "number", "y": "number"}]
                },
                velocity: {"x": "number", "y": "number"},
                bounce: "number",
                friction: "number",
                mass: "number",
                immovable: "boolean"
            },
            
            // Component data (game-specific)
            components: {
                "ComponentName": {
                    // Component-specific properties
                }
            },
            
            // Custom editor data
            editorData: {
                locked: "boolean",   // Can't be selected/moved
                hidden: "boolean",   // Hidden in editor
                notes: "string",     // Designer notes
                color: "string"      // Custom color coding
            }
        }
    ],
    
    // Lighting configuration
    lighting: {
        ambientColor: "number",      // 0xRRGGBB
        ambientIntensity: "number",  // 0-1
        lights: [
            {
                id: "string",
                type: "point|spot|directional",
                x: "number",
                y: "number",
                color: "number",
                intensity: "number",
                radius: "number",
                castShadows: "boolean"
            }
        ]
    },
    
    // Trigger zones
    triggers: [
        {
            id: "string",
            name: "string",
            shape: "rectangle|circle|polygon",
            x: "number",
            y: "number",
            width: "number",
            height: "number",
            radius: "number",
            vertices: [{"x": "number", "y": "number"}],
            
            // Trigger behavior
            triggerType: "enter|exit|stay",
            oneShot: "boolean",
            enabled: "boolean",
            
            // Actions
            actions: [
                {
                    type: "string",      // Action type
                    params: {}           // Action parameters
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    
    // Spawn points
    spawnPoints: [
        {
            id: "string",
            name: "string",
            x: "number",
            y: "number",
            spawnType: "player|enemy|npc|item",
            entityId: "string",      // ID of entity to spawn
            maxSpawns: "number",
            respawnTime: "number"
        }
    ],
    
    // Audio zones
    audioZones: [
        {
            id: "string",
            x: "number",
            y: "number",
            width: "number",
            height: "number",
            musicTrack: "string",
            ambientSound: "string",
            volume: "number",
            fadeIn: "number",
            fadeOut: "number"
        }
    ],
    
    // Paths (for NPCs, cameras, etc)
    paths: [
        {
            id: "string",
            name: "string",
            closed: "boolean",      // Is path a loop?
            points: [
                {
                    x: "number",
                    y: "number",
                    duration: "number"  // Time to reach this point
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    
    // Layer definitions
    layers: [
        {
            name: "string",
            depth: "number",
            visible: "boolean",
            locked: "boolean",
            opacity: "number"
        }
    ],
    
    // Weather/environmental effects
    environment: {
        weather: "none|rain|snow|fog",
        weatherIntensity: "number",
        timeOfDay: "dawn|day|dusk|night",
        windDirection: "number",  // Degrees
        windSpeed: "number"
    }
};

// Example complete scene file
const EXAMPLE_SCENE = {
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "metadata": {
        "name": "Forest Clearing",
        "description": "A peaceful forest clearing with hidden dangers",
        "created": "2025-02-06T10:00:00Z",
        "modified": "2025-02-06T14:30:00Z",
        "author": "Nathan",
        "editorVersion": "1.0.0",
        "tags": ["forest", "combat", "chapter1"]
    },
    "camera": {
        "startX": 600,
        "startY": 400,
        "zoom": 1.0,
        "bounds": {
            "x": 0,
            "y": 0,
            "width": 1200,
            "height": 800
        },
        "follow": "player_01",
        "lerp": 0.1
    },
    "objects": [
        {
            "id": "player_01",
            "type": "sprite",
            "name": "Player Start",
            "layer": "characters",
            "transform": {
                "x": 100,
                "y": 400,
                "rotation": 0,
                "scaleX": 1,
                "scaleY": 1
            },
            "appearance": {
                "texture": "player_character",
                "frame": 0,
                "tint": 0xffffff,
                "alpha": 1,
                "visible": true,
                "depth": 100,
                "flipX": false,
                "flipY": false
            },
            "physics": {
                "enabled": true,
                "bodyType": "dynamic",
                "collider": {
                    "type": "rectangle",
                    "width": 32,
                    "height": 48
                },
                "velocity": {"x": 0, "y": 0},
                "bounce": 0,
                "friction": 0.1,
                "mass": 1,
                "immovable": false
            },
            "components": {
                "PlayerController": {
                    "speed": 200,
                    "jumpPower": 400
