export { SCENE_FILE_SPECIFICATION, EXAMPLE_SCENE };
Missing Component 2: Scene Loader System
javascript
// systems/SceneLoader.js

class SceneLoader {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.loadedScene = null;
        this.objectRegistry = new Map();
    }
    
    /**
     * Load a complete scene from JSON data
     * @param {Object} sceneData - Scene data object
     * @returns {Promise<void>}
     */
    async loadScene(sceneData) {
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Loading scene: ${sceneData.metadata.name}`);
        
        try {
            // Validate scene format
            this.validateSceneData(sceneData);
            
            // Store reference
            this.loadedScene = sceneData;
            
            // Clear existing scene
            this.clearScene();
            
            // Load in order
            await this.loadLayers(sceneData.layers);
            await this.loadCamera(sceneData.camera);
            await this.loadLighting(sceneData.lighting);
            await this.loadObjects(sceneData.objects);
            await this.loadTriggers(sceneData.triggers);
            await this.loadSpawnPoints(sceneData.spawnPoints);
            await this.loadAudioZones(sceneData.audioZones);
            await this.loadPaths(sceneData.paths);
            await this.loadEnvironment(sceneData.environment);
            
            console.log('[SceneLoader] ✓ Scene loaded successfully');
            
            // Emit event
            this.scene.events.emit('scene-loaded', sceneData);
            
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('[SceneLoader] Failed to load scene:', error);
            throw error;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Validate scene data structure
     */
    validateSceneData(sceneData) {
        if (!sceneData.version) {
            throw new Error('Scene data missing version');
        }
        
        if (!sceneData.metadata) {
            throw new Error('Scene data missing metadata');
        }
        
        if (!sceneData.objects) {
            throw new Error('Scene data missing objects array');
        }
        
        // Check version compatibility
        const [major, minor, patch] = sceneData.version.split('.').map(Number);
        if (major !== 1) {
            throw new Error(`Unsupported scene version: ${sceneData.version}`);
        }
        
        console.log('[SceneLoader] ✓ Scene data validated');
    }
    
    /**
     * Clear existing scene
     */
    clearScene() {
        // Destroy all registered objects
        this.objectRegistry.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj && obj.destroy) {
                obj.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        this.objectRegistry.clear();
        
        console.log('[SceneLoader] Scene cleared');
    }
    
    /**
     * Load layer definitions
     */
    async loadLayers(layers) {
        if (!layers) return;
        
        layers.forEach(layerData => {
            // Create layer group
            const layer = this.scene.add.group();
            layer.name = layerData.name;
            layer.setDepth(layerData.depth);
            
            // Store layer reference
            if (!this.scene.layers) {
                this.scene.layers = new Map();
            }
            this.scene.layers.set(layerData.name, layer);
            
            console.log(`[SceneLoader] Created layer: ${layerData.name} (depth: ${layerData.depth})`);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Configure camera
     */
    async loadCamera(cameraData) {
        if (!cameraData) return;
        
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        
        // Set initial position
        camera.setScroll(cameraData.startX, cameraData.startY);
        
        // Set zoom
        if (cameraData.zoom) {
            camera.setZoom(cameraData.zoom);
        }
        
        // Set bounds
        if (cameraData.bounds) {
            camera.setBounds(
                cameraData.bounds.x,
                cameraData.bounds.y,
                cameraData.bounds.width,
                cameraData.bounds.height
            );
        }
        
        // Store follow target for later (after objects are loaded)
        if (cameraData.follow) {
            this.scene.cameraFollowTarget = cameraData.follow;
        }
        
        // Set lerp
        if (cameraData.lerp !== undefined) {
            this.scene.cameraLerp = cameraData.lerp;
        }
        
        console.log('[SceneLoader] Camera configured');
    }
    
    /**
     * Load lighting configuration
     */
    async loadLighting(lightingData) {
        if (!lightingData) return;
        
        // Enable lights
        this.scene.lights.enable();
        
        // Set ambient light
        if (lightingData.ambientColor !== undefined) {
            const intensity = lightingData.ambientIntensity || 0.5;
            this.scene.lights.setAmbientColor(lightingData.ambientColor);
        }
        
        // Create individual lights
        if (lightingData.lights) {
            lightingData.lights.forEach(lightData => {
                let light;
                
                switch (lightData.type) {
                    case 'point':
                        light = this.scene.lights.addLight(
                            lightData.x,
                            lightData.y,
                            lightData.radius || 100,
                            lightData.color || 0xffffff,
                            lightData.intensity || 1.0
                        );
                        break;
                        
                    // Add other light types as needed
                }
                
                if (light) {
                    this.objectRegistry.set(lightData.id, light);
                }
            });
        }
        
        console.log('[SceneLoader] Lighting configured');
    }
    
    /**
     * Load all objects
     */
    async loadObjects(objectsData) {
        if (!objectsData) return;
        
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Loading ${objectsData.length} objects...`);
        
        // Sort by depth to ensure proper layering
        const sorted = [...objectsData].sort((a, b) => {
            const depthA = a.appearance?.depth || 0;
            const depthB = b.appearance?.depth || 0;
            return depthA - depthB;
        });
        
        for (const objData of sorted) {
            try {
                const gameObject = await this.createObject(objData);
                
                if (gameObject) {
                    this.objectRegistry.set(objData.id, gameObject);
                    
                    // Add to layer
                    const layerName = objData.layer || 'default';
                    const layer = this.scene.layers?.get(layerName);
                    if (layer) {
                        layer.add(gameObject);
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`[SceneLoader] Failed to create object ${objData.id}:`, error);
            }
        }
        
        // Set up camera follow if specified
        if (this.scene.cameraFollowTarget) {
            const target = this.objectRegistry.get(this.scene.cameraFollowTarget);
            if (target) {
                this.scene.cameras.main.startFollow(
                    target,
                    true,
                    this.scene.cameraLerp || 0.1,
                    this.scene.cameraLerp || 0.1
                );
            }
        }
        
        console.log('[SceneLoader] ✓ Objects loaded');
    }
    
    /**
     * Create a single game object from data
     */
    async createObject(objData) {
        let gameObject;
        
        const { transform, appearance, physics, components } = objData;
        
        // Create base object based on type
        switch (objData.type) {
            case 'sprite':
                gameObject = this.scene.add.sprite(
                    transform.x,
                    transform.y,
                    appearance.texture,
                    appearance.frame
                );
                break;
                
            case 'image':
                gameObject = this.scene.add.image(
                    transform.x,
                    transform.y,
                    appearance.texture,
                    appearance.frame
                );
                break;
                
            case 'rectangle':
                gameObject = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                    transform.x,
                    transform.y,
                    appearance.width || 32,
                    appearance.height || 32,
                    appearance.fillColor || 0xffffff,
                    appearance.alpha || 1
                );
                break;
                
            case 'circle':
                gameObject = this.scene.add.circle(
                    transform.x,
                    transform.y,
                    appearance.radius || 16,
                    appearance.fillColor || 0xffffff,
                    appearance.alpha || 1
                );
                break;
                
            case 'text':
                gameObject = this.scene.add.text(
                    transform.x,
                    transform.y,
                    appearance.text || '',
                    appearance.style || {}
                );
                break;
                
            default:
                console.warn(`[SceneLoader] Unknown object type: ${objData.type}`);
                return null;
        }
        
        // Apply transform
        gameObject.setRotation(transform.rotation || 0);
        gameObject.setScale(transform.scaleX || 1, transform.scaleY || 1);
        
        // Apply appearance
        if (appearance.tint !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setTint(appearance.tint);
        }
        
        if (appearance.alpha !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setAlpha(appearance.alpha);
        }
        
        if (appearance.visible !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setVisible(appearance.visible);
        }
        
        if (appearance.depth !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setDepth(appearance.depth);
        }
        
        if (appearance.flipX !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setFlipX(appearance.flipX);
        }
        
        if (appearance.flipY !== undefined) {
            gameObject.setFlipY(appearance.flipY);
        }
        
        // Set name and ID
        gameObject.name = objData.name;
        gameObject.objectId = objData.id;
        
        // Apply physics
        if (physics && physics.enabled) {
            this.applyPhysics(gameObject, physics);
        }
        
        // Apply components
        if (components) {
            await this.applyComponents(gameObject, components);
        }
        
        // Store editor data
        if (objData.editorData) {
            gameObject.editorData = { ...objData.editorData };
        }
        
        return gameObject;
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply physics to an object
     */
    applyPhysics(gameObject, physicsData) {
        // Enable physics
        this.scene.physics.add.existing(gameObject);
        
        const body = gameObject.body;
        
        // Set body type
        if (physicsData.bodyType === 'static') {
            body.setImmovable(true);
            body.moves = false;
        } else if (physicsData.bodyType === 'kinematic') {
            body.setImmovable(true);
            body.moves = true;
        }
        
        // Set collider shape
        if (physicsData.collider) {
            const collider = physicsData.collider;
            
            switch (collider.type) {
                case 'rectangle':
                    body.setSize(collider.width, collider.height);
                    break;
                    
                case 'circle':
                    body.setCircle(collider.radius);
                    break;
            }
        }
        
        // Set physics properties
        if (physicsData.velocity) {
            body.setVelocity(physicsData.velocity.x, physicsData.velocity.y);
        }
        
        if (physicsData.bounce !== undefined) {
            body.setBounce(physicsData.bounce);
        }
        
        if (physicsData.friction !== undefined) {
            body.setFriction(physicsData.friction);
        }
        
        if (physicsData.mass !== undefined) {
            body.setMass(physicsData.mass);
        }
        
        if (physicsData.immovable !== undefined) {
            body.setImmovable(physicsData.immovable);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply components to an object
     */
    async applyComponents(gameObject, componentsData) {
        // Store component data on the game object
        gameObject.components = {};
        
        for (const [componentName, componentData] of Object.entries(componentsData)) {
            // Check if component class exists
            const ComponentClass = this.scene[componentName];
            
            if (ComponentClass && typeof ComponentClass === 'function') {
                // Instantiate component
                const component = new ComponentClass(this.scene, gameObject, componentData);
                gameObject.components[componentName] = component;
                
                // Initialize if method exists
                if (component.initialize) {
                    await component.initialize();
                }
            } else {
                // Store raw data if no component class found
                gameObject.components[componentName] = componentData;
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Load trigger zones
     */
    async loadTriggers(triggersData) {
        if (!triggersData) return;
        
        triggersData.forEach(triggerData => {
            let zone;
            
            // Create zone based on shape
            switch (triggerData.shape) {
                case 'rectangle':
                    zone = this.scene.add.zone(
                        triggerData.x,
                        triggerData.y,
                        triggerData.width,
                        triggerData.height
                    );
                    break;
                    
                case 'circle':
                    zone = this.scene.add.zone(
                        triggerData.x,
                        triggerData.y,
                        triggerData.radius * 2,
                        triggerData.radius * 2
                    );
                    zone.setCircleDropZone(triggerData.radius);
                    break;
            }
            
            if (zone) {
                zone.name = triggerData.name;
                zone.triggerId = triggerData.id;
                zone.triggerType = triggerData.triggerType;
                zone.oneShot = triggerData.oneShot;
                zone.actions = triggerData.actions;
                zone.triggered = false;
                
                // Make zone interactive
                this.scene.physics.add.existing(zone);
                
                // Set up overlap detection
                if (this.scene.player) {
                    this.scene.physics.add.overlap(
                        this.scene.player,
                        zone,
                        () => this.onTriggerActivated(zone),
                        null,
                        this.scene
                    );
                }
                
                this.objectRegistry.set(triggerData.id, zone);
                
                // Debug visualization (only in editor)
                if (this.scene.editorMode) {
                    const debugGraphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
                    debugGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0x00ff00, 0.5);
                    debugGraphics.fillStyle(0x00ff00, 0.1);
                    
                    if (triggerData.shape === 'rectangle') {
                        debugGraphics.strokeRect(
                            triggerData.x - triggerData.width / 2,
                            triggerData.y - triggerData.height / 2,
                            triggerData.width,
                            triggerData.height
                        );
                        debugGraphics.fillRect(
                            triggerData.x - triggerData.width / 2,
                            triggerData.y - triggerData.height / 2,
                            triggerData.width,
                            triggerData.height
                        );
                    } else if (triggerData.shape === 'circle') {
                        debugGraphics.strokeCircle(
                            triggerData.x,
                            triggerData.y,
                            triggerData.radius
                        );
                        debugGraphics.fillCircle(
                            triggerData.x,
                            triggerData.y,
                            triggerData.radius
                        );
                    }
                }
            }
        });
        
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Loaded ${triggersData.length} triggers`);
    }
    
    /**
     * Handle trigger activation
     */
    onTriggerActivated(trigger) {
        if (trigger.oneShot && trigger.triggered) {
            return;
        }
        
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Trigger activated: ${trigger.name}`);
        
        trigger.triggered = true;
        
        // Execute actions
        if (trigger.actions) {
            trigger.actions.forEach(action => {
                this.executeAction(action);
            });
        }
        
        // Emit event
        this.scene.events.emit('trigger-activated', trigger);
    }
    
    /**
     * Execute a trigger action
     */
    executeAction(action) {
        switch (action.type) {
            case 'spawn_boss':
                this.scene.events.emit('spawn-boss', action.params);
                break;
                
            case 'lock_camera':
                const bounds = action.params.bounds;
                this.scene.cameras.main.setBounds(
                    bounds.x, bounds.y,
                    bounds.width, bounds.height
                );
                break;
                
            case 'play_music':
                if (this.scene.sound) {
                    this.scene.sound.play(action.params.track, {
                        loop: true,
                        volume: action.params.volume || 1
                    });
                }
                break;
                
            case 'show_dialog':
                this.scene.events.emit('show-dialog', action.params);
                break;
                
            default:
                console.warn(`[SceneLoader] Unknown action type: ${action.type}`);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Load spawn points
     */
    async loadSpawnPoints(spawnPointsData) {
        if (!spawnPointsData) return;
        
        spawnPointsData.forEach(spawnData => {
            const spawnPoint = {
                id: spawnData.id,
                name: spawnData.name,
                x: spawnData.x,
                y: spawnData.y,
                spawnType: spawnData.spawnType,
                entityId: spawnData.entityId,
                maxSpawns: spawnData.maxSpawns || 1,
                respawnTime: spawnData.respawnTime || 0,
                currentSpawns: 0,
                lastSpawnTime: 0
            };
            
            this.objectRegistry.set(spawnData.id, spawnPoint);
            
            // Visual marker in editor
            if (this.scene.editorMode) {
                const marker = this.scene.add.circle(
                    spawnData.x,
                    spawnData.y,
                    10,
                    0xff00ff,
                    0.5
                );
                marker.setDepth(10000);
            }
        });
        
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Loaded ${spawnPointsData.length} spawn points`);
    }
    
    /**
     * Load audio zones
     */
    async loadAudioZones(audioZonesData) {
        if (!audioZonesData) return;
        
        audioZonesData.forEach(zoneData => {
            const zone = this.scene.add.zone(
                zoneData.x,
                zoneData.y,
                zoneData.width,
                zoneData.height
            );
            
            zone.audioData = {
                musicTrack: zoneData.musicTrack,
                ambientSound: zoneData.ambientSound,
                volume: zoneData.volume || 1,
                fadeIn: zoneData.fadeIn || 1000,
                fadeOut: zoneData.fadeOut || 1000
            };
            
            this.scene.physics.add.existing(zone);
            
            // Set up overlap detection
            if (this.scene.player) {
                this.scene.physics.add.overlap(
                    this.scene.player,
                    zone,
                    () => this.onAudioZoneEnter(zone),
                    null,
                    this.scene
                );
            }
            
            this.objectRegistry.set(zoneData.id, zone);
        });
        
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Loaded ${audioZonesData.length} audio zones`);
    }
    
    /**
     * Handle audio zone entry
     */
    onAudioZoneEnter(zone) {
        const audioData = zone.audioData;
        
        if (audioData.musicTrack && this.scene.sound) {
            // Fade out current music
            const currentMusic = this.scene.sound.getAllPlaying()
                .find(s => s.key !== audioData.musicTrack);
            
            if (currentMusic) {
                this.scene.tweens.add({
                    targets: currentMusic,
                    volume: 0,
                    duration: audioData.fadeOut,
                    onComplete: () => {
                        currentMusic.stop();
                    }
                });
            }
            
            // Fade in new music
            const newMusic = this.scene.sound.add(audioData.musicTrack, {
                loop: true,
                volume: 0
            });
            
            newMusic.play();
            
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: newMusic,
                volume: audioData.volume,
                duration: audioData.fadeIn
            });
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Load paths
     */
    async loadPaths(pathsData) {
        if (!pathsData) return;
        
        pathsData.forEach(pathData => {
            const path = {
                id: pathData.id,
                name: pathData.name,
                closed: pathData.closed,
                points: pathData.points
            };
            
            // Create Phaser curve
            const curve = new Phaser.Curves.Spline(
                pathData.points.map(p => new Phaser.Math.Vector2(p.x, p.y))
            );
            
            path.curve = curve;
            
            this.objectRegistry.set(pathData.id, path);
            
            // Debug visualization
            if (this.scene.editorMode) {
                const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
                graphics.lineStyle(2, 0xffff00, 0.5);
                curve.draw(graphics, 64);
                
                // Draw points
                pathData.points.forEach(point => {
                    graphics.fillStyle(0xffff00, 1);
                    graphics.fillCircle(point.x, point.y, 5);
                });
            }
        });
        
        console.log(`[SceneLoader] Loaded ${pathsData.length} paths`);
    }
    
    /**
     * Load environment settings
     */
    async loadEnvironment(environmentData) {
        if (!environmentData) return;
        
        // Store environment settings
        this.scene.environment = { ...environmentData };
        
        // Apply weather effects
        if (environmentData.weather !== 'none') {
            this.applyWeatherEffect(environmentData.weather, environmentData.weatherIntensity);
        }
        
        // Apply time of day
        if (environmentData.timeOfDay) {
            this.applyTimeOfDay(environmentData.timeOfDay);
        }
        
        console.log('[SceneLoader] Environment configured');
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply weather visual effects
     */
    applyWeatherEffect(weather, intensity) {
        switch (weather) {
            case 'rain':
                // Create rain particle emitter
                if (this.scene.add.particles) {
                    const emitter = this.scene.add.particles('raindrop').createEmitter({
                        x: { min: 0, max: this.scene.scale.width },
                        y: -50,
                        speedY: { min: 400, max: 600 },
                        speedX: { min: -50, max: 50 },
                        lifespan: 3000,
                        quantity: intensity * 5,
                        scale: { start: 0.5, end: 0.3 },
                        alpha: { start: 0.6, end: 0.3 },
                        blendMode: 'ADD'
                    });
                }
                break;
                
            case 'snow':
                // Similar to rain but slower
                break;
                
            case 'fog':
                // Add fog overlay
                const fog = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                    0, 0,
                    this.scene.scale.width,
                    this.scene.scale.height,
                    0xcccccc,
                    intensity * 0.3
                );
                fog.setOrigin(0, 0);
                fog.setScrollFactor(0);
                fog.setDepth(500);
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply time of day lighting
     */
    applyTimeOfDay(timeOfDay) {
        const lightingPresets = {
            dawn: { ambient: 0xff8866, intensity: 0.4 },
            day: { ambient: 0xffffee, intensity: 0.8 },
            dusk: { ambient: 0xff6644, intensity: 0.5 },
            night: { ambient: 0x223344, intensity: 0.2 }
        };
        
        const preset = lightingPresets[timeOfDay];
        
        if (preset && this.scene.lights) {
            this.scene.lights.setAmbientColor(preset.ambient);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get loaded object by ID
     */
    getObject(id) {
        return this.objectRegistry.get(id);
    }
    
    /**
     * Get all objects of a specific type
     */
    getObjectsByType(type) {
        const results = [];
        
        this.objectRegistry.forEach((obj, id) => {
            if (this.loadedScene) {
                const objData = this.loadedScene.objects.find(o => o.id === id);
                if (objData && objData.type === type) {
                    results.push(obj);
                }
            }
        });
        
        return results;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get scene metadata
     */
    getMetadata() {
        return this.loadedScene ? this.loadedScene.metadata : null;
    }
}

export default SceneLoader;

// examples/editor-integration-examples.js

/**
 * EXAMPLE 1: Basic Editor Setup
 */

// game.js
import Phaser from 'phaser';
import EditorScene from './scenes/EditorScene.js';
import ForestScene from './scenes/ForestScene.js';

const config = {
    type: Phaser.AUTO,
    width: 1200,
    height: 800,
    parent: 'game-container',
    backgroundColor: '#1a1a1a',
    scene: [EditorScene, ForestScene],
    physics: {
        default: 'arcade',
        arcade: {
            debug: true,
            gravity: { y: 0 }
        }
    }
};

const game = new Phaser.Game(config);

// Toggle between editor and game with F1
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'F1') {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const editor = game.scene.getScene('EditorScene');
        const gameScene = game.scene.getScene('ForestScene');
        
        if (editor.scene.isActive()) {
            // Switch to game mode
            editor.scene.stop();
            gameScene.scene.start();
        } else {
            // Switch to editor mode
            gameScene.scene.stop();
            editor.scene.start();
        }
    }
});

/**
 * EXAMPLE 2: Loading a Scene in Game Mode
 */

// ForestScene.js
import Phaser from 'phaser';
import SceneLoader from '../systems/SceneLoader.js';

class ForestScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    constructor() {
        super({ key: 'ForestScene' });
    }
    
    async create() {
        // Create scene loader
        this.sceneLoader = new SceneLoader(this);
        
        // Load scene file
        const response = await fetch('./scenes/forest_clearing.scene.json');
        const sceneData = await response.json();
        
        await this.sceneLoader.loadScene(sceneData);
        
        // Get player object
        this.player = this.sceneLoader.getObject('player_01');
        
        // Set up input
        this.cursors = this.input.keyboard.createCursorKeys();
        
        // Listen for events
        this.events.on('trigger-activated', (trigger) => {
            console.log(`Trigger: ${trigger.name}`);
        });
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        if (!this.player) return;
        
        // Player movement
        const speed = 200;
        
        if (this.cursors.left.isDown) {
            this.player.body.setVelocityX(-speed);
        } else if (this.cursors.right.isDown) {
            this.player.body.setVelocityX(speed);
        } else {
            this.player.body.setVelocityX(0);
        }
        
        if (this.cursors.up.isDown) {
            this.player.body.setVelocityY(-speed);
        } else if (this.cursors.down.isDown) {
            this.player.body.setVelocityY(speed);
        } else {
            this.player.body.setVelocityY(0);
        }
    }
}

export default ForestScene;

/**
 * EXAMPLE 3: Creating Custom Components
 */

// components/PlayerController.js
class PlayerController {
    constructor(scene, gameObject, data) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.gameObject = gameObject;
        this.speed = data.speed || 200;
        this.jumpPower = data.jumpPower || 400;
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Set up input
        this.cursors = this.scene.input.keyboard.createCursorKeys();
        
        console.log('[PlayerController] Initialized');
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        const body = this.gameObject.body;
        
        // Horizontal movement
        if (this.cursors.left.isDown) {
            body.setVelocityX(-this.speed);
            this.gameObject.setFlipX(true);
        } else if (this.cursors.right.isDown) {
            body.setVelocityX(this.speed);
            this.gameObject.setFlipX(false);
        } else {
            body.setVelocityX(0);
        }
        
        // Jump
        if (this.cursors.up.isDown && body.onFloor()) {
            body.setVelocityY(-this.jumpPower);
        }
    }
}

// Register component globally
window.PlayerController = PlayerController;

// In EditorScene
const editor = this;

// Create a prefab from selected objects
editor.prefabManager.createPrefab('EnemySpawner', [

    triggerZone,

]);

    400,

);

/**
 * EXAMPLE 5: Custom Trigger Actions
 */

// In SceneLoader, extend executeAction method
executeAction(action) {
    switch (action.type) {
        case 'custom_teleport':
            const target = this.objectRegistry.get(action.params.targetId);
            if (target && this.scene.player) {
                this.scene.player.x = target.x;
                this.scene.player.y = target.y;
                
                // Camera flash effect
                this.scene.cameras.main.flash(500, 255, 255, 255);
            }
            break;
            
        case 'custom_spawn_enemies':
            const spawnCount = action.params.count || 3;
            const enemyType = action.params.enemyType;
            
            for (let i = 0; i < spawnCount; i++) {
                const x = action.params.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 100;
                const y = action.params.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 100;
                
                this.scene.events.emit('spawn-enemy', {
                    type: enemyType,
                    x: x,
                    y: y
                });
            }
            break;
            
        // ... other custom actions
            
        default:
            super.executeAction(action);
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 6: Scene Validation Before Save
 */

// Add to EditorScene
validateScene() {
    const errors = [];
    const warnings = [];
    
    // Check for player spawn
    const hasPlayer = this.sceneData.objects.some(obj => 
        obj.type === 'player' || obj.components?.PlayerController
    );
    
    if (!hasPlayer) {
        errors.push('Scene must have a player spawn point');
    }
    
    // Check for camera target
    if (this.sceneData.camera.follow) {
        const target = this.sceneData.objects.find(obj => 
            obj.id === this.sceneData.camera.follow
        );
        
        if (!target) {
            errors.push(`Camera follow target "${this.sceneData.camera.follow}" not found`);
        }
    }
    
    // Check for unreferenced objects
    this.sceneData.objects.forEach(obj => {
        if (!obj.layer) {
            warnings.push(`Object "${obj.name}" has no layer assigned`);
        }
        
        if (obj.appearance?.texture) {
            // Check if texture exists
            if (!this.textures.exists(obj.appearance.texture)) {
                errors.push(`Object "${obj.name}" references missing texture: ${obj.appearance.texture}`);
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Check trigger references
    this.sceneData.triggers?.forEach(trigger => {
        trigger.actions?.forEach(action => {
            if (action.type === 'spawn_boss') {
                const bossId = action.params.bossId;
                // Validate boss exists in data
                const bossData = dataManager.getEnemy(bossId);
                if (!bossData) {
                    errors.push(`Trigger "${trigger.name}" references unknown boss: ${bossId}`);
                }
            }
        });
    });
    
    return { errors, warnings };
}

// Use before saving
saveScene() {
    const validation = this.validateScene();
    
    if (validation.errors.length > 0) {
        alert('Cannot save scene with errors:\n' + validation.errors.join('\n'));
        return;
    }
    
    if (validation.warnings.length > 0) {
        const proceed = confirm(
            'Scene has warnings:\n' + 
            validation.warnings.join('\n') + 
            '\n\nSave anyway?'
        );
        
        if (!proceed) return;
    }
    
    // Proceed with save
    // ... existing save code
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 7: Exporting for Different Platforms
 */

// Export optimized for web
exportForWeb() {
    const sceneData = this.serializeScene();
    
    // Remove editor-only data
    sceneData.objects.forEach(obj => {
        delete obj.editorData;
    });
    
    // Compress
    const compressed = LZString.compressToBase64(JSON.stringify(sceneData));
    
    return compressed;
}

// Export for native platforms (with full data)
exportForNative() {
    const sceneData = this.serializeScene();
    
    // Include all data
    return JSON.stringify(sceneData, null, 2);
}

// Currently with basic Phaser lighting:

// Create sophisticated 2D lighting
const lightingSystem = new AdvancedLightingSystem(this);

// Point light with shadows
const torch = lightingSystem.addLight(400, 300, {
