```
## What We're Building

### Lighting System Architecture
```
Advanced Lighting System
│
├─── Render Pipeline
│    ├─── Lighting Layer (multiplicative blend)
│    ├─── Shadow Layer (occlusion)
│    ├─── Normal Map Layer (depth)
│    └─── Composite Layer (final output)
│
├─── Light Types
│    ├─── Point Lights (omnidirectional)
│    ├─── Spot Lights (cone-shaped)
│    ├─── Directional Lights (sun/moon)
│    └─── Area Lights (rectangular emitters)
│
├─── Shadow System
│    ├─── Ray Casting (shadow projection)
│    ├─── Occluder Management (what blocks light)
│    ├─── Shadow Map Generation
│    └─── Soft Shadows (penumbra)
│
├─── Normal Mapping
│    ├─── Normal Map Loader
│    ├─── Per-Pixel Lighting Shader
│    └─── Specular Highlights
│
├─── Effects
│    ├─── Light Flickering
│    ├─── Pulsing/Breathing
│    ├─── Color Cycling
│    └─── Volumetric Fog
│
└─── Performance Optimization
     ├─── Light Culling (off-screen)
     ├─── Shadow Caching
     ├─── LOD System (distance-based quality)
     └─── Pooling (object reuse)
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Lighting System
javascript
// systems/AdvancedLightingSystem.js

class AdvancedLightingSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.lights = [];
        this.shadowCasters = [];
        this.normalMappedSprites = new Map();
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            shadowsEnabled: true,
            normalMapsEnabled: true,
            ambientLight: {
                color: 0x222244,
                intensity: 0.3
            },
            maxLights: 32,
            shadowQuality: 'medium', // low, medium, high
            updateFrequency: 60 // Hz (updates per second)
        };
        
        // Performance tracking
        this.stats = {
            lightsRendered: 0,
            shadowsRendered: 0,
            frameTime: 0,
            lastUpdate: 0
        };
        
        // Render textures
        this.renderTextures = {};
        
        // Light pooling
        this.lightPool = [];
        this.maxPoolSize = 64;
        
        // Initialize system
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        // Create render textures for different passes
        this.createRenderTextures(width, height);
        
        // Create custom pipelines if needed
        this.createCustomPipelines();
        
        // Set up update loop
        this.setupUpdateLoop();
        
        console.log('[AdvancedLightingSystem] Initialized');
        console.log(`  - Resolution: ${width}x${height}`);
        console.log(`  - Max lights: ${this.config.maxLights}`);
        console.log(`  - Shadow quality: ${this.config.shadowQuality}`);
    }
    
    createRenderTextures(width, height) {
        // Base lighting layer
        this.renderTextures.lighting = this.scene.add.renderTexture(0, 0, width, height);
        this.renderTextures.lighting.setDepth(9998);
        this.renderTextures.lighting.setBlendMode(Phaser.BlendModes.MULTIPLY);
        this.renderTextures.lighting.setScrollFactor(0);
        
        // Shadow layer
        this.renderTextures.shadows = this.scene.add.renderTexture(0, 0, width, height);
        this.renderTextures.shadows.setDepth(9997);
        this.renderTextures.shadows.setBlendMode(Phaser.BlendModes.MULTIPLY);
        this.renderTextures.shadows.setScrollFactor(0);
        
        // Normal map layer (for advanced effects)
        this.renderTextures.normals = this.scene.add.renderTexture(0, 0, width, height);
        this.renderTextures.normals.setVisible(false);
        
        // Volumetric effects layer
        this.renderTextures.volumetric = this.scene.add.renderTexture(0, 0, width, height);
        this.renderTextures.volumetric.setDepth(9999);
        this.renderTextures.volumetric.setBlendMode(Phaser.BlendModes.ADD);
        this.renderTextures.volumetric.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.renderTextures.volumetric.setAlpha(0.5);
    }
    
    createCustomPipelines() {
        // Register custom shader pipeline for normal mapping
        if (!this.scene.game.renderer.pipelines.get('NormalMapPipeline')) {
            const pipeline = new NormalMapPipeline(this.scene.game);
            this.scene.game.renderer.pipelines.add('NormalMapPipeline', pipeline);
        }
    }
    
    setupUpdateLoop() {
        // Update at configured frequency
        const updateInterval = 1000 / this.config.updateFrequency;
        
        this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: updateInterval,
            callback: () => this.update(),
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    // === LIGHT MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Add a light to the scene
     * @param {number} x - X position
     * @param {number} y - Y position
     * @param {Object} config - Light configuration
     * @returns {Object} Light instance
     */
    addLight(x, y, config = {}) {
        // Check light limit
        if (this.lights.length >= this.config.maxLights) {
            console.warn('[AdvancedLightingSystem] Max lights reached');
            return null;
        }
        
        // Default configuration
        const light = {
            id: this.generateLightId(),
            x: x,
            y: y,
            
            // Type
            type: config.type || 'point', // point, spot, directional, area
            
            // Basic properties
            color: config.color || 0xffffff,
            intensity: config.intensity !== undefined ? config.intensity : 1.0,
            radius: config.radius || 100,
            
            // Spotlight properties
            angle: config.angle || 0, // Direction in radians
            cone: config.cone || Math.PI / 4, // Cone width in radians
            
            // Area light properties
            width: config.width || 100,
            height: config.height || 50,
            
            // Shadow properties
            castShadows: config.castShadows !== undefined ? config.castShadows : true,
            shadowQuality: config.shadowQuality || this.config.shadowQuality,
            
            // Effects
            flicker: config.flicker || null, // { speed: 0.05, amount: 0.2 }
            pulse: config.pulse || null, // { speed: 1, min: 0.5, max: 1.5 }
            colorCycle: config.colorCycle || null, // { colors: [...], speed: 1 }
            
            // Volumetric
            volumetric: config.volumetric || false,
            volumetricDensity: config.volumetricDensity || 0.5,
            
            // State
            enabled: true,
            visible: true,
            
            // Internal
            _currentIntensity: config.intensity || 1.0,
            _currentColor: config.color || 0xffffff,
            _time: 0,
            _graphics: null
        };
        
        // Validate configuration
        if (!this.validateLight(light)) {
            console.error('[AdvancedLightingSystem] Invalid light configuration');
            return null;
        }
        
        this.lights.push(light);
        
        console.log(`[AdvancedLightingSystem] Added ${light.type} light at (${x}, ${y})`);
        
        return light;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove a light
     * @param {Object} light - Light to remove
     */
    removeLight(light) {
        const index = this.lights.indexOf(light);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            // Clean up graphics
            if (light._graphics) {
                light._graphics.destroy();
            }
            
            this.lights.splice(index, 1);
            
            // Add to pool for reuse
            if (this.lightPool.length < this.maxPoolSize) {
                this.lightPool.push(light);
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get light by ID
     */
    getLight(id) {
        return this.lights.find(l => l.id === id);
    }
    
    /**
     * Update a light's properties
     */
    updateLight(light, properties) {
        Object.assign(light, properties);
    }
    
    validateLight(light) {
        // Check required properties
        if (typeof light.x !== 'number' || typeof light.y !== 'number') {
            console.error('Light position must be numbers');
            return false;
        }
        
        if (light.intensity < 0 || light.intensity > 10) {
            console.warn('Light intensity should be between 0 and 10');
        }
        
        if (light.radius <= 0) {
            console.error('Light radius must be positive');
            return false;
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    generateLightId() {
        return `light_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    // === SHADOW CASTER MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Add an object that casts shadows
     * @param {Phaser.GameObjects.GameObject} gameObject - Object to cast shadows
     * @param {Object} config - Shadow configuration
     */
    addShadowCaster(gameObject, config = {}) {
        const caster = {
            gameObject: gameObject,
            enabled: true,
            
            // Shape definition
            shapeType: config.shapeType || 'auto', // auto, rectangle, circle, polygon
            vertices: config.vertices || null,
            
            // Shadow properties
            opacity: config.opacity !== undefined ? config.opacity : 0.8,
            softness: config.softness || 0, // 0 = hard shadows, 1 = very soft
            
            // Performance
            static: config.static || false, // Static objects cache shadows
            _cachedShadow: null
        };
        
        // Auto-detect shape
        if (caster.shapeType === 'auto') {
            caster.vertices = this.detectShape(gameObject);
        } else if (!caster.vertices) {
            caster.vertices = this.getShapeVertices(gameObject, caster.shapeType);
        }
        
        this.shadowCasters.push(caster);
        
        console.log(`[AdvancedLightingSystem] Added shadow caster: ${gameObject.name || 'unnamed'}`);
        
        return caster;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove a shadow caster
     */
    removeShadowCaster(gameObject) {
        const index = this.shadowCasters.findIndex(c => c.gameObject === gameObject);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.shadowCasters.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Detect shape of a game object
     */
    detectShape(gameObject) {
        // Try to get physics body first
        if (gameObject.body) {
            if (gameObject.body.isCircle) {
                return this.getCircleVertices(
                    gameObject.x,
                    gameObject.y,
                    gameObject.body.radius
                );
            } else {
                return this.getRectangleVertices(
                    gameObject.x - gameObject.body.halfWidth,
                    gameObject.y - gameObject.body.halfHeight,
                    gameObject.body.width,
                    gameObject.body.height
                );
            }
        }
        
        // Fall back to bounds
        const bounds = gameObject.getBounds();
        return this.getRectangleVertices(
            bounds.x,
            bounds.y,
            bounds.width,
            bounds.height
        );
    }
    
    /**
     * Get vertices for different shapes
     */
    getShapeVertices(gameObject, shapeType) {
        switch (shapeType) {
            case 'rectangle':
                const bounds = gameObject.getBounds();
                return this.getRectangleVertices(
                    bounds.x, bounds.y,
                    bounds.width, bounds.height
                );
                
            case 'circle':
                return this.getCircleVertices(
                    gameObject.x,
                    gameObject.y,
                    gameObject.width / 2
                );
                
            default:
                return this.detectShape(gameObject);
        }
    }
    
    getRectangleVertices(x, y, width, height) {
        return [
            { x: x, y: y },
            { x: x + width, y: y },
            { x: x + width, y: y + height },
            { x: x, y: y + height }
        ];
    }
    
    getCircleVertices(x, y, radius, segments = 16) {
        const vertices = [];
        
        for (let i = 0; i < segments; i++) {
            const angle = (i / segments) * Math.PI * 2;
            vertices.push({
                x: x + Math.cos(angle) * radius,
                y: y + Math.sin(angle) * radius
            });
        }
        
        return vertices;
    }
    
    // === NORMAL MAPPING ===
    
    /**
     * Add normal map to a sprite for depth
     * @param {Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite} sprite - Sprite to apply normal map
     * @param {string} normalMapKey - Texture key for normal map
     */
    addNormalMap(sprite, normalMapKey) {
        if (!this.config.normalMapsEnabled) return;
        
        // Check if normal map texture exists
        if (!this.scene.textures.exists(normalMapKey)) {
            console.warn(`[AdvancedLightingSystem] Normal map texture not found: ${normalMapKey}`);
            return;
        }
        
        // Apply normal map pipeline
        sprite.setPipeline('NormalMapPipeline');
        
        // Store normal map reference
        this.normalMappedSprites.set(sprite, {
            normalMapKey: normalMapKey,
            specularIntensity: 0.5,
            specularPower: 32
        });
        
        console.log(`[AdvancedLightingSystem] Applied normal map to sprite: ${normalMapKey}`);
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove normal map from sprite
     */
    removeNormalMap(sprite) {
        sprite.resetPipeline();
        this.normalMappedSprites.delete(sprite);
    }
    
    // === UPDATE LOOP ===
    
    update() {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        const startTime = performance.now();
        
        // Clear render textures
        this.clearRenderTextures();
        
        // Render ambient lighting
        this.renderAmbientLight();
        
        // Update and render lights
        this.updateLights();
        this.renderLights();
        
        // Render shadows if enabled
        if (this.config.shadowsEnabled) {
            this.renderShadows();
        }
        
        // Update normal mapped sprites
        if (this.config.normalMapsEnabled) {
            this.updateNormalMaps();
        }
        
        // Render volumetric effects
        this.renderVolumetric();
        
        // Composite layers
        this.compositeLayers();
        
        // Update stats
        this.stats.frameTime = performance.now() - startTime;
        this.stats.lastUpdate = Date.now();
    }
    
    clearRenderTextures() {
        this.renderTextures.lighting.clear();
        this.renderTextures.shadows.clear();
        this.renderTextures.volumetric.clear();
    }
    
    renderAmbientLight() {
        const ambient = this.config.ambientLight;
        
        // Fill lighting layer with ambient color
        this.renderTextures.lighting.fill(
            ambient.color,
            ambient.intensity
        );
    }
    
    updateLights() {
        const delta = this.scene.game.loop.delta / 1000; // Convert to seconds
        
        this.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (!light.enabled) return;
            
            light._time += delta;
            
            // Apply flicker effect
            if (light.flicker) {
                const flicker = light.flicker;
                const flickerAmount = Math.sin(light._time * flicker.speed * Math.PI * 2) * flicker.amount;
                light._currentIntensity = light.intensity * (1 + flickerAmount);
            }
            
            // Apply pulse effect
            if (light.pulse) {
                const pulse = light.pulse;
                const t = (Math.sin(light._time * pulse.speed * Math.PI * 2) + 1) / 2;
                light._currentIntensity = Phaser.Math.Linear(pulse.min, pulse.max, t) * light.intensity;
            }
            
            // Apply color cycle
            if (light.colorCycle) {
                const cycle = light.colorCycle;
                const index = Math.floor(light._time * cycle.speed) % cycle.colors.length;
                const nextIndex = (index + 1) % cycle.colors.length;
                const t = (light._time * cycle.speed) % 1;
                
                const color1 = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(cycle.colors[index]);
                const color2 = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(cycle.colors[nextIndex]);
                
                const interpolated = Phaser.Display.Color.Interpolate.ColorWithColor(
                    color1, color2, 100, t * 100
                );
                
                light._currentColor = Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(
                    interpolated.r,
                    interpolated.g,
                    interpolated.b
                );
            }
        });
    }
    
    renderLights() {
        this.stats.lightsRendered = 0;
        
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        const worldView = camera.worldView;
        
        this.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (!light.enabled || !light.visible) return;
            
            // Cull lights outside camera view (with padding)
            const padding = light.radius;
            if (!Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Overlaps(worldView, 
                new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(
                    light.x - padding,
                    light.y - padding,
                    padding * 2,
                    padding * 2
                ))) {
                return;
            }
            
            // Render based on light type
            switch (light.type) {
                case 'point':
                    this.renderPointLight(light, camera);
                    break;
                    
                case 'spot':
                    this.renderSpotLight(light, camera);
                    break;
                    
                case 'directional':
                    this.renderDirectionalLight(light, camera);
                    break;
                    
                case 'area':
                    this.renderAreaLight(light, camera);
                    break;
            }
            
            this.stats.lightsRendered++;
        });
    }
    
    renderPointLight(light, camera) {
        // Create graphics if needed
        if (!light._graphics) {
            light._graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        }
        
        light._graphics.clear();
        
        // Convert world position to screen position
        const screenPos = camera.getWorldPoint(light.x, light.y);
        
        // Create radial gradient
        const gradient = light._graphics.createRadialGradient(
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y, 0,
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y, light.radius * camera.zoom
        );
        
        // Get current color with intensity
        const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(light._currentColor);
        const r = Math.floor(color.red * light._currentIntensity);
        const g = Math.floor(color.green * light._currentIntensity);
        const b = Math.floor(color.blue * light._currentIntensity);
        
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgb(${r},${g},${b})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        
        light._graphics.fillStyle(gradient);
        light._graphics.fillCircle(
            screenPos.x,
            screenPos.y,
            light.radius * camera.zoom
        );
        
        // Draw to lighting render texture
        this.renderTextures.lighting.draw(light._graphics);
    }
    
    renderSpotLight(light, camera) {
        if (!light._graphics) {
            light._graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        }
        
        light._graphics.clear();
        
        const screenPos = camera.getWorldPoint(light.x, light.y);
        
        // Calculate spotlight cone
        const halfCone = light.cone / 2;
        const angleStart = light.angle - halfCone;
        const angleEnd = light.angle + halfCone;
        
        // Create gradient
        const gradient = light._graphics.createRadialGradient(
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y, 0,
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y, light.radius * camera.zoom
        );
        
        const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(light._currentColor);
        const r = Math.floor(color.red * light._currentIntensity);
        const g = Math.floor(color.green * light._currentIntensity);
        const b = Math.floor(color.blue * light._currentIntensity);
        
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgb(${r},${g},${b})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        
        light._graphics.fillStyle(gradient);
        
        // Draw cone shape
        light._graphics.beginPath();
        light._graphics.moveTo(screenPos.x, screenPos.y);
        light._graphics.arc(
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y,
            light.radius * camera.zoom,
            angleStart, angleEnd
        );
        light._graphics.closePath();
        light._graphics.fillPath();
        
        this.renderTextures.lighting.draw(light._graphics);
    }
    
    renderDirectionalLight(light, camera) {
        // Directional lights illuminate entire scene from one direction
        if (!light._graphics) {
            light._graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        }
        
        light._graphics.clear();
        
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        // Create directional gradient
        const angle = light.angle;
        const distance = Math.max(width, height);
        
        const startX = width / 2 - Math.cos(angle) * distance;
        const startY = height / 2 - Math.sin(angle) * distance;
        const endX = width / 2 + Math.cos(angle) * distance;
        const endY = height / 2 + Math.sin(angle) * distance;
        
        const gradient = light._graphics.createLinearGradient(
            startX, startY, endX, endY
        );
        
        const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(light._currentColor);
        const r = Math.floor(color.red * light._currentIntensity);
        const g = Math.floor(color.green * light._currentIntensity);
        const b = Math.floor(color.blue * light._currentIntensity);
        
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgb(${r},${g},${b})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        
        light._graphics.fillStyle(gradient);
        light._graphics.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
        
        this.renderTextures.lighting.draw(light._graphics);
    }
    
    renderAreaLight(light, camera) {
        if (!light._graphics) {
            light._graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        }
        
        light._graphics.clear();
        
        const screenPos = camera.getWorldPoint(light.x, light.y);
        
        // Create rectangular gradient
        const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(light._currentColor);
        const r = Math.floor(color.red * light._currentIntensity);
        const g = Math.floor(color.green * light._currentIntensity);
        const b = Math.floor(color.blue * light._currentIntensity);
        
        light._graphics.fillStyle(Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(r, g, b), 1);
        light._graphics.fillRect(
            screenPos.x - light.width / 2,
            screenPos.y - light.height / 2,
            light.width,
            light.height
        );
        
        // Add soft edges with gradient falloff
        const falloff = 20;
        
        light._graphics.fillStyle(0x000000, 0);
        light._graphics.fillRect(
            screenPos.x - light.width / 2 - falloff,
            screenPos.y - light.height / 2 - falloff,
            light.width + falloff * 2,
            light.height + falloff * 2
        );
        
        this.renderTextures.lighting.draw(light._graphics);
    }
    
    // === SHADOW RENDERING ===
    
    renderShadows() {
        this.stats.shadowsRendered = 0;
        
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        
        // For each light that casts shadows
        this.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (!light.enabled || !light.castShadows) return;
            
            // For each shadow caster
            this.shadowCasters.forEach(caster => {
                if (!caster.enabled) return;
                
                // Use cached shadow if static
                if (caster.static && caster._cachedShadow) {
                    this.renderTextures.shadows.draw(caster._cachedShadow);
                    return;
                }
                
                // Calculate and render shadow
                const shadow = this.calculateShadow(light, caster, camera);
                
                if (shadow) {
                    this.renderShadow(shadow, caster.opacity, camera);
                    
                    // Cache if static
                    if (caster.static) {
                        caster._cachedShadow = shadow;
                    }
                    
                    this.stats.shadowsRendered++;
                }
            });
        });
    }
    
    calculateShadow(light, caster, camera) {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        // Get caster vertices in world space
        let vertices = caster.vertices;
        
        // Update vertices if object has moved (for dynamic objects)
        if (!caster.static) {
            vertices = this.detectShape(caster.gameObject);
        }
        
        // Project shadows based on light type
        let shadowPolygon;
        
        switch (light.type) {
            case 'point':
            case 'spot':
                shadowPolygon = this.projectPointLightShadow(light, vertices);
                break;
                
            case 'directional':
                shadowPolygon = this.projectDirectionalLightShadow(light, vertices);
                break;
                
            default:
                return null;
        }
        
        if (!shadowPolygon || shadowPolygon.length === 0) {
            graphics.destroy();
            return null;
        }
        
        // Draw shadow polygon
        graphics.fillStyle(0x000000, 1);
        graphics.beginPath();
        
        const screenPos = camera.getWorldPoint(shadowPolygon[0].x, shadowPolygon[0].y);
        graphics.moveTo(screenPos.x, screenPos.y);
        
        for (let i = 1; i < shadowPolygon.length; i++) {
            const pos = camera.getWorldPoint(shadowPolygon[i].x, shadowPolygon[i].y);
            graphics.lineTo(pos.x, pos.y);
        }
        
        graphics.closePath();
        graphics.fillPath();
        
        return graphics;
    }
    
    projectPointLightShadow(light, vertices) {
        const shadowVertices = [];
        const projectionDistance = 2000; // How far to project shadows
        
        // For each edge of the occluder
        for (let i = 0; i < vertices.length; i++) {
            const v1 = vertices[i];
            const v2 = vertices[(i + 1) % vertices.length];
            
            // Check if edge faces away from light
            const edgeCenter = {
                x: (v1.x + v2.x) / 2,
                y: (v1.y + v2.y) / 2
            };
            
            const toLightX = light.x - edgeCenter.x;
            const toLightY = light.y - edgeCenter.y;
            
            const edgeX = v2.x - v1.x;
            const edgeY = v2.y - v1.y;
            
            // Edge normal (perpendicular)
            const normalX = -edgeY;
            const normalY = edgeX;
            
            // Dot product to determine facing
            const dot = toLightX * normalX + toLightY * normalY;
            
            // If edge faces away from light, it casts a shadow
            if (dot < 0) {
                // Project vertices away from light
                const dir1X = v1.x - light.x;
                const dir1Y = v1.y - light.y;
                const len1 = Math.sqrt(dir1X * dir1X + dir1Y * dir1Y);
                
                const dir2X = v2.x - light.x;
                const dir2Y = v2.y - light.y;
                const len2 = Math.sqrt(dir2X * dir2X + dir2Y * dir2Y);
                
                // Add shadow quad vertices
                shadowVertices.push(v1);
                shadowVertices.push(v2);
                shadowVertices.push({
                    x: v2.x + (dir2X / len2) * projectionDistance,
                    y: v2.y + (dir2Y / len2) * projectionDistance
                });
                shadowVertices.push({
                    x: v1.x + (dir1X / len1) * projectionDistance,
                    y: v1.y + (dir1Y / len1) * projectionDistance
                });
            }
        }
        
        return shadowVertices;
    }
    
    projectDirectionalLightShadow(light, vertices) {
        const shadowVertices = [];
        const projectionDistance = 2000;
        
        const dirX = Math.cos(light.angle);
        const dirY = Math.sin(light.angle);
        
        // Project all vertices in light direction
        vertices.forEach(v => {
            shadowVertices.push(v);
            shadowVertices.push({
                x: v.x + dirX * projectionDistance,
                y: v.y + dirY * projectionDistance
            });
        });
        
        return shadowVertices;
    }
    
    renderShadow(shadowGraphics, opacity, camera) {
        // Apply shadow opacity
        shadowGraphics.setAlpha(opacity);
        
        // Apply soft shadow blur if configured
        // (This would require a custom shader for true soft shadows)
        
        // Draw to shadow render texture
        this.renderTextures.shadows.draw(shadowGraphics);
        
        // Clean up
        shadowGraphics.destroy();
    }
    
    // === NORMAL MAP UPDATES ===
    
    updateNormalMaps() {
        // Update shader uniforms for each normal mapped sprite
        this.normalMappedSprites.forEach((data, sprite) => {
            const pipeline = sprite.pipeline;
            
            if (pipeline && pipeline.name === 'NormalMapPipeline') {
                // Get normal map texture
                const normalMap = this.scene.textures.get(data.normalMapKey);
                
                // Find nearest lights
                const nearestLights = this.findNearestLights(sprite, 4);
                
                // Update shader uniforms
                pipeline.setUniform('uNormalMap', normalMap);
                pipeline.setUniform('uLights', nearestLights);
                pipeline.setUniform('uSpecularIntensity', data.specularIntensity);
                pipeline.setUniform('uSpecularPower', data.specularPower);
            }
        });
    }
    
    findNearestLights(sprite, maxLights) {
        const lightData = [];
        
        // Sort lights by distance
        const sorted = [...this.lights]
            .filter(l => l.enabled && l.visible)
            .sort((a, b) => {
                const distA = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(sprite.x, sprite.y, a.x, a.y);
                const distB = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(sprite.x, sprite.y, b.x, b.y);
                return distA - distB;
            });
        
        // Take closest lights
        for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(maxLights, sorted.length); i++) {
            const light = sorted[i];
            
            lightData.push({
                position: [light.x, light.y],
                color: [
                    ((light._currentColor >> 16) & 0xff) / 255,
                    ((light._currentColor >> 8) & 0xff) / 255,
                    (light._currentColor & 0xff) / 255
                ],
                intensity: light._currentIntensity,
                radius: light.radius
            });
        }
        
        return lightData;
    }
    
    // === VOLUMETRIC EFFECTS ===
    
    renderVolumetric() {
        // Render volumetric light scattering (god rays)
        this.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (!light.enabled || !light.volumetric) return;
            
            this.renderVolumetricLight(light);
        });
    }
    
    renderVolumetricLight(light) {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        const screenPos = camera.getWorldPoint(light.x, light.y);
        
        // Create radial gradient with lower alpha for volumetric effect
        const gradient = graphics.createRadialGradient(
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y, 0,
            screenPos.x, screenPos.y, light.radius * camera.zoom
        );
        
        const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(light._currentColor);
        const r = color.red;
        const g = color.green;
        const b = color.blue;
        const alpha = light.volumetricDensity * light._currentIntensity;
        
        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${alpha})`);
        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        
        graphics.fillStyle(gradient);
        graphics.fillCircle(screenPos.x, screenPos.y, light.radius * camera.zoom);
        
        this.renderTextures.volumetric.draw(graphics);
        
        graphics.destroy();
    }
    
    // === COMPOSITING ===
    
    compositeLayers() {
        // Layers are already set up with correct blend modes and depths
        // They composite automatically in the render pipeline
        
        // Optional: Apply post-processing here
        // e.g., bloom, color grading, vignette
    }
    
    // === UTILITY METHODS ===
    
    /**
     * Set ambient light color and intensity
     */
    setAmbientLight(color, intensity) {
        this.config.ambientLight.color = color;
        this.config.ambientLight.intensity = intensity;
    }
    
    /**
     * Enable/disable entire lighting system
     */
    setEnabled(enabled) {
        this.config.enabled = enabled;
        
        // Show/hide render textures
        Object.values(this.renderTextures).forEach(rt => {
            rt.setVisible(enabled);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Enable/disable shadows
     */
    setShadowsEnabled(enabled) {
        this.config.shadowsEnabled = enabled;
        this.renderTextures.shadows.setVisible(enabled);
    }
    
    /**
     * Set shadow quality
     */
    setShadowQuality(quality) {
        this.config.shadowQuality = quality;
        
        // Adjust shadow rendering parameters based on quality
        switch (quality) {
            case 'low':
                // Reduce shadow caster detail, increase caching
                break;
            case 'medium':
                // Default settings
                break;
            case 'high':
                // Increase detail, add soft shadows
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get performance statistics
     */
    getStats() {
        return { ...this.stats };
    }
    
    /**
     * Clean up
     */
    shutdown() {
        // Destroy all lights
        this.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (light._graphics) {
                light._graphics.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        // Destroy render textures
        Object.values(this.renderTextures).forEach(rt => {
            rt.destroy();
        });
        
        // Clear arrays
        this.lights = [];
        this.shadowCasters = [];
        this.normalMappedSprites.clear();
        
        console.log('[AdvancedLightingSystem] Shutdown complete');
    }
}

export default AdvancedLightingSystem;
Step 2: Normal Map Shader Pipeline
javascript
// pipelines/NormalMapPipeline.js

const normalMapFragmentShader = `
precision mediump float;

uniform sampler2D uMainSampler;
uniform sampler2D uNormalMap;

// Light data (up to 4 lights)
uniform vec2 uLightPositions[4];
uniform vec3 uLightColors[4];
uniform float uLightIntensities[4];
uniform float uLightRadii[4];
uniform int uLightCount;

// Surface properties
uniform float uSpecularIntensity;
uniform float uSpecularPower;
uniform vec3 uAmbientColor;
uniform float uAmbientIntensity;

varying vec2 outTexCoord;
varying vec4 outTint;

void main() {
    // Sample textures
    vec4 color = texture2D(uMainSampler, outTexCoord);
    vec3 normal = texture2D(uNormalMap, outTexCoord).rgb;
    
    // Convert normal from [0,1] to [-1,1]
    normal = normal * 2.0 - 1.0;
    normal.z = sqrt(1.0 - dot(normal.xy, normal.xy)); // Reconstruct Z
    normal = normalize(normal);
    
    // Start with ambient lighting
    vec3 finalColor = color.rgb * uAmbientColor * uAmbientIntensity;
    
    // Calculate lighting for each light
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        if (i >= uLightCount) break;
        
        // Light direction (in screen space, need to convert)
        vec2 lightPos = uLightPositions[i];
        vec2 pixelPos = gl_FragCoord.xy;
        vec3 lightDir = vec3(lightPos - pixelPos, 50.0); // Z offset for depth
        
        float distance = length(lightDir);
        lightDir = normalize(lightDir);
        
        // Attenuation
        float attenuation = 1.0 - clamp(distance / uLightRadii[i], 0.0, 1.0);
        attenuation = attenuation * attenuation; // Squared falloff
        
        // Diffuse lighting (Lambert)
        float diffuse = max(dot(normal, lightDir), 0.0);
        
        // Specular lighting (Blinn-Phong)
        vec3 viewDir = vec3(0.0, 0.0, 1.0); // Camera is perpendicular to surface
        vec3 halfDir = normalize(lightDir + viewDir);
        float specular = pow(max(dot(normal, halfDir), 0.0), uSpecularPower);
        specular *= uSpecularIntensity;
        
        // Combine
        vec3 lightContribution = uLightColors[i] * uLightIntensities[i] * attenuation;
        finalColor += color.rgb * lightContribution * diffuse;
        finalColor += lightContribution * specular;
    }
    
    // Apply tint
    finalColor *= outTint.rgb;
    
    gl_FragColor = vec4(finalColor, color.a * outTint.a);
}
`;

class NormalMapPipeline extends Phaser.Renderer.WebGL.Pipelines.MultiPipeline {
    constructor(game) {
        super({
            game: game,
            name: 'NormalMapPipeline',
            fragShader: normalMapFragmentShader
        });
    }
    
    onBoot() {
        // Set default uniform values
        this.set1i('uNormalMap', 1);
        this.set1i('uLightCount', 0);
        this.set1f('uSpecularIntensity', 0.5);
        this.set1f('uSpecularPower', 32.0);
        this.set3f('uAmbientColor', 0.2, 0.2, 0.3);
        this.set1f('uAmbientIntensity', 0.3);
    }
    
    onBind(gameObject) {
        super.onBind();
        
        // Bind normal map texture
        if (gameObject.normalMapTexture) {
            this.renderer.setTexture2D(gameObject.normalMapTexture, 1);
        }
    }
    
    setUniform(name, value) {
        if (name === 'uNormalMap') {
            // Handle texture
            this.renderer.setTexture2D(value, 1);
        } else if (name === 'uLights') {
            // Handle light array
            this.setLights(value);
        } else {
            // Handle regular uniforms
            this.set1f(name, value);
        }
    }
    
    setLights(lights) {
        const maxLights = Math.min(lights.length, 4);
        
        this.set1i('uLightCount', maxLights);
        
        const positions = [];
        const colors = [];
        const intensities = [];
        const radii = [];
        
        for (let i = 0; i < maxLights; i++) {
            const light = lights[i];
            
            positions.push(light.position[0], light.position[1]);
            colors.push(light.color[0], light.color[1], light.color[2]);
            intensities.push(light.intensity);
            radii.push(light.radius);
        }
        
        this.set2fv('uLightPositions', positions);
        this.set3fv('uLightColors', colors);
        this.set1fv('uLightIntensities', intensities);
        this.set1fv('uLightRadii', radii);
    }
}

export default NormalMapPipeline;
Step 3: Sap Cycle Integration
javascript
// Integration with Sap Cycle for dynamic lighting

class SapCycleLightingIntegration {
    constructor(scene, lightingSystem, sapCycleManager) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.lightingSystem = lightingSystem;
        this.sapCycleManager = sapCycleManager;
        
        // Phase lighting presets
        this.phasePresets = {
            blue: {
                ambient: { color: 0x3366bb, intensity: 0.4 },
                tint: 0x88aaff,
                fogColor: 0x4477cc
            },
            crimson: {
                ambient: { color: 0xbb3344, intensity: 0.35 },
                tint: 0xff8899,
                fogColor: 0xcc4455
            },
            silver: {
                ambient: { color: 0xccccdd, intensity: 0.5 },
                tint: 0xddddff,
                fogColor: 0xaaaacc
            }
        };
        
        // Listen for phase changes
        this.sapCycleManager.events.on('phase-changed', (newPhase) => {
            this.onPhaseChanged(newPhase);
        });
        
        // Apply initial phase lighting
        this.applyPhaseLighting(this.sapCycleManager.currentPhase);
    }
    
    onPhaseChanged(newPhase) {
        console.log(`[SapCycleLighting] Phase changed to: ${newPhase}`);
        
        // Transition to new phase lighting
        this.transitionToPhase(newPhase, 3000); // 3 second transition
    }
    
    transitionToPhase(phase, duration) {
        const preset = this.phasePresets[phase];
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[SapCycleLighting] Unknown phase: ${phase}`);
            return;
        }
        
        // Get current ambient
        const currentAmbient = this.lightingSystem.config.ambientLight;
        
        // Tween to new ambient color and intensity
        this.scene.tweens.addCounter({
            from: 0,
            to: 1,
            duration: duration,
            onUpdate: (tween) => {
                const t = tween.getValue();
                
                // Interpolate color
                const currentColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(currentAmbient.color);
                const targetColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(preset.ambient.color);
                
                const interpolated = Phaser.Display.Color.Interpolate.ColorWithColor(
                    currentColor,
                    targetColor,
                    100,
                    t * 100
                );
                
                const newColor = Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(
                    interpolated.r,
                    interpolated.g,
                    interpolated.b
                );
                
                // Interpolate intensity
                const newIntensity = Phaser.Math.Linear(
                    currentAmbient.intensity,
                    preset.ambient.intensity,
                    t
                );
                
                this.lightingSystem.setAmbientLight(newColor, newIntensity);
            }
        });
        
        // Update spell light colors based on phase
        this.updateSpellLightColors(phase);
    }
    
    applyPhaseLighting(phase) {
        const preset = this.phasePresets[phase];
        
        if (preset) {
            this.lightingSystem.setAmbientLight(
                preset.ambient.color,
                preset.ambient.intensity
            );
        }
    }
    
    updateSpellLightColors(phase) {
        // Find all spell-related lights and update their colors
        this.lightingSystem.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (light.spellLight) {
                // Adjust spell light color based on phase
                const phaseTint = this.phasePresets[phase].tint;
                
                // Blend original color with phase tint
                const originalColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(light.originalColor);
                const tintColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(phaseTint);
                
                const blended = Phaser.Display.Color.Interpolate.ColorWithColor(
                    originalColor,
                    tintColor,
                    100,
                    30 // 30% tint
                );
                
                light.color = Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(
                    blended.r,
                    blended.g,
                    blended.b
                );
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Create a spell light effect
     */
    createSpellLight(spell, caster, target) {
        // Determine light properties based on spell
        const lightConfig = this.getSpellLightConfig(spell);
        
        // Create light at caster position
        const light = this.lightingSystem.addLight(caster.x, caster.y, lightConfig);
        
        if (!light) return;
        
        // Mark as spell light
        light.spellLight = true;
        light.originalColor = lightConfig.color;
        
        // Animate light to target
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: light,
            x: target.x,
            y: target.y,
            duration: 300,
            ease: 'Quad.easeOut',
            onComplete: () => {
                // Flash on impact
                this.flashLight(light, 1.5, 100);
                
                // Remove after delay
                this.scene.time.delayedCall(500, () => {
                    this.lightingSystem.removeLight(light);
                });
            }
        });
        
        return light;
    }
    
    getSpellLightConfig(spell) {
        // Default configuration
        const config = {
            type: 'point',
            radius: 80,
            intensity: 1.2,
            castShadows: false,
            volumetric: true,
            volumetricDensity: 0.3
        };
        
        // Customize based on spell element
        switch (spell.element) {
            case 'nature':
                config.color = 0x44ff88;
                config.flicker = { speed: 0.1, amount: 0.1 };
                break;
                
            case 'arcane':
                config.color = 0x4488ff;
                config.pulse = { speed: 2, min: 0.8, max: 1.2 };
                break;
                
            case 'shadow':
                config.color = 0x8844ff;
                config.intensity = 0.8;
                config.volumetric = false;
                break;
                
            case 'radiant':
                config.color = 0xffffaa;
                config.intensity = 1.5;
                config.radius = 120;
                break;
                
            default:
                config.color = 0xffffff;
        }
        
        return config;
    }
    
    flashLight(light, maxIntensity, duration) {
        const originalIntensity = light.intensity;
        
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: light,
            intensity: maxIntensity,
            duration: duration / 2,
            yoyo: true,
            onComplete: () => {
                light.intensity = originalIntensity;
            }
        });
    }
}

export default SapCycleLightingIntegration;
Step 4: Lighting Presets and Configurations
javascript
// configs/lightingPresets.js

const LIGHTING_PRESETS = {
    // Time of day presets
    timeOfDay: {
        dawn: {
            ambient: { color: 0xff8866, intensity: 0.4 },
            directionalLight: {
                angle: -Math.PI / 4, // 45 degrees from horizon
                color: 0xffaa88,
                intensity: 0.6
            }
        },
        
        day: {
            ambient: { color: 0xffffee, intensity: 0.8 },
            directionalLight: {
                angle: -Math.PI / 2, // Directly overhead
                color: 0xffffee,
                intensity: 1.0
            }
        },
        
        dusk: {
            ambient: { color: 0xff6644, intensity: 0.5 },
            directionalLight: {
                angle: -Math.PI / 6, // Low angle
                color: 0xff8844,
                intensity: 0.7
            }
        },
        
        night: {
            ambient: { color: 0x223344, intensity: 0.2 },
            directionalLight: {
                angle: Math.PI / 2, // Moon from below (southern hemisphere style)
                color: 0x8899bb,
                intensity: 0.3
            }
        }
    },
    
    // Location-specific presets
    locations: {
        forest: {
            ambient: { color: 0x336633, intensity: 0.4 },
            fog: {
                color: 0x88aa88,
                density: 0.3
            }
        },
        
        cave: {
            ambient: { color: 0x222222, intensity: 0.1 },
            echo: true // Audio effect
        },

            ambient: { color: 0x8888aa, intensity: 0.5 },
            mystical: true // Special effects
        },

            ambient: { color: 0xffffbb, intensity: 0.9 },
            heatShimmer: true
        },
        
        underwater: {
            ambient: { color: 0x4488aa, intensity: 0.6 },
            caustics: true, // Water light patterns
            particlesFloat: true
        }
    },
    
    // Combat/gameplay presets
    combat: {
        normal: {
            ambient: { color: 0x666688, intensity: 0.5 }
        },

            ambient: { color: 0x884444, intensity: 0.4 },
            dramaticLighting: true,
            spotlights: [
                { x: 0, y: -200, angle: Math.PI / 2, cone: Math.PI / 3 }
            ]
        },
        
        stealth: {
            ambient: { color: 0x222244, intensity: 0.2 },
            emphasizeShadows: true
        }

    // Weather presets
    weather: {

        },

        },

            lightning: {
                frequency: 5000, // ms between flashes
                duration: 100
            }
        },

};

// Preset application helper
class LightingPresetManager {
    constructor(lightingSystem) {
        this.lightingSystem = lightingSystem;
        this.currentPreset = null;
        this.activeEffects = [];
    }
    
    applyPreset(category, name, transitionDuration = 1000) {
        const preset = LIGHTING_PRESETS[category]?.[name];
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[LightingPresets] Unknown preset: ${category}.${name}`);
            return;
        }
        
        console.log(`[LightingPresets] Applying preset: ${category}.${name}`);
        
        // Clear existing effects
        this.clearEffects();
        
        // Apply ambient lighting
        if (preset.ambient) {
            this.transitionAmbient(preset.ambient, transitionDuration);
        }
        
        // Apply directional light
        if (preset.directionalLight) {
            this.applyDirectionalLight(preset.directionalLight);
        }
        
        // Apply special effects
        if (preset.fog) {
            this.applyFog(preset.fog);
        }
        
        if (preset.lightning) {
            this.startLightning(preset.lightning);
        }
        
        this.currentPreset = { category, name, preset };
    }
    
    transitionAmbient(ambientConfig, duration) {
        const scene = this.lightingSystem.scene;
        const current = this.lightingSystem.config.ambientLight;
        
        scene.tweens.addCounter({
            from: 0,
            to: 1,
            duration: duration,
            onUpdate: (tween) => {
                const t = tween.getValue();
                
                const currentColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(current.color);
                const targetColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(ambientConfig.color);
                
                const interpolated = Phaser.Display.Color.Interpolate.ColorWithColor(
                    currentColor, targetColor, 100, t * 100
                );
                
                const newColor = Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(
                    interpolated.r, interpolated.g, interpolated.b
                );
                
                const newIntensity = Phaser.Math.Linear(
                    current.intensity,
                    ambientConfig.intensity,
                    t
                );
                
                this.lightingSystem.setAmbientLight(newColor, newIntensity);
            }
        });
    }
    
    applyDirectionalLight(config) {
        // Remove existing directional lights
        this.lightingSystem.lights
            .filter(l => l.type === 'directional')
            .forEach(l => this.lightingSystem.removeLight(l));
        
        // Add new directional light
        const light = this.lightingSystem.addLight(0, 0, {
            type: 'directional',
            angle: config.angle,
            color: config.color,
            intensity: config.intensity,
            castShadows: true
        });
        
        this.activeEffects.push(light);
    }
    
    applyFog(fogConfig) {
        // Increase volumetric density on all lights
        this.lightingSystem.lights.forEach(light => {
            light.volumetric = true;
            light.volumetricDensity = fogConfig.density;
        });
    }
    
    startLightning(lightningConfig) {
        const scene = this.lightingSystem.scene;
        
        const flashLightning = () => {
            // Create brief intense white light
            const light = this.lightingSystem.addLight(
                scene.scale.width / 2,
                scene.scale.height / 2,
                {
                    type: 'directional',
                    angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
                    color: 0xffffff,
                    intensity: lightningConfig.intensity || 2.0,
                    castShadows: false
                }
            );
            
            // Flash camera
            scene.cameras.main.flash(lightningConfig.duration, 255, 255, 255);
            
            // Remove light after duration
            scene.time.delayedCall(lightningConfig.duration, () => {
                this.lightingSystem.removeLight(light);
            });
            
            // Schedule next flash
            const nextDelay = lightningConfig.frequency + 
                (Math.random() - 0.5) * lightningConfig.frequency * 0.5;
            
            const timer = scene.time.delayedCall(nextDelay, flashLightning);
            this.activeEffects.push(timer);
        };
        
        // Start first flash
        flashLightning();
    }
    
    clearEffects() {
        this.activeEffects.forEach(effect => {
            if (effect.remove) {
                effect.remove(); // Timer
            } else if (effect.id) {
                this.lightingSystem.removeLight(effect); // Light
            }
        });
        
        this.activeEffects = [];
    }
    
    getCurrentPreset() {
        return this.currentPreset;
    }
}

export { LIGHTING_PRESETS, LightingPresetManager };
Step 5: Performance Optimization
javascript
// systems/LightingOptimizer.js

class LightingOptimizer {
    constructor(lightingSystem) {
        this.lightingSystem = lightingSystem;
        
        this.config = {
            // Light culling
            cullOffscreenLights: true,
            cullDistance: 200, // Additional padding beyond screen
            
            // LOD (Level of Detail)
            enableLOD: true,
            lodDistances: {
                high: 300,   // Full quality within 300px
                medium: 600, // Medium quality 300-600px
                low: 1000    // Low quality 600-1000px
                             // Beyond 1000px: culled
            },
            
            // Shadow optimization
            cacheStat icShadows: true,
            maxShadowsPerFrame: 20,
            shadowUpdateFrequency: 2, // Update every N frames
            
            // Performance targets
            targetFPS: 60,
            maxFrameTime: 16.67 // ms (60 FPS = 16.67ms per frame)
        };
        
        this.stats = {
            currentFPS: 60,
            averageFrameTime: 0,
            lightsRendered: 0,
            lightsCulled: 0,
            shadowsCached: 0
        };
        
        this.frameCounter = 0;
    }
    
    optimize() {
        this.frameCounter++;
        
        // Cull off-screen lights
        if (this.config.cullOffscreenLights) {
            this.cullLights();
        }
        
        // Apply LOD
        if (this.config.enableLOD) {
            this.applyLOD();
        }
        
        // Optimize shadows
        this.optimizeShadows();
        
        // Adjust quality based on performance
        this.adaptiveQuality();
    }
    
    cullLights() {
        const camera = this.lightingSystem.scene.cameras.main;
        const worldView = camera.worldView;
        const padding = this.config.cullDistance;
        
        let culled = 0;
        
        this.lightingSystem.lights.forEach(light => {
            // Check if light is within camera view (with padding)
            const inView = Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Overlaps(
                worldView,
                new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(
                    light.x - light.radius - padding,
                    light.y - light.radius - padding,
                    (light.radius + padding) * 2,
                    (light.radius + padding) * 2
                )
            );
            
            light.visible = inView;
            
            if (!inView) {
                culled++;
            }
        });
        
        this.stats.lightsCulled = culled;
    }
    
    applyLOD() {
        const camera = this.lightingSystem.scene.cameras.main;
        const cameraCenter = {
            x: camera.scrollX + camera.width / 2,
            y: camera.scrollY + camera.height / 2
        };
        
        this.lightingSystem.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (!light.visible) return;
            
            const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                light.x, light.y,
                cameraCenter.x, cameraCenter.y
            );
            
            // Determine LOD level
            let lodLevel;
            if (distance < this.config.lodDistances.high) {
                lodLevel = 'high';
            } else if (distance < this.config.lodDistances.medium) {
                lodLevel = 'medium';
            } else if (distance < this.config.lodDistances.low) {
                lodLevel = 'low';
            } else {
                light.visible = false;
                return;
            }
            
            // Apply LOD settings
            this.applyLightLOD(light, lodLevel);
        });
    }
    
    applyLightLOD(light, level) {
        switch (level) {
            case 'high':
                // Full quality
                light.castShadows = light._originalCastShadows !== undefined 
                    ? light._originalCastShadows 
                    : light.castShadows;
                light.volumetric = light._originalVolumetric !== undefined
                    ? light._originalVolumetric
                    : light.volumetric;
                break;
                
            case 'medium':
                // Reduced quality
                if (light._originalCastShadows === undefined) {
                    light._originalCastShadows = light.castShadows;
                }
                light.castShadows = false; // Disable shadows at medium distance
                
                if (light._originalVolumetric === undefined) {
                    light._originalVolumetric = light.volumetric;
                }
                break;
                
            case 'low':
                // Minimal quality
                light.castShadows = false;
                light.volumetric = false;
                // Could also reduce radius slightly
                break;
        }
    }
    
    optimizeShadows() {
        // Only update shadows every N frames
        if (this.frameCounter % this.config.shadowUpdateFrequency !== 0) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Limit number of shadow updates per frame
        let shadowsUpdated = 0;
        const maxUpdates = this.config.maxShadowsPerFrame;
        
        this.lightingSystem.shadowCasters.forEach(caster => {
            if (shadowsUpdated >= maxUpdates) {
                // Skip this frame, will update next time
                return;
            }
            
            // Static shadows are cached and don't need updates
            if (caster.static && caster._cachedShadow) {
                this.stats.shadowsCached++;
                return;
            }
            
            shadowsUpdated++;
        });
    }
    
    adaptiveQuality() {
        const frameTime = this.lightingSystem.stats.frameTime;
        
        // Calculate average frame time
        this.stats.averageFrameTime = 
            (this.stats.averageFrameTime * 0.9) + (frameTime * 0.1);
        
        // Calculate FPS
        this.stats.currentFPS = 1000 / this.stats.averageFrameTime;
        
        // If consistently under target FPS, reduce quality
        if (this.stats.currentFPS < this.config.targetFPS - 5) {
            this.reduceQuality();
        }
        // If consistently above target with headroom, increase quality
        else if (this.stats.currentFPS > this.config.targetFPS + 10) {
            this.increaseQuality();
        }
    }
    
    reduceQuality() {
        // Reduce shadow quality
        if (this.lightingSystem.config.shadowQuality === 'high') {
            this.lightingSystem.setShadowQuality('medium');
            console.log('[LightingOptimizer] Reduced shadow quality to medium');
        } else if (this.lightingSystem.config.shadowQuality === 'medium') {
            this.lightingSystem.setShadowQuality('low');
            console.log('[LightingOptimizer] Reduced shadow quality to low');
        } else {
            // Last resort: disable shadows entirely
            this.lightingSystem.setShadowsEnabled(false);
            console.log('[LightingOptimizer] Disabled shadows');
        }
        
        // Increase LOD distances (cull more aggressively)
        this.config.lodDistances.high *= 0.8;
        this.config.lodDistances.medium *= 0.8;
        this.config.lodDistances.low *= 0.8;
    }
    
    increaseQuality() {
        // Increase shadow quality
        if (!this.lightingSystem.config.shadowsEnabled) {
            this.lightingSystem.setShadowsEnabled(true);
            console.log('[LightingOptimizer] Enabled shadows');
        } else if (this.lightingSystem.config.shadowQuality === 'low') {
            this.lightingSystem.setShadowQuality('medium');
            console.log('[LightingOptimizer] Increased shadow quality to medium');
        } else if (this.lightingSystem.config.shadowQuality === 'medium') {
            this.lightingSystem.setShadowQuality('high');
            console.log('[LightingOptimizer] Increased shadow quality to high');
        }
        
        // Decrease LOD distances (show more detail)
        this.config.lodDistances.high = Math.min(this.config.lodDistances.high * 1.2, 300);
        this.config.lodDistances.medium = Math.min(this.config.lodDistances.medium * 1.2, 600);
        this.config.lodDistances.low = Math.min(this.config.lodDistances.low * 1.2, 1000);
    }
    
    getStats() {
        return { ...this.stats };
    }
}

export default LightingOptimizer;
Step 6: Integration Examples
javascript
// examples/lightingIntegrationExamples.js

/**
 * EXAMPLE 1: Basic Setup in a Scene
 */

import AdvancedLightingSystem from '../systems/AdvancedLightingSystem.js';
import { LightingPresetManager } from '../configs/lightingPresets.js';

class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize lighting system
        this.lightingSystem = new AdvancedLightingSystem(this);
        
        // Create preset manager
        this.presetManager = new LightingPresetManager(this.lightingSystem);
        
        // Apply forest location preset
        this.presetManager.applyPreset('locations', 'forest', 2000);
        
        // Add a torch
        const torch = this.lightingSystem.addLight(400, 300, {
            type: 'point',
            radius: 150,
            color: 0xff8800,
            intensity: 1.2,
            castShadows: true,
            flicker: { speed: 0.05, amount: 0.15 }
        });
        
        // Add shadow casters
        const wall = this.add.rectangle(500, 400, 100, 200, 0x666666);
        this.physics.add.existing(wall, true);
        this.lightingSystem.addShadowCaster(wall, {
            static: true // Wall doesn't move, cache shadows
        });
        
        const tree = this.add.sprite(300, 250, 'oak_tree');
        this.lightingSystem.addShadowCaster(tree, {
            shapeType: 'circle',
            static: true
        });
        
        // Add normal map to player
        this.player = this.add.sprite(200, 400, 'player');
        this.lightingSystem.addNormalMap(this.player, 'player_normal');
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 2: Dynamic Spell Lighting
 */

class SpellSystem {
    castSpell(spell, caster, target) {
        // Create spell light
        const light = this.scene.lightingSystem.addLight(caster.x, caster.y, {
            type: 'point',
            radius: 80,
            color: this.getSpellColor(spell.element),
            intensity: 1.5,
            castShadows: false,
            volumetric: true,
            volumetricDensity: 0.4
        });
        
        // Animate to target
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: light,
            x: target.x,
            y: target.y,
            duration: 300,
            onComplete: () => {
                // Flash on impact
                this.scene.tweens.add({
                    targets: light,
                    intensity: 3.0,
                    duration: 100,
                    yoyo: true,
                    onComplete: () => {
                        this.scene.lightingSystem.removeLight(light);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    }
    
    getSpellColor(element) {
        const colors = {
            fire: 0xff4400,
            ice: 0x44ccff,
            nature: 0x44ff88,
            arcane: 0x4488ff,
            shadow: 0x8844ff,
            radiant: 0xffffaa
        };
        
        return colors[element] || 0xffffff;
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 3: Day/Night Cycle
 */

class DayNightCycle {
    constructor(scene, lightingSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.lightingSystem = lightingSystem;
        this.presetManager = new LightingPresetManager(lightingSystem);
        
        this.timeOfDay = 0; // 0-24 hours
        this.dayLength = 120000; // 2 minutes = 1 day
        
        this.startCycle();
    }
    
    startCycle() {
        this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: 100,
            callback: () => this.update(),
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    update() {
        // Advance time
        const delta = 100; // ms
        this.timeOfDay += (delta / this.dayLength) * 24;
        
        if (this.timeOfDay >= 24) {
            this.timeOfDay -= 24;
        }
        
        // Apply lighting based on time
        if (this.timeOfDay >= 5 && this.timeOfDay < 7) {
            // Dawn
            this.presetManager.applyPreset('timeOfDay', 'dawn', 1000);
        } else if (this.timeOfDay >= 7 && this.timeOfDay < 17) {
            // Day
            this.presetManager.applyPreset('timeOfDay', 'day', 1000);
        } else if (this.timeOfDay >= 17 && this.timeOfDay < 19) {
            // Dusk
            this.presetManager.applyPreset('timeOfDay', 'dusk', 1000);
        } else {
            // Night
            this.presetManager.applyPreset('timeOfDay', 'night', 1000);
        }
    }
    
    getTimeOfDay() {
        return this.timeOfDay;
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 4: Interactive Torches
 */

class InteractiveTorch extends Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite {
    constructor(scene, x, y) {
        super(scene, x, y, 'torch');
        
        scene.add.existing(this);
        
        this.isLit = true;
        this.light = null;
        
        // Create light
        this.createLight();
        
        // Make interactive
        this.setInteractive();
        this.on('pointerdown', () => this.toggle());
    }
    
    createLight() {
        this.light = this.scene.lightingSystem.addLight(this.x, this.y, {
            type: 'point',
            radius: 120,
            color: 0xff8800,
            intensity: 1.0,
            castShadows: true,
            flicker: { speed: 0.05, amount: 0.2 }
        });
    }
    
    toggle() {
        this.isLit = !this.isLit;
        
        if (this.isLit) {
            // Light torch
            this.setFrame(0); // Lit frame
            this.light.enabled = true;
            
            // Flame sound
            this.scene.sound.play('torch_light');
        } else {
            // Extinguish torch
            this.setFrame(1); // Unlit frame
            this.light.enabled = false;
            
            // Smoke puff effect
            this.scene.sound.play('torch_extinguish');
        }
    }
    
    destroy() {
        if (this.light) {
            this.scene.lightingSystem.removeLight(this.light);
        }
        
        super.destroy();
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 5: Boss Arena Dramatic Lighting
 */

class BossArena extends Phaser.Scene {
    startBossFight() {
        // Darken ambient lighting
        this.lightingSystem.setAmbientLight(0x220000, 0.2);
        
        // Add dramatic spotlights on boss and player
        const bossSpotlight = this.lightingSystem.addLight(
            this.boss.x, this.boss.y - 200,
            {
                type: 'spot',
                angle: Math.PI / 2, // Pointing down
                cone: Math.PI / 6,   // Narrow cone
                radius: 300,
                color: 0xff0000,
                intensity: 1.5,
                castShadows: true
            }
        );
        
        const playerSpotlight = this.lightingSystem.addLight(
            this.player.x, this.player.y - 200,
            {
                type: 'spot',
                angle: Math.PI / 2,
                cone: Math.PI / 6,
                radius: 250,
                color: 0x0088ff,
                intensity: 1.3,
                castShadows: true
            }
        );
        
        // Follow characters
        this.time.addEvent({
            delay: 50,
            callback: () => {
                bossSpotlight.x = this.boss.x;
                bossSpotlight.y = this.boss.y - 200;
                
                playerSpotlight.x = this.player.x;
                playerSpotlight.y = this.player.y - 200;
            },
            loop: true
        });
        
        // Pulse boss light when attacking
        this.boss.on('attack', () => {
            this.tweens.add({
                targets: bossSpotlight,
                intensity: 2.5,
                duration: 200,
                yoyo: true
            });
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 6: Stealth Gameplay
 */

class StealthSystem {
    constructor(scene, lightingSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.lightingSystem = lightingSystem;
    }
    
    isPlayerHidden(player) {
        // Check light intensity at player position
        const totalIntensity = this.calculateLightIntensityAt(player.x, player.y);
        
        // Player is hidden if in very low light
        const hiddenThreshold = 0.3;
        
        return totalIntensity < hiddenThreshold;
    }
    
    calculateLightIntensityAt(x, y) {
        let totalIntensity = this.lightingSystem.config.ambientLight.intensity;
        
        this.lightingSystem.lights.forEach(light => {
            if (!light.enabled || !light.visible) return;
            
            const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(x, y, light.x, light.y);
            
            if (distance < light.radius) {
                // Calculate light contribution with falloff
                const attenuation = 1 - (distance / light.radius);
                const contribution = light._currentIntensity * attenuation;
                
                totalIntensity += contribution;
            }
        });
        
        return Math.min(totalIntensity, 2.0);
    }
    
    update() {
        const hidden = this.isPlayerHidden(this.scene.player);
        
        // Update player visibility to enemies
        this.scene.enemies.forEach(enemy => {
            if (hidden) {
                enemy.canSeePlayer = false;
                enemy.setTint(0x888888); // Darken enemy
            } else {
                enemy.canSeePlayer = true;
                enemy.clearTint();
            }
        });
        
        // Show indicator
        if (hidden) {
            this.scene.stealthIndicator.setText('HIDDEN');
            this.scene.stealthIndicator.setColor('#00ff00');
        } else {
            this.scene.stealthIndicator.setText('EXPOSED');
            this.scene.stealthIndicator.setColor('#ff0000');
        }
    }
}

const fireballEffect = particleSystem.createEffect('fireball', x, y, {
