Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Particle System
javascript
// systems/AdvancedParticleSystem.js

class AdvancedParticleSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.emitters = [];
        this.particles = [];
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            maxParticles: 10000,
            maxEmitters: 100,
            updateFrequency: 60, // Hz
            renderLayers: true, // Separate render passes for blend modes
            gpuAcceleration: true // Use GPU when available
        };
        
        // Performance tracking
        this.stats = {
            activeParticles: 0,
            activeEmitters: 0,
            particlesSpawned: 0,
            particlesKilled: 0,
            frameTime: 0
        };
        
        // Object pools for reuse
        this.particlePool = [];
        this.emitterPool = [];
        
        // Render layers for different blend modes
        this.renderLayers = {};
        
        // Global forces
        this.globalForces = [];
        
        // Effect presets
        this.presets = new Map();
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Create render layers for different blend modes
        this.createRenderLayers();
        
        // Load effect presets
        this.loadPresets();
        
        // Set up update loop
        this.setupUpdateLoop();
        
        console.log('[AdvancedParticleSystem] Initialized');
        console.log(`  - Max particles: ${this.config.maxParticles}`);
        console.log(`  - Max emitters: ${this.config.maxEmitters}`);
    }
    
    createRenderLayers() {
        const blendModes = ['NORMAL', 'ADD', 'MULTIPLY', 'SCREEN'];
        
        blendModes.forEach(mode => {
            const container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
            container.setDepth(5000); // Above most game objects
            
            this.renderLayers[mode] = {
                container: container,
                graphics: this.scene.add.graphics(),
                particles: []
            };
            
            container.add(this.renderLayers[mode].graphics);
        });
    }
    
    setupUpdateLoop() {
        const updateInterval = 1000 / this.config.updateFrequency;
        
        this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: updateInterval,
            callback: () => this.update(updateInterval),
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    // === EMITTER MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Create a particle emitter
     * @param {Object} config - Emitter configuration
     * @returns {Object} Emitter instance
     */
    createEmitter(config) {
        if (this.emitters.length >= this.config.maxEmitters) {
            console.warn('[AdvancedParticleSystem] Max emitters reached');
            return null;
        }
        
        // Get from pool or create new
        const emitter = this.emitterPool.length > 0 
            ? this.emitterPool.pop() 
            : this.createEmitterObject();
        
        // Configure emitter
        this.configureEmitter(emitter, config);
        
        this.emitters.push(emitter);
        
        return emitter;
    }
    
    createEmitterObject() {
        return {
            id: this.generateId(),
            
            // Position
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            
            // Emission
            emissionMode: 'continuous', // continuous, burst, stream
            emissionRate: 10, // particles per second
            burstCount: 20,
            streamDuration: 1000, // ms
            
            // Particle properties
            particleConfig: {},
            
            // Shape
            emissionShape: 'point', // point, circle, rectangle, line, custom
            emissionArea: {},
            
            // Lifetime
            duration: -1, // -1 = infinite
            delay: 0,
            
            // State
            enabled: true,
            active: false,
            timeAlive: 0,
            timeSinceLastEmit: 0,
            particlesEmitted: 0,
            
            // Callbacks
            onStart: null,
            onStop: null,
            onComplete: null,
            onParticleSpawn: null,
            onParticleDeath: null,
            
            // Sub-emitters
            subEmitters: [],
            
            // Internal
            _particles: [],
            _markedForRemoval: false
        };
    }
    
    configureEmitter(emitter, config) {
        // Reset emitter
        Object.assign(emitter, this.createEmitterObject());
        
        // Apply config
        Object.keys(config).forEach(key => {
            if (key === 'particleConfig') {
                emitter.particleConfig = { ...config.particleConfig };
            } else {
                emitter[key] = config[key];
            }
        });
        
        // Validate particle config
        this.validateParticleConfig(emitter.particleConfig);
        
        // Start emitter if configured
        if (config.autoStart !== false) {
            this.startEmitter(emitter);
        }
    }
    
    validateParticleConfig(config) {
        // Set defaults for required properties
        if (!config.lifetime) {
            config.lifetime = { min: 1000, max: 2000 };
        }
        
        if (!config.speed) {
            config.speed = { min: 50, max: 150 };
        }
        
        if (!config.angle) {
            config.angle = { min: 0, max: 360 };
        }
        
        if (!config.texture) {
            config.texture = 'particle'; // Default texture
        }
    }
    
    startEmitter(emitter) {
        if (emitter.delay > 0) {
            this.scene.time.delayedCall(emitter.delay, () => {
                emitter.active = true;
                
                if (emitter.onStart) {
                    emitter.onStart(emitter);
                }
            });
        } else {
            emitter.active = true;
            
            if (emitter.onStart) {
                emitter.onStart(emitter);
            }
        }
    }
    
    stopEmitter(emitter, killParticles = false) {
        emitter.active = false;
        
        if (killParticles) {
            // Kill all particles from this emitter
            emitter._particles.forEach(particle => {
                this.killParticle(particle);
            });
            emitter._particles = [];
        }
        
        if (emitter.onStop) {
            emitter.onStop(emitter);
        }
    }
    
    removeEmitter(emitter) {
        this.stopEmitter(emitter, true);
        
        const index = this.emitters.indexOf(emitter);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.emitters.splice(index, 1);
        }
        
        // Return to pool
        if (this.emitterPool.length < 50) {
            this.emitterPool.push(emitter);
        }
    }
    
    // === PARTICLE CREATION ===
    
    /**
     * Spawn a particle
     * @param {Object} emitter - Source emitter
     * @returns {Object} Particle instance
     */
    spawnParticle(emitter) {
        if (this.particles.length >= this.config.maxParticles) {
            return null;
        }
        
        // Get from pool or create new
        const particle = this.particlePool.length > 0
            ? this.particlePool.pop()
            : this.createParticleObject();
        
        // Configure particle from emitter config
        this.configureParticle(particle, emitter);
        
        this.particles.push(particle);
        emitter._particles.push(particle);
        
        this.stats.particlesSpawned++;
        
        // Callback
        if (emitter.onParticleSpawn) {
            emitter.onParticleSpawn(particle, emitter);
        }
        
        return particle;
    }
    
    createParticleObject() {
        return {
            id: this.generateId(),
            
            // Transform
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            rotation: 0,
            scaleX: 1,
            scaleY: 1,
            
            // Velocity
            vx: 0,
            vy: 0,
            angularVelocity: 0,
            
            // Appearance
            texture: 'particle',
            frame: 0,
            color: 0xffffff,
            alpha: 1,
            blendMode: 'ADD',
            
            // Lifetime
            life: 0,
            maxLife: 1000,
            
            // Properties
            mass: 1,
            drag: 0.98,
            bounce: 0,
            
            // Curves (interpolation over lifetime)
            scaleCurve: null,
            alphaCurve: null,
            colorCurve: null,
            
            // Trail
            hasTrail: false,
            trailPoints: [],
            trailLength: 10,
            
            // State
            alive: true,
            
            // Parent emitter
            emitter: null,
            
            // Custom data
            data: {}
        };
    }
    
    configureParticle(particle, emitter) {
        const config = emitter.particleConfig;
        
        // Position
        const spawnPos = this.getEmissionPosition(emitter);
        particle.x = spawnPos.x;
        particle.y = spawnPos.y;
        
        // Velocity
        const angle = this.randomRange(config.angle);
        const speed = this.randomRange(config.speed);
        
        particle.vx = Math.cos(angle) * speed;
        particle.vy = Math.sin(angle) * speed;
        
        // Angular velocity
        if (config.angularVelocity) {
            particle.angularVelocity = this.randomRange(config.angularVelocity);
        }
        
        // Rotation
        if (config.rotation) {
            particle.rotation = this.randomRange(config.rotation);
        } else if (config.rotateToDirection) {
            particle.rotation = angle;
        }
        
        // Scale
        if (config.scale) {
            const scale = this.randomRange(config.scale);
            particle.scaleX = scale;
            particle.scaleY = scale;
        }
        
        // Appearance
        particle.texture = config.texture || 'particle';
        particle.frame = config.frame || 0;
        particle.blendMode = config.blendMode || 'ADD';
        
        // Color
        if (config.color) {
            if (typeof config.color === 'number') {
                particle.color = config.color;
            } else if (config.color.start !== undefined) {
                particle.color = config.color.start;
                particle.colorCurve = config.color;
            }
        }
        
        // Alpha
        if (config.alpha) {
            if (typeof config.alpha === 'number') {
                particle.alpha = config.alpha;
            } else if (config.alpha.start !== undefined) {
                particle.alpha = config.alpha.start;
                particle.alphaCurve = config.alpha;
            }
        }
        
        // Scale curve
        if (config.scaleCurve) {
            particle.scaleCurve = config.scaleCurve;
        }
        
        // Lifetime
        particle.maxLife = this.randomRange(config.lifetime);
        particle.life = 0;
        
        // Physics
        particle.mass = config.mass || 1;
        particle.drag = config.drag !== undefined ? config.drag : 0.98;
        particle.bounce = config.bounce || 0;
        
        // Trail
        if (config.trail) {
            particle.hasTrail = true;
            particle.trailPoints = [];
            particle.trailLength = config.trailLength || 10;
        }
        
        // Parent reference
        particle.emitter = emitter;
        
        // Custom data
        if (config.data) {
            particle.data = { ...config.data };
        }
        
        particle.alive = true;
    }
    
    getEmissionPosition(emitter) {
        const shape = emitter.emissionShape;
        const area = emitter.emissionArea || {};
        
        switch (shape) {
            case 'point':
                return { x: emitter.x, y: emitter.y };
                
            case 'circle':
                const radius = area.radius || 50;
                const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const distance = Math.random() * radius;
                
                return {
                    x: emitter.x + Math.cos(angle) * distance,
                    y: emitter.y + Math.sin(angle) * distance
                };
                
            case 'ring':
                const outerRadius = area.outerRadius || 50;
                const innerRadius = area.innerRadius || 30;
                const ringAngle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
                const ringDistance = innerRadius + Math.random() * (outerRadius - innerRadius);
                
                return {
                    x: emitter.x + Math.cos(ringAngle) * ringDistance,
                    y: emitter.y + Math.sin(ringAngle) * ringDistance
                };
                
            case 'rectangle':
                const width = area.width || 100;
                const height = area.height || 100;
                
                return {
                    x: emitter.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * width,
                    y: emitter.y + (Math.random() - 0.5) * height
                };
                
            case 'line':
                const length = area.length || 100;
                const lineAngle = area.angle || 0;
                const t = Math.random();
                
                return {
                    x: emitter.x + Math.cos(lineAngle) * length * t,
                    y: emitter.y + Math.sin(lineAngle) * length * t
                };
                
            case 'custom':
                if (area.getPosition) {
                    return area.getPosition(emitter);
                }
                return { x: emitter.x, y: emitter.y };
                
            default:
                return { x: emitter.x, y: emitter.y };
        }
    }
    
    killParticle(particle) {
        particle.alive = false;
        
        // Trigger death callbacks
        if (particle.emitter && particle.emitter.onParticleDeath) {
            particle.emitter.onParticleDeath(particle, particle.emitter);
        }
        
        // Spawn sub-emitters
        if (particle.emitter && particle.emitter.subEmitters) {
            particle.emitter.subEmitters.forEach(subConfig => {
                if (subConfig.trigger === 'death') {
                    this.spawnSubEmitter(subConfig, particle);
                }
            });
        }
        
        this.stats.particlesKilled++;
    }
    
    spawnSubEmitter(subConfig, particle) {
        const config = {
            ...subConfig.config,
            x: particle.x,
            y: particle.y,
            emissionMode: 'burst',
            duration: 0,
            autoStart: true
        };
        
        // Inherit properties if specified
        if (subConfig.inherit) {
            if (subConfig.inherit.includes('velocity')) {
                config.particleConfig.speed = {
                    min: Math.sqrt(particle.vx * particle.vx + particle.vy * particle.vy) * 0.5,
                    max: Math.sqrt(particle.vx * particle.vx + particle.vy * particle.vy) * 0.8
                };
            }
            
            if (subConfig.inherit.includes('color')) {
                config.particleConfig.color = particle.color;
            }
        }
        
        this.createEmitter(config);
    }
    
    // === UPDATE LOOP ===
    
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        const startTime = performance.now();
        
        // Update emitters
        this.updateEmitters(delta);
        
        // Update particles
        this.updateParticles(delta);
        
        // Apply global forces
        this.applyGlobalForces(delta);
        
        // Clean up dead particles
        this.cleanupParticles();
        
        // Render
        this.render();
        
        // Update stats
        this.stats.frameTime = performance.now() - startTime;
        this.stats.activeParticles = this.particles.length;
        this.stats.activeEmitters = this.emitters.filter(e => e.active).length;
    }
    
    updateEmitters(delta) {
        for (let i = this.emitters.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const emitter = this.emitters[i];
            
            if (!emitter.enabled) continue;
            
            emitter.timeAlive += delta;
            
            // Check duration
            if (emitter.duration > 0 && emitter.timeAlive >= emitter.duration) {
                if (emitter.onComplete) {
                    emitter.onComplete(emitter);
                }
                
                emitter._markedForRemoval = true;
                continue;
            }
            
            if (!emitter.active) continue;
            
            // Emit particles based on mode
            switch (emitter.emissionMode) {
                case 'continuous':
                    this.updateContinuousEmitter(emitter, delta);
                    break;
                    
                case 'burst':
                    this.updateBurstEmitter(emitter, delta);
                    break;
                    
                case 'stream':
                    this.updateStreamEmitter(emitter, delta);
                    break;
            }
        }
        
        // Remove marked emitters
        this.emitters = this.emitters.filter(e => !e._markedForRemoval);
    }
    
    updateContinuousEmitter(emitter, delta) {
        emitter.timeSinceLastEmit += delta;
        
        const emitInterval = 1000 / emitter.emissionRate;
        
        while (emitter.timeSinceLastEmit >= emitInterval) {
            this.spawnParticle(emitter);
            emitter.timeSinceLastEmit -= emitInterval;
            emitter.particlesEmitted++;
        }
    }
    
    updateBurstEmitter(emitter, delta) {
        if (emitter.particlesEmitted === 0) {
            // Emit all particles at once
            for (let i = 0; i < emitter.burstCount; i++) {
                this.spawnParticle(emitter);
            }
            
            emitter.particlesEmitted = emitter.burstCount;
            emitter.active = false; // Burst is one-shot
        }
    }
    
    updateStreamEmitter(emitter, delta) {
        if (emitter.timeAlive < emitter.streamDuration) {
            this.updateContinuousEmitter(emitter, delta);
        } else {
            emitter.active = false;
        }
    }
    
    updateParticles(delta) {
        const deltaSeconds = delta / 1000;
        
        for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const particle = this.particles[i];
            
            if (!particle.alive) continue;
            
            // Update lifetime
            particle.life += delta;
            
            if (particle.life >= particle.maxLife) {
                this.killParticle(particle);
                continue;
            }
            
            // Calculate lifetime progress (0 to 1)
            const t = particle.life / particle.maxLife;
            
            // Update velocity with drag
            particle.vx *= particle.drag;
            particle.vy *= particle.drag;
            
            // Update position
            particle.x += particle.vx * deltaSeconds;
            particle.y += particle.vy * deltaSeconds;
            
            // Update rotation
            particle.rotation += particle.angularVelocity * deltaSeconds;
            
            // Apply curves
            if (particle.scaleCurve) {
                const scale = this.evaluateCurve(particle.scaleCurve, t);
                particle.scaleX = scale;
                particle.scaleY = scale;
            }
            
            if (particle.alphaCurve) {
                particle.alpha = this.evaluateCurve(particle.alphaCurve, t);
            }
            
            if (particle.colorCurve) {
                particle.color = this.evaluateColorCurve(particle.colorCurve, t);
            }
            
            // Update trail
            if (particle.hasTrail) {
                particle.trailPoints.push({ x: particle.x, y: particle.y, alpha: particle.alpha });
                
                if (particle.trailPoints.length > particle.trailLength) {
                    particle.trailPoints.shift();
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    applyGlobalForces(delta) {
        const deltaSeconds = delta / 1000;
        
        this.globalForces.forEach(force => {
            if (!force.enabled) return;
            
            this.particles.forEach(particle => {
                if (!particle.alive) return;
                
                this.applyForceToParticle(force, particle, deltaSeconds);
            });
        });
    }
    
    applyForceToParticle(force, particle, deltaSeconds) {
        switch (force.type) {
            case 'gravity':
                particle.vx += force.x * deltaSeconds * 60;
                particle.vy += force.y * deltaSeconds * 60;
                break;
                
            case 'wind':
                // Check if particle is in wind area
                const inArea = this.isPointInArea(particle.x, particle.y, force.area);
                
                if (inArea) {
                    particle.vx += force.strength.x * deltaSeconds * 60;
                    particle.vy += force.strength.y * deltaSeconds * 60;
                }
                break;
                
            case 'vortex':
                const dx = force.x - particle.x;
                const dy = force.y - particle.y;
                const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
                
                if (distance < force.radius) {
                    // Tangential force (spiral)
                    const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
                    const tangentAngle = angle + Math.PI / 2;
                    
                    const falloff = 1 - (distance / force.radius);
                    const strength = force.strength * falloff;
                    
                    particle.vx += Math.cos(tangentAngle) * strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                    particle.vy += Math.sin(tangentAngle) * strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                    
                    // Radial force (pull inward)
                    particle.vx += (dx / distance) * force.pull * falloff * deltaSeconds * 60;
                    particle.vy += (dy / distance) * force.pull * falloff * deltaSeconds * 60;
                }
                break;
                
            case 'attractor':
                const adx = force.x - particle.x;
                const ady = force.y - particle.y;
                const aDist = Math.sqrt(adx * adx + ady * ady);
                
                if (aDist < force.radius && aDist > 0) {
                    const falloff = 1 - (aDist / force.radius);
                    const strength = force.strength * falloff;
                    
                    particle.vx += (adx / aDist) * strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                    particle.vy += (ady / aDist) * strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                }
                break;
                
            case 'repeller':
                const rdx = force.x - particle.x;
                const rdy = force.y - particle.y;
                const rDist = Math.sqrt(rdx * rdx + rdy * rdy);
                
                if (rDist < force.radius && rDist > 0) {
                    const falloff = 1 - (rDist / force.radius);
                    const strength = force.strength * falloff;
                    
                    particle.vx -= (rdx / rDist) * strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                    particle.vy -= (rdy / rDist) * strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                }
                break;
                
            case 'turbulence':
                // Perlin noise-based random force
                const noiseX = this.noise(particle.x * 0.01, particle.y * 0.01, force.time);
                const noiseY = this.noise(particle.x * 0.01 + 100, particle.y * 0.01 + 100, force.time);
                
                particle.vx += (noiseX - 0.5) * force.strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                particle.vy += (noiseY - 0.5) * force.strength * deltaSeconds * 60;
                
                force.time += deltaSeconds;
                break;
        }
    }
    
    cleanupParticles() {
        // Remove dead particles
        for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const particle = this.particles[i];
            
            if (!particle.alive) {
                // Remove from emitter's particle list
                if (particle.emitter) {
                    const emitterIndex = particle.emitter._particles.indexOf(particle);
                    if (emitterIndex !== -1) {
                        particle.emitter._particles.splice(emitterIndex, 1);
                    }
                }
                
                // Remove from main list
                this.particles.splice(i, 1);
                
                // Return to pool
                if (this.particlePool.length < 1000) {
                    // Reset particle
                    particle.trailPoints = [];
                    particle.data = {};
                    this.particlePool.push(particle);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === RENDERING ===
    
    render() {
        // Clear all render layers
        Object.values(this.renderLayers).forEach(layer => {
            layer.graphics.clear();
            layer.particles = [];
        });
        
        // Sort particles into render layers by blend mode
        this.particles.forEach(particle => {
            if (!particle.alive) return;
            
            const blendMode = particle.blendMode;
            const layer = this.renderLayers[blendMode] || this.renderLayers['ADD'];
            
            layer.particles.push(particle);
        });
        
        // Render each layer
        Object.entries(this.renderLayers).forEach(([mode, layer]) => {
            this.renderLayer(layer, mode);
        });
    }
    
    renderLayer(layer, blendMode) {
        const graphics = layer.graphics;
        
        // Set blend mode
        graphics.setBlendMode(Phaser.BlendModes[blendMode]);
        
        layer.particles.forEach(particle => {
            // Render trail first
            if (particle.hasTrail && particle.trailPoints.length > 1) {
                this.renderTrail(graphics, particle);
            }
            
            // Render particle
            this.renderParticle(graphics, particle);
        });
    }
    
    renderParticle(graphics, particle) {
        // Get color components
        const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(particle.color);
        const r = Math.floor(color.red * particle.alpha);
        const g = Math.floor(color.green * particle.alpha);
        const b = Math.floor(color.blue * particle.alpha);
        
        const finalColor = Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(r, g, b);
        
        // Simple circle rendering (can be replaced with sprite rendering)
        graphics.fillStyle(finalColor, particle.alpha);
        
        graphics.save();
        graphics.translate(particle.x, particle.y);
        graphics.rotate(particle.rotation);
        graphics.scale(particle.scaleX, particle.scaleY);
        
        // Draw particle shape (circle for now)
        graphics.fillCircle(0, 0, 5);
        
        graphics.restore();
    }
    
    renderTrail(graphics, particle) {
        if (particle.trailPoints.length < 2) return;
        
        graphics.lineStyle(2, particle.color, particle.alpha * 0.5);
        
        graphics.beginPath();
        graphics.moveTo(particle.trailPoints[0].x, particle.trailPoints[0].y);
        
        for (let i = 1; i < particle.trailPoints.length; i++) {
            const point = particle.trailPoints[i];
            graphics.lineTo(point.x, point.y);
        }
        
        graphics.strokePath();
    }
    
    // === FORCES ===
    
    addGlobalForce(config) {
        const force = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            type: config.type, // gravity, wind, vortex, attractor, repeller, turbulence
            enabled: true,
            ...config
        };
        
        this.globalForces.push(force);
        
        return force;
    }
    
    removeGlobalForce(force) {
        const index = this.globalForces.indexOf(force);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.globalForces.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    // === UTILITY METHODS ===
    
    randomRange(range) {
        if (typeof range === 'number') {
            return range;
        }
        
        if (range.min !== undefined && range.max !== undefined) {
            return range.min + Math.random() * (range.max - range.min);
        }
        
        return 0;
    }
    
    evaluateCurve(curve, t) {
        if (typeof curve === 'number') {
            return curve;
        }
        
        if (curve.start !== undefined && curve.end !== undefined) {
            return Phaser.Math.Linear(curve.start, curve.end, t);
        }
        
        if (curve.points) {
            // Multi-point curve evaluation
            return this.evaluateMultiPointCurve(curve.points, t);
        }
        
        return 1;
    }
    
    evaluateMultiPointCurve(points, t) {
        if (points.length === 0) return 0;
        if (points.length === 1) return points[0].value;
        
        // Find two points to interpolate between
        for (let i = 0; i < points.length - 1; i++) {
            if (t >= points[i].time && t <= points[i + 1].time) {
                const localT = (t - points[i].time) / (points[i + 1].time - points[i].time);
                return Phaser.Math.Linear(points[i].value, points[i + 1].value, localT);
            }
        }
        
        return points[points.length - 1].value;
    }
    
    evaluateColorCurve(curve, t) {
        if (typeof curve === 'number') {
            return curve;
        }
        
        const startColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(curve.start);
        const endColor = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(curve.end);
        
        const interpolated = Phaser.Display.Color.Interpolate.ColorWithColor(
            startColor, endColor, 100, t * 100
        );
        
        return Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(
            interpolated.r,
            interpolated.g,
            interpolated.b
        );
    }
    
    isPointInArea(x, y, area) {
        if (!area) return false;
        
        switch (area.shape) {
            case 'rectangle':
                return x >= area.x && x <= area.x + area.width &&
                       y >= area.y && y <= area.y + area.height;
                       
            case 'circle':
                const dx = x - area.x;
                const dy = y - area.y;
                return (dx * dx + dy * dy) <= (area.radius * area.radius);
                
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }
    
    // Simple perlin noise approximation
    noise(x, y, z = 0) {
        // Simplified noise function
        const n = Math.sin(x * 12.9898 + y * 78.233 + z * 37.719) * 43758.5453;
        return (n - Math.floor(n) + 1) / 2;
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `particle_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    // === PRESET LOADING ===
    
    loadPresets() {
        // Will be populated in next section
        console.log('[AdvancedParticleSystem] Loading effect presets...');
    }
    
    /**
     * Create effect from preset
     */
    createEffect(presetName, x, y, config = {}) {
        const preset = this.presets.get(presetName);
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[AdvancedParticleSystem] Unknown preset: ${presetName}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Merge preset config with provided config
        const finalConfig = {
            ...preset,
            x: x,
            y: y,
            ...config
        };
        
        return this.createEmitter(finalConfig);
    }
    
    /**
     * Register a custom preset
     */
    registerPreset(name, config) {
        this.presets.set(name, config);
        console.log(`[AdvancedParticleSystem] Registered preset: ${name}`);
    }
    
    // === STATS & DEBUG ===
    
    getStats() {
        return { ...this.stats };
    }
    
    setEnabled(enabled) {
        this.config.enabled = enabled;
        
        if (!enabled) {
            // Clear all render layers
            Object.values(this.renderLayers).forEach(layer => {
                layer.graphics.clear();
            });
        }
    }
    
    // === CLEANUP ===
    
    shutdown() {
        // Stop all emitters
        this.emitters.forEach(emitter => {
            this.stopEmitter(emitter, true);
        });
        
        // Clear all particles
        this.particles = [];
        
        // Clear render layers
        Object.values(this.renderLayers).forEach(layer => {
            layer.graphics.destroy();
            layer.container.destroy();
        });
        
        console.log('[AdvancedParticleSystem] Shutdown complete');
    }
}

export default AdvancedParticleSystem;
Step 2: Effect Presets Library

            lifetime: { min: 1000, max: 1500 },
            speed: { min: 50, max: 150 },
            angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
            
            color: {
                start: 0xffff00,
                end: 0xffffff
            },
            
            scale: { start: 1.2, end: 0.0 },
            alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
            
            rotation: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
            angularVelocity: { min: -5, max: 5 },
            
            blendMode: 'ADD'
        }
    },
    
    item_collect: {
        emissionMode: 'burst',
        burstCount: 20,
        emissionShape: 'circle',
        emissionArea: { radius: 20 },
        
        particleConfig: {
            texture: 'sparkle',
            lifetime: { min: 600, max: 900 },
            speed: { min: 80, max: 150 },
            angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
            
            color: 0xffcc00,
            scale: { start: 0.8, end: 0.2 },
            alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
            
            blendMode: 'ADD',
            drag: 0.93
        }
    },
    
    quest_complete: {
        emissionMode: 'burst',
        burstCount: 40,
        emissionShape: 'ring',
        emissionArea: { innerRadius: 30, outerRadius: 50 },
        
        particleConfig: {
            texture: 'glow',
            lifetime: { min: 800, max: 1200 },
            speed: { min: 100, max: 200 },
            angle: { min: -Math.PI / 2 - 0.5, max: -Math.PI / 2 + 0.5 },
            
            color: {
                start: 0x44ff88,
                end: 0x88ffcc
            },
            
            scale: { start: 1.0, end: 0.3 },
            alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
            
            blendMode: 'ADD'
        }
    }
};

// Preset registration function
function registerAllPresets(particleSystem) {
    Object.entries(PARTICLE_PRESETS).forEach(([name, config]) => {
        particleSystem.registerPreset(name, config);
    });
    
    console.log(`[ParticlePresets] Registered ${Object.keys(PARTICLE_PRESETS).length} presets`);
}

export { PARTICLE_PRESETS, registerAllPresets };
Step 3: Spell VFX Integration
javascript
// integration/SpellParticleIntegration.js

class SpellParticleIntegration {
    constructor(scene, particleSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
        
        // Active spell effects
        this.activeEffects = new Map();
    }
    
    /**
     * Create spell cast effect
     */
    createSpellCastEffect(spell, caster) {
        const effect = this.getSpellEffect(spell.element, 'cast');
        
        if (effect) {
            const emitter = this.particleSystem.createEffect(
                effect,
                caster.x,
                caster.y
            );
            
            // Store reference
            this.activeEffects.set(`${spell.id}_cast`, emitter);
            
            return emitter;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Create spell projectile effect
     */
    createSpellProjectileEffect(spell, caster, target) {
        const effect = this.getSpellEffect(spell.element, 'projectile');
        
        if (!effect) return;
        
        // Create emitter that follows projectile
        const emitter = this.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: caster.x,
            y: caster.y,
            emissionMode: 'continuous',
            emissionRate: 30,
            duration: 1000,
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 200, max: 400 },
                speed: { min: 20, max: 50 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: this.getElementColor(spell.element),
                scale: { start: 0.8, end: 0.2 },
                alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
                
                blendMode: 'ADD'
            }
        });
        
        // Animate emitter to target
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: emitter,
            x: target.x,
            y: target.y,
            duration: 300,
            ease: 'Quad.easeOut',
            onComplete: () => {
                this.particleSystem.stopEmitter(emitter);
                this.createSpellImpactEffect(spell, target.x, target.y);
            }
        });
        
        return emitter;
    }
    
    /**
     * Create spell impact effect
     */
    createSpellImpactEffect(spell, x, y) {
        const effect = this.getSpellEffect(spell.element, 'impact');
        
        if (effect) {
            const emitter = this.particleSystem.createEffect(effect, x, y);
            
            // Auto-cleanup after burst
            this.scene.time.delayedCall(1000, () => {
                this.particleSystem.removeEmitter(emitter);
            });
            
            return emitter;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Create area of effect spell
     */
    createAreaOfEffectSpell(spell, x, y, radius) {
        const config = {
            x: x,
            y: y,
            emissionMode: 'continuous',
            emissionRate: 50,
            duration: spell.duration || 3000,
            emissionShape: 'circle',
            emissionArea: { radius: radius },
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 500, max: 1000 },
                speed: { min: 30, max: 80 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: this.getElementColor(spell.element),
                scale: { start: 1.0, end: 0.3 },
                alpha: { start: 0.8, end: 0.0 },
                
                blendMode: 'ADD',
                drag: 0.95
            }
        };
        
        const emitter = this.particleSystem.createEmitter(config);
        
        // Pulsing effect
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: emitter.emissionArea,
            radius: radius * 1.2,
            duration: 1000,
            yoyo: true,
            repeat: -1,
            ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
        });
        
        return emitter;
    }
    
    /**
     * Create channeled spell effect
     */
    createChanneledSpellEffect(spell, caster, target) {
        // Beam effect from caster to target
        const beamParticles = this.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: caster.x,
            y: caster.y,
            emissionMode: 'continuous',
            emissionRate: 100,
            duration: spell.channelDuration || 2000,
            emissionShape: 'line',
            emissionArea: {
                length: Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(caster.x, caster.y, target.x, target.y),
                angle: Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(caster.x, caster.y, target.x, target.y)
            },
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 100, max: 300 },
                speed: { min: 50, max: 100 },
                angle: {
                    min: Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(caster.x, caster.y, target.x, target.y) - 0.3,
                    max: Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(caster.x, caster.y, target.x, target.y) + 0.3
                },
                
                color: this.getElementColor(spell.element),
                scale: { start: 0.6, end: 0.2 },
                alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
                
                blendMode: 'ADD'
            }
        });
        
        // Update beam as target moves
        const updateInterval = this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: 50,
            callback: () => {
                if (beamParticles.active) {
                    beamParticles.x = caster.x;
                    beamParticles.y = caster.y;
                    
                    beamParticles.emissionArea.length = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                        caster.x, caster.y, target.x, target.y
                    );
                    beamParticles.emissionArea.angle = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
                        caster.x, caster.y, target.x, target.y
                    );
                }
            },
            loop: true
        });
        
        // Cleanup
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(spell.channelDuration || 2000, () => {
            updateInterval.remove();
            this.particleSystem.stopEmitter(beamParticles);
        });
        
        return beamParticles;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get element-specific effect
     */
    getSpellEffect(element, type) {
        const effectMap = {
            fire: {
                cast: 'fireball',
                projectile: 'fireball',
                impact: 'fireball'
            },
            ice: {
                cast: 'ice_shards',
                projectile: 'ice_shards',
                impact: 'ice_shards'
            },
            nature: {
                cast: 'healing_aura',
                projectile: 'poison_cloud',
                impact: 'healing_aura'
            },
            arcane: {
                cast: 'lightning_bolt',
                projectile: 'lightning_bolt',
                impact: 'critical_hit'
            },
            shadow: {
                cast: 'shadow_strike',
                projectile: 'shadow_strike',
                impact: 'shadow_strike'
            }
        };
        
        return effectMap[element]?.[type];
    }
    
    /**
     * Get element color
     */
    getElementColor(element) {
        const colors = {
            fire: { start: 0xff4400, end: 0x440000 },
            ice: { start: 0x88ccff, end: 0x004488 },
            nature: { start: 0x44ff88, end: 0x118844 },
            arcane: { start: 0x4488ff, end: 0x002288 },
            shadow: { start: 0x8844ff, end: 0x220044 },
            radiant: { start: 0xffffaa, end: 0xffcc00 }
        };
        
        return colors[element] || { start: 0xffffff, end: 0x888888 };
    }
    
    /**
     * Cleanup all active effects
     */
    cleanup() {
        this.activeEffects.forEach(emitter => {
            this.particleSystem.removeEmitter(emitter);
        });
        
        this.activeEffects.clear();
    }
}

export default SpellParticleIntegration;
