TOOL 4: Advanced Particle System (CONTINUATION TO COMPLETION)
Step 4: Particle Collision System
javascript
// systems/ParticleCollisionSystem.js

class ParticleCollisionSystem {
    constructor(particleSystem, scene) {
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Collision objects
        this.colliders = [];
        this.collisionGroups = new Map();
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            spatialHashCellSize: 64, // For optimization
            maxCollisionChecks: 500, // Per frame
            bounceEnergyLoss: 0.2 // 20% energy lost on bounce
        };
        
        // Spatial hash for efficient collision detection
        this.spatialHash = new Map();
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            collisionsDetected: 0,
            collisionsResolved: 0
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Add a collision object
     * @param {Object} config - Collider configuration
     */
    addCollider(config) {
        const collider = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            
            // Shape
            shape: config.shape || 'rectangle', // rectangle, circle, polygon, line
            
            // Position and dimensions
            x: config.x || 0,
            y: config.y || 0,
            width: config.width || 50,
            height: config.height || 50,
            radius: config.radius || 25,
            vertices: config.vertices || null,
            
            // Physics properties
            static: config.static !== undefined ? config.static : true,
            bounce: config.bounce !== undefined ? config.bounce : 0.8,
            friction: config.friction !== undefined ? config.friction : 0.1,
            
            // Collision response
            response: config.response || 'bounce', // bounce, stick, destroy, pass-through
            
            // Groups (for filtering)
            groups: config.groups || ['default'],
            
            // Callbacks
            onCollision: config.onCollision || null,
            
            // Visual debug
            debugColor: config.debugColor || 0xff0000,
            
            // State
            enabled: true,
            
            // Reference to game object (if any)
            gameObject: config.gameObject || null
        };
        
        this.colliders.push(collider);
        
        // Add to groups
        collider.groups.forEach(group => {
            if (!this.collisionGroups.has(group)) {
                this.collisionGroups.set(group, []);
            }
            this.collisionGroups.get(group).push(collider);
        });
        
        return collider;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove a collider
     */
    removeCollider(collider) {
        const index = this.colliders.indexOf(collider);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.colliders.splice(index, 1);
        }
        
        // Remove from groups
        collider.groups.forEach(group => {
            const groupArray = this.collisionGroups.get(group);
            if (groupArray) {
                const groupIndex = groupArray.indexOf(collider);
                if (groupIndex !== -1) {
                    groupArray.splice(groupIndex, 1);
                }
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Update collision system
     */
    update() {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        // Reset stats
        this.stats.collisionsDetected = 0;
        this.stats.collisionsResolved = 0;
        
        // Build spatial hash for particles
        this.buildSpatialHash();
        
        // Check collisions
        this.checkCollisions();
    }
    
    /**
     * Build spatial hash for efficient broad-phase collision detection
     */
    buildSpatialHash() {
        this.spatialHash.clear();
        
        const cellSize = this.config.spatialHashCellSize;
        
        this.particleSystem.particles.forEach(particle => {
            if (!particle.alive) return;
            
            const cellX = Math.floor(particle.x / cellSize);
            const cellY = Math.floor(particle.y / cellSize);
            const key = `${cellX},${cellY}`;
            
            if (!this.spatialHash.has(key)) {
                this.spatialHash.set(key, []);
            }
            
            this.spatialHash.get(key).push(particle);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Check for collisions
     */
    checkCollisions() {
        let checksPerformed = 0;
        
        this.colliders.forEach(collider => {
            if (!collider.enabled) return;
            
            // Get nearby particles using spatial hash
            const nearbyParticles = this.getNearbyParticles(collider);
            
            nearbyParticles.forEach(particle => {
                if (!particle.alive) return;
                
                if (checksPerformed >= this.config.maxCollisionChecks) return;
                
                checksPerformed++;
                
                // Check collision
                if (this.checkCollision(particle, collider)) {
                    this.stats.collisionsDetected++;
                    this.resolveCollision(particle, collider);
                }
            });
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Get particles near a collider
     */
    getNearbyParticles(collider) {
        const cellSize = this.config.spatialHashCellSize;
        const particles = new Set();
        
        // Get bounding box of collider
        const bounds = this.getColliderBounds(collider);
        
        // Check all cells that overlap the bounds
        const minCellX = Math.floor(bounds.x / cellSize);
        const minCellY = Math.floor(bounds.y / cellSize);
        const maxCellX = Math.floor((bounds.x + bounds.width) / cellSize);
        const maxCellY = Math.floor((bounds.y + bounds.height) / cellSize);
        
        for (let cx = minCellX; cx <= maxCellX; cx++) {
            for (let cy = minCellY; cy <= maxCellY; cy++) {
                const key = `${cx},${cy}`;
                const cellParticles = this.spatialHash.get(key);
                
                if (cellParticles) {
                    cellParticles.forEach(p => particles.add(p));
                }
            }
        }
        
        return Array.from(particles);
    }
    
    /**
     * Get bounding box of collider
     */
    getColliderBounds(collider) {
        switch (collider.shape) {
            case 'rectangle':
                return {
                    x: collider.x - collider.width / 2,
                    y: collider.y - collider.height / 2,
                    width: collider.width,
                    height: collider.height
                };
                
            case 'circle':
                return {
                    x: collider.x - collider.radius,
                    y: collider.y - collider.radius,
                    width: collider.radius * 2,
                    height: collider.radius * 2
                };
                
            case 'polygon':
                let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;
                let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
                
                collider.vertices.forEach(v => {
                    minX = Math.min(minX, v.x);
                    minY = Math.min(minY, v.y);
                    maxX = Math.max(maxX, v.x);
                    maxY = Math.max(maxY, v.y);
                });
                
                return {
                    x: minX,
                    y: minY,
                    width: maxX - minX,
                    height: maxY - minY
                };
                
            default:
                return { x: collider.x, y: collider.y, width: 0, height: 0 };
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if particle collides with collider
     */
    checkCollision(particle, collider) {
        switch (collider.shape) {
            case 'rectangle':
                return this.checkRectangleCollision(particle, collider);
                
            case 'circle':
                return this.checkCircleCollision(particle, collider);
                
            case 'polygon':
                return this.checkPolygonCollision(particle, collider);
                
            case 'line':
                return this.checkLineCollision(particle, collider);
                
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }
    
    checkRectangleCollision(particle, collider) {
        const halfWidth = collider.width / 2;
        const halfHeight = collider.height / 2;
        
        return particle.x >= collider.x - halfWidth &&
               particle.x <= collider.x + halfWidth &&
               particle.y >= collider.y - halfHeight &&
               particle.y <= collider.y + halfHeight;
    }
    
    checkCircleCollision(particle, collider) {
        const dx = particle.x - collider.x;
        const dy = particle.y - collider.y;
        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        
        return distance <= collider.radius;
    }
    
    checkPolygonCollision(particle, collider) {
        // Point-in-polygon test using ray casting
        const vertices = collider.vertices;
        let inside = false;
        
        for (let i = 0, j = vertices.length - 1; i < vertices.length; j = i++) {
            const xi = vertices[i].x, yi = vertices[i].y;
            const xj = vertices[j].x, yj = vertices[j].y;
            
            const intersect = ((yi > particle.y) !== (yj > particle.y)) &&
                (particle.x < (xj - xi) * (particle.y - yi) / (yj - yi) + xi);
            
            if (intersect) inside = !inside;
        }
        
        return inside;
    }
    
    checkLineCollision(particle, collider) {
        // Distance from point to line segment
        const x1 = collider.x;
        const y1 = collider.y;
        const x2 = collider.x + Math.cos(collider.angle) * collider.length;
        const y2 = collider.y + Math.sin(collider.angle) * collider.length;
        
        const distance = this.pointToLineDistance(
            particle.x, particle.y,
            x1, y1, x2, y2
        );
        
        return distance <= (collider.thickness || 5);
    }
    
    pointToLineDistance(px, py, x1, y1, x2, y2) {
        const A = px - x1;
        const B = py - y1;
        const C = x2 - x1;
        const D = y2 - y1;
        
        const dot = A * C + B * D;
        const lenSq = C * C + D * D;
        let param = -1;
        
        if (lenSq !== 0) {
            param = dot / lenSq;
        }
        
        let xx, yy;
        
        if (param < 0) {
            xx = x1;
            yy = y1;
        } else if (param > 1) {
            xx = x2;
            yy = y2;
        } else {
            xx = x1 + param * C;
            yy = y1 + param * D;
        }
        
        const dx = px - xx;
        const dy = py - yy;
        
        return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    }
    
    /**
     * Resolve collision between particle and collider
     */
    resolveCollision(particle, collider) {
        switch (collider.response) {
            case 'bounce':
                this.bounceParticle(particle, collider);
                break;
                
            case 'stick':
                this.stickParticle(particle, collider);
                break;
                
            case 'destroy':
                this.particleSystem.killParticle(particle);
                break;
                
            case 'pass-through':
                // Do nothing, particle passes through
                break;
        }
        
        // Trigger callback
        if (collider.onCollision) {
            collider.onCollision(particle, collider);
        }
        
        this.stats.collisionsResolved++;
    }
    
    /**
     * Bounce particle off collider
     */
    bounceParticle(particle, collider) {
        // Calculate collision normal
        const normal = this.getCollisionNormal(particle, collider);
        
        if (!normal) return;
        
        // Reflect velocity
        const dotProduct = particle.vx * normal.x + particle.vy * normal.y;
        
        particle.vx -= 2 * dotProduct * normal.x;
        particle.vy -= 2 * dotProduct * normal.y;
        
        // Apply bounce coefficient
        const bounce = collider.bounce * (1 - this.config.bounceEnergyLoss);
        particle.vx *= bounce;
        particle.vy *= bounce;
        
        // Apply friction
        if (collider.friction > 0) {
            const speed = Math.sqrt(particle.vx * particle.vx + particle.vy * particle.vy);
            const frictionForce = collider.friction * speed;
            
            particle.vx *= (1 - frictionForce);
            particle.vy *= (1 - frictionForce);
        }
        
        // Move particle out of collision
        this.separateParticle(particle, collider, normal);
    }
    
    /**
     * Get collision normal
     */
    getCollisionNormal(particle, collider) {
        switch (collider.shape) {
            case 'rectangle':
                return this.getRectangleNormal(particle, collider);
                
            case 'circle':
                return this.getCircleNormal(particle, collider);
                
            case 'polygon':
                return this.getPolygonNormal(particle, collider);
                
            default:
                return { x: 0, y: -1 }; // Default up
        }
    }
    
    getRectangleNormal(particle, collider) {
        const halfWidth = collider.width / 2;
        const halfHeight = collider.height / 2;
        
        const dx = particle.x - collider.x;
        const dy = particle.y - collider.y;
        
        // Determine which edge is closest
        const overlapX = halfWidth - Math.abs(dx);
        const overlapY = halfHeight - Math.abs(dy);
        
        if (overlapX < overlapY) {
            // Collision from left or right
            return { x: dx > 0 ? 1 : -1, y: 0 };
        } else {
            // Collision from top or bottom
            return { x: 0, y: dy > 0 ? 1 : -1 };
        }
    }
    
    getCircleNormal(particle, collider) {
        const dx = particle.x - collider.x;
        const dy = particle.y - collider.y;
        const distance = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        
        if (distance === 0) {
            return { x: 0, y: -1 }; // Default up
        }
        
        return {
            x: dx / distance,
            y: dy / distance
        };
    }
    
    getPolygonNormal(particle, collider) {
        // Find closest edge
        const vertices = collider.vertices;
        let closestDistance = Infinity;
        let closestNormal = { x: 0, y: -1 };
        
        for (let i = 0; i < vertices.length; i++) {
            const v1 = vertices[i];
            const v2 = vertices[(i + 1) % vertices.length];
            
            // Edge vector
            const edgeX = v2.x - v1.x;
            const edgeY = v2.y - v1.y;
            
            // Normal (perpendicular)
            const normalX = -edgeY;
            const normalY = edgeX;
            const normalLength = Math.sqrt(normalX * normalX + normalY * normalY);
            
            const nx = normalX / normalLength;
            const ny = normalY / normalLength;
            
            // Distance to edge
            const distance = this.pointToLineDistance(
                particle.x, particle.y,
                v1.x, v1.y, v2.x, v2.y
            );
            
            if (distance < closestDistance) {
                closestDistance = distance;
                closestNormal = { x: nx, y: ny };
            }
        }
        
        return closestNormal;
    }
    
    /**
     * Separate particle from collider
     */
    separateParticle(particle, collider, normal) {
        // Move particle slightly away from collider to prevent overlap
        const separationDistance = 1;
        
        particle.x += normal.x * separationDistance;
        particle.y += normal.y * separationDistance;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stick particle to collider
     */
    stickParticle(particle, collider) {
        // Stop particle movement
        particle.vx = 0;
        particle.vy = 0;
        particle.angularVelocity = 0;
        
        // Mark as stuck
        particle.data.stuck = true;
        particle.data.stuckTo = collider;
    }
    
    /**
     * Render debug visualization
     */
    renderDebug(graphics) {
        graphics.clear();
        
        this.colliders.forEach(collider => {
            if (!collider.enabled) return;
            
            graphics.lineStyle(2, collider.debugColor, 0.5);
            graphics.fillStyle(collider.debugColor, 0.1);
            
            switch (collider.shape) {
                case 'rectangle':
                    graphics.strokeRect(
                        collider.x - collider.width / 2,
                        collider.y - collider.height / 2,
                        collider.width,
                        collider.height
                    );
                    graphics.fillRect(
                        collider.x - collider.width / 2,
                        collider.y - collider.height / 2,
                        collider.width,
                        collider.height
                    );
                    break;
                    
                case 'circle':
                    graphics.strokeCircle(collider.x, collider.y, collider.radius);
                    graphics.fillCircle(collider.x, collider.y, collider.radius);
                    break;
                    
                case 'polygon':
                    if (collider.vertices && collider.vertices.length > 0) {
                        graphics.beginPath();
                        graphics.moveTo(collider.vertices[0].x, collider.vertices[0].y);
                        
                        for (let i = 1; i < collider.vertices.length; i++) {
                            graphics.lineTo(collider.vertices[i].x, collider.vertices[i].y);
                        }
                        
                        graphics.closePath();
                        graphics.strokePath();
                        graphics.fillPath();
                    }
                    break;
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Get statistics
     */
    getStats() {
        return {
            ...this.stats,
            colliderCount: this.colliders.length,
            spatialHashCells: this.spatialHash.size
        };
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `collider_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
}

export default ParticleCollisionSystem;
Step 5: GPU-Accelerated Particle Renderer
javascript
// renderers/GPUParticleRenderer.js

class GPUParticleRenderer {
    constructor(scene, particleSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
        
        // WebGL resources
        this.gl = null;
        this.program = null;
        this.vertexBuffer = null;
        this.indexBuffer = null;
        
        // Particle data buffers
        this.maxParticles = 10000;
        this.positionData = new Float32Array(this.maxParticles * 2); // x, y
        this.colorData = new Float32Array(this.maxParticles * 4); // r, g, b, a
        this.scaleData = new Float32Array(this.maxParticles * 2); // scaleX, scaleY
        this.rotationData = new Float32Array(this.maxParticles); // rotation
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: false, // Disabled by default, enable when WebGL available
            batchSize: 1000,
            useInstancedRendering: true
        };
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Check WebGL support
        const canvas = this.scene.sys.game.canvas;
        
        try {
            this.gl = canvas.getContext('webgl2') || canvas.getContext('webgl');
            
            if (!this.gl) {
                console.warn('[GPUParticleRenderer] WebGL not supported, falling back to canvas rendering');
                return;
            }
            
            // Initialize shaders
            this.initializeShaders();
            
            // Initialize buffers
            this.initializeBuffers();
            
            this.config.enabled = true;
            
            console.log('[GPUParticleRenderer] Initialized successfully');
            console.log(`  - Max particles: ${this.maxParticles}`);
            console.log(`  - Instanced rendering: ${this.config.useInstancedRendering}`);
            
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('[GPUParticleRenderer] Initialization failed:', error);
            this.config.enabled = false;
        }
    }
    
    initializeShaders() {
        const gl = this.gl;
        
        // Vertex shader
        const vertexShaderSource = `
            attribute vec2 a_position;
            attribute vec2 a_particlePosition;
            attribute vec4 a_color;
            attribute vec2 a_scale;
            attribute float a_rotation;
            
            uniform mat4 u_projection;
            uniform vec2 u_resolution;
            
            varying vec4 v_color;
            varying vec2 v_texCoord;
            
            void main() {
                // Rotate and scale vertex
                float c = cos(a_rotation);
                float s = sin(a_rotation);
                
                vec2 rotated = vec2(
                    a_position.x * c - a_position.y * s,
                    a_position.x * s + a_position.y * c
                );
                
                vec2 scaled = rotated * a_scale;
                vec2 worldPos = a_particlePosition + scaled;
                
                // Convert to clip space
                vec2 clipSpace = (worldPos / u_resolution) * 2.0 - 1.0;
                gl_Position = vec4(clipSpace * vec2(1, -1), 0, 1);
                
                v_color = a_color;
                v_texCoord = a_position * 0.5 + 0.5; // Map -1..1 to 0..1
            }
        `;
        
        // Fragment shader
        const fragmentShaderSource = `
            precision mediump float;
            
            varying vec4 v_color;
            varying vec2 v_texCoord;
            
            void main() {
                // Circular particle shape
                float distance = length(v_texCoord - 0.5) * 2.0;
                float alpha = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.8, 1.0, distance);
                
                gl_FragColor = v_color * alpha;
            }
        `;
        
        // Compile shaders
        const vertexShader = this.compileShader(gl.VERTEX_SHADER, vertexShaderSource);
        const fragmentShader = this.compileShader(gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER, fragmentShaderSource);
        
        // Create program
        this.program = gl.createProgram();
        gl.attachShader(this.program, vertexShader);
        gl.attachShader(this.program, fragmentShader);
        gl.linkProgram(this.program);
        
        if (!gl.getProgramParameter(this.program, gl.LINK_STATUS)) {
            console.error('Shader program link failed:', gl.getProgramInfoLog(this.program));
            return;
        }
        
        // Get attribute and uniform locations
        this.attribLocations = {
            position: gl.getAttribLocation(this.program, 'a_position'),
            particlePosition: gl.getAttribLocation(this.program, 'a_particlePosition'),
            color: gl.getAttribLocation(this.program, 'a_color'),
            scale: gl.getAttribLocation(this.program, 'a_scale'),
            rotation: gl.getAttribLocation(this.program, 'a_rotation')
        };
        
        this.uniformLocations = {
            projection: gl.getUniformLocation(this.program, 'u_projection'),
            resolution: gl.getUniformLocation(this.program, 'u_resolution')
        };
    }
    
    compileShader(type, source) {
        const gl = this.gl;
        const shader = gl.createShader(type);
        
        gl.shaderSource(shader, source);
        gl.compileShader(shader);
        
        if (!gl.getShaderParameter(shader, gl.COMPILE_STATUS)) {
            console.error('Shader compilation failed:', gl.getShaderInfoLog(shader));
            gl.deleteShader(shader);
            return null;
        }
        
        return shader;
    }
    
    initializeBuffers() {
        const gl = this.gl;
        
        // Vertex positions for quad (-1 to 1)
        const vertices = new Float32Array([
            -1, -1,
             1, -1,
             1,  1,
            -1,  1
        ]);
        
        this.vertexBuffer = gl.createBuffer();
        gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.vertexBuffer);
        gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, vertices, gl.STATIC_DRAW);
        
        // Indices for quad (two triangles)
        const indices = new Uint16Array([
            0, 1, 2,
            0, 2, 3
        ]);
        
        this.indexBuffer = gl.createBuffer();
        gl.bindBuffer(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER, this.indexBuffer);
        gl.bufferData(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER, indices, gl.STATIC_DRAW);
        
        // Create buffers for instance data
        this.particlePositionBuffer = gl.createBuffer();
        this.particleColorBuffer = gl.createBuffer();
        this.particleScaleBuffer = gl.createBuffer();
        this.particleRotationBuffer = gl.createBuffer();
    }
    
    /**
     * Render all particles using GPU
     */
    render() {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        const gl = this.gl;
        const particles = this.particleSystem.particles.filter(p => p.alive);
        
        if (particles.length === 0) return;
        
        // Update particle data
        this.updateParticleData(particles);
        
        // Set up WebGL state
        gl.enable(gl.BLEND);
        gl.blendFunc(gl.SRC_ALPHA, gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);
        
        gl.useProgram(this.program);
        
        // Set uniforms
        gl.uniform2f(
            this.uniformLocations.resolution,
            this.scene.scale.width,
            this.scene.scale.height
        );
        
        // Bind vertex buffer
        gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, this.vertexBuffer);
        gl.enableVertexAttribArray(this.attribLocations.position);
        gl.vertexAttribPointer(
            this.attribLocations.position,
            2, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0
        );
        
        // Bind instance data buffers
        this.bindInstanceBuffer(
            this.particlePositionBuffer,
            this.positionData,
            this.attribLocations.particlePosition,
            2
        );
        
        this.bindInstanceBuffer(
            this.particleColorBuffer,
            this.colorData,
            this.attribLocations.color,
            4
        );
        
        this.bindInstanceBuffer(
            this.particleScaleBuffer,
            this.scaleData,
            this.attribLocations.scale,
            2
        );
        
        this.bindInstanceBuffer(
            this.particleRotationBuffer,
            this.rotationData,
            this.attribLocations.rotation,
            1
        );
        
        // Bind index buffer
        gl.bindBuffer(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER, this.indexBuffer);
        
        // Draw instances
        const ext = gl.getExtension('ANGLE_instanced_arrays');
        if (ext && this.config.useInstancedRendering) {
            ext.drawElementsInstancedANGLE(
                gl.TRIANGLES,
                6, // indices count
                gl.UNSIGNED_SHORT,
                0,
                particles.length // instance count
            );
        } else {
            // Fallback: draw each particle individually
            for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
                gl.drawElements(gl.TRIANGLES, 6, gl.UNSIGNED_SHORT, 0);
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update particle data arrays
     */
    updateParticleData(particles) {
        for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++) {
            const particle = particles[i];
            
            // Position
            this.positionData[i * 2] = particle.x;
            this.positionData[i * 2 + 1] = particle.y;
            
            // Color (convert from hex to RGBA)
            const color = Phaser.Display.Color.IntegerToColor(particle.color);
            this.colorData[i * 4] = color.red / 255;
            this.colorData[i * 4 + 1] = color.green / 255;
            this.colorData[i * 4 + 2] = color.blue / 255;
            this.colorData[i * 4 + 3] = particle.alpha;
            
            // Scale
            this.scaleData[i * 2] = particle.scaleX * 10; // Base size
            this.scaleData[i * 2 + 1] = particle.scaleY * 10;
            
            // Rotation
            this.rotationData[i] = particle.rotation;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Bind instance buffer
     */
    bindInstanceBuffer(buffer, data, location, size) {
        const gl = this.gl;
        
        gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, buffer);
        gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, data, gl.DYNAMIC_DRAW);
        
        gl.enableVertexAttribArray(location);
        gl.vertexAttribPointer(location, size, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0);
        
        // Set divisor for instancing
        const ext = gl.getExtension('ANGLE_instanced_arrays');
        if (ext && this.config.useInstancedRendering) {
            ext.vertexAttribDivisorANGLE(location, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Clean up resources
     */
    shutdown() {
        if (!this.gl) return;
        
        const gl = this.gl;
        
        if (this.program) {
            gl.deleteProgram(this.program);
        }
        
        if (this.vertexBuffer) {
            gl.deleteBuffer(this.vertexBuffer);
        }
        
        if (this.indexBuffer) {
            gl.deleteBuffer(this.indexBuffer);
        }
        
        if (this.particlePositionBuffer) {
            gl.deleteBuffer(this.particlePositionBuffer);
        }
        
        if (this.particleColorBuffer) {
            gl.deleteBuffer(this.particleColorBuffer);
        }
        
        if (this.particleScaleBuffer) {
            gl.deleteBuffer(this.particleScaleBuffer);
        }
        
        if (this.particleRotationBuffer) {
            gl.deleteBuffer(this.particleRotationBuffer);
        }
        
        console.log('[GPUParticleRenderer] Shutdown complete');
    }
}

export default GPUParticleRenderer;
Step 6: Performance Optimizer
javascript
// systems/ParticleOptimizer.js

class ParticleOptimizer {
    constructor(particleSystem) {
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            targetFPS: 60,
            adaptiveQuality: true,
            
            // Culling
            cullOffscreen: true,
            cullDistance: 100, // pixels beyond screen
            
            // LOD thresholds
            lodEnabled: true,
            lodNear: 300,    // Full quality within 300px of camera center
            lodMid: 600,     // Medium quality 300-600px
            lodFar: 1000,    // Low quality 600-1000px
            
            // Limits
            maxActiveParticles: 5000,
            maxEmittersPerFrame: 50,
            
            // Budget
            frameTimeBudget: 16.67 // ms (60 FPS)
        };
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            currentFPS: 60,
            averageFrameTime: 0,
            particlesCulled: 0,
            emittersCulled: 0,
            qualityLevel: 'high' // high, medium, low
        };
        
        // Performance tracking
        this.frameTimeHistory = [];
        this.frameTimeHistorySize = 60;
    }
    
    /**
     * Optimize particle system
     */
    optimize() {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        const startTime = performance.now();
        
        // Cull off-screen particles and emitters
        if (this.config.cullOffscreen) {
            this.cullOffscreen();
        }
        
        // Apply Level of Detail
        if (this.config.lodEnabled) {
            this.applyLOD();
        }
        
        // Enforce particle limits
        this.enforceParticleLimits();
        
        // Adaptive quality adjustment
        if (this.config.adaptiveQuality) {
            this.adjustQuality();
        }
        
        // Update statistics
        const frameTime = performance.now() - startTime;
        this.updateStats(frameTime);
    }
    
    /**
     * Cull off-screen elements
     */
    cullOffscreen() {
        const camera = this.particleSystem.scene.cameras.main;
        const worldView = camera.worldView;
        const padding = this.config.cullDistance;
        
        let particlesCulled = 0;
        let emittersCulled = 0;
        
        // Cull particles
        this.particleSystem.particles.forEach(particle => {
            if (!particle.alive) return;
            
            const inView = Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains(
                worldView,
                particle.x - padding,
                particle.y - padding
            );
            
            particle.visible = inView;
            
            if (!inView) {
                particlesCulled++;
            }
        });
        
        // Cull emitters
        this.particleSystem.emitters.forEach(emitter => {
            if (!emitter.active) return;
            
            const inView = Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains(
                worldView,
                emitter.x - padding,
                emitter.y - padding
            );
            
            emitter.culled = !inView;
            
            if (!inView) {
                emittersCulled++;
            }
        });
        
        this.stats.particlesCulled = particlesCulled;
        this.stats.emittersCulled = emittersCulled;
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply Level of Detail based on distance from camera
     */
    applyLOD() {
        const camera = this.particleSystem.scene.cameras.main;
        const cameraCenter = {
            x: camera.scrollX + camera.width / 2,
            y: camera.scrollY + camera.height / 2
        };
        
        this.particleSystem.emitters.forEach(emitter => {
            if (!emitter.active || emitter.culled) return;
            
            const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                emitter.x, emitter.y,
                cameraCenter.x, cameraCenter.y
            );
            
            // Determine LOD level
            let lodLevel;
            if (distance < this.config.lodNear) {
                lodLevel = 'high';
            } else if (distance < this.config.lodMid) {
                lodLevel = 'medium';
            } else if (distance < this.config.lodFar) {
                lodLevel = 'low';
            } else {
                // Beyond far distance, cull
                emitter.culled = true;
                return;
            }
            
            this.applyEmitterLOD(emitter, lodLevel);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply LOD settings to emitter
     */
    applyEmitterLOD(emitter, level) {
        // Store original values if not already stored
        if (!emitter._originalEmissionRate) {
            emitter._originalEmissionRate = emitter.emissionRate;
        }
        
        switch (level) {
            case 'high':
                // Full quality
                emitter.emissionRate = emitter._originalEmissionRate;
                break;
                
            case 'medium':
                // 70% emission rate
                emitter.emissionRate = emitter._originalEmissionRate * 0.7;
                break;
                
            case 'low':
                // 40% emission rate
                emitter.emissionRate = emitter._originalEmissionRate * 0.4;
                break;
        }
        
        emitter._currentLOD = level;
    }
    
    /**
     * Enforce particle limits
     */
    enforceParticleLimits() {
        const particleCount = this.particleSystem.particles.filter(p => p.alive).length;
        
        if (particleCount > this.config.maxActiveParticles) {
            // Kill oldest particles
            const excess = particleCount - this.config.maxActiveParticles;
            let killed = 0;
            
            for (let i = 0; i < this.particleSystem.particles.length && killed < excess; i++) {
                const particle = this.particleSystem.particles[i];
                
                if (particle.alive) {
                    this.particleSystem.killParticle(particle);
                    killed++;
                }
            }
            
            console.warn(`[ParticleOptimizer] Killed ${killed} particles to stay within limit`);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Adjust quality based on performance
     */
    adjustQuality() {
        const avgFrameTime = this.stats.averageFrameTime;
        const targetFrameTime = this.config.frameTimeBudget;
        
        // If consistently over budget, reduce quality
        if (avgFrameTime > targetFrameTime * 1.2) {
            this.reduceQuality();
        }
        // If consistently under budget with headroom, increase quality
        else if (avgFrameTime < targetFrameTime * 0.8 && this.stats.qualityLevel !== 'high') {
            this.increaseQuality();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Reduce quality settings
     */
    reduceQuality() {
        switch (this.stats.qualityLevel) {
            case 'high':
                this.stats.qualityLevel = 'medium';
                this.config.maxActiveParticles = Math.floor(this.config.maxActiveParticles * 0.7);
                this.config.lodNear *= 0.8;
                this.config.lodMid *= 0.8;
                this.config.lodFar *= 0.8;
                console.log('[ParticleOptimizer] Reduced quality to MEDIUM');
                break;
                
            case 'medium':
                this.stats.qualityLevel = 'low';
                this.config.maxActiveParticles = Math.floor(this.config.maxActiveParticles * 0.7);
                this.config.lodNear *= 0.8;
                this.config.lodMid *= 0.8;
                this.config.lodFar *= 0.8;
                console.log('[ParticleOptimizer] Reduced quality to LOW');
                break;
                
            case 'low':
                // Already at lowest quality
                console.warn('[ParticleOptimizer] Already at lowest quality, performance may suffer');
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Increase quality settings
     */
    increaseQuality() {
        switch (this.stats.qualityLevel) {
            case 'low':
                this.stats.qualityLevel = 'medium';
                this.config.maxActiveParticles = Math.floor(this.config.maxActiveParticles * 1.4);
                this.config.lodNear *= 1.2;
                this.config.lodMid *= 1.2;
                this.config.lodFar *= 1.2;
                console.log('[ParticleOptimizer] Increased quality to MEDIUM');
                break;
                
            case 'medium':
                this.stats.qualityLevel = 'high';
                this.config.maxActiveParticles = Math.floor(this.config.maxActiveParticles * 1.4);
                this.config.lodNear *= 1.2;
                this.config.lodMid *= 1.2;
                this.config.lodFar *= 1.2;
                console.log('[ParticleOptimizer] Increased quality to HIGH');
                break;
                
            case 'high':
                // Already at highest quality
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update statistics
     */
    updateStats(frameTime) {
        // Add to history
        this.frameTimeHistory.push(frameTime);
        
        if (this.frameTimeHistory.length > this.frameTimeHistorySize) {
            this.frameTimeHistory.shift();
        }
        
        // Calculate average
        const sum = this.frameTimeHistory.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
        this.stats.averageFrameTime = sum / this.frameTimeHistory.length;
        
        // Calculate FPS
        this.stats.currentFPS = 1000 / this.stats.averageFrameTime;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get performance report
     */
    getPerformanceReport() {
        const particleCount = this.particleSystem.particles.filter(p => p.alive).length;
        const emitterCount = this.particleSystem.emitters.filter(e => e.active).length;
        
        return {
            fps: Math.round(this.stats.currentFPS),
            frameTime: Math.round(this.stats.averageFrameTime * 100) / 100,
            qualityLevel: this.stats.qualityLevel,
            particles: {
                active: particleCount,
                culled: this.stats.particlesCulled,
                limit: this.config.maxActiveParticles
            },
            emitters: {
                active: emitterCount,
                culled: this.stats.emittersCulled
            },
            budget: {
                target: this.config.frameTimeBudget,
                actual: this.stats.averageFrameTime,
                utilization: Math.round((this.stats.averageFrameTime / this.config.frameTimeBudget) * 100)
            }
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Reset to default settings
     */
    reset() {
        this.config.maxActiveParticles = 5000;
        this.config.lodNear = 300;
        this.config.lodMid = 600;
        this.config.lodFar = 1000;
        this.stats.qualityLevel = 'high';
        this.frameTimeHistory = [];
    }
}

export default ParticleOptimizer;
Step 7: Complete Integration Examples
javascript
// examples/particleSystemExamples.js

/**
 * EXAMPLE 1: Complete Scene Setup with All Systems
 */

import AdvancedParticleSystem from '../systems/AdvancedParticleSystem.js';
import { registerAllPresets } from '../configs/particlePresets.js';
import SpellParticleIntegration from '../integration/SpellParticleIntegration.js';
import ParticleCollisionSystem from '../systems/ParticleCollisionSystem.js';
import GPUParticleRenderer from '../renderers/GPUParticleRenderer.js';
import ParticleOptimizer from '../systems/ParticleOptimizer.js';

class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize particle system
        this.particleSystem = new AdvancedParticleSystem(this);
        
        // Register all presets
        registerAllPresets(this.particleSystem);
        
        // Initialize collision system
        this.particleCollision = new ParticleCollisionSystem(this.particleSystem, this);
        
        // Initialize GPU renderer (if supported)
        this.gpuRenderer = new GPUParticleRenderer(this, this.particleSystem);
        
        // Initialize optimizer
        this.particleOptimizer = new ParticleOptimizer(this.particleSystem);
        
        // Initialize spell integration
        this.spellParticles = new SpellParticleIntegration(this, this.particleSystem);
        
        // Add collision boundaries
        this.createWorldBoundaries();
        
        // Add environmental effects
        this.createEnvironmentalEffects();
        
        // Add global forces
        this.createGlobalForces();
        
        // Debug graphics
        this.debugGraphics = this.add.graphics();
        
        // Performance display
        this.createPerformanceDisplay();
    }
    
    createWorldBoundaries() {
        const width = this.scale.width;
        const height = this.scale.height;
        
        // Floor
        this.particleCollision.addCollider({
            shape: 'rectangle',
            x: width / 2,
            y: height - 10,
            width: width,
            height: 20,
            static: true,
            bounce: 0.7,
            response: 'bounce'
        });
        
        // Walls
        this.particleCollision.addCollider({
            shape: 'rectangle',
            x: 10,
            y: height / 2,
            width: 20,
            height: height,
            static: true,
            bounce: 0.8,
            response: 'bounce'
        });
        
        this.particleCollision.addCollider({
            shape: 'rectangle',
            x: width - 10,
            y: height / 2,
            width: 20,
            height: height,
            static: true,
            bounce: 0.8,
            response: 'bounce'
        });
    }
    
    createEnvironmentalEffects() {
        // Rain effect
        this.rainEmitter = this.particleSystem.createEffect(
            'rain',
            this.scale.width / 2,
            -50
        );
        
        // Fireflies
        this.firefliesEmitter = this.particleSystem.createEffect(
            'fireflies',
            this.scale.width / 2,
            this.scale.height / 2
        );
    }
    
    createGlobalForces() {
        // Gravity
        this.particleSystem.addGlobalForce({
            type: 'gravity',
            x: 0,
            y: 100,
            enabled: true
        });
        
        // Wind (intermittent)
        this.windForce = this.particleSystem.addGlobalForce({
            type: 'wind',
            area: {
                shape: 'rectangle',
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                width: this.scale.width,
                height: this.scale.height
            },
            strength: { x: 50, y: 0 },
            enabled: false
        });
        
        // Toggle wind periodically
        this.time.addEvent({
            delay: 3000,
            callback: () => {
                this.windForce.enabled = !this.windForce.enabled;
            },
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    createPerformanceDisplay() {
        this.performanceText = this.add.text(10, 10, '', {
            font: '14px monospace',
            fill: '#ffffff',
            backgroundColor: '#000000',
            padding: { x: 5, y: 5 }
        });
        this.performanceText.setDepth(10000);
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        // Update collision system
        this.particleCollision.update();
        
        // Optimize
        this.particleOptimizer.optimize();
        
        // Update performance display
        const report = this.particleOptimizer.getPerformanceReport();
        this.performanceText.setText([
            `FPS: ${report.fps}`,
            `Frame Time: ${report.frameTime}ms`,
            `Quality: ${report.qualityLevel.toUpperCase()}`,
            `Particles: ${report.particles.active} / ${report.particles.limit}`,
            `Culled: ${report.particles.culled}`,
            `Budget: ${report.budget.utilization}%`
        ]);
        
        // Render debug visualization (toggle with D key)
        if (this.input.keyboard.addKey('D').isDown) {
            this.particleCollision.renderDebug(this.debugGraphics);
        } else {
            this.debugGraphics.clear();
        }
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 2: Complex Multi-Stage Spell Effect
 */

class ComplexSpellEffect {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
    }
    
    createFireTornado(x, y) {
        // Stage 1: Ground impact burst
        const impactBurst = this.scene.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: x,
            y: y,
            emissionMode: 'burst',
            burstCount: 50,
            emissionShape: 'circle',
            emissionArea: { radius: 30 },
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 400, max: 700 },
                speed: { min: 200, max: 400 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: { start: 0xff8800, end: 0x440000 },
                scale: { start: 1.2, end: 0.3 },
                alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
                
                blendMode: 'ADD',
                drag: 0.9
            }
        });
        
        // Stage 2: Rising vortex
        const vortexEmitter = this.scene.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: x,
            y: y,
            emissionMode: 'continuous',
            emissionRate: 100,
            duration: 3000,
            emissionShape: 'circle',
            emissionArea: { radius: 80 },
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 1000, max: 1500 },
                speed: { min: 100, max: 200 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: {
                    start: 0xff4400,
                    end: 0xffaa00
                },
                scale: { start: 1.0, end: 0.5 },
                alpha: { start: 0.9, end: 0.0 },
                
                trail: true,
                trailLength: 8,
                
                blendMode: 'ADD',
                drag: 0.98
            }
        });
        
        // Add vortex force
        const vortex = this.scene.particleSystem.addGlobalForce({
            type: 'vortex',
            x: x,
            y: y,
            radius: 150,
            strength: 200,
            pull: -50, // Negative = push outward
            enabled: true
        });
        
        // Animate vortex upward
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: vortex,
            y: y - 300,
            duration: 3000,
            ease: 'Quad.easeOut'
        });
        
        // Stage 3: Explosion at peak
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(3000, () => {
            this.scene.particleSystem.createEffect(
                'fireball',
                vortex.x,
                vortex.y
            );
            
            // Remove vortex force
            this.scene.particleSystem.removeGlobalForce(vortex);
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 3: Interactive Particle Painting
 */

class ParticlePainter {
    constructor(scene, particleSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
        this.painting = false;
        
        // Track mouse
        this.scene.input.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.painting = true;
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointerup', () => {
            this.painting = false;
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointermove', (pointer) => {
            if (this.painting) {
                this.paint(pointer.worldX, pointer.worldY);
            }
        });
    }
    
    paint(x, y) {
        this.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: x,
            y: y,
            emissionMode: 'burst',
            burstCount: 5,
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 2000, max: 4000 },
                speed: { min: 20, max: 50 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: Phaser.Display.Color.HSVToRGB(
                    Math.random(),
                    1.0,
                    1.0
                ).color,
                
                scale: { start: 0.8, end: 1.2 },
                alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
                
                blendMode: 'NORMAL',
                drag: 0.95
            }
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 4: Particle-Based Damage Numbers
 */

class DamageNumberParticles {
    constructor(scene, particleSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
    }
    
    showDamage(x, y, amount, isCritical = false) {
        const color = isCritical ? 0xffff00 : 0xff4444;
        const scale = isCritical ? 1.5 : 1.0;
        
        // Create text sprite
        const damageText = this.scene.add.text(x, y, amount.toString(), {
            font: `${24 * scale}px bold Arial`,
            fill: `#${color.toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`,
            stroke: '#000000',
            strokeThickness: 4
        });
        
        damageText.setOrigin(0.5);
        
        // Animate upward with particles
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: damageText,
            y: y - 50,
            alpha: 0,
            duration: 1000,
            ease: 'Cubic.easeOut',
            onComplete: () => {
                damageText.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        // Particle burst
        this.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: x,
            y: y,
            emissionMode: 'burst',
            burstCount: isCritical ? 30 : 15,
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'particle',
                lifetime: { min: 400, max: 700 },
                speed: { min: 100, max: 200 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: color,
                scale: { start: 0.8, end: 0.2 },
                alpha: { start: 1.0, end: 0.0 },
                
                blendMode: 'ADD',
                drag: 0.92
            }
        });
    }
    
    showHealing(x, y, amount) {
        const healText = this.scene.add.text(x, y, `+${amount}`, {
            font: '20px bold Arial',
            fill: '#44ff88',
            stroke: '#000000',
            strokeThickness: 3
        });
        
        healText.setOrigin(0.5);
        
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: healText,
            y: y - 40,
            alpha: 0,
            duration: 800,
            ease: 'Quad.easeOut',
            onComplete: () => {
                healText.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        // Green sparkles
        this.particleSystem.createEffect('healing_aura', x, y);
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 5: Weather System with Particles
 */

class ParticleWeatherSystem {
    constructor(scene, particleSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.particleSystem = particleSystem;
        this.currentWeather = 'clear';
        this.weatherEmitters = {};
    }
    
    setWeather(weatherType, intensity = 1.0) {
        // Stop current weather
        if (this.weatherEmitters[this.currentWeather]) {
            this.particleSystem.stopEmitter(
                this.weatherEmitters[this.currentWeather],
                false
            );
        }
        
        this.currentWeather = weatherType;
        
        // Start new weather
        switch (weatherType) {
            case 'rain':
                this.startRain(intensity);
                break;
                
            case 'snow':
                this.startSnow(intensity);
                break;
                
            case 'storm':
                this.startStorm(intensity);
                break;
                
            case 'fog':
                this.startFog(intensity);
                break;
                
            case 'clear':
            default:
                // No particles needed
                break;
        }
    }
    
    startRain(intensity) {
        this.weatherEmitters.rain = this.particleSystem.createEffect(
            'rain',
            this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            -50
        );
        
        // Adjust rate based on intensity
        this.weatherEmitters.rain.emissionRate = 50 * intensity;
        
        // Add puddle splashes
        this.addRainSplashes(intensity);
    }
    
    addRainSplashes(intensity) {
        this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: 100 / intensity,
            callback: () => {
                if (this.currentWeather !== 'rain') return;
                
                const x = Math.random() * this.scene.scale.width;
                const y = this.scene.scale.height - 20;
                
                this.particleSystem.createEmitter({
                    x: x,
                    y: y,
                    emissionMode: 'burst',
                    burstCount: 5,
                    
                    particleConfig: {
                        texture: 'particle',
                        lifetime: { min: 200, max: 400 },
                        speed: { min: 30, max: 80 },
                        angle: { min: -Math.PI / 2 - 0.5, max: -Math.PI / 2 + 0.5 },
                        
                        color: 0xaaccff,
                        scale: { start: 0.3, end: 0.1 },
                        alpha: { start: 0.7, end: 0.0 },
                        
                        blendMode: 'NORMAL',
                        drag: 0.9
                    }
                });
            },
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    startSnow(intensity) {
        this.weatherEmitters.snow = this.particleSystem.createEffect(
            'snow',
            this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            -50
        );
        
        this.weatherEmitters.snow.emissionRate = 30 * intensity;
        
        // Add wind turbulence
        this.particleSystem.addGlobalForce({
            type: 'turbulence',
            strength: 20 * intensity,
            time: 0,
            enabled: true
        });
    }
    
    startStorm(intensity) {
        // Heavy rain
        this.startRain(intensity * 1.5);
        
        // Lightning flashes
        this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: 3000 / intensity,
            callback: () => {
                if (this.currentWeather !== 'storm') return;
                
                // Flash screen
                this.scene.cameras.main.flash(150, 255, 255, 255);
                
                // Lightning bolt particles
                const x = Math.random() * this.scene.scale.width;
                
                this.particleSystem.createEffect(
                    'lightning_bolt',
                    x,
                    -50
                );
            },
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    startFog(intensity) {
        this.weatherEmitters.fog = this.particleSystem.createEmitter({
            x: this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            y: this.scene.scale.height / 2,
            emissionMode: 'continuous',
            emissionRate: 20 * intensity,
            duration: -1,
            emissionShape: 'rectangle',
            emissionArea: {
                width: this.scene.scale.width,
                height: this.scene.scale.height
            },
            
            particleConfig: {
                texture: 'smoke_particle',
                lifetime: { min: 5000, max: 8000 },
                speed: { min: 10, max: 30 },
                angle: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                
                color: 0xcccccc,
                scale: { start: 2.0, end: 3.0 },
                alpha: { start: 0.3 * intensity, end: 0.0 },
                
                rotation: { min: 0, max: Math.PI * 2 },
                angularVelocity: { min: -0.5, max: 0.5 },
                
                blendMode: 'NORMAL',
                drag: 0.99
            }
        });
    }
}

export {
    GameScene,
    ComplexSpellEffect,
    ParticlePainter,
    DamageNumberParticles,
    ParticleWeatherSystem
};

// Currently with basic Phaser camera:

// Create sophisticated camera behavior
const cameraSystem = new AdvancedCameraSystem(this);

// Cinematic boss entrance
cameraSystem.playCinematic([
    { target: boss, zoom: 0.5, duration: 2000, focus: 'center' },
    { target: boss.face, zoom: 2.0, duration: 1500, focus: 'eyes' },
    { target: player, zoom: 1.5, duration: 1000, focus: 'ready-stance' }

// Combat impact with layered shake
cameraSystem.shake('heavy-impact', {
    intensity: 0.02,
