```
## What We're Building

### Camera System Architecture
```
Advanced Camera System
│
├─── Camera Controllers
│    ├─── Follow Controller (smooth tracking)
│    ├─── Look-Ahead Controller (predictive)
│    ├─── Framing Controller (auto-compose)
│    ├─── Zoom Controller (dynamic scaling)
│    └─── Target Lock Controller (combat focus)
│
├─── Cinematic System
│    ├─── Timeline Manager (keyframe sequences)
│    ├─── Curve Interpolation (smooth transitions)
│    ├─── Camera Cuts (instant switches)
│    ├─── Dolly Zoom (Hitchcock effect)
│    └─── Cinematic Presets (common shots)
│
├─── Camera Effects
│    ├─── Shake System (multi-layer, frequency-based)
│    ├─── Flash System (screen overlays)
│    ├─── Fade System (transitions)
│    ├─── Screen Tilt (dynamic rotation)
│    └─── Chromatic Aberration (distortion)
│
├─── Camera Zones
│    ├─── Trigger Zones (auto-adjust on enter)
│    ├─── Constraint Zones (boundary limits)
│    ├─── Focus Zones (priority targets)
│    └─── Speed Zones (slow/fast regions)
│
├─── Smart Framing
│    ├─── Rule of Thirds (composition guides)
│    ├─── Target Importance (weighted focus)
│    ├─── Obstacle Avoidance (no wall clipping)
│    ├─── Predictive Framing (anticipate movement)
│    └─── Multi-Target Framing (group shots)
│
├─── Camera Behaviors
│    ├─── Lerp Smoothing (gradual movement)
│    ├─── Spring Physics (bouncy follow)
│    ├─── Deadzone (movement threshold)
│    ├─── Lead Distance (look-ahead offset)
│    └─── Drift Correction (auto-center)
│
└─── Performance & Debug
     ├─── Camera Prediction (optimize culling)
     ├─── Debug Visualization (framing guides)
     ├─── Recording System (replay shots)
     └─── Performance Metrics
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Camera System
javascript
// systems/AdvancedCameraSystem.js

class AdvancedCameraSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.camera = scene.cameras.main;
        
        // Controllers
        this.controllers = {
            follow: null,
            lookAhead: null,
            framing: null,
            zoom: null,
            targetLock: null
        };
        
        // Active controller
        this.activeController = null;
        
        // Camera zones
        this.zones = [];
        
        // Effects
        this.effects = {
            shakes: [],
            flashes: [],
            fades: [],
            tilts: []
        };
        
        // Cinematic state
        this.cinematicActive = false;
        this.cinematicTimeline = null;
        this.cinematicCallbacks = [];
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            // Smoothing
            lerpFactor: 0.1,
            
            // Deadzones
            deadzoneX: 0.2, // 20% of screen width
            deadzoneY: 0.2,
            
            // Look-ahead
            lookAheadDistance: 150,
            lookAheadSmoothing: 0.05,
            
            // Zoom
            minZoom: 0.5,
            maxZoom: 3.0,
            zoomSpeed: 0.05,
            
            // Shake
            maxShakeIntensity: 0.05,
            shakeDecay: 0.92,
            
            // Boundaries
            worldBounds: null,
            
            // Debug
            showDebug: false
        };
        
        // State
        this.state = {
            targetX: 0,
            targetY: 0,
            currentZoom: 1.0,
            targetZoom: 1.0,
            lookAheadX: 0,
            lookAheadY: 0,
            rotation: 0,
            targetRotation: 0
        };
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            cameraMovement: 0,
            zooms: 0,
            shakes: 0,
            cinematicsPlayed: 0
        };
        
        // Debug graphics
        this.debugGraphics = scene.add.graphics();
        this.debugGraphics.setDepth(10000);
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Set initial camera state
        this.state.currentZoom = this.camera.zoom;
        this.state.targetZoom = this.camera.zoom;
        
        // Set world bounds if available
        if (this.scene.physics && this.scene.physics.world) {
            this.config.worldBounds = this.scene.physics.world.bounds;
            this.camera.setBounds(
                this.config.worldBounds.x,
                this.config.worldBounds.y,
                this.config.worldBounds.width,
                this.config.worldBounds.height
            );
        }
        
        console.log('[AdvancedCameraSystem] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === CAMERA CONTROLLERS ===
    
    /**
     * Enable smooth follow controller
     * @param {Object} target - Target to follow
     * @param {Object} options - Follow options
     */
    followTarget(target, options = {}) {
        this.controllers.follow = {
            target: target,
            lerpX: options.lerpX !== undefined ? options.lerpX : this.config.lerpFactor,
            lerpY: options.lerpY !== undefined ? options.lerpY : this.config.lerpFactor,
            offsetX: options.offsetX || 0,
            offsetY: options.offsetY || 0,
            deadzoneX: options.deadzoneX !== undefined ? options.deadzoneX : this.config.deadzoneX,
            deadzoneY: options.deadzoneY !== undefined ? options.deadzoneY : this.config.deadzoneY,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeController = 'follow';
    }
    
    /**
     * Enable look-ahead controller (predicts target movement)
     */
    enableLookAhead(target, options = {}) {
        this.controllers.lookAhead = {
            target: target,
            distance: options.distance || this.config.lookAheadDistance,
            smoothing: options.smoothing || this.config.lookAheadSmoothing,
            maxSpeed: options.maxSpeed || 500,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeController = 'lookAhead';
    }
    
    /**
     * Frame multiple targets automatically
     * @param {Array} targets - Array of objects to frame
     * @param {Object} options - Framing options
     */
    frameTargets(targets, options = {}) {
        this.controllers.framing = {
            targets: targets,
            padding: options.padding || 100,
            minZoom: options.minZoom || this.config.minZoom,
            maxZoom: options.maxZoom || this.config.maxZoom,
            smooth: options.smooth !== undefined ? options.smooth : true,
            smoothFactor: options.smoothFactor || 0.05,
            weights: options.weights || null, // Importance weights per target
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeController = 'framing';
    }
    
    /**
     * Lock camera to specific target (combat focus)
     */
    lockToTarget(target, options = {}) {
        this.controllers.targetLock = {
            target: target,
            zoom: options.zoom || 1.5,
            lockStrength: options.lockStrength || 0.15,
            circleStrafe: options.circleStrafe || false,
            strafeRadius: options.strafeRadius || 200,
            strafeSpeed: options.strafeSpeed || 1,
            strafeAngle: 0,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeController = 'targetLock';
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop all controllers
     */
    stopFollow() {
        Object.keys(this.controllers).forEach(key => {
            if (this.controllers[key]) {
                this.controllers[key].enabled = false;
            }
        });
        
        this.activeController = null;
    }
    
    // === UPDATE CONTROLLERS ===
    
    update(delta) {
        if (this.cinematicActive) {
            this.updateCinematic(delta);
            return;
        }
        
        // Update active controller
        switch (this.activeController) {
            case 'follow':
                this.updateFollowController(delta);
                break;
                
            case 'lookAhead':
                this.updateLookAheadController(delta);
                break;
                
            case 'framing':
                this.updateFramingController(delta);
                break;
                
            case 'targetLock':
                this.updateTargetLockController(delta);
                break;
        }
        
        // Update zoom
        this.updateZoom(delta);
        
        // Update rotation
        this.updateRotation(delta);
        
        // Update camera zones
        this.updateZones();
        
        // Update effects
        this.updateEffects(delta);
        
        // Apply final position
        this.applyPosition();
        
        // Debug visualization
        if (this.config.showDebug) {
            this.renderDebug();
        }
    }
    
    updateFollowController(delta) {
        const controller = this.controllers.follow;
        if (!controller || !controller.enabled) return;
        
        const target = controller.target;
        if (!target) return;
        
        // Calculate deadzone boundaries
        const screenWidth = this.camera.width / this.camera.zoom;
        const screenHeight = this.camera.height / this.camera.zoom;
        
        const deadzoneWidth = screenWidth * controller.deadzoneX;
        const deadzoneHeight = screenHeight * controller.deadzoneY;
        
        const currentCameraX = this.camera.scrollX + screenWidth / 2;
        const currentCameraY = this.camera.scrollY + screenHeight / 2;
        
        // Check if target is outside deadzone
        const targetX = target.x + controller.offsetX;
        const targetY = target.y + controller.offsetY;
        
        const deltaX = targetX - currentCameraX;
        const deltaY = targetY - currentCameraY;
        
        // Apply deadzone
        let moveX = 0;
        let moveY = 0;
        
        if (Math.abs(deltaX) > deadzoneWidth / 2) {
            moveX = deltaX - Math.sign(deltaX) * deadzoneWidth / 2;
        }
        
        if (Math.abs(deltaY) > deadzoneHeight / 2) {
            moveY = deltaY - Math.sign(deltaY) * deadzoneHeight / 2;
        }
        
        // Lerp to target
        this.state.targetX = currentCameraX + moveX * controller.lerpX;
        this.state.targetY = currentCameraY + moveY * controller.lerpY;
    }
    
    updateLookAheadController(delta) {
        const controller = this.controllers.lookAhead;
        if (!controller || !controller.enabled) return;
        
        const target = controller.target;
        if (!target || !target.body) return;
        
        // Calculate look-ahead offset based on velocity
        const velocityX = target.body.velocity.x;
        const velocityY = target.body.velocity.y;
        
        const speed = Math.sqrt(velocityX * velocityX + velocityY * velocityY);
        const normalizedSpeed = Math.min(speed / controller.maxSpeed, 1.0);
        
        // Calculate target look-ahead
        const targetLookAheadX = (velocityX / speed || 0) * controller.distance * normalizedSpeed;
        const targetLookAheadY = (velocityY / speed || 0) * controller.distance * normalizedSpeed;
        
        // Smooth look-ahead
        this.state.lookAheadX += (targetLookAheadX - this.state.lookAheadX) * controller.smoothing;
        this.state.lookAheadY += (targetLookAheadY - this.state.lookAheadY) * controller.smoothing;
        
        // Set camera target
        this.state.targetX = target.x + this.state.lookAheadX;
        this.state.targetY = target.y + this.state.lookAheadY;
    }
    
    updateFramingController(delta) {
        const controller = this.controllers.framing;
        if (!controller || !controller.enabled) return;
        
        const targets = controller.targets.filter(t => t && t.active !== false);
        if (targets.length === 0) return;
        
        // Calculate bounding box of all targets
        let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;
        let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
        let totalWeight = 0;
        
        targets.forEach((target, index) => {
            const weight = controller.weights ? controller.weights[index] || 1 : 1;
            totalWeight += weight;
            
            // Expand bounds based on weight
            const influence = weight / totalWeight;
            
            minX = Math.min(minX, target.x - controller.padding * influence);
            minY = Math.min(minY, target.y - controller.padding * influence);
            maxX = Math.max(maxX, target.x + controller.padding * influence);
            maxY = Math.max(maxY, target.y + controller.padding * influence);
        });
        
        // Calculate center and required zoom
        const centerX = (minX + maxX) / 2;
        const centerY = (minY + maxY) / 2;
        
        const width = maxX - minX;
        const height = maxY - minY;
        
        // Calculate zoom to fit all targets
        const zoomX = this.camera.width / width;
        const zoomY = this.camera.height / height;
        const targetZoom = Math.min(zoomX, zoomY);
        
        // Clamp zoom
        const clampedZoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            targetZoom,
            controller.minZoom,
            controller.maxZoom
        );
        
        if (controller.smooth) {
            // Smooth transition
            this.state.targetX += (centerX - this.state.targetX) * controller.smoothFactor;
            this.state.targetY += (centerY - this.state.targetY) * controller.smoothFactor;
            this.state.targetZoom += (clampedZoom - this.state.targetZoom) * controller.smoothFactor;
        } else {
            // Immediate
            this.state.targetX = centerX;
            this.state.targetY = centerY;
            this.state.targetZoom = clampedZoom;
        }
    }
    
    updateTargetLockController(delta) {
        const controller = this.controllers.targetLock;
        if (!controller || !controller.enabled) return;
        
        const target = controller.target;
        if (!target) return;
        
        if (controller.circleStrafe) {
            // Circle strafe around target
            controller.strafeAngle += controller.strafeSpeed * (delta / 1000);
            
            const offsetX = Math.cos(controller.strafeAngle) * controller.strafeRadius;
            const offsetY = Math.sin(controller.strafeAngle) * controller.strafeRadius;
            
            this.state.targetX = target.x + offsetX;
            this.state.targetY = target.y + offsetY;
        } else {
            // Direct lock
            this.state.targetX += (target.x - this.state.targetX) * controller.lockStrength;
            this.state.targetY += (target.y - this.state.targetY) * controller.lockStrength;
        }
        
        this.state.targetZoom = controller.zoom;
    }
    
    updateZoom(delta) {
        // Smooth zoom transition
        const zoomDiff = this.state.targetZoom - this.state.currentZoom;
        this.state.currentZoom += zoomDiff * this.config.zoomSpeed;
        
        // Clamp zoom
        this.state.currentZoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            this.state.currentZoom,
            this.config.minZoom,
            this.config.maxZoom
        );
        
        this.camera.setZoom(this.state.currentZoom);
    }
    
    updateRotation(delta) {
        // Smooth rotation transition
        const rotationDiff = this.state.targetRotation - this.state.rotation;
        this.state.rotation += rotationDiff * 0.1;
        
        this.camera.setRotation(this.state.rotation);
    }
    
    applyPosition() {
        // Smooth camera movement
        const currentX = this.camera.scrollX + this.camera.width / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        const currentY = this.camera.scrollY + this.camera.height / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        
        const newX = currentX + (this.state.targetX - currentX) * this.config.lerpFactor;
        const newY = currentY + (this.state.targetY - currentY) * this.config.lerpFactor;
        
        this.camera.centerOn(newX, newY);
        
        // Track movement for stats
        const movement = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(currentX, currentY, newX, newY);
        this.stats.cameraMovement += movement;
    }
    
    // === CAMERA ZONES ===
    
    /**
     * Add a camera zone (auto-adjust when player enters)
     * @param {Object} config - Zone configuration
     */
    addZone(config) {
        const zone = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            
            // Area
            bounds: config.bounds, // { x, y, width, height }
            
            // Camera settings when in zone
            zoom: config.zoom || null,
            followOffset: config.followOffset || null,
            constraints: config.constraints || null, // Lock camera to zone bounds
            
            // Transition
            transitionDuration: config.transitionDuration || 1000,
            
            // Callbacks
            onEnter: config.onEnter || null,
            onExit: config.onExit || null,
            
            // State
            active: false,
            priority: config.priority || 0 // Higher priority zones override lower
        };
        
        this.zones.push(zone);
        
        // Sort by priority
        this.zones.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
        
        return zone;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove a zone
     */
    removeZone(zone) {
        const index = this.zones.indexOf(zone);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.zones.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update camera zones
     */
    updateZones() {
        // Get camera position
        const cameraX = this.camera.scrollX + this.camera.width / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        const cameraY = this.camera.scrollY + this.camera.height / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        
        // Check each zone
        this.zones.forEach(zone => {
            const inZone = Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains(
                zone.bounds,
                cameraX,
                cameraY
            );
            
            // Trigger enter/exit
            if (inZone && !zone.active) {
                zone.active = true;
                
                if (zone.onEnter) {
                    zone.onEnter(zone);
                }
                
                // Apply zone settings
                this.applyZoneSettings(zone);
            } else if (!inZone && zone.active) {
                zone.active = false;
                
                if (zone.onExit) {
                    zone.onExit(zone);
                }
            }
        });
    }
    
    applyZoneSettings(zone) {
        // Apply zoom
        if (zone.zoom !== null) {
            this.transitionZoom(zone.zoom, zone.transitionDuration);
        }
        
        // Apply constraints
        if (zone.constraints) {
            this.camera.setBounds(
                zone.bounds.x,
                zone.bounds.y,
                zone.bounds.width,
                zone.bounds.height
            );
        }
        
        // Apply follow offset
        if (zone.followOffset && this.controllers.follow) {
            const controller = this.controllers.follow;
            
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: controller,
                offsetX: zone.followOffset.x,
                offsetY: zone.followOffset.y,
                duration: zone.transitionDuration,
                ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
            });
        }
    }
    
    // === CAMERA EFFECTS ===
    
    /**
     * Shake camera with advanced options
     * @param {string} preset - Shake preset name
     * @param {Object} options - Override options
     */
    shake(preset, options = {}) {
        const presets = {
            'light': {
                intensity: 0.003,
                duration: 150,
                frequency: 20,
                decay: 0.9,
                rotation: false
            },
            'medium': {
                intensity: 0.008,
                duration: 300,
                frequency: 25,
                decay: 0.92,
                rotation: true,
                rotationIntensity: 0.01
            },
            'heavy': {
                intensity: 0.015,
                duration: 500,
                frequency: 30,
                decay: 0.94,
                rotation: true,
                rotationIntensity: 0.02
            },
            'explosion': {
                intensity: 0.025,
                duration: 700,
                frequency: 35,
                decay: 0.95,
                rotation: true,
                rotationIntensity: 0.03
            },
            'earthquake': {
                intensity: 0.012,
                duration: 2000,
                frequency: 15,
                decay: 0.98,
                rotation: true,
                rotationIntensity: 0.015
            },
            'rumble': {
                intensity: 0.005,
                duration: -1, // Infinite until stopped
                frequency: 10,
                decay: 1.0, // No decay for rumble
                rotation: false
            }
        };
        
        const shakeConfig = {
            ...(presets[preset] || presets['medium']),
            ...options
        };
        
        const shake = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            intensity: shakeConfig.intensity,
            currentIntensity: shakeConfig.intensity,
            duration: shakeConfig.duration,
            elapsed: 0,
            frequency: shakeConfig.frequency,
            decay: shakeConfig.decay,
            rotation: shakeConfig.rotation,
            rotationIntensity: shakeConfig.rotationIntensity || 0,
            
            // Oscillation state
            offsetX: 0,
            offsetY: 0,
            offsetRotation: 0,
            phase: 0
        };
        
        this.effects.shakes.push(shake);
        this.stats.shakes++;
        
        return shake;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop a specific shake or all shakes
     */
    stopShake(shake = null) {
        if (shake) {
            const index = this.effects.shakes.indexOf(shake);
            if (index !== -1) {
                this.effects.shakes.splice(index, 1);
            }
        } else {
            this.effects.shakes = [];
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Flash the screen
     */
    flash(duration = 250, color = 0xffffff, alpha = 1.0) {
        const flash = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            duration: duration,
            elapsed: 0,
            color: color,
            alpha: alpha,
            currentAlpha: alpha
        };
        
        this.effects.flashes.push(flash);
        
        // Use Phaser's built-in flash
        this.camera.flash(duration, 
            (color >> 16) & 0xff,
            (color >> 8) & 0xff,
            color & 0xff,
            false
        );
    }
    
    /**
     * Fade camera in/out
     */
    fade(fadeOut = true, duration = 1000, color = 0x000000, callback = null) {
        const fade = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            fadeOut: fadeOut,
            duration: duration,
            elapsed: 0,
            color: color,
            callback: callback
        };
        
        this.effects.fades.push(fade);
        
        // Use Phaser's built-in fade
        if (fadeOut) {
            this.camera.fade(duration,
                (color >> 16) & 0xff,
                (color >> 8) & 0xff,
                color & 0xff,
                false,
                callback
            );
        } else {
            this.camera.fadeIn(duration,
                (color >> 16) & 0xff,
                (color >> 8) & 0xff,
                color & 0xff,
                callback
            );
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Tilt camera (rotate for impact)
     */
    tilt(angle, duration = 500, returnToNormal = true) {
        const tilt = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            targetAngle: angle,
            duration: duration,
            elapsed: 0,
            returnToNormal: returnToNormal,
            startAngle: this.state.rotation
        };
        
        this.effects.tilts.push(tilt);
        
        // Set target rotation
        this.state.targetRotation = angle;
        
        if (returnToNormal) {
            this.scene.time.delayedCall(duration, () => {
                this.state.targetRotation = 0;
            });
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update all active effects
     */
    updateEffects(delta) {
        // Update shakes
        for (let i = this.effects.shakes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const shake = this.effects.shakes[i];
            
            shake.elapsed += delta;
            
            // Check if shake is finished
            if (shake.duration > 0 && shake.elapsed >= shake.duration) {
                this.effects.shakes.splice(i, 1);
                continue;
            }
            
            // Update shake intensity with decay
            shake.currentIntensity *= shake.decay;
            
            // Generate oscillating offset
            shake.phase += shake.frequency * (delta / 1000);
            
            shake.offsetX = Math.sin(shake.phase * Math.PI * 2) * shake.currentIntensity * this.camera.width;
            shake.offsetY = Math.cos(shake.phase * Math.PI * 2) * shake.currentIntensity * this.camera.height;
            
            if (shake.rotation) {
                shake.offsetRotation = Math.sin(shake.phase * Math.PI) * shake.rotationIntensity;
            }
            
            // Apply shake to camera
            this.camera.scrollX += shake.offsetX;
            this.camera.scrollY += shake.offsetY;
            
            if (shake.rotation) {
                this.camera.rotation += shake.offsetRotation;
            }
        }
        
        // Update flashes
        for (let i = this.effects.flashes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const flash = this.effects.flashes[i];
            
            flash.elapsed += delta;
            
            if (flash.elapsed >= flash.duration) {
                this.effects.flashes.splice(i, 1);
            }
        }
        
        // Update fades
        for (let i = this.effects.fades.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const fade = this.effects.fades[i];
            
            fade.elapsed += delta;
            
            if (fade.elapsed >= fade.duration) {
                this.effects.fades.splice(i, 1);
            }
        }
        
        // Update tilts
        for (let i = this.effects.tilts.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const tilt = this.effects.tilts[i];
            
            tilt.elapsed += delta;
            
            if (tilt.elapsed >= tilt.duration) {
                this.effects.tilts.splice(i, 1);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === CINEMATIC SYSTEM ===
    
    /**
     * Play a cinematic sequence
     * @param {Array} shots - Array of shot configurations
     * @param {Object} options - Cinematic options
     */
    playCinematic(shots, options = {}) {
        this.cinematicActive = true;
        this.stats.cinematicsPlayed++;
        
        // Stop current controllers
        this.stopFollow();
        
        // Create timeline
        this.cinematicTimeline = {
            shots: shots,
            currentShot: 0,
            elapsed: 0,
            
            // Options
            canSkip: options.canSkip !== undefined ? options.canSkip : true,
            onComplete: options.onComplete || null,
            onShotChange: options.onShotChange || null,
            
            // Interpolation
            easing: options.easing || 'Sine.easeInOut'
        };
        
        // Start first shot
        this.startCinematicShot(0);
        
        // Set up skip handler
        if (this.cinematicTimeline.canSkip) {
            const skipHandler = () => {
                this.skipCinematic();
                this.scene.input.keyboard.off('keydown-SPACE', skipHandler);
            };
            
            this.scene.input.keyboard.once('keydown-SPACE', skipHandler);
        }
    }
    
    startCinematicShot(index) {
        const timeline = this.cinematicTimeline;
        if (index >= timeline.shots.length) {
            this.endCinematic();
            return;
        }
        
        const shot = timeline.shots[index];
        timeline.currentShot = index;
        timeline.elapsed = 0;
        
        // Store start state
        shot._startX = this.camera.scrollX + this.camera.width / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        shot._startY = this.camera.scrollY + this.camera.height / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        shot._startZoom = this.camera.zoom;
        shot._startRotation = this.camera.rotation;
        
        // Calculate target state
        if (shot.target) {
            shot._targetX = shot.target.x + (shot.offsetX || 0);
            shot._targetY = shot.target.y + (shot.offsetY || 0);
        } else {
            shot._targetX = shot.x || shot._startX;
            shot._targetY = shot.y || shot._startY;
        }
        
        shot._targetZoom = shot.zoom || shot._startZoom;
        shot._targetRotation = shot.rotation || shot._startRotation;
        
        // Callback
        if (timeline.onShotChange) {
            timeline.onShotChange(shot, index);
        }
    }
    
    updateCinematic(delta) {
        const timeline = this.cinematicTimeline;
        if (!timeline) return;
        
        const shot = timeline.shots[timeline.currentShot];
        timeline.elapsed += delta;
        
        // Calculate progress
        const t = Math.min(timeline.elapsed / shot.duration, 1.0);
        
        // Apply easing
        const easedT = this.easeValue(t, shot.easing || timeline.easing);
        
        // Interpolate camera state
        const currentX = Phaser.Math.Linear(shot._startX, shot._targetX, easedT);
        const currentY = Phaser.Math.Linear(shot._startY, shot._targetY, easedT);
        const currentZoom = Phaser.Math.Linear(shot._startZoom, shot._targetZoom, easedT);
        const currentRotation = Phaser.Math.Linear(shot._startRotation, shot._targetRotation, easedT);
        
        // Apply to camera
        this.camera.centerOn(currentX, currentY);
        this.camera.setZoom(currentZoom);
        this.camera.setRotation(currentRotation);
        
        // Check if shot is complete
        if (timeline.elapsed >= shot.duration) {
            // Move to next shot
            this.startCinematicShot(timeline.currentShot + 1);
        }
    }
    
    skipCinematic() {
        this.endCinematic();
    }
    
    endCinematic() {
        const timeline = this.cinematicTimeline;
        
        if (timeline && timeline.onComplete) {
            timeline.onComplete();
        }
        
        this.cinematicActive = false;
        this.cinematicTimeline = null;
    }
    
    easeValue(t, easing) {
        switch (easing) {
            case 'Linear':
                return t;
            case 'Quad.easeIn':
                return t * t;
            case 'Quad.easeOut':
                return t * (2 - t);
            case 'Quad.easeInOut':
                return t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
            case 'Cubic.easeIn':
                return t * t * t;
            case 'Cubic.easeOut':
                return (--t) * t * t + 1;
            case 'Cubic.easeInOut':
                return t < 0.5 ? 4 * t * t * t : (t - 1) * (2 * t - 2) * (2 * t - 2) + 1;
            case 'Sine.easeIn':
                return 1 - Math.cos(t * Math.PI / 2);
            case 'Sine.easeOut':
                return Math.sin(t * Math.PI / 2);
            case 'Sine.easeInOut':
                return -(Math.cos(Math.PI * t) - 1) / 2;
            default:
                return t;
        }
    }
    
    // === ADVANCED FEATURES ===
    
    /**
     * Dolly zoom effect (Hitchcock/Vertigo effect)
     * @param {number} targetZoom - Target zoom level
     * @param {number} duration - Effect duration
     */
    dollyZoom(targetZoom, duration = 1000) {
        const startZoom = this.camera.zoom;
        const startX = this.camera.scrollX + this.camera.width / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        const startY = this.camera.scrollY + this.camera.height / (2 * this.camera.zoom);
        
        this.scene.tweens.addCounter({
            from: 0,
            to: 1,
            duration: duration,
            ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',
            onUpdate: (tween) => {
                const t = tween.getValue();
                
                // Interpolate zoom
                const currentZoom = Phaser.Math.Linear(startZoom, targetZoom, t);
                this.camera.setZoom(currentZoom);
                
                // Adjust position to keep same point in frame
                this.camera.centerOn(startX, startY);
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Smooth zoom transition
     */
    transitionZoom(targetZoom, duration = 1000) {
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.state,
            targetZoom: targetZoom,
            duration: duration,
            ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
        });
        
        this.stats.zooms++;
    }
    
    /**
     * Pan camera to position
     */
    panTo(x, y, duration = 1000, callback = null) {
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.state,
            targetX: x,
            targetY: y,
            duration: duration,
            ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',
            onComplete: callback
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Track mouse/pointer with camera offset
     */
    enableMouseTracking(options = {}) {
        this.mouseTracking = {
            enabled: true,
            influence: options.influence || 0.1,
            maxDistance: options.maxDistance || 200,
            smoothing: options.smoothing || 0.05
        };
    }
    
    disableMouseTracking() {
        if (this.mouseTracking) {
            this.mouseTracking.enabled = false;
        }
    }
    
    updateMouseTracking() {
        if (!this.mouseTracking || !this.mouseTracking.enabled) return;
        
        const pointer = this.scene.input.activePointer;
        if (!pointer) return;
        
        // Calculate mouse offset from screen center
        const centerX = this.camera.width / 2;
        const centerY = this.camera.height / 2;
        
        const deltaX = pointer.x - centerX;
        const deltaY = pointer.y - centerY;
        
        // Apply influence and max distance
        const distance = Math.sqrt(deltaX * deltaX + deltaY * deltaY);
        const clampedDistance = Math.min(distance, this.mouseTracking.maxDistance);
        
        const normalizedX = (deltaX / distance || 0) * clampedDistance;
        const normalizedY = (deltaY / distance || 0) * clampedDistance;
        
        const offsetX = normalizedX * this.mouseTracking.influence;
        const offsetY = normalizedY * this.mouseTracking.influence;
        
        // Apply smoothly
        this.state.targetX += offsetX * this.mouseTracking.smoothing;
        this.state.targetY += offsetY * this.mouseTracking.smoothing;
    }
    
    // === DEBUG & UTILITIES ===
    
    renderDebug() {
        this.debugGraphics.clear();
        
        // Draw deadzone
        if (this.activeController === 'follow' && this.controllers.follow) {
            const controller = this.controllers.follow;
            
            const screenWidth = this.camera.width / this.camera.zoom;
            const screenHeight = this.camera.height / this.camera.zoom;
            
            const deadzoneWidth = screenWidth * controller.deadzoneX;
            const deadzoneHeight = screenHeight * controller.deadzoneY;
            
            const centerX = this.camera.scrollX + screenWidth / 2;
            const centerY = this.camera.scrollY + screenHeight / 2;
            
            this.debugGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0x00ff00, 0.5);
            this.debugGraphics.strokeRect(
                centerX - deadzoneWidth / 2,
                centerY - deadzoneHeight / 2,
                deadzoneWidth,
                deadzoneHeight
            );
        }
        
        // Draw camera zones
        this.zones.forEach(zone => {
            const color = zone.active ? 0x00ff00 : 0xff0000;
            
            this.debugGraphics.lineStyle(2, color, 0.3);
            this.debugGraphics.strokeRect(
                zone.bounds.x,
                zone.bounds.y,
                zone.bounds.width,
                zone.bounds.height
            );
        });
        
        // Draw rule of thirds grid
        this.drawRuleOfThirds();
    }
    
    drawRuleOfThirds() {
        const width = this.camera.width / this.camera.zoom;
        const height = this.camera.height / this.camera.zoom;
        
        const startX = this.camera.scrollX;
        const startY = this.camera.scrollY;
        
        this.debugGraphics.lineStyle(1, 0xffffff, 0.2);
        
        // Vertical lines
        this.debugGraphics.lineBetween(
            startX + width / 3,
            startY,
            startX + width / 3,
            startY + height
        );
        
        this.debugGraphics.lineBetween(
            startX + (width / 3) * 2,
            startY,
            startX + (width / 3) * 2,
            startY + height
        );
        
        // Horizontal lines
        this.debugGraphics.lineBetween(
            startX,
            startY + height / 3,
            startX + width,
            startY + height / 3
        );
        
        this.debugGraphics.lineBetween(
            startX,
            startY + (height / 3) * 2,
            startX + width,
            startY + (height / 3) * 2
        );
    }
    
    getStats() {
        return { ...this.stats };
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `camera_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    shutdown() {
        this.stopFollow();
        this.stopShake();
        this.debugGraphics.destroy();
        
        console.log('[AdvancedCameraSystem] Shutdown complete');
    }
}

export default AdvancedCameraSystem;

javascript
// configs/cinematicPresets.js

const CINEMATIC_PRESETS = {
    // === CHARACTER INTRODUCTIONS ===
    
    boss_entrance: {
        shots: [
            {
                // Wide establishing shot
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                zoom: 0.5,
                duration: 1500,
                easing: 'Sine.easeIn'
            },
            {
                // Zoom to boss feet
                target: 'boss',
                offsetY: 100,
                zoom: 1.5,
                duration: 1000,
                easing: 'Quad.easeOut'
            },
            {
                // Pan up to boss face
                target: 'boss',
                offsetY: -50,
                zoom: 2.0,
                duration: 1500,
                easing: 'Sine.easeInOut'
            },

            }
