        canSkip: false
    }
};

/**
 * Cinematic preset manager
 */
class CinematicPresetManager {
    constructor(cameraSystem) {
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.presets = { ...CINEMATIC_PRESETS };
    }
    
    /**
     * Play a preset cinematic with target mapping
     * @param {string} presetName - Name of preset
     * @param {Object} targetMap - Map of target names to actual objects
     * @param {Object} options - Additional options
     */
    play(presetName, targetMap = {}, options = {}) {
        const preset = this.presets[presetName];
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[CinematicPresets] Unknown preset: ${presetName}`);
            return;
        }
        
        // Clone shots and replace target references
        const shots = preset.shots.map(shot => {
            const newShot = { ...shot };
            
            if (shot.target && typeof shot.target === 'string') {
                newShot.target = targetMap[shot.target] || null;
            }
            
            return newShot;
        });
        
        // Merge options
        const cinematicOptions = {
            ...preset,
            shots: shots,
            ...options
        };
        
        this.cameraSystem.playCinematic(shots, cinematicOptions);
    }
    
    /**
     * Register custom preset
     */
    register(name, config) {
        this.presets[name] = config;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get all preset names
     */
    getPresetNames() {
        return Object.keys(this.presets);
    }
}

export { CINEMATIC_PRESETS, CinematicPresetManager };
Step 3: Combat Camera Integration
javascript
// integration/CombatCameraIntegration.js

class CombatCameraIntegration {
    constructor(scene, cameraSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        
        // Combat state
        this.inCombat = false;
        this.combatParticipants = [];
        this.focusTarget = null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            // Camera behavior in combat
            combatZoom: 1.3,
            combatFramePadding: 150,
            combatSmoothness: 0.08,
            
            // Impact responses
            lightHitShake: 'light',
            heavyHitShake: 'heavy',
            criticalHitShake: 'explosion',
            blockShake: 'light',
            
            // Special moments
            enableSlowMotion: true,
            slowMotionScale: 0.3,
            slowMotionDuration: 500,
            
            // Target lock
            lockZoom: 1.8,
            lockSmoothness: 0.15
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Start combat encounter
     */
    startCombat(player, enemies) {
        this.inCombat = true;
        this.combatParticipants = [player, ...enemies];
        
        console.log('[CombatCamera] Combat started');
        
        // Frame all participants
        this.cameraSystem.frameTargets(this.combatParticipants, {
            padding: this.config.combatFramePadding,
            minZoom: 0.8,
            maxZoom: this.config.combatZoom,
            smooth: true,
            smoothFactor: this.config.combatSmoothness
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * End combat encounter
     */
    endCombat(player) {
        this.inCombat = false;
        this.combatParticipants = [];
        this.focusTarget = null;
        
        console.log('[CombatCamera] Combat ended');
        
        // Return to normal follow
        this.cameraSystem.followTarget(player, {
            lerpX: 0.1,
            lerpY: 0.1
        });
        
        // Victory camera moment
        this.playVictoryMoment(player);
    }
    
    /**
     * Handle attack impact
     */
    onAttackHit(attacker, target, damage, isCritical) {
        // Camera shake based on damage
        let shakePreset;
        
        if (isCritical) {
            shakePreset = this.config.criticalHitShake;
            
            // Critical hit slow motion
            if (this.config.enableSlowMotion) {
                this.triggerSlowMotion();
            }
            
            // Brief zoom on impact
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(this.config.lockZoom, 200);
            
            this.scene.time.delayedCall(300, () => {
                this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(this.config.combatZoom, 400);
            });
            
        } else if (damage > 50) {
            shakePreset = this.config.heavyHitShake;
        } else {
            shakePreset = this.config.lightHitShake;
        }
        
        this.cameraSystem.shake(shakePreset);
        
        // Brief camera tilt on heavy hits
        if (damage > 50) {
            const tiltDirection = attacker.x < target.x ? 0.05 : -0.05;
            this.cameraSystem.tilt(tiltDirection, 200, true);
        }
        
        // Focus briefly on impact point
        this.focusMomentarily(target, 100);
    }
    
    /**
     * Handle block/parry
     */
    onAttackBlocked(blocker, attacker) {
        this.cameraSystem.shake(this.config.blockShake);
        
        // Flash effect
        this.cameraSystem.flash(100, 0x88ccff, 0.3);
        
        // Brief pause effect
        this.scene.time.timeScale = 0.5;
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(100, () => {
            this.scene.time.timeScale = 1.0;
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Handle dodge
     */
    onDodge(dodger, attack) {
        // Slight zoom during dodge
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.5, 200);
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(400, () => {
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(this.config.combatZoom, 300);
        });
        
        // Follow dodger closely
        this.focusMomentarily(dodger, 400);
    }
    
    /**
     * Lock camera to specific enemy
     */
    lockToEnemy(enemy) {
        this.focusTarget = enemy;
        
        this.cameraSystem.lockToTarget(enemy, {
            zoom: this.config.lockZoom,
            lockStrength: this.config.lockSmoothness,
            circleStrafe: false
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Unlock from specific enemy
     */
    unlockTarget() {
        this.focusTarget = null;
        
        if (this.inCombat) {
            // Return to framing all participants
            this.cameraSystem.frameTargets(this.combatParticipants, {
                padding: this.config.combatFramePadding,
                maxZoom: this.config.combatZoom,
                smooth: true
            });
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Focus on target momentarily
     */
    focusMomentarily(target, duration) {
        const originalController = this.cameraSystem.activeController;
        
        this.cameraSystem.lockToTarget(target, {
            zoom: this.cameraSystem.state.currentZoom,
            lockStrength: 0.3
        });
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(duration, () => {
            // Restore original controller
            if (this.inCombat) {
                this.cameraSystem.frameTargets(this.combatParticipants, {
                    padding: this.config.combatFramePadding,
                    maxZoom: this.config.combatZoom,
                    smooth: true
                });
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Trigger slow motion effect
     */
    triggerSlowMotion() {
        this.scene.time.timeScale = this.config.slowMotionScale;
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(this.config.slowMotionDuration, () => {
            this.scene.time.timeScale = 1.0;
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Play victory moment
     */
    playVictoryMoment(player) {
        // Zoom out slightly
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(0.9, 1000);
        
        // Center on player
        this.cameraSystem.panTo(player.x, player.y - 50, 800);
        
        // Return to normal after moment
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(2000, () => {
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.0, 500);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Special ability camera moment
     */
    onSpecialAbility(caster, abilityName) {
        switch (abilityName) {
            case 'ultimate':
                // Dramatic zoom and rotation
                this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(2.5, 500);
                this.cameraSystem.tilt(0.1, 500, true);
                this.cameraSystem.shake('medium');
                
                // Hold for 1 second
                this.scene.time.delayedCall(1000, () => {
                    this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(this.config.combatZoom, 800);
                });
                break;
                
            case 'summon':
                // Shake and flash
                this.cameraSystem.shake('heavy');
                this.cameraSystem.flash(300, 0xffffff, 0.5);
                break;
                
            case 'heal':
                // Gentle glow
                this.cameraSystem.flash(500, 0x44ff88, 0.3);
                break;
                
            default:
                // Standard ability
                this.cameraSystem.shake('light');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update combat camera
     */
    update() {
        if (!this.inCombat) return;
        
        // Remove dead enemies from participants
        this.combatParticipants = this.combatParticipants.filter(p => {
            return p.active !== false && (p.health === undefined || p.health > 0);
        });
        
        // End combat if no enemies remain
        if (this.combatParticipants.length <= 1) {
            const player = this.combatParticipants[0];
            this.endCombat(player);
        }
    }
}

export default CombatCameraIntegration;
Step 4: Screen Space Effects
javascript
// effects/ScreenSpaceEffects.js

class ScreenSpaceEffects {
    constructor(scene, cameraSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.camera = scene.cameras.main;
        
        // Effect layers
        this.effectLayers = {};
        
        // Active effects
        this.activeEffects = [];
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Create render texture for post-processing
        this.postProcessRT = this.scene.add.renderTexture(
            0, 0,
            this.scene.scale.width,
            this.scene.scale.height
        );
        this.postProcessRT.setDepth(9999);
        this.postProcessRT.setScrollFactor(0);
        
        // Overlay graphics
        this.overlayGraphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.overlayGraphics.setDepth(10000);
        this.overlayGraphics.setScrollFactor(0);
        
        console.log('[ScreenSpaceEffects] Initialized');
    }
    
    /**
     * Vignette effect
     */
    addVignette(intensity = 0.5, color = 0x000000) {
        const effect = {
            type: 'vignette',
            intensity: intensity,
            color: color,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeEffects.push(effect);
        return effect;
    }
    
    /**
     * Chromatic aberration
     */
    addChromaticAberration(offset = 5) {
        const effect = {
            type: 'chromatic_aberration',
            offset: offset,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeEffects.push(effect);
        return effect;
    }
    
    /**
     * Scan lines (retro effect)
     */
    addScanLines(intensity = 0.3, speed = 1) {
        const effect = {
            type: 'scan_lines',
            intensity: intensity,
            speed: speed,
            offset: 0,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeEffects.push(effect);
        return effect;
    }
    
    /**
     * Screen distortion (wave effect)
     */
    addDistortion(amplitude = 10, frequency = 0.02, speed = 1) {
        const effect = {
            type: 'distortion',
            amplitude: amplitude,
            frequency: frequency,
            speed: speed,
            time: 0,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeEffects.push(effect);
        return effect;
    }
    
    /**
     * Motion blur
     */
    addMotionBlur(samples = 5, strength = 0.5) {
        const effect = {
            type: 'motion_blur',
            samples: samples,
            strength: strength,
            previousPositions: [],
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeEffects.push(effect);
        return effect;
    }
    
    /**
     * Film grain
     */
    addFilmGrain(intensity = 0.2) {
        const effect = {
            type: 'film_grain',
            intensity: intensity,
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.activeEffects.push(effect);
        return effect;
    }
    
    /**
     * Blood splatter on screen
     */
    bloodSplatter(x, y, intensity = 1.0) {
        const splatterCount = Math.floor(10 * intensity);
        
        for (let i = 0; i < splatterCount; i++) {
            const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
            const distance = Math.random() * 100 * intensity;
            
            const splatterX = x + Math.cos(angle) * distance;
            const splatterY = y + Math.sin(angle) * distance;
            
            const size = (Math.random() * 20 + 10) * intensity;
            
            this.overlayGraphics.fillStyle(0xaa0000, 0.6);
            this.overlayGraphics.fillCircle(splatterX, splatterY, size);
            
            // Fade out over time
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: this.overlayGraphics,
                alpha: 0,
                duration: 2000,
                onComplete: () => {
                    this.overlayGraphics.clear();
                    this.overlayGraphics.setAlpha(1);
                }
            });
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Screen crack effect
     */
    screenCrack(centerX, centerY, intensity = 1.0) {
        const crackCount = Math.floor(8 * intensity);
        
        this.overlayGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.3);
        
        for (let i = 0; i < crackCount; i++) {
            const angle = (i / crackCount) * Math.PI * 2;
            const length = (Math.random() * 150 + 100) * intensity;
            
            // Main crack
            const endX = centerX + Math.cos(angle) * length;
            const endY = centerY + Math.sin(angle) * length;
            
            this.overlayGraphics.lineBetween(centerX, centerY, endX, endY);
            
            // Branching cracks
            const branchCount = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3);
            for (let j = 0; j < branchCount; j++) {
                const branchT = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.6;
                const branchStartX = centerX + (endX - centerX) * branchT;
                const branchStartY = centerY + (endY - centerY) * branchT;
                
                const branchAngle = angle + (Math.random() - 0.5) * Math.PI / 2;
                const branchLength = length * 0.4;
                
                const branchEndX = branchStartX + Math.cos(branchAngle) * branchLength;
                const branchEndY = branchStartY + Math.sin(branchAngle) * branchLength;
                
                this.overlayGraphics.lineBetween(
                    branchStartX, branchStartY,
                    branchEndX, branchEndY
                );
            }
        }
        
        // Fade out
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.overlayGraphics,
            alpha: 0,
            duration: 3000,
            onComplete: () => {
                this.overlayGraphics.clear();
                this.overlayGraphics.setAlpha(1);
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Heat distortion effect
     */
    heatDistortion(x, y, radius, duration = 2000) {
        const distortion = this.addDistortion(15, 0.05, 2);
        
        // Limit to circular area
        distortion.area = {
            x: x,
            y: y,
            radius: radius
        };
        
        // Remove after duration
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(duration, () => {
            this.removeEffect(distortion);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Update all effects
     */
    update(delta) {
        this.overlayGraphics.clear();
        
        this.activeEffects.forEach(effect => {
            if (!effect.enabled) return;
            
            switch (effect.type) {
                case 'vignette':
                    this.renderVignette(effect);
                    break;
                    
                case 'scan_lines':
                    this.renderScanLines(effect, delta);
                    break;
                    
                case 'film_grain':
                    this.renderFilmGrain(effect);
                    break;
                    
                case 'distortion':
                    effect.time += delta / 1000;
                    break;
            }
        });
    }
    
    renderVignette(effect) {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        const gradient = this.overlayGraphics.createRadialGradient(
            width / 2, height / 2, 0,
            width / 2, height / 2, Math.max(width, height) * 0.7
        );
        
        gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(0,0,0,${effect.intensity})`);
        
        this.overlayGraphics.fillStyle(gradient);
        this.overlayGraphics.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
    }
    
    renderScanLines(effect, delta) {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        effect.offset += effect.speed * (delta / 16);
        if (effect.offset > 4) effect.offset = 0;
        
        this.overlayGraphics.lineStyle(1, 0x000000, effect.intensity);
        
        for (let y = effect.offset; y < height; y += 4) {
            this.overlayGraphics.lineBetween(0, y, width, y);
        }
    }
    
    renderFilmGrain(effect) {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        const grainDensity = 0.02; // 2% of pixels
        
        const grainCount = Math.floor(width * height * grainDensity);
        
        for (let i = 0; i < grainCount; i++) {
            const x = Math.random() * width;
            const y = Math.random() * height;
            const brightness = Math.random();
            const alpha = effect.intensity * brightness;
            
            const color = brightness > 0.5 ? 0xffffff : 0x000000;
            
            this.overlayGraphics.fillStyle(color, alpha);
            this.overlayGraphics.fillRect(x, y, 1, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove an effect
     */
    removeEffect(effect) {
        const index = this.activeEffects.indexOf(effect);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.activeEffects.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Clear all effects
     */
    clearEffects() {
        this.activeEffects = [];
        this.overlayGraphics.clear();
    }
    
    shutdown() {
        this.clearEffects();
        this.postProcessRT.destroy();
        this.overlayGraphics.destroy();
    }
}

export default ScreenSpaceEffects;
Step 5: Camera Performance Optimizer
javascript
// systems/CameraOptimizer.js

class CameraOptimizer {
    constructor(cameraSystem) {
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.scene = cameraSystem.scene;
        this.camera = cameraSystem.camera;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            
            // Culling optimization
            cullPadding: 200, // Extra padding for smooth transitions
            updateCullingEveryNFrames: 3,
            
            // Performance budgets
            maxEffectsPerFrame: 10,
            maxZonesChecked: 5,
            
            // Adaptive quality
            targetFPS: 60,
            adaptiveQuality: true
        };
        
        // State
        this.frameCounter = 0;
        this.culledObjects = new Set();
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            objectsCulled: 0,
            effectsSkipped: 0,
            zonesSkipped: 0,
            averageFrameTime: 0
        };
        
        // Performance tracking
        this.frameTimeHistory = [];
    }
    
    /**
     * Optimize camera system
     */
    optimize() {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        const startTime = performance.now();
        
        this.frameCounter++;
        
        // Cull off-screen objects
        if (this.frameCounter % this.config.updateCullingEveryNFrames === 0) {
            this.cullObjects();
        }
        
        // Limit effects
        this.limitEffects();
        
        // Optimize zone checks
        this.optimizeZones();
        
        // Track performance
        const frameTime = performance.now() - startTime;
        this.updatePerformanceStats(frameTime);
    }
    
    /**
     * Cull objects outside camera view
     */
    cullObjects() {
        const worldView = this.camera.worldView;
        const padding = this.config.cullPadding;
        
        // Expand view with padding
        const cullBounds = new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(
            worldView.x - padding,
            worldView.y - padding,
            worldView.width + padding * 2,
            worldView.height + padding * 2
        );
        
        let culled = 0;
        
        // Get all game objects (this is scene-specific, adapt as needed)
        const allObjects = this.scene.children.list;
        
        allObjects.forEach(obj => {
            // Skip UI elements and always-visible objects
            if (obj.scrollFactorX === 0 && obj.scrollFactorY === 0) {
                return;
            }
            
            // Check if in view
            const bounds = obj.getBounds ? obj.getBounds() : null;
            
            if (bounds) {
                const inView = Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Overlaps(cullBounds, bounds);
                
                if (!inView && obj.visible) {
                    obj.setVisible(false);
                    this.culledObjects.add(obj);
                    culled++;
                } else if (inView && !obj.visible) {
                    obj.setVisible(true);
                    this.culledObjects.delete(obj);
                }
            }
        });
        
        this.stats.objectsCulled = culled;
    }
    
    /**
     * Limit number of active effects
     */
    limitEffects() {
        const effects = this.cameraSystem.effects;
        let effectCount = 0;
        
        // Count all active effects
        Object.values(effects).forEach(effectArray => {
            effectCount += effectArray.length;
        });
        
        // If over budget, disable lowest priority effects
        if (effectCount > this.config.maxEffectsPerFrame) {
            let disabled = 0;
            
            // Prioritize: tilts < flashes < fades < shakes
            if (effects.tilts.length > 0) {
                effects.tilts.splice(0, Math.min(effects.tilts.length, effectCount - this.config.maxEffectsPerFrame));
                disabled++;
            }
            
            this.stats.effectsSkipped = disabled;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Optimize zone checks
     */
    optimizeZones() {
        const zones = this.cameraSystem.zones;
        
        if (zones.length > this.config.maxZonesChecked) {
            // Only check highest priority zones
            const sortedZones = [...zones].sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
            
            // Disable lower priority zones temporarily
            sortedZones.slice(this.config.maxZonesChecked).forEach(zone => {
                zone._tempDisabled = true;
            });
            
            this.stats.zonesSkipped = zones.length - this.config.maxZonesChecked;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update performance statistics
     */
    updatePerformanceStats(frameTime) {
        this.frameTimeHistory.push(frameTime);
        
        if (this.frameTimeHistory.length > 60) {
            this.frameTimeHistory.shift();
        }
        
        const sum = this.frameTimeHistory.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
        this.stats.averageFrameTime = sum / this.frameTimeHistory.length;
        
        // Adaptive quality adjustment
        if (this.config.adaptiveQuality) {
            const currentFPS = 1000 / this.stats.averageFrameTime;
            
            if (currentFPS < this.config.targetFPS - 5) {
                this.reduceQuality();
            } else if (currentFPS > this.config.targetFPS + 10) {
                this.increaseQuality();
            }
        }
    }
    
    reduceQuality() {
        // Increase culling update interval
        if (this.config.updateCullingEveryNFrames < 10) {
            this.config.updateCullingEveryNFrames++;
        }
        
        // Reduce effect budget
        if (this.config.maxEffectsPerFrame > 3) {
            this.config.maxEffectsPerFrame--;
        }
        
        console.log('[CameraOptimizer] Reduced quality');
    }
    
    increaseQuality() {
        // Decrease culling update interval
        if (this.config.updateCullingEveryNFrames > 1) {
            this.config.updateCullingEveryNFrames--;
        }
        
        // Increase effect budget
        if (this.config.maxEffectsPerFrame < 10) {
            this.config.maxEffectsPerFrame++;
        }
    }
    
    getStats() {
        return {
            ...this.stats,
            fps: Math.round(1000 / this.stats.averageFrameTime),
            cullingInterval: this.config.updateCullingEveryNFrames
        };
    }
}

export default CameraOptimizer;
Step 6: Complete Usage Examples
javascript
// examples/cameraSystemExamples.js

import AdvancedCameraSystem from '../systems/AdvancedCameraSystem.js';
import { CinematicPresetManager } from '../configs/cinematicPresets.js';
import CombatCameraIntegration from '../integration/CombatCameraIntegration.js';
import ScreenSpaceEffects from '../effects/ScreenSpaceEffects.js';
import CameraOptimizer from '../systems/CameraOptimizer.js';

/**
 * EXAMPLE 1: Complete Scene Setup
 */
class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize camera system
        this.cameraSystem = new AdvancedCameraSystem(this);
        
        // Initialize cinematic presets
        this.cinematics = new CinematicPresetManager(this.cameraSystem);
        
        // Initialize combat camera
        this.combatCamera = new CombatCameraIntegration(this, this.cameraSystem);
        
        // Initialize screen effects
        this.screenEffects = new ScreenSpaceEffects(this, this.cameraSystem);
        
        // Initialize optimizer
        this.cameraOptimizer = new CameraOptimizer(this.cameraSystem);
        
        // Add vignette for atmosphere
        this.screenEffects.addVignette(0.3);
        
        // Enable debug with D key
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-D', () => {
            this.cameraSystem.config.showDebug = !this.cameraSystem.config.showDebug;
        });
        
        // Start following player
        this.cameraSystem.followTarget(this.player, {
            lerpX: 0.1,
            lerpY: 0.1,
            deadzoneX: 0.15,
            deadzoneY: 0.15
        });
        
        // Add camera zones
        this.createCameraZones();
        
        // Listen for combat events
        this.events.on('combat-start', (player, enemies) => {
            this.combatCamera.startCombat(player, enemies);
        });
        
        this.events.on('combat-hit', (attacker, target, damage, isCritical) => {
            this.combatCamera.onAttackHit(attacker, target, damage, isCritical);
        });
    }
    
    createCameraZones() {
        // Boss arena zone
        this.cameraSystem.addZone({
            bounds: new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(2000, 1000, 800, 600),
            zoom: 0.8,
            constraints: true,
            transitionDuration: 1500,
            onEnter: (zone) => {
                console.log('Entered boss arena');
                // Play boss entrance cinematic
                this.playBossEntrance();
            },
            priority: 10
        });
        
        // Narrow corridor zone
        this.cameraSystem.addZone({
            bounds: new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(500, 500, 200, 800),
            zoom: 1.5,
            followOffset: { x: 0, y: 0 },
            transitionDuration: 1000,
            priority: 5
        });
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        // Update camera system
        this.cameraSystem.update(delta);
        
        // Update combat camera
        this.combatCamera.update();
        
        // Update screen effects
        this.screenEffects.update(delta);
        
        // Optimize
        this.cameraOptimizer.optimize();
    }
    
    playBossEntrance() {
        this.cinematics.play('boss_entrance', {
            boss: this.boss,
            player: this.player,
            midpoint: {
                x: (this.boss.x + this.player.x) / 2,
                y: (this.boss.y + this.player.y) / 2
            }
        }, {
            onComplete: () => {
                // Start combat
                this.events.emit('combat-start', this.player, [this.boss]);
            }
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 2: Stealth Gameplay Camera
 */
class StealthCameraController {
    constructor(scene, cameraSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.player = null;
        this.guards = [];
        
        this.isHiding = false;
        this.currentlySpotted = false;
    }
    
    setPlayer(player) {
        this.player = player;
        
        // Enable look-ahead for stealth
        this.cameraSystem.enableLookAhead(player, {
            distance: 200,
            smoothing: 0.03
        });
    }
    
    addGuard(guard) {
        this.guards.push(guard);
    }
    
    onPlayerHide() {
        this.isHiding = true;
        
        // Zoom out to show more of environment
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(0.8, 800);
        
        // Reduce saturation (would need shader)
        // this.screenEffects.addDesaturation(0.5);
    }
    
    onPlayerExitHiding() {
        this.isHiding = false;
        
        // Return to normal zoom
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.0, 600);
    }
    
    onSpotted(guard) {
        this.currentlySpotted = true;
        
        // Dramatic moment
        this.cameraSystem.shake('medium');
        this.cameraSystem.flash(200, 0xff4444, 0.4);
        
        // Frame both player and guard
        this.cameraSystem.frameTargets([this.player, guard], {
            padding: 150,
            maxZoom: 1.5,
            smooth: true
        });
        
        // Red vignette
        // this.screenEffects.addVignette(0.6, 0xff0000);
    }
    
    onEscaped() {
        this.currentlySpotted = false;
        
        // Return to stealth mode
        this.cameraSystem.enableLookAhead(this.player, {
            distance: 200,
            smoothing: 0.03
        });
        
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.0, 1000);
    }
    
    update() {
        // Check if any guard can see player
        const spotted = this.guards.some(guard => {
            return this.canSeePlayer(guard, this.player);
        });
        
        if (spotted && !this.currentlySpotted) {
            const spottingGuard = this.guards.find(g => this.canSeePlayer(g, this.player));
            this.onSpotted(spottingGuard);
        } else if (!spotted && this.currentlySpotted) {
            this.onEscaped();
        }
    }
    
    canSeePlayer(guard, player) {
        // Simplified line-of-sight check
        const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
            guard.x, guard.y,
            player.x, player.y
        );
        
        return distance < guard.visionRange && !this.isHiding;
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 3: Puzzle Game Camera
 */
class PuzzleCameraController {
    constructor(scene, cameraSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.puzzleElements = [];
    }
    
    registerPuzzleElement(element) {
        this.puzzleElements.push(element);
    }
    
    frameAllElements() {
        // Show entire puzzle
        this.cameraSystem.frameTargets(this.puzzleElements, {
            padding: 100,
            minZoom: 0.5,
            maxZoom: 1.5,
            smooth: true,
            smoothFactor: 0.08
        });
    }
    
    focusOnElement(element, duration = 1000) {
        // Zoom to specific element
        this.cameraSystem.playCinematic([
            {
                target: element,
                zoom: 2.0,
                duration: duration,
                easing: 'Quad.easeInOut'
            }
        ]);
    }
    
    onPuzzleSolved() {
        // Celebratory camera moment
        this.cameraSystem.shake('light');
        this.cameraSystem.flash(500, 0xffff00, 0.3);
        
        // Zoom out to show result
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(500, () => {
            this.frameAllElements();
        });
    }
    
    onHintRequested(element) {
        // Gently pulse zoom on hinted element
        const originalZoom = this.cameraSystem.state.currentZoom;
        
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(originalZoom * 1.3, 400);
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(400, () => {
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(originalZoom, 400);
        });
        
        // Subtle flash
        this.cameraSystem.flash(300, 0xffffaa, 0.2);
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 4: Platformer Camera with Prediction
 */
class PlatformerCameraController {
    constructor(scene, cameraSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.player = null;
    }
    
    setPlayer(player) {
        this.player = player;
        
        // Enable look-ahead for responsive feel
        this.cameraSystem.enableLookAhead(player, {
            distance: 150,
            smoothing: 0.08,
            maxSpeed: 400
        });
        
        // Set up jump/fall camera behavior
        this.setupJumpBehavior(player);
    }
    
    setupJumpBehavior(player) {
        // Zoom out slightly when jumping
        player.on('jump', () => {
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(0.95, 200);
        });
        
        // Zoom back in on landing
        player.on('land', () => {
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.0, 300);
            this.cameraSystem.shake('light');
        });
        
        // Screen shake on hard landing
        player.on('hard-land', () => {
            this.cameraSystem.shake('medium');
        });
    }
    
    onCheckpointReached(checkpoint) {
        // Brief pause moment
        this.scene.time.timeScale = 0.3;
        
        this.cameraSystem.flash(300, 0x44ff88, 0.4);
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.2, 200);
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(400, () => {
            this.scene.time.timeScale = 1.0;
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(1.0, 300);
        });
    }
    
    onDeath() {
        // Dramatic death moment
        this.cameraSystem.shake('heavy');
        
        // Zoom in on player
        this.cameraSystem.playCinematic([
            {
                target: this.player,
                zoom: 2.0,
                duration: 500,
                easing: 'Quad.easeIn'
            }
        ], {
            canSkip: false,
            onComplete: () => {
                // Fade to black
                this.cameraSystem.fade(true, 1000, 0x000000, () => {
                    this.scene.scene.restart();
                });
            }
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 5: Racing Game Camera
 */
class RacingCameraController {
    constructor(scene, cameraSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cameraSystem = cameraSystem;
        this.vehicle = null;
        this.opponents = [];
        
        this.cameraMode = 'follow'; // follow, overhead, cinematic
    }
    
    setVehicle(vehicle) {
        this.vehicle = vehicle;
        this.enterFollowMode();
    }
    
    enterFollowMode() {
        this.cameraMode = 'follow';
        
        // Follow behind vehicle
        this.cameraSystem.followTarget(this.vehicle, {
            lerpX: 0.15,
            lerpY: 0.15,
            offsetY: -100, // Behind vehicle
            deadzoneX: 0.1,
            deadzoneY: 0.1
        });
        
        // Enable speed-based zoom
        this.enableSpeedZoom();
    }
    
    enterOverheadMode() {
        this.cameraMode = 'overhead';
        
        this.cameraSystem.followTarget(this.vehicle, {
            lerpX: 0.1,
            lerpY: 0.1,
            offsetY: 0
        });
        
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(0.6, 1000);
    }
    
    enableSpeedZoom() {
        // Zoom out as vehicle speeds up
        this.vehicle.on('speed-change', (speed) => {
            const maxSpeed = 500;
            const minZoom = 0.8;
            const maxZoom = 1.2;
            
            const speedRatio = Math.min(speed / maxSpeed, 1.0);
            const targetZoom = maxZoom - (speedRatio * (maxZoom - minZoom));
            
            this.cameraSystem.state.targetZoom = targetZoom;
        });
    }
    
    onBoost() {
        // Dramatic boost effect
        this.cameraSystem.shake('light');
        
        // Speed lines effect
        // this.screenEffects.addMotionBlur(8, 0.8);
        
        // Quick zoom
        const currentZoom = this.cameraSystem.state.currentZoom;
        this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(currentZoom * 0.9, 100);
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(100, () => {
            this.cameraSystem.transitionZoom(currentZoom, 400);
        });
    }
    
    onCollision(otherVehicle) {
        // Impact shake
        this.cameraSystem.shake('heavy');
        
        // Brief slow motion
        this.scene.time.timeScale = 0.5;
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(200, () => {
            this.scene.time.timeScale = 1.0;
        });
    }
    
    onFinish() {
        // Victory camera sequence
        this.cameraSystem.playCinematic([
            {
                // Follow across finish line
                target: this.vehicle,
                zoom: 1.5,
                duration: 1000,
                easing: 'Quad.easeOut'
            },
            {
                // Circle around vehicle
                target: this.vehicle,
                zoom: 1.2,
                duration: 2000,
                easing: 'Sine.easeInOut'
            },
            {
                // Pull back for overview
                target: this.vehicle,
                zoom: 0.7,
                duration: 1500,
                easing: 'Quad.easeOut'
            }
        ], {
            canSkip: true,
            onComplete: () => {
                this.scene.scene.start('ResultsScene');
            }
        });
    }
}

export {
    GameScene,
    StealthCameraController,
    PuzzleCameraController,
    PlatformerCameraController,
    RacingCameraController
};
