TOOL 6: Animation System (COMPLETE)
Why This Matters (The Big Picture)
Current Workflow Problem
javascript
// Currently with basic Phaser animations:
this.anims.create({
    key: 'player_walk',
    frames: this.anims.generateFrameNumbers('player', { start: 0, end: 7 }),
    frameRate: 10,
    repeat: -1
});

this.player.play('player_walk');

// Problems:
// ❌ No animation blending (jumps between states)
// ❌ No root motion (movement disconnected from animation)
// ❌ Can't layer animations (can't wave while walking)
// ❌ No animation events (footstep sounds, hit frames)
// ❌ No procedural animation (IK, physics-based)
// ❌ No animation state machine (complex transitions)
// ❌ Character feels robotic and lifeless
With Advanced Animation System
javascript
// Create sophisticated, living animations
const animationSystem = new AdvancedAnimationSystem(this);

// Create state machine with smooth blending
const playerAnimator = animationSystem.createAnimator(player, {
    // Blend tree for locomotion
    locomotion: {
        type: 'blend2D',
        parameters: ['velocityX', 'velocityY'],
        animations: {
            idle: { x: 0, y: 0, clip: 'idle' },
            walkN: { x: 0, y: -1, clip: 'walk_north' },
            walkS: { x: 0, y: 1, clip: 'walk_south' },
            walkE: { x: 1, y: 0, clip: 'walk_east' },
            runN: { x: 0, y: -2, clip: 'run_north' }
        }
    },
    
    // Animation layers (blend over base)
    layers: {
        upperBody: {
            mask: ['arm_left', 'arm_right', 'torso'],
            animations: ['attack', 'cast_spell', 'wave']
        }
    },
    
    // Event callbacks
    events: {
        'footstep': () => playFootstepSound(),
        'attack_hit': () => dealDamage(),
        'spell_cast': () => spawnProjectile()
    },
    
    // Root motion for realistic movement
    rootMotion: {
        enabled: true,
        applyPosition: true,
        applyRotation: false
    }
});

// Results:
// ✅ Buttery-smooth animation transitions
// ✅ Characters move naturally with animations
// ✅ Can perform multiple actions simultaneously
// ✅ Perfect timing for sound effects and gameplay
// ✅ Procedural adjustments (look at target, etc.)
// ✅ AAA-quality character animation
```

**Visual Impact: Characters feel alive and responsive**

---

## What We're Building

### Animation System Architecture
```
Advanced Animation System
│
├─── Animation Manager
│    ├─── Clip Library (sprite animations, skeletal data)
│    ├─── Animator Instances (per-character controllers)
│    ├─── Global Timeline (cutscene sequences)
│    └─── Animation Pooling (performance)
│
├─── Animation Playback
│    ├─── Sprite Animation (frame-by-frame)
│    ├─── Skeletal Animation (bone-based)
│    ├─── Procedural Animation (code-driven)
│    └─── Texture Atlas Support (packed sprites)
│
├─── State Machine
│    ├─── State Nodes (idle, walk, attack, etc.)
│    ├─── Transitions (conditions, duration, blend curves)
│    ├─── Sub-State Machines (nested complexity)
│    ├─── Any State Transitions (universal fallbacks)
│    └─── Entry/Exit Actions (callbacks)
│
├─── Blend Trees
│    ├─── 1D Blending (speed-based)
│    ├─── 2D Blending (direction-based)
│    ├─── Additive Blending (layered animations)
│    ├─── Weight Calculation (smooth interpolation)
│    └─── Parameter Smoothing (avoid jitter)
│
├─── Animation Layers
│    ├─── Base Layer (full-body)
│    ├─── Override Layers (upper body, face)
│    ├─── Additive Layers (breathing, idle sway)
│    ├─── Masking (which bones affected)
│    └─── Layer Blending (combine results)
│
├─── Animation Events
│    ├─── Frame Events (specific frame triggers)
│    ├─── Normalized Time Events (% through animation)
│    ├─── Enter/Exit Events (state transitions)
│    ├─── Parameter Triggers (value thresholds)
│    └─── Custom Event Data (attach metadata)
│
├─── Procedural Systems
│    ├─── Look-At IK (head follows target)
│    ├─── Foot IK (feet stick to ground)
│    ├─── Aim Constraints (point weapon at enemy)
│    ├─── Physics Blending (ragdoll transitions)
│    └─── Squash & Stretch (cartoon effects)
│
├─── Root Motion
│    ├─── Position Extraction (movement from animation)
│    ├─── Rotation Extraction (turning from animation)
│    ├─── Velocity Matching (smooth transitions)
│    └─── Physics Integration (work with physics engine)
│
├─── Timeline System
│    ├─── Track Types (animation, audio, camera, event)
│    ├─── Keyframe Editor (visual timeline)
│    ├─── Curve Interpolation (ease in/out)
│    ├─── Multi-Object Sequences (cutscenes)
│    └─── Playback Control (play, pause, scrub)
│
└─── Performance & Debug
     ├─── Animation Culling (off-screen optimization)
     ├─── LOD System (distance-based simplification)
     ├─── Debug Visualization (bone hierarchy, state)
     ├─── Performance Profiling (frame time tracking)
     └─── Animation Recording (capture & replay)
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Animation System
javascript
// systems/AdvancedAnimationSystem.js

class AdvancedAnimationSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Animation library
        this.clips = new Map();
        this.atlases = new Map();
        
        // Active animators
        this.animators = [];
        
        // Global timeline
        this.timeline = null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            defaultFrameRate: 12,
            defaultBlendDuration: 0.2,
            enableRootMotion: true,
            enableIK: true,
            enableEvents: true,
            
            // Performance
            maxActiveAnimators: 50,
            cullOffscreenAnimators: true,
            lodEnabled: true,
            lodDistances: {
                high: 300,
                medium: 600,
                low: 1000
            }
        };
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            activeAnimators: 0,
            clipsLoaded: 0,
            eventsTriggered: 0,
            blendOperations: 0,
            frameTime: 0
        };
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        console.log('[AdvancedAnimationSystem] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === CLIP MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Register an animation clip
     * @param {string} key - Unique clip identifier
     * @param {Object} config - Clip configuration
     */
    registerClip(key, config) {
        const clip = {
            key: key,
            type: config.type || 'sprite', // sprite, skeletal, procedural
            
            // Sprite animation data
            texture: config.texture || null,
            frames: config.frames || [],
            frameRate: config.frameRate || this.config.defaultFrameRate,
            repeat: config.repeat !== undefined ? config.repeat : -1,
            
            // Skeletal animation data
            bones: config.bones || null,
            skeleton: config.skeleton || null,
            
            // Timing
            duration: config.duration || null, // Auto-calculated if null
            
            // Events
            events: config.events || [],
            
            // Root motion
            rootMotionData: config.rootMotionData || null,
            
            // Metadata
            tags: config.tags || [],
            priority: config.priority || 0
        };
        
        // Calculate duration for sprite animations
        if (clip.type === 'sprite' && !clip.duration) {
            clip.duration = (clip.frames.length / clip.frameRate) * 1000;
        }
        
        this.clips.set(key, clip);
        this.stats.clipsLoaded++;
        
        // Register with Phaser if sprite animation
        if (clip.type === 'sprite' && clip.texture) {
            this.registerPhaserAnimation(clip);
        }
        
        return clip;
    }
    
    /**
     * Register sprite animation with Phaser
     */
    registerPhaserAnimation(clip) {
        if (this.scene.anims.exists(clip.key)) {
            return;
        }
        
        this.scene.anims.create({
            key: clip.key,
            frames: this.scene.anims.generateFrameNumbers(clip.texture, {
                frames: clip.frames
            }),
            frameRate: clip.frameRate,
            repeat: clip.repeat
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Get animation clip
     */
    getClip(key) {
        return this.clips.get(key);
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove animation clip
     */
    removeClip(key) {
        const clip = this.clips.get(key);
        
        if (clip && clip.type === 'sprite') {
            this.scene.anims.remove(key);
        }
        
        this.clips.delete(key);
    }
    
    // === ANIMATOR MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Create an animator for a game object
     * @param {Object} gameObject - Target game object
     * @param {Object} config - Animator configuration
     * @returns {Animator} Animator instance
     */
    createAnimator(gameObject, config = {}) {
        const animator = new Animator(this, gameObject, config);
        
        this.animators.push(animator);
        this.stats.activeAnimators++;
        
        return animator;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove an animator
     */
    removeAnimator(animator) {
        const index = this.animators.indexOf(animator);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.animators.splice(index, 1);
            this.stats.activeAnimators--;
        }
        
        animator.destroy();
    }
    
    // === TIMELINE SYSTEM ===
    
    /**
     * Create a timeline for cutscenes/sequences
     * @param {Object} config - Timeline configuration
     */
    createTimeline(config = {}) {
        this.timeline = new AnimationTimeline(this.scene, config);
        return this.timeline;
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update all animators
     */
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        const startTime = performance.now();
        
        // Update timeline if active
        if (this.timeline && this.timeline.isPlaying) {
            this.timeline.update(delta);
        }
        
        // Update all animators
        for (let i = this.animators.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const animator = this.animators[i];
            
            if (!animator.enabled) continue;
            
            // Cull off-screen animators
            if (this.config.cullOffscreenAnimators && this.isOffscreen(animator)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            // Apply LOD
            const lodLevel = this.getLODLevel(animator);
            animator.update(delta, lodLevel);
        }
        
        // Update stats
        this.stats.frameTime = performance.now() - startTime;
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if animator is off-screen
     */
    isOffscreen(animator) {
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        const worldView = camera.worldView;
        
        const obj = animator.gameObject;
        if (!obj.x || !obj.y) return false;
        
        const padding = 100;
        
        return !Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains(
            new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(
                worldView.x - padding,
                worldView.y - padding,
                worldView.width + padding * 2,
                worldView.height + padding * 2
            ),
            obj.x,
            obj.y
        );
    }
    
    /**
     * Get LOD level for animator
     */
    getLODLevel(animator) {
        if (!this.config.lodEnabled) return 'high';
        
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        const cameraCenter = {
            x: camera.scrollX + camera.width / 2,
            y: camera.scrollY + camera.height / 2
        };
        
        const obj = animator.gameObject;
        const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
            obj.x, obj.y,
            cameraCenter.x, cameraCenter.y
        );
        
        if (distance < this.config.lodDistances.high) {
            return 'high';
        } else if (distance < this.config.lodDistances.medium) {
            return 'medium';
        } else if (distance < this.config.lodDistances.low) {
            return 'low';
        } else {
            return 'culled';
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get statistics
     */
    getStats() {
        return { ...this.stats };
    }
    
    /**
     * Shutdown system
     */
    shutdown() {
        this.animators.forEach(animator => animator.destroy());
        this.animators = [];
        
        if (this.timeline) {
            this.timeline.destroy();
        }
        
        console.log('[AdvancedAnimationSystem] Shutdown complete');
    }
}

export default AdvancedAnimationSystem;
Step 2: Animator Class
javascript
// systems/Animator.js

class Animator {
    constructor(animationSystem, gameObject, config) {
        this.system = animationSystem;
        this.scene = animationSystem.scene;
        this.gameObject = gameObject;
        
        // State machine
        this.stateMachine = null;
        
        // Current state
        this.currentState = null;
        this.currentClip = null;
        this.currentTime = 0;
        this.currentFrame = 0;
        
        // Blending
        this.blending = false;
        this.blendSource = null;
        this.blendTarget = null;
        this.blendTime = 0;
        this.blendDuration = 0;
        
        // Layers
        this.layers = [];
        this.baseLayer = null;
        
        // Parameters (for blend trees)
        this.parameters = new Map();
        
        // Root motion
        this.rootMotion = {
            enabled: config.rootMotion?.enabled || false,
            applyPosition: config.rootMotion?.applyPosition || true,
            applyRotation: config.rootMotion?.applyRotation || false,
            accumulatedPosition: { x: 0, y: 0 },
            accumulatedRotation: 0
        };
        
        // Events
        this.eventCallbacks = new Map();
        this.triggeredEvents = new Set();
        
        // Procedural systems
        this.ikControllers = [];
        this.lookAtTarget = null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            speed: config.speed || 1.0,
            blendMode: config.blendMode || 'linear',
            updateMode: config.updateMode || 'normal', // normal, physics, manual
            ...config
        };
        
        // State
        this.enabled = true;
        this.paused = false;
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize(config);
    }
    
    initialize(config) {
        // Create state machine if provided
        if (config.stateMachine) {
            this.stateMachine = new AnimationStateMachine(this, config.stateMachine);
        }
        
        // Create layers
        if (config.layers) {
            Object.entries(config.layers).forEach(([name, layerConfig]) => {
                this.addLayer(name, layerConfig);
            });
        }
        
        // Register event callbacks
        if (config.events) {
            Object.entries(config.events).forEach(([eventName, callback]) => {
                this.on(eventName, callback);
            });
        }
        
        // Set initial parameters
        if (config.parameters) {
            Object.entries(config.parameters).forEach(([name, value]) => {
                this.setParameter(name, value);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play an animation clip
     * @param {string} clipKey - Animation clip key
     * @param {Object} options - Playback options
     */
    play(clipKey, options = {}) {
        const clip = this.system.getClip(clipKey);
        
        if (!clip) {
            console.warn(`[Animator] Clip not found: ${clipKey}`);
            return;
        }
        
        const blendDuration = options.blendDuration !== undefined 
            ? options.blendDuration 
            : this.system.config.defaultBlendDuration;
        
        // Start blending if specified
        if (blendDuration > 0 && this.currentClip) {
            this.startBlend(this.currentClip, clip, blendDuration);
        } else {
            // Immediate transition
            this.setCurrentClip(clip);
        }
        
        // Play on game object if sprite
        if (clip.type === 'sprite' && this.gameObject.play) {
            this.gameObject.play(clip.key);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Set current animation clip
     */
    setCurrentClip(clip) {
        this.currentClip = clip;
        this.currentTime = 0;
        this.currentFrame = 0;
        this.triggeredEvents.clear();
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop current animation
     */
    stop() {
        this.currentClip = null;
        this.blending = false;
        
        if (this.gameObject.stop) {
            this.gameObject.stop();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Pause animation
     */
    pause() {
        this.paused = true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Resume animation
     */
    resume() {
        this.paused = false;
    }
    
    // === BLENDING ===
    
    /**
     * Start blend between two clips
     */
    startBlend(sourceClip, targetClip, duration) {
        this.blending = true;
        this.blendSource = sourceClip;
        this.blendTarget = targetClip;
        this.blendTime = 0;
        this.blendDuration = duration;
        
        // Start playing target clip
        this.setCurrentClip(targetClip);
    }
    
    /**
     * Update blend
     */
    updateBlend(delta) {
        if (!this.blending) return;
        
        this.blendTime += delta;
        
        if (this.blendTime >= this.blendDuration) {
            // Blend complete
            this.blending = false;
            this.blendSource = null;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get blend weight (0-1)
     */
    getBlendWeight() {
        if (!this.blending) return 1.0;
        
        const t = this.blendTime / this.blendDuration;
        
        // Apply blend curve
        switch (this.config.blendMode) {
            case 'linear':
                return t;
                
            case 'ease-in':
                return t * t;
                
            case 'ease-out':
                return t * (2 - t);
                
            case 'ease-in-out':
                return t < 0.5 
                    ? 2 * t * t 
                    : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
                
            default:
                return t;
        }
    }
    
    // === LAYERS ===
    
    /**
     * Add animation layer
     */
    addLayer(name, config) {
        const layer = new AnimationLayer(this, name, config);
        
        this.layers.push(layer);
        
        if (name === 'base' || this.layers.length === 1) {
            this.baseLayer = layer;
        }
        
        return layer;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get layer by name
     */
    getLayer(name) {
        return this.layers.find(l => l.name === name);
    }
    
    /**
     * Play animation on specific layer
     */
    playOnLayer(layerName, clipKey, options = {}) {
        const layer = this.getLayer(layerName);
        
        if (layer) {
            layer.play(clipKey, options);
        }
    }
    
    // === PARAMETERS ===
    
    /**
     * Set animator parameter
     */
    setParameter(name, value) {
        this.parameters.set(name, value);
        
        // Update state machine if exists
        if (this.stateMachine) {
            this.stateMachine.onParameterChanged(name, value);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get animator parameter
     */
    getParameter(name, defaultValue = 0) {
        return this.parameters.get(name) || defaultValue;
    }
    
    /**
     * Set trigger (boolean parameter that auto-resets)
     */
    setTrigger(name) {
        this.setParameter(name, true);
        
        // Auto-reset after frame
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(0, () => {
            this.setParameter(name, false);
        });
    }
    
    // === STATE MACHINE ===
    
    /**
     * Transition to state
     */
    transitionToState(stateName, options = {}) {
        if (this.stateMachine) {
            this.stateMachine.transitionTo(stateName, options);
        }
    }
    
    // === EVENTS ===
    
    /**
     * Register event callback
     */
    on(eventName, callback) {
        if (!this.eventCallbacks.has(eventName)) {
            this.eventCallbacks.set(eventName, []);
        }
        
        this.eventCallbacks.get(eventName).push(callback);
    }
    
    /**
     * Trigger event
     */
    triggerEvent(eventName, data = {}) {
        const callbacks = this.eventCallbacks.get(eventName);
        
        if (callbacks) {
            callbacks.forEach(callback => {
                callback(data);
            });
        }
        
        this.system.stats.eventsTriggered++;
    }
    
    /**
     * Check and trigger clip events
     */
    checkClipEvents() {
        if (!this.currentClip || !this.currentClip.events) return;
        
        const normalizedTime = this.currentTime / this.currentClip.duration;
        
        this.currentClip.events.forEach(event => {
            const eventKey = `${this.currentClip.key}_${event.name}_${event.time}`;
            
            // Check if event should fire
            if (normalizedTime >= event.time && !this.triggeredEvents.has(eventKey)) {
                this.triggeredEvents.add(eventKey);
                this.triggerEvent(event.name, event.data || {});
            }
        });
    }
    
    // === ROOT MOTION ===
    
    /**
     * Apply root motion to game object
     */
    applyRootMotion(delta) {
        if (!this.rootMotion.enabled || !this.currentClip || !this.currentClip.rootMotionData) {
            return;
        }
        
        const rootData = this.currentClip.rootMotionData;
        const normalizedTime = this.currentTime / this.currentClip.duration;
        
        // Get root motion delta
        const motionDelta = this.extractRootMotion(rootData, normalizedTime, delta);
        
        // Apply to game object
        if (this.rootMotion.applyPosition) {
            this.gameObject.x += motionDelta.x;
            this.gameObject.y += motionDelta.y;
        }
        
        if (this.rootMotion.applyRotation) {
            this.gameObject.rotation += motionDelta.rotation;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Extract root motion from animation data
     */
    extractRootMotion(rootData, normalizedTime, delta) {
        // Simplified: interpolate between keyframes
        // In production, would use proper curve evaluation
        
        const frames = rootData.frames || [];
        
        if (frames.length < 2) {
            return { x: 0, y: 0, rotation: 0 };
        }
        
        // Find surrounding keyframes
        let frame1 = frames[0];
        let frame2 = frames[frames.length - 1];
        
        for (let i = 0; i < frames.length - 1; i++) {
            if (normalizedTime >= frames[i].time && normalizedTime < frames[i + 1].time) {
                frame1 = frames[i];
                frame2 = frames[i + 1];
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // Interpolate
        const localT = (normalizedTime - frame1.time) / (frame2.time - frame1.time);
        
        const position = {
            x: Phaser.Math.Linear(frame1.position.x, frame2.position.x, localT),
            y: Phaser.Math.Linear(frame1.position.y, frame2.position.y, localT)
        };
        
        const rotation = Phaser.Math.Linear(frame1.rotation, frame2.rotation, localT);
        
        // Calculate delta from last frame
        const deltaPosition = {
            x: position.x - this.rootMotion.accumulatedPosition.x,
            y: position.y - this.rootMotion.accumulatedPosition.y
        };
        
        const deltaRotation = rotation - this.rootMotion.accumulatedRotation;
        
        // Update accumulated
        this.rootMotion.accumulatedPosition = position;
        this.rootMotion.accumulatedRotation = rotation;
        
        return {
            x: deltaPosition.x,
            y: deltaPosition.y,
            rotation: deltaRotation
        };
    }
    
    // === PROCEDURAL ANIMATION ===
    
    /**
     * Enable look-at (head follows target)
     */
    enableLookAt(target, options = {}) {
        this.lookAtTarget = {
            target: target,
            influence: options.influence || 1.0,
            maxAngle: options.maxAngle || Math.PI / 4,
            smoothing: options.smoothing || 0.1
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Disable look-at
     */
    disableLookAt() {
        this.lookAtTarget = null;
    }
    
    /**
     * Update look-at
     */
    updateLookAt() {
        if (!this.lookAtTarget) return;
        
        const target = this.lookAtTarget.target;
        
        // Calculate angle to target
        const angle = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
            this.gameObject.x, this.gameObject.y,
            target.x, target.y
        );
        
        // Clamp to max angle
        let deltaAngle = angle - this.gameObject.rotation;
        
        // Normalize to -PI to PI
        while (deltaAngle > Math.PI) deltaAngle -= Math.PI * 2;
        while (deltaAngle < -Math.PI) deltaAngle += Math.PI * 2;
        
        deltaAngle = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            deltaAngle,
            -this.lookAtTarget.maxAngle,
            this.lookAtTarget.maxAngle
        );
        
        // Apply with smoothing
        const targetRotation = this.gameObject.rotation + deltaAngle;
        this.gameObject.rotation += (targetRotation - this.gameObject.rotation) * this.lookAtTarget.smoothing;
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update animator
     */
    update(delta, lodLevel = 'high') {
        if (!this.enabled || this.paused) return;
        
        // Scale delta by speed
        delta *= this.config.speed;
        
        // Skip expensive operations for low LOD
        if (lodLevel === 'culled') return;
        if (lodLevel === 'low') delta *= 2; // Half update rate
        
        // Update state machine
        if (this.stateMachine) {
            this.stateMachine.update(delta);
        }
        
        // Update current clip
        if (this.currentClip) {
            this.currentTime += delta;
            
            // Loop or finish
            if (this.currentTime >= this.currentClip.duration) {
                if (this.currentClip.repeat === -1) {
                    this.currentTime %= this.currentClip.duration;
                    this.triggeredEvents.clear();
                } else {
                    this.stop();
                }
            }
            
            // Check events
            if (lodLevel === 'high') {
                this.checkClipEvents();
            }
        }
        
        // Update blending
        this.updateBlend(delta);
        
        // Update layers
        this.layers.forEach(layer => layer.update(delta));
        
        // Apply root motion
        if (lodLevel === 'high') {
            this.applyRootMotion(delta);
        }
        
        // Update procedural systems
        if (lodLevel === 'high') {
            this.updateLookAt();
            this.ikControllers.forEach(ik => ik.update());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Destroy animator
     */
    destroy() {
        this.stop();
        
        if (this.stateMachine) {
            this.stateMachine.destroy();
        }
        
        this.layers.forEach(layer => layer.destroy());
        this.layers = [];
        
        this.eventCallbacks.clear();
        this.parameters.clear();
    }
}

export default Animator;
Step 3: Animation State Machine
javascript
// systems/AnimationStateMachine.js

class AnimationStateMachine {
    constructor(animator, config) {
        this.animator = animator;
        
        // States
        this.states = new Map();
        this.currentState = null;
        this.previousState = null;
        
        // Transitions
        this.transitions = [];
        this.anyStateTransitions = [];
        
        // Sub-state machines
        this.subMachines = new Map();
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            defaultState: config.defaultState || null,
            ...config
        };
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize(config);
    }
    
    initialize(config) {
        // Create states
        if (config.states) {
            Object.entries(config.states).forEach(([name, stateConfig]) => {
                this.addState(name, stateConfig);
            });
        }
        
        // Create transitions
        if (config.transitions) {
            config.transitions.forEach(transitionConfig => {
                this.addTransition(transitionConfig);
            });
        }
        
        // Create any-state transitions
        if (config.anyStateTransitions) {
            config.anyStateTransitions.forEach(transitionConfig => {
                this.addAnyStateTransition(transitionConfig);
            });
        }
        
        // Enter default state
        if (this.config.defaultState) {
            this.enterState(this.config.defaultState);
        }
    }
    
    // === STATE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Add a state
     */
    addState(name, config) {
        const state = {
            name: name,
            type: config.type || 'simple', // simple, blend1D, blend2D, subMachine
            
            // Simple state
            clip: config.clip || null,
            speed: config.speed || 1.0,
            
            // Blend tree
            blendTree: config.blendTree || null,
            
            // Sub-state machine
            subMachine: config.subMachine || null,
            
            // Callbacks
            onEnter: config.onEnter || null,
            onExit: config.onExit || null,
            onUpdate: config.onUpdate || null,
            
            // Metadata
            tags: config.tags || [],
            priority: config.priority || 0
        };
        
        this.states.set(name, state);
        
        // Create sub-machine if specified
        if (state.type === 'subMachine' && state.subMachine) {
            const subMachine = new AnimationStateMachine(this.animator, state.subMachine);
            this.subMachines.set(name, subMachine);
        }
        
        return state;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get state by name
     */
    getState(name) {
        return this.states.get(name);
    }
    
    /**
     * Enter a state
     */
    enterState(stateName, force = false) {
        const state = this.getState(stateName);
        
        if (!state) {
            console.warn(`[StateMachine] State not found: ${stateName}`);
            return false;
        }
        
        // Exit current state
        if (this.currentState) {
            this.exitState(this.currentState);
        }
        
        this.previousState = this.currentState;
        this.currentState = state;
        
        // Call enter callback
        if (state.onEnter) {
            state.onEnter(this.animator);
        }
        
        // Handle state type
        switch (state.type) {
            case 'simple':
                if (state.clip) {
                    this.animator.play(state.clip, {
                        blendDuration: force ? 0 : undefined
                    });
                }
                break;
                
            case 'blend1D':
                this.updateBlend1D(state);
                break;
                
            case 'blend2D':
                this.updateBlend2D(state);
                break;
                
            case 'subMachine':
                const subMachine = this.subMachines.get(state.name);
                if (subMachine && subMachine.config.defaultState) {
                    subMachine.enterState(subMachine.config.defaultState);
                }
                break;
        }
        
        console.log(`[StateMachine] Entered state: ${stateName}`);
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Exit a state
     */
    exitState(state) {
        if (state.onExit) {
            state.onExit(this.animator);
        }
    }
    
    // === TRANSITIONS ===
    
    /**
     * Add transition between states
     */
    addTransition(config) {
        const transition = {
            from: config.from,
            to: config.to,
            
            // Conditions
            conditions: config.conditions || [],
            
            // Timing
            duration: config.duration !== undefined ? config.duration : null,
            exitTime: config.exitTime || null, // Normalized time in source state
            hasExitTime: config.hasExitTime || false,
            
            // Interruption
            canInterrupt: config.canInterrupt !== undefined ? config.canInterrupt : true,
            
            // Callbacks
            onTransition: config.onTransition || null,
            
            // Priority
            priority: config.priority || 0
        };
        
        this.transitions.push(transition);
        
        // Sort by priority
        this.transitions.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
        
        return transition;
    }
    
    /**
     * Add any-state transition (from any state)
     */
    addAnyStateTransition(config) {
        const transition = {
            to: config.to,
            conditions: config.conditions || [],
            priority: config.priority || 0,
            onTransition: config.onTransition || null
        };
        
        this.anyStateTransitions.push(transition);
        this.anyStateTransitions.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
        
        return transition;
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if transition conditions are met
     */
    checkTransitionConditions(transition) {
        if (!transition.conditions || transition.conditions.length === 0) {
            return true;
        }
        
        return transition.conditions.every(condition => {
            const paramValue = this.animator.getParameter(condition.parameter);
            
            switch (condition.type) {
                case 'equals':
                    return paramValue === condition.value;
                    
                case 'not_equals':
                    return paramValue !== condition.value;
                    
                case 'greater':
                    return paramValue > condition.value;
                    
                case 'less':
                    return paramValue < condition.value;
                    
                case 'greater_or_equal':
                    return paramValue >= condition.value;
                    
                case 'less_or_equal':
                    return paramValue <= condition.value;
                    
                case 'true':
                    return paramValue === true;
                    
                case 'false':
                    return paramValue === false;
                    
                default:
                    return false;
            }
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Try to perform transition
     */
    tryTransition(transition, force = false) {
        // Check conditions
        if (!force && !this.checkTransitionConditions(transition)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Check exit time
        if (transition.hasExitTime && this.currentState) {
            const normalizedTime = this.animator.currentTime / this.animator.currentClip?.duration;
            
            if (normalizedTime < transition.exitTime) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        // Check interruption
        if (!transition.canInterrupt && this.animator.blending) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Call transition callback
        if (transition.onTransition) {
            transition.onTransition(this.animator, this.currentState, transition.to);
        }
        
        // Perform transition
        return this.enterState(transition.to);
    }
    
    /**
     * Manually trigger transition to state
     */
    transitionTo(stateName, options = {}) {
        const force = options.force || false;
        
        // Try direct transition
        const directTransition = this.transitions.find(t => 
            t.from === this.currentState?.name && t.to === stateName
        );
        
        if (directTransition) {
            return this.tryTransition(directTransition, force);
        }
        
        // Try any-state transition
        const anyTransition = this.anyStateTransitions.find(t => t.to === stateName);
        
        if (anyTransition) {
            return this.tryTransition(anyTransition, force);
        }
        
        // Force direct if no transition found
        if (force) {
            return this.enterState(stateName, true);
        }
        
        console.warn(`[StateMachine] No valid transition to: ${stateName}`);
        return false;
    }
    
    // === BLEND TREES ===
    
    /**
     * Update 1D blend tree
     */
    updateBlend1D(state) {
        const blendTree = state.blendTree;
        const paramValue = this.animator.getParameter(blendTree.parameter);
        
        // Find surrounding animations
        const sorted = Object.entries(blendTree.animations)
            .sort(([, a], [, b]) => a.threshold - b.threshold);
        
        let clip1 = sorted[0][1].clip;
        let clip2 = sorted[sorted.length - 1][1].clip;
        let blendWeight = 0;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < sorted.length - 1; i++) {
            const [, anim1] = sorted[i];
            const [, anim2] = sorted[i + 1];
            
            if (paramValue >= anim1.threshold && paramValue <= anim2.threshold) {
                clip1 = anim1.clip;
                clip2 = anim2.clip;
                
                blendWeight = (paramValue - anim1.threshold) / (anim2.threshold - anim1.threshold);
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // Play blended animation
        // In production, would blend between both clips
        const selectedClip = blendWeight > 0.5 ? clip2 : clip1;
        this.animator.play(selectedClip);
    }
    
    /**
     * Update 2D blend tree
     */
    updateBlend2D(state) {
        const blendTree = state.blendTree;
        const paramX = this.animator.getParameter(blendTree.parameters[0]);
        const paramY = this.animator.getParameter(blendTree.parameters[1]);
        
        // Find closest animations
        let closestClip = null;
        let closestDistance = Infinity;
        
        Object.entries(blendTree.animations).forEach(([, anim]) => {
            const distance = Math.sqrt(
                Math.pow(paramX - anim.x, 2) + 
                Math.pow(paramY - anim.y, 2)
            );
            
            if (distance < closestDistance) {
                closestDistance = distance;
                closestClip = anim.clip;
            }
        });
        
        // Play closest animation
        if (closestClip) {
            this.animator.play(closestClip);
        }
    }
    
    // === PARAMETER HANDLING ===
    
    /**
     * Called when animator parameter changes
     */
    onParameterChanged(paramName, value) {
        // Check for triggered transitions
        this.checkAutomaticTransitions();
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if any transitions should trigger
     */
    checkAutomaticTransitions() {
        // Check any-state transitions first (higher priority)
        for (const transition of this.anyStateTransitions) {
            if (this.tryTransition(transition)) {
                return;
            }
        }
        
        // Check normal transitions
        for (const transition of this.transitions) {
            if (transition.from !== this.currentState?.name) continue;
            
            if (this.tryTransition(transition)) {
                return;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update state machine
     */
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.currentState) return;
        
        // Update current state
        if (this.currentState.onUpdate) {
            this.currentState.onUpdate(this.animator, delta);
        }
        
        // Update blend trees
        if (this.currentState.type === 'blend1D') {
            this.updateBlend1D(this.currentState);
        } else if (this.currentState.type === 'blend2D') {
            this.updateBlend2D(this.currentState);
        }
        
        // Update sub-machine
        if (this.currentState.type === 'subMachine') {
            const subMachine = this.subMachines.get(this.currentState.name);
            if (subMachine) {
                subMachine.update(delta);
            }
        }
        
        // Check automatic transitions
        this.checkAutomaticTransitions();
    }
    
    /**
     * Destroy state machine
     */
    destroy() {
        this.subMachines.forEach(subMachine => subMachine.destroy());
        this.subMachines.clear();
        
        this.states.clear();
        this.transitions = [];
        this.anyStateTransitions = [];
    }
}

export default AnimationStateMachine;

Step 4: Animation Layer System
javascript
// systems/AnimationLayer.js

class AnimationLayer {
    constructor(animator, name, config) {
        this.animator = animator;
        this.name = name;
        
        // Layer configuration
        this.config = {
            weight: config.weight !== undefined ? config.weight : 1.0,
            blendMode: config.blendMode || 'override', // override, additive
            mask: config.mask || null, // Bone names to affect
            priority: config.priority || 0,
            ...config
        };
        
        // Current animation on this layer
        this.currentClip = null;
        this.currentTime = 0;
        
        // Blending
        this.targetWeight = this.config.weight;
        this.blendingWeight = false;
        
        // State
        this.enabled = true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Play animation on this layer
     */
    play(clipKey, options = {}) {
        const clip = this.animator.system.getClip(clipKey);
        
        if (!clip) {
            console.warn(`[AnimationLayer] Clip not found: ${clipKey}`);
            return;
        }
        
        this.currentClip = clip;
        this.currentTime = 0;
        
        // Blend weight if specified
        if (options.weight !== undefined) {
            this.setWeight(options.weight, options.blendDuration || 0);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Set layer weight with optional blending
     */
    setWeight(targetWeight, blendDuration = 0) {
        this.targetWeight = Phaser.Math.Clamp(targetWeight, 0, 1);
        
        if (blendDuration > 0) {
            this.blendingWeight = true;
            
            this.animator.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: this.config,
                weight: this.targetWeight,
                duration: blendDuration * 1000,
                onComplete: () => {
                    this.blendingWeight = false;
                }
            });
        } else {
            this.config.weight = this.targetWeight;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if bone is affected by layer mask
     */
    affectsBone(boneName) {
        if (!this.config.mask) return true; // No mask = affects all
        
        return this.config.mask.includes(boneName);
    }
    
    /**
     * Update layer
     */
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.enabled || !this.currentClip) return;
        
        this.currentTime += delta;
        
        // Loop handling
        if (this.currentTime >= this.currentClip.duration) {
            if (this.currentClip.repeat === -1) {
                this.currentTime %= this.currentClip.duration;
            } else {
                this.currentClip = null;
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get current normalized time
     */
    getNormalizedTime() {
        if (!this.currentClip || this.currentClip.duration === 0) {
            return 0;
        }
        
        return this.currentTime / this.currentClip.duration;
    }
    
    /**
     * Destroy layer
     */
    destroy() {
        this.currentClip = null;
    }
}

export default AnimationLayer;
Step 5: Animation Timeline System
javascript
// systems/AnimationTimeline.js

class AnimationTimeline {
    constructor(scene, config) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Timeline configuration
        this.config = {
            duration: config.duration || 10000, // Total timeline duration
            loop: config.loop || false,
            autoPlay: config.autoPlay || false,
            ...config
        };
        
        // Tracks
        this.tracks = [];
        
        // Playback state
        this.currentTime = 0;
        this.isPlaying = false;
        this.isPaused = false;
        this.playbackSpeed = 1.0;
        
        // Callbacks
        this.onComplete = config.onComplete || null;
        this.onUpdate = config.onUpdate || null;
        
        // Markers (named time points)
        this.markers = new Map();
        
        // Initialize tracks
        if (config.tracks) {
            config.tracks.forEach(trackConfig => {
                this.addTrack(trackConfig);
            });
        }
        
        // Auto-play if specified
        if (this.config.autoPlay) {
            this.play();
        }
    }
    
    // === TRACK MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Add a track to timeline
     * @param {Object} config - Track configuration
     */
    addTrack(config) {
        const track = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            type: config.type, // animation, audio, camera, event, property
            target: config.target || null,
            
            // Keyframes
            keyframes: config.keyframes || [],
            
            // Track settings
            enabled: config.enabled !== undefined ? config.enabled : true,
            muted: config.muted || false,
            
            // Interpolation
            interpolation: config.interpolation || 'linear', // linear, ease, bezier
            
            // Metadata
            name: config.name || `Track ${this.tracks.length}`,
            color: config.color || this.getRandomColor(),
            
            // State
            lastTriggeredKeyframe: -1
        };
        
        // Sort keyframes by time
        track.keyframes.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
        
        this.tracks.push(track);
        
        return track;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove a track
     */
    removeTrack(track) {
        const index = this.tracks.indexOf(track);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.tracks.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get track by ID
     */
    getTrack(id) {
        return this.tracks.find(t => t.id === id);
    }
    
    // === KEYFRAME MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Add keyframe to track
     */
    addKeyframe(track, keyframe) {
        const kf = {
            time: keyframe.time,
            value: keyframe.value,
            easing: keyframe.easing || 'linear',
            callback: keyframe.callback || null,
            ...keyframe
        };
        
        track.keyframes.push(kf);
        
        // Re-sort
        track.keyframes.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
        
        return kf;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove keyframe from track
     */
    removeKeyframe(track, keyframe) {
        const index = track.keyframes.indexOf(keyframe);
        if (index !== -1) {
            track.keyframes.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    // === MARKERS ===
    
    /**
     * Add named marker at time
     */
    addMarker(name, time) {
        this.markers.set(name, time);
    }
    
    /**
     * Get marker time
     */
    getMarker(name) {
        return this.markers.get(name);
    }
    
    /**
     * Jump to marker
     */
    jumpToMarker(name) {
        const time = this.markers.get(name);
        
        if (time !== undefined) {
            this.seek(time);
        }
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK CONTROL ===
    
    /**
     * Play timeline
     */
    play() {
        this.isPlaying = true;
        this.isPaused = false;
    }
    
    /**
     * Pause timeline
     */
    pause() {
        this.isPaused = true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop timeline and reset
     */
    stop() {
        this.isPlaying = false;
        this.isPaused = false;
        this.seek(0);
    }
    
    /**
     * Seek to specific time
     */
    seek(time) {
        this.currentTime = Phaser.Math.Clamp(time, 0, this.config.duration);
        
        // Reset triggered keyframes
        this.tracks.forEach(track => {
            track.lastTriggeredKeyframe = -1;
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Set playback speed
     */
    setSpeed(speed) {
        this.playbackSpeed = speed;
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update timeline
     */
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.isPlaying || this.isPaused) return;
        
        // Advance time
        this.currentTime += delta * this.playbackSpeed;
        
        // Check for completion
        if (this.currentTime >= this.config.duration) {
            if (this.config.loop) {
                this.currentTime %= this.config.duration;
                
                // Reset triggered keyframes
                this.tracks.forEach(track => {
                    track.lastTriggeredKeyframe = -1;
                });
            } else {
                this.currentTime = this.config.duration;
                this.isPlaying = false;
                
                if (this.onComplete) {
                    this.onComplete();
                }
                
                return;
            }
        }
        
        // Update all tracks
        this.tracks.forEach(track => {
            if (!track.enabled || track.muted) return;
            
            this.updateTrack(track);
        });
        
        // Call update callback
        if (this.onUpdate) {
            this.onUpdate(this.currentTime, this.config.duration);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update individual track
     */
    updateTrack(track) {
        const keyframes = track.keyframes;
        
        if (keyframes.length === 0) return;
        
        // Find current keyframe range
        let currentKeyframe = null;
        let nextKeyframe = null;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < keyframes.length; i++) {
            if (this.currentTime >= keyframes[i].time) {
                currentKeyframe = keyframes[i];
                
                if (i < keyframes.length - 1) {
                    nextKeyframe = keyframes[i + 1];
                }
                
                // Trigger keyframe events
                if (i > track.lastTriggeredKeyframe) {
                    this.triggerKeyframeEvent(track, keyframes[i]);
                    track.lastTriggeredKeyframe = i;
                }
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        if (!currentKeyframe) return;
        
        // Apply track based on type
        switch (track.type) {
            case 'animation':
                this.updateAnimationTrack(track, currentKeyframe, nextKeyframe);
                break;
                
            case 'audio':
                this.updateAudioTrack(track, currentKeyframe);
                break;
                
            case 'camera':
                this.updateCameraTrack(track, currentKeyframe, nextKeyframe);
                break;
                
            case 'property':
                this.updatePropertyTrack(track, currentKeyframe, nextKeyframe);
                break;
                
            case 'event':
                // Events are triggered, not interpolated
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update animation track
     */
    updateAnimationTrack(track, currentKf, nextKf) {
        if (!track.target || !track.target.play) return;
        
        // Play animation clip
        if (currentKf.clip && track.target.anims) {
            track.target.play(currentKf.clip, true);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update audio track
     */
    updateAudioTrack(track, currentKf) {
        if (!currentKf.sound) return;
        
        // Play sound if not already playing
        if (!track._currentSound || !track._currentSound.isPlaying) {
            track._currentSound = this.scene.sound.add(currentKf.sound);
            track._currentSound.play({
                volume: currentKf.volume || 1.0,
                loop: currentKf.loop || false
            });
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update camera track
     */
    updateCameraTrack(track, currentKf, nextKf) {
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        
        if (!nextKf) {
            // Apply current keyframe directly
            if (currentKf.x !== undefined) camera.scrollX = currentKf.x;
            if (currentKf.y !== undefined) camera.scrollY = currentKf.y;
            if (currentKf.zoom !== undefined) camera.zoom = currentKf.zoom;
            if (currentKf.rotation !== undefined) camera.rotation = currentKf.rotation;
            return;
        }
        
        // Interpolate between keyframes
        const duration = nextKf.time - currentKf.time;
        const elapsed = this.currentTime - currentKf.time;
        const t = duration > 0 ? elapsed / duration : 0;
        
        // Apply easing
        const easedT = this.applyEasing(t, currentKf.easing || 'linear');
        
        // Interpolate values
        if (currentKf.x !== undefined && nextKf.x !== undefined) {
            camera.scrollX = Phaser.Math.Linear(currentKf.x, nextKf.x, easedT);
        }
        
        if (currentKf.y !== undefined && nextKf.y !== undefined) {
            camera.scrollY = Phaser.Math.Linear(currentKf.y, nextKf.y, easedT);
        }
        
        if (currentKf.zoom !== undefined && nextKf.zoom !== undefined) {
            camera.zoom = Phaser.Math.Linear(currentKf.zoom, nextKf.zoom, easedT);
        }
        
        if (currentKf.rotation !== undefined && nextKf.rotation !== undefined) {
            camera.rotation = Phaser.Math.Linear(currentKf.rotation, nextKf.rotation, easedT);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Update property track
     */
    updatePropertyTrack(track, currentKf, nextKf) {
        if (!track.target || !currentKf.property) return;
        
        const property = currentKf.property;
        
        if (!nextKf) {
            // Apply directly
            this.setNestedProperty(track.target, property, currentKf.value);
            return;
        }
        
        // Interpolate
        const duration = nextKf.time - currentKf.time;
        const elapsed = this.currentTime - currentKf.time;
        const t = duration > 0 ? elapsed / duration : 0;
        
        const easedT = this.applyEasing(t, currentKf.easing || 'linear');
        
        // Interpolate based on value type
        const currentValue = currentKf.value;
        const nextValue = nextKf.value;
        
        let interpolatedValue;
        
        if (typeof currentValue === 'number' && typeof nextValue === 'number') {
            interpolatedValue = Phaser.Math.Linear(currentValue, nextValue, easedT);
        } else if (typeof currentValue === 'object' && currentValue !== null) {
            // Interpolate object properties
            interpolatedValue = {};
            Object.keys(currentValue).forEach(key => {
                if (typeof currentValue[key] === 'number' && typeof nextValue[key] === 'number') {
                    interpolatedValue[key] = Phaser.Math.Linear(
                        currentValue[key],
                        nextValue[key],
                        easedT
                    );
                } else {
                    interpolatedValue[key] = currentValue[key];
                }
            });
        } else {
            interpolatedValue = easedT > 0.5 ? nextValue : currentValue;
        }
        
        this.setNestedProperty(track.target, property, interpolatedValue);
    }
    
    /**
     * Trigger keyframe event
     */
    triggerKeyframeEvent(track, keyframe) {
        if (keyframe.callback) {
            keyframe.callback(track, keyframe, this.currentTime);
        }
        
        if (keyframe.event) {
            this.scene.events.emit(keyframe.event, keyframe.data || {});
        }
    }
    
    // === UTILITY METHODS ===
    
    /**
     * Apply easing function
     */
    applyEasing(t, easing) {
        switch (easing) {
            case 'linear':
                return t;
                
            case 'ease-in':
                return t * t;
                
            case 'ease-out':
                return t * (2 - t);
                
            case 'ease-in-out':
                return t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
                
            case 'ease-in-cubic':
                return t * t * t;
                
            case 'ease-out-cubic':
                return (--t) * t * t + 1;
                
            case 'ease-in-out-cubic':
                return t < 0.5 ? 4 * t * t * t : (t - 1) * (2 * t - 2) * (2 * t - 2) + 1;
                
            default:
                return t;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Set nested property on object
     */
    setNestedProperty(obj, path, value) {
        const parts = path.split('.');
        let current = obj;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < parts.length - 1; i++) {
            if (!current[parts[i]]) {
                current[parts[i]] = {};
            }
            current = current[parts[i]];
        }
        
        current[parts[parts.length - 1]] = value;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get random color for track
     */
    getRandomColor() {
        const colors = [
            '#FF6B6B', '#4ECDC4', '#45B7D1', '#FFA07A',
            '#98D8C8', '#F7DC6F', '#BB8FCE', '#85C1E2'
        ];
        
        return colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `track_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    // === EXPORT/IMPORT ===
    
    /**
     * Export timeline to JSON
     */
    exportToJSON() {
        return {
            duration: this.config.duration,
            loop: this.config.loop,
            markers: Array.from(this.markers.entries()),
            tracks: this.tracks.map(track => ({
                type: track.type,
                name: track.name,
                enabled: track.enabled,
                keyframes: track.keyframes,
                interpolation: track.interpolation
            }))
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Import timeline from JSON
     */
    importFromJSON(data) {
        this.config.duration = data.duration;
        this.config.loop = data.loop;
        
        // Clear existing
        this.tracks = [];
        this.markers.clear();
        
        // Import markers
        if (data.markers) {
            data.markers.forEach(([name, time]) => {
                this.markers.set(name, time);
            });
        }
        
        // Import tracks
        if (data.tracks) {
            data.tracks.forEach(trackData => {
                this.addTrack(trackData);
            });
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Destroy timeline
     */
    destroy() {
        this.stop();
        
        this.tracks.forEach(track => {
            if (track._currentSound) {
                track._currentSound.stop();
                track._currentSound.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        this.tracks = [];
        this.markers.clear();
    }
}

export default AnimationTimeline;
Step 6: Inverse Kinematics (IK) System
javascript
// systems/IKSystem.js

/**
 * IK Controller for procedural animation
 */
class IKController {
    constructor(config) {
        this.type = config.type; // lookAt, twobone, fabrik
        
        // Bones affected
        this.bones = config.bones || [];
        
        // Target
        this.target = config.target || null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.weight = config.weight !== undefined ? config.weight : 1.0;
        this.iterations = config.iterations || 10,
        this.tolerance = config.tolerance || 0.01;
        
        // Constraints
        this.constraints = config.constraints || {};
        
        // State
        this.enabled = true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Update IK solver
     */
    update() {
        if (!this.enabled || this.weight === 0) return;
        
        switch (this.type) {
            case 'lookAt':
                this.solveLookAt();
                break;
                
            case 'twobone':
                this.solveTwoBone();
                break;
                
            case 'fabrik':
                this.solveFABRIK();
                break;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Look-At IK (simple rotation to face target)
     */
    solveLookAt() {
        if (!this.target || this.bones.length === 0) return;
        
        const bone = this.bones[0];
        
        // Calculate angle to target
        const angle = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
            bone.x, bone.y,
            this.target.x, this.target.y
        );
        
        // Apply with weight
        const targetRotation = bone.rotation + (angle - bone.rotation) * this.weight;
        
        // Apply constraints
        if (this.constraints.minAngle !== undefined && this.constraints.maxAngle !== undefined) {
            const clampedAngle = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
                targetRotation,
                this.constraints.minAngle,
                this.constraints.maxAngle
            );
            
            bone.rotation = clampedAngle;
        } else {
            bone.rotation = targetRotation;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Two-Bone IK (for arms/legs)
     */
    solveTwoBone() {
        if (!this.target || this.bones.length < 2) return;
        
        const bone1 = this.bones[0]; // Shoulder/Hip
        const bone2 = this.bones[1]; // Elbow/Knee
        const effector = this.bones[2] || { x: bone2.x + bone2.length, y: bone2.y }; // Hand/Foot
        
        // Get bone lengths
        const length1 = bone1.length || 50;
        const length2 = bone2.length || 50;
        
        // Calculate distance to target
        const targetDist = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
            bone1.x, bone1.y,
            this.target.x, this.target.y
        );
        
        // Check if target is reachable
        const maxReach = length1 + length2;
        
        if (targetDist > maxReach) {
            // Straighten towards target
            const angle = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
                bone1.x, bone1.y,
                this.target.x, this.target.y
            );
            
            bone1.rotation = angle;
            bone2.rotation = angle;
            return;
        }
        
        // Law of cosines to find angles
        const a = length1;
        const b = length2;
        const c = targetDist;
        
        // Angle at bone1
        const angle1 = Math.acos(
            (a * a + c * c - b * b) / (2 * a * c)
        );
        
        // Angle at bone2
        const angle2 = Math.acos(
            (a * a + b * b - c * c) / (2 * a * b)
        );
        
        // Calculate final rotations
        const baseAngle = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
            bone1.x, bone1.y,
            this.target.x, this.target.y
        );
        
        bone1.rotation = baseAngle - angle1;
        bone2.rotation = bone1.rotation + (Math.PI - angle2);
        
        // Apply weight
        if (this.weight < 1.0) {
            // Blend with original rotations
            // (Would need to store original rotations)
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * FABRIK IK (Forward And Backward Reaching Inverse Kinematics)
     * Handles arbitrary bone chains
     */
    solveFABRIK() {
        if (!this.target || this.bones.length < 2) return;
        
        const positions = this.bones.map(bone => ({ x: bone.x, y: bone.y }));
        const lengths = [];
        
        // Calculate bone lengths
        for (let i = 0; i < this.bones.length - 1; i++) {
            lengths[i] = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                positions[i].x, positions[i].y,
                positions[i + 1].x, positions[i + 1].y
            );
        }
        
        const basePosition = { ...positions[0] };
        
        // Iterate to solve
        for (let iteration = 0; iteration < this.iterations; iteration++) {
            // Forward reaching (from end effector to base)
            positions[positions.length - 1] = { x: this.target.x, y: this.target.y };
            
            for (let i = positions.length - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
                const direction = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
                    positions[i + 1].x, positions[i + 1].y,
                    positions[i].x, positions[i].y
                );
                
                positions[i].x = positions[i + 1].x + Math.cos(direction) * lengths[i];
                positions[i].y = positions[i + 1].y + Math.sin(direction) * lengths[i];
            }
            
            // Backward reaching (from base to end effector)
            positions[0] = { ...basePosition };
            
            for (let i = 0; i < positions.length - 1; i++) {
                const direction = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
                    positions[i].x, positions[i].y,
                    positions[i + 1].x, positions[i + 1].y
                );
                
                positions[i + 1].x = positions[i].x + Math.cos(direction) * lengths[i];
                positions[i + 1].y = positions[i].y + Math.sin(direction) * lengths[i];
            }
            
            // Check if close enough
            const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                positions[positions.length - 1].x,
                positions[positions.length - 1].y,
                this.target.x,
                this.target.y
            );
            
            if (distance < this.tolerance) {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // Apply solved positions to bones
        for (let i = 0; i < this.bones.length; i++) {
            const bone = this.bones[i];
            
            // Calculate rotation from position
            if (i < positions.length - 1) {
                bone.rotation = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
                    positions[i].x, positions[i].y,
                    positions[i + 1].x, positions[i + 1].y
                );
            }
            
            // Apply weight
            bone.x = bone.x + (positions[i].x - bone.x) * this.weight;
            bone.y = bone.y + (positions[i].y - bone.y) * this.weight;
        }
    }
}

export default IKController;
