/**
 * Animation preset manager
 */
class AnimationPresetManager {
    constructor(animationSystem) {
        this.system = animationSystem;
        this.presets = { ...ANIMATION_PRESETS };
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply preset to animator
     */
    applyPreset(animator, presetName) {
        const preset = this.presets[presetName];
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[AnimationPresets] Unknown preset: ${presetName}`);
            return false;
        }
        
        // Apply state machine
        if (preset.stateMachine) {
            animator.stateMachine = new AnimationStateMachine(
                animator,
                preset.stateMachine
            );
        }
        
        // Apply layers
        if (preset.layers) {
            Object.entries(preset.layers).forEach(([name, config]) => {
                animator.addLayer(name, config);
            });
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Register custom preset
     */
    registerPreset(name, config) {
        this.presets[name] = config;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get preset configuration
     */
    getPreset(name) {
        return this.presets[name];
    }
}

export { ANIMATION_PRESETS, AnimationPresetManager };
Step 8: Complete Integration Examples
javascript
// examples/animationSystemExamples.js

import AdvancedAnimationSystem from '../systems/AdvancedAnimationSystem.js';
import { AnimationPresetManager } from '../configs/animationPresets.js';
import IKController from '../systems/IKSystem.js';

/**
 * EXAMPLE 1: Complete Player Character Setup
 */
class PlayerCharacter extends Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite {
    constructor(scene, x, y) {
        super(scene, x, y, 'player');
        
        scene.add.existing(this);
        scene.physics.add.existing(this);
        
        // Get animation system
        this.animationSystem = scene.animationSystem;
        
        // Create animator
        this.animator = this.animationSystem.createAnimator(this, {
            rootMotion: {
                enabled: true,
                applyPosition: true,
                applyRotation: false
            }
        });
        
        // Apply locomotion preset
        const presetManager = new AnimationPresetManager(this.animationSystem);
        presetManager.applyPreset(this.animator, 'humanoid_locomotion');
        
        // Set up input handling
        this.setupInput();
        
        // Set up animation events
        this.setupAnimationEvents();
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        const cursors = this.scene.input.keyboard.createCursorKeys();
        const spaceKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('SPACE');
        
        this.inputState = {
            cursors: cursors,
            spaceKey: spaceKey
        };
    }
    
    setupAnimationEvents() {
        // Footstep sounds
        this.animator.on('footstep', () => {
            this.scene.sound.play('footstep', { volume: 0.3 });
        });
        
        // Jump event
        this.animator.on('jump', () => {
            this.body.setVelocityY(-400);
        });
        
        // Land event
        this.animator.on('land', () => {
            this.scene.cameras.main.shake(100, 0.002);
        });
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        const cursors = this.inputState.cursors;
        const spaceKey = this.inputState.spaceKey;
        
        // Calculate movement
        let velocityX = 0;
        
        if (cursors.left.isDown) {
            velocityX = -200;
            this.setFlipX(true);
        } else if (cursors.right.isDown) {
            velocityX = 200;
            this.setFlipX(false);
        }
        
        this.body.setVelocityX(velocityX);
        
        // Calculate speed parameter for animation
        const speed = Math.abs(velocityX) / 200;
        this.animator.setParameter('speed', speed);
        
        // Check if grounded
        const grounded = this.body.onFloor();
        this.animator.setParameter('grounded', grounded);
        
        // Jump input
        if (Phaser.Input.Keyboard.JustDown(spaceKey) && grounded) {
            this.animator.setTrigger('jumping');
        }
        
        // Update animator
        this.animator.update(delta);
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 2: Combat Character with Combo System
 */
class CombatCharacter extends Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite {
    constructor(scene, x, y) {
        super(scene, x, y, 'warrior');
        
        scene.add.existing(this);
        scene.physics.add.existing(this);
        
        // Create animator with combat preset
        this.animator = scene.animationSystem.createAnimator(this);
        
        const presetManager = new AnimationPresetManager(scene.animationSystem);
        presetManager.applyPreset(this.animator, 'melee_combat');
        
        // Combat state
        this.combatState = {
            comboCount: 0,
            comboTimer: 0,
            comboWindow: 1000 // ms
        };
        
        // Set up combat input
        this.setupCombatInput();
        
        // Set up combat events
        this.setupCombatEvents();
    }
    
    setupCombatInput() {
        const attackKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('J');
        const heavyKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('K');
        const blockKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('L');
        const dodgeKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('SHIFT');
        
        this.combatInput = {
            attackKey, heavyKey, blockKey, dodgeKey
        };
    }
    
    setupCombatEvents() {
        // Hit frame event (when damage should be dealt)
        this.animator.on('attack_hit', (data) => {
            console.log('Deal damage:', data);
            this.dealDamage();
        });
        
        // Combo reset
        this.animator.on('combo_end', () => {
            this.combatState.comboCount = 0;
        });
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        const input = this.combatInput;
        
        // Update combo timer
        if (this.combatState.comboTimer > 0) {
            this.combatState.comboTimer -= delta;
            
            if (this.combatState.comboTimer <= 0) {
                this.combatState.comboCount = 0;
            }
        }
        
        // Light attack
        if (Phaser.Input.Keyboard.JustDown(input.attackKey)) {
            this.animator.setTrigger('light_attack');
            this.combatState.comboTimer = this.combatState.comboWindow;
        }
        
        // Heavy attack
        if (Phaser.Input.Keyboard.JustDown(input.heavyKey)) {
            this.animator.setTrigger('heavy_attack');
        }
        
        // Block
        this.animator.setParameter('blocking', input.blockKey.isDown);
        
        // Dodge
        if (Phaser.Input.Keyboard.JustDown(input.dodgeKey)) {
            this.animator.setTrigger('dodge');
        }
        
        // Update animator
        this.animator.update(delta);
    }
    
    dealDamage() {
        // Find enemies in range
        const attackRange = 80;
        const enemies = this.scene.enemies.getChildren();
        
        enemies.forEach(enemy => {
            const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                this.x, this.y, enemy.x, enemy.y
            );
            
            if (distance < attackRange) {
                enemy.takeDamage(10);
            }
        });
    }
    
    takeDamage(amount) {
        this.animator.setTrigger('hit');
        // Apply damage...
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 3: Spell Caster with Channeling
 */
class SpellCaster extends Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite {
    constructor(scene, x, y) {
        super(scene, x, y, 'mage');
        
        scene.add.existing(this);
        
        // Create animator with spell casting preset
        this.animator = scene.animationSystem.createAnimator(this);
        
        const presetManager = new AnimationPresetManager(scene.animationSystem);
        presetManager.applyPreset(this.animator, 'spell_casting');
        
        // Spell state
        this.spellState = {
            charging: false,
            chargeTime: 0,
            maxChargeTime: 2000
        };
        
        this.setupSpellInput();
        this.setupSpellEvents();
    }
    
    setupSpellInput() {
        this.castKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('SPACE');
    }
    
    setupSpellEvents() {
        // Spell release
        this.animator.on('spell-release', () => {
            const chargeRatio = this.spellState.chargeTime / this.spellState.maxChargeTime;
            this.castSpell(chargeRatio);
        });
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        // Start charging
        if (this.castKey.isDown && !this.spellState.charging) {
            this.spellState.charging = true;
            this.spellState.chargeTime = 0;
            this.animator.setParameter('casting', true);
        }
        
        // Charging
        if (this.spellState.charging) {
            this.spellState.chargeTime += delta;
            
            // Visual feedback (particle effects would go here)
            const chargeRatio = Math.min(
                this.spellState.chargeTime / this.spellState.maxChargeTime,
                1.0
            );
            
            this.setTint(Phaser.Display.Color.GetColor(
                255,
                Math.floor(255 * (1 - chargeRatio)),
                Math.floor(255 * (1 - chargeRatio))
            ));
        }
        
        // Release spell
        if (!this.castKey.isDown && this.spellState.charging) {
            this.spellState.charging = false;
            this.animator.setTrigger('release_spell');
            this.animator.setParameter('casting', false);
            this.clearTint();
        }
        
        this.animator.update(delta);
    }
    
    castSpell(power) {
        console.log(`Cast spell at ${Math.floor(power * 100)}% power`);
        
        // Spawn spell projectile
        const spell = this.scene.add.circle(
            this.x + (this.flipX ? -30 : 30),
            this.y - 20,
            10 + power * 20,
            0xff4444
        );
        
        this.scene.physics.add.existing(spell);
        spell.body.setVelocityX((this.flipX ? -1 : 1) * (300 + power * 200));
        
        // Destroy after 2 seconds
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(2000, () => spell.destroy());
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 4: NPC with Look-At IK
 */
class InteractiveNPC extends Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite {
    constructor(scene, x, y) {
        super(scene, x, y, 'npc');
        
        scene.add.existing(this);
        
        // Create animator
        this.animator = scene.animationSystem.createAnimator(this);
        
        const presetManager = new AnimationPresetManager(scene.animationSystem);
        presetManager.applyPreset(this.animator, 'npc_basic');
        
        // Enable look-at for head
        this.animator.enableLookAt(scene.player, {
            influence: 0.8,
            maxAngle: Math.PI / 4,
            smoothing: 0.1
        });
        
        // Interaction
        this.setInteractive();
        this.on('pointerdown', () => this.startConversation());
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        // Randomly change idle variation
        if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
            this.animator.setParameter('idle_variation', Math.random());
        }
        
        this.animator.update(delta);
    }
    
    startConversation() {
        this.animator.setParameter('talking', true);
        this.animator.setTrigger('wave');
        
        // Stop talking after 3 seconds
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(3000, () => {
            this.animator.setParameter('talking', false);
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 5: Cutscene with Timeline
 */
class CutsceneController {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.animationSystem = scene.animationSystem;
    }
    
    playCutscene(player, npc, boss) {
        // Create timeline
        const timeline = this.animationSystem.createTimeline({
            duration: 10000,
            autoPlay: true,
            onComplete: () => {
                console.log('Cutscene complete');
                this.scene.events.emit('cutscene-end');
            }
        });
        
        // Add markers
        timeline.addMarker('boss_reveal', 2000);
        timeline.addMarker('player_react', 4000);
        timeline.addMarker('npc_speaks', 6000);
        
        // Camera track
        timeline.addTrack({
            type: 'camera',
            name: 'Camera Movement',
            keyframes: [
                {
                    time: 0,
                    x: player.x - 400,
                    y: player.y - 300,
                    zoom: 1.0,
                    easing: 'linear'
                },
                {
                    time: 2000,
                    x: boss.x - 400,
                    y: boss.y - 300,
                    zoom: 1.5,
                    easing: 'ease-in-out'
                },
                {
                    time: 4000,
                    x: player.x - 400,
                    y: player.y - 300,
                    zoom: 2.0,
                    easing: 'ease-in-out'
                },
                {
                    time: 6000,
                    x: npc.x - 400,
                    y: npc.y - 300,
                    zoom: 1.8,
                    easing: 'ease-in-out'
                },
                {
                    time: 8000,
                    x: (player.x + boss.x) / 2 - 400,
                    y: (player.y + boss.y) / 2 - 300,
                    zoom: 0.8,
                    easing: 'ease-out'
                }
            ]
        });
        
        // Animation track for boss
        timeline.addTrack({
            type: 'animation',
            target: boss,
            name: 'Boss Animation',
            keyframes: [
                { time: 0, clip: 'boss_idle' },
                { time: 2000, clip: 'boss_roar' },
                { time: 4000, clip: 'boss_idle' }
            ]
        });
        
        // Animation track for player
        timeline.addTrack({
            type: 'animation',
            target: player,
            name: 'Player Animation',
            keyframes: [
                { time: 0, clip: 'player_idle' },
                { time: 4000, clip: 'player_shocked' },
                { time: 6000, clip: 'player_ready' }
            ]
        });
        
        // Event track
        timeline.addTrack({
            type: 'event',
            name: 'Events',
            keyframes: [
                {
                    time: 2000,
                    event: 'boss-roar',
                    callback: () => {
                        this.scene.sound.play('boss_roar', { volume: 1.0 });
                        this.scene.cameras.main.shake(500, 0.01);
                    }
                },
                {
                    time: 6000,
                    event: 'npc-speaks',
                    callback: () => {
                        this.scene.events.emit('show-dialogue', {
                            speaker: 'npc',
                            text: 'We must work together to defeat this beast!'
                        });
                    }
                }
            ]
        });
        
        // Audio track
        timeline.addTrack({
            type: 'audio',
            name: 'Music',
            keyframes: [
                {
                    time: 0,
                    sound: 'cutscene_music',
                    volume: 0.7,
                    loop: true
                }
            ]
        });
        
        return timeline;
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 6: Complete Scene Integration
 */
class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize animation system
        this.animationSystem = new AdvancedAnimationSystem(this);
        
        // Register animation clips
        this.registerAnimations();
        
        // Create player
        this.player = new PlayerCharacter(this, 200, 400);
        
        // Create enemies
        this.enemies = this.add.group();
        
        const enemy1 = new CombatCharacter(this, 500, 400);
        this.enemies.add(enemy1);
        
        // Create NPC
        this.npc = new InteractiveNPC(this, 300, 400);
        
        // Create spell caster
        this.mage = new SpellCaster(this, 400, 400);
    }
    
    registerAnimations() {
        // Register player animations
        this.animationSystem.registerClip('character_idle', {
            type: 'sprite',
            texture: 'player',
            frames: [0, 1, 2, 3],
            frameRate: 8,
            repeat: -1,
            events: [
                { name: 'breathe', time: 0.5 }
            ]
        });
        
        this.animationSystem.registerClip('character_walk', {
            type: 'sprite',
            texture: 'player',
            frames: [8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15],
            frameRate: 12,
            repeat: -1,
            events: [
                { name: 'footstep', time: 0.25 },
                { name: 'footstep', time: 0.75 }
            ]
        });
        
        this.animationSystem.registerClip('character_run', {
            type: 'sprite',
            texture: 'player',
            frames: [16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21],
            frameRate: 15,
            repeat: -1,
            events: [
                { name: 'footstep', time: 0.3 },
                { name: 'footstep', time: 0.8 }
            ]
        });
        
        this.animationSystem.registerClip('character_jump', {
            type: 'sprite',
            texture: 'player',
            frames: [24, 25, 26],
            frameRate: 10,
            repeat: 0,
            events: [
                { name: 'jump', time: 0.1 }
            ]
        });
        
        // Register more animations...
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        // Update animation system
        this.animationSystem.update(delta);
        
        // Update characters
        this.player.update(delta);
        this.mage.update(delta);
        this.npc.update(delta);
        
        this.enemies.getChildren().forEach(enemy => {
            enemy.update(delta);
        });
    }
}

export {
    PlayerCharacter,
    CombatCharacter,
    SpellCaster,
    InteractiveNPC,
    CutsceneController,
    GameScene
};

Current Workflow Problem
javascript
// Currently with basic Phaser audio:
this.sound.play('bgm_battle', { loop: true, volume: 0.5 });
this.sound.play('sword_swing');
this.sound.play('footstep');

// Problems:
// ❌ No adaptive music (same track regardless of intensity)
// ❌ No layered music system (can't add/remove instruments)
// ❌ No spatial audio (all sounds equally loud everywhere)
// ❌ No sound pooling (lags when many sounds play)
// ❌ No ducking (music doesn't lower for dialogue)
// ❌ No smooth transitions between tracks
// ❌ Repetitive and immersion-breaking audio
With Advanced Audio Manager
javascript
// Create sophisticated, dynamic audio
const audioManager = new AdvancedAudioManager(this);

// Adaptive layered music that responds to gameplay
audioManager.playMusic('battle_theme', {
    layers: {
        base: { volume: 1.0, fadeIn: 1000 },
        percussion: { volume: 0.0 }, // Start quiet
        strings: { volume: 0.0 },
        choir: { volume: 0.0 }
    },
    adaptive: true
});

// Intensify music during boss fight
audioManager.setMusicIntensity(0.8); // Brings in percussion & strings

// Peak intensity at critical moment
audioManager.setMusicIntensity(1.0); // Full orchestra with choir

// Spatial 3D audio with distance falloff
audioManager.playSpatialSound('monster_roar', enemy.x, enemy.y, {
    maxDistance: 500,
    rolloffFactor: 2.0,
    cone: { angle: 120, outerAngle: 240 }
});

// Smart sound pooling (no lag with many effects)
audioManager.playPooledSound('sword_clash', { limit: 5 });

// Automatic ducking for dialogue
audioManager.startDialogue('npc_greeting', {
    duckMusic: 0.3, // Lower music to 30%
    duckSFX: 0.5    // Lower effects to 50%
});

// Results:
// ✅ Music evolves with gameplay intensity
// ✅ Realistic 3D positional audio
// ✅ Smooth performance with many sounds
// ✅ Professional mixing and ducking
// ✅ Memorable, dynamic soundscapes
```

## What We're Building

### Audio Manager Architecture
```
Advanced Audio Manager
│
├─── Core Audio System
│    ├─── Sound Manager (global control)
│    ├─── Music Manager (background tracks)
│    ├─── SFX Manager (sound effects)
│    ├─── Voice Manager (dialogue/narration)
│    └─── Ambient Manager (environmental audio)
│
├─── Adaptive Music System
│    ├─── Layered Tracks (stems/instruments)
│    ├─── Intensity System (0-1 dynamic scaling)
│    ├─── Vertical Remixing (add/remove layers)
│    ├─── Horizontal Resequencing (change sections)
│    ├─── Smooth Transitions (crossfade, beatmatch)
│    └─── Combat Music (intro/loop/outro)
│
├─── Spatial Audio (3D Sound)
│    ├─── Distance Attenuation (volume falloff)
│    ├─── Panning (left/right positioning)
│    ├─── Doppler Effect (pitch shift with movement)
│    ├─── Sound Cones (directional audio)
│    ├─── Occlusion (walls block sound)
│    └─── Reverb Zones (environment acoustics)
│
├─── Sound Pooling
│    ├─── Object Pools (reuse sound instances)
│    ├─── Priority System (limit simultaneous sounds)
│    ├─── Instance Limits (per sound type)
│    ├─── Automatic Cleanup (memory management)
│    └─── Polyphony Control (max voices)
│
├─── Mixing & Ducking
│    ├─── Volume Groups (music, sfx, voice, ambient)
│    ├─── Dynamic Ducking (auto-lower for priority)
│    ├─── Sidechain Compression (rhythmic ducking)
│    ├─── Crossfading (smooth transitions)
│    └─── Master Bus (final output control)
│
├─── Audio Events
│    ├─── Footstep System (surface-based sounds)
│    ├─── Impact Sounds (collision physics)
│    ├─── Ambient Triggers (zone-based audio)
│    ├─── Weather Sounds (rain, wind, thunder)
│    └─── UI Feedback (button clicks, hovers)
│
├─── Dialogue System
│    ├─── Voice Lines (character dialogue)
│    ├─── Subtitle Synchronization
│    ├─── Lip Sync Markers
│    ├─── Conversation Flow
│    └─── Barks (short contextual lines)
│
├─── Music Sequencing
│    ├─── Playlist System (queued tracks)
│    ├─── Shuffle & Repeat modes
│    ├─── Tempo Synchronization
│    ├─── Musical Transitions (measure-aligned)
│    └─── Dynamic Playlists (context-aware)
│
└─── Performance & Debug
     ├─── Audio Culling (distance-based)
     ├─── Compression (reduce memory)
     ├─── Audio Mixer Visualization
     ├─── Sound Debug Overlay
     └─── Performance Metrics
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Audio Manager
javascript
// systems/AdvancedAudioManager.js

class AdvancedAudioManager {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Sub-managers
        this.musicManager = null;
        this.sfxManager = null;
        this.voiceManager = null;
        this.ambientManager = null;
        this.spatialAudio = null;
        
        // Sound library
        this.sounds = new Map();
        
        // Volume groups (mixer channels)
        this.volumeGroups = {
            master: 1.0,
            music: 0.7,
            sfx: 0.8,
            voice: 1.0,
            ambient: 0.6
        };
        
        // Ducking state
        this.ducking = {
            active: false,
            targets: {},
            duration: 500
        };
        
        // Global settings
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            
            // Performance
            maxSimultaneousSounds: 32,
            soundCullingDistance: 1000,
            
            // Spatial audio
            spatialAudioEnabled: true,
            listenerFollowsCamera: true,
            
            // Transitions
            defaultFadeDuration: 1000,
            defaultCrossfadeDuration: 2000
        };
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            activeSounds: 0,
            totalSoundsPlayed: 0,
            musicChanges: 0,
            duckingEvents: 0
        };
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Create sub-managers
        this.musicManager = new MusicManager(this);
        this.sfxManager = new SFXManager(this);
        this.voiceManager = new VoiceManager(this);
        this.ambientManager = new AmbientManager(this);
        this.spatialAudio = new SpatialAudioSystem(this);
        
        // Set up listener position
        this.updateListener();
        
        console.log('[AdvancedAudioManager] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === SOUND REGISTRATION ===
    
    /**
     * Register a sound for use
     */
    registerSound(key, config = {}) {
        const sound = {
            key: key,
            type: config.type || 'sfx', // music, sfx, voice, ambient
            
            // Audio data
            loop: config.loop || false,
            volume: config.volume !== undefined ? config.volume : 1.0,
            rate: config.rate || 1.0,
            detune: config.detune || 0,
            
            // Spatial
            spatial: config.spatial || false,
            maxDistance: config.maxDistance || 500,
            rolloffFactor: config.rolloffFactor || 1.0,
            
            // Pooling
            poolSize: config.poolSize || 0,
            instanceLimit: config.instanceLimit || 0,
            
            // Music specific
            layers: config.layers || null,
            bpm: config.bpm || 120,
            
            // Metadata
            tags: config.tags || [],
            priority: config.priority || 0
        };
        
        this.sounds.set(key, sound);
        
        return sound;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get sound configuration
     */
    getSound(key) {
        return this.sounds.get(key);
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play a sound
     */
    play(key, options = {}) {
        const soundConfig = this.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[AudioManager] Sound not registered: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Route to appropriate manager
        switch (soundConfig.type) {
            case 'music':
                return this.musicManager.play(key, options);
                
            case 'sfx':
                return this.sfxManager.play(key, options);
                
            case 'voice':
                return this.voiceManager.play(key, options);
                
            case 'ambient':
                return this.ambientManager.play(key, options);
                
            default:
                return this.playDirect(key, options);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Play sound directly (bypass managers)
     */
    playDirect(key, options = {}) {
        const soundConfig = this.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) return null;
        
        // Apply volume group
        const groupVolume = this.getGroupVolume(soundConfig.type);
        const finalVolume = (options.volume || soundConfig.volume) * groupVolume * this.volumeGroups.master;
        
        // Create Phaser sound
        const sound = this.scene.sound.add(key);
        
        sound.play({
            loop: options.loop !== undefined ? options.loop : soundConfig.loop,
            volume: finalVolume,
            rate: options.rate || soundConfig.rate,
            detune: options.detune || soundConfig.detune,
            seek: options.seek || 0
        });
        
        this.stats.activeSounds++;
        this.stats.totalSoundsPlayed++;
        
        sound.once('complete', () => {
            this.stats.activeSounds--;
        });
        
        return sound;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop a sound
     */
    stop(sound) {
        if (sound && sound.stop) {
            sound.stop();
            this.stats.activeSounds--;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop all sounds
     */
    stopAll() {
        this.scene.sound.stopAll();
        this.stats.activeSounds = 0;
    }
    
    // === MUSIC ===
    
    /**
     * Play music track
     */
    playMusic(key, options = {}) {
        return this.musicManager.play(key, options);
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop current music
     */
    stopMusic(fadeOut = true) {
        this.musicManager.stop(fadeOut);
    }
    
    /**
     * Set music intensity (0-1)
     */
    setMusicIntensity(intensity) {
        this.musicManager.setIntensity(intensity);
    }
    
    /**
     * Transition to new music track
     */
    transitionMusic(newKey, duration) {
        this.musicManager.transitionTo(newKey, duration);
    }
    
    // === SPATIAL AUDIO ===
    
    /**
     * Play spatial sound at position
     */
    playSpatialSound(key, x, y, options = {}) {
        return this.spatialAudio.playAt(key, x, y, options);
    }
    
    /**
     * Attach sound to moving object
     */
    attachSound(key, gameObject, options = {}) {
        return this.spatialAudio.attach(key, gameObject, options);
    }
    
    // === VOLUME CONTROL ===
    
    /**
     * Set volume for a group
     */
    setGroupVolume(group, volume) {
        this.volumeGroups[group] = Phaser.Math.Clamp(volume, 0, 1);
        
        // Update all active sounds in group
        this.updateGroupVolumes(group);
    }
    
    /**
     * Get volume for a group
     */
    getGroupVolume(group) {
        return this.volumeGroups[group] || 1.0;
    }
    
    /**
     * Update volumes for all sounds in a group
     */
    updateGroupVolumes(group) {
        // Implementation depends on tracking active sounds
        // For now, this is a placeholder
    }
    
    // === DUCKING ===
    
    /**
     * Start ducking (lower volume of groups)
     */
    startDucking(targets = {}, duration = 500) {
        this.ducking.active = true;
        this.ducking.targets = targets;
        this.ducking.duration = duration;
        
        // Tween volumes down
        Object.entries(targets).forEach(([group, targetVolume]) => {
            const originalVolume = this.volumeGroups[group];
            
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: this.volumeGroups,
                [group]: targetVolume,
                duration: duration,
                ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
            });
            
            // Store original for restoration
            if (!this.ducking.original) {
                this.ducking.original = {};
            }
            this.ducking.original[group] = originalVolume;
        });
        
        this.stats.duckingEvents++;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop ducking (restore volumes)
     */
    stopDucking(duration) {
        if (!this.ducking.active) return;
        
        duration = duration || this.ducking.duration;
        
        // Restore original volumes
        Object.entries(this.ducking.original || {}).forEach(([group, volume]) => {
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: this.volumeGroups,
                [group]: volume,
                duration: duration,
                ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
            });
        });
        
        this.ducking.active = false;
        this.ducking.targets = {};
        this.ducking.original = {};
    }
    
    /**
     * Start dialogue with automatic ducking
     */
    startDialogue(key, options = {}) {
        const duckMusic = options.duckMusic !== undefined ? options.duckMusic : 0.3;
        const duckSFX = options.duckSFX !== undefined ? options.duckSFX : 0.5;
        
        // Duck other audio
        this.startDucking({
            music: duckMusic,
            sfx: duckSFX,
            ambient: duckSFX
        });
        
        // Play dialogue
        const voice = this.voiceManager.play(key, options);
        
        // Stop ducking when dialogue ends
        if (voice) {
            voice.once('complete', () => {
                this.stopDucking();
            });
        }
        
        return voice;
    }
    
    // === LISTENER (CAMERA) ===
    
    /**
     * Update listener position (for spatial audio)
     */
    updateListener() {
        if (!this.config.spatialAudioEnabled) return;
        
        const camera = this.scene.cameras.main;
        
        if (this.config.listenerFollowsCamera) {
            this.spatialAudio.setListenerPosition(
                camera.scrollX + camera.width / 2,
                camera.scrollY + camera.height / 2
            );
        }
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update audio system
     */
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        // Update listener position
        this.updateListener();
        
        // Update sub-managers
        this.musicManager.update(delta);
        this.sfxManager.update(delta);
        this.voiceManager.update(delta);
        this.ambientManager.update(delta);
        this.spatialAudio.update(delta);
    }
    
    // === UTILITY ===
    
    /**
     * Get statistics
     */
    getStats() {
        return {
            ...this.stats,
            volumeGroups: { ...this.volumeGroups }
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Shutdown audio manager
     */
    shutdown() {
        this.stopAll();
        
        this.musicManager.shutdown();
        this.sfxManager.shutdown();
        this.voiceManager.shutdown();
        this.ambientManager.shutdown();
        this.spatialAudio.shutdown();
        
        console.log('[AdvancedAudioManager] Shutdown complete');
    }
}

export default AdvancedAudioManager;
Step 2: Adaptive Music Manager
javascript
// systems/MusicManager.js

class MusicManager {
    constructor(audioManager) {
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.scene = audioManager.scene;
        
        // Current music state
        this.currentTrack = null;
        this.currentKey = null;
        
        // Layered music system
        this.layers = new Map();
        this.intensity = 0.5;
        
        // Playlist
        this.playlist = [];
        this.playlistIndex = 0;
        this.shuffle = false;
        this.repeat = false;
        
        // Transitions
        this.transitioning = false;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            adaptiveMusic: true,
            beatSyncTransitions: true,
            intensitySmoothing: 0.1
        };
        
        // State
        this.targetIntensity = 0.5;
        this.smoothedIntensity = 0.5;
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play music track
     */
    play(key, options = {}) {
        const soundConfig = this.audioManager.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[MusicManager] Track not found: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Stop current track
        if (this.currentTrack) {
            this.stop(options.fadeOut !== false);
        }
        
        this.currentKey = key;
        
        // Check if layered music
        if (soundConfig.layers) {
            return this.playLayered(key, soundConfig, options);
        } else {
            return this.playSimple(key, soundConfig, options);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Play simple (non-layered) music
     */
    playSimple(key, soundConfig, options) {
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('music');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        
        const volume = (options.volume || soundConfig.volume) * groupVolume * masterVolume;
        
        this.currentTrack = this.scene.sound.add(key);
        
        // Fade in if specified
        if (options.fadeIn) {
            this.currentTrack.play({
                loop: true,
                volume: 0
            });
            
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: this.currentTrack,
                volume: volume,
                duration: options.fadeIn,
                ease: 'Linear'
            });
        } else {
            this.currentTrack.play({
                loop: true,
                volume: volume
            });
        }
        
        this.audioManager.stats.musicChanges++;
        
        return this.currentTrack;
    }
    
    /**
     * Play layered music (stems)
     */
    playLayered(key, soundConfig, options) {
        this.layers.clear();
        
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('music');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        
        // Create layer for each stem
        Object.entries(soundConfig.layers).forEach(([layerName, layerConfig]) => {
            const layerKey = `${key}_${layerName}`;
            
            const layer = {
                name: layerName,
                sound: this.scene.sound.add(layerKey),
                baseVolume: layerConfig.volume || 1.0,
                intensityRange: layerConfig.intensityRange || [0, 1],
                fadeIn: layerConfig.fadeIn || 0,
                enabled: true
            };
            
            // Calculate initial volume based on intensity
            const layerVolume = this.calculateLayerVolume(layer) * groupVolume * masterVolume;
            
            // Start playing
            if (layer.fadeIn > 0) {
                layer.sound.play({
                    loop: true,
                    volume: 0
                });
                
                this.scene.tweens.add({
                    targets: layer.sound,
                    volume: layerVolume,
                    duration: layer.fadeIn,
                    ease: 'Linear'
                });
            } else {
                layer.sound.play({
                    loop: true,
                    volume: layerVolume
                });
            }
            
            this.layers.set(layerName, layer);
        });
        
        // Set current track reference to base layer
        this.currentTrack = this.layers.get('base')?.sound || null;
        
        this.audioManager.stats.musicChanges++;
        
        return this.currentTrack;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop current music
     */
    stop(fadeOut = true) {
        if (!this.currentTrack) return;
        
        if (fadeOut && typeof fadeOut === 'number') {
            // Fade out all layers
            this.layers.forEach(layer => {
                this.scene.tweens.add({
                    targets: layer.sound,
                    volume: 0,
                    duration: fadeOut,
                    ease: 'Linear',
                    onComplete: () => {
                        layer.sound.stop();
                    }
                });
            });
            
            // Fade out main track
            if (this.layers.size === 0) {
                this.scene.tweens.add({
                    targets: this.currentTrack,
                    volume: 0,
                    duration: fadeOut,
                    ease: 'Linear',
                    onComplete: () => {
                        this.currentTrack.stop();
                    }
                });
            }
        } else {
            // Stop immediately
            this.layers.forEach(layer => {
                layer.sound.stop();
            });
            
            if (this.currentTrack) {
                this.currentTrack.stop();
            }
        }
        
        this.currentTrack = null;
        this.currentKey = null;
        this.layers.clear();
    }
    
    // === ADAPTIVE INTENSITY ===
    
    /**
     * Set music intensity (0-1)
     */
    setIntensity(intensity) {
        this.targetIntensity = Phaser.Math.Clamp(intensity, 0, 1);
    }
    
    /**
     * Calculate layer volume based on intensity
     */
    calculateLayerVolume(layer) {
        const [minIntensity, maxIntensity] = layer.intensityRange;
        
        // Layer is active in this intensity range
        if (this.smoothedIntensity >= minIntensity && this.smoothedIntensity <= maxIntensity) {
            // Calculate fade in/out within range
            const rangeSize = maxIntensity - minIntensity;
            const fadeRange = 0.1; // 10% fade zone
            
            let fade = 1.0;
            
            // Fade in at start of range
            if (this.smoothedIntensity < minIntensity + fadeRange) {
                fade = (this.smoothedIntensity - minIntensity) / fadeRange;
            }
            // Fade out at end of range
            else if (this.smoothedIntensity > maxIntensity - fadeRange) {
                fade = (maxIntensity - this.smoothedIntensity) / fadeRange;
            }
            
            return layer.baseVolume * fade;
        }
        
        return 0;
    }
    
    /**
     * Update layer volumes based on current intensity
     */
    updateLayerVolumes() {
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('music');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        
        this.layers.forEach(layer => {
            if (!layer.enabled) return;
            
            const layerVolume = this.calculateLayerVolume(layer) * groupVolume * masterVolume;
            
            // Smooth volume changes
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: layer.sound,
                volume: layerVolume,
                duration: 200,
                ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
            });
        });
    }
    
    // === TRANSITIONS ===
    
    /**
     * Transition to new track
     */
    transitionTo(newKey, duration) {
        duration = duration || this.audioManager.config.defaultCrossfadeDuration;
        
        if (this.transitioning) return;
        
        this.transitioning = true;
        
        const oldTrack = this.currentTrack;
        const oldLayers = new Map(this.layers);
        
        // Start new track
        this.play(newKey, {
            fadeIn: duration,
            fadeOut: false
        });
        
        // Fade out old track
        if (oldLayers.size > 0) {
            oldLayers.forEach(layer => {
                this.scene.tweens.add({
                    targets: layer.sound,
                    volume: 0,
                    duration: duration,
                    ease: 'Linear',
                    onComplete: () => {
                        layer.sound.stop();
                    }
                });
            });
        } else if (oldTrack) {
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: oldTrack,
                volume: 0,
                duration: duration,
                ease: 'Linear',
                onComplete: () => {
                    oldTrack.stop();
                }
            });
        }
        
        // Reset transition flag
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(duration, () => {
            this.transitioning = false;
        });
    }
    
    // === PLAYLIST ===
    
    /**
     * Set playlist
     */
    setPlaylist(tracks, options = {}) {
        this.playlist = tracks;
        this.playlistIndex = 0;
        this.shuffle = options.shuffle || false;
        this.repeat = options.repeat || false;
        
        if (this.shuffle) {
            this.shufflePlaylist();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Shuffle playlist
     */
    shufflePlaylist() {
        for (let i = this.playlist.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
            const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
            [this.playlist[i], this.playlist[j]] = [this.playlist[j], this.playlist[i]];
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Play next track in playlist
     */
    playNext() {
        if (this.playlist.length === 0) return;
        
        this.playlistIndex++;
        
        if (this.playlistIndex >= this.playlist.length) {
            if (this.repeat) {
                this.playlistIndex = 0;
                
                if (this.shuffle) {
                    this.shufflePlaylist();
                }
            } else {
                return;
            }
        }
        
        const nextTrack = this.playlist[this.playlistIndex];
        this.transitionTo(nextTrack, 2000);
    }
    
    /**
     * Play previous track in playlist
     */
    playPrevious() {
        if (this.playlist.length === 0) return;
        
        this.playlistIndex--;
        
        if (this.playlistIndex < 0) {
            this.playlistIndex = this.playlist.length - 1;
        }
        
        const prevTrack = this.playlist[this.playlistIndex];
        this.transitionTo(prevTrack, 2000);
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update music system
     */
    update(delta) {
        // Smooth intensity changes
        if (Math.abs(this.smoothedIntensity - this.targetIntensity) > 0.01) {
            this.smoothedIntensity += (this.targetIntensity - this.smoothedIntensity) * this.config.intensitySmoothing;
            
            // Update layer volumes
            if (this.layers.size > 0) {
                this.updateLayerVolumes();
            }
        }
        
        // Check if current track ended (for playlist)
        if (this.currentTrack && !this.currentTrack.isPlaying && this.playlist.length > 0) {
            this.playNext();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Shutdown music manager
     */
    shutdown() {
        this.stop(false);
    }
}

export default MusicManager;
Step 3: Spatial Audio System
javascript
// systems/SpatialAudioSystem.js

class SpatialAudioSystem {
    constructor(audioManager) {
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.scene = audioManager.scene;
        
        // Listener position (typically camera)
        this.listenerX = 0;
        this.listenerY = 0;
        
        // Active spatial sounds
        this.spatialSounds = [];
        
        // Reverb zones
        this.reverbZones = [];
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            
            // Distance model
            distanceModel: 'inverse', // linear, inverse, exponential
            
            // Defaults
            defaultMaxDistance: 500,
            defaultRolloffFactor: 1.0,
            
            // Performance
            updateInterval: 50, // ms between updates
            cullDistance: 1000
        };
        
        // State
        this.lastUpdateTime = 0;
    }
    
    // === LISTENER ===
    
    /**
     * Set listener position
     */
    setListenerPosition(x, y) {
        this.listenerX = x;
        this.listenerY = y;
    }
    
    // === SPATIAL PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play sound at world position
     */
    playAt(key, x, y, options = {}) {
        const soundConfig = this.audioManager.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[SpatialAudio] Sound not found: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Create spatial sound
        const spatial = {
            key: key,
            x: x,
            y: y,
            gameObject: null,
            
            sound: this.scene.sound.add(key),
            
            // Spatial properties
            maxDistance: options.maxDistance || soundConfig.maxDistance || this.config.defaultMaxDistance,
            rolloffFactor: options.rolloffFactor || soundConfig.rolloffFactor || this.config.defaultRolloffFactor,
            
            // Sound cone (directional audio)
            cone: options.cone || null,
            direction: options.direction || 0,
            
            // Occlusion
            occlusionEnabled: options.occlusion || false,
            occlusionFactor: 1.0,
            
            // State
            baseVolume: options.volume || soundConfig.volume || 1.0,
            active: true
        };
        
        // Calculate initial spatial properties
        this.updateSpatialSound(spatial);
        
        // Play sound
        spatial.sound.play({
            loop: options.loop || soundConfig.loop,
            volume: spatial.calculatedVolume,
            rate: options.rate || soundConfig.rate
        });
        
        // Track spatial sound
        this.spatialSounds.push(spatial);
        
        // Clean up when complete
        spatial.sound.once('complete', () => {
            this.removeSpatialSound(spatial);
        });
        
        return spatial;
    }
    
    /**
     * Attach sound to moving game object
     */
    attach(key, gameObject, options = {}) {
        const spatial = this.playAt(key, gameObject.x, gameObject.y, {
            ...options,
            loop: true
        });
        
        if (spatial) {
            spatial.gameObject = gameObject;
        }
        
        return spatial;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove spatial sound
     */
    removeSpatialSound(spatial) {
        const index = this.spatialSounds.indexOf(spatial);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.spatialSounds.splice(index, 1);
        }
        
        spatial.active = false;
    }
    
    // === SPATIAL CALCULATIONS ===
    
    /**
     * Update spatial properties of a sound
     */
    updateSpatialSound(spatial) {
        // Update position if attached to game object
        if (spatial.gameObject) {
            spatial.x = spatial.gameObject.x;
            spatial.y = spatial.gameObject.y;
        }
        
        // Calculate distance to listener
        const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
            this.listenerX, this.listenerY,
            spatial.x, spatial.y
        );
        
        // Calculate volume based on distance
        const distanceAttenuation = this.calculateDistanceAttenuation(
            distance,
            spatial.maxDistance,
            spatial.rolloffFactor
        );
        
        // Calculate panning (left/right)
        const pan = this.calculatePan(spatial.x);
        
        // Calculate occlusion
        if (spatial.occlusionEnabled) {
            spatial.occlusionFactor = this.calculateOcclusion(spatial);
        }
        
        // Calculate cone attenuation (directional audio)
        let coneAttenuation = 1.0;
        if (spatial.cone) {
            coneAttenuation = this.calculateConeAttenuation(spatial);
        }
        
        // Apply reverb from zones
        const reverbAmount = this.calculateReverb(spatial);
        
        // Combine all factors
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('sfx');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        
        spatial.calculatedVolume = 
            spatial.baseVolume * 
            distanceAttenuation * 
            spatial.occlusionFactor * 
            coneAttenuation *
            groupVolume * 
            masterVolume;
        
        spatial.calculatedPan = pan;
        
        // Apply to sound
        if (spatial.sound && spatial.sound.isPlaying) {
            spatial.sound.setVolume(spatial.calculatedVolume);
            
            // Phaser doesn't have built-in panning, but we can simulate with stereo
            // In production, would use Web Audio API for proper panning
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Calculate distance attenuation
     */
    calculateDistanceAttenuation(distance, maxDistance, rolloffFactor) {
        if (distance >= maxDistance) {
            return 0;
        }
        
        switch (this.config.distanceModel) {
            case 'linear':
                return 1 - (distance / maxDistance);
                
            case 'inverse':
                return 1 / (1 + rolloffFactor * (distance / maxDistance));
                
            case 'exponential':
                return Math.pow(1 - (distance / maxDistance), rolloffFactor);
                
            default:
                return 1;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Calculate stereo panning (-1 to 1)
     */
    calculatePan(sourceX) {
        const deltaX = sourceX - this.listenerX;
        const screenWidth = this.scene.scale.width;
        
        // Normalize to -1 to 1 range
        return Phaser.Math.Clamp(deltaX / (screenWidth / 2), -1, 1);
    }
    
    /**
     * Calculate cone attenuation (directional audio)
     */
    calculateConeAttenuation(spatial) {
        if (!spatial.cone) return 1.0;
        
        // Calculate angle from source to listener
        const angleToListener = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
            spatial.x, spatial.y,
            this.listenerX, this.listenerY
        );
        
        // Calculate angle difference
        let angleDiff = Math.abs(angleToListener - spatial.direction);
        
        // Normalize to 0-PI range
        while (angleDiff > Math.PI) angleDiff -= Math.PI * 2;
        angleDiff = Math.abs(angleDiff);
        
        const cone = spatial.cone;
        const innerAngle = cone.angle || Math.PI / 4;
        const outerAngle = cone.outerAngle || Math.PI / 2;
        
        if (angleDiff < innerAngle) {
            // Inside inner cone - full volume
            return 1.0;
        } else if (angleDiff < outerAngle) {
            // In transition zone
            const t = (angleDiff - innerAngle) / (outerAngle - innerAngle);
            return 1.0 - t * (1.0 - (cone.outerGain || 0.5));
        } else {
            // Outside cone
            return cone.outerGain || 0.5;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Calculate occlusion (simplified raycasting)
     */
    calculateOcclusion(spatial) {
        // Simplified: check if line of sight is blocked
        // In production, would raycast through physics bodies
        
        // For now, return full volume (no occlusion)
        return 1.0;
    }
    
    /**
     * Calculate reverb amount from zones
     */
    calculateReverb(spatial) {
        let maxReverb = 0;
        
        this.reverbZones.forEach(zone => {
            // Check if spatial sound is in zone
            if (Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains(zone.bounds, spatial.x, spatial.y)) {
                maxReverb = Math.max(maxReverb, zone.amount);
            }
        });
        
        return maxReverb;
    }
    
    // === REVERB ZONES ===
    
    /**
     * Add reverb zone
     */
    addReverbZone(bounds, amount, type = 'hall') {
        const zone = {
            bounds: bounds,
            amount: amount, // 0-1
            type: type, // hall, room, cave, etc.
            enabled: true
        };
        
        this.reverbZones.push(zone);
        
        return zone;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove reverb zone
     */
    removeReverbZone(zone) {
        const index = this.reverbZones.indexOf(zone);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.reverbZones.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    /**
     * Update spatial audio system
     */
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.config.enabled) return;
        
        // Throttle updates for performance
        this.lastUpdateTime += delta;
        
        if (this.lastUpdateTime < this.config.updateInterval) {
            return;
        }
        
        this.lastUpdateTime = 0;
        
        // Update all spatial sounds
        for (let i = this.spatialSounds.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const spatial = this.spatialSounds[i];
            
            if (!spatial.active || !spatial.sound.isPlaying) {
                this.spatialSounds.splice(i, 1);
                continue;
            }
            
            // Cull distant sounds
            const distance = Phaser.Math.Distance.Between(
                this.listenerX, this.listenerY,
                spatial.x, spatial.y
            );
            
            if (distance > this.config.cullDistance) {
                continue;
            }
            
            this.updateSpatialSound(spatial);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Shutdown spatial audio
     */
    shutdown() {
        this.spatialSounds.forEach(spatial => {
            if (spatial.sound) {
                spatial.sound.stop();
            }
        });
        
        this.spatialSounds = [];
        this.reverbZones = [];
    }
}

export default SpatialAudioSystem;
