TOOL 7: Audio Manager (CONTINUATION TO COMPLETION)
Step 4: SFX Manager with Sound Pooling
javascript
// systems/SFXManager.js

class SFXManager {
    constructor(audioManager) {
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.scene = audioManager.scene;
        
        // Sound pools (reusable sound instances)
        this.pools = new Map();
        
        // Active sounds
        this.activeSounds = [];
        
        // Priority queue
        this.priorityQueue = [];
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            maxSimultaneous: 32,
            defaultPoolSize: 5,
            enablePriority: true,
            enableVariation: true
        };
        
        // Variation settings
        this.variations = {
            pitchRange: 0.1,    // ±10% pitch variation
            volumeRange: 0.15   // ±15% volume variation
        };
    }
    
    // === SOUND POOLING ===
    
    /**
     * Create or get sound pool
     */
    getPool(key) {
        if (!this.pools.has(key)) {
            this.createPool(key);
        }
        
        return this.pools.get(key);
    }
    
    /**
     * Create sound pool
     */
    createPool(key) {
        const soundConfig = this.audioManager.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[SFXManager] Sound not found: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        const poolSize = soundConfig.poolSize || this.config.defaultPoolSize;
        
        const pool = {
            key: key,
            sounds: [],
            available: [],
            inUse: [],
            maxSize: poolSize,
            instanceLimit: soundConfig.instanceLimit || 0
        };
        
        // Pre-create sound instances
        for (let i = 0; i < poolSize; i++) {
            const sound = this.scene.sound.add(key);
            pool.sounds.push(sound);
            pool.available.push(sound);
            
            // Return to pool when complete
            sound.on('complete', () => {
                this.returnToPool(pool, sound);
            });
            
            sound.on('stop', () => {
                this.returnToPool(pool, sound);
            });
        }
        
        this.pools.set(key, pool);
        
        return pool;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get available sound from pool
     */
    getFromPool(pool) {
        // Check instance limit
        if (pool.instanceLimit > 0 && pool.inUse.length >= pool.instanceLimit) {
            // Stop oldest sound
            const oldest = pool.inUse[0];
            if (oldest) {
                oldest.stop();
            }
        }
        
        // Get available sound
        let sound = pool.available.pop();
        
        // If none available, create new one if under max size
        if (!sound && pool.sounds.length < pool.maxSize) {
            sound = this.scene.sound.add(pool.key);
            pool.sounds.push(sound);
            
            sound.on('complete', () => {
                this.returnToPool(pool, sound);
            });
            
            sound.on('stop', () => {
                this.returnToPool(pool, sound);
            });
        }
        
        // If still no sound available, steal from oldest
        if (!sound && pool.inUse.length > 0) {
            sound = pool.inUse[0];
            sound.stop();
        }
        
        if (sound) {
            pool.inUse.push(sound);
        }
        
        return sound;
    }
    
    /**
     * Return sound to pool
     */
    returnToPool(pool, sound) {
        const index = pool.inUse.indexOf(sound);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            pool.inUse.splice(index, 1);
        }
        
        if (!pool.available.includes(sound)) {
            pool.available.push(sound);
        }
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play sound effect
     */
    play(key, options = {}) {
        const soundConfig = this.audioManager.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[SFXManager] Sound not found: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Check if should use pooling
        const usePooling = soundConfig.poolSize > 0 || options.pooled;
        
        let sound;
        
        if (usePooling) {
            const pool = this.getPool(key);
            sound = this.getFromPool(pool);
        } else {
            sound = this.scene.sound.add(key);
        }
        
        if (!sound) {
            console.warn(`[SFXManager] Could not create sound: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Apply variation
        let volume = options.volume !== undefined ? options.volume : soundConfig.volume;
        let rate = options.rate !== undefined ? options.rate : soundConfig.rate || 1.0;
        let detune = options.detune !== undefined ? options.detune : soundConfig.detune || 0;
        
        if (this.config.enableVariation && !options.noVariation) {
            volume *= 1 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * this.variations.volumeRange;
            rate *= 1 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * this.variations.pitchRange;
        }
        
        // Apply volume groups
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('sfx');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        volume *= groupVolume * masterVolume;
        
        // Check simultaneous sound limit
        if (this.activeSounds.length >= this.config.maxSimultaneous) {
            this.evictLowestPriority();
        }
        
        // Play sound
        sound.play({
            volume: volume,
            rate: rate,
            detune: detune,
            loop: options.loop || false
        });
        
        // Track active sound
        const activeSound = {
            sound: sound,
            key: key,
            priority: options.priority || soundConfig.priority || 0,
            startTime: Date.now()
        };
        
        this.activeSounds.push(activeSound);
        
        // Remove from active when complete
        sound.once('complete', () => {
            const index = this.activeSounds.indexOf(activeSound);
            if (index !== -1) {
                this.activeSounds.splice(index, 1);
            }
        });
        
        return sound;
    }
    
    /**
     * Play one-shot sound (convenience method)
     */
    playOneShot(key, volume = 1.0) {
        return this.play(key, { 
            volume: volume,
            pooled: true
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Evict lowest priority sound
     */
    evictLowestPriority() {
        if (this.activeSounds.length === 0) return;
        
        // Find lowest priority sound
        let lowest = this.activeSounds[0];
        
        for (let i = 1; i < this.activeSounds.length; i++) {
            if (this.activeSounds[i].priority < lowest.priority) {
                lowest = this.activeSounds[i];
            }
        }
        
        // Stop it
        if (lowest.sound) {
            lowest.sound.stop();
        }
    }
    
    // === SPECIAL EFFECTS ===
    
    /**
     * Play randomized variant
     */
    playVariant(baseKey, variantCount, options = {}) {
        const variant = Math.floor(Math.random() * variantCount) + 1;
        const key = `${baseKey}_${variant}`;
        
        return this.play(key, options);
    }
    
    /**
     * Play sound with delay
     */
    playDelayed(key, delay, options = {}) {
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(delay, () => {
            this.play(key, options);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Play sound sequence
     */
    playSequence(keys, interval = 100, options = {}) {
        keys.forEach((key, index) => {
            this.playDelayed(key, index * interval, options);
        });
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        // Clean up stopped sounds
        for (let i = this.activeSounds.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const activeSound = this.activeSounds[i];
            
            if (!activeSound.sound.isPlaying) {
                this.activeSounds.splice(i, 1);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === SHUTDOWN ===
    
    shutdown() {
        // Stop all active sounds
        this.activeSounds.forEach(activeSound => {
            if (activeSound.sound) {
                activeSound.sound.stop();
            }
        });
        
        // Clear pools
        this.pools.forEach(pool => {
            pool.sounds.forEach(sound => {
                sound.destroy();
            });
        });
        
        this.pools.clear();
        this.activeSounds = [];
    }
}

export default SFXManager;
Step 5: Voice Manager
javascript
// systems/VoiceManager.js

class VoiceManager {
    constructor(audioManager) {
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.scene = audioManager.scene;
        
        // Current voice line
        this.currentVoice = null;
        
        // Voice queue
        this.queue = [];
        
        // Subtitle system
        this.subtitles = {
            enabled: true,
            currentText: null,
            textObject: null,
            background: null
        };
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enableSubtitles: true,
            enableQueue: true,
            skipOnInput: true,
            
            // Subtitle styling
            subtitleFont: '18px Arial',
            subtitleColor: '#ffffff',
            subtitleBackground: 0x000000,
            subtitleBackgroundAlpha: 0.7,
            subtitlePadding: 20,
            subtitleY: 500
        };
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play voice line
     */
    play(key, options = {}) {
        // Stop current voice if interruption allowed
        if (this.currentVoice && options.interrupt !== false) {
            this.stop();
        }
        
        // Queue if currently speaking
        if (this.currentVoice && this.config.enableQueue) {
            this.queue.push({ key, options });
            return null;
        }
        
        const soundConfig = this.audioManager.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[VoiceManager] Voice line not found: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Apply volume groups
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('voice');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        const volume = (options.volume || soundConfig.volume) * groupVolume * masterVolume;
        
        // Create and play sound
        const voice = this.scene.sound.add(key);
        
        voice.play({
            volume: volume
        });
        
        this.currentVoice = {
            sound: voice,
            key: key,
            subtitle: options.subtitle || soundConfig.subtitle || null,
            onComplete: options.onComplete || null
        };
        
        // Show subtitle
        if (this.config.enableSubtitles && this.currentVoice.subtitle) {
            this.showSubtitle(this.currentVoice.subtitle);
        }
        
        // Handle completion
        voice.once('complete', () => {
            this.onVoiceComplete();
        });
        
        return voice;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop current voice
     */
    stop() {
        if (!this.currentVoice) return;
        
        if (this.currentVoice.sound) {
            this.currentVoice.sound.stop();
        }
        
        this.hideSubtitle();
        
        this.currentVoice = null;
    }
    
    /**
     * Handle voice completion
     */
    onVoiceComplete() {
        if (!this.currentVoice) return;
        
        // Call completion callback
        if (this.currentVoice.onComplete) {
            this.currentVoice.onComplete();
        }
        
        this.hideSubtitle();
        
        this.currentVoice = null;
        
        // Play next in queue
        if (this.queue.length > 0) {
            const next = this.queue.shift();
            this.play(next.key, next.options);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Skip current voice
     */
    skip() {
        if (!this.currentVoice) return;
        
        this.stop();
        
        // Play next in queue immediately
        if (this.queue.length > 0) {
            const next = this.queue.shift();
            this.play(next.key, next.options);
        }
    }
    
    // === SUBTITLES ===
    
    /**
     * Show subtitle
     */
    showSubtitle(text) {
        this.hideSubtitle();
        
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const y = this.config.subtitleY;
        
        // Create background
        this.subtitles.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            width / 2,
            y,
            width - this.config.subtitlePadding * 2,
            60,
            this.config.subtitleBackground,
            this.config.subtitleBackgroundAlpha
        );
        
        this.subtitles.background.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.subtitles.background.setDepth(10000);
        
        // Create text
        this.subtitles.textObject = this.scene.add.text(
            width / 2,
            y,
            text,
            {
                font: this.config.subtitleFont,
                fill: this.config.subtitleColor,
                align: 'center',
                wordWrap: {
                    width: width - this.config.subtitlePadding * 4
                }
            }
        );
        
        this.subtitles.textObject.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.subtitles.textObject.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.subtitles.textObject.setDepth(10001);
        
        this.subtitles.currentText = text;
    }
    
    /**
     * Hide subtitle
     */
    hideSubtitle() {
        if (this.subtitles.background) {
            this.subtitles.background.destroy();
            this.subtitles.background = null;
        }
        
        if (this.subtitles.textObject) {
            this.subtitles.textObject.destroy();
            this.subtitles.textObject = null;
        }
        
        this.subtitles.currentText = null;
    }
    
    // === BARKS (Short contextual lines) ===
    
    /**
     * Play bark (short voice line that doesn't interrupt)
     */
    playBark(key, options = {}) {
        // Don't interrupt current voice
        if (this.currentVoice) {
            return null;
        }
        
        return this.play(key, {
            ...options,
            interrupt: false
        });
    }
    
    // === CONVERSATION ===
    
    /**
     * Play conversation (sequence of voice lines)
     */
    playConversation(lines, options = {}) {
        lines.forEach((line, index) => {
            if (index === 0) {
                // Play first immediately
                this.play(line.key, {
                    subtitle: line.text,
                    ...options
                });
            } else {
                // Queue rest
                this.queue.push({
                    key: line.key,
                    options: {
                        subtitle: line.text,
                        ...options
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        // Handle skip input
        if (this.config.skipOnInput && this.currentVoice) {
            const spaceKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey('SPACE');
            
            if (Phaser.Input.Keyboard.JustDown(spaceKey)) {
                this.skip();
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === SHUTDOWN ===
    
    shutdown() {
        this.stop();
        this.queue = [];
        this.hideSubtitle();
    }
}

export default VoiceManager;
Step 6: Ambient Manager
javascript
// systems/AmbientManager.js

class AmbientManager {
    constructor(audioManager) {
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.scene = audioManager.scene;
        
        // Active ambient sounds
        this.ambientSounds = new Map();
        
        // Ambient zones
        this.ambientZones = [];
        
        // Current zone
        this.currentZone = null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enableZones: true,
            transitionDuration: 2000,
            layerVolumes: true
        };
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    /**
     * Play ambient sound
     */
    play(key, options = {}) {
        const soundConfig = this.audioManager.getSound(key);
        
        if (!soundConfig) {
            console.warn(`[AmbientManager] Ambient sound not found: ${key}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Stop existing ambient with same key
        if (this.ambientSounds.has(key)) {
            this.stop(key);
        }
        
        // Apply volume groups
        const groupVolume = this.audioManager.getGroupVolume('ambient');
        const masterVolume = this.audioManager.volumeGroups.master;
        const volume = (options.volume || soundConfig.volume) * groupVolume * masterVolume;
        
        // Create and play sound
        const ambient = this.scene.sound.add(key);
        
        // Fade in if specified
        if (options.fadeIn) {
            ambient.play({
                loop: true,
                volume: 0
            });
            
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: ambient,
                volume: volume,
                duration: options.fadeIn,
                ease: 'Linear'
            });
        } else {
            ambient.play({
                loop: true,
                volume: volume
            });
        }
        
        this.ambientSounds.set(key, {
            sound: ambient,
            baseVolume: volume,
            key: key
        });
        
        return ambient;
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop ambient sound
     */
    stop(key, fadeOut = true) {
        const ambient = this.ambientSounds.get(key);
        
        if (!ambient) return;
        
        if (fadeOut && typeof fadeOut === 'number') {
            this.scene.tweens.add({
                targets: ambient.sound,
                volume: 0,
                duration: fadeOut,
                ease: 'Linear',
                onComplete: () => {
                    ambient.sound.stop();
                    this.ambientSounds.delete(key);
                }
            });
        } else {
            ambient.sound.stop();
            this.ambientSounds.delete(key);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Stop all ambient sounds
     */
    stopAll(fadeOut = true) {
        this.ambientSounds.forEach((ambient, key) => {
            this.stop(key, fadeOut);
        });
    }
    
    // === AMBIENT ZONES ===
    
    /**
     * Add ambient zone
     */
    addZone(config) {
        const zone = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            bounds: config.bounds,
            
            // Ambient sounds for this zone
            sounds: config.sounds || [],
            
            // Transition
            transitionDuration: config.transitionDuration || this.config.transitionDuration,
            
            // Callbacks
            onEnter: config.onEnter || null,
            onExit: config.onExit || null,
            
            // Priority
            priority: config.priority || 0,
            
            // State
            active: false
        };
        
        this.ambientZones.push(zone);
        
        // Sort by priority
        this.ambientZones.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
        
        return zone;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove ambient zone
     */
    removeZone(zone) {
        const index = this.ambientZones.indexOf(zone);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.ambientZones.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if player entered/exited zones
     */
    updateZones(playerX, playerY) {
        if (!this.config.enableZones) return;
        
        // Find active zone
        let activeZone = null;
        
        for (const zone of this.ambientZones) {
            if (Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains(zone.bounds, playerX, playerY)) {
                activeZone = zone;
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // Check for zone change
        if (activeZone !== this.currentZone) {
            // Exit old zone
            if (this.currentZone) {
                this.exitZone(this.currentZone);
            }
            
            // Enter new zone
            if (activeZone) {
                this.enterZone(activeZone);
            }
            
            this.currentZone = activeZone;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Enter ambient zone
     */
    enterZone(zone) {
        zone.active = true;
        
        // Call enter callback
        if (zone.onEnter) {
            zone.onEnter(zone);
        }
        
        // Start zone ambient sounds
        zone.sounds.forEach(soundConfig => {
            this.play(soundConfig.key, {
                volume: soundConfig.volume || 1.0,
                fadeIn: zone.transitionDuration
            });
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Exit ambient zone
     */
    exitZone(zone) {
        zone.active = false;
        
        // Call exit callback
        if (zone.onExit) {
            zone.onExit(zone);
        }
        
        // Stop zone ambient sounds
        zone.sounds.forEach(soundConfig => {
            this.stop(soundConfig.key, zone.transitionDuration);
        });
    }
    
    // === LAYERED AMBIENT ===
    
    /**
     * Play layered ambient (e.g., wind + birds + water)
     */
    playLayered(layers, options = {}) {
        layers.forEach(layer => {
            this.play(layer.key, {
                volume: layer.volume || 1.0,
                fadeIn: options.fadeIn || 0
            });
        });
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        // Update zone check if player reference exists
        if (this.scene.player) {
            this.updateZones(this.scene.player.x, this.scene.player.y);
        }
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `zone_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    // === SHUTDOWN ===
    
    shutdown() {
        this.stopAll(false);
        this.ambientZones = [];
        this.currentZone = null;
    }
}

export default AmbientManager;

javascript
// configs/audioPresets.js

const AUDIO_PRESETS = {
    // === COMBAT MUSIC ===
    
    combat_standard: {
        music: {
            key: 'battle_theme',
            layers: {
                base: { volume: 1.0, intensityRange: [0, 1] },
                percussion: { volume: 0.8, intensityRange: [0.3, 1] },
                strings: { volume: 0.7, intensityRange: [0.5, 1] },
                brass: { volume: 0.9, intensityRange: [0.7, 1] }
            }
        },
        intensityMap: {
            idle: 0.2,
            combat: 0.6,
            boss: 0.9,
            critical: 1.0
        }
    },
    
    boss_battle: {
        music: {

                choir: { volume: 0.8, intensityRange: [0.5, 1] },
                orchestra: { volume: 0.9, intensityRange: [0.7, 1] }
            }

        phases: [
            { healthPercent: 1.0, intensity: 0.6 },

            { key: 'forest_wind', volume: 0.4 },
            { key: 'forest_stream', volume: 0.3 }
        ]
    },
    
    dungeon_exploration: {
        music: {
            key: 'dungeon_theme',
            layers: {
                base: { volume: 0.8, intensityRange: [0, 1] },
                tension: { volume: 0.0, intensityRange: [0.6, 1] }
            }
        },
        ambient: [
            { key: 'dungeon_drips', volume: 0.5 },
            { key: 'dungeon_echo', volume: 0.3 }
        ]
    },
    
    // === TOWN/SAFE ZONES ===
    
    town_day: {
        music: {
            key: 'town_day_theme',
            adaptive: false
        },
        ambient: [
            { key: 'town_chatter', volume: 0.4 },
            { key: 'town_market', volume: 0.3 },
            { key: 'birds_chirping', volume: 0.5 }
        ]
    },
    
    town_night: {
        music: {
            key: 'town_night_theme',
            adaptive: false
        },
        ambient: [
            { key: 'crickets', volume: 0.6 },
            { key: 'night_wind', volume: 0.3 }
        ]
    },
    
    // === SPECIAL MOMENTS ===
    
    victory_fanfare: {
        sequence: [
            { key: 'victory_fanfare', delay: 0, volume: 1.0 },
            { key: 'level_up_jingle', delay: 1500, volume: 0.8 }
        ],
        duckMusic: 0.2
    },
    
    death_sequence: {
        sequence: [
            { key: 'death_sound', delay: 0, volume: 1.0 },
            { key: 'game_over_sting', delay: 1000, volume: 0.9 }
        ],
        fadeOutMusic: 2000
    },
    
    // === WEATHER PRESETS ===
    
    heavy_rain: {
        ambient: [
            { key: 'rain_heavy', volume: 0.8 },
            { key: 'thunder_distant', volume: 0.4 },
            { key: 'wind_strong', volume: 0.5 }
        ],
        spatial: [
            { 
                key: 'thunder_close',
                trigger: 'random',
                interval: [5000, 15000],
                volume: 1.0
            }
        ]
    },
    
    light_rain: {
        ambient: [
            { key: 'rain_light', volume: 0.5 },
            { key: 'wind_gentle', volume: 0.3 }
        ]
    },
    
    // === FOOTSTEP SURFACES ===
    
    footsteps: {
        surfaces: {
            grass: ['footstep_grass_1', 'footstep_grass_2', 'footstep_grass_3'],
            stone: ['footstep_stone_1', 'footstep_stone_2', 'footstep_stone_3'],
            wood: ['footstep_wood_1', 'footstep_wood_2', 'footstep_wood_3'],
            water: ['footstep_water_1', 'footstep_water_2'],
            metal: ['footstep_metal_1', 'footstep_metal_2']
        },
        volume: 0.4,
        poolSize: 5
    },
    
    // === UI SOUNDS ===
    
    ui_feedback: {
        sounds: {
            click: { key: 'ui_click', volume: 0.5 },
            hover: { key: 'ui_hover', volume: 0.3 },
            error: { key: 'ui_error', volume: 0.6 },
            success: { key: 'ui_success', volume: 0.7 },
            open_menu: { key: 'menu_open', volume: 0.5 },
            close_menu: { key: 'menu_close', volume: 0.5 }
        }
    }
};

/**
 * Audio preset manager
 */
class AudioPresetManager {
    constructor(audioManager) {
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.presets = { ...AUDIO_PRESETS };
        
        // Active preset
        this.currentPreset = null;
    }
    
    /**
     * Apply audio preset
     */
    apply(presetName, options = {}) {
        const preset = this.presets[presetName];
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[AudioPresets] Unknown preset: ${presetName}`);
            return false;
        }
        
        this.currentPreset = presetName;
        
        // Apply music
        if (preset.music) {
            this.audioManager.playMusic(preset.music.key, preset.music);
        }
        
        // Apply ambient sounds
        if (preset.ambient) {
            preset.ambient.forEach(ambient => {
                this.audioManager.ambientManager.play(ambient.key, {
                    volume: ambient.volume,
                    fadeIn: options.fadeIn || 1000
                });
            });
        }
        
        // Apply sequence
        if (preset.sequence) {
            preset.sequence.forEach(item => {
                this.audioManager.sfxManager.playDelayed(
                    item.key,
                    item.delay,
                    { volume: item.volume }
                );
            });
        }
        
        // Apply ducking
        if (preset.duckMusic) {
            this.audioManager.startDucking({
                music: preset.duckMusic
            });
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Transition to new preset
     */
    transitionTo(presetName, duration = 2000) {
        // Fade out current
        if (this.currentPreset) {
            this.audioManager.stopMusic(duration);
            this.audioManager.ambientManager.stopAll(duration);
        }
        
        // Apply new preset after transition
        this.audioManager.scene.time.delayedCall(duration, () => {
            this.apply(presetName, { fadeIn: duration });
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Register custom preset
     */
    register(name, config) {
        this.presets[name] = config;
    }
}

export { AUDIO_PRESETS, AudioPresetManager };
Step 8: Complete Integration Examples
javascript
// examples/audioSystemExamples.js

import AdvancedAudioManager from '../systems/AdvancedAudioManager.js';
import { AudioPresetManager } from '../configs/audioPresets.js';

/**
 * EXAMPLE 1: Complete Game Scene with Audio
 */
class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize audio manager
        this.audioManager = new AdvancedAudioManager(this);
        
        // Initialize preset manager
        this.audioPresets = new AudioPresetManager(this.audioManager);
        
        // Register all sounds
        this.registerSounds();
        
        // Set up audio zones
        this.setupAudioZones();
        
        // Start exploration music
        this.audioPresets.apply('forest_exploration');
        
        // Set up player
        this.setupPlayer();
        
        // Set up UI audio
        this.setupUIAudio();
    }
    
    registerSounds() {
        // Music
        this.audioManager.registerSound('battle_theme', {
            type: 'music',
            layers: {
                base: 'battle_base',
                percussion: 'battle_percussion',
                strings: 'battle_strings',
                brass: 'battle_brass'
            },
            bpm: 140
        });
        
        this.audioManager.registerSound('forest_theme', {
            type: 'music',
            volume: 0.6
        });
        
        // SFX
        this.audioManager.registerSound('sword_swing', {
            type: 'sfx',
            volume: 0.7,
            poolSize: 3,
            priority: 5
        });
        
        this.audioManager.registerSound('footstep_grass_1', {
            type: 'sfx',
            volume: 0.4,
            poolSize: 5
        });
        
        // Ambient
        this.audioManager.registerSound('forest_birds', {
            type: 'ambient',
            volume: 0.6
        });
        
        this.audioManager.registerSound('forest_wind', {
            type: 'ambient',
            volume: 0.4
        });
        
        // Voice
        this.audioManager.registerSound('npc_greeting', {
            type: 'voice',
            subtitle: 'Hello, traveler! Welcome to our village.'
        });
    }
    
    setupAudioZones() {
        // Forest zone
        this.audioManager.ambientManager.addZone({
            bounds: new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(0, 0, 1000, 1000),
            sounds: [
                { key: 'forest_birds', volume: 0.6 },
                { key: 'forest_wind', volume: 0.4 }
            ],
            priority: 1
        });
        
        // Cave zone
        this.audioManager.ambientManager.addZone({
            bounds: new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(1000, 1000, 500, 500),
            sounds: [
                { key: 'dungeon_drips', volume: 0.5 },
                { key: 'dungeon_echo', volume: 0.3 }
            ],
            onEnter: () => {
                console.log('Entered cave');
                this.audioManager.transitionMusic('dungeon_theme', 2000);
            },
            onExit: () => {
                console.log('Exited cave');
                this.audioManager.transitionMusic('forest_theme', 2000);
            },
            priority: 2
        });
    }
    
    setupPlayer() {
        // Footstep sounds
        this.player.on('step', (surface) => {
            const preset = AUDIO_PRESETS.footsteps;
            const surfaceSounds = preset.surfaces[surface] || preset.surfaces.grass;
            
            this.audioManager.sfxManager.playVariant(
                'footstep_grass',
                surfaceSounds.length,
                { volume: preset.volume }
            );
        });
        
        // Attack sounds
        this.player.on('attack', () => {
            this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('sword_swing');
        });
    }
    
    setupUIAudio() {
        // Button sounds
        this.ui.buttons.forEach(button => {
            button.on('pointerover', () => {
                this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('ui_hover');
            });
            
            button.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('ui_click');
            });
        });
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        // Update audio manager
        this.audioManager.update(delta);
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 2: Combat with Adaptive Music
 */
class CombatController {
    constructor(scene, audioManager) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.inCombat = false;
    }
    
    startCombat(enemies) {
        this.inCombat = true;
        
        // Start battle music
        this.audioManager.playMusic('battle_theme', {
            layers: {
                base: { volume: 1.0 },
                percussion: { volume: 0.0 },
                strings: { volume: 0.0 },
                brass: { volume: 0.0 }
            }
        });
        
        // Gradually increase intensity
        this.scene.tweens.addCounter({
            from: 0.2,
            to: 0.6,
            duration: 2000,
            onUpdate: (tween) => {
                const intensity = tween.getValue();
                this.audioManager.setMusicIntensity(intensity);
            }
        });
    }
    
    onPlayerDamaged() {
        // Play hurt sound
        this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('player_hurt', {
            volume: 0.8
        });
        
        // Brief music intensity spike
        const currentIntensity = this.audioManager.musicManager.intensity;
        this.audioManager.setMusicIntensity(Math.min(currentIntensity + 0.2, 1.0));
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(500, () => {
            this.audioManager.setMusicIntensity(currentIntensity);
        });
    }
    
    onEnemyKilled() {
        // Play kill sound
        this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('enemy_death');
        
        // Check remaining enemies
        const remainingEnemies = this.getRemainingEnemies();
        
        // Adjust intensity based on threat
        const threatLevel = remainingEnemies.length / 10; // Assume max 10 enemies
        this.audioManager.setMusicIntensity(0.3 + threatLevel * 0.5);
    }
    
    endCombat(victory) {
        this.inCombat = false;
        
        if (victory) {
            // Play victory fanfare
            this.audioManager.startDucking({ music: 0.2 });
            this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('victory_fanfare');
            
            this.scene.time.delayedCall(3000, () => {
                this.audioManager.stopDucking();
                this.audioManager.transitionMusic('forest_theme', 2000);
            });
        } else {
            // Player died
            this.audioManager.stopMusic(2000);
            this.audioManager.sfxManager.playSequence([
                'player_death',
                'game_over_sting'
            ], 1000);
        }
    }
    
    getRemainingEnemies() {
        // Implementation specific to your game
        return [];
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 3: Boss Battle with Phase-Based Music
 */
class BossBattle {
    constructor(scene, audioManager, boss) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.boss = boss;
        
        this.currentPhase = 0;
        this.phases = [
            { healthPercent: 1.0, intensity: 0.6 },
            { healthPercent: 0.7, intensity: 0.75 },
            { healthPercent: 0.4, intensity: 0.9 },
            { healthPercent: 0.15, intensity: 1.0 }
        ];
    }
    
    start() {
        // Boss entrance
        this.scene.cameras.main.shake(500, 0.01);
        
        // Spatial roar
        this.audioManager.playSpatialSound(
            'boss_roar',
            this.boss.x,
            this.boss.y,
            {
                maxDistance: 800,
                rolloffFactor: 1.5
            }
        );
        
        // Start boss music
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(2000, () => {
            this.audioManager.playMusic('boss_theme', {
                layers: {
                    base: { volume: 1.0 },
                    drums: { volume: 0.8 },
                    choir: { volume: 0.0 },
                    orchestra: { volume: 0.0 }
                }
            });
            
            this.audioManager.setMusicIntensity(0.6);
        });
    }
    
    update() {
        const healthPercent = this.boss.health / this.boss.maxHealth;
        
        // Check for phase transition
        const nextPhase = this.phases.findIndex(phase => 
            healthPercent <= phase.healthPercent && this.currentPhase < this.phases.indexOf(phase)
        );
        
        if (nextPhase !== -1 && nextPhase > this.currentPhase) {
            this.enterPhase(nextPhase);
        }
    }
    
    enterPhase(phaseIndex) {
        this.currentPhase = phaseIndex;
        const phase = this.phases[phaseIndex];
        
        console.log(`Boss entered phase ${phaseIndex + 1}`);
        
        // Visual effects
        this.scene.cameras.main.shake(300, 0.015);
        this.scene.cameras.main.flash(200, 255, 255, 255);
        
        // Audio effects
        this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('boss_phase_transition', {
            volume: 1.0
        });
        
        // Increase music intensity
        this.scene.tweens.addCounter({
            from: this.audioManager.musicManager.intensity,
            to: phase.intensity,
            duration: 1500,
            onUpdate: (tween) => {
                this.audioManager.setMusicIntensity(tween.getValue());
            }
        });
    }
    
    defeat() {
        // Epic victory sequence
        this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('boss_death', { volume: 1.0 });
        
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(1000, () => {
            this.audioManager.stopMusic(3000);
            
            this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('victory_epic', {
                volume: 0.9
            });
        });
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 4: Dialogue System Integration
 */
class DialogueController {
    constructor(scene, audioManager) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
    }
    
    startDialogue(npc, conversation) {
        // Duck background audio
        this.audioManager.startDucking({
            music: 0.3,
            sfx: 0.5,
            ambient: 0.4
        });
        
        // Play conversation
        this.audioManager.voiceManager.playConversation(
            conversation.lines.map(line => ({
                key: line.voiceKey,
                text: line.text
            })),
            {
                onComplete: () => {
                    this.endDialogue();
                }
            }
        );
    }
    
    endDialogue() {
        // Restore audio levels
        this.audioManager.stopDucking(1000);
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 5: Environmental Audio Triggers
 */
class EnvironmentalAudio {
    constructor(scene, audioManager) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        
        this.setupTriggers();
    }
    
    setupTriggers() {
        // Waterfall trigger
        this.addTrigger(
            new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(500, 300, 200, 200),
            () => {
                this.audioManager.playSpatialSound(
                    'waterfall',
                    600,
                    400,
                    {
                        maxDistance: 400,
                        rolloffFactor: 2.0,
                        cone: {
                            angle: Math.PI / 2,
                            outerAngle: Math.PI,
                            outerGain: 0.3
                        }
                    }
                );
            }
        );
        
        // Campfire trigger
        this.addTrigger(
            new Phaser.Geom.Circle(800, 600, 100),
            () => {
                this.audioManager.playSpatialSound(
                    'campfire',
                    800,
                    600,
                    {
                        maxDistance: 200,
                        rolloffFactor: 1.5
                    }
                );
            }
        );
    }
    
    addTrigger(area, callback) {
        // Implementation specific to your trigger system
    }
}

/**
 * EXAMPLE 6: Dynamic Weather Audio
 */
class WeatherAudioController {
    constructor(scene, audioManager) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.audioManager = audioManager;
        this.currentWeather = 'clear';
    }
    
    setWeather(weatherType, intensity = 1.0) {
        // Stop current weather
        this.stopCurrentWeather();
        
        this.currentWeather = weatherType;
        
        switch (weatherType) {
            case 'rain':
                this.startRain(intensity);
                break;
                
            case 'storm':
                this.startStorm(intensity);
                break;
                
            case 'snow':
                this.startSnow(intensity);
                break;
        }
    }
    
    startRain(intensity) {
        this.audioManager.ambientManager.play('rain_ambient', {
            volume: 0.5 * intensity,
            fadeIn: 2000
        });
        
        // Random thunder
        this.thunderTimer = this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: Phaser.Math.Between(5000, 15000),
            callback: () => {
                this.audioManager.sfxManager.play('thunder', {
                    volume: 0.7 * intensity
                });
            },
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    startStorm(intensity) {
        this.startRain(intensity);
        
        this.audioManager.ambientManager.play('wind_strong', {
            volume: 0.6 * intensity,
            fadeIn: 2000
        });
        
        // More frequent thunder
        if (this.thunderTimer) {
            this.thunderTimer.delay = Phaser.Math.Between(3000, 8000);
        }
    }
    
    startSnow(intensity) {
        this.audioManager.ambientManager.play('wind_gentle', {
            volume: 0.4 * intensity,
            fadeIn: 3000
        });
    }
    
    stopCurrentWeather() {
        if (this.thunderTimer) {
            this.thunderTimer.remove();
            this.thunderTimer = null;
        }
        
        this.audioManager.ambientManager.stopAll(2000);
    }
}

export {
    GameScene,
    CombatController,
    BossBattle,
    DialogueController,
    EnvironmentalAudio,
    WeatherAudioController
};

Step 1: Core Dialogue System
javascript
// systems/AdvancedDialogueSystem.js

class AdvancedDialogueSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Conversation data
        this.conversations = new Map();
        this.characters = new Map();
        
        // Current state
        this.active = false;
        this.currentConversation = null;
        this.currentNode = null;
        this.conversationStack = []; // For nested conversations
        
        // Dialogue state (flags, variables)
        this.flags = new Map();
        this.variables = new Map();
        
        // Relationship tracking
        this.relationships = new Map();
        
        // Conversation history
        this.history = [];
        this.seenNodes = new Set();
        
        // UI components
        this.ui = null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: true,
            
            // Auto-advance
            autoAdvance: false,
            autoAdvanceDelay: 2000,
            
            // Skip settings
            allowSkip: true,
            skipSpeed: 5, // Multiplier for typewriter
            
            // History
            maxHistoryLength: 100,
            trackSeenDialogue: true,
            
            // Input
            continueKeys: ['SPACE', 'ENTER'],
            skipKey: 'CTRL',
            
            // Callbacks
            onConversationStart: null,
            onConversationEnd: null,
            onNodeChange: null,
            onChoiceMade: null
        };
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Create UI
        this.ui = new DialogueUI(this);
        
        // Set up input
        this.setupInput();
        
        console.log('[DialogueSystem] Initialized');
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // Continue dialogue
        this.config.continueKeys.forEach(keyName => {
            const key = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey(keyName);
            
            key.on('down', () => {
                if (this.active && !this.ui.showingChoices) {
                    this.continue();
                }
            });
        });
        
        // Skip key
        const skipKey = this.scene.input.keyboard.addKey(this.config.skipKey);
        this.skipKeyDown = false;
        
        skipKey.on('down', () => {
            this.skipKeyDown = true;
        });
        
        skipKey.on('up', () => {
            this.skipKeyDown = false;
        });
    }
    
    // === CONVERSATION MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Register a conversation
     */
    registerConversation(key, conversation) {
        const conv = {
            key: key,
            nodes: new Map(),
            startNode: conversation.startNode || 'start',
            metadata: conversation.metadata || {}
        };
        
        // Register all nodes
        if (conversation.nodes) {
            Object.entries(conversation.nodes).forEach(([nodeKey, nodeData]) => {
                conv.nodes.set(nodeKey, this.createNode(nodeKey, nodeData));
            });
        }
        
        this.conversations.set(key, conv);
        
        return conv;
    }
    
    /**
     * Create dialogue node
     */
    createNode(key, data) {
        return {
            key: key,
            
            // Content
            speaker: data.speaker || null,
            text: data.text || '',
            portrait: data.portrait || null,
            emotion: data.emotion || 'neutral',
            
            // Voice
            voice: data.voice || null,
            
            // Choices
            choices: data.choices || null,
            
            // Flow control
            next: data.next || null,
            
            // Conditions
            condition: data.condition || null,
            
            // Effects
            effects: data.effects || {},
            
            // Actions (code to execute)
            onEnter: data.onEnter || null,
            onExit: data.onExit || null,
            
            // Flags/Variables to set
            setFlags: data.setFlags || {},
            setVariables: data.setVariables || {},
            
            // Metadata
            tags: data.tags || [],
            once: data.once || false // Only show once
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Start a conversation
     */
    startConversation(conversationKey, options = {}) {
        const conversation = this.conversations.get(conversationKey);
        
        if (!conversation) {
            console.warn(`[DialogueSystem] Conversation not found: ${conversationKey}`);
            return false;
        }
        
        // Store current conversation if starting nested
        if (this.currentConversation) {
            this.conversationStack.push({
                conversation: this.currentConversation,
                node: this.currentNode
            });
        }
        
        this.currentConversation = conversation;
        this.active = true;
        
        // Show UI
        this.ui.show();
        
        // Go to start node
        const startNodeKey = options.startNode || conversation.startNode;
        this.goToNode(startNodeKey);
        
        // Callback
        if (this.config.onConversationStart) {
            this.config.onConversationStart(conversationKey);
        }
        
        // Pause game if needed
        if (options.pauseGame !== false) {
            this.scene.scene.pause();
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * End current conversation
     */
    endConversation() {
        if (!this.active) return;
        
        // Callback
        if (this.config.onConversationEnd && this.currentConversation) {
            this.config.onConversationEnd(this.currentConversation.key);
        }
        
        // Check for nested conversation
        if (this.conversationStack.length > 0) {
            const previous = this.conversationStack.pop();
            this.currentConversation = previous.conversation;
            this.currentNode = previous.node;
            
            // Continue from where we left off
            this.goToNode(this.currentNode.key);
        } else {
            // Fully end
            this.active = false;
            this.currentConversation = null;
            this.currentNode = null;
            
            // Hide UI
            this.ui.hide();
            
            // Resume game
            this.scene.scene.resume();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Go to specific dialogue node
     */
    goToNode(nodeKey) {
        if (!this.currentConversation) return false;
        
        const node = this.currentConversation.nodes.get(nodeKey);
        
        if (!node) {
            console.warn(`[DialogueSystem] Node not found: ${nodeKey}`);
            this.endConversation();
            return false;
        }
        
        // Check if node should only show once
        if (node.once && this.seenNodes.has(nodeKey)) {
            // Skip to next node
            if (node.next) {
                return this.goToNode(node.next);
            } else {
                this.endConversation();
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        // Check conditions
        if (node.condition && !this.evaluateCondition(node.condition)) {
            // Skip to next node
            if (node.next) {
                return this.goToNode(node.next);
            } else {
                this.endConversation();
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        // Exit previous node
        if (this.currentNode && this.currentNode.onExit) {
            this.currentNode.onExit(this);
        }
        
        // Set current node
        this.currentNode = node;
        
        // Track seen
        if (this.config.trackSeenDialogue) {
            this.seenNodes.add(nodeKey);
        }
        
        // Add to history
        this.addToHistory(node);
        
        // Apply effects
        this.applyNodeEffects(node);
        
        // Enter node
        if (node.onEnter) {
            node.onEnter(this);
        }
        
        // Display node
        this.displayNode(node);
        
        // Callback
        if (this.config.onNodeChange) {
            this.config.onNodeChange(node);
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    /**
     * Display dialogue node
     */
    displayNode(node) {
        // Get character info
        const character = node.speaker ? this.characters.get(node.speaker) : null;
        
        // Process text (substitute variables)
        const processedText = this.processText(node.text);
        
        // Display in UI
        this.ui.displayNode({
            speaker: character?.name || node.speaker || '',
            text: processedText,
            portrait: this.getPortrait(node),
            emotion: node.emotion,
            voice: node.voice,
            choices: node.choices,
            effects: node.effects
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Continue to next node
     */
    continue() {
        if (!this.currentNode) return;
        
        // Check if text is still typing
        if (this.ui.isTyping()) {
            this.ui.completeTyping();
            return;
        }
        
        // Check if showing choices
        if (this.ui.showingChoices) {
            return; // Wait for choice
        }
        
        // Go to next node
        if (this.currentNode.next) {
            this.goToNode(this.currentNode.next);
        } else {
            // No next node, end conversation
            this.endConversation();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Make a choice
     */
    makeChoice(choiceIndex) {
        if (!this.currentNode || !this.currentNode.choices) return;
        
        const choice = this.currentNode.choices[choiceIndex];
        
        if (!choice) return;
        
        // Check choice condition
        if (choice.condition && !this.evaluateCondition(choice.condition)) {
            console.warn('[DialogueSystem] Choice condition not met');
            return;
        }
        
        // Apply choice effects
        if (choice.setFlags) {
            Object.entries(choice.setFlags).forEach(([flag, value]) => {
                this.setFlag(flag, value);
            });
        }
        
        if (choice.setVariables) {
            Object.entries(choice.setVariables).forEach(([variable, value]) => {
                this.setVariable(variable, value);
            });
        }
        
        // Affect relationship
        if (choice.affectsRelationship && this.currentNode.speaker) {
            this.adjustRelationship(
                this.currentNode.speaker,
                choice.affectsRelationship
            );
        }
        
        // Execute action
        if (choice.action) {
            choice.action(this);
        }
        
        // Callback
        if (this.config.onChoiceMade) {
            this.config.onChoiceMade(choice, choiceIndex);
        }
        
        // Go to next node
        if (choice.next) {
            this.goToNode(choice.next);
        } else if (this.currentNode.next) {
            this.goToNode(this.currentNode.next);
        } else {
            this.endConversation();
        }
    }
    
    // === TEXT PROCESSING ===
    
    /**
     * Process text (variable substitution, etc.)
     */
    processText(text) {
        // Replace variables {variableName}
        return text.replace(/\{(\w+)\}/g, (match, varName) => {
            return this.getVariable(varName) || match;
        });
    }
    
    // === CONDITIONS ===
    
    /**
     * Evaluate a condition
     */
    evaluateCondition(condition) {
        if (typeof condition === 'function') {
            return condition(this);
        }
        
        if (typeof condition === 'object') {
            // Check flags
            if (condition.flags) {
                for (const [flag, value] of Object.entries(condition.flags)) {
                    if (this.getFlag(flag) !== value) {
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Check variables
            if (condition.variables) {
                for (const [variable, check] of Object.entries(condition.variables)) {
                    const varValue = this.getVariable(variable);
                    
                    if (!this.checkVariableCondition(varValue, check)) {
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Check relationships
            if (condition.relationships) {
                for (const [character, check] of Object.entries(condition.relationships)) {
                    const relationship = this.getRelationship(character);
                    
                    if (!this.checkVariableCondition(relationship, check)) {
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            return true;
        }
        
        return Boolean(condition);
    }
    
    /**
     * Check variable condition
     */
    checkVariableCondition(value, check) {
        if (typeof check === 'object') {
            if (check.equals !== undefined) return value === check.equals;
            if (check.notEquals !== undefined) return value !== check.notEquals;
            if (check.greaterThan !== undefined) return value > check.greaterThan;
            if (check.lessThan !== undefined) return value < check.lessThan;
            if (check.greaterOrEqual !== undefined) return value >= check.greaterOrEqual;
            if (check.lessOrEqual !== undefined) return value <= check.lessOrEqual;
            if (check.contains !== undefined) return value?.includes(check.contains);
        }
        
        return value === check;
    }
    
    // === NODE EFFECTS ===
    
    /**
     * Apply node effects
     */
    applyNodeEffects(node) {
        // Set flags
        if (node.setFlags) {
            Object.entries(node.setFlags).forEach(([flag, value]) => {
                this.setFlag(flag, value);
            });
        }
        
        // Set variables
        if (node.setVariables) {
            Object.entries(node.setVariables).forEach(([variable, value]) => {
                this.setVariable(variable, value);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // === FLAGS & VARIABLES ===
    
    setFlag(flag, value) {
        this.flags.set(flag, value);
    }
    
    getFlag(flag) {
        return this.flags.get(flag) || false;
    }
    
    setVariable(variable, value) {
        this.variables.set(variable, value);
    }
    
    getVariable(variable) {
        return this.variables.get(variable);
    }
    
    // === RELATIONSHIPS ===
    
    /**
     * Set relationship value
     */
    setRelationship(character, value) {
        this.relationships.set(character, value);
    }
    
    /**
     * Get relationship value
     */
    getRelationship(character) {
        return this.relationships.get(character) || 0;
    }
    
    /**
     * Adjust relationship
     */
    adjustRelationship(character, amount) {
        const current = this.getRelationship(character);
        this.setRelationship(character, current + amount);
    }
    
    // === CHARACTERS ===
    
    /**
     * Register a character
     */
    registerCharacter(key, data) {
        const character = {
            key: key,
            name: data.name || key,
            
            // Portraits
            portraits: data.portraits || {},
            defaultPortrait: data.defaultPortrait || null,
            
            // Voice
            voice: data.voice || null,
            
            // Personality
            personality: data.personality || {},
            
            // Initial relationship
            initialRelationship: data.initialRelationship || 0
        };
        
        this.characters.set(key, character);
        
        // Set initial relationship
        if (!this.relationships.has(key)) {
            this.relationships.set(key, character.initialRelationship);
        }
        
        return character;
    }
    
    /**
     * Get portrait for node
     */
    getPortrait(node) {
        if (!node.speaker) return null;
        
        const character = this.characters.get(node.speaker);
        if (!character) return null;
        
        // Use specified portrait or emotion-based
        const portraitKey = node.portrait || node.emotion || character.defaultPortrait;
        
        return character.portraits[portraitKey] || character.portraits[character.defaultPortrait];
    }
    
    // === HISTORY ===
    
    /**
     * Add to conversation history
     */
    addToHistory(node) {
        this.history.push({
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            conversation: this.currentConversation?.key,
            nodeKey: node.key,
            speaker: node.speaker,
            text: node.text
        });
        
        // Limit history length
        if (this.history.length > this.config.maxHistoryLength) {
            this.history.shift();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Get conversation history
     */
    getHistory(limit = 10) {
        return this.history.slice(-limit);
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        if (!this.active) return;
        
        // Update UI
        this.ui.update(delta);
        
        // Handle skip
        if (this.skipKeyDown && this.config.allowSkip) {
            this.ui.setTypewriterSpeed(this.config.skipSpeed);
        } else {
            this.ui.setTypewriterSpeed(1);
        }
        
        // Auto-advance
        if (this.config.autoAdvance && !this.ui.showingChoices && !this.ui.isTyping()) {
            // Start timer if not already
            if (!this.autoAdvanceTimer) {
                this.autoAdvanceTimer = this.scene.time.delayedCall(
                    this.config.autoAdvanceDelay,
                    () => {
                        this.continue();
                        this.autoAdvanceTimer = null;
                    }
                );
            }
        } else {
            // Cancel auto-advance timer
            if (this.autoAdvanceTimer) {
                this.autoAdvanceTimer.remove();
                this.autoAdvanceTimer = null;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === UTILITY ===
    
    /**
     * Export dialogue state
     */
    exportState() {
        return {
            flags: Array.from(this.flags.entries()),
            variables: Array.from(this.variables.entries()),
            relationships: Array.from(this.relationships.entries()),
            seenNodes: Array.from(this.seenNodes),
            history: this.history
        };
    }
    
    /**
     * Import dialogue state
     */
    importState(state) {
        this.flags = new Map(state.flags || []);
        this.variables = new Map(state.variables || []);
        this.relationships = new Map(state.relationships || []);
        this.seenNodes = new Set(state.seenNodes || []);
        this.history = state.history || [];
    }
    
    /**
     * Shutdown dialogue system
     */
    shutdown() {
        if (this.active) {
            this.endConversation();
        }
        
        this.ui.destroy();
    }
}

export default AdvancedDialogueSystem;
Step 2: Dialogue UI System
javascript
// systems/DialogueUI.js

class DialogueUI {
    constructor(dialogueSystem) {
        this.system = dialogueSystem;
        this.scene = dialogueSystem.scene;
        
        // UI elements
        this.container = null;
        this.dialogueBox = null;
        this.speakerNameText = null;
        this.dialogueText = null;
        this.portraitImage = null;
        this.continuePrompt = null;
        this.choiceButtons = [];
        
        // Typewriter state
        this.typewriter = {
            active: false,
            text: '',
            currentIndex: 0,
            speed: 50, // ms per character
            speedMultiplier: 1,
            sound: null,
            timer: null
        };
        
        // State
        this.visible = false;
        this.showingChoices = false;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            // Positioning
            x: 0,
            y: 500,
            width: 800,
            height: 150,
            
            // Speaker name
            speakerNameY: -20,
            
            // Portrait
            portraitX: -350,
            portraitY: -75,
            portraitSize: 100,
            
            // Text
            textPadding: 20,
            textStyle: {
                font: '18px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff',
                wordWrap: { width: 700 }
            },
            
            // Continue prompt
            continuePromptX: 370,
            continuePromptY: 55,
            
            // Choices
            choiceButtonWidth: 700,
            choiceButtonHeight: 50,
            choiceButtonSpacing: 10,
            choiceButtonY: -200
        };
        
        // Create UI
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        // Create container
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(
            this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            this.scene.scale.height - this.config.height / 2 - 20
        );
        
        this.container.setDepth(10000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        // Dialogue box background
        this.dialogueBox = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.config.width,
            this.config.height,
            0x000000,
            0.85
        );
        
        this.container.add(this.dialogueBox);
        
        // Dialogue box border
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.config.width,
            this.config.height
        );
        border.setStrokeStyle(3, 0xffffff, 0.8);
        this.container.add(border);
        
        // Speaker name background
        this.speakerNameBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            -this.config.width / 2 + 100,
            this.config.speakerNameY,
            200, 30,
            0x444444, 0.9
        );
        this.container.add(this.speakerNameBg);
        
        // Speaker name text
        this.speakerNameText = this.scene.add.text(
            -this.config.width / 2 + 100,
            this.config.speakerNameY,
            '',
            {
                font: 'bold 16px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            }
        );
        this.speakerNameText.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(this.speakerNameText);
        
        // Portrait
        this.portraitBg = this.scene.add.circle(
            this.config.portraitX,
            this.config.portraitY,
            this.config.portraitSize / 2,
            0x222222
        );
        this.container.add(this.portraitBg);
        
        this.portraitImage = this.scene.add.image(
            this.config.portraitX,
            this.config.portraitY,
            ''
        );
        this.portraitImage.setDisplaySize(
            this.config.portraitSize,
            this.config.portraitSize
        );
        this.container.add(this.portraitImage);
        
        // Dialogue text
        this.dialogueText = this.scene.add.text(
            -this.config.width / 2 + this.config.textPadding + 120,
            -this.config.height / 2 + this.config.textPadding,
            '',
            this.config.textStyle
        );
        this.dialogueText.setOrigin(0, 0);
        this.container.add(this.dialogueText);
        
        // Continue prompt (animated arrow)
        this.continuePrompt = this.scene.add.text(
            this.config.continuePromptX,
            this.config.continuePromptY,
            '▼',
            {
                font: '24px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            }
        );
        this.continuePrompt.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.continuePrompt.setVisible(false);
        this.container.add(this.continuePrompt);
        
        // Animate continue prompt
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.continuePrompt,
            y: this.config.continuePromptY + 5,
            duration: 500,
            yoyo: true,
            repeat: -1,
            ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
        });
    }
    
    // === DISPLAY ===
    
    /**
     * Display dialogue node
     */
    displayNode(data) {
        // Set speaker name
        this.speakerNameText.setText(data.speaker || '');
        
        // Set portrait
        if (data.portrait) {
            this.portraitImage.setTexture(data.portrait);
            this.portraitImage.setVisible(true);
            this.portraitBg.setVisible(true);
        } else {
            this.portraitImage.setVisible(false);
            this.portraitBg.setVisible(false);
        }
        
        // Display text with typewriter
        this.startTypewriter(data.text, data.effects);
        
        // Play voice
        if (data.voice && this.scene.audioManager) {
            this.scene.audioManager.voiceManager.play(data.voice);
        }
        
        // Hide continue prompt until typing done
        this.continuePrompt.setVisible(false);
        
        // Show/hide choices
        if (data.choices) {
            this.showChoices(data.choices);
        } else {
            this.hideChoices();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Show UI
     */
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
        this.visible = true;
        
        // Fade in
        this.container.setAlpha(0);
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.container,
            alpha: 1,
            duration: 300,
            ease: 'Sine.easeOut'
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Hide UI
     */
    hide() {
        // Fade out
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.container,
            alpha: 0,
            duration: 300,
            ease: 'Sine.easeIn',
            onComplete: () => {
                this.container.setVisible(false);
                this.visible = false;
            }
        });
    }
    
    // === TYPEWRITER EFFECT ===
    
    /**
     * Start typewriter effect
     */
    startTypewriter(text, effects = {}) {
        this.typewriter.active = true;
        this.typewriter.text = text;
        this.typewriter.currentIndex = 0;
        this.typewriter.speed = effects.typewriter?.speed || 50;
        this.typewriter.sound = effects.typewriter?.sound || null;
        
        // Clear existing text
        this.dialogueText.setText('');
        
        // Start typing
        this.typeNextCharacter();
    }
    
    /**
     * Type next character
     */
    typeNextCharacter() {
        if (!this.typewriter.active) return;
        
        if (this.typewriter.currentIndex >= this.typewriter.text.length) {
            // Typing complete
            this.completeTyping();
            return;
        }
        
        // Add next character
        const char = this.typewriter.text[this.typewriter.currentIndex];
        this.dialogueText.setText(
            this.dialogueText.text + char
        );
        
        this.typewriter.currentIndex++;
        
        // Play typing sound
        if (this.typewriter.sound && this.scene.audioManager) {
            this.scene.audioManager.sfxManager.play(this.typewriter.sound, {
                volume: 0.3
            });
        }
        
        // Schedule next character
        const delay = this.typewriter.speed / this.typewriter.speedMultiplier;
        
        this.typewriter.timer = this.scene.time.delayedCall(delay, () => {
            this.typeNextCharacter();
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Complete typing immediately
     */
    completeTyping() {
        this.typewriter.active = false;
        
        if (this.typewriter.timer) {
            this.typewriter.timer.remove();
            this.typewriter.timer = null;
        }
        
        // Show full text
        this.dialogueText.setText(this.typewriter.text);
        
        // Show continue prompt if no choices
        if (!this.showingChoices) {
            this.continuePrompt.setVisible(true);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Check if typewriter is active
     */
    isTyping() {
        return this.typewriter.active;
    }
    
    /**
     * Set typewriter speed multiplier
     */
    setTypewriterSpeed(multiplier) {
        this.typewriter.speedMultiplier = multiplier;
    }
    
    // === CHOICES ===
    
    /**
     * Show player choices
     */
    showChoices(choices) {
        this.hideChoices();
        
        this.showingChoices = true;
        
        const startY = this.config.choiceButtonY;
        
        choices.forEach((choice, index) => {
            // Check if choice is available
            const available = !choice.condition || 
                this.system.evaluateCondition(choice.condition);
            
            const button = this.createChoiceButton(
                0,
                startY + index * (this.config.choiceButtonHeight + this.config.choiceButtonSpacing),
                choice.text,
                index,
                available
            );
            
            this.choiceButtons.push(button);
            this.container.add(button);
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Create choice button
     */
    createChoiceButton(x, y, text, index, available) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.config.choiceButtonWidth,
            this.config.choiceButtonHeight,
            available ? 0x444444 : 0x222222,
            0.9
        );
        container.add(bg);
        
        // Border
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.config.choiceButtonWidth,
            this.config.choiceButtonHeight
        );
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, available ? 0xffffff : 0x666666, 0.8);
        container.add(border);
        
        // Text
        const buttonText = this.scene.add.text(
            0, 0,
            text,
            {
                font: '16px Arial',
                fill: available ? '#ffffff' : '#888888',
                align: 'center',
                wordWrap: { width: this.config.choiceButtonWidth - 40 }
            }
        );
        buttonText.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(buttonText);
        
        // Make interactive if available
        if (available) {
            bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            bg.on('pointerover', () => {
                bg.setFillStyle(0x666666, 0.9);
                
                // Hover sound
                if (this.scene.audioManager) {
                    this.scene.audioManager.sfxManager.play('ui_hover');
                }
            });
            
            bg.on('pointerout', () => {
                bg.setFillStyle(0x444444, 0.9);
            });
            
            bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
                // Click sound
                if (this.scene.audioManager) {
                    this.scene.audioManager.sfxManager.play('ui_click');
                }
                
                this.system.makeChoice(index);
            });
        }
        
        return container;
    }
    
    /**
     * Hide choices
     */
    hideChoices() {
        this.choiceButtons.forEach(button => {
            button.destroy();
        });
        
        this.choiceButtons = [];
        this.showingChoices = false;
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        // Update animations, etc.
    }
    
    // === CLEANUP ===
    
    destroy() {
        if (this.typewriter.timer) {
            this.typewriter.timer.remove();
        }
        
        this.hideChoices();
        
        if (this.container) {
            this.container.destroy();
        }
    }
}

export default DialogueUI;
