Step 3: Rich Text & Effects System
javascript
// systems/RichTextSystem.js

class RichTextSystem {
    /**
     * Parse rich text tags and apply effects
     * Supports: {color=#ff0000}red text{/color}, {wave}wavy{/wave}, {shake}shaky{/shake}
     */
    static parseRichText(text) {
        const segments = [];
        let currentIndex = 0;
        
        const tagRegex = /\{(\w+)(?:=([^}]+))?\}(.*?)\{\/\1\}/g;
        let match;
        
        while ((match = tagRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
            // Add text before tag
            if (match.index > currentIndex) {
                segments.push({
                    text: text.substring(currentIndex, match.index),
                    effects: []
                });
            }
            
            // Add tagged text
            segments.push({
                text: match[3],
                effects: [{
                    type: match[1],
                    value: match[2]
                }]
            });
            
            currentIndex = match.index + match[0].length;
        }
        
        // Add remaining text
        if (currentIndex < text.length) {
            segments.push({
                text: text.substring(currentIndex),
                effects: []
            });
        }
        
        return segments;
    }
    
    /**
     * Create animated text with effects
     */
    static createAnimatedText(scene, x, y, segments, style) {
        const container = scene.add.container(x, y);
        let offsetX = 0;
        
        segments.forEach(segment => {
            const textObj = scene.add.text(offsetX, 0, segment.text, style);
            
            // Apply effects
            segment.effects.forEach(effect => {
                switch (effect.type) {
                    case 'color':
                        textObj.setColor(effect.value);
                        break;
                        
                    case 'wave':
                        RichTextSystem.applyWaveEffect(scene, textObj);
                        break;
                        
                    case 'shake':
                        RichTextSystem.applyShakeEffect(scene, textObj);
                        break;
                        
                    case 'rainbow':
                        RichTextSystem.applyRainbowEffect(scene, textObj);
                        break;
                }
            });
            
            container.add(textObj);
            offsetX += textObj.width;
        });
        
        return container;
    }
    
    static applyWaveEffect(scene, textObj) {
        const originalY = textObj.y;
        
        scene.tweens.add({
            targets: textObj,
            y: originalY + 5,
            duration: 1000,
            yoyo: true,
            repeat: -1,
            ease: 'Sine.easeInOut'
        });
    }
    
    static applyShakeEffect(scene, textObj) {
        scene.tweens.add({
            targets: textObj,
            x: textObj.x + Phaser.Math.Between(-2, 2),
            y: textObj.y + Phaser.Math.Between(-2, 2),
            duration: 50,
            repeat: -1,
            yoyo: true
        });
    }
    
    static applyRainbowEffect(scene, textObj) {
        let hue = 0;
        
        scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: 100,
            callback: () => {
                hue = (hue + 10) % 360;
                const color = Phaser.Display.Color.HSVToRGB(hue / 360, 1, 1);
                textObj.setColor(`#${color.color.toString(16).padStart(6, '0')}`);
            },
            loop: true
        });
    }
}

export default RichTextSystem;

/**
 * Dialogue preset manager
 */
class DialoguePresetManager {
    constructor(dialogueSystem) {
        this.system = dialogueSystem;
        this.presets = { ...DIALOGUE_PRESETS };
    }
    
    /**
     * Load preset conversation
     */
    loadPreset(presetName) {
        const preset = this.presets[presetName];
        
        if (!preset) {
            console.warn(`[DialoguePresets] Unknown preset: ${presetName}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        return this.system.registerConversation(presetName, preset);
    }
    
    /**
     * Load all presets
     */
    loadAllPresets() {
        Object.keys(this.presets).forEach(presetName => {
            this.loadPreset(presetName);
        });
    }
}

export { DIALOGUE_PRESETS, DialoguePresetManager };

javascript
// examples/dialogueSystemExample.js

import AdvancedDialogueSystem from '../systems/AdvancedDialogueSystem.js';
import { DialoguePresetManager } from '../configs/dialoguePresets.js';

class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize dialogue system
        this.dialogueSystem = new AdvancedDialogueSystem(this);
        
        // Load presets
        const presetManager = new DialoguePresetManager(this.dialogueSystem);
        presetManager.loadAllPresets();
        
        // Register characters
        this.registerCharacters();
        
        // Set up NPCs
        this.setupNPCs();
        
        // Set initial variables
        this.dialogueSystem.setVariable('playerName', 'Hero');
        this.dialogueSystem.setVariable('gold', 100);
    }
    
    registerCharacters() {
        this.dialogueSystem.registerCharacter('merchant', {
            name: 'Bob the Merchant',
            portraits: {
                happy: 'merchant_portrait_happy',
                neutral: 'merchant_portrait_neutral',
                sad: 'merchant_portrait_sad'
            },
            defaultPortrait: 'neutral',
            voice: 'merchant_voice',
            initialRelationship: 0
        });
        
        this.dialogueSystem.registerCharacter('quest_giver', {
            name: 'Captain Elena',
            portraits: {
                serious: 'captain_serious',
                happy: 'captain_happy',
                angry: 'captain_angry'
            },
            defaultPortrait: 'serious'
        });
    }
    
    setupNPCs() {
        // Create merchant NPC
        const merchant = this.add.sprite(400, 300, 'npc_merchant');
        merchant.setInteractive();
        
        merchant.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.dialogueSystem.startConversation('merchant_greeting');
        });
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        this.dialogueSystem.update(delta);
    }
}

export default GameScene;

Complete Implementation
javascript
// systems/QuestProgressionSystem.js

class QuestProgressionSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Quests
        this.quests = new Map();
        this.activeQuests = new Map();
        this.completedQuests = new Set();
        
        // Achievements
        this.achievements = new Map();
        this.unlockedAchievements = new Set();
        
        // Skill trees
        this.skillTrees = new Map();
        this.unlockedSkills = new Set();
        this.skillPoints = 0;
        
        // Player progression
        this.level = 1;
        this.experience = 0;
        this.experienceToNext = 100;
        
        // UI
        this.questUI = null;
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        console.log('[QuestProgressionSystem] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === QUEST MANAGEMENT ===
    
    createQuest(key, config) {
        const quest = {
            key: key,
            name: config.name,
            description: config.description,
            objectives: config.objectives.map(obj => ({
                ...obj,
                current: 0,
                completed: false
            })),
            rewards: config.rewards || {},
            prerequisites: config.prerequisites || [],
            unlocks: config.unlocks || [],
            onStart: config.onStart || null,
            onComplete: config.onComplete || null,
            onObjectiveComplete: config.onObjectiveComplete || null,
            status: 'locked'
        };
        
        this.quests.set(key, quest);
        return quest;
    }
    
    startQuest(key) {
        const quest = this.quests.get(key);
        if (!quest || quest.status === 'active') return false;
        
        // Check prerequisites
        if (!this.checkPrerequisites(quest.prerequisites)) {
            console.warn('[QuestSystem] Prerequisites not met');
            return false;
        }
        
        quest.status = 'active';
        this.activeQuests.set(key, quest);
        
        if (quest.onStart) quest.onStart(this);
        
        this.scene.events.emit('quest-started', quest);
        return true;
    }
    
    completeQuest(key) {
        const quest = this.activeQuests.get(key);
        if (!quest) return false;
        
        quest.status = 'completed';
        this.activeQuests.delete(key);
        this.completedQuests.add(key);
        
        // Grant rewards
        this.grantRewards(quest.rewards);
        
        // Unlock new quests
        quest.unlocks.forEach(unlockKey => {
            this.unlockQuest(unlockKey);
        });
        
        if (quest.onComplete) quest.onComplete(this);
        
        this.scene.events.emit('quest-completed', quest);
        return true;
    }
    
    trackObjective(questKey, objectiveIndex, progress = 1) {
        const quest = this.activeQuests.get(questKey);
        if (!quest) return;
        
        const objective = quest.objectives[objectiveIndex];
        if (!objective || objective.completed) return;
        
        objective.current = Math.min(objective.current + progress, objective.count);
        
        if (objective.current >= objective.count) {
            objective.completed = true;
            
            if (quest.onObjectiveComplete) {
                quest.onObjectiveComplete(objective, objectiveIndex);
            }
            
            // Check if all objectives complete
            if (quest.objectives.every(obj => obj.completed)) {
                this.completeQuest(questKey);
            }
        }
        
        this.scene.events.emit('quest-progress', quest, objective);
    }
    
    // === ACHIEVEMENTS ===
    
    registerAchievement(key, config) {
        this.achievements.set(key, {
            key: key,
            name: config.name,
            description: config.description,
            icon: config.icon,
            secret: config.secret || false,
            rewards: config.rewards || {}
        });
    }
    
    unlockAchievement(key) {
        if (this.unlockedAchievements.has(key)) return false;
        
        const achievement = this.achievements.get(key);
        if (!achievement) return false;
        
        this.unlockedAchievements.add(key);
        this.grantRewards(achievement.rewards);
        
        this.scene.events.emit('achievement-unlocked', achievement);
        return true;
    }
    
    // === SKILL TREES ===
    
    createSkillTree(key, config) {
        this.skillTrees.set(key, {
            key: key,
            name: config.name,
            skills: config.skills
        });
    }
    
    unlockSkill(skillKey, options = {}) {
        if (this.unlockedSkills.has(skillKey)) return false;
        
        const cost = options.cost || 1;
        if (this.skillPoints < cost) return false;
        
        this.skillPoints -= cost;
        this.unlockedSkills.add(skillKey);
        
        this.scene.events.emit('skill-unlocked', skillKey);
        return true;
    }
    
    // === PROGRESSION ===
    
    gainExperience(amount) {
        this.experience += amount;
        
        while (this.experience >= this.experienceToNext) {
            this.levelUp();
        }
        
        this.scene.events.emit('experience-gained', amount);
    }
    
    levelUp() {
        this.level++;
        this.experience -= this.experienceToNext;
        this.experienceToNext = Math.floor(this.experienceToNext * 1.5);
        this.skillPoints++;
        
        this.scene.events.emit('level-up', this.level);
    }
    
    // === REWARDS ===
    
    grantRewards(rewards) {
        if (rewards.gold) {
            this.scene.player.gold += rewards.gold;
        }
        
        if (rewards.experience) {
            this.gainExperience(rewards.experience);
        }
        
        if (rewards.items) {
            rewards.items.forEach(item => {
                this.scene.player.addItem(item);
            });
        }
        
        if (rewards.skillPoints) {
            this.skillPoints += rewards.skillPoints;
        }
    }
    
    checkPrerequisites(prerequisites) {
        return prerequisites.every(prereq => {
            if (prereq.quest) {
                return this.completedQuests.has(prereq.quest);
            }
            if (prereq.level) {
                return this.level >= prereq.level;
            }
            return true;
        });
    }
    
    // === SAVE/LOAD ===
    
    exportState() {
        return {
            activeQuests: Array.from(this.activeQuests.keys()),
            completedQuests: Array.from(this.completedQuests),
            unlockedAchievements: Array.from(this.unlockedAchievements),
            unlockedSkills: Array.from(this.unlockedSkills),
            level: this.level,
            experience: this.experience,
            skillPoints: this.skillPoints
        };
    }
    
    importState(state) {
        state.activeQuests.forEach(key => this.startQuest(key));
        this.completedQuests = new Set(state.completedQuests);
        this.unlockedAchievements = new Set(state.unlockedAchievements);
        this.unlockedSkills = new Set(state.unlockedSkills);
        this.level = state.level;
        this.experience = state.experience;
        this.skillPoints = state.skillPoints;
    }
}

export default QuestProgressionSystem;

javascript
// Create sophisticated, professional UI
const uiFramework = new AdvancedUIFramework(this);

// Create HUD with auto-updating components
const hud = uiFramework.createHUD({
    components: [
        {
            type: 'healthBar',
            binding: () => this.player.health,
            position: { x: 20, y: 20 },
            max: () => this.player.maxHealth
        },
        {
            type: 'resourceBar',
            name: 'Sap',
            binding: () => this.player.sap,
            color: 0x3366ff
        },
        {
            type: 'minimap',
            position: { x: 'right-20', y: 20 }
        }
    ]
});

// Create inventory with grid layout
const inventory = uiFramework.createWindow({
    title: 'Inventory',
    width: 600,
    height: 400,
    
    content: {
        type: 'grid',
        columns: 8,
        items: this.player.inventory,
        
        itemRenderer: (item) => {
            return {
                icon: item.texture,
                tooltip: item.name,
                onClick: () => this.useItem(item)
            };
        }
    },
    
    draggable: true,
    closeButton: true
});

// Create modal dialog
uiFramework.showModal({
    title: 'Level Up!',
    message: 'You reached level 5!',
    icon: 'level_up_icon',
    
    buttons: [
        { 
            text: 'Choose Strength', 
            onClick: () => this.increaseStat('strength') 
        },
        { 
            text: 'Choose Agility', 
            onClick: () => this.increaseStat('agility') 
        }
    ],
    
    closeOnClickOutside: false
});

// Create skill tree
const skillTree = uiFramework.createSkillTree({
    skills: this.skillTreeData,
    onUnlock: (skill) => this.unlockSkill(skill),
    availablePoints: this.skillPoints
});

## What We're Building

### UI Framework Architecture
```
Advanced UI Framework
│
├─── Core UI System
│    ├─── UI Manager (global control)
│    ├─── Component Registry (reusable widgets)
│    ├─── Layout Engine (responsive positioning)
│    ├─── Theme System (consistent styling)
│    └─── State Manager (data binding)
│
├─── HUD Components
│    ├─── Health/Resource Bars
│    ├─── Minimap
│    ├─── Hotbar (ability slots)
│    ├─── Status Effects Display
│    ├─── Combo Counter
│    └─── Objective Tracker

├─── Window System
│    ├─── Base Window (draggable, closeable)
│    ├─── Inventory Window
│    ├─── Character Sheet
│    ├─── Quest Log
│    ├─── Map Window
│    └─── Settings Menu
│
├─── Dialog/Modal System
│    ├─── Alert Dialogs
│    ├─── Confirmation Prompts
│    ├─── Input Dialogs
│    ├─── Tooltips
│    └─── Notifications/Toasts

├─── Menu System
│    ├─── Main Menu

│    ├─── Dropdown Menus
│    └─── Tab Navigation

│    ├─── Panels (bordered sections)

│    └─── Accordions (collapsible sections)

│    └─── Character Portraits

     ├─── Color Schemes

     ├─── Border Styles
     ├─── Shadow Effects
     └─── Custom Themes
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core UI Framework
javascript
// systems/AdvancedUIFramework.js

class AdvancedUIFramework {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Component registry
        this.components = new Map();
        this.windows = [];
        this.modals = [];
        
        // HUD
        this.hud = null;
        
        // Theme
        this.theme = {
            colors: {
                primary: 0x3366ff,
                secondary: 0x6699ff,
                background: 0x222222,
                backgroundLight: 0x333333,
                border: 0xffffff,
                text: 0xffffff,
                textSecondary: 0xcccccc,
                success: 0x44ff88,
                warning: 0xffaa44,
                error: 0xff4444
            },
            fonts: {
                title: 'bold 24px Arial',
                header: 'bold 18px Arial',
                normal: '16px Arial',
                small: '14px Arial'
            },
            spacing: {
                small: 5,
                medium: 10,
                large: 20
            },
            borderRadius: 5,
            borderWidth: 2
        };
        
        // Layout configuration
        this.layout = {
            screenWidth: scene.scale.width,
            screenHeight: scene.scale.height
        };
        
        // State bindings
        this.bindings = new Map();
        
        // Z-index management
        this.baseDepth = 5000;
        this.modalDepth = 9000;
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Register built-in components
        this.registerBuiltInComponents();
        
        // Listen for screen resize
        this.scene.scale.on('resize', (gameSize) => {
            this.layout.screenWidth = gameSize.width;
            this.layout.screenHeight = gameSize.height;
            this.onResize();
        });
        
        console.log('[UIFramework] Initialized');
    }
    
    registerBuiltInComponents() {
        // Register component factories
        this.registerComponent('button', UIButton);
        this.registerComponent('panel', UIPanel);
        this.registerComponent('healthBar', UIHealthBar);
        this.registerComponent('resourceBar', UIResourceBar);
        this.registerComponent('window', UIWindow);
        this.registerComponent('modal', UIModal);
        this.registerComponent('grid', UIGrid);
        this.registerComponent('list', UIList);
        this.registerComponent('text', UIText);
        this.registerComponent('icon', UIIcon);
    }
    
    /**
     * Register custom component
     */
    registerComponent(type, componentClass) {
        this.components.set(type, componentClass);
    }
    
    /**
     * Create component
     */
    createComponent(type, config) {
        const ComponentClass = this.components.get(type);
        
        if (!ComponentClass) {
            console.warn(`[UIFramework] Unknown component type: ${type}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        return new ComponentClass(this, config);
    }
    
    // === HUD ===
    
    /**
     * Create HUD
     */
    createHUD(config) {
        this.hud = new UIHud(this, config);
        return this.hud;
    }
    
    // === WINDOWS ===
    
    /**
     * Create window
     */
    createWindow(config) {
        const window = this.createComponent('window', config);
        
        this.windows.push(window);
        window.setDepth(this.baseDepth + this.windows.length);
        
        return window;
    }
    
    /**
     * Close window
     */
    closeWindow(window) {
        const index = this.windows.indexOf(window);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.windows.splice(index, 1);
            window.destroy();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Close all windows
     */
    closeAllWindows() {
        this.windows.forEach(window => window.destroy());
        this.windows = [];
    }
    
    /**
     * Bring window to front
     */
    bringToFront(window) {
        const index = this.windows.indexOf(window);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.windows.splice(index, 1);
            this.windows.push(window);
            
            // Re-depth all windows
            this.windows.forEach((win, i) => {
                win.setDepth(this.baseDepth + i);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // === MODALS ===
    
    /**
     * Show modal dialog
     */
    showModal(config) {
        const modal = this.createComponent('modal', config);
        
        this.modals.push(modal);
        modal.setDepth(this.modalDepth + this.modals.length);
        
        modal.show();
        
        return modal;
    }
    
    /**
     * Close modal
     */
    closeModal(modal) {
        const index = this.modals.indexOf(modal);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.modals.splice(index, 1);
            modal.destroy();
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Show alert
     */
    alert(message, options = {}) {
        return this.showModal({
            title: options.title || 'Alert',
            message: message,
            icon: options.icon,
            buttons: [
                { 
                    text: options.buttonText || 'OK', 
                    onClick: options.onOk 
                }
            ]
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Show confirmation
     */
    confirm(message, onConfirm, onCancel) {
        return this.showModal({
            title: 'Confirm',
            message: message,
            buttons: [
                { text: 'Yes', onClick: onConfirm },
                { text: 'No', onClick: onCancel }
            ]
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Show notification toast
     */
    notify(message, type = 'info') {
        const notification = new UINotification(this, {
            message: message,
            type: type,
            duration: 3000
        });
        
        notification.show();
        
        return notification;
    }
    
    // === DATA BINDING ===
    
    /**
     * Bind data to component
     */
    bind(component, property, getter) {
        const bindingKey = `${component.id}_${property}`;
        
        this.bindings.set(bindingKey, {
            component: component,
            property: property,
            getter: getter
        });
    }
    
    /**
     * Unbind data
     */
    unbind(component, property) {
        const bindingKey = `${component.id}_${property}`;
        this.bindings.delete(bindingKey);
    }
    
    /**
     * Update all bindings
     */
    updateBindings() {
        this.bindings.forEach(binding => {
            const value = binding.getter();
            binding.component.updateProperty(binding.property, value);
        });
    }
    
    // === LAYOUT UTILITIES ===
    
    /**
     * Parse position (supports 'left', 'right', 'center', etc.)
     */
    parsePosition(position) {
        if (typeof position === 'number') {
            return position;
        }
        
        if (typeof position === 'string') {
            if (position === 'left') return 0;
            if (position === 'right') return this.layout.screenWidth;
            if (position === 'center') return this.layout.screenWidth / 2;
            if (position === 'top') return 0;
            if (position === 'bottom') return this.layout.screenHeight;
            if (position === 'middle') return this.layout.screenHeight / 2;
            
            // Support arithmetic (e.g., 'right-20', 'center+50')
            const match = position.match(/(left|right|center|top|bottom|middle)([\+\-]\d+)?/);
            
            if (match) {
                const base = this.parsePosition(match[1]);
                const offset = match[2] ? parseInt(match[2]) : 0;
                return base + offset;
            }
        }
        
        return 0;
    }
    
    // === RESIZE HANDLING ===
    
    onResize() {
        // Update HUD
        if (this.hud) {
            this.hud.onResize();
        }
        
        // Update windows
        this.windows.forEach(window => {
            if (window.onResize) {
                window.onResize();
            }
        });
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        // Update bindings
        this.updateBindings();
        
        // Update HUD
        if (this.hud) {
            this.hud.update(delta);
        }
        
        // Update windows
        this.windows.forEach(window => {
            if (window.update) {
                window.update(delta);
            }
        });
        
        // Update modals
        this.modals.forEach(modal => {
            if (modal.update) {
                modal.update(delta);
            }
        });
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    generateId() {
        return `ui_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    // === SHUTDOWN ===
    
    shutdown() {
        this.closeAllWindows();
        
        this.modals.forEach(modal => modal.destroy());
        this.modals = [];
        
        if (this.hud) {
            this.hud.destroy();
        }
        
        this.bindings.clear();
    }
}

export default AdvancedUIFramework;
Step 2: Core UI Components
javascript
// components/UIComponents.js

// === BASE COMPONENT ===

class UIComponent {
    constructor(framework, config) {
        this.framework = framework;
        this.scene = framework.scene;
        this.id = framework.generateId();
        
        this.config = config;
        this.container = null;
        this.visible = true;
        this.enabled = true;
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container();
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
    }
    
    setPosition(x, y) {
        this.container.setPosition(x, y);
        return this;
    }
    
    setVisible(visible) {
        this.visible = visible;
        this.container.setVisible(visible);
        return this;
    }
    
    setDepth(depth) {
        this.container.setDepth(depth);
        return this;
    }
    
    setAlpha(alpha) {
        this.container.setAlpha(alpha);
        return this;
    }
    
    updateProperty(property, value) {
        // Override in subclasses
    }
    
    destroy() {
        if (this.container) {
            this.container.destroy();
        }
    }
}

// === BUTTON ===

class UIButton extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        const width = this.config.width || 200;
        const height = this.config.height || 50;
        const text = this.config.text || 'Button';
        
        // Background
        this.bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0, width, height,
            this.framework.theme.colors.primary,
            1
        );
        this.container.add(this.bg);
        
        // Border
        this.border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0, width, height
        );
        this.border.setStrokeStyle(
            this.framework.theme.borderWidth,
            this.framework.theme.colors.border
        );
        this.container.add(this.border);
        
        // Text
        this.text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, text, {
            font: this.framework.theme.fonts.normal,
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.text.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(this.text);
        
        // Make interactive
        this.bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        this.bg.on('pointerover', () => {
            this.bg.setFillStyle(this.framework.theme.colors.secondary);
        });
        
        this.bg.on('pointerout', () => {
            this.bg.setFillStyle(this.framework.theme.colors.primary);
        });
        
        this.bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            if (this.config.onClick) {
                this.config.onClick();
            }
        });
    }
}

// === PANEL ===

class UIPanel extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        const width = this.config.width || 300;
        const height = this.config.height || 200;
        
        // Background
        this.bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0, width, height,
            this.framework.theme.colors.background,
            0.9
        );
        this.container.add(this.bg);
        
        // Border
        this.border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0, width, height
        );
        this.border.setStrokeStyle(
            this.framework.theme.borderWidth,
            this.framework.theme.colors.border
        );
        this.container.add(this.border);
    }
}

// === HEALTH BAR ===

class UIHealthBar extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        this.width = this.config.width || 200;
        this.height = this.config.height || 20;
        this.value = 1.0;
        this.maxValue = 1.0;
        
        // Background
        this.bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width, this.height,
            0x444444, 1
        );
        this.bg.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.bg);
        
        // Fill
        this.fill = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width, this.height,
            this.framework.theme.colors.success, 1
        );
        this.fill.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.fill);
        
        // Border
        this.border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.width / 2, 0,
            this.width, this.height
        );
        this.border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff);
        this.container.add(this.border);
        
        // Text
        this.text = this.scene.add.text(
            this.width / 2, 0,
            '100 / 100',
            {
                font: '14px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            }
        );
        this.text.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(this.text);
        
        // Set up binding
        if (this.config.binding) {
            this.framework.bind(this, 'value', this.config.binding);
        }
        
        if (this.config.max) {
            this.framework.bind(this, 'maxValue', this.config.max);
        }
    }
    
    updateProperty(property, value) {
        if (property === 'value') {
            this.value = value;
            this.updateBar();
        } else if (property === 'maxValue') {
            this.maxValue = value;
            this.updateBar();
        }
    }
    
    updateBar() {
        const ratio = this.value / this.maxValue;
        const fillWidth = this.width * ratio;
        
        this.fill.setDisplaySize(fillWidth, this.height);
        
        // Update color based on percentage
        if (ratio > 0.5) {
            this.fill.setFillStyle(this.framework.theme.colors.success);
        } else if (ratio > 0.25) {
            this.fill.setFillStyle(this.framework.theme.colors.warning);
        } else {
            this.fill.setFillStyle(this.framework.theme.colors.error);
        }
        
        // Update text
        this.text.setText(`${Math.floor(this.value)} / ${Math.floor(this.maxValue)}`);
    }
}

// === RESOURCE BAR ===

class UIResourceBar extends UIHealthBar {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        // Override color
        this.fill.setFillStyle(this.config.color || this.framework.theme.colors.primary);
    }
}

// === WINDOW ===

class UIWindow extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        const width = this.config.width || 400;
        const height = this.config.height || 300;
        
        // Background panel
        this.panel = new UIPanel(this.framework, {
            width: width,
            height: height
        });
        this.container.add(this.panel.container);
        
        // Title bar
        this.titleBar = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, -height / 2 + 15,
            width, 30,
            this.framework.theme.colors.backgroundLight,
            1
        );
        this.container.add(this.titleBar);
        
        // Title text
        this.titleText = this.scene.add.text(
            -width / 2 + 10,
            -height / 2 + 15,
            this.config.title || 'Window',
            {
                font: this.framework.theme.fonts.header,
                fill: '#ffffff'
            }
        );
        this.titleText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.titleText);
        
        // Close button
        if (this.config.closeButton !== false) {
            this.closeBtn = this.scene.add.text(
                width / 2 - 10,
                -height / 2 + 15,
                '✕',
                {
                    font: '20px Arial',
                    fill: '#ffffff'
                }
            );
            this.closeBtn.setOrigin(1, 0.5);
            this.closeBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            this.closeBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.framework.closeWindow(this);
            });
            this.container.add(this.closeBtn);
        }
        
        // Make draggable
        if (this.config.draggable !== false) {
            this.setupDragging();
        }
        
        // Content container
        this.contentContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.add(this.contentContainer);
        
        // Add content
        if (this.config.content) {
            this.setContent(this.config.content);
        }
        
        // Center by default
        this.setPosition(
            this.framework.layout.screenWidth / 2,
            this.framework.layout.screenHeight / 2
        );
    }
    
    setupDragging() {
        this.titleBar.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true, draggable: true });
        
        this.titleBar.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            this.container.setPosition(dragX, dragY);
        });
        
        this.titleBar.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.framework.bringToFront(this);
        });
    }
    
    setContent(content) {
        // Clear existing content
        this.contentContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        if (content.type === 'grid') {
            this.createGridContent(content);
        } else if (content.type === 'list') {
            this.createListContent(content);
        }
    }
    
    createGridContent(config) {
        const columns = config.columns || 4;
        const cellSize = config.cellSize || 60;
        const padding = config.padding || 5;
        
        config.items.forEach((item, index) => {
            const row = Math.floor(index / columns);
            const col = index % columns;
            
            const x = col * (cellSize + padding) - (this.config.width / 2) + cellSize / 2 + 20;
            const y = row * (cellSize + padding) - (this.config.height / 2) + cellSize / 2 + 50;
            
            const cell = this.createGridCell(item, config.itemRenderer);
            cell.setPosition(x, y);
            
            this.contentContainer.add(cell);
        });
    }
    
    createGridCell(item, renderer) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 50, 50, 0x333333, 1);
        bg.setStrokeStyle(1, 0xffffff);
        container.add(bg);
        
        // Render item
        if (renderer) {
            const rendered = renderer(item);
            
            if (rendered.icon) {
                const icon = this.scene.add.image(0, 0, rendered.icon);
                icon.setDisplaySize(40, 40);
                container.add(icon);
            }
            
            if (rendered.onClick) {
                bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
                bg.on('pointerdown', rendered.onClick);
            }
        }
        
        return container;
    }
}

// === MODAL ===

class UIModal extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        // Backdrop
        this.backdrop = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.framework.layout.screenWidth / 2,
            this.framework.layout.screenHeight / 2,
            this.framework.layout.screenWidth,
            this.framework.layout.screenHeight,
            0x000000,
            0.7
        );
        this.backdrop.setInteractive();
        this.container.add(this.backdrop);
        
        if (this.config.closeOnClickOutside !== false) {
            this.backdrop.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.framework.closeModal(this);
            });
        }
        
        // Modal window
        const width = this.config.width || 400;
        const height = this.config.height || 300;
        
        this.window = new UIPanel(this.framework, {
            width: width,
            height: height
        });
        this.window.setPosition(
            this.framework.layout.screenWidth / 2,
            this.framework.layout.screenHeight / 2
        );
        this.container.add(this.window.container);
        
        // Title
        if (this.config.title) {
            this.title = this.scene.add.text(
                this.framework.layout.screenWidth / 2,
                this.framework.layout.screenHeight / 2 - height / 2 + 30,
                this.config.title,
                {
                    font: this.framework.theme.fonts.title,
                    fill: '#ffffff'
                }
            );
            this.title.setOrigin(0.5);
            this.container.add(this.title);
        }
        
        // Message
        if (this.config.message) {
            this.message = this.scene.add.text(
                this.framework.layout.screenWidth / 2,
                this.framework.layout.screenHeight / 2,
                this.config.message,
                {
                    font: this.framework.theme.fonts.normal,
                    fill: '#ffffff',
                    align: 'center',
                    wordWrap: { width: width - 40 }
                }
            );
            this.message.setOrigin(0.5);
            this.container.add(this.message);
        }
        
        // Buttons
        if (this.config.buttons) {
            this.createButtons(this.config.buttons, width, height);
        }
        
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
    
    createButtons(buttons, width, height) {
        const buttonWidth = 120;
        const buttonSpacing = 20;
        const totalWidth = buttons.length * buttonWidth + (buttons.length - 1) * buttonSpacing;
        const startX = this.framework.layout.screenWidth / 2 - totalWidth / 2 + buttonWidth / 2;
        const y = this.framework.layout.screenHeight / 2 + height / 2 - 40;
        
        buttons.forEach((btnConfig, index) => {
            const x = startX + index * (buttonWidth + buttonSpacing);
            
            const button = new UIButton(this.framework, {
                text: btnConfig.text,
                width: buttonWidth,
                height: 40,
                onClick: () => {
                    if (btnConfig.onClick) {
                        btnConfig.onClick();
                    }
                    this.framework.closeModal(this);
                }
            });
            
            button.setPosition(x, y);
            this.container.add(button.container);
        });
    }
    
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
        this.container.setAlpha(0);
        
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.container,
            alpha: 1,
            duration: 200,
            ease: 'Sine.easeOut'
        });
    }
}

// === HUD ===

class UIHud extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        this.components = [];
        
        // Create HUD components
        if (this.config.components) {
            this.config.components.forEach(componentConfig => {
                this.addComponent(componentConfig);
            });
        }
    }
    
    addComponent(config) {
        const component = this.framework.createComponent(config.type, config);
        
        if (config.position) {
            const x = this.framework.parsePosition(config.position.x || 0);
            const y = this.framework.parsePosition(config.position.y || 0);
            component.setPosition(x, y);
        }
        
        this.components.push(component);
        this.container.add(component.container);
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        this.components.forEach(component => {
            if (component.update) {
                component.update(delta);
            }
        });
    }
    
    onResize() {
        // Reposition components on resize
        this.components.forEach((component, index) => {
            const config = this.config.components[index];
            if (config.position) {
                const x = this.framework.parsePosition(config.position.x || 0);
                const y = this.framework.parsePosition(config.position.y || 0);
                component.setPosition(x, y);
            }
        });
    }
}

// === NOTIFICATION ===

class UINotification extends UIComponent {
    create() {
        super.create();
        
        const width = 300;
        const height = 60;
        
        // Background color based on type
        let color = this.framework.theme.colors.primary;
        if (this.config.type === 'success') color = this.framework.theme.colors.success;
        if (this.config.type === 'warning') color = this.framework.theme.colors.warning;
        if (this.config.type === 'error') color = this.framework.theme.colors.error;
        
        // Background
        this.bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, color, 0.95);
        this.container.add(this.bg);
        
        // Border
        this.border = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height);
        this.border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff);
        this.container.add(this.border);
        
        // Message
        this.text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, this.config.message, {
            font: this.framework.theme.fonts.normal,
            fill: '#ffffff',
            align: 'center',
            wordWrap: { width: width - 20 }
        });
        this.text.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(this.text);
        
        // Position top-right
        this.setPosition(
            this.framework.layout.screenWidth - width / 2 - 20,
            -height / 2
        );
    }
    
    show() {
        // Slide down
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.container,
            y: 80,
            duration: 300,
            ease: 'Back.easeOut'
        });
        
        // Auto-hide
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(this.config.duration || 3000, () => {
            this.hide();
        });
    }
    
    hide() {
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.container,
            y: -100,
            alpha: 0,
            duration: 300,
            ease: 'Sine.easeIn',
            onComplete: () => {
                this.destroy();
            }
        });
    }
}

export {
    UIComponent,
    UIButton,
    UIPanel,
    UIHealthBar,
    UIResourceBar,
    UIWindow,
    UIModal,
    UIHud,
    UINotification
};

javascript
// examples/uiFrameworkExample.js

import AdvancedUIFramework from '../systems/AdvancedUIFramework.js';

class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize UI Framework
        this.uiFramework = new AdvancedUIFramework(this);
        
        // Create HUD
        this.createHUD();
        
        // Create inventory (hidden initially)
        this.inventory = this.createInventory();
        this.inventory.setVisible(false);
        
        // Set up hotkeys
        this.setupHotkeys();
    }
    
    createHUD() {
        this.hud = this.uiFramework.createHUD({
            components: [
                {
                    type: 'healthBar',
                    position: { x: 20, y: 20 },
                    width: 200,
                    binding: () => this.player.health,
                    max: () => this.player.maxHealth
                },
                {
                    type: 'resourceBar',
                    position: { x: 20, y: 50 },
                    width: 200,
                    color: 0x3366ff,
                    binding: () => this.player.sap,
                    max: () => this.player.maxSap
                },
                {
                    type: 'text',
                    position: { x: 20, y: 80 },
                    binding: () => `Level ${this.player.level}`,
                    style: { font: '16px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
                }
            ]
        });
    }
    
    createInventory() {
        return this.uiFramework.createWindow({
            title: 'Inventory',
            width: 600,
            height: 400,
            draggable: true,
            closeButton: true,
            
            content: {
                type: 'grid',
                columns: 8,
                items: this.player.inventory,
                
                itemRenderer: (item) => ({
                    icon: item.texture,
                    onClick: () => this.useItem(item)
                })
            }
        });
    }
    
    setupHotkeys() {
        // Open inventory with I key
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-I', () => {
            this.inventory.setVisible(!this.inventory.visible);
        });
        
        // Test notification
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-N', () => {
            this.uiFramework.notify('Quest completed!', 'success');
        });
        
        // Test modal
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-M', () => {
            this.uiFramework.showModal({
                title: 'Level Up!',
                message: 'You reached level 2!',
                buttons: [
                    { text: 'OK', onClick: () => console.log('Level up accepted') }
                ]
            });
        });
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        this.uiFramework.update(delta);
    }
}

export default GameScene;

Current Workflow Problem
javascript
// Currently writing dialogue in JSON manually:
{
  "merchant_greeting": {
    "nodes": {
      "start": {
        "speaker": "merchant",
        "text": "Welcome!",
        "choices": [
          { "text": "Show wares", "next": "shop" },
          { "text": "Goodbye", "next": "end" }
        ]
      },
      "shop": {
        "speaker": "merchant",
        "text": "Here's my inventory",
        "next": "start"
      }
    }
  }
}

// Problems:
// ❌ Can't visualize branching structure
// ❌ Easy to create broken links ("shpo" typo = crash)
// ❌ Hard to see conversation flow at a glance
// ❌ No validation until runtime
// ❌ Tedious to write complex conversations
// ❌ Can't collaborate with non-programmers
// ❌ Painful to reorganize dialogue trees
With Visual Dialogue Editor
javascript
// Open visual graph editor in-game
dialogueEditor.open('merchant_greeting');

// Visual node-based editing:
// [START] → "Welcome!" → [Choice: Show wares/Goodbye]
//              ↓                    ↓
//          [SHOP]              [FAREWELL]
//              ↓
//          [back to START]

// Features:
// ✅ Drag-and-drop node creation
// ✅ Visual connection drawing
// ✅ Live validation (red nodes = broken links)
// ✅ Real-time preview of conversations
// ✅ Search/filter nodes
// ✅ Automatic layout optimization
// ✅ Export to game-ready JSON
// ✅ Non-programmers can write dialogue

// Results:
// 10x faster dialogue creation
// Zero broken conversation links
// Easy collaboration with writers
// Visual debugging of complex branches

## What We're Building

### Visual Dialogue Editor Architecture
```
Visual Dialogue Editor
│
├─── Graph Editor Core
│    ├─── Canvas (pan, zoom, grid)
│    ├─── Node System (dialogue, choice, branch)
│    ├─── Connection System (bezier curves, validation)
│    ├─── Selection & Multi-select
│    └─── Undo/Redo Stack
│
├─── Node Types
│    ├─── Dialogue Node (speaker, text, portrait)
│    ├─── Choice Node (player decisions)
│    ├─── Condition Node (if/else branching)
│    ├─── Action Node (execute code/events)
│    ├─── Variable Node (set flags/vars)
│    └─── Comment Node (annotations)
│
├─── Visual Features
│    ├─── Node Inspector (edit properties)
│    ├─── Minimap (navigate large graphs)
│    ├─── Search/Filter (find nodes)
│    ├─── Auto-Layout (organize nodes)
│    ├─── Grid Snap (alignment)
│    └─── Connection Validation (highlight errors)
│
├─── Testing & Preview
│    ├─── Live Conversation Preview
│    ├─── Playtest Mode (simulate choices)
│    ├─── Variable Inspector (see state)
│    ├─── Validation Report (list issues)
│    └─── Flow Visualization (highlight paths)
│
├─── Import/Export
│    ├─── Save to JSON
│    ├─── Load from JSON
│    ├─── Export for Game (optimized)
│    ├─── Import from Yarn/Twine
│    └─── Version Control Friendly
│
└─── Integration
     ├─── Hot-Reload in Game
     ├─── Character Database Link
     ├─── Localization Export
     ├─── Voice Line Checklist
     └─── Analytics (which paths taken)
