Step 1: Core Graph Editor
javascript
// tools/VisualDialogueEditor.js

class VisualDialogueEditor {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Graph state
        this.nodes = [];
        this.connections = [];
        this.selectedNodes = [];
        
        // Canvas
        this.camera = {
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            zoom: 1.0,
            minZoom: 0.25,
            maxZoom: 2.0
        };
        
        // UI container
        this.container = null;
        this.canvas = null;
        this.toolbar = null;
        this.inspector = null;
        
        // Interaction state
        this.dragging = null;
        this.connecting = null;
        this.panning = false;
        this.panStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        
        // History (undo/redo)
        this.history = [];
        this.historyIndex = -1;
        this.maxHistory = 50;
        
        // Current conversation
        this.conversationKey = null;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            gridSize: 20,
            snapToGrid: true,
            
            nodeWidth: 200,
            nodeHeight: 100,
            
            colors: {
                dialogue: 0x4488ff,
                choice: 0x44ff88,
                condition: 0xffaa44,
                action: 0xff4444,
                variable: 0xaa44ff,
                comment: 0x888888
            }
        };
        
        // Initialize
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Create UI
        this.createUI();
        
        // Set up input
        this.setupInput();
        
        console.log('[VisualDialogueEditor] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createUI() {
        // Main container
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(20000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            this.scene.scale.height / 2,
            this.scene.scale.width,
            this.scene.scale.height,
            0x1a1a1a,
            1
        );
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Canvas area
        this.createCanvas();
        
        // Toolbar
        this.createToolbar();
        
        // Inspector panel
        this.createInspector();
        
        // Minimap
        this.createMinimap();
    }
    
    createCanvas() {
        // Canvas container (for panning/zooming)
        this.canvas = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.add(this.canvas);
        
        // Grid background
        this.createGrid();
    }
    
    createGrid() {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        graphics.lineStyle(1, 0x333333, 0.5);
        
        const width = 4000;
        const height = 4000;
        const gridSize = this.config.gridSize;
        
        // Vertical lines
        for (let x = -width; x <= width; x += gridSize) {
            graphics.moveTo(x, -height);
            graphics.lineTo(x, height);
        }
        
        // Horizontal lines
        for (let y = -height; y <= height; y += gridSize) {
            graphics.moveTo(-width, y);
            graphics.lineTo(width, y);
        }
        
        graphics.strokePath();
        
        this.canvas.add(graphics);
    }
    
    createToolbar() {
        const toolbarY = 10;
        const buttonWidth = 100;
        const buttonHeight = 40;
        const spacing = 10;
        
        const buttons = [
            { text: 'Add Dialogue', onClick: () => this.addNode('dialogue') },
            { text: 'Add Choice', onClick: () => this.addNode('choice') },
            { text: 'Add Condition', onClick: () => this.addNode('condition') },
            { text: 'Add Action', onClick: () => this.addNode('action') },
            { text: 'Auto Layout', onClick: () => this.autoLayout() },
            { text: 'Validate', onClick: () => this.validate() },
            { text: 'Preview', onClick: () => this.preview() },
            { text: 'Save', onClick: () => this.save() },
            { text: 'Close', onClick: () => this.close() }
        ];
        
        buttons.forEach((btn, index) => {
            const x = 10 + index * (buttonWidth + spacing);
            
            const button = this.createButton(x, toolbarY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight, btn.text, btn.onClick);
            this.container.add(button);
        });
    }
    
    createButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x444444, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        container.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.8);
        container.add(border);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: '14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        bg.on('pointerover', () => {
            bg.setFillStyle(0x666666);
        });
        
        bg.on('pointerout', () => {
            bg.setFillStyle(0x444444);
        });
        
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    createInspector() {
        const width = 300;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 20;
        const x = this.scene.scale.width - width - 10;
        const y = 10;
        
        // Panel background
        this.inspector = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 0.95);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.inspector.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.5);
        this.inspector.add(border);
        
        // Title
        this.inspectorTitle = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Inspector', {
            font: 'bold 18px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspector.add(this.inspectorTitle);
        
        // Content container
        this.inspectorContent = this.scene.add.container(10, 50);
        this.inspector.add(this.inspectorContent);
        
        this.container.add(this.inspector);
    }
    
    createMinimap() {
        const size = 150;
        const x = this.scene.scale.width - size - 320;
        const y = this.scene.scale.height - size - 10;
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(x, y, size, size, 0x000000, 0.8);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(x + size / 2, y + size / 2, size, size);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.5);
        this.container.add(border);
        
        // Minimap will show node positions
        this.minimap = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        this.container.add(this.minimap);
    }
    
    // === NODE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    /**
     * Add new node to graph
     */
    addNode(type, config = {}) {
        const node = new DialogueGraphNode(this, type, {
            x: config.x || -this.camera.x + this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            y: config.y || -this.camera.y + this.scene.scale.height / 2,
            ...config
        });
        
        this.nodes.push(node);
        this.canvas.add(node.container);
        
        this.saveHistory('Add Node');
        
        return node;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove node from graph
     */
    removeNode(node) {
        const index = this.nodes.indexOf(node);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.nodes.splice(index, 1);
            
            // Remove connections
            this.connections = this.connections.filter(conn => 
                conn.from !== node && conn.to !== node
            );
            
            node.destroy();
            
            this.saveHistory('Remove Node');
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Connect two nodes
     */
    connect(fromNode, toNode, fromPort = 'output', toPort = 'input') {
        // Check if connection already exists
        const existing = this.connections.find(conn =>
            conn.from === fromNode && conn.to === toNode &&
            conn.fromPort === fromPort && conn.toPort === toPort
        );
        
        if (existing) return existing;
        
        const connection = new DialogueConnection(this, fromNode, toNode, fromPort, toPort);
        
        this.connections.push(connection);
        this.canvas.add(connection.graphics);
        
        this.saveHistory('Connect Nodes');
        
        return connection;
    }
    
    /**
     * Remove connection
     */
    disconnect(connection) {
        const index = this.connections.indexOf(connection);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.connections.splice(index, 1);
            connection.destroy();
            
            this.saveHistory('Disconnect Nodes');
        }
    }
    
    // === SELECTION ===
    
    selectNode(node, addToSelection = false) {
        if (!addToSelection) {
            this.clearSelection();
        }
        
        if (!this.selectedNodes.includes(node)) {
            this.selectedNodes.push(node);
            node.setSelected(true);
        }
        
        // Update inspector
        this.updateInspector();
    }
    
    deselectNode(node) {
        const index = this.selectedNodes.indexOf(node);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.selectedNodes.splice(index, 1);
            node.setSelected(false);
        }
        
        this.updateInspector();
    }
    
    clearSelection() {
        this.selectedNodes.forEach(node => node.setSelected(false));
        this.selectedNodes = [];
        this.updateInspector();
    }
    
    // === INSPECTOR ===
    
    updateInspector() {
        // Clear current content
        this.inspectorContent.removeAll(true);
        
        if (this.selectedNodes.length === 0) {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, 'No node selected', {
                font: '14px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            this.inspectorContent.add(text);
            return;
        }
        
        if (this.selectedNodes.length === 1) {
            this.showNodeInspector(this.selectedNodes[0]);
        } else {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, `${this.selectedNodes.length} nodes selected`, {
                font: '14px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            this.inspectorContent.add(text);
        }
    }
    
    showNodeInspector(node) {
        let yOffset = 0;
        
        // Node type
        const typeText = this.scene.add.text(0, yOffset, `Type: ${node.type}`, {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(typeText);
        yOffset += 30;
        
        // Node ID
        const idText = this.scene.add.text(0, yOffset, `ID: ${node.id}`, {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#888888'
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(idText);
        yOffset += 25;
        
        // Editable fields based on node type
        if (node.type === 'dialogue') {
            // Speaker
            yOffset = this.addInspectorField('Speaker', node.data.speaker || '', (value) => {
                node.data.speaker = value;
            }, yOffset);
            
            // Text
            yOffset = this.addInspectorField('Text', node.data.text || '', (value) => {
                node.data.text = value;
                node.updateDisplay();
            }, yOffset, 'textarea');
            
            // Portrait
            yOffset = this.addInspectorField('Portrait', node.data.portrait || '', (value) => {
                node.data.portrait = value;
            }, yOffset);
        }
        
        if (node.type === 'choice') {
            // Choice text
            yOffset = this.addInspectorField('Choice Text', node.data.text || '', (value) => {
                node.data.text = value;
                node.updateDisplay();
            }, yOffset);
        }
        
        if (node.type === 'condition') {
            // Condition type
            yOffset = this.addInspectorField('Condition', node.data.condition || '', (value) => {
                node.data.condition = value;
                node.updateDisplay();
            }, yOffset);
        }
        
        // Delete button
        yOffset += 20;
        const deleteBtn = this.createButton(0, yOffset, 280, 40, 'Delete Node', () => {
            this.removeNode(node);
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(deleteBtn);
    }
    
    addInspectorField(label, value, onChange, yOffset, type = 'input') {
        // Label
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(0, yOffset, label + ':', {
            font: '14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(labelText);
        yOffset += 25;
        
        // Input (simplified - in production would use DOM elements)
        const inputBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, yOffset, 280, type === 'textarea' ? 80 : 30, 0x333333, 1);
        inputBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.inspectorContent.add(inputBg);
        
        const inputText = this.scene.add.text(5, yOffset + 5, value, {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff',
            wordWrap: { width: 270 }
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(inputText);
        
        // Make interactive (simplified)
        inputBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        inputBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            // In production, would open DOM input overlay
            const newValue = prompt(label, value);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                inputText.setText(newValue);
                onChange(newValue);
            }
        });
        
        yOffset += (type === 'textarea' ? 80 : 30) + 15;
        
        return yOffset;
    }
    
    // === LAYOUT ===
    
    /**
     * Auto-arrange nodes using force-directed layout
     */
    autoLayout() {
        // Simple hierarchical layout
        if (this.nodes.length === 0) return;
        
        // Find start node
        const startNode = this.nodes.find(n => n.data.isStart) || this.nodes[0];
        
        // BFS layout
        const visited = new Set();
        const levels = new Map();
        
        const queue = [{ node: startNode, level: 0 }];
        levels.set(startNode, 0);
        visited.add(startNode);
        
        let maxLevel = 0;
        
        while (queue.length > 0) {
            const { node, level } = queue.shift();
            maxLevel = Math.max(maxLevel, level);
            
            // Find connected nodes
            const connections = this.connections.filter(c => c.from === node);
            
            connections.forEach(conn => {
                if (!visited.has(conn.to)) {
                    visited.add(conn.to);
                    levels.set(conn.to, level + 1);
                    queue.push({ node: conn.to, level: level + 1 });
                }
            });
        }
        
        // Position nodes by level
        const levelCounts = new Map();
        const levelPositions = new Map();
        
        levels.forEach((level, node) => {
            levelCounts.set(level, (levelCounts.get(level) || 0) + 1);
            
            if (!levelPositions.has(level)) {
                levelPositions.set(level, []);
            }
            levelPositions.set(level, [...levelPositions.get(level), node]);
        });
        
        const horizontalSpacing = 300;
        const verticalSpacing = 200;
        
        levelPositions.forEach((nodes, level) => {
            const count = nodes.length;
            const startX = -(count - 1) * horizontalSpacing / 2;
            
            nodes.forEach((node, index) => {
                node.setPosition(
                    startX + index * horizontalSpacing,
                    level * verticalSpacing
                );
            });
        });
        
        // Redraw connections
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.update());
        
        this.saveHistory('Auto Layout');
    }
    
    // === VALIDATION ===
    
    validate() {
        const errors = [];
        
        // Check for orphaned nodes
        this.nodes.forEach(node => {
            if (node.type === 'dialogue' && !node.data.isStart) {
                const hasIncoming = this.connections.some(c => c.to === node);
                if (!hasIncoming) {
                    errors.push(`Node "${node.id}" has no incoming connections`);
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Check for missing connections
        this.nodes.forEach(node => {
            if (node.type === 'dialogue' || node.type === 'choice') {
                if (!node.data.isEnd) {
                    const hasOutgoing = this.connections.some(c => c.from === node);
                    if (!hasOutgoing) {
                        errors.push(`Node "${node.id}" has no outgoing connections`);
                    }
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Check for empty text
        this.nodes.forEach(node => {
            if ((node.type === 'dialogue' || node.type === 'choice') && !node.data.text) {
                errors.push(`Node "${node.id}" has empty text`);
            }
        });
        
        if (errors.length === 0) {
            alert('✅ Validation passed! No errors found.');
        } else {
            alert(`❌ Found ${errors.length} error(s):\n\n` + errors.join('\n'));
        }
        
        return errors;
    }
    
    // === PREVIEW ===
    
    preview() {
        // Export to dialogue system and start conversation
        const conversationData = this.exportToJSON();
        
        if (this.scene.dialogueSystem) {
            this.scene.dialogueSystem.registerConversation(this.conversationKey, conversationData);
            this.scene.dialogueSystem.startConversation(this.conversationKey);
            
            // Hide editor during preview
            this.hide();
        }
    }
    
    // === SAVE/LOAD ===
    
    save() {
        const data = this.exportToJSON();
        
        // Save to localStorage (in production would save to file)
        localStorage.setItem(`dialogue_${this.conversationKey}`, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
        
        alert('💾 Conversation saved!');
    }
    
    load(conversationKey) {
        this.conversationKey = conversationKey;
        
        // Load from localStorage
        const saved = localStorage.getItem(`dialogue_${conversationKey}`);
        
        if (saved) {
            this.importFromJSON(JSON.parse(saved));
        } else {
            // Create new conversation
            this.clear();
            
            // Add start node
            const startNode = this.addNode('dialogue', {
                x: 0,
                y: 0
            });
            startNode.data.isStart = true;
            startNode.data.text = 'Start of conversation';
            startNode.updateDisplay();
        }
    }
    
    exportToJSON() {
        const nodes = {};
        
        // Convert graph nodes to dialogue system format
        this.nodes.forEach(node => {
            const nodeData = {
                speaker: node.data.speaker,
                text: node.data.text,
                portrait: node.data.portrait
            };
            
            // Find outgoing connections
            const outgoing = this.connections.filter(c => c.from === node);
            
            if (node.type === 'choice' || outgoing.length > 1) {
                // Has choices
                nodeData.choices = outgoing.map(conn => ({
                    text: conn.from.data.choiceText || 'Continue',
                    next: conn.to.id
                }));
            } else if (outgoing.length === 1) {
                // Single next
                nodeData.next = outgoing[0].to.id;
            }
            
            nodes[node.id] = nodeData;
        });
        
        const startNode = this.nodes.find(n => n.data.isStart);
        
        return {
            startNode: startNode ? startNode.id : 'start',
            nodes: nodes,
            metadata: {
                createdWith: 'VisualDialogueEditor',
                version: '1.0',
                lastModified: new Date().toISOString()
            }
        };
    }
    
    importFromJSON(data) {
        this.clear();
        
        const nodeMap = new Map();
        
        // Create nodes
        Object.entries(data.nodes).forEach(([key, nodeData], index) => {
            const node = this.addNode('dialogue', {
                x: (index % 5) * 300,
                y: Math.floor(index / 5) * 200
            });
            
            node.id = key;
            node.data.speaker = nodeData.speaker;
            node.data.text = nodeData.text;
            node.data.portrait = nodeData.portrait;
            node.data.isStart = key === data.startNode;
            
            node.updateDisplay();
            
            nodeMap.set(key, node);
        });
        
        // Create connections
        Object.entries(data.nodes).forEach(([key, nodeData]) => {
            const fromNode = nodeMap.get(key);
            
            if (nodeData.next) {
                const toNode = nodeMap.get(nodeData.next);
                if (toNode) {
                    this.connect(fromNode, toNode);
                }
            }
            
            if (nodeData.choices) {
                nodeData.choices.forEach(choice => {
                    const toNode = nodeMap.get(choice.next);
                    if (toNode) {
                        this.connect(fromNode, toNode);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    }
    
    clear() {
        this.nodes.forEach(node => node.destroy());
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.destroy());
        
        this.nodes = [];
        this.connections = [];
        this.selectedNodes = [];
        
        this.clearHistory();
    }
    
    // === HISTORY (UNDO/REDO) ===
    
    saveHistory(action) {
        // Remove any history after current index
        this.history = this.history.slice(0, this.historyIndex + 1);
        
        // Save current state
        const state = {
            action: action,
            nodes: this.nodes.map(n => n.serialize()),
            connections: this.connections.map(c => c.serialize())
        };
        
        this.history.push(state);
        this.historyIndex++;
        
        // Limit history size
        if (this.history.length > this.maxHistory) {
            this.history.shift();
            this.historyIndex--;
        }
    }
    
    undo() {
        if (this.historyIndex > 0) {
            this.historyIndex--;
            this.restoreState(this.history[this.historyIndex]);
        }
    }
    
    redo() {
        if (this.historyIndex < this.history.length - 1) {
            this.historyIndex++;
            this.restoreState(this.history[this.historyIndex]);
        }
    }
    
    restoreState(state) {
        this.clear();
        
        // Restore nodes
        const nodeMap = new Map();
        
        state.nodes.forEach(nodeData => {
            const node = this.addNode(nodeData.type, nodeData);
            node.deserialize(nodeData);
            nodeMap.set(node.id, node);
        });
        
        // Restore connections
        state.connections.forEach(connData => {
            const fromNode = nodeMap.get(connData.fromId);
            const toNode = nodeMap.get(connData.toId);
            
            if (fromNode && toNode) {
                this.connect(fromNode, toNode, connData.fromPort, connData.toPort);
            }
        });
    }
    
    clearHistory() {
        this.history = [];
        this.historyIndex = -1;
    }
    
    // === INPUT HANDLING ===
    
    setupInput() {
        // Click background to deselect
        this.background.setInteractive();
        this.background.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (pointer.rightButtonDown()) {
                this.startPanning(pointer);
            } else {
                this.clearSelection();
            }
        });
        
        // Mouse wheel zoom
        this.scene.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY, deltaZ) => {
            if (!this.container.visible) return;
            
            const zoomDelta = deltaY > 0 ? -0.1 : 0.1;
            this.zoom(this.camera.zoom + zoomDelta);
        });
        
        // Keyboard shortcuts
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown-Z', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.undo();
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown-Y', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.redo();
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown-DEL', () => {
            this.selectedNodes.forEach(node => this.removeNode(node));
        });
    }
    
    startPanning(pointer) {
        this.panning = true;
        this.panStart = {
            x: pointer.x,
            y: pointer.y,
            cameraX: this.camera.x,
            cameraY: this.camera.y
        };
    }
    
    updatePanning(pointer) {
        if (!this.panning) return;
        
        const deltaX = pointer.x - this.panStart.x;
        const deltaY = pointer.y - this.panStart.y;
        
        this.camera.x = this.panStart.cameraX + deltaX;
        this.camera.y = this.panStart.cameraY + deltaY;
        
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    stopPanning() {
        this.panning = false;
    }
    
    zoom(newZoom) {
        this.camera.zoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            newZoom,
            this.camera.minZoom,
            this.camera.maxZoom
        );
        
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    updateCamera() {
        this.canvas.setPosition(this.camera.x, this.camera.y);
        this.canvas.setScale(this.camera.zoom);
    }
    
    // === VISIBILITY ===
    
    open(conversationKey) {
        this.load(conversationKey);
        this.show();
    }
    
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    hide() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.hide();
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        // Update connections
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.update());
        
        // Handle panning
        if (this.panning) {
            this.updatePanning(this.scene.input.activePointer);
        }
    }
}

export default VisualDialogueEditor;
Step 2: Graph Node Component
javascript
// tools/DialogueGraphNode.js

class DialogueGraphNode {
    constructor(editor, type, config) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        this.type = type;
        
        // Node data
        this.id = config.id || this.generateId();
        this.data = {
            speaker: config.speaker || '',
            text: config.text || '',
            portrait: config.portrait || '',
            condition: config.condition || '',
            action: config.action || '',
            isStart: config.isStart || false,
            isEnd: config.isEnd || false,
            choiceText: config.choiceText || ''
        };
        
        // Position
        this.x = config.x || 0;
        this.y = config.y || 0;
        
        // Visual
        this.container = null;
        this.background = null;
        this.header = null;
        this.body = null;
        this.selected = false;
        
        // Ports
        this.inputPort = null;
        this.outputPort = null;
        
        // Create visual
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        const width = this.editor.config.nodeWidth;
        const height = this.editor.config.nodeHeight;
        const color = this.editor.config.colors[this.type] || 0x888888;
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, color, 0.9);
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Border
        this.border = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height);
        this.border.setStrokeStyle(3, 0xffffff, 0.8);
        this.container.add(this.border);
        
        // Header
        this.header = this.scene.add.text(-width / 2 + 10, -height / 2 + 10, this.type.toUpperCase(), {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.container.add(this.header);
        
        // Body text
        this.bodyText = this.scene.add.text(
            -width / 2 + 10,
            -height / 2 + 35,
            '',
            {
                font: '11px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff',
                wordWrap: { width: width - 20 }
            }
        );
        this.container.add(this.bodyText);
        
        // Input port
        this.inputPort = this.scene.add.circle(-width / 2, 0, 8, 0x44ff88, 1);
        this.inputPort.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff);
        this.container.add(this.inputPort);
        
        // Output port
        this.outputPort = this.scene.add.circle(width / 2, 0, 8, 0xff4444, 1);
        this.outputPort.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff);
        this.container.add(this.outputPort);
        
        // Make interactive
        this.setupInteraction();
        
        // Update display
        this.updateDisplay();
    }
    
    setupInteraction() {
        this.background.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true, draggable: true });
        
        // Selection
        this.background.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            this.editor.selectNode(this, pointer.shiftKey);
        });
        
        // Dragging
        this.background.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            if (this.editor.config.snapToGrid) {
                const gridSize = this.editor.config.gridSize;
                dragX = Math.round(dragX / gridSize) * gridSize;
                dragY = Math.round(dragY / gridSize) * gridSize;
            }
            
            this.setPosition(dragX, dragY);
        });
        
        // Connection from output port
        this.outputPort.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        this.outputPort.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            pointer.event.stopPropagation();
            this.editor.connecting = { from: this, port: 'output' };
        });
        
        this.outputPort.on('pointerup', (pointer) => {
            if (this.editor.connecting && this.editor.connecting.from !== this) {
                this.editor.connect(this.editor.connecting.from, this);
                this.editor.connecting = null;
            }
        });
    }
    
    updateDisplay() {
        let displayText = '';
        
        if (this.type === 'dialogue') {
            if (this.data.speaker) {
                displayText += `${this.data.speaker}: `;
            }
            displayText += this.data.text || '(empty)';
        } else if (this.type === 'choice') {
            displayText = this.data.text || '(empty choice)';
        } else if (this.type === 'condition') {
            displayText = `If: ${this.data.condition || '(empty)'}`;
        } else if (this.type === 'action') {
            displayText = `Action: ${this.data.action || '(empty)'}`;
        }
        
        // Truncate if too long
        if (displayText.length > 60) {
            displayText = displayText.substring(0, 57) + '...';
        }
        
        this.bodyText.setText(displayText);
        
        // Show start indicator
        if (this.data.isStart) {
            this.header.setText('▶ ' + this.header.text);
        }
    }
    
    setPosition(x, y) {
        this.x = x;
        this.y = y;
        this.container.setPosition(x, y);
    }
    
    setSelected(selected) {
        this.selected = selected;
        
        if (selected) {
            this.border.setStrokeStyle(4, 0xffff00, 1);
        } else {
            this.border.setStrokeStyle(3, 0xffffff, 0.8);
        }
    }
    
    getPortPosition(port) {
        const width = this.editor.config.nodeWidth;
        
        if (port === 'input') {
            return {
                x: this.x - width / 2,
                y: this.y
            };
        } else {
            return {
                x: this.x + width / 2,
                y: this.y
            };
        }
    }
    
    serialize() {
        return {
            id: this.id,
            type: this.type,
            x: this.x,
            y: this.y,
            data: { ...this.data }
        };
    }
    
    deserialize(data) {
        this.id = data.id;
        this.type = data.type;
        this.x = data.x;
        this.y = data.y;
        this.data = { ...data.data };
        this.setPosition(this.x, this.y);
        this.updateDisplay();
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `node_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    destroy() {
        this.container.destroy();
    }
}

export default DialogueGraphNode;
Step 3: Connection Component
javascript
// tools/DialogueConnection.js

class DialogueConnection {
    constructor(editor, fromNode, toNode, fromPort = 'output', toPort = 'input') {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        this.from = fromNode;
        this.to = toNode;
        this.fromPort = fromPort;
        this.toPort = toPort;
        
        this.graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.graphics.setDepth(-1);
        
        this.update();
    }
    
    update() {
        this.graphics.clear();
        
        const fromPos = this.from.getPortPosition(this.fromPort);
        const toPos = this.to.getPortPosition(this.toPort);
        
        // Draw bezier curve
        this.graphics.lineStyle(3, 0xffffff, 0.8);
        
        const path = new Phaser.Curves.CubicBezier(
            new Phaser.Math.Vector2(fromPos.x, fromPos.y),
            new Phaser.Math.Vector2(fromPos.x + 100, fromPos.y),
            new Phaser.Math.Vector2(toPos.x - 100, toPos.y),
            new Phaser.Math.Vector2(toPos.x, toPos.y)
        );
        
        path.draw(this.graphics, 64);
        this.graphics.strokePath();
        
        // Draw arrow
        const angle = Phaser.Math.Angle.Between(
            toPos.x - 10, toPos.y,
            toPos.x, toPos.y
        );
        
        const arrowSize = 10;
        this.graphics.fillStyle(0xffffff, 0.8);
        this.graphics.fillTriangle(
            toPos.x, toPos.y,
            toPos.x - arrowSize * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), toPos.y - arrowSize * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6),
            toPos.x - arrowSize * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), toPos.y - arrowSize * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6)
        );
    }
    
    serialize() {
        return {
            fromId: this.from.id,
            toId: this.to.id,
            fromPort: this.fromPort,
            toPort: this.toPort
        };
    }
    
    destroy() {
        this.graphics.destroy();
    }
}

export default DialogueConnection;

Current Workflow Problem
javascript
// Currently defining skill trees in JSON manually:
{
  "combat": {
    "power_attack": {
      "name": "Power Attack",
      "cost": 1,
      "requires": ["level_5"],
      "unlocks": ["heavy_strike", "cleave"]
    },
    "heavy_strike": {
      "name": "Heavy Strike",
      "cost": 1,
      "requires": ["power_attack", "level_10"]
    }
    // ... 50+ more skills
  }
}

// Problems:
// ❌ Can't see skill tree structure visually
// ❌ Easy to create circular dependencies
// ❌ Hard to balance progression paths
// ❌ No validation until runtime
// ❌ Can't test unlocking flow
// ❌ Tedious to reorganize trees
// ❌ Difficult to communicate with game designers
With Visual Skill Tree Editor
javascript
// Open visual skill tree editor
skillTreeEditor.open('combat_skills');

// Visual node graph shows:
//           [Basic Attack]

//         [Power Attack] (1 SP)

//    [Heavy Strike]  [Cleave]
//      (1 SP)         (1 SP)
//         ↓              ↓
//    [Devastating]   [Whirlwind]
//      (2 SP)         (2 SP)

// Features:
// ✅ Drag-and-drop skill placement

// ✅ Test unlock progression live

```
## What We're Building

### Skill Tree Editor Architecture
```
Visual Skill Tree Editor
│
├─── Tree Management
│    ├─── Multiple Trees (combat, magic, stealth)
│    ├─── Tree Categories/Tabs
│    ├─── Tree Templates (linear, radial, web)
│    └─── Import/Export Trees
│
├─── Skill Node System
│    ├─── Skill Node (icon, name, description, cost)
│    ├─── Passive/Active Indicator
│    ├─── Tier/Level Requirements
│    ├─── Stat Bonuses
│    ├─── Unlock State (locked, available, unlocked)
│    └─── Visual Styles (bronze, silver, gold, ultimate)
│
├─── Dependency System
│    ├─── Prerequisite Skills (requires X before Y)
│    ├─── Mutually Exclusive (choose one path)
│    ├─── Level Gates (require character level)
│    ├─── Stat Requirements (strength ≥ 10)
│    ├─── Quest Requirements
│    └─── Circular Dependency Detection
│
├─── Visual Layout
│    ├─── Tier-Based Layout (horizontal tiers)
│    ├─── Radial Layout (wheel/circle)
│    ├─── Constellation Layout (star patterns)
│    ├─── Web Layout (interconnected mesh)
│    ├─── Auto-Arrange by Dependencies
│    └─── Manual Positioning
│
├─── Testing & Simulation
│    ├─── Playtest Mode (simulate unlocking)
│    ├─── Points Budget Tracker
│    ├─── Build Calculator (see total stats)
│    ├─── Optimal Path Finder
│    ├─── Respec Preview
│    └─── Validation & Error Report
│
├─── Skill Properties
│    ├─── Skill Point Cost
│    ├─── Effect Descriptions
│    ├─── Stat Modifiers (+10% damage)
│    ├─── Active Abilities (grants new skill)
│    ├─── Cooldowns/Resources
│    └─── Ranks/Levels (invest multiple points)
│
├─── UI Components
│    ├─── Skill Inspector Panel
│    ├─── Tree Navigator (minimap)
│    ├─── Point Budget Display
│    ├─── Search/Filter Skills
│    ├─── Tooltips (hover for details)
│    └─── Undo/Redo
│
└─── Integration
     ├─── Export to Game Format
     ├─── Hot-Reload in Game
     ├─── Character Integration
     ├─── Analytics (popular builds)
     └─── Localization Support
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Skill Tree Editor
javascript
// tools/VisualSkillTreeEditor.js

class VisualSkillTreeEditor {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Trees
        this.trees = new Map();
        this.currentTree = null;
        
        // Skills
        this.skills = [];
        this.connections = [];
        
        // Selection
        this.selectedSkills = [];
        
        // Camera
        this.camera = {
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            zoom: 1.0,
            minZoom: 0.5,
            maxZoom: 2.0
        };
        
        // UI
        this.container = null;
        this.canvas = null;
        this.inspector = null;
        this.toolbar = null;
        
        // Simulation state
        this.playtest = {
            active: false,
            unlockedSkills: new Set(),
            availablePoints: 0
        };
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            skillNodeSize: 80,
            tierSpacing: 200,
            skillSpacing: 120,
            
            colors: {
                locked: 0x444444,
                available: 0x4488ff,
                unlocked: 0x44ff88,
                ultimate: 0xff8844,
                passive: 0xaa88ff,
                active: 0xff4488
            },
            
            tierColors: [
                0x8B4513, // Bronze - Tier 1
                0xC0C0C0, // Silver - Tier 2
                0xFFD700, // Gold - Tier 3
                0xFF1493  // Pink - Ultimate
            ]
        };
        
        // History
        this.history = [];
        this.historyIndex = -1;
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createUI();
        this.setupInput();
        
        console.log('[VisualSkillTreeEditor] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createUI() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(20000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            this.scene.scale.height / 2,
            this.scene.scale.width,
            this.scene.scale.height,
            0x0a0a0a,
            1
        );
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Canvas
        this.createCanvas();
        
        // Toolbar
        this.createToolbar();
        
        // Inspector
        this.createInspector();
        
        // Stats panel
        this.createStatsPanel();
        
        // Tree tabs
        this.createTreeTabs();
    }
    
    createCanvas() {
        this.canvas = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.add(this.canvas);
        
        // Background grid/pattern
        this.createTreeBackground();
    }
    
    createTreeBackground() {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        // Radial pattern
        graphics.lineStyle(1, 0x222222, 0.3);
        
        for (let radius = 100; radius <= 1000; radius += 100) {
            graphics.strokeCircle(0, 0, radius);
        }
        
        // Radial lines
        for (let angle = 0; angle < Math.PI * 2; angle += Math.PI / 8) {
            graphics.moveTo(0, 0);
            graphics.lineTo(Math.cos(angle) * 1000, Math.sin(angle) * 1000);
        }
        
        graphics.strokePath();
        
        this.canvas.add(graphics);
    }
    
    createToolbar() {
        const y = 10;
        const buttonWidth = 120;
        const buttonHeight = 40;
        const spacing = 10;
        
        const buttons = [
            { text: 'Add Skill', onClick: () => this.addSkill() },
            { text: 'Add Tree', onClick: () => this.addTree() },
            { text: 'Layout: Tier', onClick: () => this.autoLayout('tier') },
            { text: 'Layout: Radial', onClick: () => this.autoLayout('radial') },
            { text: 'Playtest', onClick: () => this.togglePlaytest() },
            { text: 'Validate', onClick: () => this.validate() },
            { text: 'Export', onClick: () => this.exportToJSON() },
            { text: 'Save', onClick: () => this.save() },
            { text: 'Close', onClick: () => this.close() }
        ];
        
        buttons.forEach((btn, index) => {
            const x = 10 + index * (buttonWidth + spacing);
            
            const button = this.createButton(x, y, buttonWidth, buttonHeight, btn.text, btn.onClick);
            this.container.add(button);
        });
    }
    
    createButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x333333, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        container.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.6);
        container.add(border);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: '14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        bg.on('pointerover', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x555555));
        bg.on('pointerout', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x333333));
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    createInspector() {
        const width = 300;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 70;
        const x = this.scene.scale.width - width - 10;
        const y = 60;
        
        this.inspector = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x1a1a1a, 0.95);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.inspector.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.3);
        this.inspector.add(border);
        
        this.inspectorTitle = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Skill Inspector', {
            font: 'bold 18px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspector.add(this.inspectorTitle);
        
        this.inspectorContent = this.scene.add.container(10, 50);
        this.inspector.add(this.inspectorContent);
        
        this.container.add(this.inspector);
    }
    
    createStatsPanel() {
        const width = 250;
        const height = 150;
        const x = 10;
        const y = 60;
        
        this.statsPanel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x1a1a1a, 0.95);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.statsPanel.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffffff, 0.3);
        this.statsPanel.add(border);
        
        this.statsTitle = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Build Stats', {
            font: 'bold 16px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.statsPanel.add(this.statsTitle);
        
        this.statsText = this.scene.add.text(10, 40, '', {
            font: '14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.statsPanel.add(this.statsText);
        
        this.container.add(this.statsPanel);
        
        this.updateStatsPanel();
    }
    
    createTreeTabs() {
        const tabWidth = 150;
        const tabHeight = 40;
        const spacing = 5;
        const startX = 280;
        const y = 10;
        
        this.treeTabs = this.scene.add.container(startX, y);
        this.container.add(this.treeTabs);
        
        // Will be populated when trees are added
    }
    
    // === TREE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addTree(name = 'New Tree') {
        const treeKey = `tree_${this.trees.size + 1}`;
        
        const tree = {
            key: treeKey,
            name: name,
            description: '',
            skills: [],
            layout: 'tier' // tier, radial, web
        };
        
        this.trees.set(treeKey, tree);
        
        this.updateTreeTabs();
        this.switchTree(treeKey);
        
        return tree;
    }
    
    switchTree(treeKey) {
        const tree = this.trees.get(treeKey);
        
        if (!tree) return;
        
        // Save current tree state
        if (this.currentTree) {
            const currentTreeData = this.trees.get(this.currentTree.key);
            currentTreeData.skills = this.skills.map(s => s.serialize());
        }
        
        // Clear canvas
        this.clearCanvas();
        
        // Load new tree
        this.currentTree = tree;
        
        // Create skills from tree data
        tree.skills.forEach(skillData => {
            const skill = new SkillTreeNode(this, skillData);
            this.skills.push(skill);
            this.canvas.add(skill.container);
        });
        
        // Recreate connections
        this.rebuildConnections();
        
        this.updateTreeTabs();
    }
    
    updateTreeTabs() {
        this.treeTabs.removeAll(true);
        
        const tabWidth = 150;
        const tabHeight = 40;
        const spacing = 5;
        
        let index = 0;
        this.trees.forEach((tree, key) => {
            const x = index * (tabWidth + spacing);
            
            const isActive = this.currentTree && this.currentTree.key === key;
            
            const tab = this.createTreeTab(x, 0, tabWidth, tabHeight, tree.name, isActive, () => {
                this.switchTree(key);
            });
            
            this.treeTabs.add(tab);
            index++;
        });
        
        // Add "+" button for new tree
        const newTabX = index * (tabWidth + spacing);
        const addTab = this.createTreeTab(newTabX, 0, 50, tabHeight, '+', false, () => {
            const name = prompt('Tree name:', 'New Tree');
            if (name) {
                this.addTree(name);
            }
        });
        this.treeTabs.add(addTab);
    }
    
    createTreeTab(x, y, width, height, text, active, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, active ? 0x555555 : 0x333333, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        container.add(bg);
        
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, active ? 0xffaa44 : 0x666666, 1);
        container.add(border);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: active ? 'bold 14px Arial' : '14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    // === SKILL MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addSkill(config = {}) {
        const skill = new SkillTreeNode(this, {
            x: config.x || -this.camera.x + this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            y: config.y || -this.camera.y + this.scene.scale.height / 2,
            name: config.name || 'New Skill',
            tier: config.tier || 1,
            type: config.type || 'passive',
            ...config
        });
        
        this.skills.push(skill);
        this.canvas.add(skill.container);
        
        this.saveHistory('Add Skill');
        
        return skill;
    }
    
    removeSkill(skill) {
        const index = this.skills.indexOf(skill);
        
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.skills.splice(index, 1);
            
            // Remove connections
            this.connections = this.connections.filter(conn => 
                conn.from !== skill && conn.to !== skill
            );
            
            skill.destroy();
            
            this.saveHistory('Remove Skill');
        }
    }
    
    connectSkills(fromSkill, toSkill) {
        // Check if connection already exists
        const existing = this.connections.find(conn =>
            conn.from === fromSkill && conn.to === toSkill
        );
        
        if (existing) return existing;
        
        // Check for circular dependencies
        if (this.wouldCreateCycle(fromSkill, toSkill)) {
            alert('❌ Cannot create connection: would create circular dependency!');
            return null;
        }
        
        const connection = new SkillConnection(this, fromSkill, toSkill);
        
        this.connections.push(connection);
        this.canvas.add(connection.graphics);
        
        // Add to skill's prerequisites
        if (!toSkill.data.prerequisites.includes(fromSkill.id)) {
            toSkill.data.prerequisites.push(fromSkill.id);
        }
        
        this.saveHistory('Connect Skills');
        
        return connection;
    }
    
    wouldCreateCycle(fromSkill, toSkill) {
        // DFS to check if toSkill can reach fromSkill
        const visited = new Set();
        const stack = [toSkill];
        
        while (stack.length > 0) {
            const current = stack.pop();
            
            if (current === fromSkill) {
                return true; // Cycle detected
            }
            
            if (visited.has(current)) continue;
            visited.add(current);
            
            // Get all skills that depend on current
            const dependents = this.connections
                .filter(conn => conn.from === current)
                .map(conn => conn.to);
            
            stack.push(...dependents);
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    rebuildConnections() {
        // Clear existing connections
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.destroy());
        this.connections = [];
        
        // Rebuild from skill prerequisites
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            skill.data.prerequisites.forEach(prereqId => {
                const prereqSkill = this.skills.find(s => s.id === prereqId);
                
                if (prereqSkill) {
                    const connection = new SkillConnection(this, prereqSkill, skill);
                    this.connections.push(connection);
                    this.canvas.add(connection.graphics);
                }
            });
        });
    }
    
    // === SELECTION ===
    
    selectSkill(skill, addToSelection = false) {
        if (!addToSelection) {
            this.clearSelection();
        }
        
        if (!this.selectedSkills.includes(skill)) {
            this.selectedSkills.push(skill);
            skill.setSelected(true);
        }
        
        this.updateInspector();
    }
    
    clearSelection() {
        this.selectedSkills.forEach(skill => skill.setSelected(false));
        this.selectedSkills = [];
        this.updateInspector();
    }
    
    // === INSPECTOR ===
    
    updateInspector() {
        this.inspectorContent.removeAll(true);
        
        if (this.selectedSkills.length === 0) {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, 'No skill selected', {
                font: '14px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            this.inspectorContent.add(text);
            return;
        }
        
        if (this.selectedSkills.length === 1) {
            this.showSkillInspector(this.selectedSkills[0]);
        } else {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, `${this.selectedSkills.length} skills selected`, {
                font: '14px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            this.inspectorContent.add(text);
        }
    }
    
    showSkillInspector(skill) {
        let y = 0;
        
        // Name
        y = this.addInspectorField('Name', skill.data.name, (value) => {
            skill.data.name = value;
            skill.updateDisplay();
        }, y);
        
        // Description
        y = this.addInspectorField('Description', skill.data.description, (value) => {
            skill.data.description = value;
        }, y, 'textarea');
        
        // Type
        y = this.addInspectorSelect('Type', skill.data.type, ['passive', 'active'], (value) => {
            skill.data.type = value;
            skill.updateDisplay();
        }, y);
        
        // Tier
        y = this.addInspectorField('Tier', skill.data.tier.toString(), (value) => {
            skill.data.tier = parseInt(value) || 1;
            skill.updateDisplay();
        }, y);
        
        // Cost
        y = this.addInspectorField('Skill Points', skill.data.cost.toString(), (value) => {
            skill.data.cost = parseInt(value) || 1;
        }, y);
        
        // Level Requirement
        y = this.addInspectorField('Level Required', skill.data.levelRequired.toString(), (value) => {
            skill.data.levelRequired = parseInt(value) || 0;
        }, y);
        
        // Stats
        y += 10;
        const statsLabel = this.scene.add.text(0, y, 'Stat Bonuses:', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(statsLabel);
        y += 25;
        
        ['damage', 'health', 'critChance'].forEach(stat => {
            const currentValue = skill.data.stats[stat] || 0;
            y = this.addInspectorField(`+${stat}`, currentValue.toString(), (value) => {
                skill.data.stats[stat] = parseFloat(value) || 0;
            }, y);
        });
        
        // Delete button
        y += 20;
        const deleteBtn = this.createButton(0, y, 280, 40, 'Delete Skill', () => {
            this.removeSkill(skill);
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(deleteBtn);
    }
    
    addInspectorField(label, value, onChange, yOffset, type = 'input') {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(0, yOffset, label + ':', {
            font: '13px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(labelText);
        yOffset += 20;
        
        const height = type === 'textarea' ? 60 : 25;
        
        const inputBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, yOffset, 280, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        inputBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.inspectorContent.add(inputBg);
        
        const inputText = this.scene.add.text(5, yOffset + 5, value, {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff',
            wordWrap: { width: 270 }
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(inputText);
        
        inputBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        inputBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = prompt(label, value);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                inputText.setText(newValue);
                onChange(newValue);
            }
        });
        
        yOffset += height + 10;
        
        return yOffset;
    }
    
    addInspectorSelect(label, value, options, onChange, yOffset) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(0, yOffset, label + ':', {
            font: '13px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.inspectorContent.add(labelText);
        yOffset += 20;
        
        options.forEach((option, index) => {
            const optionBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, yOffset + index * 30, 280, 25, 
                option === value ? 0x555555 : 0x2a2a2a, 1);
            optionBg.setOrigin(0);
            this.inspectorContent.add(optionBg);
            
            const optionText = this.scene.add.text(10, yOffset + index * 30 + 5, option, {
                font: '12px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            this.inspectorContent.add(optionText);
            
            optionBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            optionBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
                onChange(option);
                this.updateInspector();
            });
        });
        
        yOffset += options.length * 30 + 10;
        
        return yOffset;
    }
    
    // === STATS PANEL ===
    
    updateStatsPanel() {
        if (!this.playtest.active) {
            this.statsText.setText(
                `Total Skills: ${this.skills.length}\n` +
                `Connections: ${this.connections.length}\n` +
                `Max Tier: ${this.getMaxTier()}\n`
            );
        } else {
            const unlockedCount = this.playtest.unlockedSkills.size;
            const totalCost = this.calculateTotalCost(this.playtest.unlockedSkills);
            
            const stats = this.calculateBuildStats(this.playtest.unlockedSkills);
            
            this.statsText.setText(
                `Points: ${this.playtest.availablePoints}\n` +
                `Unlocked: ${unlockedCount}/${this.skills.length}\n` +
                `Spent: ${totalCost} SP\n\n` +
                `+Damage: ${stats.damage}%\n` +
                `+Health: ${stats.health}%\n` +
                `+Crit: ${stats.critChance}%`
            );
        }
    }
    
    getMaxTier() {
        return this.skills.reduce((max, skill) => Math.max(max, skill.data.tier), 0);
    }
    
    calculateTotalCost(unlockedSkills) {
        let total = 0;
        
        unlockedSkills.forEach(skillId => {
            const skill = this.skills.find(s => s.id === skillId);
            if (skill) {
                total += skill.data.cost;
            }
        });
        
        return total;
    }
    
    calculateBuildStats(unlockedSkills) {
        const stats = {
            damage: 0,
            health: 0,
            critChance: 0
        };
        
        unlockedSkills.forEach(skillId => {
            const skill = this.skills.find(s => s.id === skillId);
            if (skill) {
                Object.keys(stats).forEach(stat => {
                    stats[stat] += skill.data.stats[stat] || 0;
                });
            }
        });
        
        return stats;
    }
    
    // === AUTO-LAYOUT ===
    
    autoLayout(type = 'tier') {
        if (type === 'tier') {
            this.layoutByTier();
        } else if (type === 'radial') {
            this.layoutRadial();
        }
        
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.update());
        
        this.saveHistory(`Auto Layout: ${type}`);
    }
    
    layoutByTier() {
        // Group skills by tier
        const tiers = new Map();
        
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            const tier = skill.data.tier;
            
            if (!tiers.has(tier)) {
                tiers.set(tier, []);
            }
            
            tiers.get(tier).push(skill);
        });
        
        // Position skills
        const tierSpacing = this.config.tierSpacing;
        const skillSpacing = this.config.skillSpacing;
        
        tiers.forEach((skills, tier) => {
            const totalWidth = (skills.length - 1) * skillSpacing;
            const startX = -totalWidth / 2;
            const y = (tier - 1) * tierSpacing;
            
            skills.forEach((skill, index) => {
                skill.setPosition(
                    startX + index * skillSpacing,
                    y
                );
            });
        });
    }
    
    layoutRadial() {
        const tiers = new Map();
        
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            const tier = skill.data.tier;
            
            if (!tiers.has(tier)) {
                tiers.set(tier, []);
            }
            
            tiers.get(tier).push(skill);
        });
        
        tiers.forEach((skills, tier) => {
            const radius = tier * 150;
            const angleStep = (Math.PI * 2) / skills.length;
            
            skills.forEach((skill, index) => {
                const angle = index * angleStep - Math.PI / 2;
                
                skill.setPosition(
                    Math.cos(angle) * radius,
                    Math.sin(angle) * radius
                );
            });
        });
    }
    
    // === PLAYTEST MODE ===
    
    togglePlaytest() {
        this.playtest.active = !this.playtest.active;
        
        if (this.playtest.active) {
            this.startPlaytest();
        } else {
            this.endPlaytest();
        }
    }
    
    startPlaytest() {
        this.playtest.unlockedSkills.clear();
        this.playtest.availablePoints = parseInt(prompt('How many skill points?', '20')) || 20;
        
        // Update all skills to show locked/available state
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            skill.updatePlaytestState();
        });
        
        this.updateStatsPanel();
        
        alert('🎮 Playtest Mode: Click skills to unlock them!');
    }
    
    endPlaytest() {
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            skill.updateDisplay();
        });
        
        this.updateStatsPanel();
    }
    
    canUnlockSkill(skill) {
        // Check prerequisites
        const prereqsMet = skill.data.prerequisites.every(prereqId => 
            this.playtest.unlockedSkills.has(prereqId)
        );
        
        if (!prereqsMet) return false;
        
        // Check skill points
        if (this.playtest.availablePoints < skill.data.cost) return false;
        
        return true;
    }
    
    unlockSkill(skill) {
        if (!this.canUnlockSkill(skill)) return false;
        
        this.playtest.unlockedSkills.add(skill.id);
        this.playtest.availablePoints -= skill.data.cost;
        
        // Update skill visuals
        this.skills.forEach(s => s.updatePlaytestState());
        
        this.updateStatsPanel();
        
        return true;
    }
    
    // === VALIDATION ===
    
    validate() {
        const errors = [];
        
        // Check for orphaned skills
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            if (skill.data.tier > 1) {
                const hasPrerequisites = skill.data.prerequisites.length > 0;
                
                if (!hasPrerequisites) {
                    errors.push(`Skill "${skill.data.name}" (Tier ${skill.data.tier}) has no prerequisites`);
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Check for broken prerequisite links
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            skill.data.prerequisites.forEach(prereqId => {
                const prereq = this.skills.find(s => s.id === prereqId);
                
                if (!prereq) {
                    errors.push(`Skill "${skill.data.name}" references missing prerequisite: ${prereqId}`);
                }
            });
        });
        
        // Check for circular dependencies (shouldn't exist due to prevention, but validate anyway)
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            if (this.hasCircularDependency(skill)) {
                errors.push(`Skill "${skill.data.name}" has circular dependency`);
            }
        });
        
        // Check balance
        const avgCostPerTier = this.calculateAverageCostPerTier();
        Object.entries(avgCostPerTier).forEach(([tier, avgCost]) => {
            if (avgCost > tier * 2) {
                errors.push(`Tier ${tier} skills cost too much on average (${avgCost.toFixed(1)} SP)`);
            }
        });
        
        if (errors.length === 0) {
            alert('✅ Validation passed! No errors found.');
        } else {
            alert(`❌ Found ${errors.length} issue(s):\n\n` + errors.join('\n'));
        }
        
        return errors;
    }
    
    hasCircularDependency(skill, visited = new Set(), path = []) {
        if (path.includes(skill.id)) {
            return true; // Cycle found
        }
        
        if (visited.has(skill.id)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        visited.add(skill.id);
        path.push(skill.id);
        
        for (const prereqId of skill.data.prerequisites) {
            const prereq = this.skills.find(s => s.id === prereqId);
            
            if (prereq && this.hasCircularDependency(prereq, visited, [...path])) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    calculateAverageCostPerTier() {
        const tierCosts = {};
        const tierCounts = {};
        
        this.skills.forEach(skill => {
            const tier = skill.data.tier;
            
            if (!tierCosts[tier]) {
                tierCosts[tier] = 0;
                tierCounts[tier] = 0;
            }
            
            tierCosts[tier] += skill.data.cost;
            tierCounts[tier]++;
        });
        
        const avgCosts = {};
        Object.keys(tierCosts).forEach(tier => {
            avgCosts[tier] = tierCosts[tier] / tierCounts[tier];
        });
        
        return avgCosts;
    }
    
    // === SAVE/LOAD ===
    
    save() {
        const data = {
            trees: Array.from(this.trees.entries()).map(([key, tree]) => ({
                key: key,
                name: tree.name,
                description: tree.description,
                layout: tree.layout,
                skills: this.currentTree && this.currentTree.key === key 
                    ? this.skills.map(s => s.serialize())
                    : tree.skills
            }))
        };
        
        localStorage.setItem('skill_trees', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
        
        alert('💾 Skill trees saved!');
    }
    
    load() {
        const saved = localStorage.getItem('skill_trees');
        
        if (!saved) {
            // Create default tree
            this.addTree('Combat');
            return;
        }
        
        const data = JSON.parse(saved);
        
        this.trees.clear();
        
        data.trees.forEach(treeData => {
            this.trees.set(treeData.key, {
                key: treeData.key,
                name: treeData.name,
                description: treeData.description,
                layout: treeData.layout,
                skills: treeData.skills
            });
        });
        
        // Switch to first tree
        if (this.trees.size > 0) {
            const firstTreeKey = Array.from(this.trees.keys())[0];
            this.switchTree(firstTreeKey);
        }
    }
    
    exportToJSON() {
        const data = {};
        
        this.trees.forEach((tree, key) => {
            const skills = {};
            
            const treeSkills = this.currentTree && this.currentTree.key === key
                ? this.skills
                : tree.skills.map(s => {
                    const skill = new SkillTreeNode(this, s);
                    const serialized = skill;
                    skill.destroy();
                    return serialized;
                });
            
            treeSkills.forEach(skill => {
                const skillData = skill.serialize ? skill.serialize() : skill;
                
                skills[skillData.id] = {
                    name: skillData.name,
                    description: skillData.description,
                    tier: skillData.tier,
                    type: skillData.type,
                    cost: skillData.cost,
                    levelRequired: skillData.levelRequired,
                    prerequisites: skillData.prerequisites,
                    stats: skillData.stats
                };
            });
            
            data[key] = {
                name: tree.name,
                description: tree.description,
                skills: skills
            };
        });
        
        console.log('Exported Skill Trees:', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
        
        // Download as file (simplified)
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        
        alert('📥 Skill trees exported! Check console for JSON.');
        
        return data;
    }
    
    // === CAMERA/INPUT ===
    
    setupInput() {
        this.background.setInteractive();
        
        this.background.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (pointer.rightButtonDown()) {
                this.startPanning(pointer);
            } else {
                this.clearSelection();
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY) => {
            if (!this.container.visible) return;
            
            const zoomDelta = deltaY > 0 ? -0.1 : 0.1;
            this.zoom(this.camera.zoom + zoomDelta);
        });
        
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown-DEL', () => {
            this.selectedSkills.forEach(skill => this.removeSkill(skill));
        });
    }
    
    startPanning(pointer) {
        this.panning = true;
        this.panStart = {
            x: pointer.x,
            y: pointer.y,
            cameraX: this.camera.x,
            cameraY: this.camera.y
        };
    }
    
    updatePanning(pointer) {
        if (!this.panning) return;
        
        const deltaX = pointer.x - this.panStart.x;
        const deltaY = pointer.y - this.panStart.y;
        
        this.camera.x = this.panStart.cameraX + deltaX;
        this.camera.y = this.panStart.cameraY + deltaY;
        
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    stopPanning() {
        this.panning = false;
    }
    
    zoom(newZoom) {
        this.camera.zoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(newZoom, this.camera.minZoom, this.camera.maxZoom);
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    updateCamera() {
        this.canvas.setPosition(this.camera.x, this.camera.y);
        this.canvas.setScale(this.camera.zoom);
    }
    
    // === HISTORY ===
    
    saveHistory(action) {
        // Simplified history for now
    }
    
    clearCanvas() {
        this.skills.forEach(skill => skill.destroy());
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.destroy());
        
        this.skills = [];
        this.connections = [];
    }
    
    // === VISIBILITY ===
    
    open() {
        this.load();
        this.show();
    }
    
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    hide() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.save();
        this.hide();
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        if (this.panning) {
            this.updatePanning(this.scene.input.activePointer);
        }
        
        this.connections.forEach(conn => conn.update());
    }
}

export default VisualSkillTreeEditor;
