Feb 8
OPTION A: INTEGRATED SCENE EDITOR + TILEMAP + PREFABS
Deep Dive into Unity's Implementation
Let me analyze exactly how Unity implements these 3 critical tools and build faithful recreations optimized for Verdance.

TOOL 15: INTEGRATED SCENE EDITOR
How Unity Does It
Unity's Scene View Architecture
Unity Editor Structure:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Menu Bar (File, Edit, GameObject, Component)    │
├──────────┬────────────────────────┬─────────────┤
│          │                        │             │
│ Hierarchy│   Scene View Canvas    │  Inspector  │
│          │                        │             │
│  ├ Main  │  [Visual 2D/3D view]   │ Transform   │
│  ├ Player│   - Gizmos             │  Position   │
│  │ ├Body │   - Grid               │  Rotation   │
│  │ └Wpn  │   - Selection handles  │  Scale      │
│  ├ Enemy │   - Camera preview     │             │
│  └ UI    │                        │ SpriteRndr  │
│          │                        │  Sprite     │
│          │                        │  Color      │
└──────────┴────────────────────────┴─────────────┘
│ Project Window (Assets Browser)                 │
│  📁 Sprites  📁 Scripts  📁 Prefabs  📁 Scenes  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Key Unity Features We'll Copy
1. Scene View Canvas
Infinite 2D grid with zoom/pan
Gizmos (move, rotate, scale handles)
Multi-select with rubber-band selection
Snap to grid (customizable grid size)
Layers (background, midground, foreground, UI)
Camera preview bounds
Play mode overlay (test without leaving editor)
2. Hierarchy System
Tree structure with parent-child relationships
Drag-to-parent (create hierarchy)
Right-click context menu
Eye icon (show/hide)
Lock icon (prevent editing)
Search with filtering
Color coding by type
3. Inspector Panel
Component-based architecture
Expandable/collapsible sections
Type-specific editors (color picker, sprite selector, slider)
Add Component button
Remove component (trash icon)
Copy/paste component values
Reset to default values
4. Game View
Exact player view
Resolution presets (1920x1080, 1280x720, etc.)
Aspect ratio enforcement
Play/Pause/Step controls
Stats overlay (FPS, draw calls)
Complete Implementation
Step 1: Core Editor Framework
javascript
// tools/IntegratedSceneEditor.js

class IntegratedSceneEditor {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Editor state
        this.mode = 'edit'; // 'edit' or 'play'
        this.selectedObjects = [];
        this.clipboard = null;
        
        // Current scene data
        this.sceneObjects = [];
        this.currentSceneName = 'untitled';
        
        // Editor configuration
        this.config = {
            gridSize: 32,
            snapToGrid: true,
            showGrid: true,
            showGizmos: true,
            
            // Layout (percentages)
            hierarchyWidth: 0.15,
            inspectorWidth: 0.25,
            projectHeight: 0.2,
            
            // Colors
            gridColor: 0x333333,
            selectionColor: 0xffaa00,
            gizmoColor: 0x44ff88
        };
        
        // UI Components
        this.container = null;
        this.hierarchyPanel = null;
        this.sceneViewCanvas = null;
        this.inspectorPanel = null;
        this.projectWindow = null;
        this.menuBar = null;
        this.toolbar = null;
        
        // Tools
        this.currentTool = 'select'; // select, move, rotate, scale
        
        // Gizmos
        this.gizmos = null;
        
        // History (undo/redo)
        this.history = [];
        this.historyIndex = -1;
        this.maxHistory = 100;
        
        // Prefab system integration
        this.prefabRegistry = new Map();
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createEditorUI();
        this.setupInput();
        this.setupHotkeys();
        
        console.log('[IntegratedSceneEditor] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createEditorUI() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(50000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        // Menu bar (top)
        this.createMenuBar();
        
        // Toolbar (below menu)
        this.createToolbar();
        
        // Calculate layout dimensions
        const menuHeight = 30;
        const toolbarHeight = 40;
        const workspaceY = menuHeight + toolbarHeight;
        const workspaceHeight = height - workspaceY - this.config.projectHeight * height;
        
        const hierarchyWidth = width * this.config.hierarchyWidth;
        const inspectorWidth = width * this.config.inspectorWidth;
        const sceneViewWidth = width - hierarchyWidth - inspectorWidth;
        
        // Hierarchy panel (left)
        this.hierarchyPanel = new HierarchyPanel(this, {
            x: 0,
            y: workspaceY,
            width: hierarchyWidth,
            height: workspaceHeight
        });
        this.container.add(this.hierarchyPanel.container);
        
        // Scene view canvas (center)
        this.sceneViewCanvas = new SceneViewCanvas(this, {
            x: hierarchyWidth,
            y: workspaceY,
            width: sceneViewWidth,
            height: workspaceHeight
        });
        this.container.add(this.sceneViewCanvas.container);
        
        // Inspector panel (right)
        this.inspectorPanel = new InspectorPanel(this, {
            x: hierarchyWidth + sceneViewWidth,
            y: workspaceY,
            width: inspectorWidth,
            height: workspaceHeight
        });
        this.container.add(this.inspectorPanel.container);
        
        // Project window (bottom)
        this.projectWindow = new ProjectWindow(this, {
            x: 0,
            y: height - this.config.projectHeight * height,
            width: width,
            height: this.config.projectHeight * height
        });
        this.container.add(this.projectWindow.container);
    }
    
    createMenuBar() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = 30;
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        const menus = [
            {
                label: 'File',
                items: [
                    { label: 'New Scene', action: () => this.newScene() },
                    { label: 'Open Scene', action: () => this.openScene() },
                    { label: 'Save Scene', action: () => this.saveScene() },
                    { label: 'Save Scene As...', action: () => this.saveSceneAs() },
                    { label: 'Exit Editor', action: () => this.close() }
                ]
            },
            {
                label: 'Edit',
                items: [
                    { label: 'Undo', action: () => this.undo(), hotkey: 'Ctrl+Z' },
                    { label: 'Redo', action: () => this.redo(), hotkey: 'Ctrl+Y' },
                    { label: 'Cut', action: () => this.cut(), hotkey: 'Ctrl+X' },
                    { label: 'Copy', action: () => this.copy(), hotkey: 'Ctrl+C' },
                    { label: 'Paste', action: () => this.paste(), hotkey: 'Ctrl+V' },
                    { label: 'Duplicate', action: () => this.duplicate(), hotkey: 'Ctrl+D' },
                    { label: 'Delete', action: () => this.deleteSelected(), hotkey: 'Del' }
                ]
            },
            {
                label: 'GameObject',
                items: [
                    { label: 'Create Empty', action: () => this.createEmpty() },
                    { label: 'Create Sprite', action: () => this.createSprite() },
                    { label: 'Create Tilemap', action: () => this.createTilemap() },
                    { label: 'Create Light', action: () => this.createLight() },
                    { label: 'Create Camera', action: () => this.createCamera() }
                ]
            },
            {
                label: 'Component',
                items: [
                    { label: 'Add...', action: () => this.showAddComponentDialog() }
                ]
            },
            {
                label: 'Window',
                items: [
                    { label: 'Tilemap Editor', action: () => this.openTilemapEditor() },
                    { label: 'Animation Editor', action: () => this.openAnimationEditor() },
                    { label: 'Prefab Editor', action: () => this.openPrefabEditor() }
                ]
            }
        ];
        
        let x = 10;
        menus.forEach(menu => {
            const menuBtn = this.scene.add.text(x, 15, menu.label, {
                font: '14px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            menuBtn.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            menuBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            menuBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.showDropdownMenu(x, height, menu.items);
            });
            
            this.container.add(menuBtn);
            x += menuBtn.width + 20;
        });
    }
    
    createToolbar() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const y = 30;
        const height = 40;
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, y, width, height, 0x3a3a3a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        const tools = [
            { 
                name: 'select', 
                icon: '⬚', 
                tooltip: 'Select (Q)',
                action: () => this.setTool('select')
            },
            { 
                name: 'move', 
                icon: '✥', 
                tooltip: 'Move (W)',
                action: () => this.setTool('move')
            },
            { 
                name: 'rotate', 
                icon: '↻', 
                tooltip: 'Rotate (E)',
                action: () => this.setTool('rotate')
            },
            { 
                name: 'scale', 
                icon: '⤡', 
                tooltip: 'Scale (R)',
                action: () => this.setTool('scale')
            },
            { 
                name: 'separator',
                icon: '|'
            },
            { 
                name: 'play', 
                icon: '▶', 
                tooltip: 'Play (Ctrl+P)',
                action: () => this.togglePlayMode()
            },
            { 
                name: 'pause', 
                icon: '⏸', 
                tooltip: 'Pause',
                action: () => this.pauseGame()
            },
            { 
                name: 'step', 
                icon: '⏭', 
                tooltip: 'Step',
                action: () => this.stepFrame()
            }
        ];
        
        let x = 10;
        tools.forEach(tool => {
            if (tool.name === 'separator') {
                const sep = this.scene.add.text(x, y + 20, tool.icon, {
                    font: '20px Arial',
                    fill: '#666666'
                });
                sep.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
                this.container.add(sep);
                x += 20;
                return;
            }
            
            const toolBtn = this.scene.add.text(x, y + 20, tool.icon, {
                font: '20px Arial',
                fill: this.currentTool === tool.name ? '#ffaa00' : '#ffffff'
            });
            toolBtn.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            toolBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            toolBtn.on('pointerover', () => {
                if (this.currentTool !== tool.name) {
                    toolBtn.setColor('#cccccc');
                }
                // Show tooltip
                this.showTooltip(tool.tooltip, x, y + height);
            });
            
            toolBtn.on('pointerout', () => {
                if (this.currentTool !== tool.name) {
                    toolBtn.setColor('#ffffff');
                }
                this.hideTooltip();
            });
            
            toolBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                tool.action();
            });
            
            this.container.add(toolBtn);
            
            // Store reference for updating active state
            toolBtn.toolName = tool.name;
            
            x += 40;
        });
        
        // Grid toggle
        const gridToggle = this.createToggleButton(
            width - 250, y + 10,
            'Show Grid',
            this.config.showGrid,
            (value) => {
                this.config.showGrid = value;
                this.sceneViewCanvas.updateGrid();
            }
        );
        this.container.add(gridToggle);
        
        // Snap to grid toggle
        const snapToggle = this.createToggleButton(
            width - 130, y + 10,
            'Snap',
            this.config.snapToGrid,
            (value) => {
                this.config.snapToGrid = value;
            }
        );
        this.container.add(snapToggle);
    }
    
    createToggleButton(x, y, label, initialState, onChange) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 100, 25, 
            initialState ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666, 1);
        container.add(bg);
        
        const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, label, {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#000000'
        });
        text.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(text);
        
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            initialState = !initialState;
            bg.setFillStyle(initialState ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666);
            onChange(initialState);
        });
        
        return container;
    }
    
    // === TOOL MANAGEMENT ===
    
    setTool(toolName) {
        this.currentTool = toolName;
        
        // Update toolbar button colors
        this.container.list.forEach(child => {
            if (child.toolName) {
                child.setColor(child.toolName === toolName ? '#ffaa00' : '#ffffff');
            }
        });
        
        // Update scene view
        this.sceneViewCanvas.setTool(toolName);
    }
    
    // === SCENE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    newScene() {
        const confirm = window.confirm('Create new scene? Unsaved changes will be lost.');
        if (!confirm) return;
        
        this.sceneObjects = [];
        this.selectedObjects = [];
        this.currentSceneName = 'untitled';
        
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.refresh();
        this.inspectorPanel.clear();
        
        this.saveHistory('New Scene');
    }
    
    saveScene() {
        const sceneData = this.exportScene();
        
        // Save to localStorage (in production would save to file)
        const key = `scene_${this.currentSceneName}`;
        localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(sceneData, null, 2));
        
        console.log(`[SceneEditor] Saved scene: ${this.currentSceneName}`);
        this.showNotification('Scene saved!');
    }
    
    saveSceneAs() {
        const name = prompt('Scene name:', this.currentSceneName);
        if (!name) return;
        
        this.currentSceneName = name;
        this.saveScene();
    }
    
    openScene() {
        const name = prompt('Scene name to open:');
        if (!name) return;
        
        const key = `scene_${name}`;
        const saved = localStorage.getItem(key);
        
        if (!saved) {
            alert('Scene not found!');
            return;
        }
        
        this.importScene(JSON.parse(saved));
        this.currentSceneName = name;
        
        console.log(`[SceneEditor] Opened scene: ${name}`);
    }
    
    exportScene() {
        return {
            name: this.currentSceneName,
            objects: this.sceneObjects.map(obj => obj.serialize()),
            metadata: {
                created: Date.now(),
                version: '1.0'
            }
        };
    }
    
    importScene(sceneData) {
        // Clear current scene
        this.sceneObjects.forEach(obj => obj.destroy());
        this.sceneObjects = [];
        
        // Create objects from data
        sceneData.objects.forEach(objData => {
            const obj = this.createSceneObject(objData.type, objData);
            obj.deserialize(objData);
        });
        
        // Refresh UI
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.refresh();
    }
    
    // === GAMEOBJECT CREATION ===
    
    createEmpty() {
        const obj = new SceneObject(this, 'empty', {
            x: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.x,
            y: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.y
        });
        
        this.sceneObjects.push(obj);
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
        
        this.selectObject(obj);
        this.saveHistory('Create Empty');
        
        return obj;
    }
    
    createSprite() {
        const obj = new SceneObject(this, 'sprite', {
            x: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.x,
            y: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.y
        });
        
        // Add sprite component
        obj.addComponent('sprite', {
            texture: null,
            tint: 0xffffff,
            alpha: 1.0
        });
        
        this.sceneObjects.push(obj);
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
        
        this.selectObject(obj);
        this.saveHistory('Create Sprite');
        
        return obj;
    }
    
    createTilemap() {
        const obj = new SceneObject(this, 'tilemap', {
            x: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.x,
            y: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.y
        });
        
        obj.addComponent('tilemap', {
            width: 20,
            height: 20,
            tileSize: 32,
            tileset: null,
            layers: []
        });
        
        this.sceneObjects.push(obj);
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
        
        this.selectObject(obj);
        this.saveHistory('Create Tilemap');
        
        return obj;
    }
    
    createLight() {
        const obj = new SceneObject(this, 'light', {
            x: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.x,
            y: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.y
        });
        
        obj.addComponent('light', {
            type: 'point',
            radius: 200,
            color: 0xffffff,
            intensity: 1.0
        });
        
        this.sceneObjects.push(obj);
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
        
        this.selectObject(obj);
        this.saveHistory('Create Light');
        
        return obj;
    }
    
    createCamera() {
        const obj = new SceneObject(this, 'camera', {
            x: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.x,
            y: this.sceneViewCanvas.camera.y
        });
        
        obj.addComponent('camera', {
            zoom: 1.0,
            followTarget: null
        });
        
        this.sceneObjects.push(obj);
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
        
        this.selectObject(obj);
        this.saveHistory('Create Camera');
        
        return obj;
    }
    
    createSceneObject(type, config) {
        const obj = new SceneObject(this, type, config);
        this.sceneObjects.push(obj);
        return obj;
    }
    
    // === SELECTION ===
    
    selectObject(obj, addToSelection = false) {
        if (!addToSelection) {
            this.clearSelection();
        }
        
        if (!this.selectedObjects.includes(obj)) {
            this.selectedObjects.push(obj);
            obj.setSelected(true);
        }
        
        this.hierarchyPanel.updateSelection();
        this.inspectorPanel.showObject(obj);
        this.sceneViewCanvas.updateGizmos();
    }
    
    deselectObject(obj) {
        const index = this.selectedObjects.indexOf(obj);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.selectedObjects.splice(index, 1);
            obj.setSelected(false);
        }
        
        this.hierarchyPanel.updateSelection();
        if (this.selectedObjects.length === 0) {
            this.inspectorPanel.clear();
        } else {
            this.inspectorPanel.showObject(this.selectedObjects[0]);
        }
        this.sceneViewCanvas.updateGizmos();
    }
    
    clearSelection() {
        this.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => obj.setSelected(false));
        this.selectedObjects = [];
        
        this.hierarchyPanel.updateSelection();
        this.inspectorPanel.clear();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.updateGizmos();
    }
    
    // === EDIT OPERATIONS ===
    
    cut() {
        this.copy();
        this.deleteSelected();
    }
    
    copy() {
        if (this.selectedObjects.length === 0) return;
        
        this.clipboard = this.selectedObjects.map(obj => obj.serialize());
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Copied', this.selectedObjects.length, 'object(s)');
    }
    
    paste() {
        if (!this.clipboard) return;
        
        this.clearSelection();
        
        this.clipboard.forEach(objData => {
            const obj = this.createSceneObject(objData.type, {
                x: objData.transform.x + 50,
                y: objData.transform.y + 50
            });
            obj.deserialize(objData);
            
            this.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
            this.selectObject(obj, true);
        });
        
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.saveHistory('Paste');
    }
    
    duplicate() {
        this.copy();
        this.paste();
    }
    
    deleteSelected() {
        if (this.selectedObjects.length === 0) return;
        
        this.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            const index = this.sceneObjects.indexOf(obj);
            if (index !== -1) {
                this.sceneObjects.splice(index, 1);
            }
            obj.destroy();
        });
        
        this.selectedObjects = [];
        
        this.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.inspectorPanel.clear();
        this.sceneViewCanvas.refresh();
        
        this.saveHistory('Delete');
    }
    
    // === HISTORY (UNDO/REDO) ===
    
    saveHistory(action) {
        // Remove future history
        this.history = this.history.slice(0, this.historyIndex + 1);
        
        // Save current state
        const state = {
            action: action,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            sceneData: this.exportScene()
        };
        
        this.history.push(state);
        this.historyIndex++;
        
        // Limit history size
        if (this.history.length > this.maxHistory) {
            this.history.shift();
            this.historyIndex--;
        }
        
        console.log(`[SceneEditor] History: ${action} (${this.historyIndex + 1}/${this.history.length})`);
    }
    
    undo() {
        if (this.historyIndex <= 0) {
            console.log('[SceneEditor] Nothing to undo');
            return;
        }
        
        this.historyIndex--;
        this.restoreHistory(this.history[this.historyIndex]);
        
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Undo:', this.history[this.historyIndex + 1].action);
    }
    
    redo() {
        if (this.historyIndex >= this.history.length - 1) {
            console.log('[SceneEditor] Nothing to redo');
            return;
        }
        
        this.historyIndex++;
        this.restoreHistory(this.history[this.historyIndex]);
        
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Redo:', this.history[this.historyIndex].action);
    }
    
    restoreHistory(state) {
        this.importScene(state.sceneData);
    }
    
    // === PLAY MODE ===
    
    togglePlayMode() {
        if (this.mode === 'edit') {
            this.enterPlayMode();
        } else {
            this.exitPlayMode();
        }
    }
    
    enterPlayMode() {
        this.mode = 'play';
        
        // Save current scene state
        this.playModeSnapshot = this.exportScene();
        
        // Hide editor UI, show game view
        this.hierarchyPanel.hide();
        this.inspectorPanel.hide();
        this.projectWindow.hide();
        
        // Start game
        this.scene.scene.resume();
        
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Entered play mode');
    }
    
    exitPlayMode() {
        this.mode = 'edit';
        
        // Restore scene state
        if (this.playModeSnapshot) {
            this.importScene(this.playModeSnapshot);
            this.playModeSnapshot = null;
        }
        
        // Show editor UI
        this.hierarchyPanel.show();
        this.inspectorPanel.show();
        this.projectWindow.show();
        
        // Pause game
        this.scene.scene.pause();
        
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Exited play mode');
    }
    
    pauseGame() {
        if (this.mode === 'play') {
            this.scene.scene.pause();
        }
    }
    
    stepFrame() {
        // Advance one frame
        if (this.mode === 'play') {
            this.scene.scene.update(16); // One frame at 60fps
        }
    }
    
    // === HOTKEYS ===
    
    setupHotkeys() {
        const keys = this.scene.input.keyboard;
        
        // Tools
        keys.on('keydown-Q', () => this.setTool('select'));
        keys.on('keydown-W', () => this.setTool('move'));
        keys.on('keydown-E', () => this.setTool('rotate'));
        keys.on('keydown-R', () => this.setTool('scale'));
        
        // Edit
        keys.on('keydown-Z', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.undo();
        });
        
        keys.on('keydown-Y', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.redo();
        });
        
        keys.on('keydown-X', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.cut();
        });
        
        keys.on('keydown-C', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.copy();
        });
        
        keys.on('keydown-V', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.paste();
        });
        
        keys.on('keydown-D', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.duplicate();
        });
        
        keys.on('keydown-DEL', () => this.deleteSelected());
        
        // Play mode
        keys.on('keydown-P', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) this.togglePlayMode();
        });
        
        // Save
        keys.on('keydown-S', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                event.preventDefault();
                this.saveScene();
            }
        });
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // Will be handled by individual panels
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    showDropdownMenu(x, y, items) {
        // Create dropdown menu
        // (Simplified - full implementation would be more complex)
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Dropdown menu:', items);
    }
    
    showTooltip(text, x, y) {
        // Show tooltip
        // (Simplified)
    }
    
    hideTooltip() {
        // Hide tooltip
    }
    
    showNotification(message) {
        console.log('[SceneEditor]', message);
        // Could show UI notification
    }
    
    showAddComponentDialog() {
        // Show component picker dialog
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Add component dialog');
    }
    
    openTilemapEditor() {
        // Open tilemap editor window
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Opening tilemap editor');
    }
    
    openAnimationEditor() {
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Opening animation editor');
    }
    
    openPrefabEditor() {
        console.log('[SceneEditor] Opening prefab editor');
    }
    
    // === VISIBILITY ===
    
    open() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
        this.mode = 'edit';
    }
    
    close() {
        const confirm = window.confirm('Close editor? Unsaved changes will be lost.');
        if (!confirm) return;
        
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
    
    // === UPDATE ===
    
    update(delta) {
        if (this.mode === 'edit') {
            this.sceneViewCanvas.update(delta);
        }
    }
}

export default IntegratedSceneEditor;

TOOL 15: INTEGRATED SCENE EDITOR (CONTINUATION)
Step 2: Scene View Canvas
javascript
// tools/SceneViewCanvas.js

class SceneViewCanvas {
    constructor(editor, config) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        this.x = config.x;
        this.y = config.y;
        this.width = config.width;
        this.height = config.height;
        
        // Camera
        this.camera = {
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            zoom: 1.0,
            minZoom: 0.1,
            maxZoom: 5.0
        };
        
        // Interaction state
        this.panning = false;
        this.panStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        this.dragging = false;
        this.dragStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        this.rubberBanding = false;
        this.rubberBandStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        
        // Current tool
        this.currentTool = 'select';
        
        // Gizmos
        this.gizmos = null;
        this.activeGizmo = null;
        
        // Grid
        this.gridGraphics = null;
        
        // Visual objects (representations of scene objects)
        this.visualObjects = new Map();
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0, 
            this.width, 
            this.height, 
            0x1a1a1a, 
            1
        );
        this.background.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Canvas container (for zoom/pan)
        this.canvas = this.scene.add.container(this.width / 2, this.height / 2);
        this.container.add(this.canvas);
        
        // Grid layer
        this.gridLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.gridLayer);
        this.createGrid();
        
        // Objects layer
        this.objectsLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.objectsLayer);
        
        // Gizmos layer (always on top)
        this.gizmosLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.gizmosLayer);
        this.createGizmos();
        
        // Selection overlay layer
        this.selectionLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.selectionLayer);
        
        // Setup interaction
        this.setupInput();
        
        // Camera bounds indicator
        this.createCameraBounds();
    }
    
    createGrid() {
        this.gridGraphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.gridLayer.add(this.gridGraphics);
        this.updateGrid();
    }
    
    updateGrid() {
        this.gridGraphics.clear();
        
        if (!this.editor.config.showGrid) return;
        
        const gridSize = this.editor.config.gridSize;
        const color = this.editor.config.gridColor;
        
        // Calculate visible area
        const visibleWidth = this.width / this.camera.zoom;
        const visibleHeight = this.height / this.camera.zoom;
        
        const startX = this.camera.x - visibleWidth / 2;
        const startY = this.camera.y - visibleHeight / 2;
        const endX = this.camera.x + visibleWidth / 2;
        const endY = this.camera.y + visibleHeight / 2;
        
        // Snap to grid
        const gridStartX = Math.floor(startX / gridSize) * gridSize;
        const gridStartY = Math.floor(startY / gridSize) * gridSize;
        
        // Draw grid lines
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(1, color, 0.3);
        
        // Vertical lines
        for (let x = gridStartX; x <= endX; x += gridSize) {
            this.gridGraphics.moveTo(x, startY);
            this.gridGraphics.lineTo(x, endY);
        }
        
        // Horizontal lines
        for (let y = gridStartY; y <= endY; y += gridSize) {
            this.gridGraphics.moveTo(startX, y);
            this.gridGraphics.lineTo(endX, y);
        }
        
        this.gridGraphics.strokePath();
        
        // Draw axes (thicker, colored lines)
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0xff0000, 0.5); // Red X-axis
        this.gridGraphics.moveTo(startX, 0);
        this.gridGraphics.lineTo(endX, 0);
        this.gridGraphics.strokePath();
        
        this.gridGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0x00ff00, 0.5); // Green Y-axis
        this.gridGraphics.moveTo(0, startY);
        this.gridGraphics.lineTo(0, endY);
        this.gridGraphics.strokePath();
    }
    
    createCameraBounds() {
        // Show game camera bounds (what player sees)
        this.cameraBoundsGraphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.canvas.add(this.cameraBoundsGraphics);
        
        this.updateCameraBounds();
    }
    
    updateCameraBounds() {
        this.cameraBoundsGraphics.clear();
        
        // Draw rectangle showing game camera view
        const gameWidth = this.scene.scale.width;
        const gameHeight = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        this.cameraBoundsGraphics.lineStyle(2, 0x00ffff, 0.5);
        this.cameraBoundsGraphics.strokeRect(
            -gameWidth / 2,
            -gameHeight / 2,
            gameWidth,
            gameHeight
        );
    }
    
    // === GIZMOS ===
    
    createGizmos() {
        this.gizmos = {
            move: this.createMoveGizmo(),
            rotate: this.createRotateGizmo(),
            scale: this.createScaleGizmo()
        };
        
        // Hide all by default
        Object.values(this.gizmos).forEach(gizmo => {
            gizmo.setVisible(false);
        });
    }
    
    createMoveGizmo() {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        
        // X-axis (red arrow)
        const xAxis = this.scene.add.graphics();
        xAxis.lineStyle(3, 0xff0000, 1);
        xAxis.moveTo(0, 0);
        xAxis.lineTo(50, 0);
        xAxis.strokePath();
        
        // Arrow head
        xAxis.fillStyle(0xff0000, 1);
        xAxis.fillTriangle(50, 0, 45, -5, 45, 5);
        
        container.add(xAxis);
        
        // Y-axis (green arrow)
        const yAxis = this.scene.add.graphics();
        yAxis.lineStyle(3, 0x00ff00, 1);
        yAxis.moveTo(0, 0);
        yAxis.lineTo(0, 50);
        yAxis.strokePath();
        
        // Arrow head
        yAxis.fillStyle(0x00ff00, 1);
        yAxis.fillTriangle(0, 50, -5, 45, 5, 45);
        
        container.add(yAxis);
        
        // Center square (for XY movement)
        const center = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 10, 10, 0xffff00, 1);
        center.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        
        center.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            this.onGizmoDrag('xy', dragX, dragY);
        });
        
        container.add(center);
        
        // X-axis handle
        const xHandle = this.scene.add.rectangle(40, 0, 20, 10, 0xff0000, 0);
        xHandle.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        
        xHandle.on('pointerover', () => {
            xHandle.setAlpha(0.3);
        });
        
        xHandle.on('pointerout', () => {
            xHandle.setAlpha(0);
        });
        
        xHandle.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            this.onGizmoDrag('x', dragX, dragY);
        });
        
        container.add(xHandle);
        
        // Y-axis handle
        const yHandle = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 40, 10, 20, 0x00ff00, 0);
        yHandle.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        
        yHandle.on('pointerover', () => {
            yHandle.setAlpha(0.3);
        });
        
        yHandle.on('pointerout', () => {
            yHandle.setAlpha(0);
        });
        
        yHandle.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            this.onGizmoDrag('y', dragX, dragY);
        });
        
        container.add(yHandle);
        
        this.gizmosLayer.add(container);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    createRotateGizmo() {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        
        // Rotation circle
        const circle = this.scene.add.graphics();
        circle.lineStyle(3, 0x4488ff, 1);
        circle.strokeCircle(0, 0, 60);
        container.add(circle);
        
        // Rotation handles (4 cardinal directions)
        const handlePositions = [
            { angle: 0, x: 60, y: 0 },
            { angle: Math.PI / 2, x: 0, y: 60 },
            { angle: Math.PI, x: -60, y: 0 },
            { angle: Math.PI * 1.5, x: 0, y: -60 }
        ];
        
        handlePositions.forEach(pos => {
            const handle = this.scene.add.circle(pos.x, pos.y, 8, 0x4488ff, 1);
            handle.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
            
            handle.on('drag', (pointer) => {
                this.onRotateGizmoDrag(pointer);
            });
            
            container.add(handle);
        });
        
        this.gizmosLayer.add(container);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    createScaleGizmo() {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        
        // Corner handles for scaling
        const handleSize = 10;
        const distance = 50;
        
        const corners = [
            { x: -distance, y: -distance, cursor: 'nwse-resize' },
            { x: distance, y: -distance, cursor: 'nesw-resize' },
            { x: distance, y: distance, cursor: 'nwse-resize' },
            { x: -distance, y: distance, cursor: 'nesw-resize' }
        ];
        
        corners.forEach(corner => {
            const handle = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                corner.x, 
                corner.y, 
                handleSize, 
                handleSize, 
                0xffaa00, 
                1
            );
            handle.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
            
            handle.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
                this.onScaleGizmoDrag(corner, dragX, dragY);
            });
            
            container.add(handle);
        });
        
        // Bounding box
        const bbox = this.scene.add.graphics();
        bbox.lineStyle(2, 0xffaa00, 0.5);
        bbox.strokeRect(-distance, -distance, distance * 2, distance * 2);
        container.add(bbox);
        
        this.gizmosLayer.add(container);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    updateGizmos() {
        // Hide all gizmos
        Object.values(this.gizmos).forEach(gizmo => {
            gizmo.setVisible(false);
        });
        
        // Show appropriate gizmo for current tool
        if (this.editor.selectedObjects.length === 0) return;
        
        // Get center of selection
        const bounds = this.getSelectionBounds();
        const centerX = bounds.x + bounds.width / 2;
        const centerY = bounds.y + bounds.height / 2;
        
        let activeGizmo = null;
        
        if (this.currentTool === 'move') {
            activeGizmo = this.gizmos.move;
        } else if (this.currentTool === 'rotate') {
            activeGizmo = this.gizmos.rotate;
        } else if (this.currentTool === 'scale') {
            activeGizmo = this.gizmos.scale;
            
            // Update scale gizmo to match selection bounds
            const bbox = activeGizmo.list.find(child => child instanceof Phaser.GameObjects.Graphics);
            if (bbox) {
                bbox.clear();
                bbox.lineStyle(2, 0xffaa00, 0.5);
                bbox.strokeRect(
                    -bounds.width / 2,
                    -bounds.height / 2,
                    bounds.width,
                    bounds.height
                );
            }
        }
        
        if (activeGizmo) {
            activeGizmo.setPosition(centerX, centerY);
            activeGizmo.setVisible(true);
        }
    }
    
    onGizmoDrag(axis, dragX, dragY) {
        if (this.editor.selectedObjects.length === 0) return;
        
        const deltaX = dragX - this.dragStart.x;
        const deltaY = dragY - this.dragStart.y;
        
        this.editor.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            if (axis === 'xy' || axis === 'x') {
                obj.transform.x += deltaX;
            }
            
            if (axis === 'xy' || axis === 'y') {
                obj.transform.y += deltaY;
            }
            
            // Snap to grid
            if (this.editor.config.snapToGrid) {
                const gridSize = this.editor.config.gridSize;
                obj.transform.x = Math.round(obj.transform.x / gridSize) * gridSize;
                obj.transform.y = Math.round(obj.transform.y / gridSize) * gridSize;
            }
            
            obj.updateVisual();
        });
        
        this.dragStart = { x: dragX, y: dragY };
        
        this.updateGizmos();
        this.editor.inspectorPanel.refresh();
    }
    
    onRotateGizmoDrag(pointer) {
        if (this.editor.selectedObjects.length === 0) return;
        
        // Calculate angle from gizmo center to pointer
        const bounds = this.getSelectionBounds();
        const centerX = bounds.x + bounds.width / 2;
        const centerY = bounds.y + bounds.height / 2;
        
        // Convert pointer world position
        const worldPos = this.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        const angle = Math.atan2(worldPos.y - centerY, worldPos.x - centerX);
        
        this.editor.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            obj.transform.rotation = angle;
            obj.updateVisual();
        });
        
        this.editor.inspectorPanel.refresh();
    }
    
    onScaleGizmoDrag(corner, dragX, dragY) {
        if (this.editor.selectedObjects.length === 0) return;
        
        const deltaX = dragX - this.dragStart.x;
        const deltaY = dragY - this.dragStart.y;
        
        this.editor.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            // Simple uniform scaling for now
            const scaleDelta = (deltaX + deltaY) / 100;
            
            obj.transform.scaleX += scaleDelta;
            obj.transform.scaleY += scaleDelta;
            
            // Clamp
            obj.transform.scaleX = Math.max(0.1, obj.transform.scaleX);
            obj.transform.scaleY = Math.max(0.1, obj.transform.scaleY);
            
            obj.updateVisual();
        });
        
        this.dragStart = { x: dragX, y: dragY };
        
        this.updateGizmos();
        this.editor.inspectorPanel.refresh();
    }
    
    getSelectionBounds() {
        if (this.editor.selectedObjects.length === 0) {
            return { x: 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0 };
        }
        
        let minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity;
        let maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
        
        this.editor.selectedObjects.forEach(obj => {
            const bounds = obj.getBounds();
            minX = Math.min(minX, bounds.x);
            minY = Math.min(minY, bounds.y);
            maxX = Math.max(maxX, bounds.x + bounds.width);
            maxY = Math.max(maxY, bounds.y + bounds.height);
        });
        
        return {
            x: minX,
            y: minY,
            width: maxX - minX,
            height: maxY - minY
        };
    }
    
    // === OBJECT MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addObject(sceneObject) {
        // Create visual representation
        const visual = this.createVisualObject(sceneObject);
        this.visualObjects.set(sceneObject.id, visual);
        this.objectsLayer.add(visual);
    }
    
    removeObject(sceneObject) {
        const visual = this.visualObjects.get(sceneObject.id);
        if (visual) {
            visual.destroy();
            this.visualObjects.delete(sceneObject.id);
        }
    }
    
    createVisualObject(sceneObject) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(
            sceneObject.transform.x,
            sceneObject.transform.y
        );
        
        // Add visual based on object type
        if (sceneObject.type === 'sprite') {
            const sprite = sceneObject.getComponent('sprite');
            if (sprite && sprite.texture) {
                const image = this.scene.add.image(0, 0, sprite.texture);
                image.setTint(sprite.tint);
                image.setAlpha(sprite.alpha);
                container.add(image);
            } else {
                // Placeholder
                const placeholder = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 32, 32, 0x888888, 0.5);
                container.add(placeholder);
            }
        } else if (sceneObject.type === 'light') {
            // Light icon
            const lightIcon = this.scene.add.circle(0, 0, 10, 0xffff00, 0.8);
            container.add(lightIcon);
            
            // Light radius
            const light = sceneObject.getComponent('light');
            if (light) {
                const radiusCircle = this.scene.add.circle(0, 0, light.radius);
                radiusCircle.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffff00, 0.3);
                container.add(radiusCircle);
            }
        } else if (sceneObject.type === 'camera') {
            // Camera icon
            const cameraIcon = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, '📷', {
                font: '24px Arial'
            });
            cameraIcon.setOrigin(0.5);
            container.add(cameraIcon);
        } else {
            // Default empty object icon
            const icon = this.scene.add.circle(0, 0, 5, 0xffffff, 0.8);
            container.add(icon);
        }
        
        // Make interactive
        const bounds = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 32, 32, 0xffffff, 0);
        bounds.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        
        bounds.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            this.onObjectClicked(sceneObject, pointer);
        });
        
        bounds.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            if (this.currentTool === 'select' || this.currentTool === 'move') {
                this.onObjectDrag(sceneObject, dragX, dragY);
            }
        });
        
        bounds.on('dragstart', (pointer) => {
            this.dragStart = { 
                x: sceneObject.transform.x, 
                y: sceneObject.transform.y 
            };
        });
        
        container.add(bounds);
        
        // Store reference
        container.sceneObject = sceneObject;
        sceneObject.visual = container;
        
        return container;
    }
    
    onObjectClicked(sceneObject, pointer) {
        const addToSelection = pointer.shiftKey;
        this.editor.selectObject(sceneObject, addToSelection);
    }
    
    onObjectDrag(sceneObject, dragX, dragY) {
        // Convert to world coordinates
        const worldPos = this.screenToWorld(dragX, dragY);
        
        // Snap to grid
        if (this.editor.config.snapToGrid) {
            const gridSize = this.editor.config.gridSize;
            worldPos.x = Math.round(worldPos.x / gridSize) * gridSize;
            worldPos.y = Math.round(worldPos.y / gridSize) * gridSize;
        }
        
        sceneObject.transform.x = worldPos.x;
        sceneObject.transform.y = worldPos.y;
        
        sceneObject.updateVisual();
        
        this.updateGizmos();
        this.editor.inspectorPanel.refresh();
    }
    
    refresh() {
        // Clear all visual objects
        this.visualObjects.forEach(visual => visual.destroy());
        this.visualObjects.clear();
        
        // Recreate from scene objects
        this.editor.sceneObjects.forEach(obj => {
            this.addObject(obj);
        });
        
        this.updateGizmos();
    }
    
    // === INPUT ===
    
    setupInput() {
        this.background.setInteractive();
        
        // Middle mouse / right mouse for panning
        this.background.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (pointer.middleButtonDown() || pointer.rightButtonDown()) {
                this.startPanning(pointer);
            } else if (pointer.leftButtonDown()) {
                // Start rubber-band selection
                if (this.currentTool === 'select') {
                    this.startRubberBand(pointer);
                }
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointermove', (pointer) => {
            if (this.panning) {
                this.updatePanning(pointer);
            } else if (this.rubberBanding) {
                this.updateRubberBand(pointer);
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointerup', (pointer) => {
            if (this.panning) {
                this.stopPanning();
            } else if (this.rubberBanding) {
                this.stopRubberBand();
            }
        });
        
        // Mouse wheel for zoom
        this.scene.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY) => {
            if (this.isPointerOver(pointer)) {
                this.zoom(deltaY > 0 ? -0.1 : 0.1);
            }
        });
    }
    
    isPointerOver(pointer) {
        return pointer.x >= this.x && 
               pointer.x <= this.x + this.width &&
               pointer.y >= this.y && 
               pointer.y <= this.y + this.height;
    }
    
    startPanning(pointer) {
        this.panning = true;
        this.panStart = {
            x: pointer.x,
            y: pointer.y,
            cameraX: this.camera.x,
            cameraY: this.camera.y
        };
    }
    
    updatePanning(pointer) {
        const deltaX = (pointer.x - this.panStart.x) / this.camera.zoom;
        const deltaY = (pointer.y - this.panStart.y) / this.camera.zoom;
        
        this.camera.x = this.panStart.cameraX - deltaX;
        this.camera.y = this.panStart.cameraY - deltaY;
        
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    stopPanning() {
        this.panning = false;
    }
    
    startRubberBand(pointer) {
        const worldPos = this.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        this.rubberBanding = true;
        this.rubberBandStart = worldPos;
        
        // Create rubber band visual
        if (!this.rubberBandGraphics) {
            this.rubberBandGraphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
            this.selectionLayer.add(this.rubberBandGraphics);
        }
    }
    
    updateRubberBand(pointer) {
        const worldPos = this.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        // Draw rubber band
        this.rubberBandGraphics.clear();
        this.rubberBandGraphics.lineStyle(1, 0xffaa00, 0.8);
        this.rubberBandGraphics.fillStyle(0xffaa00, 0.1);
        
        const x = Math.min(this.rubberBandStart.x, worldPos.x);
        const y = Math.min(this.rubberBandStart.y, worldPos.y);
        const width = Math.abs(worldPos.x - this.rubberBandStart.x);
        const height = Math.abs(worldPos.y - this.rubberBandStart.y);
        
        this.rubberBandGraphics.strokeRect(x, y, width, height);
        this.rubberBandGraphics.fillRect(x, y, width, height);
    }
    
    stopRubberBand() {
        if (!this.rubberBanding) return;
        
        const pointer = this.scene.input.activePointer;
        const worldPos = this.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        // Calculate selection bounds
        const bounds = new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(
            Math.min(this.rubberBandStart.x, worldPos.x),
            Math.min(this.rubberBandStart.y, worldPos.y),
            Math.abs(worldPos.x - this.rubberBandStart.x),
            Math.abs(worldPos.y - this.rubberBandStart.y)
        );
        
        // Select all objects within bounds
        this.editor.clearSelection();
        
        this.editor.sceneObjects.forEach(obj => {
            const objBounds = obj.getBounds();
            
            if (Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Overlaps(bounds, objBounds)) {
                this.editor.selectObject(obj, true);
            }
        });
        
        this.rubberBanding = false;
        this.rubberBandGraphics.clear();
    }
    
    zoom(delta) {
        const newZoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            this.camera.zoom + delta,
            this.camera.minZoom,
            this.camera.maxZoom
        );
        
        this.camera.zoom = newZoom;
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    updateCamera() {
        this.canvas.setPosition(
            this.width / 2 - this.camera.x * this.camera.zoom,
            this.height / 2 - this.camera.y * this.camera.zoom
        );
        this.canvas.setScale(this.camera.zoom);
        
        this.updateGrid();
    }
    
    screenToWorld(screenX, screenY) {
        // Convert screen coordinates to world coordinates
        const localX = screenX - this.x - this.width / 2;
        const localY = screenY - this.y - this.height / 2;
        
        return {
            x: (localX / this.camera.zoom) + this.camera.x,
            y: (localY / this.camera.zoom) + this.camera.y
        };
    }
    
    worldToScreen(worldX, worldY) {
        const localX = (worldX - this.camera.x) * this.camera.zoom;
        const localY = (worldY - this.camera.y) * this.camera.zoom;
        
        return {
            x: localX + this.x + this.width / 2,
            y: localY + this.y + this.height / 2
        };
    }
    
    setTool(toolName) {
        this.currentTool = toolName;
        this.updateGizmos();
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        // Update animations, etc.
    }
}

export default SceneViewCanvas;
Due to length, I'll continue with Hierarchy Panel and Inspector Panel in the next response. Should I continue?
