TOOL 15: INTEGRATED SCENE EDITOR (COMPLETE - PART 3)
Step 3: Hierarchy Panel
javascript
// tools/HierarchyPanel.js

class HierarchyPanel {
    constructor(editor, config) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        this.x = config.x;
        this.y = config.y;
        this.width = config.width;
        this.height = config.height;
        
        // Hierarchy tree
        this.treeItems = [];
        this.expandedNodes = new Set();
        
        // Scroll
        this.scrollY = 0;
        this.maxScroll = 0;
        
        // Search
        this.searchTerm = '';
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width,
            this.height,
            0x2a2a2a,
            1
        );
        this.background.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Border
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.width / 2,
            this.height / 2,
            this.width,
            this.height
        );
        border.setStrokeStyle(1, 0x666666, 1);
        this.container.add(border);
        
        // Title bar
        this.createTitleBar();
        
        // Search bar
        this.createSearchBar();
        
        // Content area (scrollable)
        this.contentY = 60;
        this.contentHeight = this.height - this.contentY - 40;
        
        this.contentMask = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.width / 2,
            this.contentY + this.contentHeight / 2,
            this.width,
            this.contentHeight,
            0xffffff
        );
        this.contentMask.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(this.contentMask);
        
        this.contentContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, this.contentY);
        this.container.add(this.contentContainer);
        
        // Create mask
        const maskShape = this.scene.make.graphics();
        maskShape.fillRect(
            this.x,
            this.y + this.contentY,
            this.width,
            this.contentHeight
        );
        const mask = maskShape.createGeometryMask();
        this.contentContainer.setMask(mask);
        
        // Action buttons at bottom
        this.createActionButtons();
        
        // Setup input
        this.setupInput();
        
        // Initial refresh
        this.refresh();
    }
    
    createTitleBar() {
        const titleBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width, 30,
            0x3a3a3a, 1
        );
        titleBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(titleBg);
        
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 15, 'Hierarchy', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        title.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(title);
    }
    
    createSearchBar() {
        const searchBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            5, 35,
            this.width - 10, 20,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        searchBg.setOrigin(0);
        searchBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.container.add(searchBg);
        
        this.searchText = this.scene.add.text(10, 45, '🔍 Search...', {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#888888'
        });
        this.searchText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.searchText);
        
        // Click to open search input (simplified - in production would use DOM input)
        searchBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const term = prompt('Search objects:', this.searchTerm);
            if (term !== null) {
                this.searchTerm = term;
                this.searchText.setText(term || '🔍 Search...');
                this.searchText.setColor(term ? '#ffffff' : '#888888');
                this.refresh();
            }
        });
    }
    
    createActionButtons() {
        const buttonY = this.height - 30;
        const buttonHeight = 25;
        
        // Create button
        const createBtn = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            5, buttonY,
            (this.width - 15) / 2, buttonHeight,
            0x44ff88, 1
        );
        createBtn.setOrigin(0);
        createBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.container.add(createBtn);
        
        const createText = this.scene.add.text(
            (this.width - 15) / 4, buttonY + buttonHeight / 2,
            '+',
            { font: 'bold 18px Arial', fill: '#000000' }
        );
        createText.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(createText);
        
        createBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.showCreateMenu();
        });
        
        // Delete button
        const deleteBtn = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            (this.width - 15) / 2 + 10, buttonY,
            (this.width - 15) / 2, buttonHeight,
            0xff4444, 1
        );
        deleteBtn.setOrigin(0);
        deleteBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.container.add(deleteBtn);
        
        const deleteText = this.scene.add.text(
            (this.width - 15) * 3 / 4 + 5, buttonY + buttonHeight / 2,
            '−',
            { font: 'bold 18px Arial', fill: '#000000' }
        );
        deleteText.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(deleteText);
        
        deleteBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.editor.deleteSelected();
        });
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // Scroll with mouse wheel
        this.background.setInteractive();
        
        this.scene.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY) => {
            if (this.isPointerOver(pointer)) {
                this.scroll(deltaY > 0 ? 30 : -30);
            }
        });
    }
    
    isPointerOver(pointer) {
        return pointer.x >= this.x &&
               pointer.x <= this.x + this.width &&
               pointer.y >= this.y &&
               pointer.y <= this.y + this.height;
    }
    
    scroll(delta) {
        this.scrollY = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            this.scrollY + delta,
            0,
            Math.max(0, this.maxScroll - this.contentHeight)
        );
        
        this.updateScroll();
    }
    
    updateScroll() {
        this.contentContainer.setY(this.contentY - this.scrollY);
    }
    
    // === TREE RENDERING ===
    
    refresh() {
        // Clear existing tree items
        this.contentContainer.removeAll(true);
        this.treeItems = [];
        
        // Filter objects by search term
        let objects = this.editor.sceneObjects;
        
        if (this.searchTerm) {
            const term = this.searchTerm.toLowerCase();
            objects = objects.filter(obj => 
                obj.name.toLowerCase().includes(term)
            );
        }
        
        // Build tree structure
        const rootObjects = objects.filter(obj => !obj.parent);
        
        let y = 10;
        rootObjects.forEach(obj => {
            y = this.renderTreeItem(obj, 0, y);
        });
        
        // Update max scroll
        this.maxScroll = y + 10;
        
        // Update scroll position if needed
        this.updateScroll();
    }
    
    renderTreeItem(sceneObject, depth, y) {
        const itemHeight = 25;
        const indent = depth * 20;
        
        // Item container
        const itemContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, y);
        
        // Background (for selection highlight)
        const isSelected = this.editor.selectedObjects.includes(sceneObject);
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width, itemHeight,
            isSelected ? 0x4488ff : 0x2a2a2a,
            isSelected ? 0.5 : 0
        );
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        itemContainer.add(bg);
        
        // Expand/collapse arrow (if has children)
        const hasChildren = sceneObject.children && sceneObject.children.length > 0;
        
        if (hasChildren) {
            const isExpanded = this.expandedNodes.has(sceneObject.id);
            const arrow = this.scene.add.text(
                indent + 5, itemHeight / 2,
                isExpanded ? '▼' : '▶',
                { font: '10px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
            );
            arrow.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            arrow.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            arrow.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
                pointer.event.stopPropagation();
                this.toggleExpanded(sceneObject);
            });
            
            itemContainer.add(arrow);
        }
        
        // Icon based on type
        const icon = this.getObjectIcon(sceneObject);
        const iconText = this.scene.add.text(
            indent + (hasChildren ? 20 : 5), itemHeight / 2,
            icon,
            { font: '14px Arial' }
        );
        iconText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        itemContainer.add(iconText);
        
        // Object name
        const nameText = this.scene.add.text(
            indent + (hasChildren ? 40 : 25), itemHeight / 2,
            sceneObject.name,
            { 
                font: '12px Arial', 
                fill: sceneObject.active ? '#ffffff' : '#888888'
            }
        );
        nameText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        itemContainer.add(nameText);
        
        // Visibility toggle
        const eyeIcon = this.scene.add.text(
            this.width - 50, itemHeight / 2,
            sceneObject.visible ? '👁' : '🚫',
            { font: '12px Arial' }
        );
        eyeIcon.setOrigin(0.5);
        eyeIcon.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        eyeIcon.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            pointer.event.stopPropagation();
            sceneObject.visible = !sceneObject.visible;
            sceneObject.updateVisual();
            this.refresh();
        });
        
        itemContainer.add(eyeIcon);
        
        // Lock toggle
        const lockIcon = this.scene.add.text(
            this.width - 25, itemHeight / 2,
            sceneObject.locked ? '🔒' : '🔓',
            { font: '12px Arial' }
        );
        lockIcon.setOrigin(0.5);
        lockIcon.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        lockIcon.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            pointer.event.stopPropagation();
            sceneObject.locked = !sceneObject.locked;
            this.refresh();
        });
        
        itemContainer.add(lockIcon);
        
        // Click to select
        bg.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            const addToSelection = pointer.shiftKey;
            this.editor.selectObject(sceneObject, addToSelection);
        });
        
        // Right-click for context menu
        bg.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (pointer.rightButtonDown()) {
                this.showContextMenu(sceneObject, pointer);
            }
        });
        
        // Drag to reparent
        bg.setInteractive({ draggable: true });
        
        bg.on('dragstart', () => {
            this.draggingObject = sceneObject;
        });
        
        bg.on('dragenter', () => {
            if (this.draggingObject && this.draggingObject !== sceneObject) {
                bg.setFillStyle(0x44ff88, 0.3);
            }
        });
        
        bg.on('dragleave', () => {
            bg.setFillStyle(isSelected ? 0x4488ff : 0x2a2a2a, isSelected ? 0.5 : 0);
        });
        
        bg.on('drop', () => {
            if (this.draggingObject && this.draggingObject !== sceneObject) {
                this.reparentObject(this.draggingObject, sceneObject);
                this.draggingObject = null;
            }
        });
        
        this.contentContainer.add(itemContainer);
        this.treeItems.push(itemContainer);
        
        y += itemHeight;
        
        // Render children if expanded
        if (hasChildren && this.expandedNodes.has(sceneObject.id)) {
            sceneObject.children.forEach(child => {
                y = this.renderTreeItem(child, depth + 1, y);
            });
        }
        
        return y;
    }
    
    getObjectIcon(sceneObject) {
        const iconMap = {
            'empty': '⬚',
            'sprite': '🖼',
            'tilemap': '🗺',
            'light': '💡',
            'camera': '📷',
            'text': '📝',
            'particle': '✨'
        };
        
        return iconMap[sceneObject.type] || '⬚';
    }
    
    toggleExpanded(sceneObject) {
        if (this.expandedNodes.has(sceneObject.id)) {
            this.expandedNodes.delete(sceneObject.id);
        } else {
            this.expandedNodes.add(sceneObject.id);
        }
        
        this.refresh();
    }
    
    reparentObject(child, newParent) {
        // Remove from old parent
        if (child.parent) {
            const index = child.parent.children.indexOf(child);
            if (index !== -1) {
                child.parent.children.splice(index, 1);
            }
        }
        
        // Add to new parent
        child.parent = newParent;
        if (!newParent.children) {
            newParent.children = [];
        }
        newParent.children.push(child);
        
        // Update transform hierarchy
        child.updateTransformHierarchy();
        
        this.refresh();
        this.editor.saveHistory('Reparent Object');
    }
    
    updateSelection() {
        this.refresh();
    }
    
    showCreateMenu() {
        // Show context menu with create options
        const options = [
            { label: 'Create Empty', action: () => this.editor.createEmpty() },
            { label: 'Create Sprite', action: () => this.editor.createSprite() },
            { label: 'Create Tilemap', action: () => this.editor.createTilemap() },
            { label: 'Create Light', action: () => this.editor.createLight() },
            { label: 'Create Camera', action: () => this.editor.createCamera() }
        ];
        
        // Simplified - in production would show proper context menu
        const choice = prompt('Create:\n' + options.map((o, i) => `${i + 1}. ${o.label}`).join('\n'));
        const index = parseInt(choice) - 1;
        
        if (index >= 0 && index < options.length) {
            options[index].action();
        }
    }
    
    showContextMenu(sceneObject, pointer) {
        const options = [
            { 
                label: 'Rename', 
                action: () => {
                    const newName = prompt('New name:', sceneObject.name);
                    if (newName) {
                        sceneObject.name = newName;
                        this.refresh();
                    }
                }
            },
            { 
                label: 'Duplicate', 
                action: () => {
                    this.editor.selectObject(sceneObject);
                    this.editor.duplicate();
                }
            },
            { 
                label: 'Delete', 
                action: () => {
                    this.editor.selectObject(sceneObject);
                    this.editor.deleteSelected();
                }
            },
            {
                label: 'Create Child',
                action: () => {
                    const child = this.editor.createEmpty();
                    this.reparentObject(child, sceneObject);
                }
            }
        ];
        
        // Simplified context menu
        const choice = prompt('Actions:\n' + options.map((o, i) => `${i + 1}. ${o.label}`).join('\n'));
        const index = parseInt(choice) - 1;
        
        if (index >= 0 && index < options.length) {
            options[index].action();
        }
    }
    
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    hide() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default HierarchyPanel;
Step 4: Inspector Panel
javascript
// tools/InspectorPanel.js

class InspectorPanel {
    constructor(editor, config) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        this.x = config.x;
        this.y = config.y;
        this.width = config.width;
        this.height = config.height;
        
        // Current object being inspected
        this.currentObject = null;
        
        // Property editors
        this.propertyEditors = [];
        
        // Scroll
        this.scrollY = 0;
        this.maxScroll = 0;
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width,
            this.height,
            0x2a2a2a,
            1
        );
        this.background.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Border
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.width / 2,
            this.height / 2,
            this.width,
            this.height
        );
        border.setStrokeStyle(1, 0x666666, 1);
        this.container.add(border);
        
        // Title bar
        this.createTitleBar();
        
        // Content area (scrollable)
        this.contentY = 40;
        this.contentHeight = this.height - this.contentY - 50;
        
        this.contentContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, this.contentY);
        this.container.add(this.contentContainer);
        
        // Create mask
        const maskShape = this.scene.make.graphics();
        maskShape.fillRect(
            this.x,
            this.y + this.contentY,
            this.width,
            this.contentHeight
        );
        const mask = maskShape.createGeometryMask();
        this.contentContainer.setMask(mask);
        
        // Add component button
        this.createAddComponentButton();
        
        // Setup input
        this.setupInput();
    }
    
    createTitleBar() {
        const titleBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width, 30,
            0x3a3a3a, 1
        );
        titleBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(titleBg);
        
        this.titleText = this.scene.add.text(10, 15, 'Inspector', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.titleText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.titleText);
    }
    
    createAddComponentButton() {
        const buttonY = this.height - 35;
        
        const addBtn = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            10, buttonY,
            this.width - 20, 25,
            0x44ff88, 1
        );
        addBtn.setOrigin(0);
        addBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.container.add(addBtn);
        
        const addText = this.scene.add.text(
            this.width / 2, buttonY + 12.5,
            'Add Component',
            { font: 'bold 12px Arial', fill: '#000000' }
        );
        addText.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(addText);
        
        addBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.showAddComponentDialog();
        });
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // Scroll with mouse wheel
        this.background.setInteractive();
        
        this.scene.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY) => {
            if (this.isPointerOver(pointer)) {
                this.scroll(deltaY > 0 ? 30 : -30);
            }
        });
    }
    
    isPointerOver(pointer) {
        return pointer.x >= this.x &&
               pointer.x <= this.x + this.width &&
               pointer.y >= this.y &&
               pointer.y <= this.y + this.height;
    }
    
    scroll(delta) {
        this.scrollY = Phaser.Math.Clamp(
            this.scrollY + delta,
            0,
            Math.max(0, this.maxScroll - this.contentHeight)
        );
        
        this.updateScroll();
    }
    
    updateScroll() {
        this.contentContainer.setY(this.contentY - this.scrollY);
    }
    
    // === OBJECT INSPECTION ===
    
    showObject(sceneObject) {
        this.currentObject = sceneObject;
        this.rebuild();
    }
    
    clear() {
        this.currentObject = null;
        this.rebuild();
    }
    
    rebuild() {
        // Clear existing property editors
        this.contentContainer.removeAll(true);
        this.propertyEditors = [];
        
        if (!this.currentObject) {
            const emptyText = this.scene.add.text(
                this.width / 2, 50,
                'No object selected',
                { font: '14px Arial', fill: '#888888' }
            );
            emptyText.setOrigin(0.5, 0);
            this.contentContainer.add(emptyText);
            return;
        }
        
        let y = 10;
        
        // Object name
        y = this.createObjectNameEditor(y);
        
        y += 10;
        
        // Transform component (always present)
        y = this.createTransformComponent(y);
        
        y += 10;
        
        // Other components
        this.currentObject.components.forEach(component => {
            y = this.createComponentEditor(component, y);
            y += 10;
        });
        
        // Update max scroll
        this.maxScroll = y + 10;
        this.updateScroll();
    }
    
    createObjectNameEditor(y) {
        const label = this.scene.add.text(10, y, 'Name', {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(label);
        
        y += 20;
        
        const inputBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            10, y,
            this.width - 20, 25,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        inputBg.setOrigin(0);
        inputBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(inputBg);
        
        const inputText = this.scene.add.text(
            15, y + 12.5,
            this.currentObject.name,
            { font: '12px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        inputText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(inputText);
        
        inputBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newName = prompt('Object name:', this.currentObject.name);
            if (newName) {
                this.currentObject.name = newName;
                inputText.setText(newName);
                this.editor.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
            }
        });
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    createTransformComponent(y) {
        // Component header
        y = this.createComponentHeader('Transform', y, false);
        
        // Position
        y = this.createVector2Property('Position', 'transform', 'x', 'y', y);
        
        // Rotation (in degrees)
        y = this.createNumberProperty(
            'Rotation',
            Phaser.Math.RadToDeg(this.currentObject.transform.rotation),
            (value) => {
                this.currentObject.transform.rotation = Phaser.Math.DegToRad(value);
                this.currentObject.updateVisual();
                this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.updateGizmos();
            },
            y
        );
        
        // Scale
        y = this.createVector2Property('Scale', 'transform', 'scaleX', 'scaleY', y);
        
        return y;
    }
    
    createComponentEditor(component, y) {
        // Component header
        y = this.createComponentHeader(component.type, y, true);
        
        // Component properties
        Object.entries(component.data).forEach(([key, value]) => {
            y = this.createPropertyEditor(component, key, value, y);
        });
        
        return y;
    }
    
    createComponentHeader(name, y, canRemove) {
        const headerBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, y,
            this.width, 25,
            0x3a3a3a, 1
        );
        headerBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.contentContainer.add(headerBg);
        
        const headerText = this.scene.add.text(
            10, y + 12.5,
            name,
            { font: 'bold 12px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        headerText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(headerText);
        
        if (canRemove) {
            const removeBtn = this.scene.add.text(
                this.width - 15, y + 12.5,
                '×',
                { font: 'bold 16px Arial', fill: '#ff4444' }
            );
            removeBtn.setOrigin(0.5);
            removeBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            removeBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.currentObject.removeComponent(name);
                this.rebuild();
            });
            
            this.contentContainer.add(removeBtn);
        }
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    createPropertyEditor(component, key, value, y) {
        const type = typeof value;
        
        if (type === 'number') {
            return this.createNumberProperty(
                this.formatPropertyName(key),
                value,
                (newValue) => {
                    component.data[key] = newValue;
                    this.currentObject.updateVisual();
                },
                y
            );
        } else if (type === 'boolean') {
            return this.createBooleanProperty(
                this.formatPropertyName(key),
                value,
                (newValue) => {
                    component.data[key] = newValue;
                    this.currentObject.updateVisual();
                },
                y
            );
        } else if (type === 'string') {
            return this.createStringProperty(
                this.formatPropertyName(key),
                value,
                (newValue) => {
                    component.data[key] = newValue;
                    this.currentObject.updateVisual();
                },
                y
            );
        } else if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
            return this.createObjectProperty(
                this.formatPropertyName(key),
                value,
                y
            );
        }
        
        return y;
    }
    
    createNumberProperty(label, value, onChange, y) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(10, y, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        y += 18;
        
        const inputBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            10, y,
            this.width - 20, 20,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        inputBg.setOrigin(0);
        inputBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(inputBg);
        
        const inputText = this.scene.add.text(
            15, y + 10,
            value.toFixed(2),
            { font: '11px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        inputText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(inputText);
        
        inputBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = prompt(label + ':', value);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                const parsed = parseFloat(newValue);
                if (!isNaN(parsed)) {
                    onChange(parsed);
                    inputText.setText(parsed.toFixed(2));
                }
            }
        });
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    createVector2Property(label, componentKey, xKey, yKey, y) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(10, y, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        y += 18;
        
        // X input
        const xBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            10, y,
            (this.width - 30) / 2, 20,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        xBg.setOrigin(0);
        xBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(xBg);
        
        const xLabel = this.scene.add.text(15, y + 10, 'X', {
            font: 'bold 10px Arial',
            fill: '#ff4444'
        });
        xLabel.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(xLabel);
        
        const xValue = this.scene.add.text(
            30, y + 10,
            this.currentObject[componentKey][xKey].toFixed(1),
            { font: '11px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        xValue.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(xValue);
        
        xBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = prompt('X:', this.currentObject[componentKey][xKey]);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                const parsed = parseFloat(newValue);
                if (!isNaN(parsed)) {
                    this.currentObject[componentKey][xKey] = parsed;
                    xValue.setText(parsed.toFixed(1));
                    this.currentObject.updateVisual();
                    this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.updateGizmos();
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Y input
        const yBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            (this.width - 30) / 2 + 15, y,
            (this.width - 30) / 2, 20,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        yBg.setOrigin(0);
        yBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(yBg);
        
        const yLabel = this.scene.add.text(
            (this.width - 30) / 2 + 20, y + 10,
            'Y',
            { font: 'bold 10px Arial', fill: '#44ff44' }
        );
        yLabel.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(yLabel);
        
        const yValue = this.scene.add.text(
            (this.width - 30) / 2 + 35, y + 10,
            this.currentObject[componentKey][yKey].toFixed(1),
            { font: '11px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        yValue.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(yValue);
        
        yBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = prompt('Y:', this.currentObject[componentKey][yKey]);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                const parsed = parseFloat(newValue);
                if (!isNaN(parsed)) {
                    this.currentObject[componentKey][yKey] = parsed;
                    yValue.setText(parsed.toFixed(1));
                    this.currentObject.updateVisual();
                    this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.updateGizmos();
                }
            }
        });
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    createBooleanProperty(label, value, onChange, y) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(10, y);
        
        const checkbox = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 8,
            15, 15,
            value ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666,
            1
        );
        checkbox.setOrigin(0);
        checkbox.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(checkbox);
        
        if (value) {
            const checkmark = this.scene.add.text(7.5, 15.5, '✓', {
                font: 'bold 12px Arial',
                fill: '#000000'
            });
            checkmark.setOrigin(0.5);
            container.add(checkmark);
        }
        
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(20, 8, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        labelText.setOrigin(0);
        container.add(labelText);
        
        checkbox.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = !value;
            onChange(newValue);
            this.rebuild();
        });
        
        this.contentContainer.add(container);
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    createStringProperty(label, value, onChange, y) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(10, y, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        y += 18;
        
        const inputBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            10, y,
            this.width - 20, 20,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        inputBg.setOrigin(0);
        inputBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(inputBg);
        
        const inputText = this.scene.add.text(
            15, y + 10,
            value || '(empty)',
            { 
                font: '11px Arial', 
                fill: value ? '#ffffff' : '#888888' 
            }
        );
        inputText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(inputText);
        
        inputBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = prompt(label + ':', value);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                onChange(newValue);
                inputText.setText(newValue || '(empty)');
                inputText.setColor(newValue ? '#ffffff' : '#888888');
            }
        });
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    createObjectProperty(label, value, y) {
        // Collapsible object editor
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(10, y, '▶ ' + label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        labelText.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        labelText.on('pointerdown', () => {
            // Toggle expansion (simplified)
            console.log('Expand object:', label, value);
        });
        
        return y + 20;
    }
    
    formatPropertyName(name) {
        // Convert camelCase to Title Case
        return name
            .replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1')
            .replace(/^./, str => str.toUpperCase());
    }
    
    showAddComponentDialog() {
        if (!this.currentObject) return;
        
        const components = [
            { type: 'sprite', label: 'Sprite Renderer' },
            { type: 'collider', label: 'Box Collider' },
            { type: 'rigidbody', label: 'Rigidbody' },
            { type: 'light', label: 'Light 2D' },
            { type: 'camera', label: 'Camera' },
            { type: 'script', label: 'Script' },
            { type: 'audio', label: 'Audio Source' },
            { type: 'particle', label: 'Particle System' }
        ];
        
        // Simplified component selector
        const choice = prompt(
            'Add Component:\n' + 
            components.map((c, i) => `${i + 1}. ${c.label}`).join('\n')
        );
        
        const index = parseInt(choice) - 1;
        
        if (index >= 0 && index < components.length) {
            this.addComponent(components[index].type);
        }
    }
    
    addComponent(type) {
        const defaultData = this.getDefaultComponentData(type);
        this.currentObject.addComponent(type, defaultData);
        this.rebuild();
        this.editor.saveHistory('Add Component');
    }
    
    getDefaultComponentData(type) {
        const defaults = {
            sprite: {
                texture: null,
                tint: 0xffffff,
                alpha: 1.0
            },
            collider: {
                width: 32,
                height: 32,
                isTrigger: false
            },
            rigidbody: {
                mass: 1.0,
                gravity: 1.0,
                drag: 0.0
            },
            light: {
                type: 'point',
                radius: 200,
                color: 0xffffff,
                intensity: 1.0
            },
            camera: {
                zoom: 1.0,
                followTarget: null
            },
            script: {
                scriptName: '',
                enabled: true
            },
            audio: {
                clip: null,
                volume: 1.0,
                loop: false
            },
            particle: {
                config: null
            }
        };
        
        return defaults[type] || {};
    }
    
    refresh() {
        if (this.currentObject) {
            this.rebuild();
        }
    }
    
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    hide() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default InspectorPanel;
Step 5: Project Window (Asset Browser)
javascript
// tools/ProjectWindow.js

class ProjectWindow {
    constructor(editor, config) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        this.x = config.x;
        this.y = config.y;
        this.width = config.width;
        this.height = config.height;
        
        // Asset library
        this.assets = {
            sprites: [],
            prefabs: [],
            scenes: [],
            scripts: [],
            audio: [],
            materials: []
        };
        
        // Current folder
        this.currentFolder = 'sprites';
        
        // View mode
        this.viewMode = 'grid'; // 'grid' or 'list'
        
        // Selection
        this.selectedAsset = null;
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        // Background
        this.background = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width,
            this.height,
            0x2a2a2a,
            1
        );
        this.background.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.background);
        
        // Border
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.width / 2,
            this.height / 2,
            this.width,
            this.height
        );
        border.setStrokeStyle(1, 0x666666, 1);
        this.container.add(border);
        
        // Title bar with tabs
        this.createTitleBar();
        
        // Content area
        this.contentY = 60;
        this.contentHeight = this.height - this.contentY;
        
        this.contentContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, this.contentY);
        this.container.add(this.contentContainer);
        
        // Load assets
        this.loadAssets();
        
        // Render content
        this.refresh();
    }
    
    createTitleBar() {
        const titleBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            this.width, 30,
            0x3a3a3a, 1
        );
        titleBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(titleBg);
        
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 15, 'Project', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        title.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(title);
        
        // View mode toggle
        const viewBtn = this.scene.add.text(
            this.width - 40, 15,
            this.viewMode === 'grid' ? '⊞' : '☰',
            { font: '18px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        viewBtn.setOrigin(0.5);
        viewBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        viewBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.viewMode = this.viewMode === 'grid' ? 'list' : 'grid';
            viewBtn.setText(this.viewMode === 'grid' ? '⊞' : '☰');
            this.refresh();
        });
        
        this.container.add(viewBtn);
        
        // Folder tabs
        this.createFolderTabs();
    }
    
    createFolderTabs() {
        const folders = ['sprites', 'prefabs', 'scenes', 'scripts', 'audio'];
        const tabWidth = 100;
        const tabY = 35;
        
        folders.forEach((folder, index) => {
            const isActive = this.currentFolder === folder;
            
            const tabBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                index * tabWidth, tabY,
                tabWidth, 25,
                isActive ? 0x4488ff : 0x333333,
                1
            );
            tabBg.setOrigin(0);
            tabBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            this.container.add(tabBg);
            
            const tabText = this.scene.add.text(
                index * tabWidth + tabWidth / 2, tabY + 12.5,
                folder.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + folder.slice(1),
                { 
                    font: isActive ? 'bold 11px Arial' : '11px Arial', 
                    fill: '#ffffff' 
                }
            );
            tabText.setOrigin(0.5);
            this.container.add(tabText);
            
            tabBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.currentFolder = folder;
                this.refresh();
                
                // Recreate tabs to update active state
                this.container.list.forEach(child => {
                    if (child.tabFolder) {
                        child.destroy();
                    }
                });
                this.createFolderTabs();
            });
            
            tabBg.tabFolder = true;
        });
    }
    
    loadAssets() {
        // Load available assets from Phaser's texture manager
        const textures = this.scene.textures.list;
        
        Object.keys(textures).forEach(key => {
            if (key !== '__DEFAULT' && key !== '__MISSING') {
                this.assets.sprites.push({
                    type: 'sprite',
                    key: key,
                    name: key,
                    path: key
                });
            }
        });
        
        // Load saved prefabs
        this.loadPrefabs();
        
        // Load saved scenes
        this.loadScenes();
    }
    
    loadPrefabs() {
        // Load prefabs from localStorage
        for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
            const key = localStorage.key(i);
            if (key.startsWith('prefab_')) {
                this.assets.prefabs.push({
                    type: 'prefab',
                    key: key,
                    name: key.replace('prefab_', ''),
                    path: key
                });
            }
        }
    }
    
    loadScenes() {
        // Load scenes from localStorage
        for (let i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
            const key = localStorage.key(i);
            if (key.startsWith('scene_')) {
                this.assets.scenes.push({
                    type: 'scene',
                    key: key,
                    name: key.replace('scene_', ''),
                    path: key
                });
            }
        }
    }
    
    refresh() {
        // Clear content
        this.contentContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        const assets = this.assets[this.currentFolder] || [];
        
        if (assets.length === 0) {
            const emptyText = this.scene.add.text(
                this.width / 2, 50,
                `No ${this.currentFolder} found`,
                { font: '14px Arial', fill: '#888888' }
            );
            emptyText.setOrigin(0.5, 0);
            this.contentContainer.add(emptyText);
            return;
        }
        
        if (this.viewMode === 'grid') {
            this.renderGridView(assets);
        } else {
            this.renderListView(assets);
        }
    }
    
    renderGridView(assets) {
        const itemSize = 80;
        const spacing = 10;
        const cols = Math.floor((this.width - 20) / (itemSize + spacing));
        
        assets.forEach((asset, index) => {
            const col = index % cols;
            const row = Math.floor(index / cols);
            
            const x = 10 + col * (itemSize + spacing);
            const y = 10 + row * (itemSize + spacing);
            
            const item = this.createGridItem(asset, x, y, itemSize);
            this.contentContainer.add(item);
        });
    }
    
    createGridItem(asset, x, y, size) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            size / 2, size / 2,
            size, size,
            0x1a1a1a, 1
        );
        bg.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        // Thumbnail
        if (asset.type === 'sprite' && this.scene.textures.exists(asset.key)) {
            const thumbnail = this.scene.add.image(size / 2, size / 2, asset.key);
            
            // Scale to fit
            const scale = Math.min(
                (size - 10) / thumbnail.width,
                (size - 10) / thumbnail.height
            );
            thumbnail.setScale(scale);
            
            container.add(thumbnail);
        } else {
            // Icon placeholder
            const icon = this.scene.add.text(
                size / 2, size / 2,
                this.getAssetIcon(asset.type),
                { font: '32px Arial' }
            );
            icon.setOrigin(0.5);
            container.add(icon);
        }
        
        // Name label
        const nameText = this.scene.add.text(
            size / 2, size + 5,
            asset.name,
            { 
                font: '10px Arial', 
                fill: '#ffffff',
                wordWrap: { width: size }
            }
        );
        nameText.setOrigin(0.5, 0);
        container.add(nameText);
        
        // Click to select
        bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.selectAsset(asset);
        });
        
        // Drag to scene view
        bg.on('dragstart', () => {
            this.draggingAsset = asset;
        });
        
        bg.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            // Visual feedback during drag
        });
        
        bg.on('dragend', (pointer) => {
            // Check if dropped on scene view
            if (this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.isPointerOver(pointer)) {
                this.instantiateAsset(asset, pointer);
            }
            this.draggingAsset = null;
        });
        
        return container;
    }
    
    renderListView(assets) {
        const itemHeight = 25;
        
        assets.forEach((asset, index) => {
            const y = index * itemHeight;
            
            const item = this.createListItem(asset, 10, y, this.width - 20, itemHeight);
            this.contentContainer.add(item);
        });
    }
    
    createListItem(asset, x, y, width, height) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, 0,
            width, height,
            0x1a1a1a, 0
        );
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        // Icon
        const icon = this.scene.add.text(
            5, height / 2,
            this.getAssetIcon(asset.type),
            { font: '14px Arial' }
        );
        icon.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        container.add(icon);
        
        // Name
        const nameText = this.scene.add.text(
            30, height / 2,
            asset.name,
            { font: '12px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        nameText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        container.add(nameText);
        
        // Hover effect
        bg.on('pointerover', () => {
            bg.setAlpha(0.3);
        });
        
        bg.on('pointerout', () => {
            bg.setAlpha(0);
        });
        
        // Click to select
        bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.selectAsset(asset);
        });
        
        // Drag to scene
        bg.on('dragstart', () => {
            this.draggingAsset = asset;
        });
        
        bg.on('dragend', (pointer) => {
            if (this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.isPointerOver(pointer)) {
                this.instantiateAsset(asset, pointer);
            }
            this.draggingAsset = null;
        });
        
        return container;
    }
    
    getAssetIcon(type) {
        const icons = {
            sprite: '🖼',
            prefab: '📦',
            scene: '🗺',
            script: '📜',
            audio: '🔊',
            material: '🎨'
        };
        
        return icons[type] || '📄';
    }
    
    selectAsset(asset) {
        this.selectedAsset = asset;
        console.log('[ProjectWindow] Selected asset:', asset.name);
    }
    
    instantiateAsset(asset, pointer) {
        if (asset.type === 'sprite') {
            // Create sprite object at pointer position
            const worldPos = this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
            
            const obj = this.editor.createSprite();
            obj.transform.x = worldPos.x;
            obj.transform.y = worldPos.y;
            
            // Set sprite texture
            const spriteComponent = obj.getComponent('sprite');
            if (spriteComponent) {
                spriteComponent.data.texture = asset.key;
                obj.updateVisual();
            }
            
            this.editor.selectObject(obj);
            this.editor.saveHistory('Instantiate Sprite');
            
        } else if (asset.type === 'prefab') {
            // Instantiate prefab
            this.instantiatePrefab(asset, pointer);
            
        } else if (asset.type === 'scene') {
            // Load scene
            const confirm = window.confirm(`Load scene "${asset.name}"? Unsaved changes will be lost.`);
            if (confirm) {
                this.editor.openScene();
            }
        }
    }
    
    instantiatePrefab(asset, pointer) {
        // Load prefab data
        const prefabData = localStorage.getItem(asset.key);
        if (!prefabData) return;
        
        const data = JSON.parse(prefabData);
        
        // Create object from prefab
        const worldPos = this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        const obj = this.editor.createSceneObject(data.type, {
            x: worldPos.x,
            y: worldPos.y
        });
        
        obj.deserialize(data);
        
        this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(obj);
        this.editor.hierarchyPanel.refresh();
        this.editor.selectObject(obj);
        this.editor.saveHistory('Instantiate Prefab');
    }
    
    show() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    hide() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default ProjectWindow;
Step 6: Scene Object (GameObject equivalent)
javascript
// tools/SceneObject.js

class SceneObject {
    constructor(editor, type, config = {}) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        this.id = config.id || this.generateId();
        this.type = type;
        this.name = config.name || `${type}_${this.id.substr(0, 4)}`;
        
        // Transform
        this.transform = {
            x: config.x || 0,
            y: config.y || 0,
            rotation: config.rotation || 0,
            scaleX: config.scaleX || 1,
            scaleY: config.scaleY || 1
        };
        
        // Hierarchy
        this.parent = null;
        this.children = [];
        
        // State
        this.active = true;
        this.visible = true;
        this.locked = false;
        
        // Components
        this.components = [];
        
        // Visual representation (set by SceneViewCanvas)
        this.visual = null;
    }
    
    // === COMPONENT MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addComponent(type, data = {}) {
        const component = {
            type: type,
            data: data
        };
        
        this.components.push(component);
        
        return component;
    }
    
    getComponent(type) {
        return this.components.find(c => c.type === type);
    }
    
    removeComponent(type) {
        const index = this.components.findIndex(c => c.type === type);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.components.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }
    
    // === TRANSFORM ===
    
    getWorldPosition() {
        let x = this.transform.x;
        let y = this.transform.y;
        
        let current = this.parent;
        while (current) {
            x += current.transform.x;
            y += current.transform.y;
            current = current.parent;
        }
        
        return { x, y };
    }
    
    updateTransformHierarchy() {
        this.updateVisual();
        
        this.children.forEach(child => {
            child.updateTransformHierarchy();
        });
    }
    
    // === VISUAL UPDATE ===
    
    updateVisual() {
        if (!this.visual) return;
        
        const worldPos = this.getWorldPosition();
        
        this.visual.setPosition(worldPos.x, worldPos.y);
        this.visual.setRotation(this.transform.rotation);
        this.visual.setScale(this.transform.scaleX, this.transform.scaleY);
        this.visual.setVisible(this.visible);
        this.visual.setAlpha(this.active ? 1 : 0.5);
    }
    
    setSelected(selected) {
        if (!this.visual) return;
        
        // Add selection highlight
        if (selected) {
            if (!this.selectionRect) {
                const bounds = this.getBounds();
                this.selectionRect = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                    0, 0,
                    bounds.width + 4,
                    bounds.height + 4
                );
                this.selectionRect.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffaa00, 1);
                this.visual.addAt(this.selectionRect, 0);
            }
        } else {
            if (this.selectionRect) {
                this.selectionRect.destroy();
                this.selectionRect = null;
            }
        }
    }
    
    getBounds() {
        // Get bounding box
        let width = 32;
        let height = 32;
        
        const spriteComponent = this.getComponent('sprite');
        if (spriteComponent && spriteComponent.data.texture) {
            const texture = this.scene.textures.get(spriteComponent.data.texture);
            if (texture) {
                width = texture.source[0].width * this.transform.scaleX;
                height = texture.source[0].height * this.transform.scaleY;
            }
        }
        
        return {
            x: this.transform.x - width / 2,
            y: this.transform.y - height / 2,
            width: width,
            height: height
        };
    }
    
    // === SERIALIZATION ===
    
    serialize() {
        return {
            id: this.id,
            type: this.type,
            name: this.name,
            transform: { ...this.transform },
            active: this.active,
            visible: this.visible,
            components: this.components.map(c => ({
                type: c.type,
                data: { ...c.data }
            })),
            children: this.children.map(child => child.serialize())
        };
    }
    
    deserialize(data) {
        this.id = data.id;
        this.type = data.type;
        this.name = data.name;
        this.transform = { ...data.transform };
        this.active = data.active;
        this.visible = data.visible;
        
        this.components = data.components.map(c => ({
            type: c.type,
            data: { ...c.data }
        }));
        
        // Restore children
        if (data.children) {
            data.children.forEach(childData => {
                const child = this.editor.createSceneObject(childData.type, {});
                child.deserialize(childData);
                child.parent = this;
                this.children.push(child);
            });
        }
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `obj_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    destroy() {
        if (this.visual) {
            this.visual.destroy();
        }
        
        this.children.forEach(child => child.destroy());
    }
}

export default SceneObject;

TOOL 16: SPRITE SHEET SLICER & EDITOR
How Unity Does It
Unity's Sprite Editor Workflow:

1. Import sprite sheet image → Unity detects it as Texture2D
2. Set Texture Type to "Sprite (2D and UI)"
3. Set Sprite Mode to "Multiple"
4. Open Sprite Editor window
5. Visual slicing:
   - Automatic: Grid slicing (uniform size)
   - Automatic: Tight slicing (auto-detect boundaries)
   - Manual: Click and drag rectangles
6. For each sprite slice:
   - Set pivot point (center, top-left, custom)
   - Set border (9-slice for UI)
   - Trim transparent pixels
   - Name sprite
7. Apply → Generates multiple Sprite assets
8. Use sprites in scenes, animations, UI
Key Features:

Visual rectangle editing (drag corners, resize)
Auto-slice by grid (set cell size, detect)
Auto-slice by outline (find sprite boundaries)
Pivot point editor (visual + presets)
9-slice border editor (for scalable UI)
Sprite preview
Mass rename tools
Revert to original
How We'll Build It
Architecture:

SpriteSheetSlicer
├─── Image Loader (load sprite sheet)
├─── Slice Editor Canvas
│    ├─── Visual rectangle editor
│    ├─── Zoom/pan controls
│    ├─── Grid overlay
│    └─── Selection handles
├─── Auto-Slice Tools
│    ├─── Grid slicer (uniform grid)
│    ├─── Outline detector (find sprites)
│    └─── Padding controls
├─── Sprite Properties Panel
│    ├─── Pivot point editor
│    ├─── 9-slice border editor
│    ├─── Trim transparent pixels
│    └─── Sprite naming
└─── Export System
     ├─── Generate sprite data JSON
     ├─── Save individual sprites
     └─── Generate atlas metadata
