javascript
// tools/SpriteSheetSlicer.js

class SpriteSheetSlicer {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Loaded image
        this.sourceImage = null;
        this.sourceTexture = null;
        
        // Slices (sprite rectangles)
        this.slices = [];
        this.selectedSlice = null;
        
        // UI
        this.container = null;
        this.canvas = null;
        this.propertiesPanel = null;
        
        // Tools
        this.currentTool = 'select'; // select, create, delete
        this.sliceMode = 'manual'; // manual, grid, auto
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createUI();
        console.log('[SpriteSheetSlicer] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createUI() {
        // Main container
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(60000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        // Layout: [Toolbar | Canvas | Properties Panel]
        
        // Toolbar (top)
        this.createToolbar();
        
        // Canvas (center-left)
        this.createCanvas();
        
        // Properties panel (right)
        this.createPropertiesPanel();
    }
    
    createToolbar() {
        const toolbar = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.scene.scale.width / 2, 20,
            this.scene.scale.width, 40,
            0x2a2a2a, 1
        );
        toolbar.add(bg);
        
        const buttons = [
            { label: 'Import Image', action: () => this.importImage() },
            { label: 'Slice: Grid', action: () => this.sliceByGrid() },
            { label: 'Slice: Auto', action: () => this.sliceByOutline() },
            { label: 'Clear All', action: () => this.clearSlices() },
            { label: 'Export', action: () => this.exportSlices() },
            { label: 'Close', action: () => this.close() }
        ];
        
        let x = 20;
        buttons.forEach(btn => {
            const button = this.createButton(x, 20, 120, 30, btn.label, btn.action);
            toolbar.add(button);
            x += 130;
        });
        
        this.container.add(toolbar);
    }
    
    createCanvas() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.7;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 80;
        const x = 10;
        const y = 50;
        
        this.canvas = new SpriteSliceCanvas(this, {
            x: x,
            y: y,
            width: width,
            height: height
        });
        
        this.container.add(this.canvas.container);
    }
    
    createPropertiesPanel() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.25;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 80;
        const x = this.scene.scale.width * 0.7 + 20;
        const y = 50;
        
        this.propertiesPanel = new SpritePropertiesPanel(this, {
            x: x,
            y: y,
            width: width,
            height: height
        });
        
        this.container.add(this.propertiesPanel.container);
    }
    
    // === IMAGE LOADING ===
    
    importImage() {
        // In production, would use file input dialog
        const imageName = prompt('Enter sprite sheet texture key:');
        
        if (!imageName || !this.scene.textures.exists(imageName)) {
            alert('Texture not found!');
            return;
        }
        
        this.loadImage(imageName);
    }
    
    loadImage(textureKey) {
        this.sourceTexture = textureKey;
        this.sourceImage = this.scene.textures.get(textureKey);
        
        this.slices = [];
        
        this.canvas.loadImage(textureKey);
        
        console.log('[SpriteSheetSlicer] Loaded image:', textureKey);
    }
    
    // === AUTO-SLICING ===
    
    sliceByGrid() {
        if (!this.sourceImage) {
            alert('Load an image first!');
            return;
        }
        
        const cellWidth = parseInt(prompt('Cell width (px):', '32'));
        const cellHeight = parseInt(prompt('Cell height (px):', '32'));
        const padding = parseInt(prompt('Padding (px):', '0'));
        
        if (!cellWidth || !cellHeight) return;
        
        this.slices = [];
        
        const imageWidth = this.sourceImage.source[0].width;
        const imageHeight = this.sourceImage.source[0].height;
        
        const cols = Math.floor((imageWidth + padding) / (cellWidth + padding));
        const rows = Math.floor((imageHeight + padding) / (cellHeight + padding));
        
        let index = 0;
        for (let row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
            for (let col = 0; col < cols; col++) {
                const x = col * (cellWidth + padding);
                const y = row * (cellHeight + padding);
                
                this.slices.push({
                    id: `sprite_${index}`,
                    name: `sprite_${index}`,
                    x: x,
                    y: y,
                    width: cellWidth,
                    height: cellHeight,
                    pivotX: 0.5,
                    pivotY: 0.5,
                    trimmed: false,
                    border: { left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, bottom: 0 }
                });
                
                index++;
            }
        }
        
        this.canvas.refresh();
        
        console.log(`[SpriteSheetSlicer] Created ${this.slices.length} grid slices`);
    }
    
    sliceByOutline() {
        if (!this.sourceImage) {
            alert('Load an image first!');
            return;
        }
        
        // Auto-detect sprite boundaries
        // This requires pixel data analysis
        
        alert('Auto-slice by outline - analyzing image...');
        
        const imageData = this.getImagePixelData();
        const sprites = this.detectSpriteBounds(imageData);
        
        this.slices = sprites.map((bounds, index) => ({
            id: `sprite_${index}`,
            name: `sprite_${index}`,
            x: bounds.x,
            y: bounds.y,
            width: bounds.width,
            height: bounds.height,
            pivotX: 0.5,
            pivotY: 0.5,
            trimmed: false,
            border: { left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, bottom: 0 }
        }));
        
        this.canvas.refresh();
        
        console.log(`[SpriteSheetSlicer] Auto-detected ${this.slices.length} sprites`);
    }
    
    getImagePixelData() {
        // Get pixel data from texture
        const texture = this.scene.textures.get(this.sourceTexture);
        const canvas = texture.getSourceImage();
        
        const tempCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        tempCanvas.width = canvas.width;
        tempCanvas.height = canvas.height;
        
        const ctx = tempCanvas.getContext('2d');
        ctx.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);
        
        return ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    }
    
    detectSpriteBounds(imageData) {
        // Simple flood-fill algorithm to detect sprite boundaries
        const width = imageData.width;
        const height = imageData.height;
        const data = imageData.data;
        
        const visited = new Array(width * height).fill(false);
        const sprites = [];
        
        for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
            for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
                const index = (y * width + x) * 4;
                const alpha = data[index + 3];
                
                // If pixel is not transparent and not visited
                if (alpha > 0 && !visited[y * width + x]) {
                    const bounds = this.floodFill(data, width, height, x, y, visited);
                    
                    if (bounds.width > 1 && bounds.height > 1) {
                        sprites.push(bounds);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return sprites;
    }
    
    floodFill(data, width, height, startX, startY, visited) {
        const stack = [{ x: startX, y: startY }];
        
        let minX = startX, maxX = startX;
        let minY = startY, maxY = startY;
        
        while (stack.length > 0) {
            const { x, y } = stack.pop();
            
            if (x < 0 || x >= width || y < 0 || y >= height) continue;
            if (visited[y * width + x]) continue;
            
            const index = (y * width + x) * 4;
            const alpha = data[index + 3];
            
            if (alpha === 0) continue;
            
            visited[y * width + x] = true;
            
            minX = Math.min(minX, x);
            maxX = Math.max(maxX, x);
            minY = Math.min(minY, y);
            maxY = Math.max(maxY, y);
            
            stack.push({ x: x + 1, y: y });
            stack.push({ x: x - 1, y: y });
            stack.push({ x: x, y: y + 1 });
            stack.push({ x: x, y: y - 1 });
        }
        
        return {
            x: minX,
            y: minY,
            width: maxX - minX + 1,
            height: maxY - minY + 1
        };
    }
    
    clearSlices() {
        const confirm = window.confirm('Clear all slices?');
        if (!confirm) return;
        
        this.slices = [];
        this.selectedSlice = null;
        this.canvas.refresh();
        this.propertiesPanel.clear();
    }
    
    // === SLICE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addSlice(x, y, width, height) {
        const slice = {
            id: `sprite_${this.slices.length}`,
            name: `sprite_${this.slices.length}`,
            x: x,
            y: y,
            width: width,
            height: height,
            pivotX: 0.5,
            pivotY: 0.5,
            trimmed: false,
            border: { left: 0, right: 0, top: 0, bottom: 0 }
        };
        
        this.slices.push(slice);
        this.canvas.refresh();
        
        return slice;
    }
    
    removeSlice(slice) {
        const index = this.slices.indexOf(slice);
        if (index !== -1) {
            this.slices.splice(index, 1);
            this.canvas.refresh();
        }
    }
    
    selectSlice(slice) {
        this.selectedSlice = slice;
        this.canvas.updateSelection();
        this.propertiesPanel.showSlice(slice);
    }
    
    // === EXPORT ===
    
    exportSlices() {
        if (this.slices.length === 0) {
            alert('No slices to export!');
            return;
        }
        
        const spriteData = {
            meta: {
                image: this.sourceTexture,
                size: {
                    w: this.sourceImage.source[0].width,
                    h: this.sourceImage.source[0].height
                },
                scale: 1
            },
            frames: {}
        };
        
        this.slices.forEach(slice => {
            spriteData.frames[slice.name] = {
                frame: {
                    x: slice.x,
                    y: slice.y,
                    w: slice.width,
                    h: slice.height
                },
                rotated: false,
                trimmed: slice.trimmed,
                spriteSourceSize: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    w: slice.width,
                    h: slice.height
                },
                sourceSize: {
                    w: slice.width,
                    h: slice.height
                },
                pivot: {
                    x: slice.pivotX,
                    y: slice.pivotY
                },
                border: slice.border
            };
        });
        
        console.log('Exported Sprite Data:', JSON.stringify(spriteData, null, 2));
        
        // Save to localStorage
        const key = `spritesheet_${this.sourceTexture}`;
        localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(spriteData));
        
        alert(`Exported ${this.slices.length} sprites! Data saved to localStorage.`);
        
        return spriteData;
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    createButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x4488ff, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.on('pointerover', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x6699ff));
        bg.on('pointerout', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x4488ff));
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    open() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default SpriteSheetSlicer;
Supporting Classes:

javascript
// tools/SpriteSliceCanvas.js

class SpriteSliceCanvas {
    constructor(slicer, config) {
        this.slicer = slicer;
        this.scene = slicer.scene;
        
        this.x = config.x;
        this.y = config.y;
        this.width = config.width;
        this.height = config.height;
        
        // Camera
        this.camera = {
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            zoom: 1.0
        };
        
        // Drawing state
        this.drawing = false;
        this.drawStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, this.width, this.height, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        // Canvas (for zoom/pan)
        this.canvas = this.scene.add.container(this.width / 2, this.height / 2);
        this.container.add(this.canvas);
        
        // Image layer
        this.imageLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.imageLayer);
        
        // Slices layer
        this.slicesLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.slicesLayer);
        
        this.setupInput();
    }
    
    loadImage(textureKey) {
        this.imageLayer.removeAll(true);
        
        const image = this.scene.add.image(0, 0, textureKey);
        image.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.imageLayer.add(image);
        
        // Center camera on image
        this.camera.x = 0;
        this.camera.y = 0;
        this.camera.zoom = Math.min(
            this.width / image.width,
            this.height / image.height
        ) * 0.9;
        
        this.updateCamera();
        this.refresh();
    }
    
    refresh() {
        this.slicesLayer.removeAll(true);
        
        this.slicer.slices.forEach(slice => {
            this.renderSlice(slice);
        });
    }
    
    renderSlice(slice) {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        // Rectangle
        const isSelected = this.slicer.selectedSlice === slice;
        graphics.lineStyle(2, isSelected ? 0xffaa00 : 0x44ff88, 1);
        graphics.strokeRect(
            slice.x - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].width / 2,
            slice.y - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].height / 2,
            slice.width,
            slice.height
        );
        
        // Pivot point
        const pivotX = slice.x - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].width / 2 + slice.width * slice.pivotX;
        const pivotY = slice.y - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].height / 2 + slice.height * slice.pivotY;
        
        graphics.fillStyle(0xff4444, 1);
        graphics.fillCircle(pivotX, pivotY, 3);
        
        // Label
        const label = this.scene.add.text(
            slice.x - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].width / 2 + 2,
            slice.y - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].height / 2 + 2,
            slice.name,
            { font: '10px Arial', fill: '#ffffff', backgroundColor: '#000000' }
        );
        
        this.slicesLayer.add(graphics);
        this.slicesLayer.add(label);
        
        // Make interactive
        const hitArea = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            slice.x - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].width / 2 + slice.width / 2,
            slice.y - this.slicer.sourceImage.source[0].height / 2 + slice.height / 2,
            slice.width,
            slice.height,
            0xffffff,
            0
        );
        hitArea.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        hitArea.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.slicer.selectSlice(slice);
        });
        
        this.slicesLayer.add(hitArea);
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // Drawing new slices
        this.container.setInteractive(
            new Phaser.Geom.Rectangle(0, 0, this.width, this.height),
            Phaser.Geom.Rectangle.Contains
        );
        
        this.container.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (this.slicer.currentTool === 'create') {
                this.startDrawing(pointer);
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointermove', (pointer) => {
            if (this.drawing) {
                this.updateDrawing(pointer);
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointerup', () => {
            if (this.drawing) {
                this.finishDrawing();
            }
        });
    }
    
    startDrawing(pointer) {
        const worldPos = this.screenToWorld(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        this.drawing = true;
        this.drawStart = worldPos;
    }
    
    updateDrawing(pointer) {
        // Visual feedback while drawing
    }
    
    finishDrawing() {
        this.drawing = false;
        // Create slice from drawn rectangle
    }
    
    screenToWorld(screenX, screenY) {
        const localX = screenX - this.x - this.width / 2;
        const localY = screenY - this.y - this.height / 2;
        
        return {
            x: (localX / this.camera.zoom) + this.camera.x,
            y: (localY / this.camera.zoom) + this.camera.y
        };
    }
    
    updateCamera() {
        this.canvas.setScale(this.camera.zoom);
        this.canvas.setPosition(
            this.width / 2 - this.camera.x * this.camera.zoom,
            this.height / 2 - this.camera.y * this.camera.zoom
        );
    }
    
    updateSelection() {
        this.refresh();
    }
}

export default SpriteSliceCanvas;
javascript
// tools/SpritePropertiesPanel.js

class SpritePropertiesPanel {
    constructor(slicer, config) {
        this.slicer = slicer;
        this.scene = slicer.scene;
        
        this.x = config.x;
        this.y = config.y;
        this.width = config.width;
        this.height = config.height;
        
        this.currentSlice = null;
        
        this.create();
    }
    
    create() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(this.x, this.y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, this.width, this.height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 15, 'Sprite Properties', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.container.add(title);
        
        // Content container
        this.contentContainer = this.scene.add.container(10, 50);
        this.container.add(this.contentContainer);
    }
    
    showSlice(slice) {
        this.currentSlice = slice;
        this.rebuild();
    }
    
    rebuild() {
        this.contentContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        if (!this.currentSlice) {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, 'No slice selected', {
                font: '12px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            this.contentContainer.add(text);
            return;
        }
        
        let y = 0;
        
        // Name
        y = this.addTextField('Name', this.currentSlice.name, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.name = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        // Position
        y = this.addNumberField('X', this.currentSlice.x, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.x = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        y = this.addNumberField('Y', this.currentSlice.y, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.y = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        // Size
        y = this.addNumberField('Width', this.currentSlice.width, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.width = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        y = this.addNumberField('Height', this.currentSlice.height, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.height = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        // Pivot
        y += 10;
        const pivotLabel = this.scene.add.text(0, y, 'Pivot Point', {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(pivotLabel);
        y += 20;
        
        y = this.addSlider('Pivot X', this.currentSlice.pivotX, 0, 1, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.pivotX = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        y = this.addSlider('Pivot Y', this.currentSlice.pivotY, 0, 1, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.pivotY = value;
            this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
        }, y);
        
        // Pivot presets
        y = this.addPivotPresets(y);
        
        // Trim
        y += 10;
        y = this.addCheckbox('Trim Transparent Pixels', this.currentSlice.trimmed, (value) => {
            this.currentSlice.trimmed = value;
            if (value) {
                this.trimSlice();
            }
        }, y);
        
        // Delete button
        y += 20;
        const deleteBtn = this.createButton(0, y, this.width - 20, 30, 'Delete Slice', () => {
            this.slicer.removeSlice(this.currentSlice);
            this.clear();
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(deleteBtn);
    }
    
    addTextField(label, value, onChange, y) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(0, y, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        y += 18;
        
        const input = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, y, this.width - 20, 20, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        input.setOrigin(0);
        input.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(input);
        
        const text = this.scene.add.text(5, y + 10, value, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        text.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.contentContainer.add(text);
        
        input.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = prompt(label, value);
            if (newValue !== null) {
                text.setText(newValue);
                onChange(newValue);
            }
        });
        
        return y + 30;
    }
    
    addNumberField(label, value, onChange, y) {
        return this.addTextField(label, value.toString(), (v) => {
            const parsed = parseFloat(v);
            if (!isNaN(parsed)) {
                onChange(parsed);
            }
        }, y);
    }
    
    addSlider(label, value, min, max, onChange, y) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(0, y, `${label}: ${value.toFixed(2)}`, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        y += 18;
        
        // Simplified slider (click to change)
        const sliderBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, y, this.width - 20, 10, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        sliderBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.contentContainer.add(sliderBg);
        
        const sliderFill = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            0, y,
            (this.width - 20) * value, 10,
            0x4488ff, 1
        );
        sliderFill.setOrigin(0);
        this.contentContainer.add(sliderFill);
        
        sliderBg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        sliderBg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = parseFloat(prompt(label, value));
            if (!isNaN(newValue)) {
                const clamped = Phaser.Math.Clamp(newValue, min, max);
                labelText.setText(`${label}: ${clamped.toFixed(2)}`);
                sliderFill.width = (this.width - 20) * clamped;
                onChange(clamped);
            }
        });
        
        return y + 20;
    }
    
    addCheckbox(label, value, onChange, y) {
        const checkbox = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, y, 15, 15, value ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666, 1);
        checkbox.setOrigin(0);
        checkbox.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        this.contentContainer.add(checkbox);
        
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(20, y, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(labelText);
        
        checkbox.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = !value;
            checkbox.setFillStyle(newValue ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666);
            onChange(newValue);
            value = newValue;
        });
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    addPivotPresets(y) {
        const presets = [
            { name: 'Center', x: 0.5, y: 0.5 },
            { name: 'Top Left', x: 0, y: 0 },
            { name: 'Top Right', x: 1, y: 0 },
            { name: 'Bottom Left', x: 0, y: 1 },
            { name: 'Bottom Right', x: 1, y: 1 }
        ];
        
        const buttonWidth = (this.width - 30) / 2;
        
        presets.forEach((preset, index) => {
            const col = index % 2;
            const row = Math.floor(index / 2);
            
            const x = col * (buttonWidth + 10);
            const btnY = y + row * 35;
            
            const btn = this.createButton(x, btnY, buttonWidth, 25, preset.name, () => {
                this.currentSlice.pivotX = preset.x;
                this.currentSlice.pivotY = preset.y;
                this.rebuild();
                this.slicer.canvas.refresh();
            });
            
            this.contentContainer.add(btn);
        });
        
        return y + Math.ceil(presets.length / 2) * 35;
    }
    
    createButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x4488ff, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: '10px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    trimSlice() {
        // Trim transparent pixels from slice
        // This would analyze pixel data and adjust slice bounds
        console.log('[SpritePropertiesPanel] Trim not implemented yet');
    }
    
    clear() {
        this.currentSlice = null;
        this.rebuild();
    }
}

export default SpritePropertiesPanel;

PART 1: REMAINING CRITICAL TOOLS (17-30)
TOOL 17: SPRITE ATLAS GENERATOR
How Unity Does It
Unity's Sprite Packing System:

Unity Sprite Packer Workflow:
1. Assets marked for packing (set Packing Tag)
2. Unity analyzes all sprites in project
3. Groups sprites by Packing Tag
4. Runs packing algorithm:
   - MaxRects (tight packing)
   - Basic (simple grid)
5. Generates texture atlas (power-of-2 sizes)
6. Creates sprite metadata (UV coordinates)
7. Auto-updates sprite references
8. Compression and optimization
9. Platform-specific atlases (mobile, desktop)
Key Features:

Automatic sprite grouping by tags
Multiple packing algorithms
Power-of-2 texture generation (512, 1024, 2048, 4096)
Padding and spacing control
Rotation optimization (rotate sprites for better fit)
Duplicate detection and removal
Multi-atlas support (split large sets)
Platform-specific compression
Atlas preview window
How We'll Build It
Architecture:

SpriteAtlasGenerator
├─── Sprite Collection
│    ├─── Auto-scan project assets
│    ├─── Manual sprite selection
│    ├─── Grouping by tags/folders
│    └─── Duplicate detection
├─── Packing Algorithm
│    ├─── MaxRects Packer
│    ├─── Shelf Packer
│    ├─── Simple Grid Packer
│    └─── Rotation optimizer
├─── Atlas Generation
│    ├─── Power-of-2 canvas creation
│    ├─── Sprite placement
│    ├─── Padding application
│    └─── Multi-atlas splitting
├─── Metadata Generation
│    ├─── UV coordinate calculation
│    ├─── Frame data (x, y, w, h)
│    ├─── Pivot points
│    └─── JSON export
└─── Optimization
     ├─── Texture compression
     ├─── Trim transparent pixels
     ├─── Color quantization
     └─── File size reporting
