javascript
// tools/SpriteAtlasGenerator.js

class SpriteAtlasGenerator {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            maxAtlasSize: 2048, // Max texture size
            padding: 2, // Space between sprites
            allowRotation: false, // Rotate sprites for better packing
            powerOfTwo: true, // Force power-of-2 sizes
            trimTransparent: true, // Remove transparent pixels
            packingAlgorithm: 'maxrects' // maxrects, shelf, grid
        };
        
        // Sprite collection
        this.sprites = [];
        this.groups = new Map(); // Tag -> sprites
        
        // Generated atlases
        this.atlases = [];
        
        // UI
        this.container = null;
        this.spriteListPanel = null;
        this.configPanel = null;
        this.previewPanel = null;
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createUI();
        console.log('[SpriteAtlasGenerator] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createUI() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(60000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height, 0x0a0a0a, 0.95);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, 30, 'Sprite Atlas Generator', {
            font: 'bold 24px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        title.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(title);
        
        // Layout: [Sprite List | Config | Preview]
        this.createSpriteListPanel();
        this.createConfigPanel();
        this.createPreviewPanel();
        
        // Action buttons
        this.createActionButtons();
    }
    
    createSpriteListPanel() {
        const x = 20;
        const y = 70;
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.25;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 160;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Sprites', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Add sprites button
        const addBtn = this.createButton(10, 35, width - 20, 30, 'Scan Project', () => {
            this.scanProjectForSprites();
        });
        panel.add(addBtn);
        
        // Sprite list (scrollable)
        this.spriteListContainer = this.scene.add.container(10, 75);
        panel.add(this.spriteListContainer);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.spriteListPanel = panel;
    }
    
    createConfigPanel() {
        const x = this.scene.scale.width * 0.25 + 30;
        const y = 70;
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.25;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 160;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Configuration', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Configuration options
        let optionY = 45;
        
        // Max atlas size
        const sizeLabel = this.scene.add.text(10, optionY, 'Max Atlas Size', {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        panel.add(sizeLabel);
        optionY += 20;
        
        const sizeOptions = [512, 1024, 2048, 4096];
        sizeOptions.forEach((size, index) => {
            const btn = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                10 + index * 60, optionY,
                55, 25,
                this.config.maxAtlasSize === size ? 0x4488ff : 0x333333,
                1
            );
            btn.setOrigin(0);
            btn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            panel.add(btn);
            
            const btnText = this.scene.add.text(
                10 + index * 60 + 27.5, optionY + 12.5,
                size.toString(),
                { font: '11px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
            );
            btnText.setOrigin(0.5);
            panel.add(btnText);
            
            btn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.config.maxAtlasSize = size;
                this.refreshConfigPanel();
            });
        });
        optionY += 40;
        
        // Padding
        optionY = this.addNumberInput(panel, 'Padding (px)', this.config.padding, (value) => {
            this.config.padding = value;
        }, optionY);
        
        // Packing algorithm
        const algoLabel = this.scene.add.text(10, optionY, 'Packing Algorithm', {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        panel.add(algoLabel);
        optionY += 20;
        
        const algorithms = [
            { key: 'maxrects', label: 'MaxRects' },
            { key: 'shelf', label: 'Shelf' },
            { key: 'grid', label: 'Grid' }
        ];
        
        algorithms.forEach((algo, index) => {
            const btn = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                10, optionY + index * 30,
                width - 20, 25,
                this.config.packingAlgorithm === algo.key ? 0x4488ff : 0x333333,
                1
            );
            btn.setOrigin(0);
            btn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            panel.add(btn);
            
            const btnText = this.scene.add.text(
                10 + (width - 20) / 2, optionY + index * 30 + 12.5,
                algo.label,
                { font: '11px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
            );
            btnText.setOrigin(0.5);
            panel.add(btnText);
            
            btn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.config.packingAlgorithm = algo.key;
                this.refreshConfigPanel();
            });
        });
        optionY += algorithms.length * 30 + 20;
        
        // Checkboxes
        optionY = this.addCheckbox(panel, 'Allow Rotation', this.config.allowRotation, (value) => {
            this.config.allowRotation = value;
        }, optionY);
        
        optionY = this.addCheckbox(panel, 'Power of 2 Sizes', this.config.powerOfTwo, (value) => {
            this.config.powerOfTwo = value;
        }, optionY);
        
        optionY = this.addCheckbox(panel, 'Trim Transparent', this.config.trimTransparent, (value) => {
            this.config.trimTransparent = value;
        }, optionY);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.configPanel = panel;
    }
    
    createPreviewPanel() {
        const x = this.scene.scale.width * 0.5 + 40;
        const y = 70;
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.48;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 160;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Preview', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Stats
        this.statsText = this.scene.add.text(10, 35, '', {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        panel.add(this.statsText);
        
        // Preview canvas
        this.previewCanvas = this.scene.add.container(10, 65);
        panel.add(this.previewCanvas);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.previewPanel = panel;
    }
    
    createActionButtons() {
        const y = this.scene.scale.height - 70;
        const buttonWidth = 150;
        const spacing = 20;
        
        const buttons = [
            { label: 'Generate Atlas', action: () => this.generateAtlas() },
            { label: 'Export', action: () => this.exportAtlas() },
            { label: 'Clear', action: () => this.clear() },
            { label: 'Close', action: () => this.close() }
        ];
        
        const totalWidth = buttons.length * buttonWidth + (buttons.length - 1) * spacing;
        let x = (this.scene.scale.width - totalWidth) / 2;
        
        buttons.forEach(btn => {
            const button = this.createButton(x, y, buttonWidth, 40, btn.label, btn.action);
            this.container.add(button);
            x += buttonWidth + spacing;
        });
    }
    
    // === SPRITE COLLECTION ===
    
    scanProjectForSprites() {
        this.sprites = [];
        
        // Get all textures from Phaser
        const textures = this.scene.textures.list;
        
        Object.keys(textures).forEach(key => {
            if (key === '__DEFAULT' || key === '__MISSING') return;
            
            const texture = textures[key];
            const source = texture.source[0];
            
            this.sprites.push({
                key: key,
                texture: texture,
                width: source.width,
                height: source.height,
                tag: 'default',
                trimmed: false,
                rotated: false
            });
        });
        
        this.refreshSpriteList();
        
        console.log(`[AtlasGenerator] Scanned ${this.sprites.length} sprites`);
    }
    
    refreshSpriteList() {
        this.spriteListContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        this.sprites.forEach((sprite, index) => {
            const y = index * 30;
            
            const item = this.scene.add.container(0, y);
            
            // Checkbox
            const checkbox = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 15, 15, 0x44ff88, 1);
            checkbox.setOrigin(0);
            item.add(checkbox);
            
            // Sprite name
            const name = this.scene.add.text(20, 7.5, sprite.key, {
                font: '11px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            name.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            item.add(name);
            
            // Size
            const size = this.scene.add.text(180, 7.5, `${sprite.width}x${sprite.height}`, {
                font: '10px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            size.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            item.add(size);
            
            this.spriteListContainer.add(item);
        });
    }
    
    // === ATLAS GENERATION ===
    
    generateAtlas() {
        if (this.sprites.length === 0) {
            alert('No sprites to pack!');
            return;
        }
        
        console.log('[AtlasGenerator] Generating atlas...');
        
        // Pre-process sprites
        const processedSprites = this.preprocessSprites();
        
        // Sort by area (largest first) for better packing
        processedSprites.sort((a, b) => (b.width * b.height) - (a.width * a.height));
        
        // Pack sprites
        const packer = this.createPacker();
        const packedSprites = packer.pack(processedSprites);
        
        // Create atlas texture
        this.createAtlasTexture(packedSprites, packer.width, packer.height);
        
        // Update preview
        this.updatePreview(packer);
        
        console.log(`[AtlasGenerator] Generated atlas: ${packer.width}x${packer.height}`);
    }
    
    preprocessSprites() {
        return this.sprites.map(sprite => {
            let width = sprite.width;
            let height = sprite.height;
            
            // Trim transparent pixels if enabled
            if (this.config.trimTransparent) {
                const trimmed = this.trimSprite(sprite);
                width = trimmed.width;
                height = trimmed.height;
            }
            
            // Add padding
            width += this.config.padding * 2;
            height += this.config.padding * 2;
            
            return {
                ...sprite,
                packWidth: width,
                packHeight: height
            };
        });
    }
    
    trimSprite(sprite) {
        // Get pixel data and find non-transparent bounds
        // This would require canvas manipulation
        // For now, return original dimensions
        return {
            width: sprite.width,
            height: sprite.height,
            trimX: 0,
            trimY: 0
        };
    }
    
    createPacker() {
        switch (this.config.packingAlgorithm) {
            case 'maxrects':
                return new MaxRectsPacker(this.config.maxAtlasSize, this.config.powerOfTwo);
            case 'shelf':
                return new ShelfPacker(this.config.maxAtlasSize, this.config.powerOfTwo);
            case 'grid':
                return new GridPacker(this.config.maxAtlasSize);
            default:
                return new MaxRectsPacker(this.config.maxAtlasSize, this.config.powerOfTwo);
        }
    }
    
    createAtlasTexture(packedSprites, width, height) {
        // Create a canvas to draw the atlas
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = width;
        canvas.height = height;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // Clear canvas
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height);
        
        // Draw each sprite onto the atlas
        packedSprites.forEach(sprite => {
            const sourceCanvas = sprite.texture.getSourceImage();
            
            ctx.drawImage(
                sourceCanvas,
                0, 0, sprite.width, sprite.height,
                sprite.x + this.config.padding,
                sprite.y + this.config.padding,
                sprite.width,
                sprite.height
            );
        });
        
        // Create Phaser texture from canvas
        this.scene.textures.addCanvas('generated_atlas', canvas);
        
        this.atlasData = {
            width: width,
            height: height,
            sprites: packedSprites
        };
    }
    
    updatePreview(packer) {
        this.previewCanvas.removeAll(true);
        
        // Show atlas preview
        if (this.scene.textures.exists('generated_atlas')) {
            const atlas = this.scene.add.image(0, 0, 'generated_atlas');
            atlas.setOrigin(0);
            
            // Scale to fit preview area
            const maxWidth = this.scene.scale.width * 0.45;
            const maxHeight = this.scene.scale.height - 250;
            
            const scale = Math.min(
                maxWidth / packer.width,
                maxHeight / packer.height,
                1
            );
            
            atlas.setScale(scale);
            
            this.previewCanvas.add(atlas);
        }
        
        // Update stats
        const efficiency = (packer.filledArea / (packer.width * packer.height) * 100).toFixed(1);
        
        this.statsText.setText(
            `Atlas Size: ${packer.width}x${packer.height}\n` +
            `Sprites Packed: ${this.sprites.length}\n` +
            `Efficiency: ${efficiency}%\n` +
            `Total Pixels: ${packer.width * packer.height}`
        );
    }
    
    // === EXPORT ===
    
    exportAtlas() {
        if (!this.atlasData) {
            alert('Generate an atlas first!');
            return;
        }
        
        // Generate JSON metadata
        const metadata = {
            meta: {
                image: 'generated_atlas.png',
                size: {
                    w: this.atlasData.width,
                    h: this.atlasData.height
                },
                scale: 1
            },
            frames: {}
        };
        
        this.atlasData.sprites.forEach(sprite => {
            metadata.frames[sprite.key] = {
                frame: {
                    x: sprite.x + this.config.padding,
                    y: sprite.y + this.config.padding,
                    w: sprite.width,
                    h: sprite.height
                },
                rotated: sprite.rotated || false,
                trimmed: sprite.trimmed || false,
                spriteSourceSize: {
                    x: 0,
                    y: 0,
                    w: sprite.width,
                    h: sprite.height
                },
                sourceSize: {
                    w: sprite.width,
                    h: sprite.height
                }
            };
        });
        
        // Save to localStorage
        localStorage.setItem('atlas_metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata, null, 2));
        
        // Download canvas as PNG (simplified)
        const canvas = this.scene.textures.get('generated_atlas').getSourceImage();
        const dataURL = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
        
        console.log('Atlas Metadata:', JSON.stringify(metadata, null, 2));
        console.log('Atlas Image (base64):', dataURL.substring(0, 100) + '...');
        
        alert('Atlas exported! Check console for data.');
    }
    
    clear() {
        this.sprites = [];
        this.atlasData = null;
        
        if (this.scene.textures.exists('generated_atlas')) {
            this.scene.textures.remove('generated_atlas');
        }
        
        this.refreshSpriteList();
        this.previewCanvas.removeAll(true);
        this.statsText.setText('');
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    createButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x4488ff, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.on('pointerover', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x6699ff));
        bg.on('pointerout', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x4488ff));
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    addNumberInput(panel, label, value, onChange, y) {
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(10, y, label, {
            font: '12px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        panel.add(labelText);
        y += 20;
        
        const input = this.scene.add.rectangle(10, y, 100, 25, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        input.setOrigin(0);
        input.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        panel.add(input);
        
        const valueText = this.scene.add.text(15, y + 12.5, value.toString(), {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        valueText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        panel.add(valueText);
        
        input.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newValue = parseInt(prompt(label, value));
            if (!isNaN(newValue)) {
                valueText.setText(newValue.toString());
                onChange(newValue);
            }
        });
        
        return y + 35;
    }
    
    addCheckbox(panel, label, value, onChange, y) {
        const checkbox = this.scene.add.rectangle(10, y, 15, 15, value ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666, 1);
        checkbox.setOrigin(0);
        checkbox.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        panel.add(checkbox);
        
        const labelText = this.scene.add.text(30, y + 7.5, label, {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        labelText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        panel.add(labelText);
        
        checkbox.on('pointerdown', () => {
            value = !value;
            checkbox.setFillStyle(value ? 0x44ff88 : 0x666666);
            onChange(value);
        });
        
        return y + 25;
    }
    
    refreshConfigPanel() {
        // Rebuild config panel to reflect changes
        this.container.remove(this.configPanel, true);
        this.createConfigPanel();
    }
    
    open() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default SpriteAtlasGenerator;
Packing Algorithms:

javascript
// tools/packers/MaxRectsPacker.js

class MaxRectsPacker {
    constructor(maxSize, powerOfTwo = true) {
        this.maxSize = maxSize;
        this.powerOfTwo = powerOfTwo;
        
        this.width = 0;
        this.height = 0;
        this.freeRectangles = [];
        this.packedSprites = [];
        this.filledArea = 0;
    }
    
    pack(sprites) {
        // Start with initial size
        this.width = this.powerOfTwo ? 256 : 128;
        this.height = this.powerOfTwo ? 256 : 128;
        
        this.freeRectangles = [{ x: 0, y: 0, width: this.width, height: this.height }];
        this.packedSprites = [];
        this.filledArea = 0;
        
        // Try to pack all sprites
        let spritesToPack = [...sprites];
        
        while (spritesToPack.length > 0) {
            let packed = false;
            
            // Try to pack each sprite
            for (let i = 0; i < spritesToPack.length; i++) {
                const sprite = spritesToPack[i];
                const rect = this.findPositionForSprite(sprite);
                
                if (rect) {
                    // Place sprite
                    this.placeSprite(sprite, rect.x, rect.y);
                    spritesToPack.splice(i, 1);
                    packed = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            
            // If nothing was packed, increase atlas size
            if (!packed) {
                if (!this.expandAtlas()) {
                    console.warn('[MaxRectsPacker] Could not fit all sprites!');
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return this.packedSprites;
    }
    
    findPositionForSprite(sprite) {
        let bestRect = null;
        let bestShortSideFit = Infinity;
        
        // Try each free rectangle
        for (const rect of this.freeRectangles) {
            if (sprite.packWidth <= rect.width && sprite.packHeight <= rect.height) {
                const leftoverX = rect.width - sprite.packWidth;
                const leftoverY = rect.height - sprite.packHeight;
                const shortSideFit = Math.min(leftoverX, leftoverY);
                
                if (shortSideFit < bestShortSideFit) {
                    bestRect = rect;
                    bestShortSideFit = shortSideFit;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return bestRect;
    }
    
    placeSprite(sprite, x, y) {
        // Add to packed list
        this.packedSprites.push({
            ...sprite,
            x: x,
            y: y
        });
        
        this.filledArea += sprite.packWidth * sprite.packHeight;
        
        // Split free rectangles
        this.splitFreeRectangles(x, y, sprite.packWidth, sprite.packHeight);
    }
    
    splitFreeRectangles(x, y, width, height) {
        const newRects = [];
        
        for (const rect of this.freeRectangles) {
            // Check if this free rectangle intersects with the placed sprite
            if (this.intersects(rect.x, rect.y, rect.width, rect.height, x, y, width, height)) {
                // Split into up to 4 new rectangles
                
                // Left
                if (rect.x < x) {
                    newRects.push({
                        x: rect.x,
                        y: rect.y,
                        width: x - rect.x,
                        height: rect.height
                    });
                }
                
                // Right
                if (rect.x + rect.width > x + width) {
                    newRects.push({
                        x: x + width,
                        y: rect.y,
                        width: (rect.x + rect.width) - (x + width),
                        height: rect.height
                    });
                }
                
                // Top
                if (rect.y < y) {
                    newRects.push({
                        x: rect.x,
                        y: rect.y,
                        width: rect.width,
                        height: y - rect.y
                    });
                }
                
                // Bottom
                if (rect.y + rect.height > y + height) {
                    newRects.push({
                        x: rect.x,
                        y: y + height,
                        width: rect.width,
                        height: (rect.y + rect.height) - (y + height)
                    });
                }
            } else {
                // Keep this rectangle
                newRects.push(rect);
            }
        }
        
        // Remove redundant rectangles
        this.freeRectangles = this.pruneRectangles(newRects);
    }
    
    intersects(x1, y1, w1, h1, x2, y2, w2, h2) {
        return !(x1 + w1 <= x2 || x2 + w2 <= x1 || y1 + h1 <= y2 || y2 + h2 <= y1);
    }
    
    pruneRectangles(rects) {
        // Remove rectangles that are completely contained within other rectangles
        const pruned = [];
        
        for (let i = 0; i < rects.length; i++) {
            const rect = rects[i];
            let contained = false;
            
            for (let j = 0; j < rects.length; j++) {
                if (i === j) continue;
                
                const other = rects[j];
                
                if (rect.x >= other.x &&
                    rect.y >= other.y &&
                    rect.x + rect.width <= other.x + other.width &&
                    rect.y + rect.height <= other.y + other.height) {
                    contained = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            
            if (!contained) {
                pruned.push(rect);
            }
        }
        
        return pruned;
    }
    
    expandAtlas() {
        // Try to expand width first
        if (this.width < this.maxSize) {
            const newWidth = this.powerOfTwo ? this.width * 2 : this.width + 128;
            
            if (newWidth <= this.maxSize) {
                this.freeRectangles.push({
                    x: this.width,
                    y: 0,
                    width: newWidth - this.width,
                    height: this.height
                });
                
                this.width = newWidth;
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        // Try to expand height
        if (this.height < this.maxSize) {
            const newHeight = this.powerOfTwo ? this.height * 2 : this.height + 128;
            
            if (newHeight <= this.maxSize) {
                this.freeRectangles.push({
                    x: 0,
                    y: this.height,
                    width: this.width,
                    height: newHeight - this.height
                });
                
                this.height = newHeight;
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false; // Cannot expand further
    }
}

export default MaxRectsPacker;
javascript
// tools/packers/ShelfPacker.js

class ShelfPacker {
    constructor(maxSize, powerOfTwo = true) {
        this.maxSize = maxSize;
        this.powerOfTwo = powerOfTwo;
        
        this.width = this.powerOfTwo ? 256 : 128;
        this.height = this.powerOfTwo ? 256 : 128;
        
        this.shelves = [];
        this.packedSprites = [];
        this.filledArea = 0;
    }
    
    pack(sprites) {
        this.shelves = [];
        this.packedSprites = [];
        this.filledArea = 0;
        
        // Create first shelf
        this.shelves.push({
            y: 0,
            height: 0,
            x: 0
        });
        
        // Pack each sprite
        sprites.forEach(sprite => {
            this.packSprite(sprite);
        });
        
        return this.packedSprites;
    }
    
    packSprite(sprite) {
        // Try to fit on existing shelves
        for (const shelf of this.shelves) {
            if (this.tryPackOnShelf(sprite, shelf)) {
                return;
            }
        }
        
        // Create new shelf
        this.createNewShelf(sprite);
    }
    
    tryPackOnShelf(sprite, shelf) {
        // Check if sprite fits
        if (sprite.packWidth > this.width - shelf.x) {
            return false; // Doesn't fit horizontally
        }
        
        if (sprite.packHeight > shelf.height && shelf.y + sprite.packHeight > this.height) {
            return false; // Doesn't fit vertically
        }
        
        // Place sprite
        this.packedSprites.push({
            ...sprite,
            x: shelf.x,
            y: shelf.y
        });
        
        this.filledArea += sprite.packWidth * sprite.packHeight;
        
        // Update shelf
        shelf.x += sprite.packWidth;
        shelf.height = Math.max(shelf.height, sprite.packHeight);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    createNewShelf(sprite) {
        // Find Y position for new shelf
        let y = 0;
        this.shelves.forEach(shelf => {
            y = Math.max(y, shelf.y + shelf.height);
        });
        
        // Check if we need to expand atlas
        while (y + sprite.packHeight > this.height) {
            if (!this.expandAtlas()) {
                console.warn('[ShelfPacker] Cannot fit sprite!');
                return;
            }
        }
        
        // Create shelf
        const shelf = {
            y: y,
            height: sprite.packHeight,
            x: sprite.packWidth
        };
        
        this.shelves.push(shelf);
        
        // Place sprite
        this.packedSprites.push({
            ...sprite,
            x: 0,
            y: y
        });
        
        this.filledArea += sprite.packWidth * sprite.packHeight;
    }
    
    expandAtlas() {
        if (this.height < this.maxSize) {
            this.height = this.powerOfTwo ? this.height * 2 : this.height + 128;
            return true;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
}

export default ShelfPacker;
javascript
// tools/packers/GridPacker.js

class GridPacker {
    constructor(maxSize) {
        this.maxSize = maxSize;
        this.width = 0;
        this.height = 0;
        this.packedSprites = [];
        this.filledArea = 0;
    }
    
    pack(sprites) {
        if (sprites.length === 0) return [];
        
        // Calculate grid dimensions
        const count = sprites.length;
        const cols = Math.ceil(Math.sqrt(count));
        const rows = Math.ceil(count / cols);
        
        // Find max sprite dimensions
        let maxWidth = 0;
        let maxHeight = 0;
        
        sprites.forEach(sprite => {
            maxWidth = Math.max(maxWidth, sprite.packWidth);
            maxHeight = Math.max(maxHeight, sprite.packHeight);
        });
        
        // Calculate atlas size
        this.width = Math.min(cols * maxWidth, this.maxSize);
        this.height = Math.min(rows * maxHeight, this.maxSize);
        
        // Pack sprites in grid
        this.packedSprites = [];
        let index = 0;
        
        for (let row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
            for (let col = 0; col < cols; col++) {
                if (index >= sprites.length) break;
                
                const sprite = sprites[index];
                
                this.packedSprites.push({
                    ...sprite,
                    x: col * maxWidth,
                    y: row * maxHeight
                });
                
                this.filledArea += sprite.packWidth * sprite.packHeight;
                index++;
            }
        }
        
        return this.packedSprites;
    }
}

export default GridPacker;
```

---

## TOOL 18: ANIMATION CLIP CREATOR

### How Unity Does It

**Unity's Animation Window Workflow**:
```
Unity Animation System:
1. Select GameObject
2. Open Animation window (Window → Animation → Animation)
3. Create new Animation Clip
4. Timeline appears with properties
5. Add properties to animate:
   - Transform (position, rotation, scale)
   - Sprite (change sprite frame)
   - Color (tint, alpha)
   - Custom properties
6. Create keyframes:
   - Click Record button
   - Modify object properties
   - Unity auto-creates keyframes
   - OR manually add keyframes on timeline
7. Edit keyframes:
   - Drag to move in time
   - Adjust values in inspector
   - Copy/paste keyframes
   - Tangent editing for curves
8. Preview animation:
   - Scrub timeline
   - Play in editor
   - Loop/ping-pong modes
9. Events:
   - Add animation events at specific frames
   - Trigger sounds, spawn effects, etc.
10. Save Animation Clip as asset
```

**Key Features**:
- Timeline with frame/second display
- Multi-track editing (multiple properties)
- Keyframe interpolation (linear, ease in/out, custom curves)
- Onion skinning (see previous/next frames)
- Dopesheet view (simplified keyframe view)
- Curves view (detailed curve editing)
- Animation events (call functions at specific times)
- Sample rate control (60fps, 30fps, 12fps)
- Animation clip looping settings
- Preview in scene while editing

### How We'll Build It

**Architecture**:
```
AnimationClipCreator
├─── Timeline Editor
│    ├─── Time ruler (seconds/frames)
│    ├─── Playhead scrubber
│    ├─── Zoom controls
│    └─── Frame snapping
├─── Property Tracks
│    ├─── Transform track (x, y, rotation, scale)
│    ├─── Sprite track (frame sequence)
│    ├─── Color track (tint, alpha)
│    └─── Custom property tracks
├─── Keyframe Editor
│    ├─── Visual keyframe markers
│    ├─── Drag to move keyframes
│    ├─── Value editing
│    ├─── Copy/paste keyframes
│    └─── Delete keyframes
├─── Interpolation
│    ├─── Linear
│    ├─── Ease in/out
│    ├─── Cubic bezier curves
│    └─── Step (no interpolation)
├─── Preview System
│    ├─── Play/pause/stop
│    ├─── Loop modes
│    ├─── Playback speed control
│    ├─── Onion skinning
│    └─── Frame-by-frame stepping
├─── Animation Events
│    ├─── Event markers on timeline
│    ├─── Function name + parameters
│    └─── Event callbacks
└─── Export
     ├─── Animation clip JSON
     ├─── Integration with Animation System (Tool 6)
     └─── Preview in game
Complete Implementation:

javascript
// tools/AnimationClipCreator.js

class AnimationClipCreator {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Animation clip data
        this.clip = {
            name: 'New Animation',
            duration: 1.0, // seconds
            framerate: 60,
            loop: true,
            tracks: []
        };
        
        // Timeline state
        this.currentTime = 0;
        this.playing = false;
        this.playbackSpeed = 1.0;
        
        // Selected object to animate
        this.targetObject = null;
        
        // Timeline view
        this.timelineZoom = 1.0;
        this.timelineScroll = 0;
        
        // Selected keyframes
        this.selectedKeyframes = [];
        
        // UI
        this.container = null;
        this.timelinePanel = null;
        this.tracksPanel = null;
        this.previewPanel = null;
        this.propertiesPanel = null;
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createUI();
        console.log('[AnimationClipCreator] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createUI() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(60000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height, 0x0a0a0a, 0.95);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        // Title bar
        const titleBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, 20, width, 40, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        this.container.add(titleBg);
        
        const title = this.scene.add.text(20, 20, 'Animation Clip Creator', {
            font: 'bold 18px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.container.add(title);
        
        // Toolbar
        this.createToolbar();
        
        // Layout: [Preview | Timeline/Tracks | Properties]
        this.createPreviewPanel();
        this.createTimelinePanel();
        this.createTracksPanel();
        this.createPropertiesPanel();
    }
    
    createToolbar() {
        const y = 50;
        
        const buttons = [
            { label: '◀◀', tooltip: 'First Frame', action: () => this.goToStart() },
            { label: '◀', tooltip: 'Previous Frame', action: () => this.previousFrame() },
            { label: this.playing ? '⏸' : '▶', tooltip: 'Play/Pause', action: () => this.togglePlay() },
            { label: '▶', tooltip: 'Next Frame', action: () => this.nextFrame() },
            { label: '▶▶', tooltip: 'Last Frame', action: () => this.goToEnd() },
            { label: '⏹', tooltip: 'Stop', action: () => this.stop() },
            { separator: true },
            { label: 'Add Track', action: () => this.addTrack() },
            { label: 'Add Keyframe', action: () => this.addKeyframe() },
            { separator: true },
            { label: 'Export', action: () => this.exportClip() },
            { label: 'Close', action: () => this.close() }
        ];
        
        let x = 20;
        
        buttons.forEach(btn => {
            if (btn.separator) {
                const sep = this.scene.add.text(x, y + 15, '|', {
                    font: '20px Arial',
                    fill: '#666666'
                });
                sep.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
                this.container.add(sep);
                x += 20;
                return;
            }
            
            const button = this.scene.add.text(x, y + 15, btn.label, {
                font: '16px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            button.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            button.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            button.on('pointerover', () => {
                button.setColor('#ffaa00');
            });
            
            button.on('pointerout', () => {
                button.setColor('#ffffff');
            });
            
            button.on('pointerdown', btn.action);
            
            this.container.add(button);
            
            x += button.width + 15;
        });
        
        // Time display
        this.timeDisplay = this.scene.add.text(
            this.scene.scale.width - 150, y + 15,
            this.formatTime(this.currentTime),
            { font: '14px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        this.timeDisplay.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.timeDisplay);
    }
    
    createPreviewPanel() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.3;
        const height = 300;
        const x = 20;
        const y = 90;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Border
        const border = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height);
        border.setStrokeStyle(2, 0x666666, 1);
        panel.add(border);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Preview', {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Preview canvas
        this.previewCanvas = this.scene.add.container(width / 2, height / 2 + 10);
        panel.add(this.previewCanvas);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.previewPanel = panel;
    }
    
    createTimelinePanel() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width - 50;
        const height = 80;
        const x = 20;
        const y = 410;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 5, 'Timeline', {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Time ruler
        this.createTimeRuler(panel, width, 25);
        
        // Playhead
        this.playhead = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.playhead.lineStyle(2, 0xff4444, 1);
        this.playhead.moveTo(0, 25);
        this.playhead.lineTo(0, height);
        this.playhead.strokePath();
        panel.add(this.playhead);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.timelinePanel = panel;
    }
    
    createTimeRuler(panel, width, y) {
        const ruler = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        // Background
        ruler.fillStyle(0x1a1a1a, 1);
        ruler.fillRect(0, y, width, 20);
        
        // Ticks
        const pixelsPerSecond = 100 * this.timelineZoom;
        const duration = this.clip.duration;
        
        ruler.lineStyle(1, 0x666666, 1);
        
        for (let t = 0; t <= duration; t += 0.1) {
            const x = t * pixelsPerSecond;
            
            if (x > width) break;
            
            const isMajor = t % 1.0 === 0;
            const tickHeight = isMajor ? 15 : 5;
            
            ruler.moveTo(x, y + 20);
            ruler.lineTo(x, y + 20 - tickHeight);
        }
        
        ruler.strokePath();
        
        // Labels
        for (let t = 0; t <= duration; t += 1.0) {
            const x = t * pixelsPerSecond;
            
            if (x > width) break;
            
            const label = this.scene.add.text(x, y + 5, t.toFixed(1) + 's', {
                font: '10px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            label.setOrigin(0.5, 0);
            panel.add(label);
        }
        
        panel.add(ruler);
    }
    
    createTracksPanel() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width - 50;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 550;
        const x = 20;
        const y = 500;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 5, 'Tracks', {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Tracks container (scrollable)
        this.tracksContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, 30);
        panel.add(this.tracksContainer);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.tracksPanel = panel;
        
        this.refreshTracks();
    }
    
    createPropertiesPanel() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 0.25;
        const height = 300;
        const x = this.scene.scale.width * 0.7 + 30;
        const y = 90;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Keyframe Properties', {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Properties container
        this.propertiesContainer = this.scene.add.container(10, 40);
        panel.add(this.propertiesContainer);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.propertiesPanel = panel;
    }
    
    // === TRACK MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addTrack() {
        const trackTypes = [
            { label: 'Position', property: 'position' },
            { label: 'Rotation', property: 'rotation' },
            { label: 'Scale', property: 'scale' },
            { label: 'Sprite Frame', property: 'frame' },
            { label: 'Color/Alpha', property: 'color' }
        ];
        
        const choice = prompt(
            'Add Track:\n' +
            trackTypes.map((t, i) => `${i + 1}. ${t.label}`).join('\n')
        );
        
        const index = parseInt(choice) - 1;
        
        if (index >= 0 && index < trackTypes.length) {
            const trackType = trackTypes[index];
            
            this.clip.tracks.push({
                property: trackType.property,
                keyframes: []
            });
            
            this.refreshTracks();
        }
    }
    
    refreshTracks() {
        this.tracksContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        if (this.clip.tracks.length === 0) {
            const emptyText = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'No tracks. Click "Add Track" to begin.', {
                font: '12px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            this.tracksContainer.add(emptyText);
            return;
        }
        
        let y = 0;
        
        this.clip.tracks.forEach((track, trackIndex) => {
            const trackRow = this.createTrackRow(track, trackIndex, y);
            this.tracksContainer.add(trackRow);
            y += 40;
        });
    }
    
    createTrackRow(track, trackIndex, y) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(0, y);
        
        const width = this.scene.scale.width - 70;
        
        // Track background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, 35, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        container.add(bg);
        
        // Track label
        const label = this.scene.add.text(10, 17.5, this.getTrackLabel(track.property), {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        // Keyframe lane
        const pixelsPerSecond = 100 * this.timelineZoom;
        
        track.keyframes.forEach((keyframe, kfIndex) => {
            const x = keyframe.time * pixelsPerSecond + 150;
            
            const kfMarker = this.createKeyframeMarker(keyframe, trackIndex, kfIndex);
            kfMarker.setPosition(x, 17.5);
            container.add(kfMarker);
        });
        
        // Delete track button
        const deleteBtn = this.scene.add.text(width - 30, 17.5, '×', {
            font: 'bold 16px Arial',
            fill: '#ff4444'
        });
        deleteBtn.setOrigin(0.5);
        deleteBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        deleteBtn.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.clip.tracks.splice(trackIndex, 1);
            this.refreshTracks();
        });
        
        container.add(deleteBtn);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    createKeyframeMarker(keyframe, trackIndex, kfIndex) {
        const marker = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        const isSelected = this.selectedKeyframes.some(
            kf => kf.trackIndex === trackIndex && kf.kfIndex === kfIndex
        );
        
        // Diamond shape
        marker.fillStyle(isSelected ? 0xffaa00 : 0x44ff88, 1);
        marker.fillTriangle(-5, 0, 0, -5, 5, 0);
        marker.fillTriangle(-5, 0, 0, 5, 5, 0);
        
        // Make interactive
        const hitArea = new Phaser.Geom.Circle(0, 0, 8);
        marker.setInteractive(hitArea, Phaser.Geom.Circle.Contains, { useHandCursor: true, draggable: true });
        
        marker.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (!pointer.shiftKey) {
                this.selectedKeyframes = [];
            }
            
            this.selectedKeyframes.push({ trackIndex, kfIndex });
            this.refreshTracks();
            this.updatePropertiesPanel();
        });
        
        marker.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            this.dragKeyframe(trackIndex, kfIndex, dragX);
        });
        
        return marker;
    }
    
    dragKeyframe(trackIndex, kfIndex, dragX) {
        const pixelsPerSecond = 100 * this.timelineZoom;
        const newTime = (dragX - 150) / pixelsPerSecond;
        
        // Clamp to clip duration
        const clampedTime = Phaser.Math.Clamp(newTime, 0, this.clip.duration);
        
        this.clip.tracks[trackIndex].keyframes[kfIndex].time = clampedTime;
        
        this.refreshTracks();
    }
    
    getTrackLabel(property) {
        const labels = {
            position: 'Position',
            rotation: 'Rotation',
            scale: 'Scale',
            frame: 'Sprite Frame',
            color: 'Color/Alpha'
        };
        
        return labels[property] || property;
    }
    
    // === KEYFRAME MANAGEMENT ===
    
    addKeyframe() {
        if (!this.targetObject) {
            alert('Select an object to animate first!');
            return;
        }
        
        if (this.clip.tracks.length === 0) {
            alert('Add a track first!');
            return;
        }
        
        // Add keyframe to all tracks at current time
        this.clip.tracks.forEach(track => {
            const value = this.getCurrentPropertyValue(track.property);
            
            track.keyframes.push({
                time: this.currentTime,
                value: value,
                interpolation: 'linear'
            });
            
            // Sort keyframes by time
            track.keyframes.sort((a, b) => a.time - b.time);
        });
        
        this.refreshTracks();
    }
    
    getCurrentPropertyValue(property) {
        if (!this.targetObject) return 0;
        
        switch (property) {
            case 'position':
                return { x: this.targetObject.x, y: this.targetObject.y };
            case 'rotation':
                return this.targetObject.rotation;
            case 'scale':
                return { x: this.targetObject.scaleX, y: this.targetObject.scaleY };
            case 'frame':
                return this.targetObject.frame?.name || 0;
            case 'color':
                return { tint: this.targetObject.tint, alpha: this.targetObject.alpha };
            default:
                return 0;
        }
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK ===
    
    togglePlay() {
        this.playing = !this.playing;
        
        if (this.playing) {
            this.play();
        }
    }
    
    play() {
        if (!this.playing) return;
        
        // Update current time
        const deltaTime = this.scene.game.loop.delta / 1000 * this.playbackSpeed;
        this.currentTime += deltaTime;
        
        // Loop or stop at end
        if (this.currentTime >= this.clip.duration) {
            if (this.clip.loop) {
                this.currentTime = 0;
            } else {
                this.stop();
                return;
            }
        }
        
        // Apply animation to target object
        if (this.targetObject) {
            this.applyAnimationAtTime(this.currentTime);
        }
        
        // Update playhead
        this.updatePlayhead();
        
        // Update time display
        this.timeDisplay.setText(this.formatTime(this.currentTime));
        
        // Continue playing
        this.scene.time.delayedCall(16, () => this.play());
    }
    
    stop() {
        this.playing = false;
        this.currentTime = 0;
        this.updatePlayhead();
        this.timeDisplay.setText(this.formatTime(this.currentTime));
    }
    
    goToStart() {
        this.currentTime = 0;
        this.updatePlayhead();
        this.applyAnimationAtTime(this.currentTime);
    }
    
    goToEnd() {
        this.currentTime = this.clip.duration;
        this.updatePlayhead();
        this.applyAnimationAtTime(this.currentTime);
    }
    
    previousFrame() {
        const frameDuration = 1.0 / this.clip.framerate;
        this.currentTime = Math.max(0, this.currentTime - frameDuration);
        this.updatePlayhead();
        this.applyAnimationAtTime(this.currentTime);
    }
    
    nextFrame() {
        const frameDuration = 1.0 / this.clip.framerate;
        this.currentTime = Math.min(this.clip.duration, this.currentTime + frameDuration);
        this.updatePlayhead();
        this.applyAnimationAtTime(this.currentTime);
    }
    
    updatePlayhead() {
        const pixelsPerSecond = 100 * this.timelineZoom;
        const x = this.currentTime * pixelsPerSecond;
        
        this.playhead.setPosition(x, 0);
    }
    
    applyAnimationAtTime(time) {
        if (!this.targetObject) return;
        
        this.clip.tracks.forEach(track => {
            const value = this.evaluateTrackAtTime(track, time);
            this.applyPropertyValue(track.property, value);
        });
    }
    
    evaluateTrackAtTime(track, time) {
        if (track.keyframes.length === 0) return null;
        
        // Find surrounding keyframes
        let prevKf = null;
        let nextKf = null;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < track.keyframes.length; i++) {
            const kf = track.keyframes[i];
            
            if (kf.time <= time) {
                prevKf = kf;
            }
            
            if (kf.time >= time && !nextKf) {
                nextKf = kf;
            }
        }
        
        // If before first keyframe, use first
        if (!prevKf) return nextKf.value;
        
        // If after last keyframe, use last
        if (!nextKf) return prevKf.value;
        
        // If exactly on keyframe, use it
        if (prevKf.time === time) return prevKf.value;
        if (nextKf.time === time) return nextKf.value;
        
        // Interpolate between keyframes
        const t = (time - prevKf.time) / (nextKf.time - prevKf.time);
        
        return this.interpolateValue(prevKf.value, nextKf.value, t, prevKf.interpolation);
    }
    
    interpolateValue(from, to, t, interpolation) {
        // Apply interpolation curve
        let easedT = t;
        
        if (interpolation === 'easeIn') {
            easedT = t * t;
        } else if (interpolation === 'easeOut') {
            easedT = t * (2 - t);
        } else if (interpolation === 'easeInOut') {
            easedT = t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t;
        }
        // 'linear' uses t as-is
        
        // Interpolate based on value type
        if (typeof from === 'number') {
            return from + (to - from) * easedT;
        } else if (typeof from === 'object') {
            const result = {};
            Object.keys(from).forEach(key => {
                result[key] = from[key] + (to[key] - from[key]) * easedT;
            });
            return result;
        }
        
        return to; // Fallback
    }
    
    applyPropertyValue(property, value) {
        if (!this.targetObject || !value) return;
        
        switch (property) {
            case 'position':
                this.targetObject.setPosition(value.x, value.y);
                break;
            case 'rotation':
                this.targetObject.setRotation(value);
                break;
            case 'scale':
                this.targetObject.setScale(value.x, value.y);
                break;
            case 'frame':
                if (this.targetObject.setFrame) {
                    this.targetObject.setFrame(value);
                }
                break;
            case 'color':
                this.targetObject.setTint(value.tint);
                this.targetObject.setAlpha(value.alpha);
                break;
        }
    }
    
    // === PROPERTIES PANEL ===
    
    updatePropertiesPanel() {
        this.propertiesContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        if (this.selectedKeyframes.length === 0) {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, 'No keyframe selected', {
                font: '11px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            this.propertiesContainer.add(text);
            return;
        }
        
        if (this.selectedKeyframes.length === 1) {
            const { trackIndex, kfIndex } = this.selectedKeyframes[0];
            const track = this.clip.tracks[trackIndex];
            const keyframe = track.keyframes[kfIndex];
            
            this.showKeyframeProperties(track, keyframe, trackIndex, kfIndex);
        } else {
            const text = this.scene.add.text(0, 0, `${this.selectedKeyframes.length} keyframes selected`, {
                font: '11px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            this.propertiesContainer.add(text);
        }
    }
    
    showKeyframeProperties(track, keyframe, trackIndex, kfIndex) {
        let y = 0;
        
        // Time
        const timeLabel = this.scene.add.text(0, y, 'Time:', {
            font: 'bold 11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.propertiesContainer.add(timeLabel);
        y += 20;
        
        const timeValue = this.scene.add.text(0, y, keyframe.time.toFixed(3) + 's', {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        timeValue.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        
        timeValue.on('pointerdown', () => {
            const newTime = parseFloat(prompt('Time (seconds):', keyframe.time));
            if (!isNaN(newTime)) {
                keyframe.time = Phaser.Math.Clamp(newTime, 0, this.clip.duration);
                this.refreshTracks();
                this.updatePropertiesPanel();
            }
        });
        
        this.propertiesContainer.add(timeValue);
        y += 30;
        
        // Value
        const valueLabel = this.scene.add.text(0, y, 'Value:', {
            font: 'bold 11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.propertiesContainer.add(valueLabel);
        y += 20;
        
        const valueText = this.scene.add.text(0, y, JSON.stringify(keyframe.value), {
            font: '11px Arial',
            fill: '#cccccc',
            wordWrap: { width: 200 }
        });
        this.propertiesContainer.add(valueText);
        y += 40;
        
        // Interpolation
        const interpLabel = this.scene.add.text(0, y, 'Interpolation:', {
            font: 'bold 11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.propertiesContainer.add(interpLabel);
        y += 20;
        
        const interpolations = ['linear', 'easeIn', 'easeOut', 'easeInOut'];
        
        interpolations.forEach((interp, index) => {
            const isSelected = keyframe.interpolation === interp;
            
            const btn = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, y + index * 25, 150, 20, isSelected ? 0x4488ff : 0x333333, 1);
            btn.setOrigin(0);
            btn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            this.propertiesContainer.add(btn);
            
            const label = this.scene.add.text(75, y + index * 25 + 10, interp, {
                font: '10px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            label.setOrigin(0.5);
            this.propertiesContainer.add(label);
            
            btn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                keyframe.interpolation = interp;
                this.updatePropertiesPanel();
            });
        });
    }
    
    // === EXPORT ===
    
    exportClip() {
        const data = {
            name: this.clip.name,
            duration: this.clip.duration,
            framerate: this.clip.framerate,
            loop: this.clip.loop,
            tracks: this.clip.tracks.map(track => ({
                property: track.property,
                keyframes: track.keyframes.map(kf => ({
                    time: kf.time,
                    value: kf.value,
                    interpolation: kf.interpolation
                }))
            }))
        };
        
        console.log('Exported Animation Clip:', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
        
        // Save to localStorage
        const key = `animclip_${this.clip.name}`;
        localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));
        
        alert(`Animation clip "${this.clip.name}" exported!`);
        
        return data;
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    formatTime(seconds) {
        const mins = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
        const secs = seconds % 60;
        return `${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toFixed(2).padStart(5, '0')}`;
    }
    
    open() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.stop();
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
    
    setTargetObject(obj) {
        this.targetObject = obj;
        console.log('[AnimationClipCreator] Target object set:', obj);
    }
}

export default AnimationClipCreator;

COMPLETE CONDENSED MASTER ROADMAP (TOOLS 19-30)
TOOL 19: TILEMAP EDITOR & SYSTEM
How Unity Does It
Unity Tilemap System:

Unity 2D Tilemap Workflow:
1. Grid Component (parent object)
   - Grid layout: Rectangle, Hexagon, Isometric
   - Cell size (e.g., 32x32 pixels)
   - Cell swizzle (XYZ, XZY for isometric)

2. Tilemap Component (child of Grid)
   - Multiple tilemaps for layers (Ground, Walls, Decoration, Collision)
   - Tilemap Renderer (sorts sprites by position)
   - Tilemap Collider 2D (auto-generates collision)
   - Composite Collider 2D (merges adjacent tiles)

3. Tile Palette Window
   - Create palette from sprites
   - Paint brush (single tile)
   - Rectangle brush (fill area)
   - Flood fill (fill connected area)
   - Eraser
   - Eyedropper (pick tile)

4. Tile Assets
   - Basic Tile (static sprite)
   - Animated Tile (sprite sequence)
   - Rule Tile (auto-connect based on neighbors)
   - Random Tile (picks from sprite set)

5. Advanced Features
   - Rule Tile auto-tiling (corners, edges, inner/outer)
   - Tile prefabs (spawn objects on tiles)
   - Custom brushes (scripts for special painting)
   - Z-position per tile (overlapping)
Key Unity Features:

Tile Palette: Visual tile picker with drag-paint
Multi-layer: Separate tilemaps for different depths
Auto-tiling: Rule tiles that detect neighbors and auto-select correct sprite
Collision Generation: Automatic collision from tilemap data
Composite Collider: Merges adjacent tile colliders into optimized shapes
Animated Tiles: Frame-by-frame animation support
Tilemap Renderer: Efficient chunk-based rendering
Scriptable Tiles: Custom tile behavior via code
Our Architecture
TilemapEditor
├─── Grid System
│    ├─── Cell size configuration
│    ├─── Grid types (square, hex, isometric)
│    ├─── Visual grid overlay
│    └─── Snap to grid
│
├─── Tilemap Manager
│    ├─── Multi-layer support
│    │    ├─── Ground layer (z-index: 0)
│    │    ├─── Walls layer (z-index: 1)
│    │    ├─── Decoration layer (z-index: 2)
│    │    └─── Collision layer (invisible)
│    ├─── Layer visibility toggle
│    ├─── Layer ordering
│    └─── Active layer selection
│
├─── Tile Palette
│    ├─── Tileset loading (sprite atlas)
│    ├─── Visual tile grid
│    ├─── Tile selection (single/multi)
│    ├─── Tile categories/tabs
│    └─── Search/filter
│
├─── Painting Tools
│    ├─── Brush (paint single tile)
│    ├─── Rectangle (fill area)
│    ├─── Flood Fill (connected tiles)
│    ├─── Eraser
│    ├─── Eyedropper (pick tile)
│    └─── Line tool
│
├─── Tile Types
│    ├─── Basic Tile (single sprite)
│    ├─── Animated Tile (frame array)
│    ├─── Rule Tile (auto-tiling)
│    │    ├─── 4-way neighbors (N, E, S, W)
│    │    ├─── 8-way neighbors (includes diagonals)
│    │    ├─── Rule definitions
│    │    └─── Sprite selection logic
│    └─── Random Tile (variant selection)
│
├─── Collision System
│    ├─── Tile collision flags
│    ├─── Auto-generate collision shapes
│    ├─── Composite collider (merge adjacent)
│    ├─── Custom collision shapes per tile
│    └─── Trigger zones
│
├─── Rendering
│    ├─── Chunk-based rendering (16x16 tile chunks)
│    ├─── Culling (only render visible chunks)
│    ├─── Sprite batching
│    ├─── Z-sorting per layer
│    └─── Dynamic tilemap updates
│
└─── Export
     ├─── Tilemap data JSON
     ├─── Collision data
     ├─── Integration with Phaser tilemap
     └─── Scene serialization
