javascript
// tools/TilemapEditor.js

class TilemapEditor {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Grid configuration
        this.gridConfig = {
            cellWidth: 32,
            cellHeight: 32,
            type: 'square' // square, hex, isometric
        };
        
        // Layers
        this.layers = [
            { name: 'Ground', visible: true, zIndex: 0, tiles: new Map() },
            { name: 'Walls', visible: true, zIndex: 1, tiles: new Map() },
            { name: 'Decoration', visible: true, zIndex: 2, tiles: new Map() },
            { name: 'Collision', visible: true, zIndex: -1, tiles: new Map() }
        ];
        this.activeLayerIndex = 0;
        
        // Tileset
        this.tileset = null;
        this.tilesetTexture = null;
        this.tiles = []; // Array of tile definitions
        
        // Selected tile
        this.selectedTile = null;
        
        // Tools
        this.currentTool = 'brush'; // brush, rectangle, fill, eraser, eyedropper
        
        // Camera
        this.camera = {
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            zoom: 1.0
        };
        
        // UI
        this.container = null;
        this.canvasPanel = null;
        this.palettePanel = null;
        this.layersPanel = null;
        this.toolsPanel = null;
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createUI();
        console.log('[TilemapEditor] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === UI CREATION ===
    
    createUI() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(60000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        const width = this.scene.scale.width;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height;
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height, 0x0a0a0a, 0.95);
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, 20, 'Tilemap Editor', {
            font: 'bold 24px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        title.setOrigin(0.5);
        this.container.add(title);
        
        // Layout: [Layers | Canvas | Palette]
        //         [      | Tools  |        ]
        
        this.createLayersPanel();
        this.createCanvasPanel();
        this.createPalettePanel();
        this.createToolsPanel();
        
        // Action buttons
        this.createActionButtons();
    }
    
    createLayersPanel() {
        const width = 200;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 150;
        const x = 10;
        const y = 60;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Layers', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Layer list
        this.layerListContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, 40);
        panel.add(this.layerListContainer);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.layersPanel = panel;
        
        this.refreshLayerList();
    }
    
    refreshLayerList() {
        this.layerListContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        this.layers.forEach((layer, index) => {
            const y = index * 35;
            
            const layerItem = this.scene.add.container(10, y);
            
            // Background (active highlight)
            const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                0, 0, 180, 30,
                this.activeLayerIndex === index ? 0x4488ff : 0x1a1a1a,
                this.activeLayerIndex === index ? 0.5 : 1
            );
            bg.setOrigin(0);
            bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            layerItem.add(bg);
            
            bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.activeLayerIndex = index;
                this.refreshLayerList();
            });
            
            // Visibility toggle
            const eyeIcon = this.scene.add.text(5, 15, layer.visible ? '👁' : '🚫', {
                font: '12px Arial'
            });
            eyeIcon.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            eyeIcon.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            
            eyeIcon.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
                pointer.event.stopPropagation();
                layer.visible = !layer.visible;
                this.refreshLayerList();
                this.refreshCanvas();
            });
            
            layerItem.add(eyeIcon);
            
            // Layer name
            const name = this.scene.add.text(30, 15, layer.name, {
                font: '12px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            name.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            layerItem.add(name);
            
            // Tile count
            const count = this.scene.add.text(150, 15, layer.tiles.size.toString(), {
                font: '10px Arial',
                fill: '#888888'
            });
            count.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
            layerItem.add(count);
            
            this.layerListContainer.add(layerItem);
        });
    }
    
    createCanvasPanel() {
        const width = this.scene.scale.width - 600;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 220;
        const x = 220;
        const y = 60;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x1a1a1a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive();
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Canvas (for zoom/pan)
        this.canvas = this.scene.add.container(width / 2, height / 2);
        panel.add(this.canvas);
        
        // Grid layer
        this.gridLayer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.canvas.add(this.gridLayer);
        this.createGrid();
        
        // Tilemap layers
        this.tilemapLayers = [];
        this.layers.forEach((layer, index) => {
            const layerContainer = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
            this.canvas.add(layerContainer);
            this.tilemapLayers[index] = layerContainer;
        });
        
        // Cursor preview
        this.cursorPreview = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, this.gridConfig.cellWidth, this.gridConfig.cellHeight);
        this.cursorPreview.setStrokeStyle(2, 0xffaa00, 1);
        this.cursorPreview.setAlpha(0.5);
        this.canvas.add(this.cursorPreview);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.canvasPanel = panel;
        
        this.setupCanvasInput(bg, width, height);
    }
    
    createGrid() {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        // Draw large grid (20x20 cells visible)
        const cellWidth = this.gridConfig.cellWidth;
        const cellHeight = this.gridConfig.cellHeight;
        const gridSize = 40; // 40x40 grid
        
        graphics.lineStyle(1, 0x333333, 0.5);
        
        // Vertical lines
        for (let x = 0; x <= gridSize; x++) {
            graphics.moveTo(x * cellWidth - (gridSize / 2) * cellWidth, -(gridSize / 2) * cellHeight);
            graphics.lineTo(x * cellWidth - (gridSize / 2) * cellWidth, (gridSize / 2) * cellHeight);
        }
        
        // Horizontal lines
        for (let y = 0; y <= gridSize; y++) {
            graphics.moveTo(-(gridSize / 2) * cellWidth, y * cellHeight - (gridSize / 2) * cellHeight);
            graphics.lineTo((gridSize / 2) * cellWidth, y * cellHeight - (gridSize / 2) * cellHeight);
        }
        
        graphics.strokePath();
        
        this.gridLayer.add(graphics);
    }
    
    setupCanvasInput(bg, width, height) {
        // Pan with middle/right mouse
        bg.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            if (pointer.middleButtonDown() || pointer.rightButtonDown()) {
                this.startPanning(pointer);
            } else if (pointer.leftButtonDown()) {
                this.handleCanvasClick(pointer);
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointermove', (pointer) => {
            if (this.panning) {
                this.updatePanning(pointer);
            } else {
                this.updateCursorPreview(pointer);
            }
        });
        
        this.scene.input.on('pointerup', () => {
            if (this.panning) {
                this.stopPanning();
            }
        });
        
        // Zoom
        this.scene.input.on('wheel', (pointer, gameObjects, deltaX, deltaY) => {
            if (this.isPointerOverCanvas(pointer)) {
                this.zoom(deltaY > 0 ? -0.1 : 0.1);
            }
        });
    }
    
    handleCanvasClick(pointer) {
        const gridPos = this.screenToGrid(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        
        if (this.currentTool === 'brush') {
            this.paintTile(gridPos.x, gridPos.y);
        } else if (this.currentTool === 'eraser') {
            this.eraseTile(gridPos.x, gridPos.y);
        } else if (this.currentTool === 'eyedropper') {
            this.pickTile(gridPos.x, gridPos.y);
        } else if (this.currentTool === 'fill') {
            this.floodFill(gridPos.x, gridPos.y);
        }
    }
    
    updateCursorPreview(pointer) {
        if (!this.isPointerOverCanvas(pointer)) {
            this.cursorPreview.setVisible(false);
            return;
        }
        
        const gridPos = this.screenToGrid(pointer.x, pointer.y);
        const worldPos = this.gridToWorld(gridPos.x, gridPos.y);
        
        this.cursorPreview.setPosition(worldPos.x, worldPos.y);
        this.cursorPreview.setVisible(true);
        
        // Show selected tile preview
        if (this.selectedTile && this.currentTool === 'brush') {
            // Update cursor preview with selected tile sprite
        }
    }
    
    createPalettePanel() {
        const width = 300;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height - 150;
        const x = this.scene.scale.width - width - 10;
        const y = 60;
        
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x2a2a2a, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Tile Palette', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Load tileset button
        const loadBtn = this.createButton(10, 35, width - 20, 30, 'Load Tileset', () => {
            this.loadTileset();
        });
        panel.add(loadBtn);
        
        // Palette grid
        this.paletteContainer = this.scene.add.container(10, 75);
        panel.add(this.paletteContainer);
        
        this.container.add(panel);
        this.palettePanel = panel;
    }
    
    loadTileset() {
        const textureName = prompt('Enter tileset texture key:');
        
        if (!textureName || !this.scene.textures.exists(textureName)) {
            alert('Texture not found!');
            return;
        }
        
        this.tilesetTexture = textureName;
        
        // Check if we have sprite sheet data
        const atlasData = localStorage.getItem(`spritesheet_${textureName}`);
        
        if (atlasData) {
            this.loadTilesetFromAtlas(textureName, JSON.parse(atlasData));
        } else {
            // Manual grid slicing
            this.loadTilesetFromGrid(textureName);
        }
    }
    
    loadTilesetFromAtlas(textureName, atlasData) {
        this.tiles = [];
        
        Object.keys(atlasData.frames).forEach(frameName => {
            const frameData = atlasData.frames[frameName];
            
            this.tiles.push({
                id: frameName,
                texture: textureName,
                frame: frameName,
                x: frameData.frame.x,
                y: frameData.frame.y,
                width: frameData.frame.w,
                height: frameData.frame.h
            });
        });
        
        this.refreshPalette();
        
        console.log(`[TilemapEditor] Loaded ${this.tiles.length} tiles from atlas`);
    }
    
    loadTilesetFromGrid(textureName) {
        const cellWidth = parseInt(prompt('Tile width (px):', this.gridConfig.cellWidth));
        const cellHeight = parseInt(prompt('Tile height (px):', this.gridConfig.cellHeight));
        
        const texture = this.scene.textures.get(textureName);
        const imageWidth = texture.source[0].width;
        const imageHeight = texture.source[0].height;
        
        const cols = Math.floor(imageWidth / cellWidth);
        const rows = Math.floor(imageHeight / cellHeight);
        
        this.tiles = [];
        
        for (let row = 0; row < rows; row++) {
            for (let col = 0; col < cols; col++) {
                this.tiles.push({
                    id: `tile_${row}_${col}`,
                    texture: textureName,
                    x: col * cellWidth,
                    y: row * cellHeight,
                    width: cellWidth,
                    height: cellHeight
                });
            }
        }
        
        this.refreshPalette();
        
        console.log(`[TilemapEditor] Loaded ${this.tiles.length} tiles from grid`);
    }
    
    refreshPalette() {
        this.paletteContainer.removeAll(true);
        
        const tileSize = 40;
        const spacing = 5;
        const cols = 5;
        
        this.tiles.forEach((tile, index) => {
            const col = index % cols;
            const row = Math.floor(index / cols);
            
            const x = col * (tileSize + spacing);
            const y = row * (tileSize + spacing);
            
            const tileItem = this.createPaletteTile(tile, x, y, tileSize);
            this.paletteContainer.add(tileItem);
        });
    }
    
    createPaletteTile(tile, x, y, size) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            size / 2, size / 2,
            size, size,
            this.selectedTile === tile ? 0x4488ff : 0x1a1a1a,
            1
        );
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        // Tile sprite
        const sprite = this.scene.add.image(size / 2, size / 2, tile.texture);
        sprite.setCrop(tile.x, tile.y, tile.width, tile.height);
        
        const scale = Math.min(
            size / tile.width,
            size / tile.height
        );
        sprite.setScale(scale);
        
        container.add(sprite);
        
        // Click to select
        bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
            this.selectedTile = tile;
            this.refreshPalette();
        });
        
        return container;
    }
    
    createToolsPanel() {
        const y = this.scene.scale.height - 80;
        const buttonWidth = 80;
        const spacing = 10;
        
        const tools = [
            { name: 'brush', icon: '🖌', label: 'Brush' },
            { name: 'rectangle', icon: '▭', label: 'Rectangle' },
            { name: 'fill', icon: '🪣', label: 'Fill' },
            { name: 'eraser', icon: '🧹', label: 'Eraser' },
            { name: 'eyedropper', icon: '💧', label: 'Pick' }
        ];
        
        const totalWidth = tools.length * buttonWidth + (tools.length - 1) * spacing;
        let x = (this.scene.scale.width - totalWidth) / 2;
        
        tools.forEach(tool => {
            const isActive = this.currentTool === tool.name;
            
            const btn = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
            
            const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
                0, 0,
                buttonWidth, 60,
                isActive ? 0x4488ff : 0x333333,
                1
            );
            bg.setOrigin(0);
            bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
            btn.add(bg);
            
            const icon = this.scene.add.text(buttonWidth / 2, 20, tool.icon, {
                font: '24px Arial'
            });
            icon.setOrigin(0.5);
            btn.add(icon);
            
            const label = this.scene.add.text(buttonWidth / 2, 45, tool.label, {
                font: '10px Arial',
                fill: '#ffffff'
            });
            label.setOrigin(0.5);
            btn.add(label);
            
            bg.on('pointerdown', () => {
                this.currentTool = tool.name;
                this.container.remove(this.toolsPanel, true);
                this.createToolsPanel();
            });
            
            this.container.add(btn);
            
            x += buttonWidth + spacing;
        });
    }
    
    createActionButtons() {
        const y = this.scene.scale.height - 80;
        const buttonWidth = 100;
        const spacing = 10;
        
        const buttons = [
            { label: 'Clear Layer', action: () => this.clearActiveLayer() },
            { label: 'Export', action: () => this.exportTilemap() },
            { label: 'Close', action: () => this.close() }
        ];
        
        let x = 20;
        
        buttons.forEach(btn => {
            const button = this.createButton(x, y, buttonWidth, 30, btn.label, btn.action);
            this.container.add(button);
            x += buttonWidth + spacing;
        });
    }
    
    // === PAINTING ===
    
    paintTile(gridX, gridY) {
        if (!this.selectedTile) {
            alert('Select a tile first!');
            return;
        }
        
        const layer = this.layers[this.activeLayerIndex];
        const key = `${gridX},${gridY}`;
        
        layer.tiles.set(key, {
            tile: this.selectedTile,
            x: gridX,
            y: gridY
        });
        
        this.refreshCanvas();
    }
    
    eraseTile(gridX, gridY) {
        const layer = this.layers[this.activeLayerIndex];
        const key = `${gridX},${gridY}`;
        
        layer.tiles.delete(key);
        
        this.refreshCanvas();
    }
    
    pickTile(gridX, gridY) {
        const layer = this.layers[this.activeLayerIndex];
        const key = `${gridX},${gridY}`;
        
        const tileData = layer.tiles.get(key);
        
        if (tileData) {
            this.selectedTile = tileData.tile;
            this.refreshPalette();
            this.currentTool = 'brush';
        }
    }
    
    floodFill(startX, startY) {
        if (!this.selectedTile) return;
        
        const layer = this.layers[this.activeLayerIndex];
        const startKey = `${startX},${startY}`;
        
        // Get tile at start position
        const startTile = layer.tiles.get(startKey);
        const targetTileId = startTile ? startTile.tile.id : null;
        const replacementTileId = this.selectedTile.id;
        
        if (targetTileId === replacementTileId) return; // Already filled
        
        // Flood fill algorithm
        const stack = [{ x: startX, y: startY }];
        const visited = new Set();
        
        while (stack.length > 0) {
            const { x, y } = stack.pop();
            const key = `${x},${y}`;
            
            if (visited.has(key)) continue;
            visited.add(key);
            
            const currentTile = layer.tiles.get(key);
            const currentTileId = currentTile ? currentTile.tile.id : null;
            
            if (currentTileId !== targetTileId) continue;
            
            // Fill this tile
            layer.tiles.set(key, {
                tile: this.selectedTile,
                x: x,
                y: y
            });
            
            // Add neighbors
            stack.push({ x: x + 1, y: y });
            stack.push({ x: x - 1, y: y });
            stack.push({ x: x, y: y + 1 });
            stack.push({ x: x, y: y - 1 });
        }
        
        this.refreshCanvas();
    }
    
    // === RENDERING ===
    
    refreshCanvas() {
        // Clear all layer containers
        this.tilemapLayers.forEach(layerContainer => {
            layerContainer.removeAll(true);
        });
        
        // Render each layer
        this.layers.forEach((layer, index) => {
            if (!layer.visible) return;
            
            const layerContainer = this.tilemapLayers[index];
            
            layer.tiles.forEach((tileData, key) => {
                const worldPos = this.gridToWorld(tileData.x, tileData.y);
                
                const sprite = this.scene.add.image(worldPos.x, worldPos.y, tileData.tile.texture);
                sprite.setCrop(
                    tileData.tile.x,
                    tileData.tile.y,
                    tileData.tile.width,
                    tileData.tile.height
                );
                
                layerContainer.add(sprite);
            });
        });
        
        this.refreshLayerList();
    }
    
    clearActiveLayer() {
        const confirm = window.confirm('Clear all tiles from this layer?');
        if (!confirm) return;
        
        this.layers[this.activeLayerIndex].tiles.clear();
        this.refreshCanvas();
    }
    
    // === COORDINATE CONVERSION ===
    
    screenToGrid(screenX, screenY) {
        // Convert screen coordinates to grid coordinates
        const canvasBounds = this.canvasPanel.getBounds();
        const localX = screenX - canvasBounds.x - canvasBounds.width / 2;
        const localY = screenY - canvasBounds.y - canvasBounds.height / 2;
        
        const worldX = (localX / this.camera.zoom) + this.camera.x;
        const worldY = (localY / this.camera.zoom) + this.camera.y;
        
        const gridX = Math.floor(worldX / this.gridConfig.cellWidth);
        const gridY = Math.floor(worldY / this.gridConfig.cellHeight);
        
        return { x: gridX, y: gridY };
    }
    
    gridToWorld(gridX, gridY) {
        return {
            x: gridX * this.gridConfig.cellWidth + this.gridConfig.cellWidth / 2,
            y: gridY * this.gridConfig.cellHeight + this.gridConfig.cellHeight / 2
        };
    }
    
    // === CAMERA ===
    
    startPanning(pointer) {
        this.panning = true;
        this.panStart = {
            x: pointer.x,
            y: pointer.y,
            cameraX: this.camera.x,
            cameraY: this.camera.y
        };
    }
    
    updatePanning(pointer) {
        const deltaX = (pointer.x - this.panStart.x) / this.camera.zoom;
        const deltaY = (pointer.y - this.panStart.y) / this.camera.zoom;
        
        this.camera.x = this.panStart.cameraX - deltaX;
        this.camera.y = this.panStart.cameraY - deltaY;
        
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    stopPanning() {
        this.panning = false;
    }
    
    zoom(delta) {
        this.camera.zoom = Phaser.Math.Clamp(this.camera.zoom + delta, 0.25, 4.0);
        this.updateCamera();
    }
    
    updateCamera() {
        this.canvas.setScale(this.camera.zoom);
        this.canvas.setPosition(
            this.canvasPanel.getBounds().width / 2 - this.camera.x * this.camera.zoom,
            this.canvasPanel.getBounds().height / 2 - this.camera.y * this.camera.zoom
        );
    }
    
    isPointerOverCanvas(pointer) {
        const bounds = this.canvasPanel.getBounds();
        return pointer.x >= bounds.x &&
               pointer.x <= bounds.x + bounds.width &&
               pointer.y >= bounds.y &&
               pointer.y <= bounds.y + bounds.height;
    }
    
    // === EXPORT ===
    
    exportTilemap() {
        const data = {
            gridConfig: this.gridConfig,
            layers: this.layers.map(layer => ({
                name: layer.name,
                zIndex: layer.zIndex,
                tiles: Array.from(layer.tiles.entries()).map(([key, tileData]) => ({
                    x: tileData.x,
                    y: tileData.y,
                    tileId: tileData.tile.id
                }))
            })),
            tileset: {
                texture: this.tilesetTexture,
                tiles: this.tiles
            }
        };
        
        console.log('Exported Tilemap:', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
        
        localStorage.setItem('tilemap_data', JSON.stringify(data));
        
        alert('Tilemap exported! Check console.');
        
        return data;
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    createButton(x, y, width, height, text, onClick) {
        const container = this.scene.add.container(x, y);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, 0x4488ff, 1);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        bg.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        container.add(bg);
        
        const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2, height / 2, text, {
            font: 'bold 11px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        label.setOrigin(0.5);
        container.add(label);
        
        bg.on('pointerover', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x6699ff));
        bg.on('pointerout', () => bg.setFillStyle(0x4488ff));
        bg.on('pointerdown', onClick);
        
        return container;
    }
    
    open() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default TilemapEditor;
```

---

## TOOL 20: PREFAB SYSTEM

### How Unity Does It

**Unity Prefab System**:
```
Unity Prefab Workflow:
1. Create GameObject in scene
   - Add components (Transform, Sprite, Collider, Scripts)
   - Configure properties
   - Add child objects (hierarchy)

2. Create Prefab
   - Drag GameObject from Hierarchy to Project window
   - Creates .prefab asset file
   - Original GameObject becomes "Prefab Instance"

3. Prefab Editing
   - Double-click prefab → Opens Prefab Mode (isolated editing)
   - Edit in scene → Auto-applies to prefab
   - Prefab Variants (inherit from base prefab, override properties)

4. Instantiation
   - Drag prefab into scene → Creates instance
   - Instantiate(prefab) in code
   - Multiple instances share prefab data

5. Overrides
   - Instance-specific property changes
   - "Apply" override to prefab (update all instances)
   - "Revert" override (reset to prefab values)
   - Override indicators (blue properties in Inspector)

6. Nesting
   - Prefabs can contain other prefabs
   - Nested prefab editing
   - Propagation rules (changes update children)

7. Variants
   - Create prefab variant (inherits from parent)
   - Override specific properties
   - Chain of inheritance (Variant → Base Prefab)
```

**Key Unity Features**:
- **Prefab Mode**: Isolated editing environment
- **Overrides System**: Per-instance customization
- **Auto-Update**: Changes to prefab propagate to all instances
- **Nested Prefabs**: Prefabs within prefabs
- **Prefab Variants**: Inheritance system
- **Visual Override Indicators**: Blue text for modified properties
- **Apply/Revert**: Sync changes between instance and prefab

### Our Architecture
```
PrefabSystem
├─── Prefab Registry
│    ├─── Prefab definitions (stored in localStorage)
│    ├─── Prefab metadata (name, thumbnail, tags)
│    ├─── Prefab hierarchy (nested prefabs)
│    └─── Prefab variants (inheritance chain)
│
├─── Prefab Creation
│    ├─── Select scene object
│    ├─── Serialize object + components + children
│    ├─── Generate unique prefab ID
│    ├─── Save to registry
│    └─── Convert scene object to instance
│
├─=> Prefab Instantiation
│    ├─── Load prefab data
│    ├─── Create scene object from template
│    ├─── Apply default property values
│    ├─── Link instance to prefab
│    └─── Track instance ID
│
├─── Override System
│    ├─── Track modified properties per instance
│    ├─── Compare instance vs prefab values
│    ├─── Visual override indicators
│    ├─── Apply override to prefab
│    ├─── Revert override to prefab value
│    └─── Override serialization
│
├─── Prefab Editing
│    ├─── Edit Mode (edit prefab directly)
│    ├─── Scene editing (edit instance)
│    ├─── Auto-propagation to instances
│    ├─── Preview changes
│    └─── Undo/redo support
│
├─── Prefab Variants
│    ├─── Create variant from base prefab
│    ├─── Inheritance chain tracking
│    ├─── Override resolution (variant → base)
│    ├─── Variant editing
│    └─── Multi-level inheritance
│
├─── Nested Prefabs
│    ├─── Prefab contains child prefabs
│    ├─── Nested override handling
│    ├─── Propagation rules
│    └─── Unpacking (break prefab link)
│
└─── Integration
     ├─── Scene Editor integration
     ├─── Inspector integration (override UI)
     ├─── Project Window (prefab browser)
     └─── Drag-and-drop instantiation
Complete Implementation
javascript
// systems/PrefabSystem.js

class PrefabSystem {
    constructor(editor) {
        this.editor = editor;
        this.scene = editor.scene;
        
        // Prefab registry (prefabId -> prefab data)
        this.prefabs = new Map();
        
        // Prefab instances (instanceId -> instance data)
        this.instances = new Map();
        
        // Overrides tracking (instanceId -> overrides)
        this.overrides = new Map();
        
        // Load prefabs from storage
        this.loadPrefabs();
        
        console.log('[PrefabSystem] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === PREFAB CREATION ===
    
    createPrefab(sceneObject, name) {
        const prefabId = this.generateId();
        
        // Serialize the scene object
        const prefabData = this.serializePrefab(sceneObject);
        
        const prefab = {
            id: prefabId,
            name: name || sceneObject.name,
            data: prefabData,
            created: Date.now(),
            thumbnail: null, // Could generate screenshot
            tags: [],
            variant: null // null for base prefabs, parentPrefabId for variants
        };
        
        this.prefabs.set(prefabId, prefab);
        
        // Convert scene object to prefab instance
        this.linkObjectToPrefab(sceneObject, prefabId);
        
        // Save to storage
        this.savePrefabs();
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Created prefab: ${name} (${prefabId})`);
        
        return prefab;
    }
    
    serializePrefab(sceneObject) {
        // Deep serialization of object and all children
        return {
            type: sceneObject.type,
            transform: { ...sceneObject.transform },
            components: sceneObject.components.map(c => ({
                type: c.type,
                data: { ...c.data }
            })),
            children: sceneObject.children.map(child => this.serializePrefab(child)),
            active: sceneObject.active,
            visible: sceneObject.visible
        };
    }
    
    linkObjectToPrefab(sceneObject, prefabId) {
        const instanceId = this.generateId();
        
        // Mark object as prefab instance
        sceneObject.prefabId = prefabId;
        sceneObject.instanceId = instanceId;
        
        // Register instance
        this.instances.set(instanceId, {
            id: instanceId,
            prefabId: prefabId,
            sceneObject: sceneObject
        });
        
        // Initialize empty overrides
        this.overrides.set(instanceId, {
            properties: {},
            components: {}
        });
    }
    
    // === PREFAB INSTANTIATION ===
    
    instantiate(prefabId, position = { x: 0, y: 0 }) {
        const prefab = this.prefabs.get(prefabId);
        
        if (!prefab) {
            console.error(`[PrefabSystem] Prefab not found: ${prefabId}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        // Create scene object from prefab data
        const sceneObject = this.deserializePrefab(prefab.data);
        
        // Apply position
        sceneObject.transform.x = position.x;
        sceneObject.transform.y = position.y;
        
        // Link to prefab
        this.linkObjectToPrefab(sceneObject, prefabId);
        
        // Add to scene
        this.editor.sceneObjects.push(sceneObject);
        this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.addObject(sceneObject);
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Instantiated prefab: ${prefab.name}`);
        
        return sceneObject;
    }
    
    deserializePrefab(prefabData) {
        // Create scene object from prefab data
        const sceneObject = this.editor.createSceneObject(prefabData.type, {
            x: prefabData.transform.x,
            y: prefabData.transform.y
        });
        
        sceneObject.deserialize(prefabData);
        
        return sceneObject;
    }
    
    // === OVERRIDE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    recordOverride(instanceId, propertyPath, value) {
        const overrideData = this.overrides.get(instanceId);
        
        if (!overrideData) {
            console.error(`[PrefabSystem] Instance not found: ${instanceId}`);
            return;
        }
        
        // Store override
        overrideData.properties[propertyPath] = value;
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Recorded override: ${propertyPath} = ${value}`);
    }
    
    hasOverride(instanceId, propertyPath) {
        const overrideData = this.overrides.get(instanceId);
        return overrideData && overrideData.properties.hasOwnProperty(propertyPath);
    }
    
    getOverride(instanceId, propertyPath) {
        const overrideData = this.overrides.get(instanceId);
        return overrideData ? overrideData.properties[propertyPath] : undefined;
    }
    
    applyOverrideToPrefab(instanceId, propertyPath) {
        const instance = this.instances.get(instanceId);
        
        if (!instance) return;
        
        const prefab = this.prefabs.get(instance.prefabId);
        const overrideValue = this.getOverride(instanceId, propertyPath);
        
        if (!prefab || overrideValue === undefined) return;
        
        // Apply override value to prefab
        this.setPropertyPath(prefab.data, propertyPath, overrideValue);
        
        // Remove override from instance
        delete this.overrides.get(instanceId).properties[propertyPath];
        
        // Update all other instances of this prefab
        this.propagateToInstances(instance.prefabId);
        
        // Save
        this.savePrefabs();
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Applied override to prefab: ${propertyPath}`);
    }
    
    revertOverride(instanceId, propertyPath) {
        const instance = this.instances.get(instanceId);
        
        if (!instance) return;
        
        const prefab = this.prefabs.get(instance.prefabId);
        
        if (!prefab) return;
        
        // Get prefab value
        const prefabValue = this.getPropertyPath(prefab.data, propertyPath);
        
        // Apply to instance
        this.setPropertyPath(instance.sceneObject, propertyPath, prefabValue);
        
        // Remove override
        delete this.overrides.get(instanceId).properties[propertyPath];
        
        // Update visual
        instance.sceneObject.updateVisual();
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Reverted override: ${propertyPath}`);
    }
    
    getPropertyPath(obj, path) {
        const keys = path.split('.');
        let current = obj;
        
        for (const key of keys) {
            if (current[key] === undefined) return undefined;
            current = current[key];
        }
        
        return current;
    }
    
    setPropertyPath(obj, path, value) {
        const keys = path.split('.');
        let current = obj;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < keys.length - 1; i++) {
            if (current[keys[i]] === undefined) {
                current[keys[i]] = {};
            }
            current = current[keys[i]];
        }
        
        current[keys[keys.length - 1]] = value;
    }
    
    // === PREFAB PROPAGATION ===
    
    propagateToInstances(prefabId) {
        const prefab = this.prefabs.get(prefabId);
        
        if (!prefab) return;
        
        // Find all instances of this prefab
        const instances = Array.from(this.instances.values()).filter(
            inst => inst.prefabId === prefabId
        );
        
        instances.forEach(instance => {
            this.updateInstanceFromPrefab(instance);
        });
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Propagated changes to ${instances.length} instances`);
    }
    
    updateInstanceFromPrefab(instance) {
        const prefab = this.prefabs.get(instance.prefabId);
        
        if (!prefab) return;
        
        const sceneObject = instance.sceneObject;
        const overrideData = this.overrides.get(instance.id);
        
        // Apply prefab data to instance (excluding overridden properties)
        this.applyPrefabData(sceneObject, prefab.data, overrideData.properties);
        
        // Update visual
        sceneObject.updateVisual();
    }
    
    applyPrefabData(sceneObject, prefabData, overrides) {
        // Apply transform (if not overridden)
        Object.keys(prefabData.transform).forEach(key => {
            const path = `transform.${key}`;
            if (!overrides.hasOwnProperty(path)) {
                sceneObject.transform[key] = prefabData.transform[key];
            }
        });
        
        // Apply components (if not overridden)
        prefabData.components.forEach((compData, index) => {
            if (sceneObject.components[index]) {
                Object.keys(compData.data).forEach(key => {
                    const path = `components.${index}.data.${key}`;
                    if (!overrides.hasOwnProperty(path)) {
                        sceneObject.components[index].data[key] = compData.data[key];
                    }
                });
            }
        });
        
        // Apply active/visible (if not overridden)
        if (!overrides.hasOwnProperty('active')) {
            sceneObject.active = prefabData.active;
        }
        if (!overrides.hasOwnProperty('visible')) {
            sceneObject.visible = prefabData.visible;
        }
    }
    
    // === PREFAB VARIANTS ===
    
    createVariant(basePrefabId, name) {
        const basePrefab = this.prefabs.get(basePrefabId);
        
        if (!basePrefab) {
            console.error(`[PrefabSystem] Base prefab not found: ${basePrefabId}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        const variantId = this.generateId();
        
        // Create variant (inherits from base)
        const variant = {
            id: variantId,
            name: name || `${basePrefab.name} Variant`,
            data: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(basePrefab.data)), // Deep copy
            created: Date.now(),
            thumbnail: null,
            tags: [...basePrefab.tags],
            variant: basePrefabId // Points to parent
        };
        
        this.prefabs.set(variantId, variant);
        this.savePrefabs();
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Created variant: ${variant.name} (${variantId})`);
        
        return variant;
    }
    
    getVariantChain(prefabId) {
        const chain = [];
        let current = this.prefabs.get(prefabId);
        
        while (current) {
            chain.push(current);
            
            if (current.variant) {
                current = this.prefabs.get(current.variant);
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        return chain;
    }
    
    resolveVariantData(prefabId) {
        const chain = this.getVariantChain(prefabId);
        
        // Start with base prefab data
        let resolvedData = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(chain[chain.length - 1].data));
        
        // Apply variant overrides in order (base → variant)
        for (let i = chain.length - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            this.mergeDeep(resolvedData, chain[i].data);
        }
        
        return resolvedData;
    }
    
    mergeDeep(target, source) {
        for (const key in source) {
            if (source[key] && typeof source[key] === 'object' && !Array.isArray(source[key])) {
                if (!target[key]) target[key] = {};
                this.mergeDeep(target[key], source[key]);
            } else {
                target[key] = source[key];
            }
        }
    }
    
    // === PREFAB BROWSER UI ===
    
    showPrefabBrowser() {
        // Create UI to browse, select, and instantiate prefabs
        // This would integrate with the Project Window
        
        const prefabList = Array.from(this.prefabs.values());
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] ${prefabList.length} prefabs available`);
        
        return prefabList;
    }
    
    // === PERSISTENCE ===
    
    savePrefabs() {
        const data = {
            prefabs: Array.from(this.prefabs.entries()).map(([id, prefab]) => ({
                id: id,
                name: prefab.name,
                data: prefab.data,
                created: prefab.created,
                tags: prefab.tags,
                variant: prefab.variant
            }))
        };
        
        localStorage.setItem('prefab_registry', JSON.stringify(data));
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Saved ${this.prefabs.size} prefabs`);
    }
    
    loadPrefabs() {
        const saved = localStorage.getItem('prefab_registry');
        
        if (!saved) return;
        
        const data = JSON.parse(saved);
        
        this.prefabs.clear();
        
        data.prefabs.forEach(prefabData => {
            this.prefabs.set(prefabData.id, {
                id: prefabData.id,
                name: prefabData.name,
                data: prefabData.data,
                created: prefabData.created,
                thumbnail: null,
                tags: prefabData.tags,
                variant: prefabData.variant
            });
        });
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Loaded ${this.prefabs.size} prefabs`);
    }
    
    exportPrefab(prefabId) {
        const prefab = this.prefabs.get(prefabId);
        
        if (!prefab) return null;
        
        const exportData = {
            name: prefab.name,
            data: prefab.data,
            tags: prefab.tags,
            variant: prefab.variant
        };
        
        return JSON.stringify(exportData, null, 2);
    }
    
    importPrefab(jsonData) {
        const data = JSON.parse(jsonData);
        
        const prefabId = this.generateId();
        
        this.prefabs.set(prefabId, {
            id: prefabId,
            name: data.name,
            data: data.data,
            created: Date.now(),
            thumbnail: null,
            tags: data.tags || [],
            variant: data.variant || null
        });
        
        this.savePrefabs();
        
        console.log(`[PrefabSystem] Imported prefab: ${data.name}`);
        
        return prefabId;
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    generateId() {
        return `prefab_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    deletePrefab(prefabId) {
        this.prefabs.delete(prefabId);
        this.savePrefabs();
    }
    
    isPrefabInstance(sceneObject) {
        return !!sceneObject.prefabId;
    }
    
    getPrefab(sceneObject) {
        if (!this.isPrefabInstance(sceneObject)) return null;
        return this.prefabs.get(sceneObject.prefabId);
    }
    
    getOverrides(sceneObject) {
        if (!this.isPrefabInstance(sceneObject)) return null;
        return this.overrides.get(sceneObject.instanceId);
    }
}

export default PrefabSystem;
Integration with Inspector Panel:

javascript
// Addition to InspectorPanel.js

class InspectorPanel {
    // ... existing code ...
    
    showPrefabControls(sceneObject) {
        if (!this.editor.prefabSystem.isPrefabInstance(sceneObject)) return;
        
        let y = 10;
        
        // Prefab indicator
        const prefab = this.editor.prefabSystem.getPrefab(sceneObject);
        
        const prefabLabel = this.scene.add.text(10, y, `📦 Prefab: ${prefab.name}`, {
            font: 'bold 12px Arial',
            fill: '#4488ff'
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(prefabLabel);
        y += 25;
        
        // Overrides count
        const overrides = this.editor.prefabSystem.getOverrides(sceneObject);
        const overrideCount = Object.keys(overrides.properties).length;
        
        if (overrideCount > 0) {
            const overrideLabel = this.scene.add.text(10, y, `${overrideCount} override(s)`, {
                font: '11px Arial',
                fill: '#ffaa00'
            });
            this.contentContainer.add(overrideLabel);
            y += 20;
        }
        
        // Action buttons
        const applyBtn = this.createButton(10, y, 130, 25, 'Apply to Prefab', () => {
            this.applyAllOverrides(sceneObject);
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(applyBtn);
        
        const revertBtn = this.createButton(150, y, 130, 25, 'Revert All', () => {
            this.revertAllOverrides(sceneObject);
        });
        this.contentContainer.add(revertBtn);
        
        y += 35;
        
        return y;
    }
    
    applyAllOverrides(sceneObject) {
        const overrides = this.editor.prefabSystem.getOverrides(sceneObject);
        
        Object.keys(overrides.properties).forEach(propertyPath => {
            this.editor.prefabSystem.applyOverrideToPrefab(sceneObject.instanceId, propertyPath);
        });
        
        this.rebuild();
    }
    
    revertAllOverrides(sceneObject) {
        const overrides = this.editor.prefabSystem.getOverrides(sceneObject);
        
        Object.keys(overrides.properties).forEach(propertyPath => {
            this.editor.prefabSystem.revertOverride(sceneObject.instanceId, propertyPath);
        });
        
        this.rebuild();
    }
    
    // Modify property display to show override indicators
    createPropertyEditor(component, key, value, y) {
        // ... existing code ...
        
        // Check if this property is overridden
        if (this.currentObject.prefabId) {
            const propertyPath = `components.${componentIndex}.data.${key}`;
            const isOverridden = this.editor.prefabSystem.hasOverride(
                this.currentObject.instanceId,
                propertyPath
            );
            
            if (isOverridden) {
                // Add blue indicator
                const indicator = this.scene.add.text(this.width - 40, y + 10, '●', {
                    font: '12px Arial',
                    fill: '#4488ff'
                });
                this.contentContainer.add(indicator);
            }
        }
        
        // ... rest of existing code ...
    }
}
