javascript
// tools/PerformanceProfiler.js

class PerformanceProfiler {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Profiling state
        this.enabled = false;
        this.recording = false;
        
        // Frame timing
        this.frameData = {
            fps: 60,
            deltaTime: 16.67,
            frameCount: 0,
            lastFrameTime: 0,
            avgFrameTime: 16.67
        };
        
        // Performance marks
        this.marks = new Map();
        this.measures = new Map();
        
        // Statistics
        this.stats = {
            cpu: {
                heapUsed: 0,
                heapTotal: 0,
                gcCount: 0,
                mainThreadTime: 0
            },
            gpu: {
                drawCalls: 0,
                triangles: 0,
                vertices: 0,
                textures: 0,
                shaders: 0
            },
            memory: {
                jsHeap: 0,
                textures: 0,
                audio: 0,
                total: 0
            },
            rendering: {
                gameObjects: 0,
                sprites: 0,
                particles: 0,
                lights: 0,
                cameras: 0
            },
            physics: {
                bodies: 0,
                collisions: 0,
                contacts: 0,
                raycasts: 0
            },
            audio: {
                activeSounds: 0,
                channels: 0,
                decodingTime: 0
            }
        };
        
        // History (for graphs)
        this.history = {
            fps: [],
            memory: [],
            drawCalls: [],
            maxSamples: 300 // 5 seconds at 60fps
        };
        
        // Recording
        this.recordedFrames = [];
        this.recordingStartTime = 0;
        
        // UI
        this.hudContainer = null;
        this.graphsContainer = null;
        this.detailsPanel = null;
        
        // Warning thresholds
        this.thresholds = {
            fps: 30, // Warn if FPS drops below 30
            memory: 100 * 1024 * 1024, // 100MB
            drawCalls: 1000,
            gcPressure: 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10MB allocations per second
        };
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.createHUD();
        
        // Hook into Phaser update loop
        this.scene.events.on('preupdate', () => this.preUpdate());
        this.scene.events.on('postupdate', () => this.postUpdate());
        
        // Use browser Performance API
        if (window.performance) {
            this.browserPerf = window.performance;
        }
        
        console.log('[PerformanceProfiler] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === FRAME PROFILING ===
    
    preUpdate() {
        if (!this.enabled) return;
        
        this.mark('frame-start');
        
        // Track frame count
        this.frameData.frameCount++;
        
        // Calculate delta time
        const now = this.browserPerf.now();
        if (this.frameData.lastFrameTime > 0) {
            this.frameData.deltaTime = now - this.frameData.lastFrameTime;
        }
        this.frameData.lastFrameTime = now;
        
        // Calculate FPS (rolling average)
        this.frameData.fps = 1000 / this.frameData.deltaTime;
        
        // Begin custom profiling sections
        this.mark('update-start');
    }
    
    postUpdate() {
        if (!this.enabled) return;
        
        this.mark('update-end');
        this.measure('update-time', 'update-start', 'update-end');
        
        // Collect statistics
        this.collectStats();
        
        // Update history
        this.updateHistory();
        
        // Check thresholds
        this.checkThresholds();
        
        // Update HUD
        if (this.hudContainer && this.hudContainer.visible) {
            this.refreshHUD();
        }
        
        // Record frame (if recording)
        if (this.recording) {
            this.recordFrame();
        }
        
        this.mark('frame-end');
        this.measure('frame-time', 'frame-start', 'frame-end');
    }
    
    // === PERFORMANCE MARKS ===
    
    mark(name) {
        const timestamp = this.browserPerf.now();
        this.marks.set(name, timestamp);
        
        if (this.browserPerf.mark) {
            this.browserPerf.mark(name);
        }
    }
    
    measure(name, startMark, endMark) {
        const startTime = this.marks.get(startMark);
        const endTime = this.marks.get(endMark);
        
        if (startTime !== undefined && endTime !== undefined) {
            const duration = endTime - startTime;
            this.measures.set(name, duration);
            
            if (this.browserPerf.measure) {
                this.browserPerf.measure(name, startMark, endMark);
            }
            
            return duration;
        }
        
        return 0;
    }
    
    getMeasure(name) {
        return this.measures.get(name) || 0;
    }
    
    clearMarks() {
        this.marks.clear();
        this.measures.clear();
        
        if (this.browserPerf.clearMarks) {
            this.browserPerf.clearMarks();
        }
        if (this.browserPerf.clearMeasures) {
            this.browserPerf.clearMeasures();
        }
    }
    
    // === STATISTICS COLLECTION ===
    
    collectStats() {
        this.collectCPUStats();
        this.collectGPUStats();
        this.collectMemoryStats();
        this.collectRenderingStats();
        this.collectPhysicsStats();
        this.collectAudioStats();
    }
    
    collectCPUStats() {
        // JavaScript heap (if available)
        if (performance.memory) {
            this.stats.cpu.heapUsed = performance.memory.usedJSHeapSize;
            this.stats.cpu.heapTotal = performance.memory.totalJSHeapSize;
        }
        
        // Main thread time
        this.stats.cpu.mainThreadTime = this.getMeasure('frame-time');
    }
    
    collectGPUStats() {
        // Phaser rendering stats
        const renderer = this.scene.sys.game.renderer;
        
        if (renderer.gl) {
            // WebGL stats
            this.stats.gpu.drawCalls = renderer.drawCount || 0;
            this.stats.gpu.textures = renderer.textureCount || 0;
            
            // Estimate triangles/vertices from sprites
            const displayList = this.scene.children.list;
            let triangles = 0;
            let vertices = 0;
            
            displayList.forEach(obj => {
                if (obj.type === 'Sprite' || obj.type === 'Image') {
                    triangles += 2; // Quad = 2 triangles
                    vertices += 4; // Quad = 4 vertices
                }
            });
            
            this.stats.gpu.triangles = triangles;
            this.stats.gpu.vertices = vertices;
        }
    }
    
    collectMemoryStats() {
        // JS Heap
        if (performance.memory) {
            this.stats.memory.jsHeap = performance.memory.usedJSHeapSize;
        }
        
        // Texture memory (estimate)
        let textureMemory = 0;
        const textures = this.scene.textures.list;
        
        Object.values(textures).forEach(texture => {
            if (texture.source && texture.source[0]) {
                const source = texture.source[0];
                // RGBA = 4 bytes per pixel
                const pixels = source.width * source.height;
                textureMemory += pixels * 4;
            }
        });
        
        this.stats.memory.textures = textureMemory;
        
        // Total
        this.stats.memory.total = this.stats.memory.jsHeap + this.stats.memory.textures + this.stats.memory.audio;
    }
    
    collectRenderingStats() {
        const displayList = this.scene.children.list;
        
        this.stats.rendering.gameObjects = displayList.length;
        
        let sprites = 0;
        let particles = 0;
        let lights = 0;
        
        displayList.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.type === 'Sprite' || obj.type === 'Image') sprites++;
            if (obj.type === 'ParticleEmitter') particles++;
            if (obj.type === 'Light') lights++;
        });
        
        this.stats.rendering.sprites = sprites;
        this.stats.rendering.particles = particles;
        this.stats.rendering.lights = lights;
        this.stats.rendering.cameras = this.scene.cameras.cameras.length;
    }
    
    collectPhysicsStats() {
        // Phaser Arcade Physics
        if (this.scene.physics && this.scene.physics.world) {
            const world = this.scene.physics.world;
            
            this.stats.physics.bodies = world.bodies.size;
            this.stats.physics.collisions = world.colliders ? world.colliders.length : 0;
        }
    }
    
    collectAudioStats() {
        // Active sounds
        if (this.scene.sound) {
            const sounds = this.scene.sound.sounds;
            
            this.stats.audio.activeSounds = sounds.filter(s => s.isPlaying).length;
            this.stats.audio.channels = sounds.length;
        }
    }
    
    // === HISTORY TRACKING ===
    
    updateHistory() {
        this.history.fps.push(this.frameData.fps);
        this.history.memory.push(this.stats.memory.total / (1024 * 1024)); // MB
        this.history.drawCalls.push(this.stats.gpu.drawCalls);
        
        // Limit history size
        if (this.history.fps.length > this.history.maxSamples) {
            this.history.fps.shift();
            this.history.memory.shift();
            this.history.drawCalls.shift();
        }
    }
    
    // === THRESHOLD CHECKING ===
    
    checkThresholds() {
        // FPS warning
        if (this.frameData.fps < this.thresholds.fps) {
            this.warn('Low FPS', `FPS dropped to ${this.frameData.fps.toFixed(1)}`);
        }
        
        // Memory warning
        if (this.stats.memory.total > this.thresholds.memory) {
            this.warn('High Memory', `Memory usage: ${(this.stats.memory.total / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)}MB`);
        }
        
        // Draw calls warning
        if (this.stats.gpu.drawCalls > this.thresholds.drawCalls) {
            this.warn('High Draw Calls', `Draw calls: ${this.stats.gpu.drawCalls}`);
        }
    }
    
    warn(title, message) {
        console.warn(`[Profiler] ${title}: ${message}`);
    }
    
    // === RECORDING ===
    
    startRecording() {
        this.recording = true;
        this.recordedFrames = [];
        this.recordingStartTime = this.browserPerf.now();
        
        console.log('[Profiler] Recording started');
    }
    
    stopRecording() {
        this.recording = false;
        
        const duration = this.browserPerf.now() - this.recordingStartTime;
        
        console.log(`[Profiler] Recording stopped (${this.recordedFrames.length} frames, ${(duration / 1000).toFixed(2)}s)`);
        
        return this.recordedFrames;
    }
    
    recordFrame() {
        const frameSnapshot = {
            timestamp: this.browserPerf.now() - this.recordingStartTime,
            frameNumber: this.frameData.frameCount,
            fps: this.frameData.fps,
            deltaTime: this.frameData.deltaTime,
            stats: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.stats)),
            measures: Object.fromEntries(this.measures)
        };
        
        this.recordedFrames.push(frameSnapshot);
    }
    
    exportRecording() {
        const exportData = {
            session: {
                startTime: this.recordingStartTime,
                duration: this.recordedFrames.length > 0 
                    ? this.recordedFrames[this.recordedFrames.length - 1].timestamp 
                    : 0,
                frameCount: this.recordedFrames.length
            },
            thresholds: this.thresholds,
            frames: this.recordedFrames,
            summary: this.generateSummary()
        };
        
        return JSON.stringify(exportData, null, 2);
    }
    
    generateSummary() {
        if (this.recordedFrames.length === 0) return {};
        
        const fpsValues = this.recordedFrames.map(f => f.fps);
        const memoryValues = this.recordedFrames.map(f => f.stats.memory.total);
        const drawCallValues = this.recordedFrames.map(f => f.stats.gpu.drawCalls);
        
        return {
            fps: {
                min: Math.min(...fpsValues),
                max: Math.max(...fpsValues),
                avg: fpsValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / fpsValues.length
            },
            memory: {
                min: Math.min(...memoryValues) / (1024 * 1024),
                max: Math.max(...memoryValues) / (1024 * 1024),
                avg: (memoryValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / memoryValues.length) / (1024 * 1024)
            },
            drawCalls: {
                min: Math.min(...drawCallValues),
                max: Math.max(...drawCallValues),
                avg: drawCallValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / drawCallValues.length
            }
        };
    }
    
    // === HUD VISUALIZATION ===
    
    createHUD() {
        this.hudContainer = this.scene.add.container(10, 10);
        this.hudContainer.setDepth(100000);
        this.hudContainer.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.hudContainer.setVisible(false);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 300, 400, 0x000000, 0.8);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.hudContainer.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Performance Profiler', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.hudContainer.add(title);
        
        // Stats text
        this.statsText = this.scene.add.text(10, 35, '', {
            font: '11px monospace',
            fill: '#00ff00'
        });
        this.hudContainer.add(this.statsText);
        
        // Graphs
        this.createGraphs();
        
        // Toggle button
        const toggleBtn = this.scene.add.text(10, 365, '[P] Toggle Details', {
            font: '10px Arial',
            fill: '#888888'
        });
        toggleBtn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
        toggleBtn.on('pointerdown', () => this.toggleDetails());
        this.hudContainer.add(toggleBtn);
        
        // Keyboard shortcut
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown-P', () => this.toggleDetails());
    }
    
    createGraphs() {
        // FPS Graph
        this.fpsGraph = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.hudContainer.add(this.fpsGraph);
        
        // Memory Graph
        this.memoryGraph = this.scene.add.graphics();
        this.hudContainer.add(this.memoryGraph);
    }
    
    refreshHUD() {
        // Update stats text
        const text = `
FPS: ${this.frameData.fps.toFixed(1)}
Frame Time: ${this.frameData.deltaTime.toFixed(2)}ms

CPU:
  Heap: ${(this.stats.cpu.heapUsed / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)}MB / ${(this.stats.cpu.heapTotal / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)}MB
  Frame: ${this.getMeasure('frame-time').toFixed(2)}ms

GPU:
  Draw Calls: ${this.stats.gpu.drawCalls}
  Triangles: ${this.stats.gpu.triangles}
  Textures: ${this.stats.gpu.textures}

Memory:
  Total: ${(this.stats.memory.total / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)}MB
  Textures: ${(this.stats.memory.textures / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)}MB

Rendering:
  GameObjects: ${this.stats.rendering.gameObjects}
  Sprites: ${this.stats.rendering.sprites}
  Particles: ${this.stats.rendering.particles}

Physics:
  Bodies: ${this.stats.physics.bodies}
  Collisions: ${this.stats.physics.collisions}

Audio:
  Active: ${this.stats.audio.activeSounds}
        `.trim();
        
        this.statsText.setText(text);
        
        // Update graphs
        this.drawGraph(this.fpsGraph, this.history.fps, 150, 60, 280, 50, 0, 60, 0x00ff00);
        this.drawGraph(this.memoryGraph, this.history.memory, 150, 210, 280, 50, 0, 100, 0xff8800);
    }
    
    drawGraph(graphics, data, x, y, width, height, minVal, maxVal, color) {
        graphics.clear();
        
        // Background
        graphics.fillStyle(0x222222, 0.5);
        graphics.fillRect(x, y, width, height);
        
        // Border
        graphics.lineStyle(1, 0x666666, 1);
        graphics.strokeRect(x, y, width, height);
        
        // Graph line
        if (data.length < 2) return;
        
        graphics.lineStyle(2, color, 1);
        
        const pointSpacing = width / (data.length - 1);
        
        graphics.beginPath();
        
        data.forEach((value, index) => {
            const normalizedValue = Phaser.Math.Clamp((value - minVal) / (maxVal - minVal), 0, 1);
            const plotX = x + index * pointSpacing;
            const plotY = y + height - (normalizedValue * height);
            
            if (index === 0) {
                graphics.moveTo(plotX, plotY);
            } else {
                graphics.lineTo(plotX, plotY);
            }
        });
        
        graphics.strokePath();
        
        // Reference lines
        graphics.lineStyle(1, 0x444444, 0.5);
        
        // Mid line
        graphics.moveTo(x, y + height / 2);
        graphics.lineTo(x + width, y + height / 2);
        graphics.strokePath();
    }
    
    toggleDetails() {
        if (this.detailsPanel && this.detailsPanel.visible) {
            this.hideDetails();
        } else {
            this.showDetails();
        }
    }
    
    showDetails() {
        if (!this.detailsPanel) {
            this.createDetailsPanel();
        }
        
        this.detailsPanel.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    hideDetails() {
        if (this.detailsPanel) {
            this.detailsPanel.setVisible(false);
        }
    }
    
    createDetailsPanel() {
        this.detailsPanel = this.scene.add.container(320, 10);
        this.detailsPanel.setDepth(100000);
        this.detailsPanel.setScrollFactor(0);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 400, 600, 0x000000, 0.9);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        this.detailsPanel.add(bg);
        
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Detailed Profiling', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.detailsPanel.add(title);
        
        this.detailsText = this.scene.add.text(10, 35, '', {
            font: '10px monospace',
            fill: '#cccccc'
        });
        this.detailsPanel.add(this.detailsText);
        
        // Update details on interval
        this.scene.time.addEvent({
            delay: 100,
            callback: () => this.refreshDetails(),
            loop: true
        });
    }
    
    refreshDetails() {
        if (!this.detailsPanel || !this.detailsPanel.visible) return;
        
        // Show all performance measures
        const measures = Array.from(this.measures.entries())
            .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]) // Sort by duration (descending)
            .map(([name, duration]) => `${name.padEnd(30)} ${duration.toFixed(2)}ms`)
            .join('\n');
        
        const text = `
Performance Measures:
${measures}

Browser Performance API:
${this.getBrowserPerfInfo()}
        `.trim();
        
        this.detailsText.setText(text);
    }
    
    getBrowserPerfInfo() {
        if (!this.browserPerf) return 'Not available';
        
        const entries = this.browserPerf.getEntriesByType('measure');
        
        return entries
            .slice(-10) // Last 10 measures
            .map(entry => `${entry.name}: ${entry.duration.toFixed(2)}ms`)
            .join('\n');
    }
    
    // === PUBLIC API ===
    
    enable() {
        this.enabled = true;
        this.hudContainer.setVisible(true);
        console.log('[Profiler] Enabled');
    }
    
    disable() {
        this.enabled = false;
        this.hudContainer.setVisible(false);
        console.log('[Profiler] Disabled');
    }
    
    toggle() {
        if (this.enabled) {
            this.disable();
        } else {
            this.enable();
        }
    }
    
    setThreshold(metric, value) {
        if (this.thresholds.hasOwnProperty(metric)) {
            this.thresholds[metric] = value;
        }
    }
    
    takeSnapshot() {
        return {
            timestamp: this.browserPerf.now(),
            frameData: { ...this.frameData },
            stats: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.stats)),
            measures: Object.fromEntries(this.measures)
        };
    }
    
    compareSnapshots(snapshot1, snapshot2) {
        const comparison = {
            fps: {
                delta: snapshot2.frameData.fps - snapshot1.frameData.fps,
                percentChange: ((snapshot2.frameData.fps - snapshot1.frameData.fps) / snapshot1.frameData.fps) * 100
            },
            memory: {
                delta: snapshot2.stats.memory.total - snapshot1.stats.memory.total,
                percentChange: ((snapshot2.stats.memory.total - snapshot1.stats.memory.total) / snapshot1.stats.memory.total) * 100
            },
            drawCalls: {
                delta: snapshot2.stats.gpu.drawCalls - snapshot1.stats.gpu.drawCalls,
                percentChange: ((snapshot2.stats.gpu.drawCalls - snapshot1.stats.gpu.drawCalls) / snapshot1.stats.gpu.drawCalls) * 100
            }
        };
        
        return comparison;
    }
}

export default PerformanceProfiler;
Usage Example:

javascript
// GameScene.js

class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // Initialize profiler
        this.profiler = new PerformanceProfiler(this);
        this.profiler.enable();
        
        // Custom profiling
        this.profiler.mark('enemy-spawn-start');
        this.spawnEnemies();
        this.profiler.mark('enemy-spawn-end');
        this.profiler.measure('enemy-spawn-time', 'enemy-spawn-start', 'enemy-spawn-end');
        
        // Start recording
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-R', () => {
            if (this.profiler.recording) {
                const frames = this.profiler.stopRecording();
                console.log('Recording:', this.profiler.exportRecording());
            } else {
                this.profiler.startRecording();
            }
        });
        
        // Toggle profiler
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F1', () => {
            this.profiler.toggle();
        });
    }
    
    update() {
        // Profiler automatically tracks frame timing
        
        // Custom section profiling
        this.profiler.mark('ai-update-start');
        this.updateAI();
        this.profiler.mark('ai-update-end');
        this.profiler.measure('ai-update', 'ai-update-start', 'ai-update-end');
    }
}
```

---

## TOOL 25: VISUAL SCRIPTING SYSTEM

### How Unity Does It

**Unity Visual Scripting (Bolt/Unity Visual Scripting)**:
```
Unity Visual Scripting:
1. Graph Types
   - Script Graph (state machine logic)
   - State Graph (FSM)
   
2. Node Categories
   - Events (Update, Start, OnCollision)
   - Flow Control (If, For, While, Switch)
   - Variables (Get, Set, Create)
   - Math (Add, Multiply, Random)
   - Logic (AND, OR, NOT, Compare)
   - Actions (Move, Rotate, Destroy, Instantiate)
   - Custom (C# methods exposed)

3. Execution Flow
   - Flow connections (white arrows)
   - Data connections (colored by type)
   - Entry points (green)
   - Return values

4. Variables
   - Graph variables (local)
   - Scene variables (global)
   - Object variables (per-instance)
   - Saved variables (persistent)

5. Groups & Comments
   - Visual organization
   - Collapse/expand groups
   - Documentation

6. Debugging
   - Step-through execution
   - Value preview
   - Breakpoints
```

**Key Unity Features**:
- **Node-Based Editor**: Drag-and-drop nodes
- **Type Safety**: Connections validate types
- **Live Preview**: See values during play
- **Code Generation**: Can export to C#
- **Hot Reload**: Changes apply instantly
- **Nesting**: Graphs can call other graphs

### Our Architecture
```
VisualScriptingSystem
├─── Graph Editor
│    ├─── Canvas (infinite pan/zoom)
│    ├─── Node library (searchable)
│    ├─── Connection drawing (Bezier curves)
│    ├─── Multi-select & drag
│    ├─── Copy/paste nodes
│    └─── Undo/redo
│
├─── Node Types
│    ├─── Events
│    │    ├─── OnStart
│    │    ├─── OnUpdate
│    │    ├─── OnCollision
│    │    ├─── OnKeyPress
│    │    └─── Custom events
│    ├─── Flow Control
│    │    ├─── If/Else
│    │    ├─── For Loop
│    │    ├─── While Loop
│    │    ├─── Switch
│    │    └─── Sequence
│    ├─── Variables
│    │    ├─── Get Variable
│    │    ├─── Set Variable
│    │    ├─── Create Variable
│    │    └─── Type conversion
│    ├─── Math
│    │    ├─── Add, Subtract, Multiply, Divide
│    │    ├─── Clamp, Lerp, Random
│    │    ├─── Sin, Cos, Atan2
│    │    └─── Vector operations
│    ├─── Logic
│    │    ├─── AND, OR, NOT
│    │    ├─── Compare (==, <, >)
│    │    └─── IsNull, IsType
│    ├─── Actions
│    │    ├─── Move, Rotate, Scale
│    │    ├─── Play Sound
│    │    ├─── Spawn Object
│    │    ├─── Destroy
│    │    └─── Set Property
│    └─── Custom
│         ├─── JavaScript function wrappers
│         └─── Plugin system
│
├─── Execution Engine
│    ├─── Graph traversal
│    ├─── Flow execution
│    ├─── Data propagation
│    ├─── Error handling
│    ├─── Stack management
│    └─── Performance optimization
│
├─── Variable System
│    ├─── Typed variables (number, string, bool, object)
│    ├─── Scope (graph, scene, global)
│    ├─── Serialization
│    └─── Type conversion
│
├─── Debugging
│    ├─── Execution highlighting
│    ├─── Breakpoints
│    ├─── Value inspection
│    ├─── Step execution
│    └─── Call stack
│
└─── Integration
     ├─── Attach to GameObjects
     ├─── Expose JavaScript API
     ├─── Export to code (optional)
     └─── Save/load graphs
Implementation
javascript
// tools/VisualScriptingSystem.js

class VisualScriptingSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Graphs (scriptId -> graph)
        this.graphs = new Map();
        
        // Active instances (objectId -> runtime)
        this.runtimes = new Map();
        
        // Node registry
        this.nodeTypes = new Map();
        
        // Variable scopes
        this.variables = {
            global: new Map(),
            scene: new Map()
        };
        
        // Editor UI
        this.editor = null;
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.registerBuiltInNodes();
        console.log('[VisualScripting] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === NODE REGISTRATION ===
    
    registerBuiltInNodes() {
        // Events
        this.registerNode('OnStart', {
            category: 'Events',
            color: 0x44ff88,
            outputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                runtime.executeNext(node, 'exec');
            }
        });
        
        this.registerNode('OnUpdate', {
            category: 'Events',
            color: 0x44ff88,
            outputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'deltaTime', type: 'number' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                runtime.setOutput(node, 'deltaTime', runtime.deltaTime);
                runtime.executeNext(node, 'exec');
            }
        });
        
        // Flow Control
        this.registerNode('If', {
            category: 'Flow',
            color: 0xffaa00,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'condition', type: 'boolean' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'true', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'false', type: 'exec' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const condition = runtime.getInput(node, 'condition');
                
                if (condition) {
                    runtime.executeNext(node, 'true');
                } else {
                    runtime.executeNext(node, 'false');
                }
            }
        });
        
        this.registerNode('For Loop', {
            category: 'Flow',
            color: 0xffaa00,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'start', type: 'number' },
                { name: 'end', type: 'number' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'body', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'index', type: 'number' },
                { name: 'completed', type: 'exec' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const start = runtime.getInput(node, 'start') || 0;
                const end = runtime.getInput(node, 'end') || 10;
                
                for (let i = start; i < end; i++) {
                    runtime.setOutput(node, 'index', i);
                    runtime.executeNext(node, 'body');
                }
                
                runtime.executeNext(node, 'completed');
            }
        });
        
        // Variables
        this.registerNode('Get Variable', {
            category: 'Variables',
            color: 0x4488ff,
            properties: [
                { name: 'variableName', type: 'string', default: '' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'value', type: 'any' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const varName = node.properties.variableName;
                const value = runtime.getVariable(varName);
                runtime.setOutput(node, 'value', value);
            }
        });
        
        this.registerNode('Set Variable', {
            category: 'Variables',
            color: 0x4488ff,
            properties: [
                { name: 'variableName', type: 'string', default: '' }
            ],
            inputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'value', type: 'any' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const varName = node.properties.variableName;
                const value = runtime.getInput(node, 'value');
                runtime.setVariable(varName, value);
                runtime.executeNext(node, 'exec');
            }
        });
        
        // Math
        this.registerNode('Add', {
            category: 'Math',
            color: 0xff8844,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'a', type: 'number' },
                { name: 'b', type: 'number' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'result', type: 'number' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const a = runtime.getInput(node, 'a') || 0;
                const b = runtime.getInput(node, 'b') || 0;
                runtime.setOutput(node, 'result', a + b);
            }
        });
        
        this.registerNode('Multiply', {
            category: 'Math',
            color: 0xff8844,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'a', type: 'number' },
                { name: 'b', type: 'number' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'result', type: 'number' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const a = runtime.getInput(node, 'a') || 0;
                const b = runtime.getInput(node, 'b') || 0;
                runtime.setOutput(node, 'result', a * b);
            }
        });
        
        this.registerNode('Random', {
            category: 'Math',
            color: 0xff8844,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'min', type: 'number' },
                { name: 'max', type: 'number' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'value', type: 'number' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const min = runtime.getInput(node, 'min') || 0;
                const max = runtime.getInput(node, 'max') || 1;
                const value = Phaser.Math.FloatBetween(min, max);
                runtime.setOutput(node, 'value', value);
            }
        });
        
        // Logic
        this.registerNode('Compare', {
            category: 'Logic',
            color: 0xaa44ff,
            properties: [
                { name: 'operator', type: 'enum', values: ['==', '!=', '<', '>', '<=', '>='], default: '==' }
            ],
            inputs: [
                { name: 'a', type: 'any' },
                { name: 'b', type: 'any' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'result', type: 'boolean' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const a = runtime.getInput(node, 'a');
                const b = runtime.getInput(node, 'b');
                const op = node.properties.operator;
                
                let result = false;
                
                switch (op) {
                    case '==': result = a == b; break;
                    case '!=': result = a != b; break;
                    case '<': result = a < b; break;
                    case '>': result = a > b; break;
                    case '<=': result = a <= b; break;
                    case '>=': result = a >= b; break;
                }
                
                runtime.setOutput(node, 'result', result);
            }
        });
        
        // Actions
        this.registerNode('Print', {
            category: 'Actions',
            color: 0x88ff44,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'message', type: 'any' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const message = runtime.getInput(node, 'message');
                console.log('[VisualScript]', message);
                runtime.executeNext(node, 'exec');
            }
        });
        
        this.registerNode('Move Object', {
            category: 'Actions',
            color: 0x88ff44,
            inputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' },
                { name: 'object', type: 'object' },
                { name: 'x', type: 'number' },
                { name: 'y', type: 'number' }
            ],
            outputs: [
                { name: 'exec', type: 'exec' }
            ],
            execute: (node, runtime) => {
                const obj = runtime.getInput(node, 'object') || runtime.target;
                const x = runtime.getInput(node, 'x') || 0;
                const y = runtime.getInput(node, 'y') || 0;
                
                if (obj && obj.setPosition) {
                    obj.setPosition(x, y);
                }
                
                runtime.executeNext(node, 'exec');
            }
        });
    }
    
    registerNode(name, definition) {
        this.nodeTypes.set(name, definition);
    }
    
    // === GRAPH CREATION ===
    
    createGraph(name) {
        const graphId = this.generateId();
        
        const graph = {
            id: graphId,
            name: name,
            nodes: [],
            connections: [],
            variables: new Map()
        };
        
        this.graphs.set(graphId, graph);
        
        return graph;
    }
    
    addNode(graphId, nodeType, position = { x: 0, y: 0 }) {
        const graph = this.graphs.get(graphId);
        if (!graph) return null;
        
        const nodeDefinition = this.nodeTypes.get(nodeType);
        if (!nodeDefinition) {
            console.error(`[VisualScript] Node type not found: ${nodeType}`);
            return null;
        }
        
        const node = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            type: nodeType,
            position: position,
            properties: {},
            inputs: {},
            outputs: {}
        };
        
        // Initialize properties
        if (nodeDefinition.properties) {
            nodeDefinition.properties.forEach(prop => {
                node.properties[prop.name] = prop.default;
            });
        }
        
        graph.nodes.push(node);
        
        return node;
    }
    
    connectNodes(graphId, sourceNodeId, sourcePort, targetNodeId, targetPort) {
        const graph = this.graphs.get(graphId);
        if (!graph) return null;
        
        const connection = {
            id: this.generateId(),
            source: { nodeId: sourceNodeId, port: sourcePort },
            target: { nodeId: targetNodeId, port: targetPort }
        };
        
        graph.connections.push(connection);
        
        return connection;
    }
    
    // === RUNTIME EXECUTION ===
    
    createRuntime(graphId, target = null) {
        const graph = this.graphs.get(graphId);
        if (!graph) return null;
        
        const runtime = new GraphRuntime(this, graph, target);
        
        this.runtimes.set(runtime.id, runtime);
        
        return runtime;
    }
    
    attachToObject(graphId, gameObject) {
        const runtime = this.createRuntime(graphId, gameObject);
        
        // Execute OnStart event
        this.executeEvent(runtime, 'OnStart');
        
        // Hook OnUpdate event
        this.scene.events.on('update', (time, delta) => {
            runtime.deltaTime = delta / 1000; // Convert to seconds
            this.executeEvent(runtime, 'OnUpdate');
        });
        
        return runtime;
    }
    
    executeEvent(runtime, eventType) {
        const eventNodes = runtime.graph.nodes.filter(node => node.type === eventType);
        
        eventNodes.forEach(node => {
            runtime.executeNode(node);
        });
    }
    
    // === GRAPH EDITOR UI ===
    
    openEditor(graphId) {
        if (!this.editor) {
            this.editor = new VisualScriptEditor(this.scene, this);
        }
        
        this.editor.loadGraph(graphId);
        this.editor.open();
    }
    
    closeEditor() {
        if (this.editor) {
            this.editor.close();
        }
    }
    
    // === PERSISTENCE ===
    
    saveGraph(graphId) {
        const graph = this.graphs.get(graphId);
        if (!graph) return null;
        
        const data = {
            id: graph.id,
            name: graph.name,
            nodes: graph.nodes.map(node => ({
                id: node.id,
                type: node.type,
                position: node.position,
                properties: node.properties
            })),
            connections: graph.connections.map(conn => ({
                source: conn.source,
                target: conn.target
            }))
        };
        
        localStorage.setItem(`visualscript_${graphId}`, JSON.stringify(data));
        
        return data;
    }
    
    loadGraph(graphId) {
        const saved = localStorage.getItem(`visualscript_${graphId}`);
        if (!saved) return null;
        
        const data = JSON.parse(saved);
        
        this.graphs.set(graphId, {
            id: data.id,
            name: data.name,
            nodes: data.nodes,
            connections: data.connections,
            variables: new Map()
        });
        
        return this.graphs.get(graphId);
    }
    
    generateId() {
        return `vs_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
}

// === GRAPH RUNTIME ===

class GraphRuntime {
    constructor(system, graph, target) {
        this.id = system.generateId();
        this.system = system;
        this.graph = graph;
        this.target = target; // GameObject this script is attached to
        
        // Execution state
        this.nodeOutputs = new Map(); // nodeId -> { port -> value }
        this.variables = new Map(); // Local variables
        
        // Flow execution
        this.executionStack = [];
        
        // Debug
        this.deltaTime = 0;
        this.executionCount = 0;
    }
    
    executeNode(node) {
        this.executionCount++;
        
        const nodeDefinition = this.system.nodeTypes.get(node.type);
        
        if (!nodeDefinition) {
            console.error(`[GraphRuntime] Unknown node type: ${node.type}`);
            return;
        }
        
        // Execute node logic
        if (nodeDefinition.execute) {
            nodeDefinition.execute(node, this);
        }
    }
    
    executeNext(node, outputPort) {
        // Find connections from this node's output port
        const connections = this.graph.connections.filter(conn => 
            conn.source.nodeId === node.id && 
            conn.source.port === outputPort &&
            conn.target.port === 'exec' // Only follow exec connections
        );
        
        // Execute connected nodes
        connections.forEach(conn => {
            const targetNode = this.graph.nodes.find(n => n.id === conn.target.nodeId);
            if (targetNode) {
                this.executeNode(targetNode);
            }
        });
    }
    
    getInput(node, portName) {
        // Find connection to this input port
        const connection = this.graph.connections.find(conn => 
            conn.target.nodeId === node.id && 
            conn.target.port === portName
        );
        
        if (connection) {
            // Get value from source node's output
            const sourceOutputs = this.nodeOutputs.get(connection.source.nodeId);
            if (sourceOutputs) {
                return sourceOutputs[connection.source.port];
            }
        }
        
        // No connection - check node's default value
        return undefined;
    }
    
    setOutput(node, portName, value) {
        if (!this.nodeOutputs.has(node.id)) {
            this.nodeOutputs.set(node.id, {});
        }
        
        this.nodeOutputs.get(node.id)[portName] = value;
    }
    
    getVariable(name) {
        // Check local variables
        if (this.variables.has(name)) {
            return this.variables.get(name);
        }
        
        // Check graph variables
        if (this.graph.variables.has(name)) {
            return this.graph.variables.get(name);
        }
        
        // Check scene variables
        if (this.system.variables.scene.has(name)) {
            return this.system.variables.scene.get(name);
        }
        
        // Check global variables
        if (this.system.variables.global.has(name)) {
            return this.system.variables.global.get(name);
        }
        
        return undefined;
    }
    
    setVariable(name, value) {
        this.variables.set(name, value);
    }
}

export default VisualScriptingSystem;

javascript
// tools/VisualScriptEditor.js

class VisualScriptEditor {
    constructor(scene, scriptingSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.system = scriptingSystem;
        
        this.currentGraph = null;
        
        // Camera
        this.camera = {
            x: 0,
            y: 0,
            zoom: 1.0
        };
        
        // Selection
        this.selectedNodes = [];
        this.dragging = false;
        this.connecting = false;
        this.connectionStart = null;
        
        this.createUI();
    }
    
    createUI() {
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.setDepth(60000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.container.setVisible(false);
        
        // Background
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(
            this.scene.scale.width / 2,
            this.scene.scale.height / 2,
            this.scene.scale.width,
            this.scene.scale.height,
            0x1a1a1a,
            1
        );
        this.container.add(bg);
        
        // Canvas
        this.canvas = this.scene.add.container(0, 0);
        this.container.add(this.canvas);
        
        // Grid
        this.drawGrid();
        
        // Node library panel
        this.createNodeLibrary();
        
        // Setup input
        this.setupInput();
    }
    
    drawGrid() {
        const graphics = this.scene.add.graphics();
        
        const gridSize = 50;
        const width = this.scene.scale.width * 4;
        const height = this.scene.scale.height * 4;
        
        graphics.lineStyle(1, 0x333333, 0.3);
        
        // Vertical lines
        for (let x = 0; x < width; x += gridSize) {
            graphics.moveTo(x - width / 2, -height / 2);
            graphics.lineTo(x - width / 2, height / 2);
        }
        
        // Horizontal lines
        for (let y = 0; y < height; y += gridSize) {
            graphics.moveTo(-width / 2, y - height / 2);
            graphics.lineTo(width / 2, y - height / 2);
        }
        
        graphics.strokePath();
        
        this.canvas.add(graphics);
    }
    
    createNodeLibrary() {
        // Left sidebar with node types
        const panel = this.scene.add.container(10, 60);
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 200, this.scene.scale.height - 70, 0x2a2a2a, 0.9);
        bg.setOrigin(0);
        panel.add(bg);
        
        const title = this.scene.add.text(10, 10, 'Nodes', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        panel.add(title);
        
        // Node categories
        const categories = new Map();
        
        this.system.nodeTypes.forEach((definition, name) => {
            const category = definition.category || 'Other';
            
            if (!categories.has(category)) {
                categories.set(category, []);
            }
            
            categories.get(category).push(name);
        });
        
        let y = 40;
        
        categories.forEach((nodes, category) => {
            // Category label
            const categoryLabel = this.scene.add.text(10, y, category, {
                font: 'bold 11px Arial',
                fill: '#ffaa00'
            });
            panel.add(categoryLabel);
            y += 20;
            
            // Node buttons
            nodes.forEach(nodeName => {
                const btn = this.scene.add.text(20, y, nodeName, {
                    font: '10px Arial',
                    fill: '#ffffff'
                });
                btn.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
                
                btn.on('pointerdown', () => {
                    this.addNodeToCanvas(nodeName);
                });
                
                panel.add(btn);
                y += 18;
            });
            
            y += 10;
        });
        
        this.container.add(panel);
    }
    
    addNodeToCanvas(nodeType) {
        if (!this.currentGraph) return;
        
        const node = this.system.addNode(this.currentGraph.id, nodeType, {
            x: -this.camera.x,
            y: -this.camera.y
        });
        
        this.renderNode(node);
    }
    
    renderNode(node) {
        const nodeDefinition = this.system.nodeTypes.get(node.type);
        
        const nodeContainer = this.scene.add.container(node.position.x, node.position.y);
        
        // Background
        const width = 150;
        const height = 80;
        
        const bg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, width, height, nodeDefinition.color || 0x4488ff, 1);
        bg.setInteractive({ draggable: true, useHandCursor: true });
        nodeContainer.add(bg);
        
        // Title
        const title = this.scene.add.text(0, -height / 2 + 10, node.type, {
            font: 'bold 11px Arial',
            fill: '#000000'
        });
        title.setOrigin(0.5, 0);
        nodeContainer.add(title);
        
        // Input ports
        if (nodeDefinition.inputs) {
            nodeDefinition.inputs.forEach((input, index) => {
                const y = -height / 2 + 30 + index * 15;
                
                const port = this.scene.add.circle(-width / 2, y, 5, 0xffffff, 1);
                port.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
                
                port.on('pointerdown', () => {
                    // Start connection
                });
                
                nodeContainer.add(port);
                
                const label = this.scene.add.text(-width / 2 + 10, y, input.name, {
                    font: '9px Arial',
                    fill: '#000000'
                });
                label.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
                nodeContainer.add(label);
            });
        }
        
        // Output ports
        if (nodeDefinition.outputs) {
            nodeDefinition.outputs.forEach((output, index) => {
                const y = -height / 2 + 30 + index * 15;
                
                const port = this.scene.add.circle(width / 2, y, 5, 0xffffff, 1);
                port.setInteractive({ useHandCursor: true });
                
                port.on('pointerdown', () => {
                    // Start connection from this output
                    this.startConnection(node, output.name);
                });
                
                nodeContainer.add(port);
                
                const label = this.scene.add.text(width / 2 - 10, y, output.name, {
                    font: '9px Arial',
                    fill: '#000000'
                });
                label.setOrigin(1, 0.5);
                nodeContainer.add(label);
            });
        }
        
        // Drag handling
        bg.on('drag', (pointer, dragX, dragY) => {
            nodeContainer.setPosition(dragX, dragY);
            node.position.x = dragX;
            node.position.y = dragY;
        });
        
        this.canvas.add(nodeContainer);
        node.visual = nodeContainer;
    }
    
    startConnection(sourceNode, sourcePort) {
        this.connecting = true;
        this.connectionStart = { node: sourceNode, port: sourcePort };
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // Pan camera with middle mouse
        // Zoom with scroll wheel
        // Connect nodes
    }
    
    loadGraph(graphId) {
        this.currentGraph = this.system.graphs.get(graphId);
        
        if (!this.currentGraph) return;
        
        // Clear canvas
        this.canvas.removeAll(true);
        this.drawGrid();
        
        // Render all nodes
        this.currentGraph.nodes.forEach(node => {
            this.renderNode(node);
        });
        
        // Render connections
        // (Draw Bezier curves between ports)
    }
    
    open() {
        this.container.setVisible(true);
    }
    
    close() {
        this.container.setVisible(false);
    }
}

export default VisualScriptEditor;
