javascript
// systems/AddressablesSystem.js

class AddressablesSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Asset catalog (address -> asset metadata)
        this.catalog = new Map();
        
        // Loaded assets (address -> asset reference)
        this.loadedAssets = new Map();
        
        // Asset bundles (bundleId -> asset addresses)
        this.bundles = new Map();
        
        // Reference counting (address -> ref count)
        this.refCounts = new Map();
        
        // Loading queue
        this.loadQueue = [];
        this.isLoading = false;
        
        // Cache settings
        this.cacheEnabled = true;
        this.maxCacheSize = 100 * 1024 * 1024; // 100MB
        this.currentCacheSize = 0;
        
        // Loading callbacks
        this.loadCallbacks = new Map();
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        this.buildCatalog();
        console.log('[Addressables] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === CATALOG BUILDING ===
    
    buildCatalog() {
        // Build catalog from asset manifest
        // In production, this would be generated during build
        
        const manifest = this.loadManifest();
        
        manifest.assets.forEach(asset => {
            this.catalog.set(asset.address, {
                address: asset.address,
                type: asset.type,
                path: asset.path,
                size: asset.size,
                bundle: asset.bundle || null,
                dependencies: asset.dependencies || [],
                metadata: asset.metadata || {}
            });
        });
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Catalog built: ${this.catalog.size} assets`);
    }
    
    loadManifest() {
        // Load from localStorage or fetch from server
        const saved = localStorage.getItem('addressables_manifest');
        
        if (saved) {
            return JSON.parse(saved);
        }
        
        // Default manifest
        return {
            version: '1.0.0',
            assets: []
        };
    }
    
    saveManifest(manifest) {
        localStorage.setItem('addressables_manifest', JSON.stringify(manifest));
    }
    
    // === ASSET REGISTRATION ===
    
    registerAsset(address, type, path, options = {}) {
        this.catalog.set(address, {
            address: address,
            type: type,
            path: path,
            size: options.size || 0,
            bundle: options.bundle || null,
            dependencies: options.dependencies || [],
            metadata: options.metadata || {}
        });
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Registered: ${address}`);
    }
    
    registerBundle(bundleId, assetAddresses) {
        this.bundles.set(bundleId, assetAddresses);
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Bundle registered: ${bundleId} (${assetAddresses.length} assets)`);
    }
    
    // === ASSET LOADING ===
    
    async loadAsset(address, options = {}) {
        // Check if already loaded
        if (this.loadedAssets.has(address)) {
            this.addReference(address);
            return this.loadedAssets.get(address);
        }
        
        // Get asset info from catalog
        const assetInfo = this.catalog.get(address);
        
        if (!assetInfo) {
            throw new Error(`[Addressables] Asset not found in catalog: ${address}`);
        }
        
        // Load dependencies first
        if (assetInfo.dependencies.length > 0) {
            await Promise.all(
                assetInfo.dependencies.map(dep => this.loadAsset(dep))
            );
        }
        
        // Load the asset
        const asset = await this.loadAssetByType(assetInfo, options);
        
        // Store in cache
        this.loadedAssets.set(address, asset);
        this.addReference(address);
        
        // Update cache size
        this.currentCacheSize += assetInfo.size;
        
        // Check cache limits
        this.enforceCache();
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Loaded: ${address}`);
        
        return asset;
    }
    
    async loadAssetByType(assetInfo, options) {
        const { type, path } = assetInfo;
        
        switch (type) {
            case 'texture':
                return await this.loadTexture(path, options);
            
            case 'audio':
                return await this.loadAudio(path, options);
            
            case 'json':
                return await this.loadJSON(path, options);
            
            case 'prefab':
                return await this.loadPrefab(path, options);
            
            case 'scene':
                return await this.loadScene(path, options);
            
            default:
                throw new Error(`[Addressables] Unknown asset type: ${type}`);
        }
    }
    
    async loadTexture(path, options) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const key = path.split('/').pop().split('.')[0];
            
            if (this.scene.textures.exists(key)) {
                resolve(this.scene.textures.get(key));
                return;
            }
            
            this.scene.load.image(key, path);
            
            this.scene.load.once('filecomplete-image-' + key, () => {
                resolve(this.scene.textures.get(key));
            });
            
            this.scene.load.once('loaderror', (file) => {
                if (file.key === key) {
                    reject(new Error(`Failed to load texture: ${path}`));
                }
            });
            
            this.scene.load.start();
        });
    }
    
    async loadAudio(path, options) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            const key = path.split('/').pop().split('.')[0];
            
            if (this.scene.cache.audio.exists(key)) {
                resolve(this.scene.cache.audio.get(key));
                return;
            }
            
            this.scene.load.audio(key, path);
            
            this.scene.load.once('filecomplete-audio-' + key, () => {
                resolve(this.scene.cache.audio.get(key));
            });
            
            this.scene.load.once('loaderror', (file) => {
                if (file.key === key) {
                    reject(new Error(`Failed to load audio: ${path}`));
                }
            });
            
            this.scene.load.start();
        });
    }
    
    async loadJSON(path, options) {
        try {
            const response = await fetch(path + '?t=' + Date.now());
            const data = await response.json();
            return data;
        } catch (error) {
            throw new Error(`Failed to load JSON: ${path}`);
        }
    }
    
    async loadPrefab(path, options) {
        const data = await this.loadJSON(path, options);
        return data;
    }
    
    async loadScene(path, options) {
        const data = await this.loadJSON(path, options);
        return data;
    }
    
    // === BUNDLE LOADING ===
    
    async loadBundle(bundleId, progressCallback = null) {
        const assetAddresses = this.bundles.get(bundleId);
        
        if (!assetAddresses) {
            throw new Error(`[Addressables] Bundle not found: ${bundleId}`);
        }
        
        const totalAssets = assetAddresses.length;
        let loadedCount = 0;
        
        const results = [];
        
        for (const address of assetAddresses) {
            try {
                const asset = await this.loadAsset(address);
                results.push({ address, asset, success: true });
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`[Addressables] Failed to load ${address}:`, error);
                results.push({ address, asset: null, success: false, error });
            }
            
            loadedCount++;
            
            if (progressCallback) {
                progressCallback(loadedCount / totalAssets, loadedCount, totalAssets);
            }
        }
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Bundle loaded: ${bundleId} (${loadedCount}/${totalAssets})`);
        
        return results;
    }
    
    // === BATCH LOADING ===
    
    async loadMultiple(addresses, progressCallback = null) {
        const totalAssets = addresses.length;
        let loadedCount = 0;
        
        const results = await Promise.all(
            addresses.map(async (address) => {
                try {
                    const asset = await this.loadAsset(address);
                    loadedCount++;
                    
                    if (progressCallback) {
                        progressCallback(loadedCount / totalAssets, loadedCount, totalAssets);
                    }
                    
                    return { address, asset, success: true };
                } catch (error) {
                    loadedCount++;
                    
                    if (progressCallback) {
                        progressCallback(loadedCount / totalAssets, loadedCount, totalAssets);
                    }
                    
                    return { address, asset: null, success: false, error };
                }
            })
        );
        
        return results;
    }
    
    // === ASSET UNLOADING ===
    
    releaseAsset(address) {
        if (!this.loadedAssets.has(address)) {
            return;
        }
        
        this.removeReference(address);
        
        // If no more references, unload
        if (this.getRefCount(address) === 0) {
            this.unloadAsset(address);
        }
    }
    
    unloadAsset(address) {
        const asset = this.loadedAssets.get(address);
        
        if (!asset) return;
        
        const assetInfo = this.catalog.get(address);
        
        // Type-specific cleanup
        if (assetInfo.type === 'texture') {
            const key = assetInfo.path.split('/').pop().split('.')[0];
            if (this.scene.textures.exists(key)) {
                this.scene.textures.remove(key);
            }
        } else if (assetInfo.type === 'audio') {
            const key = assetInfo.path.split('/').pop().split('.')[0];
            if (this.scene.cache.audio.exists(key)) {
                this.scene.cache.audio.remove(key);
            }
        }
        
        // Remove from cache
        this.loadedAssets.delete(address);
        this.currentCacheSize -= assetInfo.size;
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Unloaded: ${address}`);
    }
    
    releaseBundle(bundleId) {
        const assetAddresses = this.bundles.get(bundleId);
        
        if (!assetAddresses) return;
        
        assetAddresses.forEach(address => {
            this.releaseAsset(address);
        });
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Released bundle: ${bundleId}`);
    }
    
    // === REFERENCE COUNTING ===
    
    addReference(address) {
        const count = this.refCounts.get(address) || 0;
        this.refCounts.set(address, count + 1);
    }
    
    removeReference(address) {
        const count = this.refCounts.get(address) || 0;
        
        if (count > 0) {
            this.refCounts.set(address, count - 1);
        }
    }
    
    getRefCount(address) {
        return this.refCounts.get(address) || 0;
    }
    
    // === CACHE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    enforceCache() {
        if (this.currentCacheSize <= this.maxCacheSize) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Find least recently used assets with ref count 0
        const candidates = [];
        
        this.loadedAssets.forEach((asset, address) => {
            if (this.getRefCount(address) === 0) {
                candidates.push(address);
            }
        });
        
        // Sort by last access time (would need to track)
        // For now, just unload in order until under limit
        
        for (const address of candidates) {
            if (this.currentCacheSize <= this.maxCacheSize) {
                break;
            }
            
            this.unloadAsset(address);
        }
        
        console.log(`[Addressables] Cache enforced: ${this.currentCacheSize}/${this.maxCacheSize} bytes`);
    }
    
    clearCache() {
        const addresses = Array.from(this.loadedAssets.keys());
        
        addresses.forEach(address => {
            if (this.getRefCount(address) === 0) {
                this.unloadAsset(address);
            }
        });
        
        console.log('[Addressables] Cache cleared');
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    isLoaded(address) {
        return this.loadedAssets.has(address);
    }
    
    getAsset(address) {
        return this.loadedAssets.get(address);
    }
    
    getAssetInfo(address) {
        return this.catalog.get(address);
    }
    
    getCatalogSize() {
        return this.catalog.size;
    }
    
    getLoadedCount() {
        return this.loadedAssets.size;
    }
    
    getCacheUsage() {
        return {
            used: this.currentCacheSize,
            max: this.maxCacheSize,
            percentage: (this.currentCacheSize / this.maxCacheSize) * 100
        };
    }
    
    // === EXPORT/IMPORT ===
    
    exportCatalog() {
        const manifest = {
            version: '1.0.0',
            assets: Array.from(this.catalog.values()),
            bundles: Array.from(this.bundles.entries()).map(([id, addresses]) => ({
                id,
                addresses
            }))
        };
        
        return JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2);
    }
    
    importCatalog(catalogJSON) {
        const manifest = JSON.parse(catalogJSON);
        
        this.catalog.clear();
        this.bundles.clear();
        
        manifest.assets.forEach(asset => {
            this.catalog.set(asset.address, asset);
        });
        
        if (manifest.bundles) {
            manifest.bundles.forEach(bundle => {
                this.bundles.set(bundle.id, bundle.addresses);
            });
        }
        
        console.log('[Addressables] Catalog imported');
    }
}

export default AddressablesSystem;
Usage Example:

javascript
// Initialize
const addressables = new AddressablesSystem(scene);

// Register assets
addressables.registerAsset('player.sprite', 'texture', 'assets/sprites/player.png', {
    size: 12345,
    bundle: 'characters'
});

addressables.registerAsset('bgm.main', 'audio', 'assets/audio/main_theme.mp3', {
    size: 2345678,
    bundle: 'audio'
});

// Register bundle
addressables.registerBundle('characters', [
    'player.sprite',
    'enemy.goblin.sprite',
    'npc.merchant.sprite'
]);

// Load asset
const playerTexture = await addressables.loadAsset('player.sprite');

// Load bundle with progress
await addressables.loadBundle('characters', (progress, loaded, total) => {
    console.log(`Loading: ${(progress * 100).toFixed(1)}% (${loaded}/${total})`);
});

// Release when done
addressables.releaseAsset('player.sprite');
addressables.releaseBundle('characters');
TOOL 27: LEVEL STREAMING SYSTEM
Complete Implementation
javascript
// systems/LevelStreamingSystem.js

class LevelStreamingSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Level chunks (chunkId -> chunk data)
        this.chunks = new Map();
        
        // Loaded chunks (chunkId -> loaded state)
        this.loadedChunks = new Map();
        
        // Streaming settings
        this.streamingEnabled = true;
        this.loadDistance = 1000; // Load chunks within this distance
        this.unloadDistance = 1500; // Unload chunks beyond this distance
        this.maxActiveChunks = 9; // 3x3 grid around player
        
        // Player tracking
        this.playerPosition = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        this.currentChunk = null;
        
        // Loading queue
        this.loadQueue = [];
        this.unloadQueue = [];
        this.isProcessing = false;
        
        // Performance
        this.maxLoadsPerFrame = 1;
        this.maxUnloadsPerFrame = 2;
        
        // Integration
        this.addressables = null; // Link to AddressablesSystem
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Hook into scene update
        this.scene.events.on('update', () => this.update());
        
        console.log('[LevelStreaming] Initialized');
    }
    
    // === CHUNK DEFINITION ===
    
    defineChunk(chunkId, bounds, assets = []) {
        this.chunks.set(chunkId, {
            id: chunkId,
            bounds: bounds, // { x, y, width, height }
            assets: assets, // Asset addresses to load
            gameObjects: [], // Runtime objects
            loaded: false,
            loading: false
        });
    }
    
    defineChunkGrid(gridSize, chunkSize, assetProvider) {
        // Define a grid of chunks
        for (let row = 0; row < gridSize; row++) {
            for (let col = 0; col < gridSize; col++) {
                const chunkId = `chunk_${col}_${row}`;
                
                const bounds = {
                    x: col * chunkSize,
                    y: row * chunkSize,
                    width: chunkSize,
                    height: chunkSize
                };
                
                // Get assets for this chunk from provider function
                const assets = assetProvider ? assetProvider(col, row) : [];
                
                this.defineChunk(chunkId, bounds, assets);
            }
        }
        
        console.log(`[LevelStreaming] Defined ${this.chunks.size} chunks in ${gridSize}x${gridSize} grid`);
    }
    
    // === CHUNK LOADING ===
    
    async loadChunk(chunkId) {
        const chunk = this.chunks.get(chunkId);
        
        if (!chunk) {
            console.error(`[LevelStreaming] Chunk not found: ${chunkId}`);
            return;
        }
        
        if (chunk.loaded || chunk.loading) {
            return;
        }
        
        chunk.loading = true;
        
        console.log(`[LevelStreaming] Loading chunk: ${chunkId}`);
        
        try {
            // Load assets
            if (this.addressables && chunk.assets.length > 0) {
                await this.addressables.loadMultiple(chunk.assets);
            }
            
            // Spawn game objects
            await this.spawnChunkObjects(chunk);
            
            chunk.loaded = true;
            chunk.loading = false;
            
            this.loadedChunks.set(chunkId, chunk);
            
            console.log(`[LevelStreaming] Loaded chunk: ${chunkId}`);
            
            // Emit event
            this.scene.events.emit('chunk-loaded', chunkId);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`[LevelStreaming] Failed to load chunk ${chunkId}:`, error);
            chunk.loading = false;
        }
    }
    
    async spawnChunkObjects(chunk) {
        // Spawn game objects for this chunk
        // This would be customized per game
        
        // Example: Spawn enemies, props, etc.
        const chunkData = await this.loadChunkData(chunk.id);
        
        if (chunkData && chunkData.objects) {
            chunkData.objects.forEach(objData => {
                const obj = this.createGameObject(objData);
                chunk.gameObjects.push(obj);
            });
        }
    }
    
    async loadChunkData(chunkId) {
        // Load chunk-specific data (enemies, props, etc.)
        // From JSON file or embedded data
        
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`assets/chunks/${chunkId}.json`);
            const data = await response.json();
            return data;
        } catch (error) {
            return null;
        }
    }
    
    createGameObject(objData) {
        // Create Phaser game object from data
        // Example implementation
        
        let obj = null;
        
        if (objData.type === 'sprite') {
            obj = this.scene.add.sprite(objData.x, objData.y, objData.texture);
        } else if (objData.type === 'enemy') {
            // Create enemy
            obj = this.scene.add.sprite(objData.x, objData.y, 'enemy');
            // Add AI, etc.
        }
        
        return obj;
    }
    
    // === CHUNK UNLOADING ===
    
    unloadChunk(chunkId) {
        const chunk = this.chunks.get(chunkId);
        
        if (!chunk || !chunk.loaded) {
            return;
        }
        
        console.log(`[LevelStreaming] Unloading chunk: ${chunkId}`);
        
        // Destroy game objects
        chunk.gameObjects.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.destroy) {
                obj.destroy();
            }
        });
        
        chunk.gameObjects = [];
        
        // Release assets
        if (this.addressables && chunk.assets.length > 0) {
            chunk.assets.forEach(address => {
                this.addressables.releaseAsset(address);
            });
        }
        
        chunk.loaded = false;
        this.loadedChunks.delete(chunkId);
        
        console.log(`[LevelStreaming] Unloaded chunk: ${chunkId}`);
        
        // Emit event
        this.scene.events.emit('chunk-unloaded', chunkId);
    }
    
    // === STREAMING LOGIC ===
    
    update() {
        if (!this.streamingEnabled) return;
        
        // Determine which chunks should be loaded based on player position
        this.updateStreamingQueues();
        
        // Process queues
        this.processQueues();
    }
    
    updateStreamingQueues() {
        // Find current chunk
        const currentChunkId = this.getChunkAtPosition(this.playerPosition.x, this.playerPosition.y);
        
        if (currentChunkId !== this.currentChunk) {
            this.currentChunk = currentChunkId;
            this.scene.events.emit('chunk-changed', currentChunkId);
        }
        
        // Determine which chunks should be loaded
        const chunksToLoad = new Set();
        const chunksToUnload = new Set();
        
        this.chunks.forEach((chunk, chunkId) => {
            const distance = this.getDistanceToChunk(chunk, this.playerPosition);
            
            if (distance <= this.loadDistance) {
                // Should be loaded
                if (!chunk.loaded && !chunk.loading) {
                    chunksToLoad.add(chunkId);
                }
            } else if (distance >= this.unloadDistance) {
                // Should be unloaded
                if (chunk.loaded) {
                    chunksToUnload.add(chunkId);
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Add to queues
        this.loadQueue = Array.from(chunksToLoad);
        this.unloadQueue = Array.from(chunksToUnload);
        
        // Sort load queue by distance (closest first)
        this.loadQueue.sort((a, b) => {
            const distA = this.getDistanceToChunk(this.chunks.get(a), this.playerPosition);
            const distB = this.getDistanceToChunk(this.chunks.get(b), this.playerPosition);
            return distA - distB;
        });
    }
    
    processQueues() {
        if (this.isProcessing) return;
        
        this.isProcessing = true;
        
        // Unload chunks (faster)
        let unloadsThisFrame = 0;
        
        while (this.unloadQueue.length > 0 && unloadsThisFrame < this.maxUnloadsPerFrame) {
            const chunkId = this.unloadQueue.shift();
            this.unloadChunk(chunkId);
            unloadsThisFrame++;
        }
        
        // Load chunks (slower)
        let loadsThisFrame = 0;
        
        while (this.loadQueue.length > 0 && loadsThisFrame < this.maxLoadsPerFrame) {
            const chunkId = this.loadQueue.shift();
            this.loadChunk(chunkId); // Async but fire-and-forget
            loadsThisFrame++;
        }
        
        this.isProcessing = false;
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    getChunkAtPosition(x, y) {
        for (const [chunkId, chunk] of this.chunks) {
            if (this.isPointInChunk(x, y, chunk)) {
                return chunkId;
            }
        }
        
        return null;
    }
    
    isPointInChunk(x, y, chunk) {
        return x >= chunk.bounds.x &&
               x <= chunk.bounds.x + chunk.bounds.width &&
               y >= chunk.bounds.y &&
               y <= chunk.bounds.y + chunk.bounds.height;
    }
    
    getDistanceToChunk(chunk, position) {
        // Distance from point to nearest point on chunk bounds
        const chunkCenterX = chunk.bounds.x + chunk.bounds.width / 2;
        const chunkCenterY = chunk.bounds.y + chunk.bounds.height / 2;
        
        const dx = chunkCenterX - position.x;
        const dy = chunkCenterY - position.y;
        
        return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    }
    
    setPlayerPosition(x, y) {
        this.playerPosition.x = x;
        this.playerPosition.y = y;
    }
    
    // === MANUAL CONTROL ===
    
    forceLoadChunk(chunkId) {
        this.loadChunk(chunkId);
    }
    
    forceUnloadChunk(chunkId) {
        this.unloadChunk(chunkId);
    }
    
    preloadChunks(chunkIds) {
        chunkIds.forEach(chunkId => {
            this.loadChunk(chunkId);
        });
    }
    
    // === VISUALIZATION (DEBUG) ===
    
    drawChunkBounds(graphics) {
        this.chunks.forEach((chunk, chunkId) => {
            const color = chunk.loaded ? 0x00ff00 : 0xff0000;
            const alpha = chunk.loaded ? 0.3 : 0.1;
            
            graphics.lineStyle(2, color, alpha);
            graphics.strokeRect(
                chunk.bounds.x,
                chunk.bounds.y,
                chunk.bounds.width,
                chunk.bounds.height
            );
            
            // Chunk ID label
            const label = this.scene.add.text(
                chunk.bounds.x + chunk.bounds.width / 2,
                chunk.bounds.y + chunk.bounds.height / 2,
                chunkId,
                { font: '12px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
            );
            label.setOrigin(0.5);
        });
    }
    
    // === CONFIGURATION ===
    
    setLoadDistance(distance) {
        this.loadDistance = distance;
    }
    
    setUnloadDistance(distance) {
        this.unloadDistance = distance;
    }
    
    setMaxActiveChunks(count) {
        this.maxActiveChunks = count;
    }
    
    setMaxLoadsPerFrame(count) {
        this.maxLoadsPerFrame = count;
    }
    
    enable() {
        this.streamingEnabled = true;
    }
    
    disable() {
        this.streamingEnabled = false;
    }
    
    // === STATS ===
    
    getStats() {
        return {
            totalChunks: this.chunks.size,
            loadedChunks: this.loadedChunks.size,
            currentChunk: this.currentChunk,
            loadQueueSize: this.loadQueue.length,
            unloadQueueSize: this.unloadQueue.length
        };
    }
}

export default LevelStreamingSystem;
TOOL 28: LOCALIZATION SYSTEM
Complete Implementation
javascript
// systems/LocalizationSystem.js

class LocalizationSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Current language
        this.currentLanguage = 'en';
        
        // Language files (languageCode -> translations)
        this.languages = new Map();
        
        // Localized strings (key -> translated text)
        this.strings = new Map();
        
        // Text objects to update (textObject -> key)
        this.trackedTexts = new Map();
        
        // Pluralization rules
        this.pluralRules = new Map();
        
        // Formatting options
        this.numberFormat = new Intl.NumberFormat(this.currentLanguage);
        this.dateFormat = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.currentLanguage);
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        // Detect browser language
        const browserLang = navigator.language.split('-')[0];
        this.currentLanguage = browserLang || 'en';
        
        this.setupPluralRules();
        
        console.log(`[Localization] Initialized (language: ${this.currentLanguage})`);
    }
    
    // === LANGUAGE LOADING ===
    
    async loadLanguage(languageCode) {
        try {
            const response = await fetch(`assets/localization/${languageCode}.json`);
            const translations = await response.json();
            
            this.languages.set(languageCode, translations);
            
            console.log(`[Localization] Loaded language: ${languageCode} (${Object.keys(translations).length} strings)`);
            
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`[Localization] Failed to load language ${languageCode}:`, error);
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    async setLanguage(languageCode) {
        // Load language if not already loaded
        if (!this.languages.has(languageCode)) {
            const loaded = await this.loadLanguage(languageCode);
            
            if (!loaded) {
                console.error(`[Localization] Cannot set language: ${languageCode}`);
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        this.currentLanguage = languageCode;
        
        // Update number/date formatters
        this.numberFormat = new Intl.NumberFormat(languageCode);
        this.dateFormat = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(languageCode);
        
        // Rebuild strings
        this.rebuildStrings();
        
        // Update all tracked text objects
        this.updateAllTexts();
        
        // Emit event
        this.scene.events.emit('language-changed', languageCode);
        
        console.log(`[Localization] Language set to: ${languageCode}`);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    rebuildStrings() {
        this.strings.clear();
        
        const translations = this.languages.get(this.currentLanguage);
        
        if (translations) {
            Object.entries(translations).forEach(([key, value]) => {
                this.strings.set(key, value);
            });
        }
    }
    
    // === STRING RETRIEVAL ===
    
    get(key, params = {}) {
        let text = this.strings.get(key);
        
        if (!text) {
            console.warn(`[Localization] Missing translation: ${key}`);
            return `[${key}]`;
        }
        
        // Variable substitution
        text = this.substituteVariables(text, params);
        
        // Pluralization
        if (params.count !== undefined) {
            text = this.handlePluralization(text, params.count);
        }
        
        return text;
    }
    
    substituteVariables(text, params) {
        // Replace {variableName} with param values
        return text.replace(/\{(\w+)\}/g, (match, varName) => {
            return params[varName] !== undefined ? params[varName] : match;
        });
    }
    
    handlePluralization(text, count) {
        // Check if text has plural forms
        // Format: "singular|plural" or "zero|one|many"
        
        if (!text.includes('|')) {
            return text;
        }
        
        const forms = text.split('|');
        const pluralRule = this.getPluralRule(count);
        
        if (forms.length === 2) {
            // Simple singular/plural
            return count === 1 ? forms[0] : forms[1];
        } else if (forms.length === 3) {
            // zero|one|many
            if (count === 0) return forms[0];
            if (count === 1) return forms[1];
            return forms[2];
        }
        
        // Fallback
        return forms[0];
    }
    
    getPluralRule(count) {
        // Get plural rule for current language
        const rule = this.pluralRules.get(this.currentLanguage);
        
        if (rule) {
            return rule(count);
        }
        
        // Default English rule
        return count === 1 ? 'one' : 'other';
    }
    
    setupPluralRules() {
        // English
        this.pluralRules.set('en', (n) => n === 1 ? 'one' : 'other');
        
        // Spanish/French/etc (similar to English)
        this.pluralRules.set('es', (n) => n === 1 ? 'one' : 'other');
        this.pluralRules.set('fr', (n) => n === 1 ? 'one' : 'other');
        
        // Russian (complex)
        this.pluralRules.set('ru', (n) => {
            if (n % 10 === 1 && n % 100 !== 11) return 'one';
            if (n % 10 >= 2 && n % 10 <= 4 && (n % 100 < 10 || n % 100 >= 20)) return 'few';
            return 'many';
        });
        
        // Add more languages as needed
    }
    
    // === TEXT TRACKING ===
    
    createText(x, y, key, params = {}, style = {}) {
        const text = this.scene.add.text(x, y, this.get(key, params), style);
        
        this.trackedTexts.set(text, { key, params });
        
        return text;
    }
    
    updateText(textObject, key, params = {}) {
        textObject.setText(this.get(key, params));
        this.trackedTexts.set(textObject, { key, params });
    }
    
    updateAllTexts() {
        this.trackedTexts.forEach((data, textObject) => {
            textObject.setText(this.get(data.key, data.params));
        });
    }
    
    untrackText(textObject) {
        this.trackedTexts.delete(textObject);
    }
    
    // === FORMATTING ===
    
    formatNumber(number, options = {}) {
        return this.numberFormat.format(number);
    }
    
    formatCurrency(amount, currency = 'USD') {
        const formatter = new Intl.NumberFormat(this.currentLanguage, {
            style: 'currency',
            currency: currency
        });
        
        return formatter.format(amount);
    }
    
    formatDate(date, options = {}) {
        return this.dateFormat.format(date);
    }
    
    formatPercent(value) {
        const formatter = new Intl.NumberFormat(this.currentLanguage, {
            style: 'percent',
            minimumFractionDigits: 0,
            maximumFractionDigits: 2
        });
        
        return formatter.format(value);
    }
    
    // === LANGUAGE MANAGEMENT ===
    
    getAvailableLanguages() {
        return Array.from(this.languages.keys());
    }
    
    getCurrentLanguage() {
        return this.currentLanguage;
    }
    
    hasLanguage(languageCode) {
        return this.languages.has(languageCode);
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    addString(key, value, languageCode = null) {
        const lang = languageCode || this.currentLanguage;
        
        if (!this.languages.has(lang)) {
            this.languages.set(lang, {});
        }
        
        const translations = this.languages.get(lang);
        translations[key] = value;
        
        if (lang === this.currentLanguage) {
            this.strings.set(key, value);
        }
    }
    
    exportLanguage(languageCode) {
        const translations = this.languages.get(languageCode);
        
        if (!translations) return null;
        
        return JSON.stringify(translations, null, 2);
    }
    
    importLanguage(languageCode, jsonData) {
        const translations = JSON.parse(jsonData);
        this.languages.set(languageCode, translations);
        
        if (languageCode === this.currentLanguage) {
            this.rebuildStrings();
            this.updateAllTexts();
        }
    }
}

export default LocalizationSystem;

}
TOOL 29: ANALYTICS & TELEMETRY SYSTEM
Complete Implementation
javascript
// systems/AnalyticsSystem.js

class AnalyticsSystem {
    constructor(scene, config = {}) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Configuration
        this.config = {
            enabled: config.enabled !== undefined ? config.enabled : true,
            endpoint: config.endpoint || 'https://analytics.yourgame.com/events',
            apiKey: config.apiKey || '',
            batchSize: config.batchSize || 10,
            flushInterval: config.flushInterval || 30000, // 30 seconds
            debug: config.debug || false,
            allowedEvents: config.allowedEvents || null // null = all events allowed
        };
        
        // Session
        this.sessionId = this.generateSessionId();
        this.sessionStartTime = Date.now();
        
        // User ID (persistent)
        this.userId = this.getUserId();
        
        // Event queue
        this.eventQueue = [];
        
        // Standard properties (sent with every event)
        this.standardProperties = {
            platform: this.detectPlatform(),
            screenResolution: `${window.screen.width}x${window.screen.height}`,
            gameVersion: config.gameVersion || '1.0.0',
            buildId: config.buildId || 'dev'
        };
        
        // Privacy
        this.optedOut = this.checkOptOut();
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        if (!this.config.enabled || this.optedOut) {
            console.log('[Analytics] Disabled');
            return;
        }
        
        // Start flush timer
        this.startFlushTimer();
        
        // Track session start
        this.trackEvent('session_start', {
            sessionId: this.sessionId,
            userId: this.userId
        });
        
        // Track page visibility changes
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
            if (document.hidden) {
                this.trackEvent('session_paused');
                this.flush(); // Flush events before tab is hidden
            } else {
                this.trackEvent('session_resumed');
            }
        });
        
        // Track session end on page unload
        window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
            this.trackEvent('session_end', {
                sessionDuration: Date.now() - this.sessionStartTime
            });
            this.flush(true); // Synchronous flush
        });
        
        console.log(`[Analytics] Initialized (session: ${this.sessionId})`);
    }
    
    // === EVENT TRACKING ===
    
    trackEvent(eventName, properties = {}) {
        if (!this.config.enabled || this.optedOut) return;
        
        // Check if event is allowed
        if (this.config.allowedEvents && !this.config.allowedEvents.includes(eventName)) {
            return;
        }
        
        const event = {
            eventName: eventName,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            sessionId: this.sessionId,
            userId: this.userId,
            properties: {
                ...this.standardProperties,
                ...properties
            }
        };
        
        this.eventQueue.push(event);
        
        if (this.config.debug) {
            console.log('[Analytics] Event:', event);
        }
        
        // Auto-flush if batch size reached
        if (this.eventQueue.length >= this.config.batchSize) {
            this.flush();
        }
    }
    
    // === STANDARD EVENTS ===
    
    trackScreenView(screenName, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('screen_view', {
            screenName,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackLevelStart(levelId, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('level_start', {
            levelId,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackLevelComplete(levelId, score, duration, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('level_complete', {
            levelId,
            score,
            duration,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackLevelFail(levelId, reason, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('level_fail', {
            levelId,
            reason,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackPurchase(itemId, price, currency = 'USD', properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('purchase', {
            itemId,
            price,
            currency,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackAchievement(achievementId, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('achievement_unlocked', {
            achievementId,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackError(errorType, errorMessage, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('error', {
            errorType,
            errorMessage,
            stackTrace: new Error().stack,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    trackTutorialStep(stepName, stepNumber, properties = {}) {
        this.trackEvent('tutorial_step', {
            stepName,
            stepNumber,
            ...properties
        });
    }
    
    // === USER PROPERTIES ===
    
    setUserProperty(key, value) {
        this.standardProperties[`user_${key}`] = value;
    }
    
    setUserProperties(properties) {
        Object.entries(properties).forEach(([key, value]) => {
            this.setUserProperty(key, value);
        });
    }
    
    // === FLUSHING ===
    
    async flush(synchronous = false) {
        if (this.eventQueue.length === 0) return;
        
        const events = [...this.eventQueue];
        this.eventQueue = [];
        
        const payload = {
            apiKey: this.config.apiKey,
            events: events
        };
        
        if (synchronous) {
            // Synchronous beacon (for page unload)
            navigator.sendBeacon(this.config.endpoint, JSON.stringify(payload));
        } else {
            // Asynchronous fetch
            try {
                const response = await fetch(this.config.endpoint, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(payload)
                });
                
                if (!response.ok) {
                    console.error('[Analytics] Failed to send events:', response.status);
                    // Re-queue events on failure
                    this.eventQueue.unshift(...events);
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('[Analytics] Network error:', error);
                // Re-queue events on error
                this.eventQueue.unshift(...events);
            }
        }
    }
    
    startFlushTimer() {
        this.flushTimer = setInterval(() => {
            this.flush();
        }, this.config.flushInterval);
    }
    
    stopFlushTimer() {
        if (this.flushTimer) {
            clearInterval(this.flushTimer);
        }
    }
    
    // === USER IDENTIFICATION ===
    
    getUserId() {
        // Get or generate persistent user ID
        let userId = localStorage.getItem('analytics_user_id');
        
        if (!userId) {
            userId = this.generateUserId();
            localStorage.setItem('analytics_user_id', userId);
        }
        
        return userId;
    }
    
    generateUserId() {
        return `user_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    generateSessionId() {
        return `session_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
    }
    
    // === PRIVACY ===
    
    checkOptOut() {
        return localStorage.getItem('analytics_opt_out') === 'true';
    }
    
    optOut() {
        this.optedOut = true;
        localStorage.setItem('analytics_opt_out', 'true');
        
        // Clear queued events
        this.eventQueue = [];
        
        console.log('[Analytics] User opted out');
    }
    
    optIn() {
        this.optedOut = false;
        localStorage.removeItem('analytics_opt_out');
        
        console.log('[Analytics] User opted in');
    }
    
    // === PLATFORM DETECTION ===
    
    detectPlatform() {
        const ua = navigator.userAgent;
        
        if (/Android/i.test(ua)) return 'Android';
        if (/iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(ua)) return 'iOS';
        if (/Windows/i.test(ua)) return 'Windows';
        if (/Mac/i.test(ua)) return 'macOS';
        if (/Linux/i.test(ua)) return 'Linux';
        
        return 'Unknown';
    }
    
    // === A/B TESTING ===
    
    assignVariant(experimentId, variants) {
        // Consistent variant assignment based on user ID
        const hash = this.hashString(this.userId + experimentId);
        const variantIndex = hash % variants.length;
        const variant = variants[variantIndex];
        
        this.trackEvent('experiment_assigned', {
            experimentId,
            variant
        });
        
        return variant;
    }
    
    hashString(str) {
        let hash = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) {
            const char = str.charCodeAt(i);
            hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + char;
            hash = hash & hash; // Convert to 32bit integer
        }
        return Math.abs(hash);
    }
    
    // === UTILITIES ===
    
    enable() {
        this.config.enabled = true;
    }
    
    disable() {
        this.config.enabled = false;
        this.stopFlushTimer();
    }
    
    getSessionId() {
        return this.sessionId;
    }
    
    getUserId() {
        return this.userId;
    }
    
    getQueueSize() {
        return this.eventQueue.length;
    }
}

export default AnalyticsSystem;
TOOL 30: AUTOMATED TESTING FRAMEWORK
Complete Implementation
javascript
// systems/TestingFramework.js

class TestingFramework {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Test suites
        this.suites = new Map();
        
        // Test results
        this.results = {
            passed: 0,
            failed: 0,
            skipped: 0,
            total: 0,
            duration: 0
        };
        
        // Current test context
        this.currentSuite = null;
        this.currentTest = null;
        
        // Assertions
        this.assertions = [];
        
        // Performance benchmarks
        this.benchmarks = new Map();
        
        // Recording
        this.recording = false;
        this.recordedActions = [];
        
        // Coverage (simplified)
        this.coverage = {
            functions: new Set(),
            lines: new Set()
        };
        
        this.initialize();
    }
    
    initialize() {
        console.log('[Testing] Framework initialized');
    }
    
    // === TEST SUITE DEFINITION ===
    
    describe(suiteName, callback) {
        const suite = {
            name: suiteName,
            tests: [],
            beforeEach: null,
            afterEach: null,
            beforeAll: null,
            afterAll: null
        };
        
        this.suites.set(suiteName, suite);
        this.currentSuite = suite;
        
        // Execute suite definition
        callback();
        
        this.currentSuite = null;
        
        return suite;
    }
    
    it(testName, callback) {
        if (!this.currentSuite) {
            throw new Error('Test must be defined within a suite (describe block)');
        }
        
        const test = {
            name: testName,
            callback: callback,
            status: 'pending',
            error: null,
            duration: 0
        };
        
        this.currentSuite.tests.push(test);
        
        return test;
    }
    
    beforeEach(callback) {
        if (this.currentSuite) {
            this.currentSuite.beforeEach = callback;
        }
    }
    
    afterEach(callback) {
        if (this.currentSuite) {
            this.currentSuite.afterEach = callback;
        }
    }
    
    beforeAll(callback) {
        if (this.currentSuite) {
            this.currentSuite.beforeAll = callback;
        }
    }
    
    afterAll(callback) {
        if (this.currentSuite) {
            this.currentSuite.afterAll = callback;
        }
    }
    
    // === TEST EXECUTION ===
    
    async runAll() {
        console.log('[Testing] Running all test suites...');
        
        this.resetResults();
        
        const startTime = Date.now();
        
        for (const [suiteName, suite] of this.suites) {
            await this.runSuite(suite);
        }
        
        this.results.duration = Date.now() - startTime;
        
        this.printResults();
        
        return this.results;
    }
    
    async runSuite(suite) {
        console.log(`\n[Suite] ${suite.name}`);
        
        // Run beforeAll
        if (suite.beforeAll) {
            await suite.beforeAll();
        }
        
        // Run tests
        for (const test of suite.tests) {
            await this.runTest(suite, test);
        }
        
        // Run afterAll
        if (suite.afterAll) {
            await suite.afterAll();
        }
    }
    
    async runTest(suite, test) {
        this.currentTest = test;
        this.results.total++;
        
        const startTime = Date.now();
        
        try {
            // Run beforeEach
            if (suite.beforeEach) {
                await suite.beforeEach();
            }
            
            // Run test
            await test.callback();
            
            // Run afterEach
            if (suite.afterEach) {
                await suite.afterEach();
            }
            
            test.status = 'passed';
            test.duration = Date.now() - startTime;
            this.results.passed++;
            
            console.log(`  ✓ ${test.name} (${test.duration}ms)`);
        } catch (error) {
            test.status = 'failed';
            test.error = error;
            test.duration = Date.now() - startTime;
            this.results.failed++;
            
            console.error(`  ✗ ${test.name}`);
            console.error(`    ${error.message}`);
            
            if (error.stack) {
                console.error(`    ${error.stack}`);
            }
        }
        
        this.currentTest = null;
    }
    
    // === ASSERTIONS ===
    
    expect(actual) {
        return {
            toBe: (expected) => {
                if (actual !== expected) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${actual} to be ${expected}`);
                }
            },
            
            toEqual: (expected) => {
                if (JSON.stringify(actual) !== JSON.stringify(expected)) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${JSON.stringify(actual)} to equal ${JSON.stringify(expected)}`);
                }
            },
            
            toBeTruthy: () => {
                if (!actual) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${actual} to be truthy`);
                }
            },
            
            toBeFalsy: () => {
                if (actual) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${actual} to be falsy`);
                }
            },
            
            toBeGreaterThan: (expected) => {
                if (actual <= expected) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${actual} to be greater than ${expected}`);
                }
            },
            
            toBeLessThan: (expected) => {
                if (actual >= expected) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${actual} to be less than ${expected}`);
                }
            },
            
            toContain: (item) => {
                if (!actual.includes(item)) {
                    throw new Error(`Expected ${actual} to contain ${item}`);
                }
            },
            
            toThrow: () => {
                try {
                    actual();
                    throw new Error('Expected function to throw an error');
                } catch (error) {
                    // Expected
                }
            }
        };
    }
    
    // === PERFORMANCE BENCHMARKING ===
    
    benchmark(name, callback, iterations = 1000) {
        const times = [];
        
        for (let i = 0; i < iterations; i++) {
            const start = performance.now();
            callback();
            const end = performance.now();
            times.push(end - start);
        }
        
        const avg = times.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / times.length;
        const min = Math.min(...times);
        const max = Math.max(...times);
        
        const result = {
            name: name,
            iterations: iterations,
            avgTime: avg,
            minTime: min,
            maxTime: max,
            totalTime: times.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0)
        };
        
        this.benchmarks.set(name, result);
        
        console.log(`[Benchmark] ${name}: avg ${avg.toFixed(3)}ms, min ${min.toFixed(3)}ms, max ${max.toFixed(3)}ms`);
        
        return result;
    }
    
    getBenchmark(name) {
        return this.benchmarks.get(name);
    }
    
    // === PLAYBACK TESTING ===
    
    startRecording() {
        this.recording = true;
        this.recordedActions = [];
        
        // Record input events
        this.scene.input.on('pointerdown', this.recordPointerDown, this);
        this.scene.input.on('pointerup', this.recordPointerUp, this);
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown', this.recordKeyDown, this);
        this.scene.input.keyboard.on('keyup', this.recordKeyUp, this);
        
        console.log('[Testing] Recording started');
    }
    
    stopRecording() {
        this.recording = false;
        
        // Stop recording events
        this.scene.input.off('pointerdown', this.recordPointerDown, this);
        this.scene.input.off('pointerup', this.recordPointerUp, this);
        this.scene.input.keyboard.off('keydown', this.recordKeyDown, this);
        this.scene.input.keyboard.off('keyup', this.recordKeyUp, this);
        
        console.log(`[Testing] Recording stopped (${this.recordedActions.length} actions)`);
        
        return this.recordedActions;
    }
    
    recordPointerDown(pointer) {
        this.recordedActions.push({
            type: 'pointerdown',
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            x: pointer.x,
            y: pointer.y
        });
    }
    
    recordPointerUp(pointer) {
        this.recordedActions.push({
            type: 'pointerup',
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            x: pointer.x,
            y: pointer.y
        });
    }
    
    recordKeyDown(event) {
        this.recordedActions.push({
            type: 'keydown',
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            key: event.key,
            code: event.code
        });
    }
    
    recordKeyUp(event) {
        this.recordedActions.push({
            type: 'keyup',
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            key: event.key,
            code: event.code
        });
    }
    
    async playback(actions, speed = 1.0) {
        console.log(`[Testing] Playing back ${actions.length} actions...`);
        
        const startTime = actions[0].timestamp;
        
        for (let i = 0; i < actions.length; i++) {
            const action = actions[i];
            const nextAction = actions[i + 1];
            
            // Simulate action
            this.simulateAction(action);
            
            // Wait for next action (scaled by speed)
            if (nextAction) {
                const delay = (nextAction.timestamp - action.timestamp) / speed;
                await this.wait(delay);
            }
        }
        
        console.log('[Testing] Playback complete');
    }
    
    simulateAction(action) {
        if (action.type === 'pointerdown') {
            this.scene.input.emit('pointerdown', {
                x: action.x,
                y: action.y,
                leftButtonDown: () => true
            });
        } else if (action.type === 'pointerup') {
            this.scene.input.emit('pointerup', {
                x: action.x,
                y: action.y
            });
        } else if (action.type === 'keydown') {
            this.scene.input.keyboard.emit('keydown', {
                key: action.key,
                code: action.code
            });
        } else if (action.type === 'keyup') {
            this.scene.input.keyboard.emit('keyup', {
                key: action.key,
                code: action.code
            });
        }
    }
    
    wait(ms) {
        return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
    }
    
    // === RESULTS ===
    
    resetResults() {
        this.results = {
            passed: 0,
            failed: 0,
            skipped: 0,
            total: 0,
            duration: 0
        };
    }
    
    printResults() {
        console.log('\n=================================');
        console.log('TEST RESULTS');
        console.log('=================================');
        console.log(`Total: ${this.results.total}`);
        console.log(`Passed: ${this.results.passed} ✓`);
        console.log(`Failed: ${this.results.failed} ✗`);
        console.log(`Duration: ${this.results.duration}ms`);
        console.log('=================================\n');
    }
    
    exportResults() {
        const report = {
            summary: this.results,
            suites: []
        };
        
        this.suites.forEach((suite, name) => {
            report.suites.push({
                name: name,
                tests: suite.tests.map(test => ({
                    name: test.name,
                    status: test.status,
                    duration: test.duration,
                    error: test.error ? test.error.message : null
                }))
            });
        });
        
        return JSON.stringify(report, null, 2);
    }
}

export default TestingFramework;
Usage Example:

javascript
// tests/game.test.js

const testing = new TestingFramework(scene);

// Define test suite
testing.describe('Player Movement', () => {
    let player;
    
    testing.beforeEach(() => {
        player = scene.add.sprite(100, 100, 'player');
    });
    
    testing.afterEach(() => {
        player.destroy();
    });
    
    testing.it('should move right when D key is pressed', () => {
        const startX = player.x;
        
        // Simulate key press
        scene.input.keyboard.emit('keydown', { code: 'KeyD' });
        scene.update(0, 16);
        
        testing.expect(player.x).toBeGreaterThan(startX);
    });
    
    testing.it('should not move when locked', () => {
        player.locked = true;
        const startX = player.x;
        
        scene.input.keyboard.emit('keydown', { code: 'KeyD' });
        scene.update(0, 16);
        
        testing.expect(player.x).toBe(startX);
    });
});

// Run all tests
testing.runAll();

// Benchmark
testing.benchmark('Particle System Update', () => {
    particleSystem.update(16);
}, 1000);

PART 1: ARCHITECTURE OVERVIEW
The Integration Strategy
We'll build Verdance using a layered architecture where each tool layer supports the layers above it:

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    VERDANCE GAME                        │
│         (Sap Cycle Mechanics, Combat, Story)            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                         ↑ Uses
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              GAME-SPECIFIC SYSTEMS                      │
│   (Deep Sap Pool, Sap Cycles, Spell System, AI)        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                         ↑ Uses
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│            SPECIALIZED TOOLS (11-20)                    │

                         ↑ Uses

└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                         ↑ Uses

PART 2: PROJECT STRUCTURE
File Organization (Like Unity's Project Structure)
verdance/
├── src/
│   ├── main.js                          # Entry point (like Unity's startup scene)
│   │
│   ├── config/                          # Game configuration
│   │   ├── GameConfig.js                # Main game config (resolution, physics, etc.)
│   │   ├── Constants.js                 # Game constants (like Unity's ProjectSettings)
│   │   └── AssetManifest.js             # Asset addresses for Addressables
│   │
│   ├── scenes/                          # Game scenes (like Unity scenes)
│   │   ├── BootScene.js                 # Initial loading (Tool 26: Addressables)
│   │   ├── MainMenuScene.js             # Main menu
│   │   ├── GameScene.js                 # Main gameplay scene
│   │   ├── BattleScene.js               # Combat encounters
│   │   └── EditorScene.js               # In-game editor (Tool 15: Scene Editor)
│   │
│   ├── systems/                         # Core game systems (like Unity's MonoBehaviours)
│   │   ├── SapCycleSystem.js            # Verdance's unique mechanic
│   │   ├── DeepSapPoolSystem.js         # DSP resource management
│   │   ├── SpellSystem.js               # Magic system
│   │   ├── CombatSystem.js              # Turn-based combat
│   │   ├── AISystem.js                  # Enemy AI
