PART 3: INITIALIZATION SEQUENCE
How Everything Boots Up (Like Unity's Awake/Start Order)
Step 1: Entry Point (src/main.js)
javascript
// src/main.js

import Phaser from 'phaser';
import BootScene from './scenes/BootScene.js';
import MainMenuScene from './scenes/MainMenuScene.js';
import GameScene from './scenes/GameScene.js';
import EditorScene from './scenes/EditorScene.js';
import GameConfig from './config/GameConfig.js';

// Initialize Phaser game (like Unity's Application.Initialize)
const game = new Phaser.Game({
    ...GameConfig,
    scene: [
        BootScene,      // Loads critical assets
        MainMenuScene,  // Main menu
        GameScene,      // Main gameplay
        EditorScene     // Dev tools
    ]
});

// Global access (like Unity's static classes)
window.game = game;

// Development mode detection
if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
    console.log('[Verdance] Development mode enabled');
    
    // Enable hot reload (Tool 22)
    if (import.meta.hot) {
        import.meta.hot.accept();
    }
}
Step 2: Boot Scene (src/scenes/BootScene.js)
javascript
// src/scenes/BootScene.js

import AddressablesSystem from '../systems/AddressablesSystem.js';
import LocalizationSystem from '../systems/LocalizationSystem.js';
import AnalyticsSystem from '../systems/AnalyticsSystem.js';
import HotReloadSystem from '../systems/HotReloadSystem.js';
import PerformanceProfiler from '../tools/PerformanceProfiler.js';

export default class BootScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    constructor() {
        super('BootScene');
    }
    
    preload() {
        // Show loading screen
        this.createLoadingScreen();
        
        // Load essential assets
        this.load.image('logo', 'assets/ui/logo.png');
        this.load.json('asset_manifest', 'assets/asset_manifest.json');
        
        // Track loading progress
        this.load.on('progress', (value) => {
            this.updateLoadingBar(value);
        });
    }
    
    create() {
        // === INITIALIZE CORE SYSTEMS (Order matters!) ===
        
        // 1. Addressables (Tool 26) - Must be first for dynamic asset loading
        this.addressables = new AddressablesSystem(this);
        const manifest = this.cache.json.get('asset_manifest');
        this.addressables.importCatalog(JSON.stringify(manifest));
        
        // 2. Localization (Tool 28) - Load language files
        this.localization = new LocalizationSystem(this);
        await this.localization.loadLanguage('en');
        
        // 3. Analytics (Tool 29) - Track session
        this.analytics = new AnalyticsSystem(this, {
            enabled: true,
            gameVersion: '1.0.0',
            endpoint: 'https://analytics.verdance.game/events'
        });
        this.analytics.trackEvent('game_boot');
        
        // 4. Performance Profiler (Tool 24) - Monitor performance
        if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
            this.profiler = new PerformanceProfiler(this);
            this.profiler.enable();
        }
        
        // 5. Hot Reload (Tool 22) - Development only
        if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
            this.hotReload = new HotReloadSystem(this);
        }
        
        // === MAKE SYSTEMS GLOBALLY ACCESSIBLE ===
        this.registry.set('addressables', this.addressables);
        this.registry.set('localization', this.localization);
        this.registry.set('analytics', this.analytics);
        
        // === TRANSITION TO MAIN MENU ===
        this.analytics.trackScreenView('main_menu');
        this.scene.start('MainMenuScene');
    }
    
    createLoadingScreen() {
        const { width, height } = this.scale;
        
        // Background
        this.add.rectangle(width / 2, height / 2, width, height, 0x0a0a0a);
        
        // Loading bar
        this.loadingBar = this.add.graphics();
        this.loadingBarBg = this.add.rectangle(
            width / 2, height / 2,
            400, 30,
            0x333333
        );
        
        // Loading text
        this.loadingText = this.add.text(
            width / 2, height / 2 - 50,
            'Loading Verdance...',
            { font: '20px Arial', fill: '#ffffff' }
        );
        this.loadingText.setOrigin(0.5);
    }
    
    updateLoadingBar(progress) {
        const { width, height } = this.scale;
        
        this.loadingBar.clear();
        this.loadingBar.fillStyle(0x44ff88, 1);
        this.loadingBar.fillRect(
            width / 2 - 200,
            height / 2 - 15,
            400 * progress,
            30
        );
    }
}
Step 3: Game Scene (src/scenes/GameScene.js)
javascript
// src/scenes/GameScene.js

import SapCycleSystem from '../systems/SapCycleSystem.js';
import DeepSapPoolSystem from '../systems/DeepSapPoolSystem.js';
import CombatSystem from '../systems/CombatSystem.js';
import ProgressionSystem from '../systems/ProgressionSystem.js';
import DialogueSystem from '../systems/DialogueSystem.js';
import SaveSystem from '../systems/SaveSystem.js';
import LevelStreamingSystem from '../systems/LevelStreamingSystem.js';
import PrefabSystem from '../prefabs/PrefabSystem.js';
import Player from '../entities/Player.js';

export default class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    constructor() {
        super('GameScene');
    }
    
    create() {
        // === GET GLOBAL SYSTEMS ===
        this.addressables = this.registry.get('addressables');
        this.localization = this.registry.get('localization');
        this.analytics = this.registry.get('analytics');
        
        // === INITIALIZE GAME SYSTEMS ===
        
        // Tool 20: Prefab System
        this.prefabSystem = new PrefabSystem(this);
        
        // Tool 27: Level Streaming
        this.levelStreaming = new LevelStreamingSystem(this);
        this.levelStreaming.addressables = this.addressables;
        this.levelStreaming.defineChunkGrid(10, 1000, (col, row) => {
            // Define assets per chunk
            return [
                `tiles.terrain.chunk_${col}_${row}`,
                `enemies.zone_${row}`
            ];
        });
        
        // Verdance-specific systems
        this.sapCycleSystem = new SapCycleSystem(this);
        this.deepSapPool = new DeepSapPoolSystem(this, this.sapCycleSystem);
        this.combatSystem = new CombatSystem(this, this.deepSapPool);
        
        // Tool 9: Progression System
        this.progressionSystem = new ProgressionSystem(this);
        
        // Tool 8: Dialogue System
        this.dialogueSystem = new DialogueSystem(this);
        
        // Tool 14: Save System
        this.saveSystem = new SaveSystem(this);
        this.setupSaveCollectors();
        
        // === CREATE WORLD ===
        this.createWorld();
        
        // === CREATE PLAYER ===
        this.player = new Player(this, 400, 300);
        this.cameras.main.startFollow(this.player.sprite);
        
        // === SETUP INPUT ===
        this.setupInput();
        
        // === TRACK ANALYTICS ===
        this.analytics.trackLevelStart('tutorial_zone');
    }
    
    createWorld() {
        // Load initial chunks
        this.levelStreaming.preloadChunks([
            'chunk_0_0',
            'chunk_1_0',
            'chunk_0_1'
        ]);
        
        // Create tilemap (Tool 19)
        const mapData = this.cache.json.get('map_tutorial');
        this.createTilemapFromData(mapData);
    }
    
    createTilemapFromData(mapData) {
        // Create tilemap from Tool 19 (Tilemap Editor) export
        const { gridConfig, layers } = mapData;
        
        this.map = this.make.tilemap({
            width: 100,
            height: 100,
            tileWidth: gridConfig.cellWidth,
            tileHeight: gridConfig.cellHeight
        });
        
        const tileset = this.map.addTilesetImage('terrain', 'terrain_tiles');
        
        layers.forEach(layerData => {
            const layer = this.map.createBlankLayer(layerData.name, tileset);
            
            layerData.tiles.forEach(tile => {
                layer.putTileAt(tile.tileId, tile.x, tile.y);
            });
        });
    }
    
    setupSaveCollectors() {
        // Register save data collectors (Tool 14)
        this.saveSystem.registerCollector('player', 
            // Collect
            () => ({
                x: this.player.sprite.x,
                y: this.player.sprite.y,
                health: this.player.health,
                level: this.player.level,
                sapPool: this.deepSapPool.getCurrentSap()
            }),
            // Restore
            (data) => {
                this.player.sprite.setPosition(data.x, data.y);
                this.player.health = data.health;
                this.player.level = data.level;
                this.deepSapPool.setSap(data.sapPool);
            }
        );
        
        this.saveSystem.registerCollector('sapCycle',
            () => ({ currentPhase: this.sapCycleSystem.currentPhase }),
            (data) => { this.sapCycleSystem.setPhase(data.currentPhase); }
        );
        
        this.saveSystem.registerCollector('quests',
            () => this.progressionSystem.exportState(),
            (data) => this.progressionSystem.importState(data)
        );
    }
    
    setupInput() {
        // F5: Quick save
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F5', () => {
            this.saveSystem.quickSave();
        });
        
        // F9: Quick load
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F9', () => {
            this.saveSystem.quickLoad();
        });
        
        // F1: Toggle profiler (development)
        if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
            this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F1', () => {
                const profiler = this.registry.get('profiler');
                if (profiler) profiler.toggle();
            });
        }
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        // Update player
        this.player.update(time, delta);
        
        // Update level streaming based on player position
        this.levelStreaming.setPlayerPosition(
            this.player.sprite.x,
            this.player.sprite.y
        );
        
        // Update Sap Cycle
        this.sapCycleSystem.update(delta);
        
        // Update Deep Sap Pool
        this.deepSapPool.update(delta);
    }
}
PART 4: WORKFLOW EXAMPLES
Example 1: Creating an Enemy Using All Tools
Step 1: Design Enemy Data (Tool 1: Data-Driven)
json
// data/enemies/goblin_warrior.json
{
    "id": "goblin_warrior",
    "name": "Goblin Warrior",
    "type": "melee",
    "stats": {
        "health": 50,
        "attack": 12,
        "defense": 8,
        "speed": 15
    },
    "ai": {
        "behavior": "aggressive",
        "detectionRange": 200,
        "attackRange": 50
    },
    "loot": {
        "gold": { "min": 10, "max": 25 },
        "items": ["health_potion", "rusty_sword"]
    },
    "sprite": {
        "texture": "enemies.goblin",
        "animations": {
            "idle": { "start": 0, "end": 3, "frameRate": 8 },
            "walk": { "start": 4, "end": 7, "frameRate": 12 },
            "attack": { "start": 8, "end": 11, "frameRate": 16 }
        }
    },
    "collision": {
        "type": "circle",
        "radius": 16
    }
}
Step 2: Create Sprite Sheet (Tool 16: Sprite Slicer)
javascript
// In EditorScene
const slicer = new SpriteSheetSlicer(this);
slicer.open();

// 1. Import goblin sprite sheet
slicer.loadImage('goblin_spritesheet');

// 2. Auto-slice by grid (32x32 cells)
slicer.sliceByGrid();

// 3. Set pivot points for each frame
// 4. Export sprite data
const spriteData = slicer.exportSlices();
// Saves to: spritesheet_goblin_spritesheet.json
Step 3: Create Animation (Tool 18: Animation Clip Creator)
javascript
// In EditorScene
const animCreator = new AnimationClipCreator(this);
animCreator.open();

// Load goblin sprite
const goblin = this.add.sprite(400, 300, 'goblin_spritesheet', 0);
animCreator.setTargetObject(goblin);

// Create "walk" animation
// 1. Add Transform track
// 2. Add Sprite Frame track
// 3. Set keyframes at 0s, 0.25s, 0.5s, 0.75s with frames 4, 5, 6, 7
// 4. Set loop to true
// 5. Export

const walkAnim = animCreator.exportClip();
// Saves to: animclip_goblin_walk.json
Step 4: Setup Collision (Tool 21: Collision Editor)
javascript
// In EditorScene
const collisionEditor = new VisualCollisionEditor(this);

// Add circle collider to goblin
const collider = collisionEditor.addCircleCollider(goblin, 16, { x: 0, y: 0 });

// Enter edit mode to adjust
collisionEditor.enterEditMode(goblin, collider);

// Drag handles to resize, adjust offset
// When done, collision data is saved in goblin's components
Step 5: Create Prefab (Tool 20: Prefab System)
javascript
// In EditorScene or GameScene
const prefabSystem = new PrefabSystem(this);

// Create goblin scene object
const goblinObject = this.createSceneObject('sprite', { x: 0, y: 0 });

// Add sprite component
goblinObject.addComponent('sprite', {
    texture: 'goblin_spritesheet',
    frame: 0
});

// Add collider component
goblinObject.addComponent('collider', {
    type: 'circle',
    radius: 16
});

// Add AI component
goblinObject.addComponent('ai', {
    behavior: 'aggressive',
    detectionRange: 200
});

// Add health component
goblinObject.addComponent('health', {
    current: 50,
    max: 50
});

// Create prefab
const goblinPrefab = prefabSystem.createPrefab(goblinObject, 'goblin_warrior');
// Saves to prefab registry
Step 6: Register with Addressables (Tool 26)
javascript
// In asset manifest or bootstrap
addressables.registerAsset(
    'enemies.goblin_warrior',
    'prefab',
    'prefabs/enemies/goblin_warrior.json',
    {
        size: 2048,
        bundle: 'enemies',
        dependencies: [
            'sprites.goblin_spritesheet',
            'anims.goblin_walk'
        ]
    }
);
Step 7: Spawn in Game
javascript
// In GameScene
async spawnGoblin(x, y) {
    // Load prefab via addressables
    const goblinPrefabData = await this.addressables.loadAsset('enemies.goblin_warrior');
    
    // Instantiate prefab
    const goblin = this.prefabSystem.instantiate(goblinPrefab.id, { x, y });
    
    // Add to scene
    this.enemies.push(goblin);
    
    // Track analytics
    this.analytics.trackEvent('enemy_spawned', {
        enemyType: 'goblin_warrior',
        location: { x, y }
    });
    
    return goblin;
}
Example 2: Creating a Quest Using Multiple Tools
Step 1: Design Quest (Tool 9: Quest System + Tool 1: Data-Driven)
json
// data/quests/the_lost_artifact.json
{
    "id": "quest_lost_artifact",
    "name": "The Lost Artifact",
    "description": "Recover the ancient artifact from the Darkwood Forest",
    "questGiver": "npc_elder_sage",
    "objectives": [
        {
            "id": "obj_1",
            "type": "goto",
            "description": "Travel to Darkwood Forest",
            "location": { "x": 2000, "y": 1500 },
            "radius": 100
        },
        {
            "id": "obj_2",
            "type": "kill",
            "description": "Defeat the Forest Guardian",
            "target": "enemy_forest_guardian",
            "count": 1
        },
        {
            "id": "obj_3",
            "type": "collect",
            "description": "Retrieve the Ancient Artifact",
            "item": "item_ancient_artifact",
            "count": 1
        },
        {
            "id": "obj_4",
            "type": "return",
            "description": "Return to Elder Sage",
            "npc": "npc_elder_sage"
        }
    ],
    "rewards": {
        "experience": 500,
        "gold": 250,
        "items": ["item_sage_staff"],
        "reputation": { "faction": "verdant_circle", "amount": 50 }
    },
    "requirements": {
        "level": 5,
        "prerequisiteQuests": ["quest_tutorial_complete"]
    }
}
Step 2: Create Dialogue (Tool 11: Visual Dialogue Editor + Tool 8: Dialogue System)
javascript
// Using Visual Dialogue Editor
const dialogueEditor = new VisualDialogueEditor(this);
dialogueEditor.open();

// Create dialogue tree for Elder Sage
const questDialogue = dialogueEditor.createDialogue('elder_sage_lost_artifact');

// Node 1: Greeting
const greetingNode = dialogueEditor.addNode('dialogue', {
    speaker: 'Elder Sage',
    text: 'Greetings, {playerName}. I sense great power within you.',
    position: { x: 100, y: 100 }
});

// Node 2: Quest Offer
const offerNode = dialogueEditor.addNode('dialogue', {
    speaker: 'Elder Sage',
    text: 'An ancient artifact has been lost in Darkwood Forest. Will you retrieve it?',
    position: { x: 300, y: 100 }
});

// Node 3: Choice
const choiceNode = dialogueEditor.addNode('choice', {
    choices: [
        { text: 'I will help you', nextNode: 'accept' },
        { text: 'Not right now', nextNode: 'decline' }
    ],
    position: { x: 500, y: 100 }
});

// Node 4a: Accept
const acceptNode = dialogueEditor.addNode('dialogue', {
    speaker: 'Elder Sage',
    text: 'Thank you, brave one. May the forest guide your path.',
    actions: [
        { type: 'startQuest', questId: 'quest_lost_artifact' }
    ],
    position: { x: 700, y: 50 }
});

// Node 4b: Decline
const declineNode = dialogueEditor.addNode('dialogue', {
    speaker: 'Elder Sage',
    text: 'I understand. Return when you are ready.',
    position: { x: 700, y: 150 }
});

// Connect nodes
dialogueEditor.connectNodes(greetingNode.id, 'next', offerNode.id, 'in');
dialogueEditor.connectNodes(offerNode.id, 'next', choiceNode.id, 'in');
dialogueEditor.connectNodes(choiceNode.id, 'choice_0', acceptNode.id, 'in');
dialogueEditor.connectNodes(choiceNode.id, 'choice_1', declineNode.id, 'in');

// Export
const dialogueData = dialogueEditor.exportDialogue();
// Saves to: dialogues/elder_sage_lost_artifact.json

Step 4: Implement Quest in Game
javascript
// In GameScene.js

// Load quest data
const questData = await this.addressables.loadAsset('quests.lost_artifact');

// Register with progression system
this.progressionSystem.registerQuest(questData);

// Listen for quest events
this.progressionSystem.events.on('quest_started', (questId) => {
    if (questId === 'quest_lost_artifact') {
        // Show quest notification
        this.showNotification(
            this.localization.get('quest.lost_artifact.name'),
            this.localization.get('quest.lost_artifact.description')
        );
        
        // Track analytics
        this.analytics.trackEvent('quest_started', { questId });
    }
});

this.progressionSystem.events.on('quest_completed', (questId, rewards) => {
    if (questId === 'quest_lost_artifact') {
        // Show completion screen
        this.showQuestComplete(questId, rewards);
        
        // Give rewards
        this.player.addExperience(rewards.experience);
        this.player.addGold(rewards.gold);
        
        // Track analytics
        this.analytics.trackEvent('quest_completed', { 
            questId,
            rewards
        });
    }
});

// Track objective progress
this.events.on('enemy_killed', (enemyType) => {
    this.progressionSystem.updateObjective('kill', { target: enemyType });
});

this.events.on('item_collected', (itemId) => {
    this.progressionSystem.updateObjective('collect', { item: itemId });
});

this.events.on('location_reached', (location) => {
    this.progressionSystem.updateObjective('goto', { location });
});

            "duration": 10
        },

            "type": "particle",
            "effect": "shield_burst"

PART 6: TESTING INTEGRATION
How All Tools Work Together in Testing
javascript
// tests/integration/quest-system.test.js

import TestingFramework from '../../src/tools/TestingFramework.js';
import GameScene from '../../src/scenes/GameScene.js';

const testing = new TestingFramework(scene);

testing.describe('Quest System Integration', () => {
    let scene;
    let player;
    let progressionSystem;
    let dialogueSystem;
    let addressables;
    
    testing.beforeAll(async () => {
        // Initialize scene with all systems
        scene = new GameScene();
        await scene.create();
        
        player = scene.player;
        progressionSystem = scene.progressionSystem;
        dialogueSystem = scene.dialogueSystem;
        addressables = scene.addressables;
    });
    
    testing.it('should load quest from addressables', async () => {
        const questData = await addressables.loadAsset('quests.lost_artifact');
        
        testing.expect(questData).toBeTruthy();
        testing.expect(questData.id).toBe('quest_lost_artifact');
        testing.expect(questData.objectives.length).toBe(4);
    });
    
    testing.it('should start quest when dialogue completes', async () => {
        // Load dialogue
        const dialogueData = await addressables.loadAsset('dialogues.elder_sage_lost_artifact');
        
        // Start dialogue
        dialogueSystem.startDialogue(dialogueData);
        
        // Simulate player choosing "Accept"
        dialogueSystem.selectChoice(0);
        
        // Quest should now be active
        const activeQuests = progressionSystem.getActiveQuests();
        testing.expect(activeQuests.length).toBe(1);
        testing.expect(activeQuests[0].id).toBe('quest_lost_artifact');
    });
    
    testing.it('should track objective progress', () => {
        // Simulate reaching location
        player.sprite.setPosition(2000, 1500);
        scene.events.emit('location_reached', { x: 2000, y: 1500 });
        
        // Check objective 1 completed
        const quest = progressionSystem.getQuest('quest_lost_artifact');
        testing.expect(quest.objectives[0].completed).toBe(true);
    });
    
    testing.it('should save/load quest progress', async () => {
        // Save game
        await scene.saveSystem.save(1);
        
        // Modify quest state
        progressionSystem.completeObjective('quest_lost_artifact', 'obj_2');
        
        // Load game
        await scene.saveSystem.load(1);
        
        // Quest state should be restored
        const quest = progressionSystem.getQuest('quest_lost_artifact');
        testing.expect(quest.objectives[1].completed).toBe(false);
    });
    
    testing.it('should localize quest text', () => {
        const localization = scene.localization;
        
        // English
        localization.setLanguage('en');
        const nameEN = localization.get('quest.lost_artifact.name');
        testing.expect(nameEN).toBe('The Lost Artifact');
        
        // Spanish
        localization.setLanguage('es');
        const nameES = localization.get('quest.lost_artifact.name');
        testing.expect(nameES).toBe('El Artefacto Perdido');
    });
    
    testing.it('should track analytics', () => {
        const analytics = scene.analytics;
        
        // Start quest
        progressionSystem.startQuest('quest_lost_artifact');
        
        // Check event was tracked
        const events = analytics.eventQueue;
        const questStartEvent = events.find(e => e.eventName === 'quest_started');
        
        testing.expect(questStartEvent).toBeTruthy();
        testing.expect(questStartEvent.properties.questId).toBe('quest_lost_artifact');
    });
});

// Run tests
testing.runAll();

Implementing Verdance's Sap Cycle System Using All Tools
Tool 1: Data-Driven Architecture
json
// data/sap_cycles/blue_phase.json
{
    "id": "phase_blue",
    "name": "Blue Sap",
    "color": "#4488ff",
    "duration": 120000,
    "effects": {
        "damageMultiplier": 1.2,
        "healingMultiplier": 0.8,
        "movementSpeed": 1.0
    },
    "transitions": {
        "next": "phase_crimson",
        "warning": 10000
    },
    "visualEffects": {
        "ambientLight": "#6699ff",
        "particleEffect": "blue_sap_ambient"
    }
}
Tool 3: Advanced Lighting
javascript
// systems/SapCycleSystem.js

updateLighting(phase) {
    const phaseData = this.phases.get(phase);
    
    // Use Tool 3: Advanced Lighting
    this.lightingSystem.setAmbientColor(phaseData.visualEffects.ambientLight);
    this.lightingSystem.setAmbientIntensity(0.6);
    
    // Add phase-specific lights
    this.sapLights.forEach(light => light.destroy());
    this.sapLights = [];
    
    // Create pulsing sap lights
    for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
        const x = Phaser.Math.Between(0, this.scene.scale.width);
        const y = Phaser.Math.Between(0, this.scene.scale.height);
        
        const light = this.lightingSystem.createLight({
            x: x,
            y: y,
            radius: 100,
            color: phaseData.color,
            intensity: 0.8
        });
        
        // Pulsing animation
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: light,
            intensity: 0.3,
            duration: 2000,
            yoyo: true,
            repeat: -1
        });
        
        this.sapLights.push(light);
    }
}
Tool 4: Advanced Particle System
javascript
createPhaseTransitionEffect(fromPhase, toPhase) {
    // Use Tool 4: Particle System
    const particleConfig = {
        texture: 'sap_particle',
        lifespan: { min: 1000, max: 2000 },
        speed: { min: 50, max: 150 },
        scale: { start: 1.0, end: 0 },
        alpha: { start: 1, end: 0 },
        emitZone: {
            type: 'random',
            source: new Phaser.Geom.Circle(0, 0, 300)
        },
        tint: [
            this.phases.get(fromPhase).color,
            this.phases.get(toPhase).color
        ],
        blendMode: 'ADD'
    };
    
    const emitter = this.particleSystem.createEmitter(
        this.scene.scale.width / 2,
        this.scene.scale.height / 2,
        particleConfig
    );
    
    emitter.explode(100);
    
    // Destroy after particles fade
    this.scene.time.delayedCall(2000, () => {
        emitter.destroy();
    });
}
Tool 10: UI Framework
javascript
// ui/SapCycleHUD.js

class SapCycleHUD {
    constructor(scene, sapCycleSystem) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.sapCycle = sapCycleSystem;
        
        // Use Tool 10: UI Framework
        this.container = this.scene.add.container(10, 10);
        this.container.setDepth(10000);
        this.container.setScrollFactor(0);
        
        this.createPhaseIndicator();
        this.createTimerBar();
        this.createEffectsList();
        
        // Listen for phase changes
        this.sapCycle.events.on('phase-changed', (newPhase) => {
            this.onPhaseChanged(newPhase);
        });
    }
    
    createPhaseIndicator() {
        // Current phase display
        this.phaseBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 0, 150, 40, 0x000000, 0.7);
        this.phaseBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.phaseBg);
        
        this.phaseIcon = this.scene.add.image(20, 20, 'icon_sap');
        this.container.add(this.phaseIcon);
        
        this.phaseText = this.scene.add.text(45, 20, 'Blue Sap', {
            font: 'bold 14px Arial',
            fill: '#ffffff'
        });
        this.phaseText.setOrigin(0, 0.5);
        this.container.add(this.phaseText);
    }
    
    createTimerBar() {
        // Time remaining bar
        this.timerBg = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 50, 150, 10, 0x333333, 0.8);
        this.timerBg.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.timerBg);
        
        this.timerBar = this.scene.add.rectangle(0, 50, 150, 10, 0x4488ff, 1);
        this.timerBar.setOrigin(0);
        this.container.add(this.timerBar);
    }
    
    createEffectsList() {
        // Active effects
        this.effectsText = this.scene.add.text(0, 70, '', {
            font: '10px Arial',
            fill: '#aaaaaa'
        });
        this.container.add(this.effectsText);
    }
    
    update(delta) {
        // Update timer bar
        const progress = this.sapCycle.getPhaseProgress();
        this.timerBar.width = 150 * progress;
        
        // Update effects list
        const phase = this.sapCycle.getCurrentPhase();
        const effects = phase.effects;
        
        const effectsText = [
            `Damage: ${(effects.damageMultiplier * 100).toFixed(0)}%`,
            `Healing: ${(effects.healingMultiplier * 100).toFixed(0)}%`,
            `Speed: ${(effects.movementSpeed * 100).toFixed(0)}%`
        ].join('\n');
        
        this.effectsText.setText(effectsText);
        
        // Warning flash when phase ending
        if (progress < 0.1) {
            this.phaseBg.setAlpha(0.5 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.01) * 0.3);
        }
    }
    
    onPhaseChanged(newPhase) {
        // Update UI colors
        const phaseData = this.sapCycle.phases.get(newPhase);
        
        this.phaseBg.setFillStyle(
            parseInt(phaseData.color.replace('#', '0x')),
            0.7
        );
        
        this.timerBar.setFillStyle(
            parseInt(phaseData.color.replace('#', '0x')),
            1
        );
        
        this.phaseText.setText(phaseData.name);
        
        // Animate transition
        this.scene.tweens.add({
            targets: this.container,
            alpha: 0,
            duration: 200,
            yoyo: true,
            onComplete: () => {
                this.container.setAlpha(1);
            }
        });
    }
}
Tool 14: Save System Integration
javascript
// In GameScene.create()

this.saveSystem.registerCollector('sapCycle',
    // Collect
    () => ({
        currentPhase: this.sapCycleSystem.currentPhase,
        timeRemaining: this.sapCycleSystem.timeRemaining,
        cycleCount: this.sapCycleSystem.cycleCount
    }),
    // Restore
    (data) => {
        this.sapCycleSystem.setPhase(data.currentPhase);
        this.sapCycleSystem.timeRemaining = data.timeRemaining;
        this.sapCycleSystem.cycleCount = data.cycleCount;
    }
);
Tool 24: Performance Profiling
javascript
// In SapCycleSystem.update()

update(delta) {
    // Mark profiling section
    this.scene.profiler.mark('sapcycle-start');
    
    // Update timer
    this.timeRemaining -= delta;
    
    if (this.timeRemaining <= 0) {
        this.transitionPhase();
    }
    
    // Update effects
    this.applyPhaseEffects();
    
    // Measure performance
    this.scene.profiler.mark('sapcycle-end');
    this.scene.profiler.measure('sapcycle-update', 'sapcycle-start', 'sapcycle-end');
}

Tool 29: Analytics Tracking
javascript
// Track sap cycle transitions
transitionPhase() {
    const oldPhase = this.currentPhase;
    this.currentPhase = this.getNextPhase();
    this.timeRemaining = this.phases.get(this.currentPhase).duration;
    this.cycleCount++;
    
    // Track analytics
    this.scene.analytics.trackEvent('sap_phase_changed', {
        fromPhase: oldPhase,
        toPhase: this.currentPhase,
        cycleCount: this.cycleCount,
        playerLevel: this.scene.player.level
    });
    
    // Create transition effect
    this.createPhaseTransitionEffect(oldPhase, this.currentPhase);
    
    // Update lighting
    this.updateLighting(this.currentPhase);
    
    // Emit event
    this.events.emit('phase-changed', this.currentPhase);
}
THIS IS HOW ALL 30 TOOLS INTEGRATE!
Every feature in Verdance touches multiple systems:

Data-Driven (Tool 1) defines behavior
Scene Editor (Tool 15) places objects
Prefabs (Tool 20) enable reuse
Addressables (Tool 26) load dynamically
Save System (Tool 14) persists state
Localization (Tool 28) translates text
Analytics (Tool 29) tracks behavior
Performance Profiler (Tool 24) optimizes
Testing (Tool 30) validates functionality

// src/systems/DataDrivenSystem.js
// [Copy full implementation from Tool 1]

// Then create data schema for existing enemies
// src/data/schema/enemy.schema.json
{
    "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
    "type": "object",
    "required": ["id", "name", "type", "stats"],
    "properties": {
        "id": { "type": "string" },
        "name": { "type": "string" },
        "type": { "enum": ["melee", "ranged", "magic", "boss"] },
        "stats": {
            "type": "object",
            "required": ["health", "attack", "defense"],
            "properties": {
                "health": { "type": "number", "minimum": 1 },
                "attack": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0 },
                "defense": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0 },
                "speed": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0 }
            }
        },
        "ai": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
                "behavior": { 
                    "enum": ["passive", "aggressive", "tactical", "berserker"] 
                },
                "detectionRange": { "type": "number" },
                "attackRange": { "type": "number" }
            }
        }
    }
}
Step 2: Migrate First Enemy to Data-Driven Format
javascript
// OLD CODE (src/enemies/Goblin.js)
class Goblin extends Enemy {
    constructor(scene, x, y) {
        super(scene, x, y, 'goblin');
        this.health = 50;
        this.maxHealth = 50;
        this.attack = 12;
        this.defense = 8;
        this.speed = 15;
        this.aiType = 'aggressive';
        this.detectionRange = 200;
    }
    
    update() {
        // ... AI logic hardcoded
    }
}

// NEW DATA (src/data/enemies/goblin.json)
{
    "id": "enemy_goblin",
    "name": "Goblin Warrior",
    "type": "melee",
    "stats": {
        "health": 50,
        "attack": 12,
        "defense": 8,
        "speed": 15
    },
    "ai": {
        "behavior": "aggressive",
        "detectionRange": 200,
        "attackRange": 50
    },
    "sprite": {
        "texture": "goblin",
        "scale": 1.0
    },
    "loot": {
        "gold": { "min": 10, "max": 25 },
        "items": ["health_potion"]
    }
}

// NEW CODE (src/entities/Enemy.js)
class Enemy {
    constructor(scene, x, y, dataId) {
        this.scene = scene;
        
        // Load data from DataDrivenSystem
        const data = scene.dataDriven.getEntityData(dataId);
        
        // Create sprite
        this.sprite = scene.add.sprite(x, y, data.sprite.texture);
        this.sprite.setScale(data.sprite.scale);
        
        // Initialize stats from data
        this.stats = { ...data.stats };
        this.health = this.stats.health;
        this.maxHealth = this.stats.health;
        
        // Store AI config
        this.aiConfig = data.ai;
        
        // Store loot table
        this.lootTable = data.loot;
    }
    
    update(time, delta) {
        // Use generic AI system
        this.scene.aiSystem.update(this, this.aiConfig, delta);
    }
}
Step 3: Create Migration Script for All Enemies
javascript
// migration/scripts/migrate-enemies.js

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';

const ENEMIES_SOURCE = './src/enemies';
const ENEMIES_DATA = './src/data/enemies';

// Map of old enemy classes to new data format
const ENEMY_MIGRATIONS = {
    'Goblin.js': {
        id: 'enemy_goblin',
        name: 'Goblin Warrior',
        extractStats: (code) => {
            // Parse old code to extract stats
            const healthMatch = code.match(/this\.health\s*=\s*(\d+)/);
            const attackMatch = code.match(/this\.attack\s*=\s*(\d+)/);
            
            return {
                health: parseInt(healthMatch[1]),
                attack: parseInt(attackMatch[1]),
                // ... extract other stats
            };
        }
    },
    // ... map all 22 enemies
};

async function migrateEnemies() {
    console.log('Starting enemy migration...');
    
    for (const [filename, migration] of Object.entries(ENEMY_MIGRATIONS)) {
        const sourcePath = path.join(ENEMIES_SOURCE, filename);
        const sourceCode = fs.readFileSync(sourcePath, 'utf8');
        
        // Extract stats from old code
        const stats = migration.extractStats(sourceCode);
        
        // Create new data file
        const enemyData = {
            id: migration.id,
            name: migration.name,
            type: 'melee', // Manual classification
            stats: stats,
            ai: {
                behavior: 'aggressive', // Extract from code
                detectionRange: 200
            }
        };
        
        // Write JSON
        const dataPath = path.join(ENEMIES_DATA, `${migration.id}.json`);
        fs.writeFileSync(dataPath, JSON.stringify(enemyData, null, 2));
        
        console.log(`✓ Migrated ${filename} -> ${migration.id}.json`);
    }
    
    console.log('Enemy migration complete!');
}

migrateEnemies();

// migration/SaveDataAudit.js

export const SAVE_DATA_REQUIREMENTS = {
    player: {
        current: 'Stored in Player class properties',
        required: [
            'position (x, y)',
            'health, maxHealth',
            'level, experience',
            'stats (attack, defense, speed)',
            'equipped items',
            'inventory',
            'skill points',
            'unlocked skills'
        ],
        complexity: 'high',
        implementation: 'Create PlayerSaveCollector'
    },
    
    equipment: {
        current: 'Lost on refresh',
        required: [
            'enhancement levels',
            'set bonuses active',
            'durability',
            'sockets/gems'
        ],
        complexity: 'medium',
        implementation: 'Create EquipmentSaveCollector'
    },

        current: 'Not persisted',
        required: [
            'prestige level',
            'unlocked perks',
            'completed achievements',
            'quest progress'
        ],
        complexity: 'low',
        implementation: 'Create ProgressionSaveCollector'
    },
    
    world: {
        current: 'Resets every load',
        required: [
            'defeated enemies',
            'opened chests',
            'discovered locations',
            'NPC states'
        ],
        complexity: 'high',
        implementation: 'Create WorldStateSaveCollector'
    }
};
Step 3: Implement First Save Collector
javascript
// src/systems/save-collectors/PlayerSaveCollector.js

export class PlayerSaveCollector {
    constructor(player) {
        this.player = player;
    }
    
    collect() {
        return {
            // Transform
            position: {
                x: this.player.sprite.x,
                y: this.player.sprite.y
            },
            
            // Stats
            health: this.player.health,
            maxHealth: this.player.maxHealth,
            level: this.player.level,
            experience: this.player.experience,
            
            stats: {
                attack: this.player.stats.attack,
                defense: this.player.stats.defense,
                speed: this.player.stats.speed
            },
            
            // Equipment
            equipment: {
                weapon: this.player.equipment.weapon?.id || null,
                armor: this.player.equipment.armor?.id || null,
                accessory: this.player.equipment.accessory?.id || null
            },
            
            // Inventory
            inventory: this.player.inventory.items.map(item => ({
                id: item.id,
                quantity: item.quantity,
                enhancementLevel: item.enhancementLevel || 0
            })),
            
            // Skills
            skills: {
                points: this.player.skillPoints,
                unlocked: this.player.unlockedSkills.map(s => s.id)
            }
        };
    }
    
    restore(data) {
        // Transform
        this.player.sprite.setPosition(data.position.x, data.position.y);
        
        // Stats
        this.player.health = data.health;
        this.player.maxHealth = data.maxHealth;
        this.player.level = data.level;
        this.player.experience = data.experience;
        
        this.player.stats = { ...data.stats };
        
        // Equipment
        if (data.equipment.weapon) {
            const weaponData = this.player.scene.dataDriven.getItemData(data.equipment.weapon);
            this.player.equip('weapon', weaponData);
        }
        
        // Inventory
        this.player.inventory.clear();
        data.inventory.forEach(itemData => {
            const item = this.player.scene.dataDriven.getItemData(itemData.id);
            item.quantity = itemData.quantity;
            item.enhancementLevel = itemData.enhancementLevel;
            this.player.inventory.add(item);
        });
        
        // Skills
        this.player.skillPoints = data.skills.points;
        data.skills.unlocked.forEach(skillId => {
            this.player.unlockSkill(skillId);
        });
    }
}
Step 4: Integrate Save System into GameScene
javascript
// src/scenes/GameScene.js

import SaveSystem from '../systems/SaveSystem.js';
import { PlayerSaveCollector } from '../systems/save-collectors/PlayerSaveCollector.js';

export default class GameScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    create() {
        // ... existing setup ...
        
        // Initialize save system
        this.saveSystem = new SaveSystem(this);
        
        // Register collectors
        const playerCollector = new PlayerSaveCollector(this.player);
        
        this.saveSystem.registerCollector(
            'player',
            () => playerCollector.collect(),
            (data) => playerCollector.restore(data)
        );
        
        // Setup autosave
        this.saveSystem.enableAutosave(300000); // Every 5 minutes
        
        // Setup keyboard shortcuts
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F5', () => {
            this.saveSystem.quickSave();
            this.showNotification('Game Saved', 'success');
        });
        
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F9', () => {
            this.saveSystem.quickLoad();
            this.showNotification('Game Loaded', 'info');
        });
        
        // Try to load auto-save on startup
        if (this.saveSystem.hasSave('autosave')) {
            const shouldLoad = confirm('Continue from autosave?');
            if (shouldLoad) {
                this.saveSystem.load('autosave');
            }
        }
    }
}
Day 96: Install Tool 26 (Addressables System)
Step 1: Create Asset Manifest
javascript
// migration/scripts/generate-asset-manifest.js

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { glob } from 'glob';

async function generateManifest() {
    const manifest = {
        version: '1.0.0',
        assets: [],
        bundles: []
    };
    
    // Scan assets directory
    const assetFiles = await glob('public/assets/**/*.*');
    
    for (const file of assetFiles) {
        const relativePath = file.replace('public/', '');
        const ext = path.extname(file).toLowerCase();
        
        // Determine asset type
        let type = 'unknown';
        if (['.png', '.jpg', '.jpeg', '.webp'].includes(ext)) {
            type = 'texture';
        } else if (['.mp3', '.ogg', '.wav'].includes(ext)) {
            type = 'audio';
        } else if (ext === '.json') {
            type = 'json';
        }
        
        // Get file size
        const stats = fs.statSync(file);
        
        // Create address (e.g., sprites.goblin)
        const address = relativePath
            .replace('assets/', '')
            .replace(/\//g, '.')
            .replace(ext, '');
        
        manifest.assets.push({
            address: address,
            type: type,
            path: relativePath,
            size: stats.size,
            bundle: determineBundleFromPath(relativePath)
        });
    }
    
    // Create bundles
    const bundles = {};
    manifest.assets.forEach(asset => {
        if (!bundles[asset.bundle]) {
            bundles[asset.bundle] = [];
        }
        bundles[asset.bundle].push(asset.address);
    });
    
    manifest.bundles = Object.entries(bundles).map(([id, addresses]) => ({
        id,
        addresses
    }));
    
    // Write manifest
    fs.writeFileSync(
        'public/assets/asset_manifest.json',
        JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)
    );
    
    console.log(`Generated manifest with ${manifest.assets.length} assets`);
    console.log(`Created ${manifest.bundles.length} bundles`);
}

function determineBundleFromPath(path) {
    if (path.includes('sprites/')) return 'sprites';
    if (path.includes('audio/')) return 'audio';
    if (path.includes('ui/')) return 'ui';
    if (path.includes('effects/')) return 'effects';
    return 'common';
}

generateManifest();

    });

Day 97-98: Install Scene Editor (Tool 15)
Step 1: Install Integrated Scene Editor
javascript
// src/scenes/EditorScene.js

import IntegratedSceneEditor from '../tools/IntegratedSceneEditor.js';

export default class EditorScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    constructor() {
        super('EditorScene');
    }
    
    create() {
        // Get game scene reference
        this.gameScene = this.scene.get('GameScene');
        
        // Initialize editor
        this.editor = new IntegratedSceneEditor(this);
        
        // Load current game objects from GameScene
        this.importGameSceneObjects();
        
        // Setup shortcuts
        this.setupShortcuts();
    }
    
    importGameSceneObjects() {
        // Convert existing game objects to SceneObjects
        const gameObjects = this.gameScene.children.list;
        
        gameObjects.forEach(obj => {
            if (obj.type === 'Sprite' || obj.type === 'Image') {
                const sceneObject = this.editor.createSceneObject('sprite', {
                    x: obj.x,
                    y: obj.y
                });
                
                sceneObject.addComponent('sprite', {
                    texture: obj.texture.key,
                    frame: obj.frame.name
                });
                
                sceneObject.addComponent('transform', {
                    rotation: obj.rotation,
                    scaleX: obj.scaleX,
                    scaleY: obj.scaleY
                });
                
                this.editor.sceneObjects.push(sceneObject);
            }
        });
        
        this.editor.sceneViewCanvas.refresh();
    }
    
    setupShortcuts() {
        // F2: Toggle editor
        this.game.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F2', () => {
            if (this.editor.container.visible) {
                this.editor.close();
                this.scene.resume('GameScene');
            } else {
                this.scene.pause('GameScene');
                this.editor.open();
            }
        });
        
        // Ctrl+S: Save scene
        this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-S', (event) => {
            if (event.ctrlKey) {
                this.editor.saveScene();
            }
        });
    }
}

Day 99-100: Install Prefab System (Tool 20)
Step 1: Convert Existing Enemy to Prefab
javascript
// migration/scripts/create-enemy-prefabs.js

import PrefabSystem from '../src/prefabs/PrefabSystem.js';
import fs from 'fs';

async function createEnemyPrefabs() {
    // Load enemy data
    const enemyFiles = fs.readdirSync('src/data/enemies');
    
    for (const file of enemyFiles) {
        const enemyData = JSON.parse(
            fs.readFileSync(`src/data/enemies/${file}`, 'utf8')
        );
        
        // Create prefab definition
        const prefab = {
            id: `prefab_${enemyData.id}`,
            name: enemyData.name,
            data: {
                type: 'sprite',
                transform: { x: 0, y: 0, rotation: 0, scaleX: 1, scaleY: 1 },
                components: [
                    {
                        type: 'sprite',
                        data: {
                            texture: enemyData.sprite.texture,
                            frame: 0
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'health',
                        data: {
                            current: enemyData.stats.health,
                            max: enemyData.stats.health
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'stats',
                        data: enemyData.stats
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'ai',
                        data: enemyData.ai
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'collider',
                        data: {
                            type: 'circle',
                            radius: 16
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        type: 'loot',
                        data: enemyData.loot
                    }
                ],
                children: [],
                active: true,
                visible: true
            },
            tags: ['enemy', enemyData.type],
            variant: null
        };
        
        // Save prefab
        fs.mkdirSync('src/prefabs/registry/enemies', { recursive: true });
        fs.writeFileSync(
            `src/prefabs/registry/enemies/${enemyData.id}.json`,
            JSON.stringify(prefab, null, 2)
        );
        
        console.log(`✓ Created prefab: ${enemyData.id}`);
    }
}

createEnemyPrefabs();
Step 2: Update Enemy Spawning
javascript
// OLD CODE (GameScene.js)
spawnEnemy(type, x, y) {
    const enemy = new Goblin(this, x, y);
    this.enemies.push(enemy);
    return enemy;
}

// NEW CODE (GameScene.js)
async spawnEnemy(prefabId, x, y) {
    // Load prefab data
    const prefabData = await this.addressables.loadAsset(`prefabs.enemies.${prefabId}`);
    
    // Instantiate prefab
    const enemy = this.prefabSystem.instantiate(prefabData.id, { x, y });
    
    // Add to scene
    this.enemies.push(enemy);
    this.children.add(enemy.sprite);
    
    // Setup physics
    this.physics.add.existing(enemy.sprite);
    
    return enemy;
}

// Usage

class CombatSystem {

        this.scene.profiler?.mark('combat-damage-end');

Step 2: Write First Test Suite
javascript
// tests/integration/combat.test.js

import TestingFramework from '../../src/tools/TestingFramework.js';
import GameScene from '../../src/scenes/GameScene.js';
import Phaser from 'phaser';

// Setup test environment
const config = {
    type: Phaser.HEADLESS,
    width: 800,
    height: 600,
    scene: [GameScene],
    physics: {
        default: 'arcade',
        arcade: { debug: false }
    }
};

const game = new Phaser.Game(config);
const scene = game.scene.scenes[0];

const testing = new TestingFramework(scene);

// Test suite
testing.describe('Combat System', () => {
    let player;
    let enemy;
    let combatSystem;
    
    testing.beforeEach(() => {
        player = scene.player;
        enemy = scene.spawnEnemy('enemy_goblin', 500, 300);
        combatSystem = scene.combatSystem;
        
        // Reset to known state
        player.health = 100;
        enemy.health = 50;
    });
    
    testing.afterEach(() => {
        // Clean up
        enemy.sprite.destroy();
    });
    
    testing.it('should calculate damage correctly', () => {
        const damage = combatSystem.calculateDamage(player, enemy);
        
        // Player attack (12) - Enemy defense (8) = 4 damage
        testing.expect(damage).toBe(4);
    });
    
    testing.it('should apply damage to enemy', () => {
        const initialHealth = enemy.health;
        
        combatSystem.attack(player, enemy);
        
        testing.expect(enemy.health).toBeLessThan(initialHealth);
    });
    
    testing.it('should trigger death when health reaches 0', () => {
        let deathTriggered = false;
        
        enemy.events.on('death', () => {
            deathTriggered = true;
        });
        
        enemy.health = 1;
        combatSystem.attack(player, enemy);
        
        testing.expect(deathTriggered).toBe(true);
    });
    
    testing.it('should apply combo bonuses', () => {
        // Set up combo state
        player.comboCount = 3;
        
        const baseDamage = combatSystem.calculateDamage(player, enemy);
        const comboDamage = combatSystem.calculateDamage(player, enemy, { combo: true });
        
        testing.expect(comboDamage).toBeGreaterThan(baseDamage);
    });
    
    testing.it('should save/load combat state', async () => {
        // Set up combat state
        player.health = 75;
        enemy.health = 30;
        combatSystem.activeEffects = ['poison', 'burn'];
        
        // Save
        await scene.saveSystem.save(1);
        
        // Modify state
        player.health = 100;
        enemy.health = 50;
        combatSystem.activeEffects = [];
        
        // Load
        await scene.saveSystem.load(1);
        
        // Verify restored state
        testing.expect(player.health).toBe(75);
        testing.expect(enemy.health).toBe(30);
        testing.expect(combatSystem.activeEffects).toContain('poison');
    });
});

// Run tests
testing.runAll();

Day 104-105: Install Tilemap Editor (Tool 19)
Step 1: Create First Tilemap
javascript
// In EditorScene, accessible via F3

this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F3', () => {
    if (!this.tilemapEditor) {
        this.tilemapEditor = new TilemapEditor(this);
    }
    this.tilemapEditor.open();
});

// Steps to create tilemap:
// 1. Press F3 to open Tilemap Editor
// 2. Click "Load Tileset"
// 3. Select texture: "terrain_tiles"
// 4. Paint ground layer
// 5. Paint walls layer
// 6. Paint decoration layer
// 7. Add collision layer
// 8. Export
Step 2: Load Tilemap in GameScene
javascript
// src/scenes/GameScene.js

async createLevel(levelId) {
    // Load tilemap data from addressables
    const tilemapData = await this.addressables.loadAsset(`levels.${levelId}`);
    
    // Use Tilemap Editor's export format
    const { gridConfig, layers } = tilemapData;
    
    this.map = this.make.tilemap({
        tileWidth: gridConfig.cellWidth,
        tileHeight: gridConfig.cellHeight,
        width: 100,
        height: 100
    });
    
    const tileset = this.map.addTilesetImage('terrain', 'terrain_tiles');
    
    layers.forEach(layerData => {
        const layer = this.map.createBlankLayer(layerData.name, tileset);
        layer.setDepth(layerData.zIndex);
        
        // Place tiles
        layerData.tiles.forEach(tile => {
            layer.putTileAt(tile.tileId, tile.x, tile.y);
        });
        
        // Setup collision (if collision layer)
        if (layerData.name === 'Collision') {
            layer.setCollisionByExclusion([-1]);
            this.physics.add.collider(this.player.sprite, layer);
        }
    });
}

// In EditorScene (F5)
this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F5', () => {
    if (!this.skillTreeEditor) {
        this.skillTreeEditor = new VisualSkillTreeEditor(this);
    }
    
    // Load existing skill data
    const skills = this.cache.json.get('skills_data');
    this.skillTreeEditor.importSkillTree(skills);
    
    this.skillTreeEditor.open();
});
Step 2: Migrate Skill System
javascript
// OLD CODE
class SkillTree {
    constructor(player) {
        this.skills = [
            { id: 'fireball', name: 'Fireball', prereq: null },
            { id: 'inferno', name: 'Inferno', prereq: 'fireball' },
            // ... 40 skills hardcoded
        ];
    }
}

// NEW CODE - Load from editor export
class SkillTree {
    constructor(scene, player) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.player = player;
        this.loadSkillTree();
    }
    
    async loadSkillTree() {
        const treeData = await this.scene.addressables.loadAsset('skills.main_tree');
        
        this.nodes = treeData.nodes.map(nodeData => ({
            id: nodeData.id,
            name: nodeData.name,
            description: nodeData.description,
            cost: nodeData.cost,
            prerequisites: nodeData.connections
                .filter(c => c.type === 'requires')
                .map(c => c.targetId),
            effects: nodeData.effects
        }));
    }
}
Day 110: Install Localization System (Tool 28)
Step 1: Extract All Text Strings
javascript
// migration/scripts/extract-strings.js

import fs from 'fs';
import { glob } from 'glob';

async function extractStrings() {
    const strings = new Map();
    
    // Find all .js files
    const files = await glob('src/**/*.js');
    
    for (const file of files) {
        const content = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8');
        
        // Find text() calls
        const textMatches = content.matchAll(/\.text\(['"](.*?)['"]/g);
        for (const match of textMatches) {
            const text = match[1];
            if (text.length > 0) {
                // Generate key
                const key = generateKey(text);
                strings.set(key, text);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Create en.json
    const enStrings = {};
    strings.forEach((value, key) => {
        enStrings[key] = value;
    });
    
    fs.writeFileSync(
        'public/localization/en.json',
        JSON.stringify(enStrings, null, 2)
    );
    
    console.log(`Extracted ${strings.size} strings`);
}

function generateKey(text) {
    return 'ui.' + text
        .toLowerCase()
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '_')
        .substring(0, 50);
}

extractStrings();
Step 2: Replace Hardcoded Strings
javascript
// OLD CODE
this.add.text(100, 100, 'Health: 100');
this.add.text(100, 120, 'Attack: 25');

// NEW CODE
this.add.text(100, 100, this.localization.get('ui.health', { value: 100 }));
this.add.text(100, 120, this.localization.get('ui.attack', { value: 25 }));

// Or use tracked text

Step 3: Image Optimization Script
javascript
// migration/scripts/optimize-images.js

import sharp from 'sharp';
import { glob } from 'glob';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';

async function optimizeImages() {
    const images = await glob('public/assets/**/*.{png,jpg,jpeg}');
    
    for (const imagePath of images) {
        const outputPath = imagePath.replace('public/', 'dist/');
        const dir = path.dirname(outputPath);
        
        fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
        
        // Convert to WebP
        await sharp(imagePath)
            .webp({ quality: 80 })
            .toFile(outputPath.replace(/\.(png|jpg|jpeg)$/, '.webp'));
        
        // Also create lower resolutions
        await sharp(imagePath)
            .resize({ width: 512 })
            .webp({ quality: 80 })
            .toFile(outputPath.replace(/\.(png|jpg|jpeg)$/, '@0.5x.webp'));
        
        console.log(`✓ Optimized: ${imagePath}`);
    }
}

optimizeImages();
Day 113-114: Level Streaming Implementation (Tool 27)
Step 1: Define Level Chunks
javascript
// src/scenes/GameScene.js

import LevelStreamingSystem from '../systems/LevelStreamingSystem.js';

create() {
    // ... existing code ...
    
    // Initialize level streaming
    this.levelStreaming = new LevelStreamingSystem(this);
    this.levelStreaming.addressables = this.addressables;
    
    // Define world chunks (10x10 grid, 1000px per chunk)
    this.levelStreaming.defineChunkGrid(10, 1000, (col, row) => {
        // Return assets needed for this chunk
        const assets = [];
        
        // Tilemap chunk
        assets.push(`levels.chunks.chunk_${col}_${row}`);
        
        // Enemies for this zone
        if (row < 3) {
            assets.push('prefabs.enemies.goblin');
        } else if (row < 6) {
            assets.push('prefabs.enemies.orc');
        } else {
            assets.push('prefabs.enemies.dragon');
        }
        
        return assets;
    });
    
    // Set streaming distances
    this.levelStreaming.setLoadDistance(1500);   // Load chunks within 1500px
    this.levelStreaming.setUnloadDistance(2500); // Unload beyond 2500px
    
    // Preload starting chunks
    this.levelStreaming.preloadChunks([
        'chunk_0_0',
        'chunk_1_0',
        'chunk_0_1',
        'chunk_1_1'
    ]);
}

update(time, delta) {
    // Update player position for streaming
    this.levelStreaming.setPlayerPosition(
        this.player.sprite.x,
        this.player.sprite.y
    );
    
    // Level streaming automatically loads/unloads chunks
}

Day 115-116: Analytics Integration (Tool 29)
Step 1: Track Key Events
javascript
// src/scenes/GameScene.js

create() {
    // Initialize analytics (already in BootScene)
    this.analytics = this.registry.get('analytics');
    
    // Track game events
    this.setupAnalytics();
}

setupAnalytics() {
    // Player events
    this.player.events.on('level_up', (newLevel) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('player_level_up', {
            level: newLevel,
            playTime: this.getPlayTime()
        });
    });
    
    this.player.events.on('died', (cause) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('player_death', {
            cause: cause,
            level: this.player.level,
            location: {
                x: this.player.sprite.x,
                y: this.player.sprite.y
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Combat events
    this.events.on('enemy_killed', (enemyType) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('enemy_killed', {
            enemyType: enemyType,
            playerLevel: this.player.level
        });
    });
    
    this.events.on('combat_started', (enemyType) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('combat_started', {
            enemyType: enemyType
        });
    });
    
    // Item events
    this.events.on('item_equipped', (itemId) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('item_equipped', {
            itemId: itemId,
            enhancementLevel: item.enhancementLevel
        });
    });
    
    this.events.on('item_enhanced', (itemId, level) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('item_enhanced', {
            itemId: itemId,
            level: level
        });
    });
    
    // Progression events
    this.progressionSystem.events.on('quest_completed', (questId) => {
        this.analytics.trackEvent('quest_completed', {
            questId: questId,
            playerLevel: this.player.level
        });
    });
    
    this.progressionSystem.events.on('achievement_unlocked', (achievementId) => {
        this.analytics.trackAchievement(achievementId);
    });
}

Step 1: Configure Vite HMR
javascript
// vite.config.js

export default defineConfig({
    server: {
        hmr: {
            overlay: true
        }
    },
    
    plugins: [
        {
            name: 'phaser-hmr',
            handleHotUpdate({ file, server }) {
                if (file.endsWith('.json')) {
                    // Reload JSON data
                    server.ws.send({
                        type: 'custom',
                        event: 'json-update',
                        data: { file }
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    ]
});

// src/systems/HotReloadSystem.js

if (import.meta.hot) {
    import.meta.hot.on('json-update', (data) => {
        console.log('[HMR] Reloading JSON:', data.file);
        
        // Reload enemy data
        if (data.file.includes('enemies/')) {
            this.reloadEnemyData(data.file);
        }
        
        // Reload item data
        if (data.file.includes('items/')) {
            this.reloadItemData(data.file);

    });

Day 118-119: Remove Old Code

// migration/scripts/cleanup-old-code.js

import fs from 'fs';
import { glob } from 'glob';

async function cleanupOldCode() {
    // Files to remove
    const oldFiles = [
        'src/enemies/*.js',        // Now using prefabs
        'src/old-combat/*.js',     // Replaced by new CombatSystem
        'src/hardcoded-data/*.js'  // Now using JSON
    ];
    
    for (const pattern of oldFiles) {
        const files = await glob(pattern);
        
        for (const file of files) {
            // Archive instead of delete
            const archivePath = file.replace('src/', 'archive/');
            fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(archivePath), { recursive: true });
            fs.renameSync(file, archivePath);
            
            console.log(`✓ Archived: ${file}`);
        }
    }
    
    console.log('Cleanup complete!');
}

Step 2: Optimize Based on Profiling
javascript
// Common optimizations:

// 1. Object pooling for particles
class ParticlePool {
    constructor(size) {
        this.pool = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < size; i++) {
            this.pool.push(this.createParticle());
        }
    }
    
    get() {
        return this.pool.pop() || this.createParticle();
    }
    
    release(particle) {
        particle.setVisible(false);
        this.pool.push(particle);
    }
}

// 2. Spatial hashing for collision detection
class SpatialHash {
    constructor(cellSize) {
        this.cellSize = cellSize;
        this.grid = new Map();
    }
    
    insert(obj) {
        const cell = this.getCell(obj.x, obj.y);
        if (!this.grid.has(cell)) {
            this.grid.set(cell, []);
        }
        this.grid.get(cell).push(obj);
    }
    
    getNearby(x, y) {
        const cell = this.getCell(x, y);
        return this.grid.get(cell) || [];
    }
}

// 3. Batch sprite updates
update() {
    // Instead of updating each sprite individually
    this.enemies.forEach(enemy => {
        enemy.update(); // Slow
    });
    
    // Batch updates
    this.batchUpdateEnemies(this.enemies); // Fast
}
Day 124: Documentation & Knowledge Transfer
Create Developer Guide
markdown
# Verdance Developer Guide

## Project Structure

- `src/systems/` - Core game systems
- `src/entities/` - Game objects (Player, Enemy, NPC)
- `src/tools/` - Development tools (editors, profiler)
- `src/data/` - JSON data files (enemies, items, quests)
- `src/prefabs/` - Prefab definitions

## Key Workflows

### Creating a New Enemy

1. Create data file: `src/data/enemies/new_enemy.json`
2. Define stats, AI, loot, sprite
3. Create prefab: `npm run create-prefab enemy new_enemy`
4. Test in editor: Press F2, spawn prefab
5. Adjust in Inspector
6. Save scene

### Creating a New Quest

1. Open Visual Dialogue Editor (F4)
2. Create dialogue tree for quest giver
3. Add quest start action
4. Create quest data: `src/data/quests/new_quest.json`
5. Register with ProgressionSystem
6. Test in game

### Modifying Skill Tree

1. Open Visual Skill Tree Editor (F5)
2. Add new nodes
3. Connect prerequisites
4. Set costs and effects
5. Export
6. Test skill unlocking

## Common Tasks

### Running Tests
```bash
npm run test                # Run all tests
npm run test:watch          # Watch mode
npm run test:coverage       # Coverage report
```

### Building for Production
```bash
npm run optimize:images     # Optimize images
npm run optimize:audio      # Optimize audio
npm run build               # Create production build
npm run preview             # Preview build locally
```

### Profiling Performance

1. Press F1 to open profiler
2. Press R to start recording
3. Play for 30 seconds
4. Press R to stop
5. Review results
6. Export for analysis

## Troubleshooting

### Hot Reload Not Working

- Check vite.config.js HMR settings
- Restart dev server
- Clear browser cache

### Save/Load Issues

- Check console for errors
- Verify all collectors are registered
- Test with SaveSystem.validateSave()

### Performance Issues

- Open profiler (F1)
- Check FPS, memory, draw calls
- Use Performance.mark/measure in code
- Run `npm run build:analyze`

Day 1-2: Build Tool 1 (Data-Driven Architecture)

javascript
// STEP 1: Create the bare minimum
// src/systems/DataDrivenSystem.js

class DataDrivenSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.cache = new Map();
    }
    
    // Just need these 3 functions to start
    async loadData(dataType, id) {
        const data = await fetch(`/data/${dataType}/${id}.json`);
        const json = await data.json();
        this.cache.set(`${dataType}.${id}`, json);
        return json;
    }
    
    getData(dataType, id) {
        return this.cache.get(`${dataType}.${id}`);
    }
    
    getAllData(dataType) {
        const results = [];
        this.cache.forEach((value, key) => {
            if (key.startsWith(dataType + '.')) {
                results.push(value);
            }
        });
        return results;
    }
}

export default DataDrivenSystem;

Day 3-5: Build Tool 14 (Save/Load System)

javascript
// MINIMAL VIABLE SAVE SYSTEM
// src/systems/SaveSystem.js

class SaveSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.collectors = new Map();
    }
    
    registerCollector(key, collectFn, restoreFn) {
        this.collectors.set(key, { collect: collectFn, restore: restoreFn });
    }
    
    save(slot) {
        const saveData = {};
        
        this.collectors.forEach((collector, key) => {
            saveData[key] = collector.collect();
        });
        
        localStorage.setItem(`save_${slot}`, JSON.stringify(saveData));
        console.log('Game saved!');
    }
    
    load(slot) {
        const saveData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(`save_${slot}`));
        
        if (!saveData) return false;
        
        this.collectors.forEach((collector, key) => {
            if (saveData[key]) {
                collector.restore(saveData[key]);
            }
        });
        
        console.log('Game loaded!');
        return true;
    }
}

export default SaveSystem;
Day 6: Use Tool 14 Immediately

javascript
// In GameScene.create()

this.saveSystem = new SaveSystem(this);

// Register player data
this.saveSystem.registerCollector(
    'player',
    () => ({
        x: this.player.x,
        y: this.player.y,
        health: this.player.health
    }),
    (data) => {
        this.player.x = data.x;
        this.player.y = data.y;
        this.player.health = data.health;
    }
);

// F5 to save, F9 to load
this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F5', () => this.saveSystem.save(1));
this.input.keyboard.on('keydown-F9', () => this.saveSystem.load(1));

Day 9-11: Build Tool 20 (Prefab System)

javascript
// SIMPLEST PREFAB SYSTEM THAT WORKS
// src/systems/PrefabSystem.js

class PrefabSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.prefabs = new Map();
    }
    
    // Register a prefab
    register(id, template) {
        this.prefabs.set(id, template);
    }
    
    // Create instance
    spawn(id, x, y) {
        const template = this.prefabs.get(id);
        if (!template) return null;
        
        // Clone template
        const instance = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(template));
        
        // Create sprite
        const sprite = this.scene.add.sprite(x, y, instance.texture);
        sprite.setData('prefabData', instance);
        
        return sprite;
    }
}

export default PrefabSystem;

Day 13-14: Build Tool 24 (Performance Profiler)

javascript
// DEAD SIMPLE PROFILER
// src/tools/PerformanceProfiler.js

class PerformanceProfiler {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.fps = 60;
        this.memory = 0;
        
        // Create HUD
        this.text = scene.add.text(10, 10, '', {
            font: '12px monospace',
            fill: '#00ff00',
            backgroundColor: '#000000'
        });
        this.text.setScrollFactor(0);
        this.text.setDepth(100000);
    }
    
    update() {
        this.fps = this.scene.game.loop.actualFps;
        
        if (performance.memory) {
            this.memory = performance.memory.usedJSHeapSize / 1048576;
        }
        
        this.text.setText([
            `FPS: ${this.fps.toFixed(1)}`,
            `Memory: ${this.memory.toFixed(1)} MB`,
            `Objects: ${this.scene.children.list.length}`
        ]);
    }
}

export default PerformanceProfiler;

}

// Now you can SEE performance in real-time!
Day 16: Build Tool 26 (Addressables - Basic Version)

javascript
// SIMPLE ADDRESSABLE LOADER
// src/systems/AddressablesSystem.js

class AddressablesSystem {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.loaded = new Map();
    }
    
    async load(address) {
        // Check cache
        if (this.loaded.has(address)) {
            return this.loaded.get(address);
        }
        
        // Load from path
        const path = `assets/${address.replace(/\./g, '/')}.json`;
        const response = await fetch(path);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        this.loaded.set(address, data);
        return data;
    }
}

export default AddressablesSystem;
Day 17: Use Tool 26 Immediately

javascript
// Load data by address instead of path
const goblinData = await addressables.load('enemies.goblin');
const swordData = await addressables.load('items.weapons.iron_sword');
const questData = await addressables.load('quests.tutorial.first_quest');

// No more hardcoded paths!
PHASE 2: BUILD TOOLS AS YOU NEED THEM (Weeks 19-24)
The "Feature-Driven Tool Building" Method
When you need to create a level → Build Tool 19 (Tilemap Editor) When you need dialogue → Build Tool 11 (Dialogue Editor) When you need to balance skills → Build Tool 12 (Skill Tree Editor)

Example: Building Tool 19 When You Need It
Week 19, Day 1: "I need to create a forest level"

javascript
// OPTION A: Quick & Dirty (30 minutes)
// Just paint tiles in Tiled map editor, export JSON, load it
// https://www.mapeditor.org/

// OPTION B: Build Simple Tilemap Tool (4 hours)
class SimpleTilemapEditor {
    constructor(scene) {
        this.scene = scene;
        this.selectedTile = 0;
        this.tiles = [];
        
        // Click to paint
        scene.input.on('pointerdown', (pointer) => {
            const tileX = Math.floor(pointer.x / 32);
            const tileY = Math.floor(pointer.y / 32);
            this.tiles.push({ x: tileX, y: tileY, tile: this.selectedTile });
        });
        
        // S to save
        scene.input.keyboard.on('keydown-S', () => {
            console.log('Tilemap:', JSON.stringify(this.tiles));
        });
    }
}

// OPTION C: Build Full Tool 19 (8 hours)
// Only if you're making MANY levels
```

**Decision Tree:**
```
Making 1-2 levels? → Use Tiled (external tool)
Making 5-10 levels? → Build simple editor
Making 20+ levels? → Build full Tool 19
PHASE 3: ADVANCED TOOLS (Weeks 25-28)
Build these only if you have specific problems:

Tool 21 (Collision Editor)
Build When: "I'm spending hours adjusting collision boxes" Time Investment: 6 hours ROI: Saves 20+ hours of manual tweaking

Tool 22 (Hot Reload)
Build When: "I'm refreshing the browser 100 times per day" Time Investment: 4 hours ROI: Saves 30 seconds × 100 = 50 minutes per day

Tool 23 (Build Pipeline)
Build When: "I'm ready to deploy to production" Time Investment: 8 hours ROI: Automated builds, optimized assets

Tool 25 (Visual Scripting)
Build When: "I want non-programmers to create content" Time Investment: 20 hours ROI: Enables designers to work independently

Tool 27 (Level Streaming)
Build When: "My world is so large the game is slow" Time Investment: 8 hours ROI: Smooth performance in huge worlds

Tool 28 (Localization)
Build When: "I want to release in multiple languages" Time Investment: 6 hours ROI: Access to global markets

Tool 29 (Analytics)
Build When: "I need to understand how players play" Time Investment: 4 hours ROI: Data-driven balancing decisions

Tool 30 (Automated Testing)
Build When: "Manual testing takes too long" Time Investment: 10 hours ROI: Catch bugs automatically

STRATEGY 2: TOOL BUILDING SHORTCUTS
Use Existing Tools Instead of Building
Don't Rebuild What Exists
Instead of Building	Use This
Tool 16 (Sprite Slicer)	TexturePacker (free version)
Tool 17 (Atlas Generator)	TexturePacker or Phaser's built-in packer
Tool 19 (Tilemap Editor)	Tiled (free, open source)
Tool 11 (Dialogue Editor)	Yarn Spinner or Twine
Tool 23 (Build Pipeline)	Vite's built-in optimizer
Tool 28 (Localization)	i18next
Tool 29 (Analytics)	Plausible or PostHog
Integration Example
javascript
// Using Tiled instead of building Tool 19

// 1. Create map in Tiled
// 2. Export as JSON
// 3. Load in Phaser

create() {
    // Load Tiled map
    this.load.tilemapTiledJSON('level1', 'maps/level1.json');
    this.load.image('tiles', 'assets/tilesets/forest.png');
    
    const map = this.make.tilemap({ key: 'level1' });
    const tileset = map.addTilesetImage('forest', 'tiles');
    const layer = map.createLayer('Ground', tileset);
}

// Done! No need to build tilemap editor.
STRATEGY 3: THE HYBRID APPROACH (RECOMMENDED!)
Mix Custom Tools with External Tools
Tier 1: Build These (Core to Your Game)

Tool 14 (Save/Load) - Essential feature
Tool 20 (Prefabs) - Workflow efficiency

Tier 2: Use External Tools
Tilemap Editor → Tiled

Build Pipeline → Vite
Total Time: ~1 week to integrate

Tier 3: Build If Needed
Tool 15 (Scene Editor) - if making 50+ scenes
Tool 21 (Collision Editor) - if complex collisions
Tool 25 (Visual Scripting) - if non-programmer team
Tool 27 (Level Streaming) - if world > 100,000 tiles
Total Time: Build on-demand, 4-8 hours each

Tier 4: Skip Entirely (Use Libraries)
Tool 28 (Localization) → i18next library
Tool 29 (Analytics) → PostHog
Tool 30 (Testing) → Vitest
Total Time: ~2 days integration
